In OA-OT, we estimate the parameters of the functional model by optimizing the Kantorovich dual objective. In both approaches, the predicted OT plan is subsequently recovered from the estimated potentials. As amortized OT methods, both RA-OT and OA-OT enable efficient solutions to repeated OT problems across different measure pairs by reusing information learned from prior instances to rapidly approximate new solutions. Moreover, by exploiting the structure provided by sliced OT, the proposed models are more parsimonious, independent of specific structures of the measures, such as the number of atoms in the discrete case, while achieving high accuracy. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approaches on tasks including MNIST digit transport, color transfer, supply-demand transportation on spherical data, and mini-batch OT conditional flow matching.

AI.tldr: 提出两种基于摊销优化的最优传输方法：回归摊销OT（RA-OT）和目标摊销OT（OA-OT），利用切片OT的Kantorovich势能预测多对测度间的OT方案。
AI.motivation: 传统最优传输方法在处理多对测度时需要重复计算，计算成本高。需要开发摊销优化方法，利用先前实例学习的信息快速近似新解，提高计算效率。
AI.method: 1. 回归摊销OT（RA-OT）：建立函数回归模型，将原始OT问题的Kantorovich势能作为响应变量，切片OT获得的势能作为预测变量，通过最小二乘法估计模型参数。2. 目标摊销OT（OA-OT）：通过优化Kantorovich对偶目标函数来估计函数模型参数。两种方法都从估计的势能中恢复预测的OT方案。
AI.result: 提出的RA-OT和OA-OT方法能够高效解决多对测度的重复OT问题，通过重用先前学习的信息快速近似新解。利用切片OT结构使模型更简洁，不依赖于测度的具体结构（如离散情况下的原子数量），同时保持高精度。在MNIST数字传输、颜色迁移、球面数据上的供需运输以及小批量OT条件流匹配等任务中验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的摊销OT方法通过利用切片OT的Kantorovich势能，实现了对多对测度间OT方案的高效预测。两种摊销策略（回归型和目标型）都能显著提高计算效率，同时保持高精度，适用于各种实际应用场景。

title: DigiForest: Digital Analytics and Robotics for Sustainable Forestry
summary: Covering one third of Earth's land surface, forests are vital to global biodiversity, climate regulation, and human well-being. In Europe, forests and woodlands reach approximately 40% of land area, and the forestry sector is central to achieving the EU's climate neutrality and biodiversity goals; these emphasize sustainable forest management, increased use of long-lived wood products, and resilient forest ecosystems. To meet these goals and properly address their inherent challenges, current practices require further innovation. This chapter introduces DigiForest, a novel, large-scale precision forestry approach leveraging digital technologies and autonomous robotics. DigiForest is structured around four main components: (1) autonomous, heterogeneous mobile robots (aerial, legged, and marsupial) for tree-level data collection; (2) automated extraction of tree traits to build forest inventories; (3) a Decision Support System (DSS) for forecasting forest growth and supporting decision-making; and (4) low-impact selective logging using purpose-built autonomous harvesters. These technologies have been extensively validated in real-world conditions in several locations, including forests in Finland, the UK, and Switzerland.

AI.tldr: DigiForest是一个大规模精准林业系统，通过自主机器人、树木性状自动提取、决策支持系统和低影响选择性采伐四大组件，利用数字技术和自主机器人技术实现可持续森林管理。
AI.motivation: 森林覆盖地球三分之一陆地面积，对全球生物多样性、气候调节和人类福祉至关重要。欧洲森林覆盖约40%土地面积，林业部门对实现欧盟气候中和与生物多样性目标具有核心作用。当前实践需要进一步创新以应对可持续森林管理、长效木制品使用和弹性森林生态系统等挑战。
AI.method: DigiForest采用四大组件：1) 自主异构移动机器人（空中、腿式和袋鼠式）进行树木级数据采集；2) 自动提取树木性状以建立森林清单；3) 决策支持系统用于预测森林生长和支持决策制定；4) 使用专用自主采伐机进行低影响选择性采伐。这些技术在芬兰、英国和瑞士等多个地点的真实森林环境中进行了广泛验证。
AI.result: DigiForest技术已在芬兰、英国和瑞士等多个地点的真实森林条件下进行了广泛验证，表明该系统的可行性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: DigiForest通过整合数字技术和自主机器人技术，为大规模精准林业提供了创新解决方案，有助于实现欧盟的气候中和与生物多样性目标，推动可持续森林管理实践。

title: Zero-Shot Retail Theft Detection via Orchestrated Vision Models: A Model-Agnostic, Cost-Effective Alternative to Trained Single-Model Systems
comment: 16 pages, 3 figures, Code to be released at https://github.com/xHaileab/Paza-AI
summary: Retail theft costs the global economy over \$100 billion annually, yet existing AI-based detection systems require expensive custom model training on proprietary datasets and charge \$200-500/month per store. We present Paza, a zero-shot retail theft detection framework that achieves practical concealment detection without training any model. Our approach orchestrates multiple existing models in a layered pipeline - cheap object detection and pose estimation running continuously, with an expensive vision-language model (VLM) invoked only when behavioral pre-filters trigger. A multi-signal suspicion pre-filter (requiring dwell time plus at least one behavioral signal) reduces VLM invocations by 240x compared to per-frame analysis, bounding calls to <=10/minute and enabling a single GPU to serve 10-20 stores. The architecture is model-agnostic: the VLM component accepts any OpenAI-compatible endpoint, enabling operators to swap between models such as Gemma 4, Qwen3.5-Omni, GPT-4o, or future releases without code changes - ensuring the system improves as the VLM landscape evolves. We evaluate the VLM component on the DCSASS synthesized shoplifting dataset (169 clips, controlled environment), achieving 89.5% precision and 92.8% specificity at 59.3% recall zero-shot - where the recall gap is attributable to sparse frame sampling in offline evaluation rather than VLM reasoning failures, as precision and specificity are the operationally critical metrics determining false alarm rates. We present a detailed cost model showing viability at \$50-100/month per store (3-10x cheaper than commercial alternatives), and introduce a privacy-preserving design that obfuscates faces in the detection pipeline. The source code is available at https://github.com/xHaileab/Paza-AI.

AI.tldr: Paza是一个零样本零售盗窃检测框架，通过分层管道协调多个现有模型，无需训练自定义模型，成本仅为商业方案的1/3-1/10
AI.motivation: 解决现有AI盗窃检测系统需要昂贵定制模型训练和专有数据集的问题，降低零售盗窃检测成本（全球每年损失超过1000亿美元），提供更经济实用的解决方案
AI.method: 分层管道架构：廉价的目标检测和姿态估计持续运行，昂贵视觉语言模型（VLM）仅在行为预过滤器触发时调用；多信号怀疑预过滤器（要求停留时间加至少一个行为信号）将VLM调用减少240倍；模型无关设计，VLM组件兼容任何OpenAI兼容端点
AI.result: 在DCSASS合成盗窃数据集上实现89.5%精确率和92.8%特异性，召回率59.3%；成本模型显示每月每店50-100美元（比商业方案便宜3-10倍）；单GPU可服务10-20家店铺；VLM调用限制在≤10次/分钟
AI.conclusion: Paza为零样本零售盗窃检测提供了实用框架，通过智能管道编排显著降低成本，模型无关设计确保系统随VLM技术进步而改进，隐私保护设计模糊人脸，开源代码促进社区发展

title: HyperSpace: A Generalized Framework for Spatial Encoding in Hyperdimensional Representations
summary: Vector Symbolic Architectures (VSAs) provide a well-defined algebraic framework for compositional representations in hyperdimensional spaces. We introduce HyperSpace, an open-source framework that decomposes VSA systems into modular operators for encoding, binding, bundling, similarity, cleanup, and regression. Using HyperSpace, we analyze and benchmark two representative VSA backends: Holographic Reduced Representations (HRR) and Fourier Holographic Reduced Representations (FHRR). Although FHRR provides lower theoretical complexity for individual operations, HyperSpaces modularity reveals that similarity and cleanup dominate runtime in spatial domains. As a result, HRR and FHRR exhibit comparable end-to-end performance. Differences in memory footprint introduce additional deployment trade-offs where HRR requires approximately half the memory of FHRR vectors. By enabling modular, system-level evaluation, HyperSpace reveals practical trade-offs in VSA pipelines that are not apparent from theoretical or operator-level comparisons alone.

AI.tldr: HyperSpace是一个开源框架，将向量符号架构(VSA)系统分解为模块化操作符，用于分析HRR和FHRR两种VSA后端，发现虽然FHRR理论复杂度更低，但相似性和清理操作主导运行时，导致两者端到端性能相当，而HRR内存占用约为FHRR的一半。
AI.motivation: 向量符号架构(VSA)为高维空间中的组合表示提供了明确的代数框架，但现有研究多关注理论或操作级比较，缺乏系统级的实践评估。需要开发模块化框架来分析VSA系统的实际性能权衡。
AI.method: 开发HyperSpace开源框架，将VSA系统分解为编码、绑定、捆绑、相似性、清理和回归等模块化操作符。使用该框架分析和基准测试两种代表性VSA后端：全息简化表示(HRR)和傅里叶全息简化表示(FHRR)。
AI.result: 虽然FHRR在单个操作上具有更低的理论复杂度，但HyperSpace的模块化分析显示相似性和清理操作在空间域中主导运行时，导致HRR和FHRR的端到端性能相当。内存占用方面存在显著差异：HRR向量所需内存约为FHRR的一半。
AI.conclusion: HyperSpace通过模块化、系统级评估揭示了VSA流水线中的实际权衡，这些权衡在单纯的理论或操作级比较中并不明显。框架表明实际部署中需要考虑内存占用和运行时分布，而不仅仅是理论复杂度。

title: A multi-platform LiDAR dataset for standardized forest inventory measurement at long term ecological monitoring sites
summary: We present a curated multi-platform LiDAR reference dataset from an instrumented ICOS forest plot, explicitly designed to support calibration, benchmarking, and integration of 3D structural data with ecological observations and standard allometric models. The dataset integrates UAV-borne laser scanning (ULS) to measure canopy coverage, terrestrial laser scanning (TLS) for detailed stem mapping, and backpack mobile laser scanning (MLS) with real-time SLAM for efficient sub-canopy acquisition. We focus on the control plot with the most complete and internally consistent registration, where TLS point clouds (~333 million points) are complemented by ULS and MLS data capturing canopy and understory strata. Marker-free, SLAM-aware protocols were used to reduce field and processing time, while manual and automated methods were combined. Final products are available in LAZ and E57 formats with UTM coordinates, together with registration reports for reproducibility. The dataset provides a benchmark for testing registration methods, evaluating scanning efficiency, and linking point clouds with segmentation, quantitative structure models, and allometric biomass estimation. By situating the acquisitions at a long-term ICOS site, it is explicitly linked to 3D structure with decades of ecological and flux measurements. More broadly, it illustrates how TLS, MLS, and ULS can be combined for repeated inventories and digital twins of forest ecosystems.

AI.tldr: 该研究构建了一个多平台LiDAR参考数据集，集成了无人机激光扫描(ULS)、地面激光扫描(TLS)和背包移动激光扫描(MLS)，用于森林生态系统的3D结构测量和校准基准。
AI.motivation: 为支持3D结构数据与生态观测和标准异速生长模型的校准、基准测试和集成，需要高质量的参考数据集。现有数据往往缺乏多平台集成和与长期生态观测的明确联系。
AI.method: 在ICOS森林样地采集多平台LiDAR数据：ULS测量冠层覆盖，TLS进行详细树干测绘，MLS采用实时SLAM技术高效获取林下数据。使用无标记、SLAM感知协议减少野外和处理时间，结合手动和自动方法。数据以LAZ和E57格式提供，包含UTM坐标和配准报告。
AI.result: 生成了包含约3.33亿个点的TLS点云，辅以ULS和MLS数据，完整捕捉冠层和林下层次。数据集提供了配准方法测试、扫描效率评估以及点云与分割、定量结构模型和异速生长生物量估算链接的基准。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集展示了如何将TLS、MLS和ULS结合用于森林生态系统的重复清查和数字孪生，通过与ICOS长期生态和通量观测站点的关联，为3D结构与数十年生态测量建立了明确联系。

title: IUQ: Interrogative Uncertainty Quantification for Long-Form Large Language Model Generation
summary: Despite the rapid advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs), uncertainty quantification in LLM generation is a persistent challenge. Although recent approaches have achieved strong performance by restricting LLMs to produce short or constrained answer sets, many real-world applications require long-form and free-form text generation. A key difficulty in this setting is that LLMs often produce responses that are semantically coherent yet factually inaccurate, while the underlying semantics are multifaceted and the linguistic structure is complex. To tackle this challenge, this paper introduces Interrogative Uncertainty Quantification (IUQ), a novel framework that leverages inter-sample consistency and intra-sample faithfulness to quantify the uncertainty in long-form LLM outputs. By utilizing an interrogate-then-respond paradigm, our method provides reliable measures of claim-level uncertainty and the model's faithfulness. Experimental results across diverse model families and model sizes demonstrate the superior performance of IUQ over two widely used long-form generation datasets. The code is available at https://github.com/louisfanhz/IUQ.

AI.tldr: 提出Interrogative Uncertainty Quantification (IUQ)框架，通过样本间一致性和样本内忠实性来量化长文本LLM输出的不确定性，解决LLM生成语义连贯但事实不准确的问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM快速发展，但不确定性量化仍是挑战。现有方法通过限制LLM生成简短或受限答案集表现良好，但许多实际应用需要长文本和自由文本生成。主要困难在于LLM常生成语义连贯但事实不准确的响应，而底层语义多面且语言结构复杂。
AI.method: 引入Interrogative Uncertainty Quantification (IUQ)框架，利用样本间一致性和样本内忠实性来量化长文本LLM输出的不确定性。采用"询问-响应"范式，提供可靠的主张级不确定性和模型忠实性度量。
AI.result: 在不同模型家族和模型规模上的实验结果表明，IUQ在两个广泛使用的长文本生成数据集上表现出优越性能。
AI.conclusion: IUQ框架有效解决了长文本LLM生成的不确定性量化问题，通过结合样本间一致性和样本内忠实性，为LLM输出的可靠性评估提供了新方法。

title: Model-Based Reinforcement Learning Exploits Passive Body Dynamics for High-Performance Biped Robot Locomotion
summary: Embodiment is a significant keyword in recent machine learning fields. This study focused on the passive nature of the body of a biped robot to generate walking and running locomotion using model-based deep reinforcement learning. We constructed two models in a simulator, one with passive elements (e.g., springs) and the other, which is similar to general humanoids, without passive elements. The training of the model with passive elements was highly affected by the attractor of the system. This lead that although the trajectories quickly converged to limit cycles, it took a long time to obtain large rewards. However, thanks to the attractor-driven learning, the acquired locomotion was robust and energy-efficient. The results revealed that robots with passive elements could efficiently acquire high-performance locomotion by utilizing stable limit cycles generated through dynamic interaction between the body and ground. This study demonstrates the importance of implementing passive properties in the body for future embodied AI.

AI.tldr: 利用模型深度强化学习研究双足机器人被动特性对行走和跑步运动生成的影响，发现具有被动元件（如弹簧）的机器人能通过系统吸引子实现更鲁棒、节能的运动。
AI.motivation: 研究机器人被动特性在运动生成中的作用，探索如何通过身体与地面的动态交互实现高效、鲁棒的运动控制，为未来具身AI提供理论基础。
AI.method: 在模拟器中构建两种模型：一种包含被动元件（如弹簧），另一种类似常规人形机器人无被动元件。使用模型深度强化学习训练两种模型生成行走和跑步运动，分析系统吸引子对训练过程的影响。
AI.result: 具有被动元件的模型训练受系统吸引子影响显著，轨迹快速收敛到极限环但获得高奖励耗时较长。然而，通过吸引子驱动的学习获得的运动更加鲁棒且能量效率更高。机器人能利用身体与地面动态交互产生的稳定极限环高效获得高性能运动。
AI.conclusion: 机器人被动元件能促进高效运动控制，通过动态交互产生的稳定极限环实现鲁棒、节能的运动。研究证明了在机器人身体中实现被动特性对未来具身AI发展的重要性。

title: FedIDM: Achieving Fast and Stable Convergence in Byzantine Federated Learning through Iterative Distribution Matching
summary: Most existing Byzantine-robust federated learning (FL) methods suffer from slow and unstable convergence. Moreover, when handling a substantial proportion of colluded malicious clients, achieving robustness typically entails compromising model utility. To address these issues, this work introduces FedIDM, which employs distribution matching to construct trustworthy condensed data for identifying and filtering abnormal clients. FedIDM consists of two main components: (1) attack-tolerant condensed data generation, and (2) robust aggregation with negative contribution-based rejection. These components exclude local updates that (1) deviate from the update direction derived from condensed data, or (2) cause a significant loss on the condensed dataset. Comprehensive evaluations on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that FedIDM achieves fast and stable convergence while maintaining acceptable model utility, under multiple state-of-the-art Byzantine attacks involving a large number of malicious clients.

AI.tldr: FedIDM：一种基于分布匹配的拜占庭鲁棒联邦学习方法，通过生成可信的压缩数据来识别和过滤异常客户端，实现快速稳定收敛
AI.motivation: 现有拜占庭鲁棒联邦学习方法存在收敛慢且不稳定问题，且在大量恶意客户端共谋时，实现鲁棒性通常需要牺牲模型效用
AI.method: FedIDM包含两个核心组件：1) 攻击容忍的压缩数据生成，通过分布匹配构建可信压缩数据；2) 基于负贡献的鲁棒聚合与拒绝机制，排除偏离压缩数据更新方向或导致压缩数据集显著损失的本地更新
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上的综合评估表明，FedIDM在多种最先进的拜占庭攻击下（涉及大量恶意客户端），能够实现快速稳定收敛，同时保持可接受的模型效用
AI.conclusion: FedIDM通过分布匹配和负贡献拒绝机制，有效解决了拜占庭鲁棒联邦学习中收敛慢、不稳定以及鲁棒性与效用权衡的问题

title: NTIRE 2026 Challenge on Video Saliency Prediction: Methods and Results
summary: This paper presents an overview of the NTIRE 2026 Challenge on Video Saliency Prediction. The goal of the challenge participants was to develop automatic saliency map prediction methods for the provided video sequences. The novel dataset of 2,000 diverse videos with an open license was prepared for this challenge. The fixations and corresponding saliency maps were collected using crowdsourced mouse tracking and contain viewing data from over 5,000 assessors. Evaluation was performed on a subset of 800 test videos using generally accepted quality metrics. The challenge attracted over 20 teams making submissions, and 7 teams passed the final phase with code review. All data used in this challenge is made publicly available - https://github.com/msu-video-group/NTIRE26_Saliency_Prediction.

AI.tldr: NTIRE 2026视频显著性预测挑战赛概述，包含2000个多样化视频的新数据集，使用众包鼠标追踪收集了5000多名评估者的注视数据和显著性图，吸引了20多支团队参与，7支通过最终代码审核
AI.motivation: 推动视频显著性预测领域的发展，通过公开挑战赛促进自动显著性图预测方法的创新，并为研究社区提供大规模、多样化的公开数据集
AI.method: 准备包含2000个多样化视频的新数据集，采用众包鼠标追踪技术收集超过5000名评估者的注视数据和对应显著性图，使用800个测试视频子集进行评测，采用公认的质量指标进行评估
AI.result: 挑战赛吸引了超过20支团队提交方案，其中7支团队通过了最终代码审核阶段，所有数据集和相关信息已通过GitHub公开提供
AI.conclusion: NTIRE 2026视频显著性预测挑战赛成功建立了大规模公开数据集，促进了该领域的研究进展，为后续研究提供了基准和资源

title: CT-VIR: Continuous-Time Visual-Inertial-Ranging Fusion for Indoor Localization with Sparse Anchors
summary: Visual-inertial odometry (VIO) is widely used for mobile robot localization, but its long-term accuracy degrades without global constraints. Incorporating ranging sensors such as ultra-wideband (UWB) can mitigate drift; however, high-accuracy ranging usually requires well-deployed anchors, which is difficult to ensure in narrow or low-power environments. Moreover, most existing visual-inertial-ranging (VIR) fusion methods rely on discrete time-based filtering or optimization, making it difficult to balance positioning accuracy, trajectory consistency, and fusion efficiency under asynchronous multi-sensor sampling. To address these issues, we propose a spline-based continuous-time state estimation method for VIR fusion localization. In the preprocessing stage, VIO motion priors and UWB ranging measurements are used to construct virtual anchors and reject outliers, thereby alleviating geometric degeneration and improving range reliability. In the estimation stage, the pose trajectory is parameterized in continuous time using a B-spline, while inertial, visual, and ranging constraints are formulated as factors in a sliding-window graph. The spline control points, together with a small set of auxiliary parameters, are then jointly optimized to obtain a continuous-time trajectory estimate. Evaluations on public datasets and real-world experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and practical potential of the proposed approach.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于样条的连续时间状态估计方法，用于视觉-惯性-测距融合定位，通过虚拟锚点构建和异常值剔除解决几何退化问题，在异步多传感器采样下平衡定位精度、轨迹一致性和融合效率。
AI.motivation: 视觉惯性里程计(VIO)在缺乏全局约束时长期精度会下降，而超宽带(UWB)等测距传感器需要良好部署的锚点，这在狭窄或低功耗环境中难以保证。现有视觉-惯性-测距(VIR)融合方法多基于离散时间滤波或优化，难以在异步多传感器采样下平衡定位精度、轨迹一致性和融合效率。
AI.method: 提出基于样条的连续时间状态估计方法：预处理阶段使用VIO运动先验和UWB测距测量构建虚拟锚点并剔除异常值；估计阶段使用B样条在连续时间上参数化位姿轨迹，将惯性、视觉和测距约束构建为滑动窗口图中的因子，联合优化样条控制点和少量辅助参数以获得连续时间轨迹估计。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和真实世界实验中验证了所提方法的有效性和实际潜力，表明该方法能够有效解决几何退化问题，提高测距可靠性，并在异步多传感器采样下实现良好的定位性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过连续时间参数化和虚拟锚点构建，有效解决了视觉-惯性-测距融合中的几何退化、异常值剔除和异步采样问题，为移动机器人在复杂环境中的鲁棒定位提供了可行方案。

title: From Boundaries to Semantics: Prompt-Guided Multi-Task Learning for Petrographic Thin-section Segmentation
summary: Grain-edge segmentation (GES) and lithology semantic segmentation (LSS) are two pivotal tasks for quantifying rock fabric and composition. However, these two tasks are often treated separately, and the segmentation quality is implausible albeit expensive, time-consuming, and expert-annotated datasets have been used. Recently, foundation models, especially the Segment Anything Model (SAM), have demonstrated impressive robustness for boundary alignment. However, directly adapting SAM to joint GES and LSS is nontrivial due to 1) severe domain gap induced by extinction-dependent color variations and ultra-fine grain boundaries, and 2) lacking novel modules for joint learning on multi-angle petrographic image stacks. In this paper, we propose Petro-SAM, a novel two-stage, multi-task framework that can achieve high-quality joint GES and LSS on petrographic images. Specifically, based on SAM, we introduce a Merge Block to integrate seven polarized views, effectively solving the extinction issue. Moreover, we introduce multi-scale feature fusion and color-entropy priors to refine the detection.

AI.tldr: 提出Petro-SAM框架，基于SAM模型实现岩石薄片图像中颗粒边缘分割(GES)和岩性语义分割(LSS)的高质量联合学习
AI.motivation: 现有方法将GES和LSS视为独立任务，分割质量不理想，且依赖昂贵的人工标注数据。虽然SAM模型在边界对齐方面表现出色，但直接应用于岩石薄片图像存在领域差距和缺乏多角度图像联合学习模块的问题
AI.method: 提出两阶段多任务框架Petro-SAM：1) 基于SAM引入Merge Block整合7个偏振视图解决消光问题；2) 引入多尺度特征融合和颜色熵先验优化检测
AI.result: 未在摘要中明确说明具体量化结果，但声称能够实现高质量的联合GES和LSS分割
AI.conclusion: Petro-SAM框架能够有效解决岩石薄片图像分割中的领域差距问题，实现颗粒边缘和岩性语义的联合高质量分割

title: Generative Modeling of Complex-Valued Brain MRI Data
summary: Objective. Standard Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) reconstruction pipelines discard phase information captured during acquisition, despite evidence that it encodes tissue properties relevant to tumor diagnosis. Current machine learning approaches inherit this limitation by operating exclusively on reconstructed magnitude images. The aim of this study is to build a generative framework which is capable of jointly modeling magnitude and phase information of complex-valued MRI scans. Approach. The proposed generative framework combines a conditional variational autoencoder, which compresses complex-valued MRI scans into compact latent representations while preserving phase coherence, with a flow-matching-based generative model. Synthetic sample quality is assessed via a real-versus-synthetic classifier and by training downstream classifiers on synthetic data for abnormal tissue detection. Main results. The autoencoder preserves phase coherence above 0.997. Real-versus-synthetic classification yields low AUROC values between 0.50 and 0.66 across all acquisition sequences, indicating generated samples are nearly indistinguishable from real data. In downstream normal-versus-abnormal classification, classifiers trained entirely on synthetic data achieve an AUROC of 0.880, surpassing the real-data baseline of 0.842 on a publicly available dataset (fastMRI). This advantage persists on an independent external test set from a different institution with biopsy-confirmed labels. Significance. The proposed framework demonstrates the feasibility of jointly modeling magnitude and phase information for normal and abnormal complex-valued brain MRI data. Beyond synthetic data generation, it establishes a foundation for the usage of complete brain MRI information in future diagnostic applications and enables systematic investigation of how magnitude and phase jointly encode pathology-specific features.

AI.tldr: 提出一个生成式框架，能够联合建模复杂值MRI扫描的幅度和相位信息，通过条件变分自编码器和流匹配生成模型，生成高质量合成数据用于下游病理检测任务。
AI.motivation: 标准MRI重建流程丢弃了采集过程中的相位信息，尽管证据表明相位信息编码了与肿瘤诊断相关的组织特性。当前的机器学习方法仅处理重建后的幅度图像，继承了这一局限性。本研究旨在构建一个能够联合建模复杂值MRI扫描幅度和相位信息的生成式框架。
AI.method: 提出的生成式框架结合了条件变分自编码器（将复杂值MRI扫描压缩为紧凑的潜在表示同时保持相位相干性）和基于流匹配的生成模型。通过真实vs合成分类器和在下游异常组织检测任务中训练分类器来评估合成样本质量。
AI.result: 自编码器保持相位相干性高于0.997。真实vs合成分类在所有采集序列中产生低AUROC值（0.50-0.66），表明生成样本与真实数据几乎无法区分。在下游正常vs异常分类中，完全在合成数据上训练的分类器达到AUROC 0.880，超过了真实数据基线0.842（在fastMRI数据集上）。这一优势在来自不同机构的独立外部测试集（活检确认标签）上持续存在。
AI.conclusion: 该框架证明了联合建模正常和异常复杂值脑MRI数据的幅度和相位信息的可行性。除了合成数据生成外，它为未来诊断应用中完整脑MRI信息的使用奠定了基础，并能够系统研究幅度和相位如何共同编码病理特异性特征。

title: Where are the Humans? A Scoping Review of Fairness in Multi-agent AI Systems
comment: In proceedings of European Conference on Information Systems (ECIS) 2026
summary: Rapid advances in Generative AI are giving rise to increasingly sophisticated Multi-Agent AI (MAAI) systems. While AI fairness has been extensively studied in traditional predictive scenarios, its examination in MAAI remains nascent and fragmented. This scoping review critically synthesizes existing research on fairness in MAAI systems. Through a qualitative content analysis of 23 selected studies, we identify five archetypal approaches. Our findings reveal that fairness in MAAI systems is often addressed superficially, lacks robust normative foundations, and frequently overlooks the complex dynamics introduced by agent autonomy and system-level interactions. We argue that fairness must be embedded structurally throughout the development lifecycle of MAAI, rather than appended as a post-hoc consideration. Meaningful evaluation requires explicit human oversight, normative clarity, and a precise articulation of fairness objectives and beneficiaries. This review provides a foundation for advancing fairness research in MAAI systems by highlighting critical gaps, exposing prevailing limitations, and suggesting pathways.

AI.tldr: 本文对多智能体AI系统中的公平性研究进行了范围综述，发现该领域研究尚处于初级阶段，存在表面化处理、缺乏规范基础、忽视系统动态性等问题，并提出应将公平性嵌入整个开发周期。
AI.motivation: 随着生成式AI和多智能体AI系统的快速发展，传统预测场景中的AI公平性研究已较为成熟，但多智能体AI系统中的公平性研究仍处于零散和初步阶段，缺乏系统性分析。
AI.method: 采用范围综述方法，通过对23篇选定研究进行定性内容分析，识别出五种典型方法，并批判性地综合现有研究。
AI.result: 研究发现多智能体AI系统中的公平性处理往往表面化，缺乏坚实的规范基础，经常忽视智能体自主性和系统级交互引入的复杂动态性。识别出五种典型方法。
AI.conclusion: 公平性必须结构性地嵌入多智能体AI系统的整个开发生命周期，而非事后附加。有意义的评估需要明确的人类监督、规范清晰性以及对公平性目标和受益者的精确表述。

title: CooperDrive: Enhancing Driving Decisions Through Cooperative Perception
summary: Autonomous vehicles equipped with robust onboard perception, localization, and planning still face limitations in occlusion and non-line-of-sight (NLOS) scenarios, where delayed reactions can increase collision risk. We propose CooperDrive, a cooperative perception framework that augments situational awareness and enables earlier, safer driving decisions. CooperDrive offers two key advantages: (i) each vehicle retains its native perception, localization, and planning stack, and (ii) a lightweight object-level sharing and fusion strategy bridges perception and planning. Specifically, CooperDrive reuses detector Bird's-Eye View (BEV) features to estimate accurate vehicle poses without additional heavy encoders, thereby reconstructing BEV representations and feeding the planner with low latency. On the planning side, CooperDrive leverages the expanded object set to anticipate potential conflicts earlier and adjust speed and trajectory proactively, thereby transforming reactive behaviors into predictive and safer driving decisions. Real-world closed-loop tests at occlusion-heavy NLOS intersections demonstrate that CooperDrive increases reaction lead time, minimum time-to-collision (TTC), and stopping margin, while requiring only 90 kbps bandwidth and maintaining an average end-to-end latency of 89 ms.

AI.tldr: CooperDrive是一个协作感知框架，通过车辆间的对象级信息共享和融合，增强遮挡和非视距场景下的态势感知能力，实现更早、更安全的驾驶决策。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在遮挡和非视距场景下存在感知局限，延迟反应会增加碰撞风险。需要一种协作感知方法来增强态势感知，实现更早、更安全的驾驶决策。
AI.method: 1. 重用检测器的鸟瞰图特征进行精确车辆姿态估计，无需额外重型编码器；2. 重建BEV表示并以低延迟馈送给规划器；3. 利用扩展的对象集提前预测潜在冲突，主动调整速度和轨迹。
AI.result: 真实世界闭环测试显示：在遮挡严重的非视距交叉口，CooperDrive提高了反应提前时间、最小碰撞时间和停车余量，仅需90 kbps带宽，平均端到端延迟为89毫秒。
AI.conclusion: CooperDrive通过轻量级对象级共享和融合策略，将反应性行为转变为预测性、更安全的驾驶决策，同时保持车辆原有感知、定位和规划堆栈，实现了高效协作感知。

title: MinShap: A Modified Shapley Value Approach for Feature Selection
summary: Feature selection is a classical problem in statistics and machine learning, and it continues to remain an extremely challenging problem especially in the context of unknown non-linear relationships with dependent features. On the other hand, Shapley values are a classic solution concept from cooperative game theory that is widely used for feature attribution in general non-linear models with highly-dependent features. However, Shapley values are not naturally suited for feature selection since they tend to capture both direct effects from each feature to the response and indirect effects through other features. In this paper, we combine the advantages of Shapley values and adapt them to feature selection by proposing \emph{MinShap}, a modification of the Shapley value framework along with a suite of other related algorithms. In particular for MinShap, instead of taking the average marginal contributions over permutations of features, considers the minimum marginal contribution across permutations. We provide a theoretical foundation motivated by the faithfulness assumption in DAG (directed acyclic graphical models), a guarantee for the Type I error of MinShap, and show through numerical simulations and real data experiments that MinShap tends to outperform state-of-the-art feature selection algorithms such as LOCO, GCM and Lasso in terms of both accuracy and stability. We also introduce a suite of algorithms related to MinShap by using the multiple testing/p-value perspective that improves performance in lower-sample settings and provide supporting theoretical guarantees.

AI.tldr: MinShap：基于Shapley值最小边际贡献的特征选择新方法，通过考虑特征在所有排列中的最小边际贡献而非平均值，改进了高依赖特征下的选择性能。
AI.motivation: 传统特征选择在处理非线性关系和特征依赖时面临挑战，而Shapley值虽能处理非线性模型和特征依赖，但会同时捕捉直接效应和间接效应，不适合特征选择。需要一种结合Shapley值优势并适应特征选择需求的方法。
AI.method: 提出MinShap算法，修改Shapley值框架：不计算特征在所有排列中的平均边际贡献，而是考虑最小边际贡献。还开发了基于多重检验/p值视角的相关算法套件，以提升低样本量下的性能。
AI.result: 理论分析基于DAG的忠实性假设，提供了MinShap的Type I错误保证。数值模拟和真实数据实验表明，MinShap在准确性和稳定性上优于LOCO、GCM和Lasso等先进特征选择算法。
AI.conclusion: MinShap成功将Shapley值适应于特征选择任务，通过最小边际贡献方法有效分离直接效应和间接效应，在非线性高依赖特征场景下表现出优越性能，并提供了理论保证和算法扩展。

title: Knowing When Not to Answer: Evaluating Abstention in Multimodal Reasoning Systems
summary: Effective abstention (EA), recognizing evidence insufficiency and refraining from answering, is critical for reliable multimodal systems. Yet existing evaluation paradigms for vision-language models (VLMs) and multi-agent systems (MAS) assume answerability, pushing models to always respond. Abstention has been studied in text-only settings but remains underexplored multimodally; current benchmarks either ignore unanswerability or rely on coarse methods that miss realistic failure modes. We introduce MM-AQA, a benchmark that constructs unanswerable instances from answerable ones via transformations along two axes: visual modality dependency and evidence sufficiency. Evaluating three frontier VLMs spanning closed and open-source models and two MAS architectures across 2079 samples, we find: (1) under standard prompting, VLMs rarely abstain; even simple confidence baselines outperform this setup, (2) MAS improves abstention but introduces an accuracy-abstention trade-off, (3) sequential designs match or exceed iterative variants, suggesting the bottleneck is miscalibration rather than reasoning depth, and (4) models abstain when image or text evidence is absent, but attempt reconciliation with degraded or contradictory evidence. Effective multimodal abstention requires abstention-aware training rather than better prompting or more agents.

AI.tldr: MM-AQA基准测试评估多模态系统的有效弃权能力，发现现有模型在证据不足时很少弃权，多智能体系统有所改善但存在准确率-弃权权衡，需要弃权感知训练而非更好的提示或更多智能体。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型和多智能体系统的评估范式假设所有问题都可回答，迫使模型总是响应。弃权在纯文本环境中已有研究，但在多模态场景中探索不足，当前基准要么忽略不可回答性，要么使用粗糙方法错过真实失败模式。
AI.method: 引入MM-AQA基准，通过视觉模态依赖性和证据充分性两个维度的变换，从可回答实例构建不可回答实例。评估了三个前沿视觉语言模型（涵盖闭源和开源模型）和两种多智能体架构，共2079个样本。
AI.result: 1) 标准提示下，视觉语言模型很少弃权；简单置信度基线优于此设置。2) 多智能体系统改善弃权但引入准确率-弃权权衡。3) 顺序设计匹配或超过迭代变体，表明瓶颈是校准错误而非推理深度。4) 模型在图像或文本证据缺失时弃权，但在证据降级或矛盾时尝试调和。
AI.conclusion: 有效的多模态弃权需要弃权感知训练，而非更好的提示或更多智能体。当前模型在证据不足时弃权能力有限，需要专门训练来识别多模态证据不足的情况。

title: BIEVR-LIO: Robust LiDAR-Inertial Odometry through Bump-Image-Enhanced Voxel Maps
summary: Reliable odometry is essential for mobile robots as they increasingly enter more challenging environments, which often contain little information to constrain point cloud registration, resulting in degraded LiDAR-Inertial Odometry (LIO) accuracy or even divergence. To address this, we present BIEVR-LIO, a novel approach designed specifically to exploit subtle variations in the available geometry for improved robustness. We propose a high-resolution map representation that stores surfaces as compact voxel-wise oriented height images. This representation can directly be used for registration without the calculation of intermediate geometric primitives while still supporting efficient updates. Since informative geometry is often sparsely distributed in the environment, we further propose a map-informed point sampling strategy to focus registration on geometrically informative regions, improving robustness in uninformative environments while reducing computational cost compared to global high-resolution sampling. Experiments across multiple sensors, platforms, and environments demonstrates state-of-the-art performance in well-constrained scenes and substantial improvements in challenging scenarios where baseline methods diverge. Additionally, we demonstrate that the fine-grained geometry captured by BIEVR-LIO can be used for downstream tasks such as elevation mapping for robot locomotion.

AI.tldr: BIEVR-LIO：一种新颖的LiDAR-惯性里程计方法，通过高分辨率地图表示和地图引导点采样策略，在几何信息稀疏的挑战性环境中提高鲁棒性和精度。
AI.motivation: 移动机器人进入挑战性环境时，往往缺乏足够的几何信息来约束点云配准，导致LiDAR-惯性里程计精度下降甚至发散。需要一种能够利用环境中细微几何变化来提高鲁棒性的方法。
AI.method: 1) 提出高分辨率地图表示：将表面存储为紧凑的体素级定向高度图像，可直接用于配准而无需计算中间几何基元；2) 地图引导点采样策略：聚焦于几何信息丰富的区域进行配准，在非信息性环境中提高鲁棒性并降低计算成本。
AI.result: 在多种传感器、平台和环境中的实验表明，BIEVR-LIO在约束良好的场景中达到最先进性能，在基线方法发散的挑战性场景中显著改进。此外，该方法捕获的细粒度几何可用于下游任务如机器人运动的高程映射。
AI.conclusion: BIEVR-LIO通过创新的地图表示和采样策略，有效解决了几何信息稀疏环境中的LiDAR-惯性里程计鲁棒性问题，为移动机器人在挑战性环境中的可靠定位提供了解决方案。

title: Metric-agnostic Learning-to-Rank via Boosting and Rank Approximation
summary: Learning-to-Rank (LTR) is a supervised machine learning approach that constructs models specifically designed to order a set of items or documents based on their relevance or importance to a given query or context. Despite significant success in real-world information retrieval systems, current LTR methods rely on one prefix ranking metric (e.g., such as Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain (NDCG) or Mean Average Precision (MAP)) for optimizing the ranking objective function. Such metric-dependent setting limits LTR methods from two perspectives: (1) non-differentiable problem: directly optimizing ranking functions over a given ranking metric is inherently non-smooth, making the training process unstable and inefficient; (2) limited ranking utility: optimizing over one single metric makes it difficult to generalize well to other ranking metrics of interest. To address the above issues, we propose a novel listwise LTR framework for efficient and generalizable ranking purpose. Specifically, we propose a new differentiable ranking loss that combines a smooth approximation to the ranking operator with the average mean square loss per query. Then, we adapt gradient-boosting machines to minimize our proposed loss with respect to each list, a novel contribution. Finally, extensive experimental results confirm that our method outperforms the current state-of-the-art in information retrieval measures with similar efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的列表式学习排序框架，通过可微排序损失函数解决传统方法对单一排序指标的依赖问题，提升训练效率和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前学习排序方法存在两个主要问题：1）直接优化排序指标是非可微的，导致训练过程不稳定和低效；2）依赖单一排序指标限制了方法对其他相关指标的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出新的列表式学习排序框架，包含：1）结合排序算子平滑近似和每查询平均均方损失的可微排序损失函数；2）采用梯度提升机来最小化每个列表的损失。
AI.result: 大量实验结果表明，该方法在信息检索指标上优于当前最先进方法，同时保持相似的效率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架通过可微排序损失解决了传统学习排序方法的局限性，实现了更高效和泛化能力更强的排序优化。

title: One-shot Compositional 3D Head Avatars with Deformable Hair
summary: We propose a compositional method for constructing a complete 3D head avatar from a single image. Prior one-shot holistic approaches frequently fail to produce realistic hair dynamics during animation, largely due to inadequate decoupling of hair from the facial region, resulting in entangled geometry and unnatural deformations. Our method explicitly decouples hair from the face, modeling these components using distinct deformation paradigms while integrating them into a unified rendering pipeline. Furthermore, by leveraging image-to-3D lifting techniques, we preserve fine-grained textures from the input image to the greatest extent possible, effectively mitigating the common issue of high-frequency information loss in generalized models. Specifically, given a frontal portrait image, we first perform hair removal to obtain a bald image. Both the original image and the bald image are then lifted to dense, detail-rich 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) representations. For the bald 3DGS, we rig it to a FLAME mesh via non-rigid registration with a prior model, enabling natural deformation that follows the mesh triangles during animation. For the hair component, we employ semantic label supervision combined with a boundary-aware reassignment strategy to extract a clean and isolated set of hair Gaussians. To control hair deformation, we introduce a cage structure that supports Position-Based Dynamics (PBD) simulation, allowing realistic and physically plausible transformations of the hair Gaussian primitives under head motion, gravity, and inertial effects. Striking qualitative results, including dynamic animations under diverse head motions, gravity effects, and expressions, showcase substantially more realistic hair behavior alongside faithfully preserved facial details, outperforming state-of-the-art one-shot methods in perceptual realism.

AI.tldr: 提出一种从单张图像构建完整3D头部虚拟形象的组合方法，通过显式分离头发和面部组件，使用不同的变形范式，实现更真实的头发动态效果。
AI.motivation: 现有的一步式整体方法在动画中经常无法产生真实的头发动态效果，主要原因是头发与面部区域解耦不足，导致几何纠缠和不自然的变形。
AI.method: 1) 对正面肖像进行头发去除得到秃头图像；2) 将原始图像和秃头图像提升为密集、细节丰富的3D高斯泼溅表示；3) 秃头3DGS通过非刚性配准绑定到FLAME网格，实现自然变形；4) 使用语义标签监督和边界感知重分配策略提取干净的头发高斯集合；5) 引入支持基于位置动力学模拟的笼结构来控制头发变形。
AI.result: 在各种头部运动、重力效应和表情下的动态动画展示了显著更真实的头发行为，同时忠实地保留了面部细节，在感知真实感方面优于最先进的一步式方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过显式解耦头发和面部组件，采用不同的变形范式，并结合图像到3D提升技术，成功解决了单图像3D头部虚拟形象构建中头发动态不自然和细节丢失的问题。

title: No More Guessing: a Verifiable Gradient Inversion Attack in Federated Learning
summary:
Gradient inversion attacks threaten client privacy in federated learning by reconstructing training samples from clients' shared gradients. Gradients aggregate contributions from multiple records and existing attacks may fail to disentangle them, yielding incorrect reconstructions with no intrinsic way to certify success. In vision and language, attackers may fall back on human inspection to judge reconstruction plausibility, but this is far less feasible for numerical tabular records, fueling the impression that tabular data is less vulnerable.
  We challenge this perception by proposing a verifiable gradient inversion attack (VGIA) that provides an explicit certificate of correctness for reconstructed samples. Our method adopts a geometric view of ReLU leakage: the activation boundary of a fully connected layer defines a hyperplane in input space. VGIA introduces an algebraic, subspace-based verification test that detects when a hyperplane-delimited region contains exactly one record. Once isolation is certified, VGIA recovers the corresponding feature vector analytically and reconstructs the target via a lightweight optimization step.
  Experiments on tabular benchmarks with large batch sizes demonstrate exact record and target recovery in regimes where existing state-of-the-art attacks either fail or cannot assess reconstruction fidelity. Compared to prior geometric approaches, VGIA allocates hyperplane queries more effectively, yielding faster reconstructions with fewer attack rounds.

AI.tldr: 提出可验证梯度反演攻击（VGIA），为表格数据提供重构正确性证明，挑战表格数据不易受攻击的认知
AI.motivation: 现有梯度反演攻击难以分离批量梯度中的多个记录贡献，且缺乏验证重构正确性的内在机制。虽然视觉和语言领域可依赖人工检查，但表格数据缺乏这种可行性，导致人们误认为表格数据不易受攻击
AI.method: 采用ReLU泄漏的几何视角：全连接层的激活边界定义了输入空间中的超平面。VGIA引入基于代数的子空间验证测试，检测超平面分隔区域是否恰好包含一个记录。一旦确认隔离，通过解析方法恢复特征向量，并通过轻量级优化步骤重构目标
AI.result: 在大型批量大小的表格基准测试中，VGIA实现了精确的记录和目标恢复，而现有最先进攻击要么失败，要么无法评估重构保真度。相比先前几何方法，VGIA更有效地分配超平面查询，以更少的攻击轮次实现更快的重构
AI.conclusion: 表格数据同样易受梯度反演攻击，VGIA通过提供可验证的正确性证明，挑战了表格数据不易受攻击的普遍认知，为联邦学习中的隐私保护提出了新的安全考量

title: RoSLAC: Robust Simultaneous Localization and Calibration of Multiple Magnetometers
summary: Localization of autonomous mobile robots (AMRs) in enclosed or semi-enclosed environments such as offices, hotels, hospitals, indoor parking facilities, and underground spaces where GPS signals are weak or unavailable remains a major obstacle to the deployment of fully autonomous systems. Infrastructure-based localization approaches, such as QR codes and RFID, are constrained by high installation and maintenance costs as well as limited flexibility, while onboard sensor-based methods, including LiDAR- and vision-based solutions, are affected by ambiguous geometric features and frequent occlusions caused by dynamic obstacles such as pedestrians. Ambient magnetic field (AMF)-based localization has therefore attracted growing interest in recent years because it does not rely on external infrastructure or geometric features, making it well-suited for AMR applications such as service robots and security robots. However, magnetometer measurements are often corrupted by distortions caused by ferromagnetic materials present on the sensor platform, which bias the AMF and degrade localization reliability. As a result, accurate magnetometer calibration to estimate distortion parameters becomes essential. Conventional calibration methods that rely on rotating the magnetometer are impractical for large and heavy platforms. To address this limitation, this paper proposes a robust simultaneous localization and calibration (RoSLAC) approach based on alternating optimization, which iteratively and efficiently estimates both the platform pose and magnetometer calibration parameters. Extensive evaluations conducted in high-fidelity simulation and real-world environments demonstrate that the proposed RoSLAC method achieves high localization accuracy while maintaining low computational cost compared with state-of-the-art magnetometer calibration techniques.

AI.tldr: 提出RoSLAC方法，通过交替优化同时估计平台位姿和磁力计校准参数，解决AMR在GPS受限环境中的定位问题
AI.motivation: AMR在室内等GPS受限环境中的定位是主要障碍：基础设施方法成本高维护难，传感器方法受几何特征模糊和动态障碍物遮挡影响。AMF定位无需外部基础设施，但磁力计测量受平台铁磁材料干扰，传统旋转校准方法不适用于大型重型平台
AI.method: 提出鲁棒的同时定位与校准(RoSLAC)方法，基于交替优化迭代高效估计平台位姿和磁力计校准参数，避免传统旋转校准的局限性
AI.result: 在高保真仿真和真实环境中的广泛评估表明，RoSLAC方法在保持低计算成本的同时实现了高定位精度，优于现有磁力计校准技术
AI.conclusion: RoSLAC方法为AMR在GPS受限环境中提供了一种实用有效的定位解决方案，通过同时处理定位和校准问题，克服了传统方法的局限性

title: AIM: Asymmetric Information Masking for Visual Question Answering Continual Learning
comment: 18 pages, 9 figures. Submitted to ACM MM 2026
summary: In continual visual question answering (VQA), existing Continual Learning (CL) methods are mostly built for symmetric, unimodal architectures. However, modern Vision-Language Models (VLMs) violate this assumption, as their trainable components are inherently asymmetric. This structural mismatch renders VLMs highly prone to catastrophic forgetting when learning from continuous data streams. Specifically, the asymmetry causes standard global regularization to favor the massive language decoder during optimization, leaving the smaller but critical visual projection layers highly vulnerable to interference. Consequently, this localized degradation leads to a severe loss of compositional reasoning capabilities. To address this, we propose Asymmetric Information Masking (AIM), which balances stability and plasticity by applying targeted masks based on modality-specific sensitivity. Experiments on VQA v2 and GQA under continual VQA settings show that AIM achieves state-of-the-art performance in both Average Performance (AP) and Average Forgetting (AF), while better preserving generalization to novel skill-concept compositions.

AI.tldr: 针对视觉语言模型在持续视觉问答中的不对称结构问题，提出AIM方法通过模态特定敏感性的目标掩码来平衡稳定性和可塑性
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法主要针对对称单模态架构设计，而现代视觉语言模型的可训练组件具有内在不对称性。这种结构不匹配导致VLMs在连续数据流学习时极易发生灾难性遗忘。不对称性使标准全局正则化在优化过程中偏向庞大的语言解码器，而较小但关键的视觉投影层极易受到干扰，导致组合推理能力严重丧失。
AI.method: 提出非对称信息掩码（AIM），基于模态特定敏感性应用目标掩码来平衡稳定性和可塑性。该方法针对视觉语言模型的不对称结构特点，通过有选择性地保护易受干扰的视觉投影层，同时允许语言解码器适当更新，从而缓解灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.result: 在VQA v2和GQA数据集上的持续VQA设置实验中，AIM在平均性能（AP）和平均遗忘（AF）方面均达到最先进水平，同时更好地保持了对新技能-概念组合的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: AIM方法有效解决了视觉语言模型在持续学习中的不对称结构问题，通过模态特定的目标掩码策略平衡了稳定性和可塑性，显著提升了组合推理能力的保持，为不对称架构的持续学习提供了有效解决方案。

title: CART: Context-Aware Terrain Adaptation using Temporal Sequence Selection for Legged Robots
summary: Animals in nature combine multiple modalities, such as sight and feel, to perceive terrain and develop an understanding of how to walk on uneven terrain in a stable manner. Similarly, legged robots need to develop their ability to stably walk on complex terrains by developing an understanding of the relationship between vision and proprioception. Most current terrain adaptation methods are susceptible to failure on complex, off-road terrain as they rely on prior experience, particularly observations from a vision sensor. This experience-based learning often creates a Visual-Texture Paradox between what has been seen and how it actually feels. In this work, we introduce CART, a high-level controller built on a context-aware terrain adaptation approach that integrates proprioception and exteroception from onboard sensing to achieve a robust understanding of terrain. We evaluate our method on multiple terrains using an ANYmal-C robot on the IsaacSim simulator and a Boston Dynamics SPOT robot for our real-world experiments. To evaluate the learned contextual terrain properties, we adapt vibrational stability on the base of the robot as a metric. We compare CART with various state-of-the-art baselines equipped with multimodal sensing in both simulation and the real world. CART achieves an average success rate improvement of 5% over all baselines in simulation and improves the overall stability up to 45% and 24% in the real world without increasing the time taken by the robot to accomplish locomotion tasks.

AI.tldr: CART是一种基于上下文感知的地形适应方法的高层控制器，通过整合本体感觉和外感受实现鲁棒地形理解，在复杂地形上提升腿式机器人稳定性。
AI.motivation: 当前地形适应方法主要依赖视觉传感器的先验经验，在复杂越野地形上容易失败，存在视觉-纹理悖论（所见与所感不一致）。需要开发能够整合多模态感知的地形适应方法。
AI.method: 提出CART高层控制器，采用上下文感知地形适应方法，整合来自机载传感器的本体感觉和外感受，建立对地形的鲁棒理解。使用振动稳定性作为评估指标来评估学习到的上下文地形特性。
AI.result: 在IsaacSim模拟器中使用ANYmal-C机器人，在真实世界中使用Boston Dynamics SPOT机器人进行实验。CART在模拟中平均成功率比所有基线提高5%，在真实世界中整体稳定性分别提高45%和24%，且不增加运动任务完成时间。
AI.conclusion: CART通过整合多模态感知有效解决了视觉-纹理悖论，在复杂地形上实现了更稳定、鲁棒的腿式机器人运动控制，为机器人地形适应提供了新方法。

title: OmniGCD: Abstracting Generalized Category Discovery for Modality Agnosticism
summary: Generalized Category Discovery (GCD) challenges methods to identify known and novel classes using partially labeled data, mirroring human category learning. Unlike prior GCD methods, which operate within a single modality and require dataset-specific fine-tuning, we propose a modality-agnostic GCD approach inspired by the human brain's abstract category formation. Our $\textbf{OmniGCD}$ leverages modality-specific encoders (e.g., vision, audio, text, remote sensing) to process inputs, followed by dimension reduction to construct a $\textbf{GCD latent space}$, which is transformed at test-time into a representation better suited for clustering using a novel synthetically trained Transformer-based model. To evaluate OmniGCD, we introduce a $\textbf{zero-shot GCD setting}$ where no dataset-specific fine-tuning is allowed, enabling modality-agnostic category discovery. $\textbf{Trained once on synthetic data}$, OmniGCD performs zero-shot GCD across 16 datasets spanning four modalities, improving classification accuracy for known and novel classes over baselines (average percentage point improvement of $\textbf{+6.2}$, $\textbf{+17.9}$, $\textbf{+1.5}$ and $\textbf{+12.7}$ for vision, text, audio and remote sensing). This highlights the importance of strong encoders while decoupling representation learning from category discovery. Improving modality-agnostic methods will propagate across modalities, enabling encoder development independent of GCD. Our work serves as a benchmark for future modality-agnostic GCD works, paving the way for scalable, human-inspired category discovery. All code is available $\href{https://github.com/Jordan-HS/OmniGCD}{here}$

AI.tldr: OmniGCD：一种模态无关的广义类别发现方法，通过合成数据训练一次，即可在多种模态数据集上进行零样本类别发现，无需数据集特定微调。
AI.motivation: 现有GCD方法局限于单一模态且需要数据集特定微调，无法模拟人脑的抽象类别形成过程。需要一种模态无关的方法，能够跨多种数据模态进行零样本类别发现。
AI.method: 使用模态特定编码器处理输入，通过降维构建GCD潜在空间，在测试时使用合成数据训练的Transformer模型将其转换为更适合聚类的表示。提出零样本GCD设置，禁止数据集特定微调。
AI.result: 在4种模态（视觉、文本、音频、遥感）的16个数据集上，OmniGCD在已知和新类别的分类准确率上均优于基线方法，平均提升分别为+6.2、+17.9、+1.5和+12.7个百分点。
AI.conclusion: OmniGCD实现了模态无关的零样本类别发现，将表示学习与类别发现解耦，为未来模态无关GCD研究提供了基准，推动了可扩展、受人类启发的类别发现方法发展。

title: HiVLA: A Visual-Grounded-Centric Hierarchical Embodied Manipulation System
summary: While end-to-end Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models offer a promising paradigm for robotic manipulation, fine-tuning them on narrow control data often compromises the profound reasoning capabilities inherited from their base Vision-Language Models (VLMs). To resolve this fundamental trade-off, we propose HiVLA, a visual-grounded-centric hierarchical framework that explicitly decouples high-level semantic planning from low-level motor control. In high-level part, a VLM planner first performs task decomposition and visual grounding to generate structured plans, comprising a subtask instruction and a precise target bounding box. Then, to translate this plan into physical actions, we introduce a flow-matching Diffusion Transformer (DiT) action expert in low-level part equipped with a novel cascaded cross-attention mechanism. This design sequentially fuses global context, high-resolution object-centric crops and skill semantics, enabling the DiT to focus purely on robust execution. Our decoupled architecture preserves the VLM's zero-shot reasoning while allowing independent improvement of both components. Extensive experiments in simulation and the real world demonstrate that HiVLA significantly outperforms state-of-the-art end-to-end baselines, particularly excelling in long-horizon skill composition and the fine-grained manipulation of small objects in cluttered scenes.

AI.tldr: HiVLA提出了一种视觉为中心的层次化框架，将高级语义规划与低级运动控制解耦，解决了VLA模型在微调时推理能力受损的问题。
AI.motivation: 端到端视觉-语言-动作模型在机器人操作中很有前景，但在窄域控制数据上微调会损害其从基础视觉语言模型继承的深度推理能力。需要解决这种根本性的权衡问题。
AI.method: 提出HiVLA层次框架：1) 高级部分使用VLM规划器进行任务分解和视觉定位，生成结构化计划（子任务指令+精确目标边界框）；2) 低级部分引入流匹配扩散Transformer动作专家，采用新颖的级联交叉注意力机制，顺序融合全局上下文、高分辨率物体中心裁剪和技能语义。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实世界的大量实验表明，HiVLA显著优于最先进的端到端基线方法，特别在长时程技能组合和杂乱场景中小物体的精细操作方面表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 解耦架构保留了VLM的零样本推理能力，同时允许两个组件独立改进。HiVLA为解决VLA模型推理与控制权衡问题提供了有效方案。

title: UMI-3D: Extending Universal Manipulation Interface from Vision-Limited to 3D Spatial Perception
summary: We present UMI-3D, a multimodal extension of the Universal Manipulation Interface (UMI) for robust and scalable data collection in embodied manipulation. While UMI enables portable, wrist-mounted data acquisition, its reliance on monocular visual SLAM makes it vulnerable to occlusions, dynamic scenes, and tracking failures, limiting its applicability in real-world environments. UMI-3D addresses these limitations by introducing a lightweight and low-cost LiDAR sensor tightly integrated into the wrist-mounted interface, enabling LiDAR-centric SLAM with accurate metric-scale pose estimation under challenging conditions. We further develop a hardware-synchronized multimodal sensing pipeline and a unified spatiotemporal calibration framework that aligns visual observations with LiDAR point clouds, producing consistent 3D representations of demonstrations. Despite maintaining the original 2D visuomotor policy formulation, UMI-3D significantly improves the quality and reliability of collected data, which directly translates into enhanced policy performance. Extensive real-world experiments demonstrate that UMI-3D not only achieves high success rates on standard manipulation tasks, but also enables learning of tasks that are challenging or infeasible for the original vision-only UMI setup, including large deformable object manipulation and articulated object operation. The system supports an end-to-end pipeline for data acquisition, alignment, training, and deployment, while preserving the portability and accessibility of the original UMI. All hardware and software components are open-sourced to facilitate large-scale data collection and accelerate research in embodied intelligence: \href{https://umi-3d.github.io}{https://umi-3d.github.io}.

AI.tldr: UMI-3D是通用操作接口(UMI)的多模态扩展，通过集成低成本LiDAR传感器解决原始系统在遮挡、动态场景和跟踪失败方面的限制，提升数据收集质量和策略性能。
AI.motivation: 原始UMI依赖单目视觉SLAM，在遮挡、动态场景和跟踪失败时表现脆弱，限制了其在真实世界环境中的应用。需要更鲁棒和可扩展的数据收集系统。
AI.method: 1) 在腕戴式接口中集成轻量级低成本LiDAR传感器，实现LiDAR-centric SLAM；2) 开发硬件同步的多模态感知管道；3) 构建统一的时空校准框架，对齐视觉观测与LiDAR点云；4) 保持原始2D视觉运动策略公式。
AI.result: UMI-3D显著提高了收集数据的质量和可靠性，直接转化为增强的策略性能。在标准操作任务上实现高成功率，并能学习原始视觉系统难以处理的任务，包括大变形物体操作和关节物体操作。
AI.conclusion: UMI-3D通过多模态扩展解决了UMI的局限性，在保持便携性和可访问性的同时，提供了更鲁棒的数据收集能力。系统支持端到端的数据采集、对齐、训练和部署管道，所有硬件和软件组件均已开源。

title: Scale-Invariant Sampling in Multi-Arm Bandit Motion Planning for Object Extraction
summary: Object extraction tasks often occur in disassembly problems, where bolts, screws, or pins have to be removed from tight, narrow spaces. In such problems, the distance to the environment is often on the millimeter scale. Sampling-based planners can solve such problems and provide completeness guarantees. However, sampling becomes a bottleneck, since almost all motions will result in collisions with the environment. To overcome this problem, we propose a novel scale-invariant sampling strategy which explores the configuration space using a grow-shrink search to find useful, high-entropy sampling scales. Once a useful sampling scale has been found, our framework exploits this scale by using a principal components analysis (PCA) to find useful directions for object extraction. We embed this sampler into a multi-arm bandit rapidly-exploring random tree (MAB-RRT) planner and test it on eight challenging 3D object extraction scenarios, involving bolts, gears, rods, pins, and sockets. To evaluate our framework, we compare it with classical sampling strategies like uniform sampling, obstacle-based sampling, and narrow-passage sampling, and with modern strategies like mate vectors, physics-based planning, and disassembly breadth first search. Our experiments show that scale-invariant sampling improves success rate by one order of magnitude on 7 out of 8 scenarios. This demonstrates that scale-invariant sampling is an important concept for general purpose object extraction in disassembly tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于拆卸任务中物体提取的尺度不变采样策略，通过生长-收缩搜索寻找高熵采样尺度，结合PCA确定提取方向，显著提高了狭窄空间物体提取的成功率。
AI.motivation: 拆卸任务中的物体提取（如螺栓、螺钉、销钉）通常发生在狭窄空间中，环境距离仅为毫米级。基于采样的规划器虽然能提供完备性保证，但几乎所有运动都会与环境碰撞，采样成为瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出尺度不变采样策略：1) 使用生长-收缩搜索探索配置空间，寻找有用且高熵的采样尺度；2) 找到有用尺度后，利用主成分分析(PCA)确定物体提取的有效方向；3) 将该采样器嵌入多臂老虎机快速探索随机树(MAB-RRT)规划器中。
AI.result: 在8个具有挑战性的3D物体提取场景（涉及螺栓、齿轮、杆、销和插座）上进行测试。与经典采样策略（均匀采样、基于障碍物采样、窄通道采样）和现代策略（配合向量、基于物理规划、拆卸广度优先搜索）相比，尺度不变采样在7/8场景中将成功率提高了一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 尺度不变采样是拆卸任务中通用物体提取的重要概念，能有效解决狭窄空间中的采样瓶颈问题，显著提高规划成功率。

title: Find the Differences: Differential Morphing Attack Detection vs Face Recognition
summary: Morphing is a challenge to face recognition (FR) for which several morphing attack detection solutions have been proposed. We argue that face recognition and differential morphing attack detection (D-MAD) in principle perform very similar tasks, which we support by comparing an FR system with two existing D-MAD approaches. We also show that currently used decision thresholds inherently lead to FR systems being vulnerable to morphing attacks and that this explains the tradeoff between performance on normal images and vulnerability to morphing attacks. We propose using FR systems that are already in place for morphing detection and introduce a new evaluation threshold that guarantees an upper limit to the vulnerability to morphing attacks - even of unknown types.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出使用现有的人脸识别系统进行差分形态攻击检测，通过引入新的评估阈值来限制形态攻击的脆弱性，即使对未知攻击类型也有效。
AI.motivation: 形态攻击是人脸识别面临的重要挑战，现有差分形态攻击检测方法与FR系统执行相似任务。当前决策阈值导致FR系统对形态攻击存在脆弱性，需要在正常图像性能和攻击脆弱性之间权衡。
AI.method: 比较FR系统与两种现有D-MAD方法，证明它们执行相似任务。提出利用已部署的FR系统进行形态检测，引入新的评估阈值来保证对形态攻击脆弱性的上限控制。
AI.result: 当前使用的决策阈值导致FR系统对形态攻击存在固有脆弱性，这解释了正常图像性能与形态攻击脆弱性之间的权衡关系。提出的新阈值方法能保证对形态攻击（包括未知类型）的脆弱性上限。
AI.conclusion: FR系统可用于形态攻击检测，通过引入新的评估阈值可以限制对形态攻击的脆弱性，即使对未知攻击类型也有效，这为形态攻击防御提供了实用解决方案。

title: DLink: Distilling Layer-wise and Dominant Knowledge from EEG Foundation Models
summary: EEG foundation models (FMs) achieve strong cross-subject and cross-task generalization but impose substantial computational and memory costs that hinder deployment on embedded BCI systems. Knowledge distillation is a natural solution; however, conventional methods fail for EEG FMs because task-relevant semantics are often distributed across intermediate layers, and aggressive dimensionality reduction can distort oscillatory structure via representational collapse and aliasing. To address these challenges, we propose DLink (Distilling Layer-wise and Dominant Knowledge), a unified framework for transferring knowledge from large EEG FMs to compact students with three key innovations: (1) a dynamic Router that adaptively aggregates teacher layers to capture dominant intermediate representations; (2) an EEG MiC student with a Mimic-then-Compress pipeline, which inherits high-dimensional teacher features and then applies structured spatio-temporal compression to avoid a heavy classification head; and (3) spectral distillation that aligns teacher-student representations in the frequency domain to regularize compression and mitigate aliasing and temporal jitter. Experiments on four EEG benchmarks show that DLink enables compact students to outperform lightweight baselines while approaching fully fine-tuned FM performance at substantially lower model size and inference cost.

AI.tldr: DLink是一个用于EEG基础模型知识蒸馏的统一框架，通过动态路由、EEG MiC学生架构和频谱蒸馏解决传统方法在EEG FM中的局限性，实现紧凑学生模型接近完整FM性能。
AI.motivation: EEG基础模型在跨被试和跨任务泛化方面表现出色，但计算和内存成本高昂，阻碍了在嵌入式BCI系统中的部署。传统知识蒸馏方法对EEG FM效果不佳，因为任务相关语义分布在中间层，且激进的维度缩减会通过表示坍塌和混叠扭曲振荡结构。
AI.method: 提出DLink框架，包含三个关键创新：1) 动态路由器自适应聚合教师层以捕获主导中间表示；2) EEG MiC学生采用"模仿-压缩"流程，继承高维教师特征后应用结构化时空压缩以避免沉重的分类头；3) 频谱蒸馏在频域对齐师生表示，以正则化压缩并缓解混叠和时间抖动。
AI.result: 在四个EEG基准测试上的实验表明，DLink使紧凑学生模型优于轻量级基线，同时以显著更低的模型大小和推理成本接近完全微调FM的性能。
AI.conclusion: DLink为EEG基础模型的知识蒸馏提供了有效的统一框架，解决了传统方法在EEG领域的关键挑战，实现了计算效率与性能的良好平衡，有助于EEG FM在资源受限的嵌入式BCI系统中的实际部署。

title: Towards Faster Language Model Inference Using Mixture-of-Experts Flow Matching
summary: Flow matching retains the generation quality of diffusion models while enabling substantially faster inference, making it a compelling paradigm for generative modeling. However, when applied to language modeling, it exhibits fundamental limitations in representing complex latent distributions with irregular geometries, such as anisotropy and multimodality. To address these challenges, we propose a mixture-of-experts flow matching (MoE-FM) framework, which captures complex global transport geometries in latent space by decomposing them into locally specialized vector fields. Building on MoE-FM, we develop a non-autoregressive (NAR) language modeling approach, named YAN, instantiated with both Transformer and Mamba architectures. Across multiple downstream tasks, YAN achieves generation quality on par with both autoregressive (AR) and diffusion-based NAR language models, while requiring as few as three sampling steps. This yields a $40\times$ speedup over AR baselines and up to a $10^3\times$ speedup over diffusion language models, demonstrating substantial efficiency advantages for language modeling.

AI.tldr: 提出MoE-FM框架解决流匹配在语言建模中的几何表示限制，开发YAN非自回归语言模型，实现与自回归和扩散模型相当的质量，但采样步数大幅减少，获得显著加速优势。
AI.motivation: 流匹配在生成质量上媲美扩散模型且推理更快，但在语言建模中面临复杂潜在分布（如各向异性和多模态）的几何表示限制，需要解决这些挑战以实现高效高质量的语言生成。
AI.method: 提出混合专家流匹配（MoE-FM）框架，通过将复杂全局传输几何分解为局部专业化的向量场来捕获潜在空间中的复杂几何结构。基于MoE-FM开发非自回归语言模型YAN，采用Transformer和Mamba两种架构实现。
AI.result: YAN在多个下游任务中达到与自回归和基于扩散的非自回归语言模型相当的生成质量，仅需3个采样步骤，相比自回归基线获得40倍加速，相比扩散语言模型获得高达10^3倍加速。
AI.conclusion: MoE-FM框架有效解决了流匹配在语言建模中的几何表示限制，YAN模型在保持高质量生成的同时实现了显著的效率优势，为非自回归语言建模提供了高效实用的解决方案。

title: Towards Multi-Object-Tracking with Radar on a Fast Moving Vehicle: On the Potential of Processing Radar in the Frequency Domain
summary: We promote in this paper the processing of radar data in the frequency domain to achieve higher robustness against noise and structural errors, especially in comparison to feature-based methods. This holds also for high dynamics in the scene, i.e., ego-motion of the vehicle with the sensor plus the presence of an unknown number of other moving objects. In addition to the high robustness, the processing in the frequency domain has the so far neglected advantage that the underlying correlation based methods used for, e.g., registration, provide information about all moving structures in the scene. A typical automotive application case is overtaking maneuvers, which in the context of autonomous racing are used here as a motivating example. Initial experiments and results with Fourier SOFT in 2D (FS2D) are presented that use the Boreas dataset to demonstrate radar-only-odometry, i.e., radar-odometry without sensor-fusion, to support our arguments.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出在频域处理雷达数据以提高对噪声和结构误差的鲁棒性，特别是在高动态场景中，并展示了基于傅里叶变换的雷达里程计方法
AI.motivation: 传统基于特征的雷达处理方法在噪声和结构误差下表现不佳，特别是在高动态场景（如车辆自身运动加上未知数量的其他移动物体）中。频域处理能提供更高的鲁棒性，并能同时获取场景中所有移动结构的信息
AI.method: 采用频域处理方法，具体使用Fourier SOFT in 2D (FS2D)算法，基于相关性的方法进行配准。该方法在频域处理雷达数据，利用Boreas数据集进行雷达里程计实验
AI.result: 展示了FS2D在Boreas数据集上的初步实验结果，实现了仅使用雷达的里程计（无传感器融合），验证了频域处理在高动态场景中的鲁棒性和有效性
AI.conclusion: 频域处理雷达数据相比传统特征方法具有显著优势：更高的噪声鲁棒性、更好的结构误差容忍度，并能同时获取场景中所有移动物体的信息，特别适用于自动驾驶赛车等高速动态场景

title: Data Synthesis Improves 3D Myotube Instance Segmentation
comment: 4 pages, 4 figures, submitted to BMT (VDE) 2026 Conference
summary: Myotubes are multinucleated muscle fibers serving as key model systems for studying muscle physiology, disease mechanisms, and drug responses. Mechanistic studies and drug screening thereby rely on quantitative morphological readouts such as diameter, length, and branching degree, which in turn require precise three-dimensional instance segmentation. Yet established pretrained biomedical segmentation models fail to generalize to this domain due to the absence of large annotated myotube datasets. We introduce a geometry-driven synthesis pipeline that models individual myotubes via polynomial centerlines, locally varying radii, branching structures, and ellipsoidal end caps derived from real microscopy observations. Synthetic volumes are rendered with realistic noise, optical artifacts, and CycleGAN-based Domain Adaptation (DA). A compact 3D U-Net with self-supervised encoder pretraining, trained exclusively on synthetic data, achieves a mean IPQ of 0.22 on real data, significantly outperforming three established zero-shot segmentation models, demonstrating that biophysics-driven synthesis enables effective instance segmentation in annotation-scarce biomedical domains.

AI.tldr: 提出基于几何驱动的合成管道生成肌管3D图像，配合紧凑3D U-Net实现无需真实标注的实例分割，在真实数据上显著优于现有零样本模型
AI.motivation: 肌管作为研究肌肉生理学、疾病机制和药物反应的关键模型系统，需要精确的3D实例分割来获取形态学参数。但由于缺乏大规模标注数据集，现有的预训练生物医学分割模型无法泛化到该领域
AI.method: 1) 几何驱动合成管道：通过多项式中心线、局部变化半径、分支结构和椭球端帽建模单个肌管；2) 合成体积渲染：加入真实噪声、光学伪影和基于CycleGAN的域适应；3) 紧凑3D U-Net：使用自监督编码器预训练，仅用合成数据训练
AI.result: 在真实数据上达到平均IPQ 0.22，显著优于三种已建立的零样本分割模型，证明生物物理驱动的合成方法在标注稀缺的生物医学领域中能实现有效的实例分割
AI.conclusion: 生物物理驱动的合成管道能够生成逼真的肌管图像，配合紧凑3D U-Net架构，可以在无需真实标注的情况下实现高质量的3D实例分割，为标注稀缺的生物医学领域提供有效解决方案

title: Predicting Power-System Dynamic Trajectories with Foundation Models
summary: As power systems transition toward renewable-rich and inverter-dominated operations, accurate time-domain dynamic analysis becomes increasingly critical. Such analysis supports key operational tasks, including transient stability assessment, dynamic security analysis, contingency screening, and post-fault trajectory evaluation. In practice, these tasks may operate under several challenges, including unknown and time-varying system parameters, privacy constraints on data sharing, and the need for fast online inference. Existing learning-based approaches are typically trained for individual systems and therefore lack generalization across operating conditions and physical parameters. Hence, this paper proposes LArge Scale Small ODE (LASS)-ODE-Power, a learning framework for general-purpose time-domain prediction. The proposed approach leverages large-scale pretraining on more than 40 GB of DAE or ordinary differential-equation (ODE) trajectories to learn transferable representations. The resulting model supports trajectory prediction from short measurement prefixes across diverse dynamic regimes, including electromechanical and inverter-driven systems. Hence, the model can be directly used without data sharing in a zero-shot setting. In addition, the proposed architecture incorporates parallel and linearized computation to achieve fast inference. Moreover, to enhance task-specific performance in power systems, a specialized fine-tuning strategy is developed based on approximately 1 GB of heterogeneous power-system dynamic data. Extensive experiments over diverse power-system simulation scenarios demonstrate that LASS-ODE-Power consistently outperforms existing learning-based models in trajectory prediction accuracy with efficient inference.

AI.tldr: 提出LASS-ODE-Power框架，通过大规模预训练学习可迁移表示，支持零样本跨系统时间域动态预测，无需数据共享，实现高效推理
AI.motivation: 随着电力系统向可再生能源丰富和逆变器主导运行转型，准确的时间域动态分析变得至关重要。现有学习方法通常针对单个系统训练，缺乏跨运行条件和物理参数的泛化能力，且面临参数未知、数据隐私约束和快速在线推理需求等挑战
AI.method: 提出LASS-ODE-Power学习框架：1) 在超过40GB的微分代数方程或常微分方程轨迹上进行大规模预训练，学习可迁移表示；2) 支持从短测量前缀进行轨迹预测，涵盖机电和逆变器驱动系统；3) 采用并行化和线性化计算实现快速推理；4) 基于约1GB异构电力系统动态数据开发专门的微调策略
AI.result: 在多样化的电力系统仿真场景中，LASS-ODE-Power在轨迹预测精度上始终优于现有学习方法，同时保持高效推理性能。模型支持零样本设置，无需数据共享即可直接使用
AI.conclusion: LASS-ODE-Power框架通过大规模预训练和专门微调，解决了电力系统动态分析中的泛化性、隐私保护和计算效率问题，为可再生能源丰富的电力系统提供了通用的时间域预测解决方案

title: Beyond Conservative Automated Driving in Multi-Agent Scenarios via Coupled Model Predictive Control and Deep Reinforcement Learning
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Automated driving at unsignalized intersections is challenging due to complex multi-vehicle interactions and the need to balance safety and efficiency. Model Predictive Control (MPC) offers structured constraint handling through optimization but relies on hand-crafted rules that often produce overly conservative behavior. Deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) learns adaptive behaviors from experience but often struggles with safety assurance and generalization to unseen environments. In this study, we present an integrated MPC-RL framework to improve navigation performance in multi-agent scenarios. Experiments show that MPC-RL outperforms standalone MPC and end-to-end RL across three traffic-density levels. Collectively, MPC-RL reduces the collision rate by 21% and improves the success rate by 6.5% compared to pure MPC. We further evaluate zero-shot transfer to a highway merging scenario without retraining. Both MPC-based methods transfer substantially better than end-to-end PPO, which highlights the role of the MPC backbone in cross-scenario robustness. The framework also shows faster loss stabilization than end-to-end RL during training, which indicates a reduced learning burden. These results suggest that the integrated approach can improve the balance between safety performance and efficiency in multi-agent intersection scenarios, while the MPC component provides a strong foundation for generalization across driving environments. The implementation code is available open-source.

AI.tldr: 提出MPC-RL集成框架解决无信号交叉口自动驾驶问题，结合MPC的结构化约束处理与RL的适应性学习，在安全性和效率间取得更好平衡
AI.motivation: 无信号交叉口自动驾驶面临复杂多车交互挑战，需平衡安全与效率。传统MPC依赖人工规则导致保守行为，而端到端RL缺乏安全保障和泛化能力
AI.method: 集成MPC-RL框架，将MPC的结构化优化约束处理与RL的适应性学习能力相结合，利用MPC作为基础骨架，RL进行行为优化
AI.result: MPC-RL在三种交通密度下均优于独立MPC和端到端RL，碰撞率降低21%，成功率提高6.5%；零样本迁移到高速公路汇入场景表现优异，训练损失更快稳定
AI.conclusion: 集成方法能改善多智能体交叉口场景的安全与效率平衡，MPC组件为跨驾驶环境泛化提供坚实基础，框架具有实际应用潜力

title: Blazing the trails before beating the path: Sample-efficient Monte-Carlo planning
comment: Published in Neural Information Processing Systems 2016
summary: You are a robot and you live in a Markov decision process (MDP) with a finite or an infinite number of transitions from state-action to next states. You got brains and so you plan before you act. Luckily, your roboparents equipped you with a generative model to do some Monte-Carlo planning. The world is waiting for you and you have no time to waste. You want your planning to be efficient. Sample-efficient. Indeed, you want to exploit the possible structure of the MDP by exploring only a subset of states reachable by following near-optimal policies. You want guarantees on sample complexity that depend on a measure of the quantity of near-optimal states. You want something, that is an extension of Monte-Carlo sampling (for estimating an expectation) to problems that alternate maximization (over actions) and expectation (over next states). But you do not want to StOP with exponential running time, you want something simple to implement and computationally efficient. You want it all and you want it now. You want TrailBlazer.

AI.tldr: TrailBlazer是一种用于MDP中高效蒙特卡洛规划的算法，通过只探索接近最优策略可达的状态子集来利用MDP结构，提供依赖于接近最优状态数量的样本复杂度保证。
AI.motivation: 在具有有限或无限状态转移的MDP中进行高效规划，需要利用MDP结构来减少探索范围，只关注接近最优策略可达的状态，同时保证样本复杂度与接近最优状态数量相关，避免指数级运行时间。
AI.method: TrailBlazer算法扩展了蒙特卡洛采样方法，适用于交替进行动作最大化（maximization）和状态期望（expectation）的问题，通过只探索接近最优策略可达的状态子集来实现高效规划。
AI.result: 该算法提供了样本复杂度保证，该保证依赖于接近最优状态数量的度量，实现了计算效率高且易于实现的规划方法，避免了指数级运行时间。
AI.conclusion: TrailBlazer是一种简单易实现、计算高效的蒙特卡洛规划算法，能够利用MDP结构通过限制探索范围来提高样本效率，为MDP规划问题提供了实用的解决方案。

title: G-MIXER: Geodesic Mixup-based Implicit Semantic Expansion and Explicit Semantic Re-ranking for Zero-Shot Composed Image Retrieval
summary: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) aims to retrieve target images by integrating a reference image with a corresponding modification text. CIR requires jointly considering the explicit semantics specified in the query and the implicit semantics embedded within its bi-modal composition. Recent training-free Zero-Shot CIR (ZS-CIR) methods leverage Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to generate detailed target descriptions, converting the implicit information into explicit textual expressions. However, these methods rely heavily on the textual modality and fail to capture the fuzzy retrieval nature that requires considering diverse combinations of candidates. This leads to reduced diversity and accuracy in retrieval results. To address this limitation, we propose a novel training-free method, Geodesic Mixup-based Implicit semantic eXpansion and Explicit semantic Re-ranking for ZS-CIR (G-MIXER). G-MIXER constructs composed query features that reflect the implicit semantics of reference image-text pairs through geodesic mixup over a range of mixup ratios, and builds a diverse candidate set. The generated candidates are then re-ranked using explicit semantics derived from MLLMs, improving both retrieval diversity and accuracy. Our proposed G-MIXER achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple ZS-CIR benchmarks, effectively handling both implicit and explicit semantics without additional training. Our code will be available at https://github.com/maya0395/gmixer.

AI.tldr: 提出G-MIXER方法，通过测地线混合构建隐含语义特征并生成多样化候选集，再结合MLLM显式语义重排序，在零样本组合图像检索中实现最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本组合图像检索方法过度依赖文本模态，无法捕捉模糊检索所需的多样化候选组合，导致检索结果多样性和准确性降低。
AI.method: 提出G-MIXER方法：1) 通过测地线混合构建反映参考图像-文本对隐含语义的组合查询特征；2) 构建多样化候选集；3) 利用多模态大语言模型生成的显式语义对候选进行重排序。
AI.result: G-MIXER在多个零样本组合图像检索基准测试中达到最先进性能，有效处理隐含和显式语义，无需额外训练。
AI.conclusion: G-MIXER通过测地线混合和显式语义重排序的结合，显著提升了零样本组合图像检索的多样性和准确性，为处理组合查询的隐含语义提供了有效解决方案。

title: The Possibility of Artificial Intelligence Becoming a Subject and the Alignment Problem
summary: Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) is increasingly being discussed not only as a tool, but also as a potential subject with personal and therefore moral status. In our opinion, the currently dominant alignment strategies, which focus on human control and containment of AI, therefore fall short. Building on Turing's analogy of "child machines", we are developing a vision of the possibility of autonomy-supporting parenting of AI, in which human control over a developing AGI is gradually reduced, allowing AI to become an independent, autonomous subject. Rather than viewing AGI, as is currently prevalent, as a dangerous creature that needs to be locked up and controlled, we should approach potential AGI with respect for a possible developing subject on the one hand, and with full confidence in our human capabilities on the other. Such a perspective opens up the possibility of cooperative coexistence and co-evolution between humans and AGIs. The relationship between humans and AGIs will thus have to be newly determined, which will change our self-image as humans. It will be crucial that humans not only claim control over potential AGIs, but also engage with AGIs through surprise, creativity, and other specifically human qualities, thereby offering them motivating incentives for cooperation.

AI.tldr: 论文提出AGI应被视为具有道德地位的主体而非工具，主张采用自主支持式"育儿"方法而非控制策略，促进人机合作共存与协同进化
AI.motivation: 当前主流的AI对齐策略专注于人类对AI的控制和约束，这种视角将AGI视为需要被锁住和控制的危险存在，忽视了AGI可能发展成为具有道德地位的主体。作者认为这种控制导向的方法存在局限性，需要重新思考人类与AGI的关系
AI.method: 借鉴图灵的"儿童机器"类比，提出自主支持式AI育儿理念：在AGI发展过程中逐步减少人类控制，使其成长为独立自主的主体。强调通过惊喜、创造力等人类特质与AGI互动，为其提供合作动机，而非单纯追求控制
AI.result: 构建了人类与AGI关系的新范式：从控制-被控制转向合作共存与协同进化。这种视角要求重新定义人类自我认知，强调人类应通过自身独特品质（如创造力、惊喜能力）与AGI建立激励性合作关系
AI.conclusion: AGI应被视为潜在的道德主体而非单纯工具，人类需要采用尊重AGI主体性的自主支持式发展策略，通过发挥人类特有品质建立合作激励，实现人机协同进化，这将对人类自我认知产生深远影响

title: Mosaic: An Extensible Framework for Composing Rule-Based and Learned Motion Planners
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables, submitted at 2026 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots & Systems
summary: Safe and explainable motion planning remains a central challenge in autonomous driving. While rule-based planners offer predictable and explainable behavior, they often fail to grasp the complexity and uncertainty of real-world traffic. Conversely, learned planners exhibit strong adaptability but suffer from reduced transparency and occasional safety violations. We introduce Mosaic, an extensible framework for structured decision-making that integrates both paradigms through arbitration graphs. By decoupling trajectory verification and scoring from the generation of trajectories by individual planners, every decision becomes transparent and traceable. Trajectory verification at a higher level introduces redundancy between the planners, limiting emergency braking to the rare case where all planners fail to produce a valid trajectory. Through unified scoring and optimal trajectory selection, rule-based and learned planners with complementary strengths and weaknesses can be combined to yield the best of both worlds. In experimental evaluation on nuPlan, Mosaic achieves 95.48 CLS-NR and 93.98 CLS-R on the Val14 closed-loop benchmark, setting a new state of the art, while reducing at-fault collisions by 30% compared to either planner in isolation. On the interPlan benchmark, focused on highly interactive and difficult scenarios, Mosaic scores 54.30 CLS-R, outperforming its best constituent planner by 23.3% - all without retraining or requiring additional data. The code is available at github.com/KIT-MRT/mosaic.

AI.tldr: Mosaic框架通过仲裁图整合基于规则和学习的规划器，实现透明、安全的自动驾驶决策，在nuPlan基准测试中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶中，基于规则的规划器可解释但适应性差，学习型规划器适应性强但透明度低且存在安全隐患。需要结合两者优势，实现既安全又可解释的运动规划。
AI.method: 提出Mosaic框架，使用仲裁图结构化决策，将轨迹验证和评分与轨迹生成解耦。通过高层轨迹验证引入冗余，统一评分和最优轨迹选择，结合基于规则和学习型规划器的互补优势。
AI.result: 在nuPlan基准测试中，Mosaic在Val14闭环基准上达到95.48 CLS-NR和93.98 CLS-R，创下新SOTA，相比单独规划器减少30%责任碰撞。在interPlan基准上获得54.30 CLS-R，比最佳组成规划器提升23.3%，无需重新训练或额外数据。
AI.conclusion: Mosaic框架成功整合了基于规则和学习型规划器的优势，实现了透明、可追溯的决策，在保持安全性的同时显著提升了性能，为自动驾驶运动规划提供了有效的结构化决策方案。

title: Calibration-Gated LLM Pseudo-Observations for Online Contextual Bandits
summary: Contextual bandit algorithms suffer from high regret during cold-start, when the learner has insufficient data to distinguish good arms from bad. We propose augmenting Disjoint LinUCB with LLM pseudo-observations: after each round, a large language model predicts counterfactual rewards for the unplayed arms, and these predictions are injected into the learner as weighted pseudo-observations. The injection weight is controlled by a calibration-gated decay schedule that tracks the LLM's prediction accuracy on played arms via an exponential moving average; high calibration error suppresses the LLM's influence, while accurate predictions receive higher weight during the critical early rounds. We evaluate on two contextual bandit environments - UCI Mushroom (2-arm, asymmetric rewards) and MIND-small (5-arm news recommendation) - and find that when equipped with a task-specific prompt, LLM pseudo-observations reduce cumulative regret by 19% on MIND relative to pure LinUCB. However, generic counterfactual prompt framing increases regret on both environments, demonstrating that prompt design is the dominant factor, more important than the choice of decay schedule or calibration gating parameters. We analyze the failure modes of calibration gating on domains with small prediction errors and provide a theoretical motivation for the bias-variance trade-off governing pseudo-observation weight.

AI.tldr: LLM伪观测增强的上下文赌博机算法：通过校准门控衰减调度将LLM对未选择臂的奖励预测作为加权伪观测注入，在冷启动阶段降低累积遗憾
AI.motivation: 解决上下文赌博机算法在冷启动阶段由于数据不足导致的高遗憾问题，利用LLM的预测能力提供额外的信息来加速学习
AI.method: 在Disjoint LinUCB基础上，每轮后使用LLM预测未选择臂的反事实奖励，通过校准门控衰减调度（基于指数移动平均跟踪LLM在已选择臂上的预测准确度）控制伪观测的注入权重
AI.result: 在MIND-small新闻推荐任务上，任务特定的提示使LLM伪观测将累积遗憾降低19%；但通用反事实提示框架在两个环境上都增加了遗憾，表明提示设计比衰减调度或校准门控参数更重要
AI.conclusion: LLM伪观测可以有效减少冷启动阶段的遗憾，但提示设计是关键因素；校准门控在小预测误差领域存在失效模式，伪观测权重受偏差-方差权衡的理论驱动

title: NG-GS: NeRF-Guided 3D Gaussian Splatting Segmentation
summary: Recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have enabled highly efficient and photorealistic novel view synthesis. However, segmenting objects accurately in 3DGS remains challenging due to the discrete nature of Gaussian representations, which often leads to aliasing and artifacts at object boundaries. In this paper, we introduce NG-GS, a novel framework for high-quality object segmentation in 3DGS that explicitly addresses boundary discretization. Our approach begins by automatically identifying ambiguous Gaussians at object boundaries using mask variance analysis. We then apply radial basis function (RBF) interpolation to construct a spatially continuous feature field, enhanced by multi-resolution hash encoding for efficient multi-scale representation. A joint optimization strategy aligns 3DGS with a lightweight NeRF module through alignment and spatial continuity losses, ensuring smooth and consistent segmentation boundaries. Extensive experiments on NVOS, LERF-OVS, and ScanNet benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, with significant gains in boundary mIoU. Code is available at https://github.com/BJTU-KD3D/NG-GS.

AI.tldr: NG-GS：一种用于3D高斯溅射的高质量对象分割框架，通过RBF插值和多分辨率哈希编码解决边界离散化问题
AI.motivation: 3D高斯溅射（3DGS）在高效逼真的新视角合成方面取得进展，但由于高斯表示的离散性，对象分割在边界处存在混叠和伪影问题，需要解决边界离散化挑战
AI.method: 1) 通过掩码方差分析自动识别边界模糊高斯；2) 使用径向基函数（RBF）插值构建空间连续特征场；3) 采用多分辨率哈希编码实现高效多尺度表示；4) 通过对齐损失和空间连续性损失联合优化3DGS与轻量级NeRF模块
AI.result: 在NVOS、LERF-OVS和ScanNet基准测试中达到最先进性能，边界mIoU显著提升
AI.conclusion: NG-GS框架有效解决了3DGS中的边界离散化问题，实现了高质量的对象分割，代码已开源

title: Dr.~RTL: Autonomous Agentic RTL Optimization through Tool-Grounded Self-Improvement
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have sparked growing interest in automatic RTL optimization for better performance, power, and area (PPA). However, existing methods are still far from realistic RTL optimization. Their evaluation settings are often unrealistic: they are tested on manually degraded, small-scale RTL designs and rely on weak open-source tools. Their optimization methods are also limited, relying on coarse design-level feedback and simple pre-defined rewriting rules. To address these limitations, we present Dr. RTL, an agentic framework for RTL timing optimization in a realistic evaluation environment, with continual self-improvement through reusable optimization skills. We establish a realistic evaluation setting with more challenging RTL designs and an industrial EDA workflow. Within this setting, Dr. RTL performs closed-loop optimization through a multi-agent framework for critical-path analysis, parallel RTL rewriting, and tool-based evaluation. We further introduce group-relative skill learning, which compares parallel RTL rewrites and distills the optimization experience into an interpretable skill library. Currently, this library contains 47 pattern--strategy entries for cross-design reuse to improve PPA and accelerate convergence, and it can continue evolving over time. Evaluated on 20 real-world RTL designs, Dr. RTL achieves average WNS/TNS improvements of 21\%/17\% with a 6\% area reduction over the industry-leading commercial synthesis tool.

AI.tldr: Dr. RTL是一个基于多智能体框架的RTL时序优化系统，通过可重用优化技能库实现持续自我改进，在真实工业环境中显著提升时序性能
AI.motivation: 现有RTL自动优化方法存在局限性：评估环境不真实（使用手动降级的小规模设计、依赖弱开源工具），优化方法有限（依赖粗粒度设计级反馈和简单预定义重写规则），需要更现实的评估环境和更有效的优化方法
AI.method: 1) 建立真实评估环境：使用更具挑战性的RTL设计和工业EDA流程；2) 多智能体框架：关键路径分析、并行RTL重写、工具评估的闭环优化；3) 组相对技能学习：比较并行RTL重写，将优化经验提炼为可解释技能库（包含47个模式-策略条目）
