AI.result: 在20个真实RTL设计上评估，Dr. RTL相比行业领先的商业综合工具，平均WNS/TNS改善21%/17%，面积减少6%
AI.conclusion: Dr. RTL通过多智能体框架和可重用技能库，在真实工业环境中实现了有效的RTL时序优化，展示了持续自我改进的能力和跨设计重用潜力

title: EmbodiedClaw: Conversational Workflow Execution for Embodied AI Development
summary: Embodied AI research is increasingly moving beyond single-task, single-environment policy learning toward multi-task, multi-scene, and multi-model settings. This shift substantially increases the engineering overhead and development time required for stages such as evaluation environment construction, trajectory collection, model training, and evaluation. To address this challenge, we propose a new paradigm for embodied AI development in which users express goals and constraints through conversation, and the system automatically plans and executes the development workflow. We instantiate this paradigm with EmbodiedClaw, a conversational agent that turns high-frequency, high-cost embodied research activities, including environment creation and revision, benchmark transformation, trajectory synthesis, model evaluation, and asset expansion, into executable skills. Experiments on end-to-end workflow tasks, capability-specific evaluations, human researcher studies, and ablations show that EmbodiedClaw reduces manual engineering effort while improving executability, consistency, and reproducibility. These results suggest a shift from manual toolchains to conversationally executable workflows for embodied AI development.

AI.tldr: EmbodiedClaw：一个对话式智能体，将具身AI开发中的高频高成本研究活动转化为可执行技能，通过对话表达目标和约束，自动规划和执行开发工作流，减少人工工程开销。
AI.motivation: 具身AI研究正从单任务单环境转向多任务、多场景、多模型设置，这显著增加了评估环境构建、轨迹收集、模型训练和评估等阶段的工程开销和开发时间。需要新的开发范式来应对这一挑战。
AI.method: 提出基于对话的开发范式，用户通过对话表达目标和约束，系统自动规划和执行开发工作流。具体实现为EmbodiedClaw对话式智能体，将环境创建与修订、基准转换、轨迹合成、模型评估、资产扩展等具身研究活动转化为可执行技能。
AI.result: 通过端到端工作流任务、能力特定评估、人类研究员研究和消融实验表明，EmbodiedClaw减少了人工工程工作量，同时提高了可执行性、一致性和可复现性。
AI.conclusion: EmbodiedClaw展示了从手动工具链向对话式可执行工作流的转变，为具身AI开发提供了更高效、可扩展的范式，有望推动该领域向更复杂的多任务多环境设置发展。

title: The Courtroom Trial of Pixels: Robust Image Manipulation Localization via Adversarial Evidence and Reinforcement Learning Judgment
summary: Although some existing image manipulation localization (IML) methods incorporate authenticity-related supervision, this information is typically utilized merely as an auxiliary training signal to enhance the model's sensitivity to manipulation artifacts, rather than being explicitly modeled as localization evidence opposing the manipulated regions. Consequently, when manipulation traces are subtle or degraded by post-processing and noise, these methods struggle to explicitly compare manipulated and authentic evidence, resulting in unreliable predictions in ambiguous areas. To address these issues, we propose a courtroom-style adjudication framework that regards IML task as the confrontation of evidence followed by judgment. The framework comprises a prosecution stream, a defense stream, and a judge model. We first build a dual-hypothesis segmentation architecture on a shared multi-scale encoder, in which the prosecution stream asserts manipulation and the defense stream asserts authenticity. Guided by edge priors, it produces evidence for manipulated and authentic regions through cascaded multi-level fusion, bidirectional disagreement suppression, and dynamic debate refinement. We further develop a reinforcement learning judge model that performs strategic re-inference and refinement on uncertain regions, yielding a manipulated-region mask. The judge model is trained with advantage-based rewards and a soft-IoU objective, and reliability is calibrated via entropy and cross-hypothesis consistency. Experimental results show that our model achieves superior average performance compared with SOTA IML methods.

AI.tldr: 提出法庭式裁决框架，将图像篡改定位视为证据对抗后的判决过程，包含起诉流、辩护流和法官模型，通过对抗性证据生成和强化学习法官模型实现更可靠的篡改区域定位。
AI.motivation: 现有图像篡改定位方法仅将真实性相关信息作为辅助训练信号来增强对篡改痕迹的敏感性，而非将其明确建模为对抗篡改区域的定位证据。当篡改痕迹细微或受后处理/噪声影响时，这些方法难以在模糊区域进行明确的篡改与真实证据对比，导致不可靠预测。
AI.method: 提出法庭式裁决框架：1）基于共享多尺度编码器的双假设分割架构，包含起诉流（主张篡改）和辩护流（主张真实性）；2）通过边缘先验引导，采用级联多级融合、双向分歧抑制和动态辩论细化生成篡改与真实区域证据；3）开发强化学习法官模型，对不确定区域进行策略性重新推理和细化，生成篡改区域掩码，使用基于优势的奖励和软IoU目标训练，并通过熵和跨假设一致性进行可靠性校准。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该模型相比最先进的图像篡改定位方法实现了更优的平均性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的法庭式裁决框架通过将篡改定位任务建模为证据对抗后的判决过程，能够更有效地处理细微或退化的篡改痕迹，在模糊区域提供更可靠的预测，显著提升了图像篡改定位的性能。

title: Failure Identification in Imitation Learning Via Statistical and Semantic Filtering
comment: 8 pages, Appendix coming soon, accepted at ICRA 2026
summary: Imitation learning (IL) policies in robotics deliver strong performance in controlled settings but remain brittle in real-world deployments: rare events such as hardware faults, defective parts, unexpected human actions, or any state that lies outside the training distribution can lead to failed executions. Vision-based Anomaly Detection (AD) methods emerged as an appropriate solution to detect these anomalous failure states but do not distinguish failures from benign deviations. We introduce FIDeL (Failure Identification in Demonstration Learning), a policy-independent failure detection module. Leveraging recent AD methods, FIDeL builds a compact representation of nominal demonstrations and aligns incoming observations via optimal transport matching to produce anomaly scores and heatmaps. Spatio-temporal thresholds are derived with an extension of conformal prediction, and a Vision-Language Model (VLM) performs semantic filtering to discriminate benign anomalies from genuine failures. We also introduce BotFails, a multimodal dataset of real-world tasks for failure detection in robotics. FIDeL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, yielding +5.30% percent AUROC in anomaly detection and +17.38% percent failure-detection accuracy on BotFails compared to existing methods.

AI.tldr: FIDeL：一种用于机器人模仿学习的策略无关故障检测模块，通过最优传输匹配和语义过滤区分良性异常与真实故障
AI.motivation: 机器人模仿学习策略在受控环境中表现良好，但在实际部署中仍然脆弱，罕见事件（硬件故障、意外人类行为等）会导致执行失败。现有视觉异常检测方法能检测异常状态，但无法区分故障与良性偏差。
AI.method: FIDeL构建正常演示的紧凑表示，通过最优传输匹配对齐输入观测以生成异常分数和热图。使用时域阈值扩展的保形预测，并利用视觉语言模型进行语义过滤以区分良性异常与真实故障。
AI.result: 在BotFails多模态机器人故障检测数据集上，FIDeL在异常检测方面比现有方法提升5.30% AUROC，在故障检测准确率方面提升17.38%。
AI.conclusion: FIDeL提供了一种有效的策略无关故障检测方法，能够可靠区分机器人执行中的真实故障与良性异常，显著提升现有异常检测方法的性能。

title: Chain-of-Glimpse: Search-Guided Progressive Object-Grounded Reasoning for Video Understanding
summary: Video understanding requires identifying and reasoning over semantically discriminative visual objects across frames, yet existing object-agnostic solutions struggle to effectively handle substantial object variations over time. To address this, we introduce Chain-of-Glimpse, a search-guided progressive object-grounded reasoning framework that explicitly anchors each reasoning step to specific visual evidence regions, enabling compositional and multi-step decision-making. Formally, Chain-of-Glimpse formulates video reasoning as a step-by-step process that incrementally builds spatially grounded traces around task-relevant visual objects, thereby mitigating over-reliance on saliency-driven cues. Specifically, Chain-of-Glimpse features a search-guided controller, optimized via reinforcement learning with a format reward that significantly incentivizes grounding capability, to iteratively ground visual evidence regions and form reliable reasoning trajectories, yielding accurate and interpretable multi-step decisions. Extensive evaluations on both in domain NExTQA and out-of-domain Video-Holmes, CG-Bench Reasoning, and VRBench benchmarks demonstrate consistent performance gains, robustness and generalization of Chain-of-Glimpse across diverse video reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: Chain-of-Glimpse：一种基于搜索引导的渐进式对象锚定推理框架，通过逐步构建空间锚定的视觉证据轨迹来解决视频理解中的对象变化问题
AI.motivation: 现有视频理解方法多为对象无关的，难以有效处理时间维度上的显著对象变化。需要一种能够明确将推理步骤锚定到具体视觉证据区域的方法，以实现组合式和多步决策
AI.method: 提出Chain-of-Glimpse框架，将视频推理建模为逐步过程，增量构建任务相关视觉对象周围的空间锚定轨迹。采用搜索引导控制器，通过强化学习优化，使用格式化奖励激励锚定能力，迭代地锚定视觉证据区域并形成可靠推理轨迹
AI.result: 在NExTQA、Video-Holmes、CG-Bench Reasoning和VRBench等多个基准测试上均取得一致性能提升，展示了方法的鲁棒性和泛化能力
AI.conclusion: Chain-of-Glimpse通过显式锚定推理步骤到具体视觉证据区域，有效解决了视频理解中的对象变化问题，实现了准确、可解释的多步决策，在多样视频推理任务中表现出优越性能

title: Agentic Explainability at Scale: Between Corporate Fears and XAI Needs
comment: Presented at Human-centered Explainable AI Workshop (HCXAI) @ CHI 2026, Barcelona, Spain, 2026
summary: As companies enter the race for agentic AI adoption, fears surface around agentic autonomy and its subsequent risks. These fears compound as companies scale their agentic AI adoption with low-code applications, without a comparable scaling in their governance processes and expertise resulting in a phenomenon known as "Agent Sprawl". While shadow AI tools can help with agentic discovery and identification, few observability tools offer insights into the agents' configuration and settings or the decision-making process during agent-to-agent communication and orchestration. This paper explores AI governance professionals' concerns in enterprise settings, while offering design-time and runtime explainability techniques as suggested by AI governance experts for addressing those fears. Finally, we provide a preliminary prototype of an Agentic AI Card that can help companies feel at ease deploying agents at scale.

AI.tldr: 论文探讨企业采用智能体AI时的治理挑战，提出设计时和运行时可解释性技术，并开发Agentic AI Card原型来解决"智能体蔓延"问题
AI.motivation: 随着企业竞相采用智能体AI，对智能体自主性及其风险的担忧加剧。企业在通过低代码应用扩展智能体AI采用时，治理流程和专业知识未能同步扩展，导致"智能体蔓延"现象。现有可观察性工具难以提供智能体配置、设置以及智能体间通信和编排决策过程的洞察。
AI.method: 探索AI治理专业人士在企业环境中的关切，提出AI治理专家建议的设计时和运行时可解释性技术，并开发Agentic AI Card的初步原型。
AI.result: 提供了解决智能体AI治理挑战的框架，包括设计时和运行时可解释性技术，以及Agentic AI Card原型，帮助企业更安心地大规模部署智能体。
AI.conclusion: 论文为解决企业智能体AI采用中的治理和可解释性挑战提供了实用方法，通过可解释性技术和治理工具帮助企业缓解对智能体自主性的担忧，实现更安全的大规模部署。

title: Learning to Concatenate Quantum Codes
summary: Concatenating quantum error correction codes scales error correction capability by driving logical error rates down double-exponentially across levels. However, the noise structure shifts under concatenation, making it hard to choose an optimal code sequence. We automate this choice by estimating the effective noise channel after each level and selecting the next code accordingly. In particular, we use learning-based methods to tailor small, non-additive encoders when the noise exhibits sufficient structure, then switch to standard codes once the noise is nearly uniform. In simulations, this level-wise adaptation achieves a target logical error rate with far fewer qubits than concatenating stabilizer codes alone--reducing qubit counts by up to two orders of magnitude for strongly structured noise. Therefore, this hybrid, learning-based strategy offers a promising tool for early fault-tolerant quantum computing.

AI.tldr: 自动化量子纠错码级联选择，通过逐级估计有效噪声信道并自适应选择代码，显著减少所需量子比特数
AI.motivation: 量子纠错码级联虽然能双指数降低逻辑错误率，但噪声结构在级联过程中会发生变化，使得选择最优代码序列变得困难。传统方法难以适应这种动态变化的噪声环境。
AI.method: 提出级联自适应方法：1) 在每一级后估计有效噪声信道；2) 根据噪声结构选择下一级代码：当噪声具有足够结构时使用基于学习的小型非加性编码器，当噪声接近均匀时切换为标准代码；3) 采用混合学习策略优化代码选择
AI.result: 仿真显示，与仅使用稳定子码级联相比，该自适应方法在达到目标逻辑错误率时所需量子比特数大幅减少：对于强结构噪声，量子比特数减少高达两个数量级
AI.conclusion: 这种混合的、基于学习的自适应策略为早期容错量子计算提供了一个有前景的工具，能够显著降低资源需求

title: DETR-ViP: Detection Transformer with Robust Discriminative Visual Prompts
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026
summary: Visual prompted object detection enables interactive and flexible definition of target categories, thereby facilitating open-vocabulary detection. Since visual prompts are derived directly from image features, they often outperform text prompts in recognizing rare categories. Nevertheless, research on visual prompted detection has been largely overlooked, and it is typically treated as a byproduct of training text prompted detectors, which hinders its development. To fully unlock the potential of visual-prompted detection, we investigate the reasons why its performance is suboptimal and reveal that the underlying issue lies in the absence of global discriminability in visual prompts. Motivated by these observations, we propose DETR-ViP, a robust object detection framework that yields class-distinguishable visual prompts. On top of basic image-text contrastive learning, DETR-ViP incorporates global prompt integration and visual-textual prompt relation distillation to learn more discriminative prompt representations. In addition, DETR-ViP employs a selective fusion strategy that ensures stable and robust detection. Extensive experiments on COCO, LVIS, ODinW, and Roboflow100 demonstrate that DETR-ViP achieves substantially higher performance in visual prompt detection compared to other state-of-the-art counterparts. A series of ablation studies and analyses further validate the effectiveness of the proposed improvements and shed light on the underlying reasons for the enhanced detection capability of visual prompts.

AI.tldr: DETR-ViP：通过全局提示集成和视觉-文本提示关系蒸馏增强视觉提示对象检测的判别性，解决现有视觉提示检测性能不佳的问题
AI.motivation: 视觉提示对象检测虽然能灵活定义目标类别且在识别稀有类别上优于文本提示，但相关研究被忽视且通常作为文本提示检测器的副产品，导致性能不佳。研究发现根本问题在于视觉提示缺乏全局判别性。
AI.method: 提出DETR-ViP框架：在基础图像-文本对比学习之上，引入全局提示集成和视觉-文本提示关系蒸馏来学习更具判别性的提示表示；采用选择性融合策略确保检测的稳定性和鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在COCO、LVIS、ODinW和Roboflow100数据集上的大量实验表明，DETR-ViP在视觉提示检测方面相比其他最先进方法取得显著更高的性能。
AI.conclusion: DETR-ViP通过增强视觉提示的判别性，成功提升了视觉提示对象检测的性能，消融研究和分析进一步验证了所提改进的有效性，并揭示了视觉提示检测能力增强的潜在原因。

title: Hybrid Decision Making via Conformal VLM-generated Guidance
summary: Building on recent advances in AI, hybrid decision making (HDM) holds the promise of improving human decision quality and reducing cognitive load. We work in the context of learning to guide (LtG), a recently proposed HDM framework in which the human is always responsible for the final decision: rather than suggesting decisions, in LtG the AI supplies (textual) guidance useful for facilitating decision making. One limiting factor of existing approaches is that their guidance compounds information about all possible outcomes, and as a result it can be difficult to digest. We address this issue by introducing ConfGuide, a novel LtG approach that generates more succinct and targeted guidance. To this end, it employs conformal risk control to select a set of outcomes, ensuring a cap on the false negative rate. We demonstrate our approach on a real-world multi-label medical diagnosis task. Our empirical evaluation highlights the promise of ConfGuide.

AI.tldr: ConfGuide是一种新颖的"学习指导"方法，通过使用符合风险控制选择结果集，生成更简洁、有针对性的指导，以降低人类决策的认知负荷。
AI.motivation: 现有混合决策方法提供的指导信息通常包含所有可能结果的信息，导致信息过于复杂难以消化，需要更简洁、有针对性的指导来改善人类决策质量。
AI.method: 提出ConfGuide方法，采用符合风险控制技术选择结果集，确保假阴性率的上限，从而生成更简洁、有针对性的文本指导。
AI.result: 在多标签医疗诊断任务上的实证评估显示，ConfGuide方法具有良好前景，能够有效生成更简洁的指导信息。
AI.conclusion: ConfGuide通过符合风险控制生成更简洁、有针对性的指导，解决了现有混合决策方法中指导信息过于复杂的问题，在医疗诊断等实际任务中展现出应用潜力。

title: Discovering Novel LLM Experts via Task-Capability Coevolution
summary: Frontier model developers aim to train models continually to possess emergent, diverse capabilities. To extend capabilities, the current pre-training and post-training paradigm requires manually starting training runs with static datasets or reward functions every time. Addressing this limitation, our work pursues the insight that open-endedness (via the coevolution of models and tasks) can discover models with increasingly novel skills in a single run. We introduce a new model development framework that extends coevolution to large language model (LLM) discovery, open-ended \textit{Assessment Coevolving with Diverse Capabilities} (AC/DC). AC/DC evolves both LLMs via model merging and natural language tasks via synthetic data generation. AC/DC discovers growing archives of LLMs that surpass the capabilities of larger LLMs while taking up less GPU memory. In particular, our LLM populations achieve a broader Coverage of expertise than other curated models or baselines on downstream benchmarks, without \textit{any} explicit benchmark optimization. Furthermore, AC/DC improves Coverage over time, continually innovates on tasks and models, and improves performance in multi-agent best-of-N selection. Our findings highlight the potential of coevolution as a means of discovering broader sets of capabilities from base LLMs. Overall, AC/DC brings us one step closer to a profoundly new paradigm of LLM development, where continual improvements to the diversity of model capabilities can be accelerated by leveraging existing models as stepping stones to increasingly powerful models.

AI.tldr: AC/DC是一个通过模型与任务协同进化实现开放终结式大语言模型开发的框架，通过模型合并和合成数据生成，在单次运行中发现具有日益新颖技能的模型。
AI.motivation: 当前预训练和后训练范式需要每次手动启动静态数据集或奖励函数的训练运行，限制了模型能力的持续扩展。研究者希望利用开放终结性（通过模型与任务的协同进化）在单次运行中发现具有日益新颖技能的模型。
AI.method: AC/DC框架通过模型合并进化LLM，通过合成数据生成进化自然语言任务，实现模型与任务的协同进化。该框架发现不断增长的模型档案，这些模型超越更大LLM的能力同时占用更少GPU内存。
AI.result: AC/DC发现的LLM群体在下游基准测试中展现出比精心策划模型或基线更广泛的专长覆盖范围，且无需任何显式基准优化。该框架随时间改进覆盖范围，持续创新任务和模型，并提升多智能体最佳N选择性能。
AI.conclusion: AC/DC展示了协同进化作为从基础LLM中发现更广泛能力集的潜力，为LLM开发带来了新的范式，通过利用现有模型作为迈向更强大模型的垫脚石，加速模型能力多样性的持续改进。

title: Empirical Prediction of Pedestrian Comfort in Mobile Robot Pedestrian Encounters
summary: Mobile robots joining public spaces like sidewalks must care for pedestrian comfort. Many studies consider pedestrians' objective safety, for example, by developing collision avoidance algorithms, but not enough studies take the pedestrian's subjective safety or comfort into consideration. Quantifying comfort is a major challenge that hinders mobile robots from understanding and responding to human emotions. We empirically look into the relationship between the mobile robot-pedestrian interaction kinematics and subjective comfort. We perform one-on-one experimental trials, each involving a mobile robot and a volunteer. Statistical analysis of pedestrians' reported comfort versus the kinematic variables shows moderate but significant correlations for most variables. Based on these empirical findings, we design three comfort estimators/predictors derived from the minimum distance, the minimum projected time-to-collision, and a composite estimator. The composite estimator employs all studied kinematic variables and reaches the highest prediction rate and classifying performance among the predictors. The composite predictor has an odds ratio of 3.67. In simple terms, when it identifies a pedestrian as comfortable, it is almost 4 times more likely that the pedestrian is comfortable rather than uncomfortable. The study provides a comfort quantifier for incorporating pedestrian feelings into path planners for more socially compliant robots.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过实验分析移动机器人与行人交互的运动学变量与主观舒适度的关系，开发了基于最小距离、最小预计碰撞时间和综合变量的舒适度预测器，为机器人路径规划提供行人情感量化指标。
AI.motivation: 当前移动机器人在公共空间（如人行道）运行时，多数研究关注客观安全性（如避障算法），但缺乏对行人主观安全感和舒适度的考虑。量化舒适度是机器人理解并响应人类情感的主要挑战，阻碍了机器人实现更符合社会规范的行为。
AI.method: 采用一对一实验设计，让移动机器人与志愿者进行交互试验。通过统计分析行人报告的舒适度与运动学变量（如最小距离、最小预计碰撞时间等）的关系，基于经验发现设计三种舒适度估计器/预测器：基于最小距离、基于最小预计碰撞时间、以及综合所有研究变量的复合估计器。
AI.result: 运动学变量与主观舒适度之间存在中度但显著的相关性。复合预测器在所有预测器中达到最高的预测率和分类性能，其优势比为3.67，意味着当它识别行人为舒适时，行人实际舒适而非不舒适的可能性几乎是4倍。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为将行人情感纳入机器人路径规划提供了舒适度量化工具，使移动机器人能够更好地理解和响应人类舒适度，从而实现更符合社会规范的机器人行为。

title: Improving Sparse Autoencoder with Dynamic Attention
summary: Recently, sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have emerged as a promising technique for interpreting activations in foundation models by disentangling features into a sparse set of concepts. However, identifying the optimal level of sparsity for each neuron remains challenging in practice: excessive sparsity can lead to poor reconstruction, whereas insufficient sparsity may harm interpretability. While existing activation functions such as ReLU and TopK provide certain sparsity guarantees, they typically require additional sparsity regularization or cherry-picked hyperparameters. We show in this paper that dynamically sparse attention mechanisms using sparsemax can bridge this trade-off, due to their ability to determine the activation numbers in a data-dependent manner. Specifically, we first explore a new class of SAEs based on the cross-attention architecture with the latent features as queries and the learnable dictionary as the key and value matrices. To encourage sparse pattern learning, we employ a sparsemax-based attention strategy that automatically infers a sparse set of elements according to the complexity of each neuron, resulting in a more flexible and general activation function. Through comprehensive evaluation and visualization, we show that our approach successfully achieves lower reconstruction loss while producing high-quality concepts, particularly in top-n classification tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出基于sparsemax动态稀疏注意力的稀疏自编码器，通过数据依赖方式自动确定激活数量，平衡重构损失与可解释性
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏自编码器在确定神经元最佳稀疏度方面存在挑战：过度稀疏导致重构效果差，稀疏不足损害可解释性。传统激活函数如ReLU和TopK需要额外稀疏正则化或精心调整的超参数
AI.method: 提出基于交叉注意力架构的新型SAE，以潜在特征为查询，可学习字典为键值矩阵。采用sparsemax注意力策略，根据每个神经元的复杂度自动推断稀疏元素集合，实现数据依赖的激活函数
AI.result: 通过综合评估和可视化，该方法在实现更低重构损失的同时产生高质量概念，在top-n分类任务中表现优异
AI.conclusion: 基于sparsemax的动态稀疏注意力机制能够有效平衡稀疏自编码器的重构性能与可解释性，提供更灵活通用的激活函数

title: Vision-and-Language Navigation for UAVs: Progress, Challenges, and a Research Roadmap
summary: Vision-and-Language Navigation for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAV-VLN) represents a pivotal challenge in embodied artificial intelligence, focused on enabling UAVs to interpret high-level human commands and execute long-horizon tasks in complex 3D environments. This paper provides a comprehensive and structured survey of the field, from its formal task definition to the current state of the art. We establish a methodological taxonomy that charts the technological evolution from early modular and deep learning approaches to contemporary agentic systems driven by large foundation models, including Vision-Language Models (VLMs), Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, and the emerging integration of generative world models with VLA architectures for physically-grounded reasoning. The survey systematically reviews the ecosystem of essential resources simulators, datasets, and evaluation metrics that facilitates standardized research. Furthermore, we conduct a critical analysis of the primary challenges impeding real-world deployment: the simulation-to-reality gap, robust perception in dynamic outdoor settings, reasoning with linguistic ambiguity, and the efficient deployment of large models on resource-constrained hardware. By synthesizing current benchmarks and limitations, this survey concludes by proposing a forward-looking research roadmap to guide future inquiry into key frontiers such as multi-agent swarm coordination and air-ground collaborative robotics.

AI.tldr: 该论文对无人机视觉语言导航领域进行了全面综述，系统梳理了从任务定义到最新技术发展的完整脉络，建立了方法学分类体系，并分析了当前挑战与未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 无人机视觉语言导航是具身人工智能的关键挑战，涉及无人机理解高级人类指令并在复杂3D环境中执行长时程任务。当前该领域缺乏系统性的综述来整合技术发展脉络、资源生态和实际部署挑战，因此需要建立结构化分析框架来指导未来研究。
AI.method: 采用系统性文献综述方法，建立方法论分类体系，将技术演进分为早期模块化方法、深度学习方法和当代基于大基础模型的智能体系统。同时系统梳理了支撑该领域研究的关键资源生态系统，包括仿真器、数据集和评估指标。
AI.result: 建立了无人机视觉语言导航的完整技术发展脉络，从早期方法到当前基于视觉语言模型、视觉语言动作模型以及生成世界模型与VLA架构融合的最新进展。识别了该领域的核心资源生态系统，并系统分析了阻碍实际部署的关键挑战。
AI.conclusion: 无人机视觉语言导航领域已从早期模块化方法发展到基于大基础模型的智能体系统，但仍面临仿真到现实的差距、动态户外环境感知、语言歧义推理和资源受限硬件部署等关键挑战。未来研究方向应聚焦多智能体集群协调和空地协同机器人等前沿领域。

title: LongAct: Harnessing Intrinsic Activation Patterns for Long-Context Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a critical driver for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). While recent advancements have focused on reward engineering or data synthesis, few studies exploit the model's intrinsic representation characteristics to guide the training process. In this paper, we first observe the presence of high-magnitude activations within the query and key vectors when processing long contexts. Drawing inspiration from model quantization -- which establishes the criticality of such high-magnitude activations -- and the insight that long-context reasoning inherently exhibits a sparse structure, we hypothesize that these weights serve as the pivotal drivers for effective model optimization. Based on this insight, we propose LongAct, a strategy that shifts from uniform to saliency-guided sparse updates. By selectively updating only the weights associated with these significant activations, LongAct achieves an approximate 8% improvement on LongBench v2 and enhances generalization on the RULER benchmark. Furthermore, our method exhibits remarkable universality, consistently boosting performance across diverse RL algorithms such as GRPO and DAPO. Extensive ablation studies suggest that focusing on these salient features is key to unlocking long-context potential.

AI.tldr: LongAct：一种基于显著性引导的稀疏更新策略，通过选择性更新与高幅度激活相关的权重，提升LLM在长上下文推理中的性能
AI.motivation: 现有RL方法主要关注奖励工程或数据合成，很少利用模型内在表征特性来指导训练过程。作者观察到在处理长上下文时，查询和键向量中存在高幅度激活，并受到模型量化（强调此类激活的重要性）和长上下文推理具有稀疏结构的启发，认为这些权重是模型优化的关键驱动因素。
AI.method: 提出LongAct策略，从均匀更新转向显著性引导的稀疏更新。该方法选择性更新仅与显著激活相关的权重，而非所有参数。基于观察到的高幅度激活在长上下文处理中的关键作用，通过识别和聚焦这些重要特征来优化模型。
AI.result: 在LongBench v2上实现约8%的性能提升，在RULER基准测试中增强泛化能力。方法表现出显著普适性，在GRPO和DAPO等多种RL算法中均能一致提升性能。消融研究表明聚焦这些显著特征是解锁长上下文潜力的关键。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用模型内在表征特性（特别是高幅度激活）进行显著性引导的稀疏更新，能够有效提升LLM在长上下文推理中的性能。该方法提供了一种新的优化视角，超越了传统的奖励工程和数据合成方法。

title: A Mechanistic Analysis of Sim-and-Real Co-Training in Generative Robot Policies
summary: Co-training, which combines limited in-domain real-world data with abundant surrogate data such as simulation or cross-embodiment robot data, is widely used for training generative robot policies. Despite its empirical success, the mechanisms that determine when and why co-training is effective remain poorly understood. We investigate the mechanism of sim-and-real co-training through theoretical analysis and empirical study, and identify two intrinsic effects governing performance. The first, \textbf{``structured representation alignment"}, reflects a balance between cross-domain representation alignment and domain discernibility, and plays a primary role in downstream performance. The second, the \textbf{``importance reweighting effect"}, arises from domain-dependent modulation of action weighting and operates at a secondary level. We validate these effects with controlled experiments on a toy model and extensive sim-and-sim and sim-and-real robot manipulation experiments. Our analysis offers a unified interpretation of recent co-training techniques and motivates a simple method that consistently improves upon prior approaches. More broadly, our aim is to examine the inner workings of co-training and to facilitate research in this direction.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过理论分析和实验研究揭示了sim-and-real协同训练的内在机制，识别出结构化表示对齐和重要性重加权两个核心效应，并提出了改进方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管协同训练（结合有限真实数据和丰富替代数据）在生成式机器人策略训练中广泛使用且经验上成功，但其有效性的内在机制（何时、为何有效）仍缺乏深入理解。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和实证研究探究sim-and-real协同训练机制，在玩具模型上进行受控实验，并开展广泛的sim-and-sim和sim-and-real机器人操作实验进行验证。
AI.result: 识别出两个内在效应：1）结构化表示对齐（跨域表示对齐与域可区分性的平衡，对下游性能起主要作用）；2）重要性重加权效应（域依赖的动作权重调节，起次要作用）。验证了这些效应并提出了改进方法。
AI.conclusion: 分析为近期协同训练技术提供了统一解释，并启发了简单有效的改进方法。研究旨在深入理解协同训练的内在机制，推动该方向的研究发展。

title: Multi-User mmWave Beam and Rate Adaptation via Combinatorial Satisficing Bandits
summary: We study downlink beam and rate adaptation in a multi-user mmWave MISO system where multiple base stations (BSs), each using analog beamforming from finite codebooks, serve multiple single-antenna user equipments (UEs) with a unique beam per UE and discrete data transmission rates. BSs learn about transmission success based on ACK/NACK feedback. To encode service goals, we introduce a satisficing throughput threshold $τ_r$ and cast joint beam and rate adaptation as a combinatorial semi-bandit over beam-rate tuples. Within this framework, we propose SAT-CTS, a lightweight, threshold-aware policy that blends conservative confidence estimates with posterior sampling, steering learning toward meeting $τ_r$ rather than merely maximizing. Our main theoretical contribution provides the first finite-time regret bounds for combinatorial semi-bandits with satisficing objective: when $τ_r$ is realizable, we upper bound the cumulative satisficing regret to the target with a time-independent constant, and when $τ_r$ is non-realizable, we show that SAT-CTS incurs only a finite expected transient outside committed CTS rounds, after which its regret is governed by the sum of the regret contributions of restarted CTS rounds, yielding an $O((\log T)^2)$ standard regret bound. On the practical side, we evaluate the performance via cumulative satisficing regret to $τ_r$ alongside standard regret and fairness. Experiments with time-varying sparse multipath channels show that SAT-CTS consistently reduces satisficing regret and maintains competitive standard regret, while achieving favorable average throughput and fairness across users, indicating that feedback-efficient learning can equitably allocate beams and rates to meet QoS targets without channel state knowledge.

AI.tldr: 提出SAT-CTS策略，用于毫米波MISO系统中的下行波束和速率自适应，通过满足性目标而非最大化目标来优化多用户服务
AI.motivation: 在多用户毫米波MISO系统中，基站使用有限码本的模拟波束成形服务多个单天线用户设备，需要基于ACK/NACK反馈进行波束和速率自适应，以在无信道状态信息的情况下满足服务质量目标
AI.method: 将联合波束和速率自适应建模为组合半赌博问题，提出SAT-CTS策略，结合保守置信度估计和后验采样，引导学习满足吞吐量阈值τ_r而非单纯最大化
AI.result: 理论分析表明：当τ_r可实现时，SAT-CTS的累积满足性遗憾有与时间无关的常数上界；当τ_r不可实现时，仅产生有限期望瞬态，之后遗憾服从O((log T)²)标准遗憾界。实验验证了SAT-CTS在时变稀疏多径信道中能有效减少满足性遗憾，保持竞争力
AI.conclusion: SAT-CTS策略能够在无信道状态知识的情况下，通过反馈高效学习公平分配波束和速率以满足QoS目标，为组合半赌博问题中的满足性目标提供了首个有限时间遗憾界分析

title: Physically-Induced Atmospheric Adversarial Perturbations: Enhancing Transferability and Robustness in Remote Sensing Image Classification
summary: Adversarial attacks pose a severe threat to the reliability of deep learning models in remote sensing (RS) image classification. Most existing methods rely on direct pixel-wise perturbations, failing to exploit the inherent atmospheric characteristics of RS imagery or survive real-world image degradations. In this paper, we propose FogFool, a physically plausible adversarial framework that generates fog-based perturbations by iteratively optimizing atmospheric patterns based on Perlin noise. By modeling fog formations with natural, irregular structures, FogFool generates adversarial examples that are not only visually consistent with authentic RS scenes but also deceptive. By leveraging the spatial coherence and mid-to-low-frequency nature of atmospheric phenomena, FogFool embeds adversarial information into structural features shared across diverse architectures. Extensive experiments on two benchmark RS datasets demonstrate that FogFool achieves superior performance: not only does it exceed in white-box settings, but also exhibits exceptional black-box transferability (reaching 83.74% TASR) and robustness against common preprocessing-based defenses such as JPEG compression and filtering. Detailed analyses, including confusion matrices and Class Activation Map (CAM) visualizations, reveal that our atmospheric-driven perturbations induce a universal shift in model attention. These results indicate that FogFool represents a practical, stealthy, and highly persistent threat to RS classification systems, providing a robust benchmark for evaluating model reliability in complex environments.

AI.tldr: FogFool：一种基于雾效的物理对抗攻击框架，通过Perlin噪声迭代优化大气模式，生成视觉真实且具有欺骗性的对抗样本，在遥感图像分类中表现出优越的白盒攻击性能、黑盒可迁移性和防御鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法大多依赖像素级扰动，未能充分利用遥感图像固有的大气特性，且难以在真实世界图像退化中保持有效性。需要开发物理上合理、视觉一致且鲁棒的对抗攻击方法来评估遥感分类系统的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出FogFool框架，基于Perlin噪声迭代优化大气模式来生成雾基扰动。利用大气现象的空间相干性和中低频特性，将对抗信息嵌入到不同架构共享的结构特征中，生成视觉上与真实遥感场景一致且具有欺骗性的对抗样本。
AI.result: 在两个基准遥感数据集上的实验表明：1）在白盒设置下表现优越；2）具有出色的黑盒可迁移性（TASR达到83.74%）；3）对JPEG压缩和滤波等预处理防御具有鲁棒性；4）CAM可视化显示大气驱动扰动引起模型注意力的普遍偏移。
AI.conclusion: FogFool代表了一种实用、隐蔽且高度持久的遥感分类系统威胁，为评估复杂环境下模型可靠性提供了鲁棒的基准。大气驱动的对抗扰动能够诱导模型注意力的普遍偏移，表明该方法具有实际应用价值。

title: ESCAPE: Episodic Spatial Memory and Adaptive Execution Policy for Long-Horizon Mobile Manipulation
summary: Coordinating navigation and manipulation with robust performance is essential for embodied AI in complex indoor environments. However, as tasks extend over long horizons, existing methods often struggle due to catastrophic forgetting, spatial inconsistency, and rigid execution. To address these issues, we propose ESCAPE (Episodic Spatial Memory Coupled with an Adaptive Policy for Execution), operating through a tightly coupled perception-grounding-execution workflow. For robust perception, ESCAPE features a Spatio-Temporal Fusion Mapping module to autoregressively construct a depth-free, persistent 3D spatial memory, alongside a Memory-Driven Target Grounding module for precise interaction mask generation. To achieve flexible action, our Adaptive Execution Policy dynamically orchestrates proactive global navigation and reactive local manipulation to seize opportunistic targets. ESCAPE achieves state-of-the-art performance on the ALFRED benchmark, reaching 65.09% and 60.79% success rates in test seen and unseen environments with step-by-step instructions. By reducing redundant exploration, our ESCAPE attains substantial improvements in path-length-weighted metrics and maintains robust performance (61.24% / 56.04%) even without detailed guidance for long-horizon tasks.

AI.tldr: ESCAPE是一种用于室内具身AI的导航与操作协调框架，通过时空融合建图和自适应执行策略解决长时任务中的灾难性遗忘、空间不一致和刚性执行问题，在ALFRED基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理长时任务时面临灾难性遗忘、空间不一致和刚性执行三大挑战，导致在复杂室内环境中导航与操作协调的性能受限。
AI.method: ESCAPE采用紧密耦合的感知-接地-执行工作流：1) 时空融合建图模块自回归构建无深度、持久的3D空间记忆；2) 记忆驱动的目标接地模块生成精确的交互掩码；3) 自适应执行策略动态协调主动全局导航和反应式局部操作。
AI.result: 在ALFRED基准测试中，ESCAPE在测试可见和未见环境中分别达到65.09%和60.79%的成功率（逐步指令）。通过减少冗余探索，在路径长度加权指标上有显著提升，即使没有详细指导的长时任务也能保持稳健性能（61.24%/56.04%）。
AI.conclusion: ESCAPE通过紧密耦合的感知-接地-执行框架有效解决了长时任务中的关键挑战，实现了导航与操作的鲁棒协调，为复杂室内环境中的具身AI提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Comparison of Modern Multilingual Text Embedding Techniques for Hate Speech Detection Task
comment: Submitted to Applied Soft Computing (Status: Decision in Process)
summary: Online hate speech and abusive language pose a growing challenge for content moderation, especially in multilingual settings and for low-resource languages such as Lithuanian. This paper investigates to what extent modern multilingual sentence embedding models can support accurate hate speech detection in Lithuanian, Russian, and English, and how their performance depends on downstream modeling choices and feature dimensionality. We introduce LtHate, a new Lithuanian hate speech corpus derived from news portals and social networks, and benchmark six modern multilingual encoders (potion, gemma, bge, snow, jina, e5) on LtHate, RuToxic, and EnSuperset using a unified Python pipeline. For each embedding, we train both a one class HBOS anomaly detector and a two class CatBoost classifier, with and without principal component analysis (PCA) compression to 64-dimensional feature vectors. Across all datasets, two class supervised models consistently and substantially outperform one class anomaly detection, with the best configurations achieving up to 80.96% accuracy and AUC ROC of 0.887 in Lithuanian (jina), 92.19% accuracy and AUC ROC of 0.978 in Russian (e5), and 77.21% accuracy and AUC ROC of 0.859 in English (e5 with PCA). PCA compression preserves almost all discriminative power in the supervised setting, while showing some negative impact for the unsupervised anomaly detection case. These results demonstrate how modern multilingual sentence embeddings combined with gradient boosted decision trees provide robust soft-computing solutions for multilingual hate speech detection applications.

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了多语言句子嵌入模型在立陶宛语、俄语和英语仇恨言论检测中的性能，引入了LtHate语料库，并比较了六种嵌入模型在监督分类和无监督异常检测任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 在线仇恨言论和侮辱性语言在多语言环境特别是低资源语言（如立陶宛语）的内容审核中构成日益严峻的挑战。研究旨在探索现代多语言句子嵌入模型在立陶宛语、俄语和英语仇恨言论检测中的准确性和适用性。
AI.method: 研究引入了LtHate立陶宛语仇恨言论语料库，并构建了统一的Python流水线，在LtHate、RuToxic和EnSuperset三个数据集上对六种多语言编码器（potion、gemma、bge、snow、jina、e5）进行基准测试。对每种嵌入，分别训练了单类HBOS异常检测器和双类CatBoost分类器，并评估了PCA压缩到64维特征向量的影响。
AI.result: 在所有数据集中，双类监督模型始终显著优于单类异常检测。最佳配置在立陶宛语中达到80.96%准确率和0.887 AUC ROC（jina），俄语中达到92.19%准确率和0.978 AUC ROC（e5），英语中达到77.21%准确率和0.859 AUC ROC（e5+PCA）。PCA压缩在监督设置下几乎保留了所有判别能力，但对无监督异常检测有一定负面影响。
AI.conclusion: 现代多语言句子嵌入结合梯度提升决策树为多语言仇恨言论检测应用提供了稳健的软计算方法。监督分类方法在仇恨言论检测任务上明显优于无监督异常检测，且PCA压缩在保持性能的同时能有效降低特征维度。

title: High-Speed Full-Color HDR Imaging via Unwrapping Modulo-Encoded Spike Streams
summary: Conventional RGB-based high dynamic range (HDR) imaging faces a fundamental trade-off between motion artifacts in multi-exposure captures and irreversible information loss in single-shot techniques. Modulo sensors offer a promising alternative by encoding theoretically unbounded dynamic range into wrapped measurements. However, existing modulo solutions remain bottlenecked by iterative unwrapping overhead and hardware constraints limiting them to low-speed, grayscale capture. In this work, we present a complete modulo-based HDR imaging system that enables high-speed, full-color HDR acquisition by synergistically advancing both the sensing formulation and the unwrapping algorithm. At the core of our approach is an exposure-decoupled formulation of modulo imaging that allows multiple measurements to be interleaved in time, preserving a clean, observation-wise measurement model. Building upon this, we introduce an iteration-free unwrapping algorithm that integrates diffusion-based generative priors with the physical least absolute remainder property of modulo images, supporting highly efficient, physics-consistent HDR reconstruction. Finally, to validate the practical viability of our system, we demonstrate a proof-of-concept hardware implementation based on modulo-encoded spike streams. This setup preserves the native high temporal resolution of spike cameras, achieving 1000 FPS full-color imaging while reducing output data bandwidth from approximately 20 Gbps to 6 Gbps. Extensive evaluations indicate that our coordinated approach successfully overcomes key systemic bottlenecks, demonstrating the feasibility of deploying modulo imaging in dynamic scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于模数传感器的高速全彩高动态范围成像系统，通过曝光解耦的模数成像公式和基于扩散先验的无迭代解包算法，实现1000FPS全彩HDR成像，同时将数据带宽从20Gbps降至6Gbps。
AI.motivation: 传统RGB HDR成像面临多曝光运动伪影和单次拍摄信息丢失的根本性权衡。现有模数解决方案受限于迭代解包开销和硬件约束，只能实现低速灰度捕获。需要克服这些系统性瓶颈，实现高速全彩HDR采集。
AI.method: 1) 提出曝光解耦的模数成像公式，允许多个测量在时间上交错，保持清晰的观测模型；2) 开发无迭代解包算法，将基于扩散的生成先验与模数图像的物理最小绝对余数特性结合，实现高效、物理一致的HDR重建；3) 基于模数编码脉冲流实现硬件原型验证。
AI.result: 系统成功实现1000FPS全彩HDR成像，将输出数据带宽从约20Gbps降低至6Gbps。协调方法克服了关键系统性瓶颈，证明了模数成像在动态场景中部署的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 通过协同推进传感公式和解包算法，构建了完整的模数HDR成像系统，实现了高速全彩HDR采集，为动态场景中的模数成像应用提供了可行方案。

title: WavAlign: Enhancing Intelligence and Expressiveness in Spoken Dialogue Models via Adaptive Hybrid Post-Training
summary: End-to-end spoken dialogue models have garnered significant attention because they offer a higher potential ceiling in expressiveness and perceptual ability than cascaded systems. However, the intelligence and expressiveness of current open-source spoken dialogue models often remain below expectations. Motivated by the success of online reinforcement learning(RL) in other domains, one might attempt to directly apply preference optimization to spoken dialogue models, yet this transfer is non-trivial. We analyze these obstacles from the perspectives of reward modeling and rollout sampling, focusing on how sparse preference supervision interacts with dense speech generation under shared-parameter updates. Based on the analysis, we propose a modality-aware adaptive post-training recipe that makes RL practical for spoken dialogue: it constrains preference updates to the semantic channel and improves acoustic behavior via explicit anchoring, while dynamically regulating their mixture from rollout statistics to avoid unreliable preference gradients. We evaluate the method across multiple spoken dialogue benchmarks and representative architectures, and observe consistent improvements in semantic quality and speech expressiveness.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种针对语音对话模型的模态感知自适应后训练方法，通过约束偏好更新到语义通道并改进声学行为，使强化学习在语音对话中实用化。
AI.motivation: 当前开源语音对话模型的智能性和表达能力往往低于预期，虽然端到端语音对话模型比级联系统具有更高的表达潜力，但直接将偏好优化应用于语音对话模型存在挑战。
AI.method: 提出模态感知自适应后训练方法：约束偏好更新到语义通道，通过显式锚定改进声学行为，同时根据rollout统计动态调节两者的混合以避免不可靠的偏好梯度。
AI.result: 在多个语音对话基准测试和代表性架构上进行评估，观察到语义质量和语音表达能力的一致改进。
AI.conclusion: 该方法使强化学习在语音对话中实用化，通过分析奖励建模和rollout采样中的障碍，解决了稀疏偏好监督与密集语音生成在共享参数更新下的交互问题。

title: CMTM: Cross-Modal Token Modulation for Unsupervised Video Object Segmentation
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to IEEE ICIP 2025
summary: Recent advances in unsupervised video object segmentation have highlighted the potential of two-stream architectures that integrate appearance and motion cues. However, fully leveraging these complementary sources of information requires effectively modeling their interdependencies. In this paper, we introduce cross-modality token modulation, a novel approach designed to strengthen the interaction between appearance and motion cues. Our method establishes dense connections between tokens from each modality, enabling efficient intra-modal and inter-modal information propagation through relation transformer blocks. To improve learning efficiency, we incorporate a token masking strategy that addresses the limitations of relying solely on increased model complexity. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance across all public benchmarks, outperforming existing methods.

AI.tldr: 提出跨模态令牌调制方法，通过关系变换器块建立外观与运动线索间的密集连接，结合令牌掩码策略提升学习效率，在无监督视频对象分割任务中实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有双流架构虽能整合外观与运动线索，但未能充分利用这两种互补信息的相互依赖关系。需要更有效地建模外观与运动线索之间的交互作用。
AI.method: 提出跨模态令牌调制方法：1) 建立两种模态令牌间的密集连接；2) 通过关系变换器块实现模态内和模态间的高效信息传播；3) 引入令牌掩码策略，避免仅依赖增加模型复杂度。
AI.result: 在所有公开基准测试中均取得最先进的性能表现，超越了现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态令牌调制能有效增强外观与运动线索的交互，结合令牌掩码策略可提升学习效率，在无监督视频对象分割任务中实现卓越性能。

title: Beyond Importance Sampling: Rejection-Gated Policy Optimization
comment: 27 pages, includes theoretical analysis and experiments
summary: We propose a new perspective on policy optimization: rather than reweighting all samples by their importance ratios, an optimizer should select which samples are trustworthy enough to drive a policy update. Building on this view, we introduce Rejection-Gated Policy Optimization (RGPO), which replaces the importance sampling ratio r_theta = pi_theta / pi_old with a smooth, differentiable acceptance gate alpha_theta(s, a) = g(r_theta(s, a)) in the range [0, 1]. Unlike prior work that applies rejection sampling as a data-level heuristic before training, RGPO elevates rejection to an optimization principle: the gate participates directly in gradient computation and is implicitly updated alongside the policy. RGPO provides a unified framework: the policy gradients of TRPO, PPO, and REINFORCE all correspond to specific choices of the effective gradient weight w(r) = g'(r) * r. We prove that RGPO guarantees finite, bounded gradient variance even when importance sampling ratios are heavy-tailed (where IS variance diverges). We further show that RGPO incurs only a bounded, controllable bias and provides an approximate monotonic policy improvement guarantee analogous to TRPO. RGPO matches PPO in computational cost, requires no second-order optimization, and extends naturally to RLHF-style preference alignment. In online preference fine-tuning of Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct on Anthropic HH-RLHF (n = 3 seeds), RGPO uses a dual-ratio gate that anchors learning to both the previous policy and the reference model, achieving a Pareto-dominant outcome: the highest reward among online RL methods (+14.8% vs. PPO-RLHF) and the lowest KL divergence to the reference model (-16.0% vs. PPO-RLHF, -53.1% vs. GRPO).

AI.tldr: RGPO提出了一种新的策略优化视角：通过可微的接受门函数选择可信样本驱动策略更新，替代传统重要性采样重加权，在保证梯度方差有限的同时控制偏差，实现高效稳定的强化学习优化。
AI.motivation: 传统策略优化方法（如TRPO、PPO）使用重要性采样重加权所有样本，但重要性采样比率可能具有重尾分布，导致梯度方差发散，影响优化稳定性。需要一种既能利用离策略数据又能保证优化稳定性的新方法。
AI.method: 提出拒绝门控策略优化（RGPO），用平滑可微的接受门函数α_θ(s,a)=g(r_θ(s,a))∈[0,1]替代重要性采样比率r_θ=π_θ/π_old。该门函数直接参与梯度计算，与策略共同隐式更新，形成统一的优化框架。TRPO、PPO和REINFORCE的梯度权重w(r)=g'(r)*r对应特定门函数选择。
AI.result: RGPO在重要性采样比率重尾分布时仍能保证有限有界的梯度方差，同时引入可控的有界偏差，提供类似TRPO的近似单调策略改进保证。在RLHF偏好对齐实验中，RGPO使用双比率门函数（锚定先前策略和参考模型），在Anthropic HH-RLHF数据集上实现Pareto最优：在线RL方法中奖励最高（比PPO-RLHF高14.8%），与参考模型的KL散度最低（比PPO-RLHF低16.0%，比GRPO低53.1%）。
AI.conclusion: RGPO将拒绝采样提升为优化原则，通过可微接受门选择可信样本驱动策略更新，在保证梯度方差有限的同时控制偏差，提供统一框架解释传统方法，计算成本与PPO相当，无需二阶优化，自然扩展到RLHF偏好对齐，实现奖励与对齐性的Pareto改进。

title: Switch-KD: Visual-Switch Knowledge Distillation for Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have shown remarkable capabilities in joint vision-language understanding, but their large scale poses significant challenges for deployment in resource-constrained scenarios. Knowledge Distillation (KD) offers a viable way to improve model capabilities without increasing model size or data requirements, making deployment more efficient. However, applying KD to VLMs is challenged by modality-specific supervision: although multimodal knowledge in VLMs is fused within the language space, current methods supervise each modality separately without explicitly addressing multimodal alignment, leading to inconsistent multimodal knowledge transfer. To address this, we propose Switch-KD, a visual-switch distillation framework that unifies vision-language knowledge transfer within a shared text-probability space. Switch-KD comprises two key components: (1) Visual-Switch Distillation, which switches the student's visual outputs into the teacher's language pathway to construct cross-modal probabilistic references for implicit visual knowledge transfer; and (2) Dynamic Bi-directional Logits Difference (DBiLD) loss, which adaptively aligns informative probability regions while preserving the distributional structures of teacher and student through bidirectional supervision. Guided by Switch-KD, a 0.5B TinyLLaVA effectively distills rich multimodal knowledge from its 3B teacher, yielding an average improvement of 3.6 points across 10 multimodal benchmarks without any architectural modification.

AI.tldr: Switch-KD：一种视觉切换蒸馏框架，通过将学生模型的视觉输出切换到教师模型的语言通路中，在共享文本概率空间内统一视觉-语言知识转移，解决了VLM知识蒸馏中的多模态对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）在资源受限场景下的部署面临规模挑战。知识蒸馏（KD）能提升模型能力而不增加规模，但现有方法在VLM上存在多模态对齐问题：尽管多模态知识在语言空间中融合，当前方法却分别监督每个模态，导致多模态知识转移不一致。
AI.method: 提出Switch-KD框架，包含两个核心组件：1）视觉切换蒸馏：将学生模型的视觉输出切换到教师模型的语言通路中，构建跨模态概率参考以实现隐式视觉知识转移；2）动态双向对数差异（DBiLD）损失：自适应对齐信息丰富的概率区域，同时通过双向监督保持师生模型的分布结构。
AI.result: 0.5B参数的TinyLLaVA通过Switch-KD从3B参数的教师模型中有效蒸馏出丰富的多模态知识，在10个多模态基准测试中平均提升3.6分，且无需任何架构修改。
AI.conclusion: Switch-KD通过统一的文本概率空间解决了VLM知识蒸馏中的多模态对齐问题，实现了高效的多模态知识转移，为资源受限场景下的VLM部署提供了有效解决方案。

title: Evolvable Embodied Agent for Robotic Manipulation via Long Short-Term Reflection and Optimization
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 2026 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2026)
summary: Achieving general-purpose robotics requires empowering robots to adapt and evolve based on their environment and feedback. Traditional methods face limitations such as extensive training requirements, difficulties in cross-task generalization, and lack of interpretability. Prompt learning offers new opportunities for self-evolving robots without extensive training, but simply reflecting on past experiences.However, extracting meaningful insights from task successes and failures remains a challenge. To this end, we propose the evolvable embodied agent (EEAgent) framework, which leverages large vision-language models (VLMs) for better environmental interpretation and policy planning. To enhance reflection on past experiences, we propose a long short-term reflective optimization (LSTRO) mechanism that dynamically refines prompts based on both past experiences and newly learned lessons, facilitating continuous self-evolution, thereby enhancing overall task success rates. Evaluations on six VIMA-Bench tasks reveal that our approach sets a new state-of-the-art, notably outperforming baselines in complex scenarios.

AI.tldr: EEAgent框架利用视觉语言模型实现机器人自我进化，通过长短时反思优化机制动态调整提示，在VIMA-Bench任务中达到SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 通用机器人需要能够基于环境和反馈进行自适应和进化。传统方法存在训练需求大、跨任务泛化困难、缺乏可解释性等限制。提示学习为无需大量训练的自我进化提供了新机会，但从任务成功和失败中提取有意义的洞察仍然具有挑战性。
AI.method: 提出可进化具身智能体（EEAgent）框架，利用大型视觉语言模型进行环境理解和策略规划。引入长短时反思优化（LSTRO）机制，基于过去经验和新学到的教训动态优化提示，实现持续自我进化。
AI.result: 在六个VIMA-Bench任务上的评估表明，该方法创造了新的最先进水平，在复杂场景中显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: EEAgent框架通过结合视觉语言模型和反思优化机制，实现了机器人的持续自我进化，为解决通用机器人面临的训练需求大、泛化困难等问题提供了有效方案。

title: Multigrain-aware Semantic Prototype Scanning and Tri-Token Prompt Learning Embraced High-Order RWKV for Pan-Sharpening
summary: In this work, we propose a Multigrain-aware Semantic Prototype Scanning paradigm for pan-sharpening, built upon a high-order RWKV architecture and a tri-token prompting mechanism derived from semantic clustering. Specifically, our method contains three key components: 1) Multigrain-aware Semantic Prototype Scanning. Although RWKV offers a efficient linear-complexity alternative to Transformers, its conventional bidirectional raster scanning is still semantic-agnostic and prone to positional bias. To address this issue, we introduce a semantic-driven scanning strategy that leverages locality-sensitive hashing to group semantically related regions and construct multi-grain semantic prototypes, enabling context-aware token reordering and more coherent global interaction. 2) Tri-token Prompt Learning. We design a tri-token prompting mechanism consisting of a global token, cluster-derived prototype tokens, and a learnable register token. The global and prototype tokens provide complementary semantic priors for RWKV modeling, while the register token helps suppress noisy and artifact-prone intermediate representations. 3) Invertible Q-Shift. To counteract spatial details, we apply center difference convolution on the value pathway to inject high-frequency information, and introduce an invertible multi-scale Q-shift operation for efficient and lossless feature transformation without parameter-heavy receptive field expansion. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our method.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于高阶RWKV架构和三令牌提示机制的多粒度感知语义原型扫描范式，用于全色锐化任务，通过语义驱动的扫描策略和可逆Q-Shift操作提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统RWKV的双向光栅扫描是语义无关的且容易产生位置偏差，需要更有效的语义感知扫描策略来提升全色锐化的性能。
AI.method: 1) 多粒度感知语义原型扫描：利用局部敏感哈希对语义相关区域分组，构建多粒度语义原型；2) 三令牌提示学习：包含全局令牌、聚类原型令牌和可学习寄存器令牌；3) 可逆Q-Shift：在值路径上应用中心差分卷积注入高频信息，引入可逆多尺度Q-Shift操作。
AI.result: 实验结果表明该方法在性能上具有优越性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多粒度感知语义原型扫描范式通过语义驱动的扫描策略、三令牌提示机制和可逆Q-Shift操作，有效解决了传统RWKV的位置偏差问题，提升了全色锐化的性能。

title: Stability Principle Underlying Passive Dynamic Walking of Rimless Wheel
comment: This is a corrected version of the 2012 IEEE CCA paper. A typographical error in Eq. (16) has been corrected
summary: Rimless wheels are known as the simplest model for passive dynamic walking. It is known that the passive gait generated only by gravity effect always becomes asymptotically stable and 1-period because a rimless wheel automatically achieves the two necessary conditions for guaranteeing the asymptotic stability; one is the constraint on impact posture and the other is the constraint on restored mechanical energy. The asymptotic stability is then easily shown by the recurrence formula of kinetic energy. There is room, however, for further research into the inherent stability principle. In this paper, we reconsider the stability of the stance phase based on the linearization of the equation of motion, and investigate the relation between the stability and energy conservation law. Through the mathematical analysis, we provide a greater understanding of the inherent stability principle.

AI.tldr: 重新分析无轮缘轮被动行走的稳定性，通过运动方程线性化研究稳定性与能量守恒定律的关系，深化对内在稳定性原理的理解
AI.motivation: 虽然已知无轮缘轮在重力作用下的被动步态总是渐近稳定且为1周期，但对其内在稳定性原理的研究仍有深入空间。论文旨在重新审视站立相稳定性与能量守恒定律的关系，提供更深入的理论理解。
AI.method: 基于运动方程的线性化重新分析站立相稳定性，通过数学分析研究稳定性与能量守恒定律的关联，探讨无轮缘轮自动满足的两个必要条件（冲击姿态约束和恢复机械能约束）如何保证渐近稳定性。
AI.result: 通过数学分析揭示了无轮缘轮被动行走的内在稳定性原理，阐明了运动方程线性化与能量守恒定律在保证渐近稳定性中的关键作用，深化了对这一简单模型稳定机制的理论理解。
AI.conclusion: 无轮缘轮的被动步态稳定性源于其自动满足的两个必要条件，通过运动方程线性化和能量守恒定律的数学分析，可以更深入地理解其内在稳定性原理，为被动动态行走的稳定性分析提供了更完善的理论框架。

title: Towards Design Compositing
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2026 Workshop on CVEU
summary: Graphic design creation involves harmoniously assembling multimodal components such as images, text, logos, and other visual assets collected from diverse sources, into a visually-appealing and cohesive design. Recent methods have largely focused on layout prediction or complementary element generation, while retaining input elements exactly, implicitly assuming that provided components are already stylistically harmonious. In practice, inputs often come from disparate sources and exhibit visual mismatch, making this assumption limiting. We argue that identity-preserving stylization and compositing of input elements is a critical missing ingredient for truly harmonized components-to-design pipelines. To this end, we propose GIST, a training-free, identity-preserving image compositor that sits between layout prediction and typography generation, and can be plugged into any existing components-to-design or design-refining pipeline without modification. We demonstrate this by integrating GIST with two substantially different existing methods, LaDeCo and Design-o-meter. GIST shows significant improvements in visual harmony and aesthetic quality across both pipelines, as validated by LLaVA-OV and GPT-4V on aspect-wise ratings and pairwise preference over naive pasting. Project Page: abhinav-mahajan10.github.io/GIST/.

AI.tldr: GIST是一个无需训练、保持元素身份的图像合成器，可插入现有组件到设计流程中，通过风格化解决视觉不匹配问题，显著提升视觉和谐度与美学质量。
AI.motivation: 现有组件到设计的方法通常假设输入元素已经风格和谐，但实践中元素来自不同来源存在视觉不匹配。保持身份的风格化与合成是真正和谐设计流程的关键缺失环节。
AI.method: 提出GIST，一个无需训练、保持元素身份的图像合成器，位于布局预测和排版生成之间，可无缝集成到任何现有组件到设计或设计优化流程中，无需修改。
AI.result: 将GIST集成到LaDeCo和Design-o-meter两种不同方法中，相比简单粘贴，在视觉和谐度和美学质量上均有显著提升，经LLaVA-OV和GPT-4V评估验证。
AI.conclusion: GIST作为保持身份的风格化合成器，填补了组件到设计流程的关键空白，能有效解决多源元素的视觉不匹配问题，提升设计和谐度与美感。

title: xFODE: An Explainable Fuzzy Additive ODE Framework for System Identification
comment: in IEEE Conference on Artificial Intelligence, 2026
summary: Recent advances in Deep Learning (DL) have strengthened data-driven System Identification (SysID), with Neural and Fuzzy Ordinary Differential Equation (NODE/FODE) models achieving high accuracy in nonlinear dynamic modeling. Yet, system states in these frameworks are often reconstructed without clear physical meaning, and input contributions to the state derivatives remain difficult to interpret. To address these limitations, we propose Explainable FODE (xFODE), an interpretable SysID framework with integrated DL-based training. In xFODE, we define states in an incremental form to provide them with physical meanings. We employ fuzzy additive models to approximate the state derivative, thereby enhancing interpretability per input. To provide further interpretability, Partitioning Strategies (PSs) are developed, enabling the training of fuzzy additive models with explainability. By structuring the antecedent space during training so that only two consecutive rules are activated for any given input, PSs not only yield lower complexity for local inference but also enhance the interpretability of the antecedent space. To train xFODE, we present a DL framework with parameterized membership function learning that supports end-to-end optimization. Across benchmark SysID datasets, xFODE matches the accuracy of NODE, FODE, and NLARX models while providing interpretable insights.

AI.tldr: 提出可解释模糊常微分方程（xFODE）框架，在保持深度学习系统辨识精度的同时增强模型可解释性
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的系统辨识方法（如NODE/FODE）虽然精度高，但系统状态缺乏明确物理意义，输入对状态导数的贡献难以解释，需要开发既准确又可解释的框架
AI.method: 提出xFODE框架：1) 定义增量形式的状态以赋予物理意义；2) 使用模糊加性模型近似状态导数以增强输入可解释性；3) 开发分区策略（PSs）训练模糊加性模型，通过结构化前件空间使每个输入只激活两个连续规则；4) 设计支持端到端优化的深度学习框架，包含参数化隶属函数学习
AI.result: 在基准系统辨识数据集上，xFODE在精度上匹配NODE、FODE和NLARX模型，同时提供可解释的洞察
AI.conclusion: xFODE成功解决了深度学习系统辨识中可解释性不足的问题，在保持高精度的同时提供了物理意义明确的状态定义、输入贡献解释和结构化前件空间，为可解释系统辨识提供了有效框架

title: Prompt-Guided Image Editing with Masked Logit Nudging in Visual Autoregressive Models
comment: Accepted at the 2026 IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Findings (CVPRF)
summary: We address the problem of prompt-guided image editing in visual autoregressive models. Given a source image and a target text prompt, we aim to modify the source image according to the target prompt, while preserving all regions which are unrelated to the requested edit. To this end, we present Masked Logit Nudging, which uses the source image token maps to introduce a guidance step that aligns the model's predictions under the target prompt with these source token maps. Specifically, we convert the fixed source encodings into logits using the VAR encoding, nudging the model's predicted logits towards the targets along a semantic trajectory defined by the source-target prompts. Edits are applied only within spatial masks obtained through a dedicated masking scheme that leverages cross-attention differences between the source and edited prompts. Then, we introduce a refinement to correct quantization errors and improve reconstruction quality. Our approach achieves the best image editing performance on the PIE benchmark at 512px and 1024px resolutions. Beyond editing, our method delivers faithful reconstructions and outperforms previous methods on COCO at 512px and OpenImages at 1024px. Overall, our method outperforms VAR-related approaches and achieves comparable or even better performance than diffusion models, while being much faster. Code is available at 'https://github.com/AmirMaEl/MLN'.

AI.tldr: 提出Masked Logit Nudging方法，用于视觉自回归模型中的提示引导图像编辑，通过源图像token映射引导模型预测，结合专用掩码方案实现精确编辑，在多个基准测试中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 解决视觉自回归模型中提示引导图像编辑的问题，即在根据目标文本提示修改源图像的同时，保留与编辑请求无关的所有区域，实现精确、可控的图像编辑。
AI.method: 提出Masked Logit Nudging方法：1) 利用源图像token映射引入引导步骤，使模型在目标提示下的预测与源token映射对齐；2) 通过VAR编码将固定源编码转换为logits，沿源-目标提示定义的语义轨迹推动模型预测logits；3) 使用基于源与编辑提示交叉注意力差异的专用掩码方案确定编辑区域；4) 引入细化步骤纠正量化误差并提高重建质量。
AI.result: 在PIE基准测试的512px和1024px分辨率上取得最佳图像编辑性能；在COCO 512px和OpenImages 1024px上实现忠实重建并超越先前方法；整体性能优于VAR相关方法，与扩散模型相当甚至更好，且速度更快。
AI.conclusion: Masked Logit Nudging方法有效解决了视觉自回归模型中的提示引导图像编辑问题，实现了精确编辑和高质量重建，在多个基准测试中表现优异，为快速高效的图像编辑提供了新方案。

title: Governing Reflective Human-AI Collaboration: A Framework for Epistemic Scaffolding and Traceable Reasoning
summary:
Large language models have advanced rapidly, from pattern recognition to emerging forms of reasoning, yet they remain confined to linguistic simulation rather than grounded understanding. They can produce fluent outputs that resemble reflection, but lack temporal continuity, causal feedback, and anchoring in real-world interaction. This paper proposes a complementary approach in which reasoning is treated as a relational process distributed between human and model rather than an internal capability of either.
  Building on recent work on "System-2" learning, we relocate reflective reasoning to the interaction layer. Instead of engineering reasoning solely within models, we frame it as a cognitive protocol that can be structured, measured, and governed using existing systems. This perspective emphasizes collaborative intelligence, combining human judgment and contextual understanding with machine speed, memory, and associative capacity.
  We introduce "The Architect's Pen" as a practical method. Like an architect who thinks through drawing, the human uses the model as an external medium for structured reflection. By embedding phases of articulation, critique, and revision into human-AI interaction, the dialogue itself becomes a reasoning loop: human abstraction -> model articulation -> human reflection.
  This reframes the question from whether the model can think to whether the human-AI system can reason. The framework enables auditable reasoning traces and supports alignment with emerging governance standards, including the EU AI Act and ISO/IEC 42001. It provides a practical path toward more transparent, controllable, and accountable AI use without requiring new model architectures.

AI.tldr: 论文提出将推理视为人类与模型之间的分布式关系过程，而非任一方的内部能力，通过"建筑师之笔"方法将反思性推理重新定位到交互层。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型虽然从模式识别发展到推理能力，但仍局限于语言模拟而非基于现实的理解。它们缺乏时间连续性、因果反馈和真实世界交互的锚定，需要一种互补方法来实现真正的推理。
AI.method: 提出"The Architect's Pen"方法，将推理视为人类与AI之间的认知协议。人类像建筑师通过绘图思考一样，将模型作为结构化反思的外部媒介，嵌入表达、批判和修订阶段，形成人类抽象->模型表达->人类反思的推理循环。
AI.result: 该方法将问题从"模型是否能思考"重新定义为"人机系统是否能推理"，支持可审计的推理痕迹，并与欧盟AI法案和ISO/IEC 42001等治理标准保持一致，提供透明、可控、可问责的AI使用路径。
AI.conclusion: 通过将推理重新定位为分布式关系过程，该方法实现了协作智能，结合人类判断和上下文理解与机器的速度、记忆和关联能力，无需新模型架构即可实现更透明、可控和可问责的AI使用。

title: Chain of Uncertain Rewards with Large Language Models for Reinforcement Learning
summary: Designing effective reward functions is a cornerstone of reinforcement learning (RL), yet it remains a challenging and labor-intensive process due to the inefficiencies and inconsistencies inherent in traditional methods. Existing methods often rely on extensive manual design and evaluation steps, which are prone to redundancy and overlook local uncertainties at intermediate decision points. To address these challenges, we propose the Chain of Uncertain Rewards (CoUR), a novel framework that integrates large language models (LLMs) to streamline reward function design and evaluation in RL environments. Specifically, our CoUR introduces code uncertainty quantification with a similarity selection mechanism that combines textual and semantic analyses to identify and reuse the most relevant reward function components. By reducing redundant evaluations and leveraging Bayesian optimization on decoupled reward terms, CoUR enables a more efficient and robust search for optimal reward feedback. We comprehensively evaluate CoUR across nine original environments from IsaacGym and all 20 tasks from the Bidexterous Manipulation benchmark. The experimental results demonstrate that CoUR not only achieves better performance but also significantly lowers the cost of reward evaluations.

AI.tldr: CoUR框架利用LLM优化RL奖励函数设计，通过代码不确定性量化与相似性选择机制减少冗余评估，在IsaacGym和Bidexterous Manipulation基准上实现更好性能并降低评估成本。
AI.motivation: 传统RL奖励函数设计方法存在效率低下、不一致的问题，依赖大量人工设计和评估步骤，容易产生冗余且忽略中间决策点的局部不确定性。
AI.method: 提出Chain of Uncertain Rewards (CoUR)框架，集成LLM优化奖励函数设计与评估。采用代码不确定性量化与相似性选择机制，结合文本和语义分析识别和重用最相关的奖励函数组件。通过减少冗余评估并利用贝叶斯优化解耦奖励项，实现更高效鲁棒的奖励反馈搜索。
AI.result: 在IsaacGym的9个原始环境和Bidexterous Manipulation基准的20个任务上全面评估。实验结果表明CoUR不仅获得更好性能，还显著降低了奖励评估成本。
AI.conclusion: CoUR框架通过集成LLM和不确定性量化机制，有效解决了传统RL奖励函数设计的效率问题，为自动化奖励函数设计提供了新方向。

title: MapSR: Prompt-Driven Land Cover Map Super-Resolution via Vision Foundation Models
summary: High-resolution (HR) land-cover mapping is often constrained by the high cost of dense HR annotations. We revisit this problem from the perspective of map super-resolution, which enhances coarse low-resolution (LR) land-cover products into HR maps at the resolution of the input imagery. Existing weakly supervised methods can leverage LR labels, but they typically use them to retrain dense predictors with substantial computational cost. We propose MapSR, a prompt-driven framework that decouples supervision from model training. MapSR uses LR labels once to extract class prompts from frozen vision foundation model features through a lightweight linear probe, after which HR mapping proceeds via training-free metric inference and graph-based prediction refinement. Specifically, class prompts are estimated by aggregating high-confidence HR features identified by the linear probe, and HR predictions are obtained by cosine-similarity matching followed by graph-based propagation for spatial refinement. Experiments on the Chesapeake Bay dataset show that MapSR achieves 59.64% mIoU without any HR labels, remaining competitive with the strongest weakly supervised baseline and surpassing a fully supervised baseline. Notably, MapSR reduces trainable parameters by four orders of magnitude and shortens training time from hours to minutes, enabling scalable HR mapping under limited annotation and compute budgets. The code is available at https://github.com/rikirikirikiriki/MapSR.

AI.tldr: MapSR：一种无需高分辨率标注的提示驱动框架，通过线性探针提取类别提示，结合无训练度量推理和图传播实现土地覆盖图超分辨率
AI.motivation: 高分辨率土地覆盖制图面临密集标注成本高昂的约束。现有弱监督方法虽然可以利用低分辨率标签，但通常需要重新训练密集预测器，计算成本较高。需要一种能够解耦监督与模型训练、降低计算负担的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出MapSR框架：1）使用低分辨率标签通过轻量级线性探针从冻结的视觉基础模型特征中提取类别提示；2）通过无训练的余弦相似度匹配获得高分辨率预测；3）采用基于图的传播进行空间细化。整个过程仅使用一次低分辨率标签，后续无需训练。
AI.result: 在Chesapeake Bay数据集上，MapSR在没有任何高分辨率标签的情况下达到59.64% mIoU，与最强的弱监督基线竞争力相当，并超过完全监督基线。可训练参数减少四个数量级，训练时间从数小时缩短至数分钟。
AI.conclusion: MapSR通过解耦监督与模型训练，实现了高效、可扩展的高分辨率土地覆盖制图，在有限标注和计算预算下具有显著优势。该方法为地图超分辨率问题提供了新的解决方案。

title: RadarSplat-RIO: Indoor Radar-Inertial Odometry with Gaussian Splatting-Based Radar Bundle Adjustment
summary: Radar is more resilient to adverse weather and lighting conditions than visual and Lidar simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM). However, most radar SLAM pipelines still rely heavily on frame-to-frame odometry, which leads to substantial drift. While loop closure can correct long-term errors, it requires revisiting places and relies on robust place recognition. In contrast, visual odometry methods typically leverage bundle adjustment (BA) to jointly optimize poses and map within a local window. However, an equivalent BA formulation for radar has remained largely unexplored. We present the first radar BA framework enabled by Gaussian Splatting (GS), a dense and differentiable scene representation. Our method jointly optimizes radar sensor poses and scene geometry using full range-azimuth-Doppler data, bringing the benefits of multi-frame BA to radar for the first time. When integrated with an existing radar-inertial odometry frontend, our approach significantly reduces pose drift and improves robustness. Across multiple indoor scenes, our radar BA achieves substantial gains over the prior radar-inertial odometry, reducing average absolute translational and rotational errors by 90% and 80%, respectively.

AI.tldr: 首个基于高斯泼溅的雷达束调整框架，利用全距离-方位-多普勒数据联合优化雷达位姿与场景几何，显著降低雷达SLAM漂移
AI.motivation: 雷达SLAM对恶劣天气和光照条件更具鲁棒性，但现有方法严重依赖帧间里程计导致显著漂移。视觉里程计通常使用束调整联合优化位姿和地图，但雷达领域缺乏等效的束调整方法
AI.method: 提出首个基于高斯泼溅的雷达束调整框架，利用可微分密集场景表示，联合优化雷达传感器位姿和场景几何，使用全距离-方位-多普勒数据，将多帧束调整的优势引入雷达SLAM
AI.result: 在多个室内场景中，与现有雷达惯性里程计相比，平均绝对平移误差减少90%，旋转误差减少80%，显著降低位姿漂移并提高鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: 首次将束调整引入雷达SLAM，通过高斯泼溅表示实现雷达位姿与场景几何的联合优化，为雷达SLAM提供了类似视觉SLAM的多帧优化能力，显著提升精度和鲁棒性

title: xFODE+: Explainable Type-2 Fuzzy Additive ODEs for Uncertainty Quantification
comment: in IEEE International Conference on Fuzzy Systems, 2026
summary: Recent advances in Deep Learning (DL) have boosted data-driven System Identification (SysID), but reliable use requires Uncertainty Quantification (UQ) alongside accurate predictions. Although UQ-capable models such as Fuzzy ODE (FODE) can produce Prediction Intervals (PIs), they offer limited interpretability. We introduce Explainable Type-2 Fuzzy Additive ODEs for UQ (xFODE+), an interpretable SysID model which produces PIs alongside point predictions while retaining physically meaningful incremental states. xFODE+ implements each fuzzy additive model with Interval Type-2 Fuzzy Logic Systems (IT2-FLSs) and constraints membership functions to the activation of two neighboring rules, limiting overlap and keeping inference locally transparent. The type-reduced sets produced by the IT2-FLSs are aggregated to construct the state update together with the PIs. The model is trained in a DL framework via a composite loss that jointly optimizes prediction accuracy and PI quality. Results on benchmark SysID datasets show that xFODE+ matches FODE in PI quality and achieves comparable accuracy, while providing interpretability.

AI.tldr: xFODE+是一种可解释的Type-2模糊加性ODE模型，用于系统辨识中的不确定性量化，在保持预测精度的同时提供预测区间和物理可解释性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习推动了数据驱动的系统辨识，但可靠使用需要不确定性量化。现有方法如模糊ODE能产生预测区间但可解释性有限，需要同时实现准确预测、不确定性量化和可解释性的模型。
AI.method: 提出xFODE+模型，使用区间Type-2模糊逻辑系统实现每个模糊加性模型，约束隶属函数到两个相邻规则的激活，限制重叠并保持局部透明推理。通过IT2-FLS产生的类型约简集聚合构建状态更新和预测区间，在深度学习框架中使用复合损失函数联合优化预测精度和预测区间质量。
AI.result: 在基准系统辨识数据集上的结果显示，xFODE+在预测区间质量上与FODE相当，达到可比精度，同时提供可解释性。
AI.conclusion: xFODE+成功实现了系统辨识中准确预测、不确定性量化和可解释性的平衡，为可靠的数据驱动系统辨识提供了有效解决方案。

title: TurboTalk: Progressive Distillation for One-Step Audio-Driven Talking Avatar Generation
summary: Existing audio-driven video digital human generation models rely on multi-step denoising, resulting in substantial computational overhead that severely limits their deployment in real-world settings. While one-step distillation approaches can significantly accelerate inference, they often suffer from training instability. To address this challenge, we propose TurboTalk, a two-stage progressive distillation framework that effectively compresses a multi-step audio-driven video diffusion model into a single-step generator. We first adopt Distribution Matching Distillation to obtain a strong and stable 4-step student, and then progressively reduce the denoising steps from 4 to 1 through adversarial distillation. To ensure stable training under extreme step reduction, we introduce a progressive timestep sampling strategy and a self-compare adversarial objective that provides an intermediate adversarial reference that stabilizes progressive distillation. Our method achieve single-step generation of video talking avatar, boosting inference speed by 120 times while maintaining high generation quality.

AI.tldr: TurboTalk：一种两阶段渐进蒸馏框架，将多步音频驱动视频扩散模型压缩为单步生成器，推理速度提升120倍
AI.motivation: 现有音频驱动视频数字人生成模型依赖多步去噪，计算开销大，限制了实际部署。一步蒸馏方法能加速推理但训练不稳定。
AI.method: 提出两阶段渐进蒸馏框架：1) 使用分布匹配蒸馏获得稳定的4步学生模型；2) 通过对抗蒸馏从4步渐进减少到1步。引入渐进时间步采样策略和自比较对抗目标来稳定训练。
AI.result: 实现了视频说话头像的单步生成，推理速度提升120倍，同时保持高质量生成效果。
AI.conclusion: TurboTalk通过渐进蒸馏有效解决了音频驱动视频生成模型的加速问题，在保持质量的同时大幅提升推理效率，具有实际部署价值。

title: RobotPan: A 360$^\circ$ Surround-View Robotic Vision System for Embodied Perception
summary: Surround-view perception is increasingly important for robotic navigation and loco-manipulation, especially in human-in-the-loop settings such as teleoperation, data collection, and emergency takeover. However, current robotic visual interfaces are often limited to narrow forward-facing views, or, when multiple on-board cameras are available, require cumbersome manual switching that interrupts the operator's workflow. Both configurations suffer from motion-induced jitter that causes simulator sickness in head-mounted displays. We introduce a surround-view robotic vision system that combines six cameras with LiDAR to provide full 360$^\circ$ visual coverage, while meeting the geometric and real-time constraints of embodied deployment. We further present \textsc{RobotPan}, a feed-forward framework that predicts \emph{metric-scaled} and \emph{compact} 3D Gaussians from calibrated sparse-view inputs for real-time rendering, reconstruction, and streaming. \textsc{RobotPan} lifts multi-view features into a unified spherical coordinate representation and decodes Gaussians using hierarchical spherical voxel priors, allocating fine resolution near the robot and coarser resolution at larger radii to reduce computational redundancy without sacrificing fidelity. To support long sequences, our online fusion updates dynamic content while preventing unbounded growth in static regions by selectively updating appearance. Finally, we release a multi-sensor dataset tailored to 360$^\circ$ novel view synthesis and metric 3D reconstruction for robotics, covering navigation, manipulation, and locomotion on real platforms. Experiments show that \textsc{RobotPan} achieves competitive quality against prior feed-forward reconstruction and view-synthesis methods while producing substantially fewer Gaussians, enabling practical real-time embodied deployment. Project website: https://robotpan.github.io/

AI.tldr: 提出RobotPan系统，通过六摄像头+LiDAR实现360度环绕视觉，使用前馈框架从稀疏视图预测度量尺度紧凑3D高斯，支持实时渲染、重建和流式传输
AI.motivation: 当前机器人视觉接口通常局限于窄前向视图或多摄像头手动切换，存在运动抖动导致模拟器眩晕问题，需要满足几何和实时约束的360度视觉覆盖系统
AI.method: 结合六摄像头与LiDAR实现360度覆盖；提出RobotPan前馈框架，将多视图特征提升到统一球坐标系表示，使用分层球形体素先验解码高斯，近机器人处分配精细分辨率，远处分配粗糙分辨率以减少计算冗余；在线融合更新动态内容，防止静态区域无界增长
AI.result: RobotPan在质量上与先前前馈重建和视图合成方法竞争，同时产生显著更少的高斯，实现实用的实时部署；发布了专门用于360度新视图合成和度量3D重建的多传感器数据集
AI.conclusion: 提出的环绕视觉系统和RobotPan框架解决了机器人导航和操作中的视觉限制问题，通过紧凑3D高斯表示和分层分辨率分配实现了高质量实时360度视觉覆盖

title: Robust Energy-Aware Routing for Air-Ground Cooperative Multi-UAV Delivery in Wind-Uncertain Environments
summary: Ensuring energy feasibility under wind uncertainty is critical for the safety and reliability of UAV delivery missions. In realistic truck-drone logistics systems, UAVs must deliver parcels and safely return under time-varying wind conditions that are only partially observable during flight. However, most existing routing approaches assume static or deterministic energy models, making them unreliable in dynamic wind environments. We propose Battery-Efficient Routing (BER), an online risk-sensitive planning framework for wind-sensitive truck-assisted UAV delivery. The problem is formulated as routing on a time dependent energy graph whose edge costs evolve according to wind-induced aerodynamic effects. BER continuously evaluates return feasibility while balancing instantaneous energy expenditure and uncertainty-aware risk. The approach is embedded in a hierarchical aerial-ground delivery architecture that combines task allocation, routing, and decentralized trajectory execution. Extensive simulations on synthetic ER graphs generated in Unreal Engine environments and quasi-real wind logs demonstrate that BER significantly improves mission success rates and reduces wind-induced failures compared with static and greedy baselines. These results highlight the importance of integrating real-time energy budgeting and environmental awareness for UAV delivery planning under dynamic wind conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向卡车辅助无人机配送的在线风险敏感规划框架BER，用于在动态风环境下确保能量可行性，显著提高了任务成功率并减少了风致故障。
AI.motivation: 在现实的卡车-无人机物流系统中，无人机必须在部分可观测的时变风条件下完成包裹投递并安全返回。现有路由方法大多假设静态或确定性能量模型，在动态风环境中不可靠，因此需要开发能够确保能量可行性的规划框架。
AI.method: 提出电池高效路由(BER)框架，将问题建模为在时间依赖的能量图上进行路由，其中边成本根据风致空气动力学效应演化。BER持续评估返回可行性，同时平衡瞬时能量消耗和不确定性感知风险。该方法嵌入到结合任务分配、路由和分散轨迹执行的分层空地配送架构中。
AI.result: 在Unreal Engine环境中生成的合成ER图和准真实风日志上的大量仿真表明，BER相比静态和贪婪基线方法显著提高了任务成功率，并减少了风致故障。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，在动态风条件下进行无人机配送规划时，集成实时能量预算和环境感知至关重要。BER框架为风敏感卡车辅助无人机配送提供了有效的在线风险敏感规划解决方案。

title: Deepfake Detection Generalization with Diffusion Noise
summary: Deepfake detectors face growing challenges in generalization as new image synthesis techniques emerge. In particular, deepfakes generated by diffusion models are highly photorealistic and often evade detectors trained on GAN-based forgeries. This paper addresses the generalization problem in deepfake detection by leveraging diffusion noise characteristics. We propose an Attention-guided Noise Learning (ANL) framework that integrates a pre-trained diffusion model into the deepfake detection pipeline to guide the learning of more robust features. Specifically, our method uses the diffusion model's denoising process to expose subtle artifacts: the detector is trained to predict the noise contained in an input image at a given diffusion step, forcing it to capture discrepancies between real and synthetic images, while an attention-guided mechanism derived from the predicted noise is introduced to encourage the model to focus on globally distributed discrepancies rather than local patterns. By harnessing the frozen diffusion model's learned distribution of natural images, the ANL method acts as a form of regularization, improving the detector's generalization to unseen forgery types. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ANL significantly outperforms existing methods on multiple benchmarks, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy in detecting diffusion-generated deepfakes. Notably, the proposed framework boosts generalization performance (e.g., improving ACC/AP by a substantial margin on unseen models) without introducing additional overhead during inference. Our results highlight that diffusion noise provides a powerful signal for generalizable deepfake detection.

AI.tldr: 提出ANL框架，利用扩散模型噪声特征提升深度伪造检测的泛化能力，通过注意力引导的噪声学习捕获真实与合成图像间的差异，在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 随着扩散模型等新型图像合成技术的出现，深度伪造检测器面临泛化能力不足的挑战。扩散模型生成的深度伪造具有高度真实感，常能逃避基于GAN伪造训练的检测器，因此需要开发能更好泛化到未见伪造类型的检测方法。
AI.method: 提出注意力引导噪声学习（ANL）框架，将预训练扩散模型集成到深度伪造检测流程中。方法利用扩散模型去噪过程揭示细微伪影：检测器训练预测给定扩散步骤中图像包含的噪声，迫使其捕获真实与合成图像间的差异。同时引入基于预测噪声的注意力引导机制，鼓励模型关注全局分布的差异而非局部模式。通过利用冻结扩散模型学习的自然图像分布，ANL作为正则化形式提升检测器对未见伪造类型的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上的广泛实验表明，ANL显著优于现有方法，在检测扩散模型生成的深度伪造方面达到最先进准确率。该方法大幅提升泛化性能（如在未见模型上显著提高ACC/AP），且推理时不引入额外开销。结果证明扩散噪声为可泛化的深度伪造检测提供了强大信号。
AI.conclusion: 扩散噪声特征为深度伪造检测的泛化问题提供了有效解决方案。ANL框架通过注意力引导的噪声学习机制，利用预训练扩散模型捕获真实与合成图像间的细微差异，显著提升检测器对新型伪造技术的泛化能力，为应对不断演变的深度伪造威胁提供了有前景的方向。

title: MemoSight: Unifying Context Compression and Multi Token Prediction for Reasoning Acceleration
summary: While Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning enables LLMs to solve challenging reasoning problems, as KV cache grows linearly with the number of generated tokens, CoT reasoning faces scaling issues in terms of speed and memory usage. In this work, we propose MemoSight (Memory-Foresight-based reasoning), a unified framework that integrates both context compression and multi-token prediction to mitigate the efficiency issues while maintaining CoT reasoning performance. Our framework adopts the same minimalist design for both context compression and multi-token prediction via special tokens and their corresponding position layout tailored to each token type. Comprehensive experiments on four reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that MemoSight reduces the KV cache footprint by up to 66% and accelerates inference by 1.56x, while outperforming existing CoT compression methods.

AI.tldr: MemoSight通过上下文压缩和多令牌预测的统一框架，在保持CoT推理性能的同时，显著降低KV缓存占用并加速推理
AI.motivation: 链式思维推理虽然能帮助LLMs解决复杂推理问题，但随着生成令牌数量线性增长的KV缓存导致推理速度和内存使用面临扩展性问题
AI.method: 提出MemoSight统一框架，通过特殊令牌及其对应位置布局的简约设计，集成上下文压缩和多令牌预测两种技术
AI.result: 在四个推理基准测试中，MemoSight将KV缓存占用减少高达66%，推理速度提升1.56倍，同时优于现有的CoT压缩方法
AI.conclusion: MemoSight通过统一的上下文压缩和多令牌预测框架，有效解决了CoT推理的效率瓶颈问题，在保持性能的同时显著提升推理效率

title: Singularity Avoidance in Inverse Kinematics: A Unified Treatment of Classical and Learning-based Methods
summary: Singular configurations cause loss of task-space mobility, unbounded joint velocities, and solver divergence in inverse kinematics (IK) for serial manipulators. No existing survey bridges classical singularity-robust IK with rapidly growing learning-based approaches. We provide a unified treatment spanning Jacobian regularization, Riemannian manipulability tracking, constrained optimization, and modern data-driven paradigms. A systematic taxonomy classifies methods by retained geometric structure and robustness guarantees (formal vs. empirical). We address a critical evaluation gap by proposing a benchmarking protocol and presenting experimental results: 12 IK solvers are evaluated on the Franka Panda under position-only IK across four complementary panels measuring error degradation by condition number, velocity amplification, out-of-distribution robustness, and computational cost. Results show that pure learning methods fail even on well-conditioned targets (MLP: 0% success, approx. 10 mm mean error), while hybrid warm-start architectures - IKFlow (59% to 100%), CycleIK(0% to 98.6%), GGIK (0% to 100%) - rescue learned solvers via classical refinement, with DLS converging from initial errors up to 207 mm. Deeper singularity-regime evaluation is identified as immediate future work.

AI.tldr: 该论文提供了关于奇异鲁棒逆运动学方法的系统性综述，建立了经典方法与学习方法的桥梁，并提出评估协议对12种IK求解器进行实验比较。
AI.motivation: 奇异配置会导致任务空间移动性丧失、关节速度无界和求解器发散，现有研究缺乏连接经典奇异鲁棒IK与快速增长的学习方法的系统性综述，存在关键评估差距。
AI.method: 提供统一处理框架，涵盖雅可比正则化、黎曼可操作性跟踪、约束优化和现代数据驱动范式；提出系统分类法按保留的几何结构和鲁棒性保证分类方法；设计包含四个互补面板的基准测试协议。
AI.result: 纯学习方法即使在条件良好的目标上也失败（MLP：0%成功率，约10mm平均误差），而混合预热架构（IKFlow 59%-100%，CycleIK 0%-98.6%，GGIK 0%-100%）通过经典细化拯救学习求解器；DLS能从高达207mm的初始误差收敛。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了经典与学习型奇异鲁棒IK方法之间的综述空白，提供了系统性分类和评估框架，发现混合方法优于纯学习方法，并指出深入奇异区域评估是未来工作方向。

title: Regret Tail Characterization of Optimal Bandit Algorithms with Generic Rewards
summary:
We study the tail behavior of regret in stochastic multi-armed bandits for algorithms that are asymptotically optimal in expectation. While minimizing expected regret is the classical objective, recent work shows that even such algorithms can exhibit heavy regret tails, incurring large regret with non-negligible probability. Existing sharp characterizations of regret tails are largely restricted to parametric settings, such as single-parameter exponential families.
