  In this work, we extend the $\KLinf$-UCB algorithm of to a broad nonparametric class of reward distributions satisfying mild assumptions, and establish its asymptotic optimality in expectation. We then analyze the tail behavior of its regret and derive a novel upper bound on the regret tail probability. As special cases, our results recover regret-tail guarantees for both bounded-support and heavy-tailed (moment-bounded) bandit models. Moreover, for the special case of finitely-supported reward distributions, our upper bound matches the known lower bound exactly. Our results thus provide a unified and tight characterization of regret tails for asymptotically optimal KL-based UCB algorithms, going beyond parametric models.

AI.tldr: 扩展KLinf-UCB算法到非参数奖励分布，建立期望渐近最优性，并推导出统一的紧致遗憾尾概率上界
AI.motivation: 虽然最小化期望遗憾是经典目标，但即使渐近最优算法也可能表现出重尾遗憾，现有研究主要局限于参数化设置（如单参数指数族），需要扩展到更广泛的非参数分布
AI.method: 将KLinf-UCB算法扩展到满足温和假设的广泛非参数奖励分布类，分析其遗憾尾行为，推导出遗憾尾概率的新上界
AI.result: 建立了算法在期望上的渐近最优性，得到了统一的遗憾尾概率上界，该上界在有界支撑和重尾（矩有界）模型下都成立，对于有限支撑分布，上界与已知下界精确匹配
AI.conclusion: 为基于KL的渐近最优UCB算法提供了超越参数模型的统一紧致遗憾尾特征刻画，扩展了随机多臂老虎机中遗憾尾分析的理论框架

title: Learning Adaptive Reasoning Paths for Efficient Visual Reasoning
summary: Visual reasoning models (VRMs) have recently shown strong cross-modal reasoning capabilities by integrating visual perception with language reasoning. However, they often suffer from overthinking, producing unnecessarily long reasoning chains for any tasks. We attribute this issue to \textbf{Reasoning Path Redundancy} in visual reasoning: many visual questions do not require the full reasoning process. To address this, we propose \textbf{AVR}, an adaptive visual reasoning framework that decomposes visual reasoning into three cognitive functions: visual perception, logical reasoning, and answer application. It further enables models to dynamically choose among three response formats: Full Format, Perception-Only Format, and Direct Answer. AVR is trained with FS-GRPO, an adaptation of Group Relative Policy Optimization that encourages the model to select the most efficient reasoning format while preserving correctness. Experiments on multiple vision-language benchmarks show that AVR reduces token usage by 50--90\% while maintaining overall accuracy, especially in perception-intensive tasks. These results demonstrate that adaptive visual reasoning can effectively mitigate overthinking in VRMs. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/RunRiotComeOn/AVR.

AI.tldr: AVR框架通过将视觉推理分解为三个认知功能，并让模型动态选择最有效的响应格式，显著减少了视觉推理模型中的过度思考问题，在保持准确性的同时大幅降低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 视觉推理模型（VRMs）虽然展现出强大的跨模态推理能力，但普遍存在"过度思考"问题，即对任何任务都产生不必要的冗长推理链。作者将这一问题归因于视觉推理中的"推理路径冗余"：许多视觉问题并不需要完整的推理过程。
AI.method: 提出AVR（自适应视觉推理）框架，将视觉推理分解为三个认知功能：视觉感知、逻辑推理和答案应用。该框架允许模型动态选择三种响应格式：完整格式、仅感知格式和直接答案。使用FS-GRPO（Group Relative Policy Optimization的适应版本）进行训练，鼓励模型在保持正确性的同时选择最有效的推理格式。
AI.result: 在多个视觉语言基准测试中，AVR在保持整体准确性的同时，将token使用量减少了50-90%，特别是在感知密集型任务中表现尤为突出。这些结果表明自适应视觉推理能有效缓解VRMs中的过度思考问题。
AI.conclusion: AVR框架通过自适应地选择推理格式，成功解决了视觉推理模型中的过度思考问题，在显著降低计算成本的同时保持了推理准确性，为高效视觉推理系统的发展提供了新方向。

title: Diffusion Sequence Models for Generative In-Context Meta-Learning of Robot Dynamics
comment: Angelo Moroncelli, Matteo Rufolo and Gunes Cagin Aydin contributed equally to this work
summary: Accurate modeling of robot dynamics is essential for model-based control, yet remains challenging under distributional shifts and real-time constraints. In this work, we formulate system identification as an in-context meta-learning problem and compare deterministic and generative sequence models for forward dynamics prediction. We take a Transformer-based meta-model, as a strong deterministic baseline, and introduce to this setting two complementary diffusion-based approaches: (i) inpainting diffusion (Diffuser), which learns the joint input-observation distribution, and (ii) conditioned diffusion models (CNN and Transformer), which generate future observations conditioned on control inputs. Through large-scale randomized simulations, we analyze performance across in-distribution and out-of-distribution regimes, as well as computational trade-offs relevant for control. We show that diffusion models significantly improve robustness under distribution shift, with inpainting diffusion achieving the best performance in our experiments. Finally, we demonstrate that warm-started sampling enables diffusion models to operate within real-time constraints, making them viable for control applications. These results highlight generative meta-models as a promising direction for robust system identification in robotics.

AI.tldr: 该研究将系统辨识建模为上下文元学习问题，比较确定性模型和生成式序列模型在机器人动力学预测中的表现，发现扩散模型在分布偏移下具有更好的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 机器人动力学精确建模对基于模型的控制至关重要，但在分布偏移和实时约束下仍具挑战性。需要开发更鲁棒的系统辨识方法。
AI.method: 将系统辨识构建为上下文元学习问题，比较Transformer元模型（确定性基线）与两种扩散模型：修复扩散（学习联合输入-观测分布）和条件扩散模型（基于控制输入生成未来观测）。通过大规模随机仿真分析性能。
AI.result: 扩散模型在分布偏移下显著提升鲁棒性，其中修复扩散表现最佳。预热采样使扩散模型能在实时约束下运行，适用于控制应用。
AI.conclusion: 生成式元模型是机器人鲁棒系统辨识的有前景方向，扩散模型通过提升分布偏移下的鲁棒性和满足实时约束，展现出实际应用潜力。

title: Revisiting Token Compression for Accelerating ViT-based Sparse Multi-View 3D Object Detectors
summary: Vision Transformer (ViT)-based sparse multi-view 3D object detectors have achieved remarkable accuracy but still suffer from high inference latency due to heavy token processing. To accelerate these models, token compression has been widely explored. However, our revisit of existing strategies, such as token pruning, merging, and patch size enlargement, reveals that they often discard informative background cues, disrupt contextual consistency, and lose fine-grained semantics, negatively affecting 3D detection. To overcome these limitations, we propose SEPatch3D, a novel framework that dynamically adjusts patch sizes while preserving critical semantic information within coarse patches. Specifically, we design Spatiotemporal-aware Patch Size Selection (SPSS) that assigns small patches to scenes containing nearby objects to preserve fine details and large patches to background-dominated scenes to reduce computation cost. To further mitigate potential detail loss, Informative Patch Selection (IPS) selects the informative patches for feature refinement, and Cross-Granularity Feature Enhancement (CGFE) injects fine-grained details into selected coarse patches, enriching semantic features. Experiments on the nuScenes and Argoverse 2 validation sets show that SEPatch3D achieves up to \textbf{57\%} faster inference than the StreamPETR baseline and \textbf{20\%} higher efficiency than the state-of-the-art ToC3D-faster, while preserving comparable detection accuracy. Code is available at https://github.com/Mingqj/SEPatch3D.

AI.tldr: SEPatch3D是一种动态调整ViT补丁大小的3D目标检测框架，通过时空感知的补丁大小选择、信息补丁选择和跨粒度特征增强，在保持检测精度的同时显著降低推理延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有ViT稀疏多视图3D目标检测器虽然精度高，但推理延迟大。现有的令牌压缩策略（如令牌剪枝、合并、补丁大小增大）往往丢弃信息背景线索、破坏上下文一致性、丢失细粒度语义，对3D检测产生负面影响。
AI.method: 提出SEPatch3D框架：1) 时空感知补丁大小选择(SPSS)：根据场景内容动态分配补丁大小，对包含近处物体的场景使用小补丁保留细节，对背景主导场景使用大补丁减少计算；2) 信息补丁选择(IPS)：选择信息丰富的补丁进行特征细化；3) 跨粒度特征增强(CGFE)：将细粒度细节注入选定的粗粒度补丁，丰富语义特征。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和Argoverse 2验证集上，SEPatch3D比StreamPETR基线推理速度快57%，比最先进的ToC3D-faster效率高20%，同时保持可比的检测精度。
AI.conclusion: SEPatch3D通过动态调整补丁大小并保留关键语义信息，有效解决了现有令牌压缩策略的局限性，在保持3D检测精度的同时显著提升了推理效率。

title: Cooperate to Compete: Strategic Data Generation and Incentivization Framework for Coopetitive Cross-Silo Federated Learning
comment: Competition-aware Federated Learning, Strategic data generation approaches, A payoff-redistribution based incentive mechanism, Potential game, Social welfare
summary: In data-sensitive domains such as healthcare, cross-silo federated learning (CFL) allows organizations to collaboratively train AI models without sharing raw data. However, practical CFL deployments are inherently coopetitive, in which organizations cooperate during model training while competing in downstream markets. In such settings, training contributions, including data volume, quality, and diversity, can improve the global model yet inadvertently strengthen rivals. This dilemma is amplified by non-IID data, which leads to asymmetric learning gains and undermines sustained participation. While existing competition-aware CFL and incentive-design approaches reward organizations based on marginal training contributions, they fail to account for the costs of strengthening competitors. In this paper, we introduce CoCoGen+, a coopetition-compatible data generation and incentivization framework that jointly models non-IID data and inter-organizational competition while endogenizing GenAI-based synthetic data generation as a strategic decision. Specifically, CoCoGen+ formulates each training round as a weighted potential game, where organizations strategically decide how much synthetic data to generate by balancing learning performance gains against computational costs and competition-caused utility losses. We then provide a tractable equilibrium characterization and derive implementable generation strategies to maximize social welfare. To promote long-term collaboration, we integrate a payoff redistribution-based incentive mechanism to compensate organizations for their contributions and competition-caused utility degradation. Experiments on varying learning tasks validate the feasibility of CoCoGen+. The results show how non-IID data, competition intensity, and incentives shape organizational strategies and social welfare, while CoCoGen+ outperforms baselines in efficiency.

AI.tldr: CoCoGen+是一个面向跨机构联邦学习的合作竞争兼容框架，通过内生化的生成式AI合成数据生成和激励机制，解决非独立同分布数据和机构间竞争带来的参与困境。
AI.motivation: 在医疗等数据敏感领域，跨机构联邦学习允许组织在不共享原始数据的情况下协作训练AI模型。然而，实际部署中存在"合作竞争"困境：组织在模型训练中合作，但在下游市场竞争。训练贡献（数据量、质量、多样性）可能无意中增强竞争对手，这种困境在非独立同分布数据下被放大，导致不对称学习收益并破坏持续参与。现有方法未能考虑增强竞争对手的成本。
AI.method: CoCoGen+框架将每个训练轮次建模为加权势博弈，组织战略性地决定生成多少合成数据，平衡学习性能提升与计算成本及竞争导致的效用损失。提供可处理的均衡表征并推导可实施的生成策略以最大化社会福利。为促进长期协作，集成基于收益再分配的激励机制，补偿组织的贡献和竞争导致的效用退化。
AI.result: 在不同学习任务上的实验验证了CoCoGen+的可行性。结果显示非独立同分布数据、竞争强度和激励机制如何塑造组织策略和社会福利，同时CoCoGen+在效率上优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CoCoGen+成功解决了跨机构联邦学习中的合作竞争困境，通过内生化的合成数据生成和激励机制，在非独立同分布数据和机构间竞争环境下实现了可持续的协作，为实际部署提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Boundary Sampling to Learn Predictive Safety Filters via Pontryagin's Maximum Principle
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Safety filters provide a practical approach for enforcing safety constraints in autonomous systems. While learning-based tools scale to high-dimensional systems, their performance depends on informative data that includes states likely to lead to constraint violation, which can be difficult to efficiently sample in complex, high-dimensional systems. In this work, we characterize trajectories that barely avoid safety violations using the Pontryagin Maximum Principle. These boundary trajectories are used to guide data collection for learned Hamilton-Jacobi Reachability, concentrating learning efforts near safety-critical states to improve efficiency. The learned Control Barrier Value Function is then used directly for safety filtering. Simulations and experimental validation on a shared-control automotive racing application demonstrate PMP sampling improves learning efficiency, yielding faster convergence, reduced failure rates, and improved safe set reconstruction, with wall times around 3ms.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出使用庞特里亚金极大值原理（PMP）采样边界轨迹来指导学习型汉密尔顿-雅可比可达性分析的数据收集，提高安全滤波器的学习效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 基于学习的安全滤波器虽然能扩展到高维系统，但其性能依赖于包含可能导致约束违反状态的信息数据。在复杂高维系统中，高效采样这些安全关键状态具有挑战性。
AI.method: 使用庞特里亚金极大值原理（PMP）表征勉强避免安全违反的边界轨迹，用这些轨迹指导学习型汉密尔顿-雅可比可达性分析的数据收集，将学习努力集中在安全关键状态附近。学习得到的控制障碍值函数直接用于安全滤波。
AI.result: 在共享控制自动驾驶赛车应用中，PMP采样提高了学习效率，实现了更快的收敛速度、更低的故障率以及改进的安全集重构，计算时间约为3毫秒。
AI.conclusion: PMP引导的数据采样方法有效解决了学习型安全滤波器中数据收集的效率问题，通过集中学习资源于安全关键区域，显著提升了安全约束执行系统的性能和实用性。

title: Best of both worlds: Stochastic & adversarial best-arm identification
comment: Published in Conference on Learning Theory (COLT 2018)
summary: We study bandit best-arm identification with arbitrary and potentially adversarial rewards. A simple random uniform learner obtains the optimal rate of error in the adversarial scenario. However, this type of strategy is suboptimal when the rewards are sampled stochastically. Therefore, we ask: Can we design a learner that performs optimally in both the stochastic and adversarial problems while not being aware of the nature of the rewards? First, we show that designing such a learner is impossible in general. In particular, to be robust to adversarial rewards, we can only guarantee optimal rates of error on a subset of the stochastic problems. We give a lower bound that characterizes the optimal rate in stochastic problems if the strategy is constrained to be robust to adversarial rewards. Finally, we design a simple parameter-free algorithm and show that its probability of error matches (up to log factors) the lower bound in stochastic problems, and it is also robust to adversarial ones.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在随机和对抗性奖励下的多臂赌博机最优臂识别问题，设计了一个既能处理对抗性奖励又能在随机场景中接近最优的算法。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是设计一个既能处理对抗性奖励（需要均匀随机策略）又能在随机奖励场景中达到最优性能的学习器，而无需预先知道奖励的分布类型。
AI.method: 首先证明在一般情况下设计这样的通用学习器是不可能的；然后给出在对抗性约束下随机问题的最优误差率下界；最后设计了一个简单的无参数算法。
AI.result: 证明了对抗性约束下随机问题的最优误差率下界，并设计了一个算法，其在随机问题中的误差概率（在对数因子内）匹配该下界，同时保持对对抗性奖励的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 虽然无法设计一个在所有随机和对抗性场景中都最优的通用学习器，但可以在对抗性约束下实现随机问题中的接近最优性能，并通过无参数算法验证了这一理论结果。

title: Vectorizing Projection in Manifold-Constrained Motion Planning for Real-Time Whole-Body Control
summary: Many robot planning tasks require satisfaction of one or more constraints throughout the entire trajectory. For geometric constraints, manifold-constrained motion planning algorithms are capable of planning collision-free path between start and goal configurations on the constraint submanifolds specified by task. Current state-of-the-art methods can take tens of seconds to solve these tasks for complex systems such as humanoid robots, making real-world use impractical, especially in dynamic settings. Inspired by recent advances in hardware accelerated motion planning, we present a CPU SIMD-accelerated manifold-constrained motion planner that revisits projection-based constraint satisfaction through the lens of parallelization. By transforming relevant components into parallelizable structures, we use SIMD parallelism to plan constraint satisfying solutions. Our approach achieves up to 100-1000x speed-ups over the state-of-the-art, making real-time constrained motion planning feasible for the first time. We demonstrate our planner on a real humanoid robot and show real-time whole-body quasi-static plan generation. Our work is available at https://commalab.org/papers/mcvamp/.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于CPU SIMD加速的流形约束运动规划器，通过并行化投影式约束满足方法，实现了比现有方法快100-1000倍的速度提升，首次使实时约束运动规划成为可能。
AI.motivation: 当前流形约束运动规划算法在处理复杂系统（如人形机器人）时需要数十秒时间，这使得在动态环境中的实际应用变得不切实际。需要开发更快的规划方法以实现实时应用。
AI.method: 采用CPU SIMD加速技术，重新审视基于投影的约束满足方法，通过将相关组件转化为可并行化结构，利用SIMD并行性来规划满足约束的解决方案。
AI.result: 该方法实现了比现有最先进方法快100-1000倍的速度提升，首次使实时约束运动规划成为可能。在实际人形机器人上展示了实时全身准静态规划生成能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过硬件加速的并行化方法，显著提升了流形约束运动规划的效率，使复杂系统的实时约束运动规划从理论变为现实，为动态环境中的机器人应用开辟了新可能性。

title: The Fourth Challenge on Image Super-Resolution ($\times$4) at NTIRE 2026: Benchmark Results and Method Overview
summary: This paper presents the NTIRE 2026 image super-resolution ($\times$4) challenge, one of the associated competitions of the NTIRE 2026 Workshop at CVPR 2026. The challenge aims to reconstruct high-resolution (HR) images from low-resolution (LR) inputs generated through bicubic downsampling with a $\times$4 scaling factor. The objective is to develop effective super-resolution solutions and analyze recent advances in the field. To reflect the evolving objectives of image super-resolution, the challenge includes two tracks: (1) a restoration track, which emphasizes pixel-wise fidelity and ranks submissions based on PSNR; and (2) a perceptual track, which focuses on visual realism and evaluates results using a perceptual score. A total of 194 participants registered for the challenge, with 31 teams submitting valid entries. This report summarizes the challenge design, datasets, evaluation protocol, main results, and methods of participating teams. The challenge provides a unified benchmark and offers insights into current progress and future directions in image super-resolution.

AI.tldr: NTIRE 2026图像超分辨率挑战赛报告，包含两个赛道：基于PSNR的恢复赛道和基于感知质量的感知赛道，共有194名参与者注册，31支队伍提交有效方案。
AI.motivation: 为促进图像超分辨率领域的发展，提供统一的基准测试平台，分析该领域的最新进展，并反映图像超分辨率不断演进的目标。
AI.method: 挑战赛设计包括两个赛道：1) 恢复赛道：强调像素级保真度，使用PSNR进行排名；2) 感知赛道：关注视觉真实感，使用感知分数进行评估。使用双三次下采样生成×4缩放因子的低分辨率图像作为输入。
AI.result: 共有194名参与者注册，31支队伍提交了有效参赛方案。挑战赛总结了设计、数据集、评估协议、主要结果和参赛方法。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战赛为图像超分辨率提供了统一的基准测试，为当前进展和未来方向提供了见解，促进了该领域的发展。

title: The Missing Knowledge Layer in AI: A Framework for Stable Human-AI Reasoning
summary:
Large language models are increasingly integrated into decision-making in areas such as healthcare, law, finance, engineering, and government. Yet they share a critical limitation: they produce fluent outputs even when their internal reasoning has drifted. A confident answer can conceal uncertainty, speculation, or inconsistency, and small changes in phrasing can lead to different conclusions. This makes LLMs useful assistants but unreliable partners in high-stakes contexts.
  Humans exhibit a similar weakness, often mistaking fluency for reliability. When a model responds smoothly, users tend to trust it, even when both model and user are drifting together. This paper is the first in a five-paper research series on stabilising human-AI reasoning. The series proposes a two-layer approach: Parts II-IV introduce human-side mechanisms such as uncertainty cues, conflict surfacing, and auditable reasoning traces, while Part V develops a model-side Epistemic Control Loop (ECL) that detects instability and modulates generation accordingly.
  Together, these layers form a missing operational substrate for governance by increasing signal-to-noise at the point of use. Stabilising interaction makes uncertainty and drift visible before enforcement is applied, enabling more precise capability governance. This aligns with emerging compliance expectations, including the EU AI Act and ISO/IEC 42001, by making reasoning processes traceable under real conditions of use.
  The central claim is that fluency is not reliability. Without structures that stabilise both human and model reasoning, AI cannot be trusted or governed where it matters most.

AI.tldr: 该论文系列提出通过两层方法稳定人机推理：人类侧机制（不确定性提示、冲突呈现、可审计推理轨迹）和模型侧认知控制循环（ECL），以解决LLM流畅输出掩盖内部推理漂移的问题，实现高风险决策中的可信治理。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在医疗、法律、金融等高风险领域决策中日益重要，但其存在关键局限：即使内部推理已漂移，仍能产生流畅输出。自信的回答可能掩盖不确定性、推测或不一致性，微小措辞变化可能导致不同结论，这使得LLM成为有用助手但不可靠的高风险合作伙伴。人类也存在类似弱点，常将流畅性误认为可靠性。
AI.method: 提出一个五篇论文的研究系列，采用两层方法：第二部分至第四部分引入人类侧机制，包括不确定性提示、冲突呈现和可审计推理轨迹；第五部分开发模型侧认知控制循环（ECL），检测不稳定性并相应调节生成过程。
AI.result: 这些层次共同形成了治理所需的操作基础，通过提高使用点的信噪比来稳定交互，使不确定性和漂移在执行前可见，从而实现更精确的能力治理。这与欧盟AI法案和ISO/IEC 42001等新兴合规要求保持一致，使推理过程在实际使用条件下可追溯。
AI.conclusion: 流畅性不等于可靠性。如果没有稳定人类和模型推理的结构，AI在最关键的领域既不可信也不可治理。该研究系列为高风险决策中的人机协作提供了必要的稳定机制和治理框架。

title: Utilizing Inpainting for Keypoint Detection for Vision-Based Control of Robotic Manipulators
summary: In this paper we present a novel visual servoing framework to control a robotic manipulator in the configuration space by using purely natural visual features. Our goal is to develop methods that can robustly detect and track natural features or keypoints on robotic manipulators that would be used for vision-based control, especially for scenarios where placing external markers on the robot is not feasible or preferred at runtime. For the model training process of our data driven approach, we create a data collection pipeline where we attach ArUco markers along the robot's body, label their centers as keypoints, and then utilize an inpainting method to remove the markers and reconstruct the occluded regions. By doing so, we generate natural (markerless) robot images that are automatically labeled with the marker locations. These images are used to train a keypoint detection algorithm, which is used to control the robot configuration using natural features of the robot. Unlike the prior methods that rely on accurate camera calibration and robot models for labeling training images, our approach eliminates these dependencies through inpainting. To achieve robust keypoint detection even in the presence of occlusion, we introduce a second inpainting model, this time to utilize during runtime, that reconstructs occluded regions of the robot in real time, enabling continuous keypoint detection. To further enhance the consistency and robustness of keypoint predictions, we integrate an Unscented Kalman Filter (UKF) that refines the keypoint estimates over time, adding to stable and reliable control performance. We obtained successful control results with this model-free and purely vision-based control strategy, utilizing natural robot features in the runtime, both under full visibility and partial occlusion.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于自然视觉特征的机器人视觉伺服框架，通过图像修复技术生成无标记训练数据，结合运行时修复和UKF滤波实现鲁棒的关键点检测与控制
AI.motivation: 开发能够在机器人上无法或不适合放置外部标记的场景下，使用纯自然视觉特征进行视觉伺服控制的方法，消除对精确相机标定和机器人模型的依赖
AI.method: 1. 数据收集：在机器人上贴ArUco标记，标记中心作为关键点标签；2. 图像修复：使用修复方法去除标记并重建被遮挡区域，生成无标记的自动标注训练图像；3. 关键点检测：训练基于自然特征的关键点检测算法；4. 运行时修复：引入第二个修复模型实时重建机器人被遮挡区域；5. UKF滤波：使用无迹卡尔曼滤波器优化关键点估计，提高预测一致性和鲁棒性
AI.result: 成功实现了无需模型、纯视觉的控制策略，在完全可见和部分遮挡条件下都能利用自然机器人特征获得成功的控制结果
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过创新的数据生成和运行时修复技术，实现了基于自然视觉特征的鲁棒机器人视觉伺服控制，消除了对外部标记、精确相机标定和机器人模型的依赖，为标记不可行场景提供了有效解决方案

title: Nautilus: An Auto-Scheduling Tensor Compiler for Efficient Tiled GPU Kernels
summary: We present Nautilus, a novel tensor compiler that moves toward fully automated math-to-kernel optimization. Nautilus compiles a high-level algebraic specification of tensor operators into efficient tiled GPU kernels. Nautilus's successive lowering design allows high-level optimizations, expression rewrites, and tile optimizations to be jointly applied in a single end-to-end system. Nautilus presents a novel auto-scheduler that discovers sequences of high-level optimizations, while preserving the regular program structure needed by tile optimizers. Nautilus's auto-scheduler captures complex interactions and trade-offs in the high-level optimizations, including aggressive global transformations like advanced reduction fusion. Nautilus is the first end-to-end tensor compiler capable of starting from a math-like description of attention and automatically discovering FlashAttention-3-like kernels, offloading the entire burden of optimization from the programmer to the compiler. Across five transformer-based models and 150 evaluation configurations on NVIDIA GH200 and RTX 5090 GPUs, Nautilus achieves up to 23% higher throughput than state-of-the-art compilers on GH200 and up to 42% on RTX 5090, while matching or exceeding manually written cuDNN kernels on many long-sequence configurations.

AI.tldr: Nautilus是一个新颖的张量编译器，能够从高级数学描述自动优化到GPU内核生成，实现端到端的自动化优化，性能超越现有编译器和手工优化内核。
AI.motivation: 当前张量编译器需要程序员手动进行大量优化工作，无法从高级数学描述自动生成高效内核。Nautilus旨在实现完全自动化的数学到内核优化，将优化负担从程序员转移到编译器。
AI.method: 采用渐进式降低设计，在单一端到端系统中联合应用高级优化、表达式重写和分块优化。提出新颖的自动调度器，发现高级优化序列同时保持分块优化所需的规则程序结构。能够处理复杂的高层优化交互和权衡，包括高级归约融合等全局变换。
AI.result: 在NVIDIA GH200和RTX 5090 GPU上，对5个基于Transformer的模型和150个评估配置进行测试，Nautilus在GH200上比最先进编译器吞吐量提升高达23%，在RTX 5090上提升高达42%。在许多长序列配置中匹配或超过手动编写的cuDNN内核。是第一个能够从注意力数学描述自动发现类似FlashAttention-3内核的端到端张量编译器。
AI.conclusion: Nautilus实现了从高级代数规范到高效GPU内核的完全自动化优化，显著降低了程序员优化负担，在性能上超越现有编译器和手工优化方法，代表了张量编译器向完全自动化优化的重要进展。

title: Controllable Video Object Insertion via Multiview Priors
summary: Video object insertion is a critical task for dynamically inserting new objects into existing environments. Previous video generation methods focus primarily on synthesizing entire scenes while struggling with ensuring consistent object appearance, spatial alignment, and temporal coherence when inserting objects into existing videos. In this paper, we propose a novel solution for Video Object Insertion, which integrates multi-view object priors to address the common challenges of appearance inconsistency and occlusion handling in dynamic environments. By lifting 2D reference images into multi-view representations and leveraging a dual-path view-consistent conditioning mechanism, our framework ensures stable identity guidance and robust integration across diverse viewpoints. A quality-aware weighting mechanism is also employed to adaptively handle noisy or imperfect inputs. Additionally, we introduce an Integration-Aware Consistency Module that guarantees spatial realism, effectively resolving occlusion and boundary artifacts while maintaining temporal continuity across frames. Experimental results show that our solution significantly improves the quality of video object insertion, providing stable and realistic integration.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于视频对象插入的新方法，通过多视角对象先验和双路径视图一致条件机制，解决外观不一致和遮挡处理问题，实现稳定、真实的视频对象插入。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成方法主要关注整个场景的合成，但在将对象插入现有视频时难以保证对象外观一致性、空间对齐和时间连贯性。需要解决动态环境中外观不一致和遮挡处理等常见挑战。
AI.method: 1. 将2D参考图像提升为多视角表示；2. 采用双路径视图一致条件机制确保稳定身份引导和跨视角鲁棒集成；3. 使用质量感知加权机制自适应处理噪声或不完美输入；4. 引入集成感知一致性模块保证空间真实感，解决遮挡和边界伪影，同时保持帧间时间连续性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法显著提高了视频对象插入的质量，提供了稳定且真实的集成效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的视频对象插入解决方案通过多视角对象先验和集成感知一致性模块，有效解决了外观不一致、遮挡处理和边界伪影等问题，实现了高质量的视频对象插入。

title: GeoVision-Enabled Digital Twin for Hybrid Autonomous-Teleoperated Medical Responses
summary: Remote medical response systems are increasingly being deployed to support emergency care in disaster-affected and infrastructure-limited environments. Enabled by GeoVision capabilities, this paper presents a Digital Twin architecture for hybrid autonomous-teleoperated medical response systems. The proposed framework integrates perception and adaptive navigation with a Digital Twin, synchronized in real-time, that mirrors system states, environmental dynamics, patient conditions, and mission objectives. Unlike traditional ground control interfaces, the Digital Twin provides remote clinical and operational users with an intuitive, continuously updated virtual representation of the platform and its operational context, enabling enhanced situational awareness and informed decision-making.

AI.tldr: 提出基于数字孪生的混合自主-遥操作医疗响应系统架构，通过实时同步的数字孪生体增强远程医疗决策能力
AI.motivation: 解决灾害和基础设施受限环境下远程医疗响应系统的局限性，传统地面控制界面无法提供足够的态势感知和决策支持
AI.method: 提出集成感知、自适应导航与数字孪生的架构，数字孪生实时同步系统状态、环境动态、患者状况和任务目标，为远程用户提供直观的虚拟表示
AI.result: 数字孪生架构相比传统地面控制界面，能够提供持续更新的虚拟表示，增强态势感知和知情决策能力
AI.conclusion: 基于GeoVision的数字孪生架构为混合自主-遥操作医疗响应系统提供了创新的解决方案，能够显著改善远程医疗响应效果

title: GenRec: A Preference-Oriented Generative Framework for Large-Scale Recommendation
summary: Generative Retrieval (GR) offers a promising paradigm for recommendation through next-token prediction (NTP). However, scaling it to large-scale industrial systems introduces three challenges: (i) within a single request, the identical model inputs may produce inconsistent outputs due to the pagination request mechanism; (ii) the prohibitive cost of encoding long user behavior sequences with multi-token item representations based on semantic IDs, and (iii) aligning the generative policy with nuanced user preference signals. We present GenRec, a preference-oriented generative framework deployed on the JD App that addresses above challenges within a single decoder-only architecture. For training objective, we propose Page-wise NTP task, which supervises over an entire interaction page rather than each interacted item individually, providing denser gradient signal and resolving the one-to-many ambiguity of point-wise training. On the prefilling side, an asymmetric linear Token Merger compresses multi-token Semantic IDs in the prompt while preserving full-resolution decoding, reducing input length by ~2X with negligible accuracy loss. To further align outputs with user satisfaction, we introduce GRPO-SR, a reinforcement learning method that pairs Group Relative Policy Optimization with NLL regularization for training stability, and employs Hybrid Rewards combining a dense reward model with a relevance gate to mitigate reward hacking. In month-long online A/B tests serving production traffic, GenRec achieves 9.5% improvement in click count and 8.7% in transaction count over the existing pipeline.

AI.tldr: GenRec是一个部署在JD App上的偏好导向生成检索框架，通过页面级NTP训练、非对称线性Token合并器和GRPO-SR强化学习方法，解决了生成式推荐在工业规模部署中的三大挑战，在线上A/B测试中显著提升了点击和交易指标。
AI.motivation: 生成式检索（GR）通过下一个令牌预测为推荐系统提供了有前景的范式，但在扩展到大规模工业系统时面临三个主要挑战：1）分页请求机制下相同模型输入可能产生不一致输出；2）基于语义ID的多令牌项目表示编码长用户行为序列的成本过高；3）生成策略与细微用户偏好信号的对齐问题。
AI.method: 提出了GenRec框架，包含三个核心技术：1）页面级NTP任务，监督整个交互页面而非单个项目，提供更密集的梯度信号并解决点式训练的一对多歧义；2）非对称线性Token合并器，压缩提示中的多令牌语义ID，减少约2倍输入长度；3）GRPO-SR强化学习方法，结合组相对策略优化和NLL正则化确保训练稳定性，并使用混合奖励（密集奖励模型+相关性门控）缓解奖励攻击。
AI.result: 在为期一个月的线上A/B测试中，GenRec相比现有流水线实现了9.5%的点击次数提升和8.7%的交易次数提升，证明了其在生产流量中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: GenRec成功解决了生成式推荐在工业规模部署中的关键挑战，通过统一的仅解码器架构实现了偏好对齐的高效生成检索，为大规模推荐系统的生成式方法提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Capability-Aware Heterogeneous Control Barrier Functions for Decentralized Multi-Robot Safe Navigation
summary: Safe navigation for multi-robot systems requires enforcing safety without sacrificing task efficiency under decentralized decision-making. Existing decentralized methods often assume robot homogeneity, making shared safety requirements non-uniformly interpreted across heterogeneous agents with structurally different dynamics, which could lead to avoidance obligations not physically realizable for some robots and thus cause safety violations or deadlock. In this paper, we propose Capability-Aware Heterogeneous Control Barrier Function (CA-HCBF), a decentralized framework for consistent safety enforcement and capability-aware coordination in heterogeneous robot teams. We derive a canonical second-order control-affine representation that unifies holonomic and nonholonomic robots under acceleration-level control via canonical transformation and backstepping, preserving forward invariance of the safe set while avoiding relative-degree mismatch across heterogeneous dynamics. We further introduce a support-function-based directional capability metric that quantifies each robot's ability to follow its motion intent, deriving a pairwise responsibility allocation that distributes the safety burden proportionally to each robot's motion capability. A feasibility-aware clipping mechanism further constrains the allocation to each agent's physically achievable range, mitigating infeasible constraint assignments common in dense decentralized CBF settings. Simulations with up to 30 heterogeneous robots and a physical multi-robot demonstration show improved safety and task efficiency over baselines, validating real-world applicability across robots with distinct kinematic constraints.

AI.tldr: 提出CA-HCBF框架，用于异构机器人团队的去中心化安全导航，通过统一动力学表示和能力感知的责任分配，解决异构机器人间安全要求不一致的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有去中心化方法通常假设机器人同质性，导致异构机器人（具有不同动力学结构）对共享安全要求的解释不一致，可能产生某些机器人无法物理实现的避障义务，从而引发安全违规或死锁。
AI.method: 1) 推导规范二阶控制仿射表示，通过规范变换和反步法统一完整和非完整机器人在加速度级控制下的动力学；2) 引入基于支撑函数的方向能力度量，量化每个机器人执行运动意图的能力；3) 设计成对责任分配机制，按机器人运动能力比例分配安全负担；4) 采用可行性感知裁剪机制，将分配约束在物理可实现范围内。
AI.result: 仿真实验（最多30个异构机器人）和物理多机器人演示显示，相比基线方法，CA-HCBF在安全性和任务效率方面均有提升，验证了其在具有不同运动学约束的机器人间的实际适用性。
AI.conclusion: CA-HCBF框架为异构机器人团队提供了一致的去中心化安全执行和能力感知协调，解决了异构动力学下的相对阶不匹配问题，并通过能力比例责任分配和可行性约束，在密集去中心化CBF设置中缓解了不可行约束分配问题。

title: WILD-SAM: Phase-Aware Expert Adaptation of SAM for Landslide Detection in Wrapped InSAR Interferograms
summary: Detecting slow-moving landslides directly from wrapped Interferometric Synthetic Aperture Radar (InSAR) interferograms is crucial for efficient geohazard monitoring, yet it remains fundamentally challenged by severe phase ambiguity and complex coherence noise. While the Segment Anything Model (SAM) offers a powerful foundation for segmentation, its direct transfer to wrapped phase data is hindered by a profound spectral domain shift, which suppresses the high-frequency fringes essential for boundary delineation. To bridge this gap, we propose WILD-SAM, a novel parameter-efficient fine-tuning framework specifically designed to adapt SAM for high-precision landslide detection on wrapped interferograms. Specifically, the architecture integrates a Phase-Aware Mixture-of-Experts (PA-MoE) Adapter into the frozen encoder to align spectral distributions and introduces a Wavelet-Guided Subband Enhancement (WGSE) strategy to generate frequency-aware dense prompts. The PA-MoE Adapter exploits a dynamic routing mechanism across heterogeneous convolutional experts to adaptively aggregate multi-scale spectral-textural priors, effectively aligning the distribution discrepancy between natural images and interferometric phase data. Meanwhile, the WGSE strategy leverages discrete wavelet transforms to explicitly disentangle high-frequency subbands and refine directional phase textures, injecting these structural cues as dense prompts to ensure topological integrity along sharp landslide boundaries. Extensive experiments on the ISSLIDE and ISSLIDE+ benchmarks demonstrate that WILD-SAM achieves state-of-the-art performance, significantly outperforming existing methods in both target completeness and contour fidelity.

AI.tldr: WILD-SAM：一种参数高效微调框架，通过相位感知专家混合适配器和小波引导子带增强策略，将SAM适配于包裹相位干涉图的滑坡检测
AI.motivation: 直接从包裹相位InSAR干涉图中检测慢速滑坡对地质灾害监测至关重要，但面临严重的相位模糊和复杂相干噪声挑战。SAM虽然提供了强大的分割基础，但直接应用于包裹相位数据时存在显著的谱域偏移，抑制了边界描绘所需的高频条纹。
AI.method: 提出WILD-SAM框架：1）在冻结编码器中集成相位感知专家混合（PA-MoE）适配器，通过异构卷积专家的动态路由机制自适应聚合多尺度谱纹理先验，对齐自然图像与干涉相位数据的分布差异；2）引入小波引导子带增强（WGSE）策略，利用离散小波变换显式解耦高频子带并细化定向相位纹理，将这些结构线索作为密集提示注入以确保滑坡边界的拓扑完整性。
AI.result: 在ISSLIDE和ISSLIDE+基准测试上的广泛实验表明，WILD-SAM实现了最先进的性能，在目标完整性和轮廓保真度方面显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: WILD-SAM成功解决了SAM在包裹相位干涉图上的谱域偏移问题，通过参数高效的微调框架实现了高精度滑坡检测，为地质灾害监测提供了有效的技术方案。

title: Vibe-Coding: Feedback-Based Automated Verification with no Human Code Inspection, a Feasibility Study
summary:
Vibe coding inherently assumes iterative refinement of LLM-generated code through feedback loops. While effective for conventional software tasks, its reliability in runtime-adaptive systems is unclear -- especially when generated code is not manually inspected. This paper studies feedback-based automated verification of LLM-generated adaptation managers in Collective Adaptive Systems (CAS). We focus on the key challenges of verification in the loop: how to detect failures of generated code at runtime and how to report them precisely enough for an LLM to fix them.
  We combine the adaptation loop with a vibe-coding feedback loop where correctness is checked against (i) generic architectural constraints and (ii) functional constraints formalized in Functional Constraints Logic (FCL), a novel first-order temporal logic over potentially finite traces. Conducting the Dragon Hunt CAS case study, we show that fine-grained constraint violations provide actionable feedback that typically yields a valid adaptation manager within a few iterations, while simple coarse metric-based feedback often stalls. Our findings suggest that feedback precision is the dominant factor for reliable vibe coding in systems designed by domain experts with no programming skills, thereby obviating the need for human code inspection.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在集体自适应系统中，通过反馈循环自动验证LLM生成的适配管理器的可靠性，提出使用细粒度约束检查替代粗粒度指标反馈，提高vibe coding在运行时自适应系统中的成功率。
AI.motivation: 传统vibe coding在常规软件任务中有效，但在运行时自适应系统中的可靠性不明确，特别是当生成的代码未经人工检查时。需要研究如何通过反馈循环自动验证LLM生成的适配管理器，解决运行时故障检测和精确反馈报告的问题。
AI.method: 将自适应循环与vibe coding反馈循环结合，通过两种约束检查验证正确性：(1)通用架构约束；(2)使用新型一阶时序逻辑FCL（Functional Constraints Logic）形式化的功能约束。在Dragon Hunt CAS案例研究中实施该方法。
AI.result: 细粒度约束违规提供了可操作的反馈，通常在几次迭代内就能产生有效的适配管理器，而简单的粗粒度指标反馈常常停滞。反馈精度是影响可靠性的主导因素。
AI.conclusion: 对于由不具备编程技能的领域专家设计的系统，反馈精度是可靠vibe coding的关键因素，可以消除人工代码检查的需求。细粒度约束检查比粗粒度指标反馈更有效。

title: 4th Workshop on Maritime Computer Vision (MaCVi): Challenge Overview
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026 Workshop Proceeding; Maritime Computer Vision Workshop
summary: The 4th Workshop on Maritime Computer Vision (MaCVi) is organized as part of CVPR 2026. This edition features five benchmark challenges with emphasis on both predictive accuracy and embedded real-time feasibility. This report summarizes the MaCVi 2026 challenge setup, evaluation protocols, datasets, and benchmark tracks, and presents quantitative results, qualitative comparisons, and cross-challenge analyses of emerging method trends. We also include technical reports from top-performing teams to highlight practical design choices and lessons learned across the benchmark suite. Datasets, leaderboards, and challenge resources are available at https://macvi.org/workshop/cvpr26.

AI.tldr: MaCVi 2026是CVPR 2026的研讨会，包含五个基准挑战，强调预测准确性和嵌入式实时可行性，提供数据集、评估协议和技术报告
AI.motivation: 组织海事计算机视觉研讨会，通过基准挑战推动该领域技术进步，特别关注实际应用中的预测准确性和实时可行性需求
AI.method: 建立五个基准挑战任务，制定评估协议和数据集，收集参赛团队的技术报告，进行定量结果分析和定性比较
AI.result: 提供了完整的挑战设置、评估协议、数据集和基准轨道，总结了定量结果、定性比较和新兴方法趋势的跨挑战分析
AI.conclusion: MaCVi 2026成功组织了海事计算机视觉基准挑战，为领域发展提供了重要资源和实践经验分享平台

title: Expert-Guided Class-Conditional Goodness-of-Fit Scores for Interpretable Classification with Informative Missingness: An Application to Seismic Monitoring
summary: We study a classification problem with three key challenges: pervasive informative missingness, the integration of partial prior expert knowledge into the learning process, and the need for interpretable decision rules. We propose a framework that encodes prior knowledge through an expert-guided class-conditional model for one or more classes, and use this model to construct a small set of interpretable goodness-of-fit features. The features quantify how well the observed data agree with the expert model, isolating the contributions of different aspects of the data, including both observed and missing components. These features are combined with a few transparent auxiliary summaries in a simple discriminative classifier, resulting in a decision rule that is easy to inspect and justify. We develop and apply the framework in the context of seismic monitoring used to assess compliance with the Comprehensive Nuclear-Test-Ban Treaty. We show that the method has strong potential as a transparent screening tool, reducing workload for expert analysts. A simulation designed to isolate the contribution of the proposed framework shows that this interpretable expert-guided method can even outperform strong standard machine-learning classifiers, particularly when training samples are small.

AI.tldr: 提出一个专家指导的机器学习框架，用于处理信息性缺失数据、整合专家先验知识并生成可解释分类规则，应用于地震监测领域。
AI.motivation: 解决分类问题中的三个关键挑战：普遍存在的信息性缺失数据、将部分专家先验知识整合到学习过程中、以及需要可解释的决策规则。特别是在地震监测等需要透明决策的领域，传统机器学习方法缺乏可解释性。
AI.method: 通过专家指导的类条件模型编码先验知识，构建一组可解释的拟合优度特征，量化观测数据与专家模型的一致性，分离数据和缺失分量的贡献。将这些特征与少量透明辅助摘要结合，构建简单的判别分类器。
AI.result: 该方法在地震监测应用中显示出作为透明筛选工具的潜力，能减少专家分析工作量。模拟实验表明，这种可解释的专家指导方法在小样本情况下甚至能超越强大的标准机器学习分类器。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架成功解决了信息性缺失、专家知识整合和可解释性三个挑战，为需要透明决策的领域（如条约合规监测）提供了有效的解决方案，在小样本情况下表现优异。

title: Design and Validation of a Low-Cost Smartphone Based Fluorescence Detection Platform Compared with Conventional Microplate Readers
summary: A low cost fluorescence-based optical system is developed for detecting the presence of certain microorganisms and molecules within a diluted sample. A specifically designed device setup compatible with conventional 96 well plates is chosen to create an ideal environment in which a smart phone camera can be used as the optical detector. In comparison with conventional microplate reading machines such as Perkin Elmer Victor Machine, the device presented in this paper is not equipped with expensive elements such as exciter filer, barrier filter and photomultiplier; instead, a phone camera is all needed to detect fluorescence within the sample. The strategy being involved is to determine the relationship between the image color of the sample in RGB color space and the molar concentration of the fluorescence specimen in that sample. This manuscript is a preprint version of work related to a publication in IEEE. The final version may differ from this manuscript.

AI.tldr: 开发低成本荧光光学系统，使用智能手机摄像头检测微生物和分子，替代昂贵的传统微孔板读数仪
AI.motivation: 传统微孔板读数仪（如Perkin Elmer Victor）价格昂贵，包含激发滤光片、屏障滤光片和光电倍增管等昂贵元件，限制了荧光检测的普及应用
AI.method: 设计兼容常规96孔板的设备设置，利用智能手机摄像头作为光学检测器，建立样品RGB颜色空间图像颜色与荧光样本摩尔浓度之间的关系
AI.result: 成功开发出低成本荧光检测系统，仅需智能手机摄像头即可检测样品中的荧光，无需传统设备中的昂贵光学元件
AI.conclusion: 智能手机摄像头可作为有效的荧光检测工具，为低成本、便携式微生物和分子检测提供了可行方案，具有广泛的应用潜力

title: Weakly-supervised Learning for Physics-informed Neural Motion Planning via Sparse Roadmap
summary: The motion planning problem requires finding a collision-free path between start and goal configurations in high-dimensional, cluttered spaces. Recent learning-based methods offer promising solutions, with self-supervised physics-informed approaches such as Neural Time Fields (NTFields) solving the Eikonal equation to learn value functions without expert demonstrations. However, existing physics-informed methods struggle to scale in complex, multi-room environments, where simply increasing the number of samples cannot resolve local minima or guarantee global consistency. We propose Hierarchical Neural Time Fields (H-NTFields), a weakly-supervised framework that combines weak supervision from sparse roadmaps with physics-informed PDE regularization. The roadmap provides global topological anchors through upper and lower bounds on travel times, while PDE losses enforce local geometric fidelity and obstacle-aware propagation. Experiments on 18 Gibson environments and real robotic platforms show that H-NTFields substantially improves robustness over prior physics-informed methods, while enabling fast amortized inference through a continuous value representation.

AI.tldr: 提出H-NTFields框架，结合稀疏路线图的弱监督与物理信息PDE正则化，解决复杂多房间环境中现有物理信息方法难以扩展的问题
AI.motivation: 现有基于物理信息的方法（如NTFields）在复杂多房间环境中难以扩展，仅增加样本数量无法解决局部最小值或保证全局一致性
AI.method: 提出分层神经时间场（H-NTFields），结合稀疏路线图的弱监督（提供旅行时间的上下界作为全局拓扑锚点）与物理信息PDE正则化（强制局部几何保真度和障碍物感知传播）
AI.result: 在18个Gibson环境和真实机器人平台上实验表明，H-NTFields显著提高了鲁棒性，同时通过连续值表示实现快速摊销推理
AI.conclusion: H-NTFields通过弱监督与物理信息正则化的结合，有效解决了复杂环境中现有物理信息方法的扩展性问题，实现了更鲁棒的路径规划

title: FreqTrack: Frequency Learning based Vision Transformer for RGB-Event Object Tracking
summary: Existing single-modal RGB trackers often face performance bottlenecks in complex dynamic scenes, while the introduction of event sensors offers new potential for enhancing tracking capabilities. However, most current RGB-event fusion methods, primarily designed in the spatial domain using convolutional, Transformer, or Mamba architectures, fail to fully exploit the unique temporal response and high-frequency characteristics of event data. To address this, we1 propose FreqTrack, a frequency-aware RGBE tracking framework that establishes complementary inter-modal correlations through frequency-domain transformations for more robust feature fusion. We design a Spectral Enhancement Transformer (SET) layer that incorporates multi-head dynamic Fourier filtering to adaptively enhance and select frequency-domain features. Additionally, we develop a Wavelet Edge Refinement (WER) module, which leverages learnable wavelet transforms to explicitly extract multi-scale edge structures from event data, effectively improving modeling capability in high-speed and low-light scenarios. Extensive experiments on the COESOT and FE108 datasets demonstrate that FreqTrack achieves highly competitive performance, particularly attaining leading precision of 76.6\% on the COESOT benchmark, validating the effectiveness of frequency-domain modeling for RGBE tracking.

AI.tldr: FreqTrack：一种频率感知的RGBE跟踪框架，通过频域变换建立互补的跨模态关联，用于更鲁棒的特征融合，在RGBE跟踪中实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有单模态RGB跟踪器在复杂动态场景中面临性能瓶颈，而事件传感器为增强跟踪能力提供了新潜力。但当前RGB-事件融合方法主要在空间域设计，未能充分利用事件数据的独特时间响应和高频特性。
AI.method: 提出FreqTrack框架：1）设计谱增强Transformer（SET）层，通过多头动态傅里叶滤波自适应增强和选择频域特征；2）开发小波边缘细化（WER）模块，利用可学习小波变换从事件数据中显式提取多尺度边缘结构。
AI.result: 在COESOT和FE108数据集上的大量实验表明，FreqTrack实现了高度竞争力的性能，特别是在COESOT基准测试中达到76.6%的领先精度。
AI.conclusion: 频率域建模对于RGBE跟踪是有效的，FreqTrack通过频域变换建立互补的跨模态关联，显著提升了在高速和低光场景下的跟踪性能。

title: Synthesis and Deployment of Maximal Robust Control Barrier Functions through Adversarial Reinforcement Learning
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Robust control barrier functions (CBFs) provide a principled mechanism for smooth safety enforcement under worst-case disturbances. However, existing approaches typically rely on explicit, closed-form structure in the dynamics (e.g., control-affine) and uncertainty models. This has led to limited scalability and generality, with most robust CBFs certifying only conservative subsets of the maximal robust safe set. In this paper, we introduce a new robust CBF framework for general nonlinear systems under bounded uncertainty. We first show that the safety value function solving the dynamic programming Isaacs equation is a valid robust discrete-time CBF that enforces safety on the maximal robust safe set. We then adopt the key reinforcement learning (RL) notion of quality function (or Q-function), which removes the need for explicit dynamics by lifting the barrier certificate into state-action space and yields a novel robust Q-CBF constraint for safety filtering. Combined with adversarial RL, this enables the synthesis and deployment of robust Q-CBFs on general nonlinear systems with black-box dynamics and unknown uncertainty structure. We validate the framework on a canonical inverted pendulum benchmark and a 36-D quadruped simulator, achieving substantially less conservative safe sets than barrier-based baselines on the pendulum and reliable safety enforcement even under adversarial uncertainty realizations on the quadruped.

AI.tldr: 提出基于强化学习的鲁棒控制屏障函数框架，用于具有黑盒动力学和未知不确定性结构的一般非线性系统，实现最大鲁棒安全集的安全执行。
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒CBF方法通常依赖动力学的显式闭式结构（如控制仿射）和不确定性模型，导致可扩展性和通用性有限，大多数鲁棒CBF只能认证最大鲁棒安全集的保守子集。
AI.method: 引入新的鲁棒CBF框架：1）证明求解动态规划Isaacs方程的安全值函数是有效的鲁棒离散时间CBF；2）采用强化学习中的质量函数（Q函数）概念，将屏障证书提升到状态-动作空间，产生鲁棒Q-CBF约束；3）结合对抗性RL，在具有黑盒动力学和未知不确定性结构的一般非线性系统上合成和部署鲁棒Q-CBF。
AI.result: 在经典倒立摆基准和36维四足机器人模拟器上验证：在倒立摆上获得比基于屏障的基线方法显著更不保守的安全集；在四足机器人上即使存在对抗性不确定性实现也能可靠执行安全约束。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过结合动态规划、强化学习和控制屏障函数，为具有黑盒动力学和未知不确定性结构的一般非线性系统提供了可扩展且通用的鲁棒安全执行方法。

title: Learning Versatile Humanoid Manipulation with Touch Dreaming
summary: Humanoid robots promise general-purpose assistance, yet real-world humanoid loco-manipulation remains challenging because it requires whole-body stability, dexterous hands, and contact-aware perception under frequent contact changes. In this work, we study dexterous, contact-rich humanoid loco-manipulation. We first develop an RL-based whole-body controller that provides stable lower-body and torso execution during complex manipulation. Built on this controller, we develop a whole-body humanoid data collection system that combines VR-based teleoperation with human-to-humanoid motion mapping, enabling efficient collection of real-world demonstrations. We then propose Humanoid Transformer with Touch Dreaming (HTD), a multimodal encoder--decoder Transformer that models touch as a core modality alongside multi-view vision and proprioception. HTD is trained in a single stage with behavioral cloning augmented by touch dreaming: in addition to predicting action chunks, the policy predicts future hand-joint forces and future tactile latents, encouraging the shared Transformer trunk to learn contact-aware representations for dexterous interaction. Across five contact-rich tasks, Insert-T, Book Organization, Towel Folding, Cat Litter Scooping, and Tea Serving, HTD achieves a 90.9% relative improvement in average success rate over the stronger baseline. Ablation results further show that latent-space tactile prediction is more effective than raw tactile prediction, yielding a 30% relative gain in success rate. These results demonstrate that combining robust whole-body execution, scalable humanoid data collection, and predictive touch-centered learning enables versatile, high-dexterity humanoid manipulation in the real world. Project webpage: humanoid-touch-dream.github.io.

AI.tldr: 提出Humanoid Transformer with Touch Dreaming (HTD)方法，通过触觉预测增强的多模态Transformer实现人形机器人灵巧操作，在五项接触丰富任务中取得显著性能提升
AI.motivation: 解决人形机器人在现实世界中的全身稳定、灵巧操作和接触感知挑战，特别是在频繁接触变化下的灵巧操作问题
AI.method: 1) 开发基于强化学习的全身控制器保证稳定执行；2) 结合VR遥操作和人体-人形运动映射的数据收集系统；3) 提出HTD多模态编码器-解码器Transformer，将触觉作为核心模态，通过"触觉梦境"预测未来手部关节力和触觉潜在表示
AI.result: 在五项接触丰富任务(Insert-T、图书整理、毛巾折叠、猫砂铲取、茶道服务)中，HTD相比最强基线取得90.9%的相对成功率提升；潜在空间触觉预测比原始触觉预测效果更好，带来30%的相对成功率增益
AI.conclusion: 结合稳健的全身执行、可扩展的人形数据收集和预测性触觉中心学习，能够在现实世界中实现多功能、高灵巧性的人形机器人操作

title: Constraint-based Pre-training: From Structured Constraints to Scalable Model Initialization
summary: The pre-training and fine-tuning paradigm has become the dominant approach for model adaptation. However, conventional pre-training typically yields models at a fixed scale, whereas practical deployment often requires models of varying sizes, exposing its limitations when target model scales differ from those used during pre-training. To address this, we propose an innovative constraint-based pre-training paradigm that imposes structured constraints during pre-training to disentangle size-agnostic knowledge into reusable weight templates, while assigning size-specific adaptation to lightweight weight scalers, thereby reformulating variable-sized model initialization as a multi-task adaptation problem. Within this paradigm, we further introduce WeiT, which employs Kronecker-based constraints to regularize the pre-training process. Specifically, model parameters are represented as compositions of weight templates via concatenation and weighted aggregation, with adaptive connections governed by lightweight weight scalers whose parameters are learned from limited data. This design enables flexible and efficient construction of model weights across diverse downstream scales. Extensive experiments demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of WeiT, achieving state-of-the-art performance in initializing models with varying depths and widths across a broad range of perception and embodied learning tasks, including Image Classification, Image Generation, and Embodied Control. Moreover, its effectiveness generalizes to both Transformer-based and Convolution-based architectures, consistently enabling faster convergence and improved performance even under full training.

AI.tldr: 提出约束式预训练范式WeiT，通过结构化约束将尺寸无关知识解耦到可重用权重模板中，将尺寸特定适配分配给轻量权重缩放器，实现可变尺寸模型初始化
AI.motivation: 传统预训练产生固定尺度模型，而实际部署需要不同尺寸模型，当目标模型尺度与预训练尺度不同时存在局限性
AI.method: 提出约束式预训练范式，使用Kronecker-based约束正则化预训练过程。模型参数表示为权重模板的拼接和加权聚合，通过轻量权重缩放器控制自适应连接，这些缩放器参数从有限数据中学习
AI.result: 在Image Classification、Image Generation和Embodied Control等感知和具身学习任务中，WeiT在初始化不同深度和宽度模型时达到最先进性能，在Transformer和Convolution架构上均有效，实现更快收敛和更好性能
AI.conclusion: WeiT通过约束式预训练范式成功解决了可变尺寸模型初始化问题，将尺寸无关知识与尺寸特定适配解耦，实现了灵活高效的下游模型构建

title: CI-CBM: Class-Incremental Concept Bottleneck Model for Interpretable Continual Learning
comment: 31 pages, 6 figures. Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR), 04/2026
summary: Catastrophic forgetting remains a fundamental challenge in continual learning, in which models often forget previous knowledge when fine-tuned on a new task. This issue is especially pronounced in class incremental learning (CIL), which is the most challenging setting in continual learning. Existing methods to address catastrophic forgetting often sacrifice either model interpretability or accuracy. To address this challenge, we introduce ClassIncremental Concept Bottleneck Model (CI-CBM), which leverage effective techniques, including concept regularization and pseudo-concept generation to maintain interpretable decision processes throughout incremental learning phases. Through extensive evaluation on seven datasets, CI-CBM achieves comparable performance to black-box models and outperforms previous interpretable approaches in CIL, with an average 36% accuracy gain. CICBM provides interpretable decisions on individual inputs and understandable global decision rules, as shown in our experiments, thereby demonstrating that human understandable concepts can be maintained during incremental learning without compromising model performance. Our approach is effective in both pretrained and non-pretrained scenarios; in the latter, the backbone is trained from scratch during the first learning phase. Code is publicly available at github.com/importAmir/CI-CBM.

AI.tldr: CI-CBM是一种用于类增量学习的可解释概念瓶颈模型，通过概念正则化和伪概念生成技术，在保持模型可解释性的同时有效缓解灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 类增量学习中的灾难性遗忘问题严重，现有方法往往需要在模型可解释性和准确性之间做出妥协。需要一种既能保持可解释决策过程，又不牺牲性能的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出ClassIncremental Concept Bottleneck Model (CI-CBM)，采用概念正则化和伪概念生成技术，在增量学习阶段维护可解释的概念表示和决策过程。
AI.result: 在7个数据集上的评估显示，CI-CBM性能与黑盒模型相当，比先前可解释方法平均提升36%准确率，在预训练和非预训练场景下均有效。
AI.conclusion: CI-CBM证明在增量学习过程中可以保持人类可理解的概念表示，同时不损害模型性能，为可解释的类增量学习提供了有效解决方案。

title: XRZero-G0: Pushing the Frontier of Dexterous Robotic Manipulation with Interfaces, Quality and Ratios
summary: The acquisition of high-quality, action-aligned demonstration data remains a fundamental bottleneck in scaling foundation models for dexterous robot manipulation. Although robot-free human demonstrations (e.g., the UMI paradigm) offer a scalable alternative to traditional teleoperation, current systems are constrained by sub-optimal hardware ergonomics, open-loop workflows, and a lack of systematic data-mixing strategies. To address these limitations, we present XRZero-G0, a hardware-software co-designed system for embodied data collection and policy learning. The system features an ergonomic, virtual reality interface equipped with a top-view camera and dual specialized grippers to directly improve collection efficiency. To ensure dataset reliability, we propose a closed-loop collection, inspection, training, and evaluation pipeline for non-proprioceptive data. This workflow achieves an 85% data validity rate and establishes a transparent mechanism for quality control. Furthermore, we investigate the empirical scaling behaviors and optimal mixing ratios of robot-free data. Extensive experiments indicate that combining a minimal volume of real-robot data with large-scale robot-free data (e.g., a 10:1 ratio) achieves performance comparable to exclusively real-robot datasets, while reducing acquisition costs by a factor of twenty. Utilizing XRZero-G0, we construct a 2,000-hour robot-free dataset that enables zero-shot cross-embodiment transfer to a target physical robot, demonstrating a highly scalable methodology for generalized real-world manipulation.Our project repository: https://github.com/X-Square-Robot/XRZero-G0

AI.tldr: XRZero-G0是一个硬件软件协同设计的系统，用于解决机器人灵巧操作中高质量演示数据获取的瓶颈问题，通过虚拟现实界面和闭环数据收集流程，实现低成本、高效率的数据采集和策略学习。
AI.motivation: 当前机器人灵巧操作的基础模型面临高质量、动作对齐的演示数据获取瓶颈。虽然无机器人的人类演示（如UMI范式）提供了比传统遥操作更可扩展的替代方案，但现有系统受到硬件人机工程学不佳、开环工作流程以及缺乏系统性数据混合策略的限制。
AI.method: 提出了XRZero-G0系统，采用硬件软件协同设计：1）配备顶视摄像头和双专用夹爪的虚拟现实界面提高采集效率；2）针对非本体感知数据建立闭环的收集、检查、训练和评估流程；3）研究机器人无关数据的经验扩展行为和最优混合比例。
AI.result: 系统实现了85%的数据有效性率，建立了透明的质量控制机制。实验表明，将少量真实机器人数据与大规模机器人无关数据混合（如10:1比例）能达到与纯真实机器人数据集相当的性能，同时将采集成本降低20倍。构建了2000小时的机器人无关数据集，实现了到目标物理机器人的零样本跨具身迁移。
AI.conclusion: XRZero-G0系统通过创新的硬件软件协同设计，解决了机器人灵巧操作中高质量演示数据获取的瓶颈问题，提供了一种高度可扩展的通用现实世界操作方法，显著降低了数据采集成本并提高了效率。

title: H2VLR: Heterogeneous Hypergraph Vision-Language Reasoning for Few-Shot Anomaly Detection
summary: As a classic vision task, anomaly detection has been widely applied in industrial inspection and medical imaging. In this task, data scarcity is often a frequently-faced issue. To solve it, the few-shot anomaly detection (FSAD) scheme is attracting increasing attention. In recent years, beyond traditional visual paradigm, Vision-Language Model (VLM) has been extensively explored to boost this field. However, in currently-existing VLM-based FSAD schemes, almost all perform anomaly inference only by pairwise feature matching, ignoring structural dependencies and global consistency. To further redound to FSAD via VLM, we propose a Heterogeneous Hypergraph Vision-Language Reasoning (H2VLR) framework. It reformulates the FSAD as a high-order inference problem of visual-semantic relations, by jointly modeling visual regions and semantic concepts in a unified hypergraph. Experimental comparisons verify the effectiveness and advantages of H2VLR. It could often achieve state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on representative industrial and medical benchmarks. Our code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 提出H2VLR框架，通过异质超图视觉-语言推理解决少样本异常检测问题，将FSAD重新定义为视觉-语义关系的高阶推理问题。
AI.motivation: 当前基于视觉语言模型的少样本异常检测方法主要依赖成对特征匹配，忽略了结构依赖性和全局一致性，需要更有效的推理框架来提升性能。
AI.method: 提出H2VLR框架，将视觉区域和语义概念统一建模到异质超图中，将FSAD重新定义为视觉-语义关系的高阶推理问题。
AI.result: 在工业和医学基准测试中达到最先进性能，验证了H2VLR框架的有效性和优势。
AI.conclusion: H2VLR框架通过超图建模视觉-语义关系，解决了现有VLM-based FSAD方法忽略结构依赖性的问题，显著提升了少样本异常检测性能。

title: RMGS-SLAM: Real-time Multi-sensor Gaussian Splatting SLAM
summary: Real-time 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS)-based Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) in large-scale real-world environments remains challenging, as existing methods often struggle to jointly achieve low-latency pose estimation, 3D Gaussian reconstruction in step with incoming sensor streams, and long-term global consistency. In this paper, we present a tightly coupled LiDAR-Inertial-Visual (LIV) 3DGS-based SLAM framework for real-time pose estimation and photorealistic mapping in large-scale real-world scenes. The system executes state estimation and 3D Gaussian primitive initialization in parallel with global Gaussian optimization, thereby enabling continuous dense mapping. To improve Gaussian initialization quality and accelerate optimization convergence, we introduce a cascaded strategy that combines feed-forward predictions with voxel-based principal component analysis (voxel-PCA) geometric priors. To enhance global consistency in large scenes, we further perform loop closure directly on the optimized global Gaussian map by estimating loop constraints through Gaussian-based Generalized Iterative Closest Point (GICP) registration, followed by pose-graph optimization. In addition, we collected challenging large-scale looped outdoor SLAM sequences with hardware-synchronized LiDAR-camera-IMU and ground-truth trajectories to support realistic and comprehensive evaluation. Extensive experiments on both public datasets and our dataset demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a strong balance among real-time efficiency, localization accuracy, and rendering quality across diverse and challenging real-world scenes.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种紧密耦合的LiDAR-惯性-视觉3D高斯溅射SLAM框架，用于大规模真实场景的实时位姿估计和逼真建图，通过并行处理、级联策略和基于高斯地图的闭环检测实现高效、准确、全局一致的SLAM系统。
AI.motivation: 现有3D高斯溅射SLAM方法在大规模真实环境中难以同时实现低延迟位姿估计、与传感器流同步的3D高斯重建以及长期全局一致性，需要开发能够平衡实时性、定位精度和渲染质量的综合解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 并行执行状态估计和3D高斯基元初始化与全局高斯优化；2) 采用级联策略结合前馈预测和基于体素的主成分分析几何先验；3) 在优化后的全局高斯地图上直接进行闭环检测，通过基于高斯的GICP配准估计闭环约束，然后进行位姿图优化。
AI.result: 在公共数据集和自建数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法在多样且具有挑战性的真实场景中实现了实时效率、定位精度和渲染质量之间的良好平衡，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的紧密耦合LIV-3DGS SLAM框架能够在大规模真实世界环境中实现实时位姿估计和逼真建图，通过并行处理架构、级联初始化策略和基于高斯地图的闭环检测，有效解决了现有方法在实时性、精度和全局一致性方面的挑战。

title: Exploiting Correlations in Federated Learning: Opportunities and Practical Limitations
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures, submitted for possible publication
summary: The communication bottleneck in federated learning (FL) has spurred extensive research into techniques to reduce the volume of data exchanged between client devices and the central parameter server. In this paper, we systematically classify gradient and model compression schemes into three categories based on the type of correlations they exploit: structural, temporal, and spatial. We examine the sources of such correlations, propose quantitative metrics for measuring their magnitude, and reinterpret existing compression methods through this unified correlation-based framework. Our experimental studies demonstrate that the degrees of structural, temporal, and spatial correlations vary significantly depending on task complexity, model architecture, and algorithmic configurations. These findings suggest that algorithm designers should carefully evaluate correlation assumptions under specific deployment scenarios rather than assuming that they are always present. Motivated by these findings, we propose two adaptive compression designs that actively switch between different compression modes based on the measured correlation strength, and we evaluate their performance gains relative to conventional non-adaptive approaches. In summary, our unified taxonomy provides a clean and principled foundation for developing more effective and application-specific compression techniques for FL systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个基于相关性（结构、时间、空间）的统一分类框架来系统分析联邦学习中的梯度/模型压缩方法，并通过实验发现相关性程度因任务而异，进而设计了两种自适应压缩方案。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中的通信瓶颈促使了各种压缩技术的发展，但现有方法缺乏统一的分类框架。作者旨在通过相关性分析提供一个系统化的理论框架，帮助理解不同压缩方法的本质，并指导更有效的压缩算法设计。
AI.method: 1. 将梯度/模型压缩方案系统分类为三类：利用结构相关性、时间相关性和空间相关性的方法；2. 分析这些相关性的来源并提出量化度量指标；3. 在统一的相关性框架下重新解释现有压缩方法；4. 通过实验研究不同任务、模型和配置下的相关性变化；5. 提出两种自适应压缩设计，根据测量的相关性强度在不同压缩模式间主动切换。
AI.result: 实验研究表明，结构、时间和空间相关性的程度显著依赖于任务复杂性、模型架构和算法配置。这些发现表明算法设计者不应假设相关性总是存在，而应在特定部署场景下仔细评估相关性假设。提出的自适应压缩方案相对于传统非自适应方法显示出性能优势。
AI.conclusion: 该论文提出的统一分类法为联邦学习系统开发更有效、更应用特定的压缩技术提供了清晰且原则性的基础。相关性分析框架有助于指导压缩算法的设计选择，而自适应方法能够根据实际相关性模式动态调整压缩策略，从而优化通信效率。

title: Co-distilled attention guided masked image modeling with noisy teacher for self-supervised learning on medical images
summary: Masked image modeling (MIM) is a highly effective self-supervised learning (SSL) approach to extract useful feature representations from unannotated data. Predominantly used random masking methods make SSL less effective for medical images due to the contextual similarity of neighboring patches, leading to information leakage and SSL simplification. Hierarchical shifted window (Swin) transformer, a highly effective approach for medical images cannot use advanced masking methods as it lacks a global [CLS] token. Hence, we introduced an attention guided masking mechanism for Swin within a co-distillation learning framework to selectively mask semantically co-occurring and discriminative patches, to reduce information leakage and increase the difficulty of SSL pretraining. However, attention guided masking inevitably reduces the diversity of attention heads, which negatively impacts downstream task performance. To address this, we for the first time, integrate a noisy teacher into the co-distillation framework (termed DAGMaN) that performs attentive masking while preserving high attention head diversity. We demonstrate the capability of DAGMaN on multiple tasks including full- and few-shot lung nodule classification, immunotherapy outcome prediction, tumor segmentation, and unsupervised organs clustering.

AI.tldr: DAGMaN：一种用于医学图像自监督学习的噪声教师协同蒸馏框架，通过注意力引导掩码机制减少信息泄漏，同时保持注意力头多样性
AI.motivation: 传统随机掩码方法在医学图像上效果不佳，因为相邻图像块具有上下文相似性，导致信息泄漏和自监督学习简化。Swin Transformer缺乏全局[CLS]标记，无法使用先进的掩码方法。注意力引导掩码虽然能减少信息泄漏，但会降低注意力头多样性，影响下游任务性能。
AI.method: 提出DAGMaN框架：1）在协同蒸馏框架中引入注意力引导掩码机制，选择性掩码语义共现和判别性图像块；2）首次集成噪声教师，在保持注意力引导掩码的同时维持高注意力头多样性；3）应用于Swin Transformer架构。
AI.result: 在多个任务上验证了DAGMaN的能力：全样本和少样本肺结节分类、免疫治疗结果预测、肿瘤分割、无监督器官聚类。结果表明该方法能有效减少信息泄漏，同时保持注意力头多样性，提升下游任务性能。
AI.conclusion: DAGMaN框架成功解决了医学图像自监督学习中随机掩码的信息泄漏问题，通过注意力引导掩码和噪声教师协同蒸馏，在减少信息泄漏的同时保持了注意力头多样性，在多种医学图像任务上表现出优越性能。

title: DINO-Explorer: Active Underwater Discovery via Ego-Motion Compensated Semantic Predictive Coding
summary: Marine ecosystem degradation necessitates continuous, scientifically selective underwater monitoring. However, most autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) operate as passive data loggers, capturing exhaustive video for offline review and frequently missing transient events of high scientific value. Transitioning to active perception requires a causal, online signal that highlights significant phenomena while suppressing maneuver-induced visual changes. We propose DINO-Explorer, a novelty-aware perception framework driven by a continuous semantic surprise signal. Operating within the latent space of a frozen DINOv3 foundation model, it leverages a lightweight, action-conditioned recurrent predictor to anticipate short-horizon semantic evolution. An efference-copy-inspired module utilizes globally pooled optical flow to discount self-induced visual changes without suppressing genuine environmental novelty. We evaluate this signal on the downstream task of asynchronous event triage under variant telemetry constraints. Results demonstrate that DINO-Explorer provides a robust, bandwidth-efficient attention mechanism. At a fixed operating point, the system retains 78.8% of post-discovery human-reviewer consensus events with a 56.8% trigger confirmation rate, effectively surfacing mission-relevant phenomena. Crucially, ego-motion conditioning suppresses 45.5% of false positives relative to an uncompensated surprise signal baseline. In a replay-side Pareto ablation study, DINO-Explorer robustly dominates the validated peak F1 versus telemetry bandwidth frontier, reducing telemetry bandwidth by 48.2% at the selected operating point while maintaining a 62.2% peak F1 score, successfully concentrating data transmission around human-verified novelty events.

AI.tldr: DINO-Explorer：基于语义惊奇信号的新颖性感知水下感知框架，通过动作条件化预测器和自我运动补偿实现高效事件检测，显著减少遥测带宽需求
AI.motivation: 传统自主水下航行器作为被动数据记录器，常错过具有高科学价值的瞬态事件。需要一种因果、在线的信号来突出显著现象，同时抑制机动引起的视觉变化，实现主动感知
AI.method: 基于冻结DINOv3基础模型的潜在空间，采用轻量级动作条件化循环预测器预测短期语义演化。通过全局池化光流的传出副本模块，消除自诱导视觉变化而不抑制真实环境新颖性
AI.result: 系统保留78.8%的人类审查共识事件，触发确认率56.8%。自我运动补偿相对无补偿基线减少45.5%误报。在选定工作点减少48.2%遥测带宽，同时保持62.2%峰值F1分数
AI.conclusion: DINO-Explorer提供了鲁棒、带宽高效的注意力机制，成功将数据传输集中在人类验证的新颖事件周围，有效提升了水下监测的科学价值捕获能力

title: E2E-Fly: An Integrated Training-to-Deployment System for End-to-End Quadrotor Autonomy
summary: Training and transferring learning-based policies for quadrotors from simulation to reality remains challenging due to inefficient visual rendering, physical modeling inaccuracies, unmodeled sensor discrepancies, and the absence of a unified platform integrating differentiable physics learning into end-to-end training. While recent work has demonstrated various end-to-end quadrotor control tasks, few systems provide a systematic, zero-shot transfer pipeline, hindering reproducibility and real-world deployment. To bridge this gap, we introduce E2E-Fly, an integrated framework featuring an agile quadrotor platform coupled with a full-stack training, validation, and deployment workflow. The training framework incorporates a high-performance simulator with support for differentiable physics learning and reinforcement learning, alongside structured reward design tailored to common quadrotor tasks. We further introduce a two-stage validation strategy using sim-to-sim transfer and hardware-in-the-loop testing, and deploy policies onto two physical quadrotor platforms via a dedicated low-level control interface and a comprehensive sim-to-real alignment methodology, encompassing system identification, domain randomization, latency compensation, and noise modeling. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to systematically unify differentiable physical learning with training, validation, and real-world deployment for quadrotors. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework for training six end-to-end control tasks and deploy them in the real world.

AI.tldr: E2E-Fly：首个系统化统一可微分物理学习与训练、验证、真实世界部署的端到端四旋翼控制框架
AI.motivation: 当前四旋翼从仿真到现实的策略迁移面临视觉渲染效率低、物理建模不准确、传感器差异未建模、缺乏统一平台等问题，现有系统缺乏系统化的零样本迁移流程，阻碍了可重复性和实际部署。
AI.method: 提出E2E-Fly集成框架，包含敏捷四旋翼平台和全栈训练-验证-部署工作流。训练框架采用支持可微分物理学习和强化学习的高性能仿真器，设计结构化奖励函数。引入两阶段验证策略（仿真到仿真迁移和硬件在环测试），通过专用底层控制接口和全面的仿真到现实对齐方法（系统辨识、域随机化、延迟补偿、噪声建模）将策略部署到物理平台。
AI.result: 成功训练六个端到端控制任务并在真实世界中部署，验证了框架的有效性。据作者所知，这是首个系统化统一可微分物理学习与训练、验证、真实世界部署的四旋翼工作。
AI.conclusion: E2E-Fly框架成功解决了四旋翼从仿真到现实策略迁移的系统化挑战，通过集成可微分物理学习、结构化训练、两阶段验证和全面的仿真到现实对齐方法，实现了端到端控制任务的零样本部署，为可重复研究和实际应用提供了统一平台。

title: FAIR Universe Weak Lensing ML Uncertainty Challenge: Handling Uncertainties and Distribution Shifts for Precision Cosmology
comment: Whitepaper for the FAIR Universe Weak Lensing ML Uncertainty Challenge Competition. More info is available at our GitHub repository https://github.com/FAIR-Universe/Cosmology_Challenge. 13 pages, 5 figures, 1 table
summary: Weak gravitational lensing, the correlated distortion of background galaxy shapes by foreground structures, is a powerful probe of the matter distribution in our universe and allows accurate constraints on the cosmological model. In recent years, high-order statistics and machine learning (ML) techniques have been applied to weak lensing data to extract the nonlinear information beyond traditional two-point analysis. However, these methods typically rely on cosmological simulations, which poses several challenges: simulations are computationally expensive, limiting most realistic setups to a low training data regime; inaccurate modeling of systematics in the simulations create distribution shifts that can bias cosmological parameter constraints; and varying simulation setups across studies make method comparison difficult. To address these difficulties, we present the first weak lensing benchmark dataset with several realistic systematics and launch the FAIR Universe Weak Lensing Machine Learning Uncertainty Challenge. The challenge focuses on measuring the fundamental properties of the universe from weak lensing data with limited training set and potential distribution shifts, while providing a standardized benchmark for rigorous comparison across methods. Organized in two phases, the challenge will bring together the physics and ML communities to advance the methodologies for handling systematic uncertainties, data efficiency, and distribution shifts in weak lensing analysis with ML, ultimately facilitating the deployment of ML approaches into upcoming weak lensing survey analysis.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了首个包含多种现实系统效应的弱引力透镜基准数据集，并启动了FAIR宇宙弱引力透镜机器学习不确定性挑战赛，旨在解决弱透镜分析中训练数据有限、分布偏移和系统不确定性等问题。
AI.motivation: 弱引力透镜是研究宇宙物质分布和约束宇宙学模型的有力工具。近年来，高阶统计和机器学习技术被应用于弱透镜数据分析以提取非线性信息。然而，这些方法通常依赖宇宙学模拟，面临以下挑战：模拟计算成本高，导致训练数据有限；模拟中系统效应的不准确建模会导致分布偏移，从而偏差宇宙学参数约束；不同研究的模拟设置差异使得方法比较困难。
AI.method: 作者创建了首个包含多种现实系统效应的弱引力透镜基准数据集，并启动了FAIR宇宙弱引力透镜机器学习不确定性挑战赛。挑战赛分为两个阶段，重点关注在有限训练集和潜在分布偏移条件下从弱透镜数据测量宇宙基本性质，同时为不同方法提供标准化基准进行严格比较。
AI.result: 提出了一个标准化的弱透镜基准数据集和挑战赛框架，旨在促进物理和机器学习社区合作，共同推进处理弱透镜分析中系统不确定性、数据效率和分布偏移的方法论。
AI.conclusion: 该基准数据集和挑战赛将有助于解决弱透镜机器学习分析中的关键挑战，促进不同方法的标准化比较，最终推动机器学习方法在即将到来的弱透镜巡天分析中的实际应用。

title: Intermediate Layers Encode Optimal Biological Representations in Single-Cell Foundation Models
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures, 4 tables. Accepted at the LMRL (Learning Meaningful Representations of Life) Workshop at ICLR 2026
summary: Current single-cell foundation model benchmarks universally extract final layer embeddings, assuming these represent optimal feature spaces. We systematically evaluate layer-wise representations from scFoundation (100M parameters) and Tahoe-X1 (1.3B parameters) across trajectory inference and perturbation response prediction. Our analysis reveals that optimal layers are task-dependent (trajectory peaks at 60% depth, 31% above final layers) and context-dependent (perturbation optima shift 0-96% across T cell activation states). Notably, first-layer embeddings outperform all deeper layers in quiescent cells, challenging assumptions about hierarchical feature abstraction. These findings demonstrate that "where" to extract features matters as much as "what" the model learns, necessitating systematic layer evaluation tailored to biological task and cellular context rather than defaulting to final-layer embeddings.

AI.tldr: 研究发现单细胞基础模型的最佳特征提取层是任务和细胞状态依赖的，而非默认的最终层嵌入
AI.motivation: 当前单细胞基础模型基准普遍提取最终层嵌入，假设这些代表最优特征空间。本研究旨在系统评估不同层的表示能力，挑战这一默认假设
AI.method: 系统评估scFoundation（1亿参数）和Tahoe-X1（13亿参数）的逐层表示，在轨迹推断和扰动响应预测任务上进行测试
AI.result: 1）最优层是任务依赖的：轨迹推断在60%深度层表现最佳，比最终层高31%；2）最优层是上下文依赖的：扰动预测最优层在T细胞激活状态间变化0-96%；3）静息细胞中第一层嵌入优于所有深层，挑战层次特征抽象假设
AI.conclusion: 特征提取的"位置"与模型学习"内容"同等重要，需要根据生物任务和细胞上下文进行系统层评估，而非默认使用最终层嵌入

title: Tree Learning: A Multi-Skill Continual Learning Framework for Humanoid Robots
summary: As reinforcement learning for humanoid robots evolves from single-task to multi-skill paradigms, efficiently expanding new skills while avoiding catastrophic forgetting has become a key challenge in embodied intelligence. Existing approaches either rely on complex topology adjustments in Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models or require training extremely large-scale models, making lightweight deployment difficult. To address this, we propose Tree Learning, a multi-skill continual learning framework for humanoid robots. The framework adopts a root-branch hierarchical parameter inheritance mechanism, providing motion priors for branch skills through parameter reuse to fundamentally prevent catastrophic forgetting. A multi-modal feedforward adaptation mechanism combining phase modulation and interpolation is designed to support both periodic and aperiodic motions. A task-level reward shaping strategy is also proposed to accelerate skill convergence. Unity-based simulation experiments show that, in contrast to simultaneous multi-task training, Tree Learning achieves higher rewards across various representative locomotion skills while maintaining a 100% skill retention rate, enabling seamless multi-skill switching and real-time interactive control. We further validate the performance and generalization capability of Tree Learning on two distinct Unity-simulated tasks: a Super Mario-inspired interactive scenario and autonomous navigation in a classical Chinese garden environment.

AI.tldr: 提出Tree Learning框架，通过根-分支层次参数继承机制解决人形机器人多技能持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，支持周期性和非周期性运动，在Unity仿真中验证了高奖励和100%技能保留率。
AI.motivation: 随着人形机器人强化学习从单任务向多技能范式演进，如何高效扩展新技能同时避免灾难性遗忘成为具身智能的关键挑战。现有方法要么依赖复杂的MoE模型拓扑调整，要么需要训练极大规模模型，难以轻量部署。
AI.method: 提出Tree Learning多技能持续学习框架：1) 采用根-分支层次参数继承机制，通过参数重用为分支技能提供运动先验；2) 设计结合相位调制和插值的多模态前馈适应机制，支持周期性和非周期性运动；3) 提出任务级奖励塑形策略加速技能收敛。
AI.result: Unity仿真实验表明，相比同时多任务训练，Tree Learning在各种代表性运动技能上获得更高奖励，同时保持100%技能保留率，实现无缝多技能切换和实时交互控制。在超级马里奥式交互场景和古典中国园林自主导航两个不同任务中验证了性能和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Tree Learning框架通过参数继承机制从根本上防止灾难性遗忘，支持多技能持续学习，在保持轻量部署的同时实现高性能和泛化能力，为人形机器人多技能学习提供了有效解决方案。

title: Crowdsourcing of Real-world Image Annotation via Visual Properties
summary: Recent advances in data-centric artificial intelligence highlight inherent limitations in object recognition datasets. One of the primary issues stems from the semantic gap problem, which results in complex many-to-many mappings between visual data and linguistic descriptions. This bias adversely affects performance in computer vision tasks. This paper proposes an image annotation methodology that integrates knowledge representation, natural language processing, and computer vision techniques, aiming to reduce annotator subjectivity by applying visual property constraints. We introduce an interactive crowdsourcing framework that dynamically asks questions based on a predefined object category hierarchy and annotator feedback, guiding image annotation by visual properties. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of this methodology, and annotator feedback is discussed to optimize the crowdsourcing setup.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合知识表示、自然语言处理和计算机视觉的图像标注方法，通过视觉属性约束减少标注者主观性，并引入基于对象类别层次结构的交互式众包框架。
AI.motivation: 当前以数据为中心的人工智能在物体识别数据集上存在局限性，主要问题源于语义鸿沟，导致视觉数据与语言描述之间存在复杂的多对多映射关系，这种偏差影响了计算机视觉任务的性能。
AI.method: 提出一种图像标注方法，整合知识表示、自然语言处理和计算机视觉技术，通过应用视觉属性约束来减少标注者主观性。引入交互式众包框架，基于预定义的对象类别层次结构和标注者反馈动态提问，通过视觉属性指导图像标注。
AI.result: 实验证明了该方法的有效性，并讨论了标注者反馈以优化众包设置。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合多种技术减少语义鸿沟带来的标注偏差，交互式众包框架能够有效指导标注过程，提高标注质量和一致性。

title: Beyond Literal Summarization: Redefining Hallucination for Medical SOAP Note Evaluation
summary:
Evaluating large language models (LLMs) for clinical documentation tasks such as SOAP note generation remains challenging. Unlike standard summarization, these tasks require clinical abstraction, normalization of colloquial language, and medically grounded inference. However, prevailing evaluation methods including automated metrics and LLM as judge frameworks rely on lexical faithfulness, often labeling any information not explicitly present in the transcript as hallucination.
  We show that such approaches systematically misclassify clinically valid outputs as errors, inflating hallucination rates and distorting model assessment. Our analysis reveals that many flagged hallucinations correspond to legitimate clinical transformations, including synonym mapping, abstraction of examination findings, diagnostic inference, and guideline consistent care planning.
  By aligning evaluation criteria with clinical reasoning through calibrated prompting and retrieval grounded in medical ontologies we observe a significant shift in outcomes. Under a lexical evaluation regime, the mean hallucination rate is 35%, heavily penalizing valid reasoning. With inference aware evaluation, this drops to 9%, with remaining cases reflecting genuine safety concerns. These findings suggest that current evaluation practices over penalize valid clinical reasoning and may measure artifacts of evaluation design rather than true errors, underscoring the need for clinically informed evaluation in high context domains like medicine.

AI.tldr: 论文指出当前LLM临床文档评估方法（如SOAP笔记生成）存在系统性偏差，将临床有效推理误判为幻觉，需要基于临床推理的评估框架
AI.motivation: 评估大型语言模型在临床文档任务（如SOAP笔记生成）时面临挑战，现有评估方法依赖词汇忠实度，将临床推理和规范化内容误判为幻觉，导致评估失真
AI.method: 通过校准提示和基于医学本体的检索，将评估标准与临床推理对齐，开发推理感知的评估框架，区分真正的安全问题和有效的临床转换
AI.result: 词汇评估方法下平均幻觉率为35%，严重惩罚有效推理；推理感知评估下幻觉率降至9%，剩余案例反映真正的安全问题，显示当前评估过度惩罚临床推理
AI.conclusion: 当前评估实践过度惩罚有效的临床推理，可能测量的是评估设计的伪影而非真实错误，强调在医学等高语境领域需要临床知情的评估方法

title: Zero-Ablation Overstates Register Content Dependence in DINO Vision Transformers
comment: 12 pages, 10 figures, to be published in CVPR 2026 HOW Vision Interpretability Workshop Proceedings
summary: Zero-ablation -- replacing token activations with zero vectors -- is widely used to probe token function in vision transformers. Register zeroing in DINOv2+registers and DINOv3 produces large drops (up to $-36.6$\,pp classification, $-30.9$\,pp segmentation), suggesting registers are functionally indispensable. However, three replacement controls -- mean-substitution, noise-substitution, and cross-image register-shuffling -- preserve performance across classification, correspondence, and segmentation, remaining within ${\sim}1$\,pp of the unmodified baseline. Per-patch cosine similarity shows these replacements genuinely perturb internal representations, while zeroing causes disproportionately large perturbations, consistent with why it alone degrades tasks. We conclude that zero-ablation overstates dependence on exact register content. In the frozen-feature evaluations we test, performance depends on plausible register-like activations rather than on exact image-specific values. Registers nevertheless buffer dense features from \texttt{[CLS]} dependence and are associated with compressed patch geometry. These findings, including the replacement-control results, replicate at ViT-B scale.

AI.tldr: 零消融（zero-ablation）在视觉Transformer中高估了对寄存器精确内容的依赖，替代控制方法（均值替换、噪声替换、跨图像寄存器混洗）能保持性能，表明任务只需要合理的寄存器类激活而非精确的图像特定值。
AI.motivation: 研究零消融方法在视觉Transformer中评估寄存器功能的有效性，质疑其是否过度强调了对寄存器精确内容的依赖。
AI.method: 使用三种替代控制方法：均值替换、噪声替换和跨图像寄存器混洗，与零消融对比，通过分类、对应关系和分割任务评估性能，并分析每块余弦相似度来测量内部表示扰动程度。
AI.result: 零消融导致性能大幅下降（分类-36.6pp，分割-30.9pp），而三种替代控制方法在各项任务中均保持性能，与未修改基线相差约1pp以内。余弦相似度分析显示替代方法确实扰动了内部表示，但零消融造成不成比例的大扰动。
AI.conclusion: 零消融夸大了对寄存器精确内容的依赖，在冻结特征评估中，性能依赖于合理的寄存器类激活而非精确的图像特定值。寄存器仍起到缓冲密集特征免受[CLS]依赖影响的作用，并与压缩的块几何结构相关。这些发现在ViT-B规模上可复现。

title: RELOAD: A Robust and Efficient Learned Query Optimizer for Database Systems
comment: This work is currently under review
summary: Recent advances in query optimization have shifted from traditional rule-based and cost-based techniques towards machine learning-driven approaches. Among these, reinforcement learning (RL) has attracted significant attention due to its ability to optimize long-term performance by learning policies over query planning. However, existing RL-based query optimizers often exhibit unstable performance at the level of individual queries, including severe performance regressions, and require prolonged training to reach the plan quality of expert, cost-based optimizers.
