These shortcomings make learned query optimizers difficult to deploy in practice and remain a major barrier to their adoption in production database systems. To address these challenges, we present RELOAD, a robust and efficient learned query optimizer for database systems. RELOAD focuses on (i) robustness, by minimizing query-level performance regressions and ensuring consistent optimization behavior across executions, and (ii) efficiency, by accelerating convergence to expert-level plan quality. Through extensive experiments on standard benchmarks, including Join Order Benchmark, TPC-DS, and Star Schema Benchmark, RELOAD demonstrates up to 2.4x higher robustness and 3.1x greater efficiency compared to state-of-the-art RL-based query optimization techniques.

AI.tldr: RELOAD是一个鲁棒高效的基于强化学习的查询优化器，解决了现有RL优化器查询级性能不稳定、收敛慢的问题，在多个基准测试中表现出显著优势。
AI.motivation: 现有基于强化学习的查询优化器存在查询级性能不稳定（包括严重性能回归）和需要长时间训练才能达到专家级成本优化器水平的问题，这阻碍了学习型查询优化器在实际生产数据库系统中的部署和应用。
AI.method: RELOAD专注于两个核心目标：1）鲁棒性 - 最小化查询级性能回归，确保跨执行的一致优化行为；2）效率 - 加速收敛到专家级计划质量。具体方法未在摘要中详细说明，但强调通过技术创新实现这两个目标。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试（包括Join Order Benchmark、TPC-DS和Star Schema Benchmark）中，RELOAD相比最先进的基于RL的查询优化技术，表现出高达2.4倍的鲁棒性提升和3.1倍的效率提升。
AI.conclusion: RELOAD通过解决现有RL查询优化器的鲁棒性和效率问题，为学习型查询优化器在实际数据库系统中的部署提供了可行的解决方案，显著提升了性能稳定性和训练效率。

title: FoodSense: A Multisensory Food Dataset and Benchmark for Predicting Taste, Smell, Texture, and Sound from Images
summary: Humans routinely infer taste, smell, texture, and even sound from food images a phenomenon well studied in cognitive science. However, prior vision language research on food has focused primarily on recognition tasks such as meal identification, ingredient detection, and nutrition estimation. Image-based prediction of multisensory experience remains largely unexplored. We introduce FoodSense, a human-annotated dataset for cross-sensory inference containing 66,842 participant-image pairs across 2,987 unique food images. Each pair includes numeric ratings (1-5) and free-text descriptors for four sensory dimensions: taste, smell, texture, and sound. To enable models to both predict and explain sensory expectations, we expand short human annotations into image-grounded reasoning traces. A large language model generates visual justifications conditioned on the image, ratings, and descriptors. Using these annotations, we train FoodSense-VL, a vision language benchmark model to produce both multisensory ratings and grounded explanations directly from food images. This work connects cognitive science findings on cross-sensory perception with modern instruction tuning for multimodal models and shows that many popular evaluation metrics are insufficient for visually sensory inference.

AI.tldr: FoodSense：首个用于从食物图像进行跨感官推理的数据集和基准模型，包含味觉、嗅觉、触觉和声音的评分与描述，通过LLM生成视觉依据的推理轨迹来训练模型预测和解释感官体验。
AI.motivation: 人类能从食物图像中推断多种感官体验（味觉、嗅觉、触觉、声音），这一认知现象已被广泛研究，但现有视觉语言研究主要关注识别任务（如餐食识别、成分检测、营养估计），基于图像的跨感官体验预测仍未被充分探索。
AI.method: 1) 构建FoodSense数据集：包含66,842个参与者-图像对，覆盖2,987张独特食物图像，每个对包含四个感官维度（味觉、嗅觉、触觉、声音）的1-5分评分和自由文本描述；2) 使用大语言模型将简短人工标注扩展为基于图像的推理轨迹，生成视觉依据的推理解释；3) 训练FoodSense-VL基准模型，直接从食物图像生成多感官评分和基于视觉的解释。
AI.result: 创建了首个用于跨感官推理的人类标注数据集FoodSense，开发了FoodSense-VL基准模型，能够从食物图像预测多感官评分并提供基于视觉的解释。研究还发现许多流行的评估指标对于视觉感官推理任务不够充分。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将认知科学中关于跨感官感知的研究与现代多模态模型的指令调优相结合，填补了从食物图像预测多感官体验的研究空白，为视觉感官推理提供了新的数据集和基准模型，并指出了现有评估指标的局限性。

title: FastGrasp: Learning-based Whole-body Control method for Fast Dexterous Grasping with Mobile Manipulators
summary: Fast grasping is critical for mobile robots in logistics, manufacturing, and service applications. Existing methods face fundamental challenges in impact stabilization under high-speed motion, real-time whole-body coordination, and generalization across diverse objects and scenarios, limited by fixed bases, simple grippers, or slow tactile response capabilities. We propose \textbf{FastGrasp}, a learning-based framework that integrates grasp guidance, whole-body control, and tactile feedback for mobile fast grasping. Our two-stage reinforcement learning strategy first generates diverse grasp candidates via conditional variational autoencoder conditioned on object point clouds, then executes coordinated movements of mobile base, arm, and hand guided by optimal grasp selection. Tactile sensing enables real-time grasp adjustments to handle impact effects and object variations. Extensive experiments demonstrate superior grasping performance in both simulation and real-world scenarios, achieving robust manipulation across diverse object geometries through effective sim-to-real transfer.

AI.tldr: FastGrasp：一个用于移动机器人快速抓取的学习框架，整合了抓取引导、全身控制和触觉反馈，通过两阶段强化学习实现高速稳定抓取
AI.motivation: 现有方法在高速运动下的冲击稳定、实时全身协调以及跨不同物体和场景的泛化方面面临根本性挑战，受限于固定底座、简单夹爪或缓慢的触觉响应能力
AI.method: 提出FastGrasp框架，采用两阶段强化学习策略：第一阶段通过条件变分自编码器基于物体点云生成多样抓取候选；第二阶段执行移动底座、机械臂和手爪的协调运动，由最优抓取选择引导；触觉传感实现实时抓取调整以处理冲击效应和物体变化
AI.result: 在仿真和真实场景中均表现出优越的抓取性能，通过有效的仿真到真实迁移实现了跨不同物体几何形状的鲁棒操作
AI.conclusion: FastGrasp框架成功解决了移动机器人快速抓取中的关键挑战，整合了抓取引导、全身控制和触觉反馈，为物流、制造和服务应用中的高速抓取提供了有效解决方案

title: Step-level Denoising-time Diffusion Alignment with Multiple Objectives
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a powerful tool for aligning diffusion models with human preferences, typically by optimizing a single reward function under a KL regularization constraint. In practice, however, human preferences are inherently pluralistic, and aligned models must balance multiple downstream objectives, such as aesthetic quality and text-image consistency. Existing multi-objective approaches either rely on costly multi-objective RL fine-tuning or on fusing separately aligned models at denoising time, but they generally require access to reward values (or their gradients) and/or introduce approximation error in the resulting denoising objectives. In this paper, we revisit the problem of RL fine-tuning for diffusion models and address the intractability of identifying the optimal policy by introducing a step-level RL formulation. Building on this, we further propose Multi-objective Step-level Denoising-time Diffusion Alignment (MSDDA), a retraining-free framework for aligning diffusion models with multiple objectives, obtaining the optimal reverse denoising distribution in closed form, with mean and variance expressed directly in terms of single-objective base models. We prove that this denoising-time objective is exactly equivalent to the step-level RL fine-tuning, introducing no approximation error. Moreover, we provide numerical results, which indicate our method outperforms existing denoising-time approaches.

AI.tldr: MSDDA是一种无需重新训练的多目标扩散模型对齐框架，通过步级RL公式化，在去噪时获得最优反向分布闭式解，避免了近似误差。
AI.motivation: 人类偏好本质上是多元的，扩散模型需要平衡多个下游目标（如美学质量和文本图像一致性）。现有多目标方法要么依赖昂贵的多目标RL微调，要么在去噪时融合单独对齐的模型，通常需要奖励值（或其梯度）访问权限，并引入近似误差。
AI.method: 提出步级RL公式化解决最优策略识别难题，进一步提出MSDDA框架：无需重新训练，通过闭式解获得最优反向去噪分布，均值和方差直接由单目标基础模型表达，与步级RL微调完全等价。
AI.result: 数值结果表明该方法优于现有的去噪时方法，且证明去噪时目标与步级RL微调完全等价，不引入近似误差。
AI.conclusion: MSDDA为扩散模型的多目标对齐提供了一种高效、精确的解决方案，避免了重新训练成本和近似误差，在平衡多个下游目标方面表现出优越性能。

title: OVAL: Open-Vocabulary Augmented Memory Model for Lifelong Object Goal Navigation
summary: Object Goal Navigation (ObjectNav) refers to an agent navigating to an object in an unseen environment, which is an ability often required in the accomplishment of complex tasks. While existing methods demonstrate proficiency in isolated single object navigation, their limitations emerge in the restricted applicability of lifelong memory representations, which ultimately hinders effective navigation toward continual targets over extended periods. To address this problem, we propose OVAL, a novel lifelong open-vocabulary memory framework, which enables efficient and precise execution of long-term navigation in semantically open tasks. Within this framework, we introduce memory descriptors to facilitate structured management of the memory model. Additionally, we propose a novel probability-based exploration strategy, utilizing a multi-value frontier scoring to enhance lifelong exploration efficiency. Extensive experiments demonstrate the efficiency and robustness of the proposed system.

AI.tldr: OVAL是一个用于长期开放词汇目标导航的终身记忆框架，通过结构化记忆描述符和基于概率的探索策略解决现有方法在连续目标导航中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有物体目标导航方法在孤立单目标导航中表现良好，但在终身记忆表示方面存在局限性，这阻碍了在长时间内对连续目标的有效导航。需要解决开放词汇任务中长期导航的效率和精度问题。
AI.method: 提出了OVAL终身开放词汇记忆框架，引入记忆描述符来结构化管理记忆模型，并提出基于概率的探索策略，利用多值边界评分来增强终身探索效率。
AI.result: 大量实验证明了所提出系统的高效性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: OVAL框架能够实现高效精确的长期开放词汇导航任务，解决了现有方法在连续目标导航中的局限性。

title: A Mechanistic Account of Attention Sinks in GPT-2: One Circuit, Broader Implications for Mitigation
summary: Transformers commonly exhibit an attention sink: disproportionately high attention to the first position. We study this behavior in GPT-2-style models with learned query biases and absolute positional embeddings. Combining structural analysis with causal interventions, validated across natural-language, mathematical, and code inputs, we find that the sink arises from the interaction among (i) a learned query bias, (ii) the first-layer MLP transformation of the positional encoding, and (iii) structure in the key projection. Crucially, each component we identify is individually dispensable: architectures omitting each of them robustly exhibit sinks. This indicates that attention sinks may arise through distinct circuits across architectures. These findings inform mitigation of sinks, and motivate broader investigation into why sinks emerge.

AI.tldr: 研究发现Transformer中的注意力下沉现象（对首个位置过度关注）源于三个组件的交互作用：学习到的查询偏置、第一层MLP对位置编码的变换、以及键投影的结构特征。
AI.motivation: Transformer模型普遍表现出注意力下沉现象，即对第一个位置给予不成比例的高注意力。本研究旨在深入理解这一现象的产生机制，特别是针对GPT-2风格模型，以期为缓解该问题提供理论基础。
AI.method: 采用结构分析与因果干预相结合的方法，在自然语言、数学和代码输入上进行验证，研究注意力下沉现象的产生机制。
AI.result: 发现注意力下沉源于三个组件的交互作用：学习到的查询偏置、第一层MLP对位置编码的变换、以及键投影的结构特征。每个组件单独都是可移除的，不同架构可能通过不同电路产生下沉现象。
AI.conclusion: 注意力下沉现象可能通过不同架构中的不同电路产生，这一发现为缓解下沉现象提供了信息，并激励了对下沉现象产生原因的广泛研究。

title: SatBLIP: Context Understanding and Feature Identification from Satellite Imagery with Vision-Language Learning
summary: Rural environmental risks are shaped by place-based conditions (e.g., housing quality, road access, land-surface patterns), yet standard vulnerability indices are coarse and provide limited insight into risk contexts. We propose SatBLIP, a satellite-specific vision-language framework for rural context understanding and feature identification that predicts county-level Social Vulnerability Index (SVI). SatBLIP addresses limitations of prior remote sensing pipelines-handcrafted features, manual virtual audits, and natural-image-trained VLMs-by coupling contrastive image-text alignment with bootstrapped captioning tailored to satellite semantics. We use GPT-4o to generate structured descriptions of satellite tiles (roof type/condition, house size, yard attributes, greenery, and road context), then fine-tune a satellite-adapted BLIP model to generate captions for unseen images. Captions are encoded with CLIP and fused with LLM-derived embeddings via attention for SVI estimation under spatial aggregation. Using SHAP, we identify salient attributes (e.g., roof form/condition, street width, vegetation, cars/open space) that consistently drive robust predictions, enabling interpretable mapping of rural risk environments.

AI.tldr: SatBLIP是一个卫星视觉语言框架，用于理解农村环境风险背景，通过生成结构化图像描述和融合多模态特征来预测县级社会脆弱性指数。
AI.motivation: 现有脆弱性指数过于粗糙，无法反映农村地区基于位置的环境风险特征（如住房质量、道路通达性、地表模式），需要更精细的农村环境背景理解方法。
AI.method: 提出SatBLIP框架：1) 使用GPT-4o生成卫星图像的结构化描述（屋顶类型/状况、房屋大小、庭院属性、绿化、道路背景）；2) 微调卫星适应的BLIP模型为未见图像生成描述；3) 用CLIP编码描述，通过注意力机制与LLM嵌入融合，进行空间聚合的SVI估计。
AI.result: 使用SHAP识别出驱动稳健预测的关键属性（屋顶形式/状况、街道宽度、植被、汽车/开放空间），实现了农村风险环境的可解释性映射。
AI.conclusion: SatBLIP通过结合对比性图像-文本对齐和针对卫星语义的自举式描述生成，克服了传统遥感方法的局限性，为农村环境风险评估提供了可解释的精细尺度分析框架。

title: Sequence Search: Automated Sequence Design using Neural Architecture Search
summary: Developing an MR sequence is challenging and remains largely constrained by human intuition. Recently, AI-driven approaches have been proposed; however, most require an initial sequence for parameter optimization or extensive training datasets, limiting their general applicability. In this study, we propose "Sequence Search," an automated sequence design framework based on neural architecture search. The method takes tissue properties, imaging parameters, and design objectives as inputs and generates pulse sequences satisfying the design objectives, without requiring prior knowledge of conventional sequence structures. Sequence Search iteratively generates candidate sequences through neural architecture search and optimizes them via a differentiable Bloch simulator and objective-specific loss functions using gradient-based learning. The framework successfully replicated conventional spin-echo, T2-weighted spin-echo, and inversion recovery sequences. Less intuitive solutions were also discovered, such as three-RF spin-echo-like sequences with reduced RF energy and refocusing phases deviating from the conventional Hahn-echo. This work establishes a generalizable framework for automated MR sequence design, highlighting the potential to explore configurations beyond conventional designs based on human intuition.

AI.tldr: 提出基于神经架构搜索的自动化MR序列设计框架"Sequence Search"，无需先验序列知识即可生成满足设计目标的脉冲序列
AI.motivation: 传统MR序列开发依赖人类直觉且具有挑战性，现有AI方法需要初始序列参数优化或大量训练数据，限制了通用性
AI.method: 基于神经架构搜索的自动化序列设计框架，输入组织特性、成像参数和设计目标，通过可微分Bloch模拟器和目标特定损失函数进行梯度学习优化
AI.result: 成功复现传统自旋回波、T2加权自旋回波和反转恢复序列，并发现非直觉解如三RF自旋回波样序列（减少RF能量）和偏离传统Hahn回波的重聚焦相位
AI.conclusion: 建立了可推广的自动化MR序列设计框架，展示了超越基于人类直觉的传统设计的探索潜力

title: Artificial Intelligence for Modeling and Simulation of Mixed Automated and Human Traffic
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Autonomous vehicles (AVs) are now operating on public roads, which makes their testing and validation more critical than ever. Simulation offers a safe and controlled environment for evaluating AV performance in varied conditions. However, existing simulation tools mainly focus on graphical realism and rely on simple rule-based models and therefore fail to accurately represent the complexity of driving behaviors and interactions. Artificial intelligence (AI) has shown strong potential to address these limitations; however, despite the rapid progress across AI methodologies, a comprehensive survey of their application to mixed autonomy traffic simulation remains lacking. Existing surveys either focus on simulation tools without examining the AI methods behind them, or cover ego-centric decision-making without addressing the broader challenge of modeling surrounding traffic. Moreover, they do not offer a unified taxonomy of AI methods covering individual behavior modeling to full scene simulation. To address these gaps, this survey provides a structured review and synthesis of AI methods for modeling AV and human driving behavior in mixed autonomy traffic simulation. We introduce a taxonomy that organizes methods into three families: agent-level behavior models, environment-level simulation methods, and cognitive and physics-informed methods. The survey analyzes how existing simulation platforms fall short of the needs of mixed autonomy research and outlines directions to narrow this gap. It also provides a chronological overview of AI methods and reviews evaluation protocols and metrics, simulation tools, and datasets. By covering both traffic engineering and computer science perspectives, we aim to bridge the gap between these two communities.

AI.tldr: 关于混合自主交通仿真中AI方法应用的综述，提出分类框架并分析现有仿真工具的不足
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在公共道路上运行，需要更有效的测试验证方法。现有仿真工具主要关注图形真实性和基于简单规则模型，无法准确反映驾驶行为和交互的复杂性。虽然AI有潜力解决这些限制，但缺乏对混合自主交通仿真中AI方法应用的全面综述。
AI.method: 提供结构化综述和综合，提出将AI方法分为三类的分类框架：智能体级行为模型、环境级仿真方法、认知和物理信息方法。分析现有仿真平台的不足，提供AI方法的时间线概述，回顾评估协议和指标、仿真工具及数据集。
AI.result: 建立了混合自主交通仿真中AI方法的系统分类框架，识别了现有仿真工具在满足混合自主研究需求方面的不足，为缩小这一差距提供了方向指导。
AI.conclusion: 通过涵盖交通工程和计算机科学两个视角，旨在弥合这两个社区之间的差距，为混合自主交通仿真中的AI方法应用提供全面指导。

title: The Cost of Language: Centroid Erasure Exposes and Exploits Modal Competition in Multimodal Language Models
summary: Multimodal language models systematically underperform on visual perception tasks, yet the structure underlying this failure remains poorly understood. We propose centroid replacement, collapsing each token to its nearest K-means centroid, as a controlled probe for modal dependence. Across seven models spanning three architecture families, erasing text centroid structure costs 4$\times$ more accuracy than erasing visual centroid structure, exposing a universal imbalance where language representations overshadow vision even on tasks that demand visual reasoning. We exploit this asymmetry through text centroid contrastive decoding, recovering up to +16.9% accuracy on individual tasks by contrastively decoding against a text-centroid-erased reference. This intervention varies meaningfully with training approaches: standard fine-tuned models show larger gains (+5.6% on average) than preference-optimized models (+1.5% on average). Our findings suggest that modal competition is structurally localized, correctable at inference time without retraining, and quantifiable as a diagnostic signal to guide future multimodal training.

AI.tldr: 通过质心替换方法揭示多模态语言模型中语言表征对视觉表征的压倒性优势，并提出基于文本质心的对比解码方法在推理时无需重新训练即可显著提升视觉感知任务性能
AI.motivation: 多模态语言模型在视觉感知任务上系统性地表现不佳，但其失败的根本结构原因尚不清楚。研究者希望探究模态依赖的结构性特征，理解语言和视觉表征之间的不平衡关系
AI.method: 提出质心替换方法，将每个token替换为其最近的K-means质心，作为模态依赖性的受控探针。通过对比解码方法，利用文本质心擦除的参考模型进行对比解码，恢复视觉推理能力
AI.result: 在七个模型（涵盖三种架构家族）中，擦除文本质心结构导致准确率下降是擦除视觉质心结构的4倍，揭示了语言表征在需要视觉推理的任务上仍压倒视觉表征的普遍不平衡。文本质心对比解码在单个任务上最高可恢复+16.9%的准确率
AI.conclusion: 模态竞争具有结构性定位特征，可在推理时无需重新训练进行校正，并可作为诊断信号指导未来多模态训练。标准微调模型比偏好优化模型从干预中获益更大

title: Evolving the Complete Muscle: Efficient Morphology-Control Co-design for Musculoskeletal Locomotion
summary: Musculoskeletal robots offer intrinsic compliance and flexibility, providing a promising paradigm for versatile locomotion. However, existing research typically relies on models with fixed muscle physiological parameters. This static physical setting fails to accommodate the diverse dynamic demands of complex tasks, inherently limiting the robot's performance upper bound. In this work, we focus on the morphology and control co-design of musculoskeletal systems. Unlike previous studies that optimize single physiological attributes such as stiffness, we introduce a Complete Musculoskeletal Morphological Evolution Space that simultaneously evolves muscle strength, velocity, and stiffness. To overcome the exponential expansion of the exploration space caused by this comprehensive evolution, we propose Spectral Design Evolution (SDE), a high-efficiency co-optimization framework. By integrating a bilateral symmetry prior with Principal Component Analysis (PCA), SDE projects complex muscle parameters onto a low-dimensional spectral manifold, enabling efficient morphological exploration. Evaluated on the MyoSuite framework across four tasks (Walk, Stair, Hilly, and Rough terrains), our method demonstrates superior learning efficiency and locomotion stability compared to fixed-morphology and standard evolutionary baselines.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种肌肉骨骼机器人形态与控制协同设计方法，通过同时优化肌肉强度、速度和刚度，并利用谱设计进化框架在低维空间高效探索，显著提升了机器人在复杂地形上的学习效率和运动稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有肌肉骨骼机器人研究通常采用固定肌肉生理参数模型，这种静态物理设置无法适应复杂任务的多样化动态需求，从根本上限制了机器人的性能上限。因此需要开发能够同时优化多个生理属性的形态与控制协同设计方法。
AI.method: 提出完整的肌肉骨骼形态进化空间，同时演化肌肉强度、速度和刚度三个关键生理属性。为解决全面演化带来的指数级探索空间扩张问题，提出谱设计进化（SDE）框架，通过结合双侧对称先验和主成分分析（PCA），将复杂肌肉参数投影到低维谱流形上，实现高效的形态探索。
AI.result: 在MyoSuite框架上对四种任务（行走、楼梯、丘陵、崎岖地形）进行评估，该方法相比固定形态和标准进化基线表现出更优的学习效率和运动稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 通过形态与控制协同设计，特别是同时优化多个肌肉生理参数并在低维空间高效探索，能够显著提升肌肉骨骼机器人在复杂环境中的适应性和性能表现，为更灵活的机器人设计提供了新思路。

title: Gating Enables Curvature: A Geometric Expressivity Gap in Attention
summary: Multiplicative gating is widely used in neural architectures and has recently been applied to attention layers to improve performance and training stability in large language models. Despite the success of gated attention, the mathematical implications of gated attention mechanisms remain poorly understood. We study attention through the geometry of its representations by modeling outputs as mean parameters of Gaussian distributions and analyzing the induced Fisher--Rao geometry. We show that ungated attention operator is restricted to intrinsically flat statistical manifolds due to its affine structure, while multiplicative gating enables non-flat geometries, including positively curved manifolds that are unattainable in the ungated setting. These results establish a geometric expressivity gap between ungated and gated attention. Empirically, we show that gated models exhibit higher representation curvature and improved performance on tasks requiring nonlinear decision boundaries whereas they provide no consistent advantage on tasks with linear decision boundaries. Furthermore, we identify a structured regime in which curvature accumulates under composition, yielding a systematic depth amplification effect.

AI.tldr: 论文通过Fisher-Rao几何分析发现，无门控注意力机制受限于平坦统计流形，而乘性门控注意力能够实现非平坦几何（包括正曲率流形），这解释了门控注意力在需要非线性决策边界任务上的优势。
AI.motivation: 尽管门控注意力在大型语言模型中已成功应用并改善了性能和训练稳定性，但其数学含义仍未被充分理解。研究者希望通过几何视角分析注意力表示，揭示门控机制的本质差异。
AI.method: 将注意力输出建模为高斯分布的均值参数，分析其诱导的Fisher-Rao几何。通过比较无门控和乘性门控注意力在统计流形上的几何特性，建立理论框架并进行实证验证。
AI.result: 1. 无门控注意力受限于内在平坦统计流形（仿射结构限制）；2. 乘性门控能实现非平坦几何，包括正曲率流形；3. 门控模型在需要非线性决策边界任务上表现更好，但在线性决策边界任务上无一致优势；4. 发现结构化机制下曲率在组合中积累，产生系统性深度放大效应。
AI.conclusion: 乘性门控通过引入非线性几何表达能力，弥补了无门控注意力的几何表达性差距，这为理解门控注意力的优势提供了数学基础，并解释了其在复杂任务中的性能提升。

title: Interpretable Human Activity Recognition for Subtle Robbery Detection in Surveillance Videos
summary: Non-violent street robberies (snatch-and-run) are difficult to detect automatically because they are brief, subtle, and often indistinguishable from benign human interactions in unconstrained surveillance footage. This paper presents a hybrid, pose-driven approach for detecting snatch-and-run events that combines real-time perception with an interpretable classification stage suitable for edge deployment. The system uses a YOLO-based pose estimator to extract body keypoints for each tracked person and computes kinematic and interaction features describing hand speed, arm extension, proximity, and relative motion between an aggressor-victim pair. A Random Forest classifier is trained on these descriptors, and a temporal hysteresis filter is applied to stabilize frame-level predictions and reduce spurious alarms. We evaluate the method on a staged dataset and on a disjoint test set collected from internet videos, demonstrating promising generalization across different scenes and camera viewpoints. Finally, we implement the complete pipeline on an NVIDIA Jetson Nano and report real-time performance, supporting the feasibility of proactive, on-device robbery detection.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于姿态的混合方法，用于检测非暴力街头抢劫（抢夺逃跑），结合实时感知与可解释分类，适合边缘部署。
AI.motivation: 非暴力街头抢劫（抢夺逃跑）在无约束监控视频中难以自动检测，因为事件短暂、细微，且与良性人际互动难以区分。
AI.method: 使用YOLO姿态估计器提取人体关键点，计算手部速度、手臂伸展、接近度、攻击者-受害者相对运动等运动学和交互特征，通过随机森林分类器训练，并应用时间滞后滤波器稳定帧级预测。
AI.result: 在模拟数据集和互联网视频独立测试集上评估，显示出跨不同场景和摄像机视角的良好泛化能力；在NVIDIA Jetson Nano上实现完整流水线，达到实时性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法支持主动、设备端的抢劫检测可行性，为边缘部署提供了有效的解决方案。

title: MirrorBench: Evaluating Self-centric Intelligence in MLLMs by Introducing a Mirror
summary: Recent progress in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) has demonstrated remarkable advances in perception and reasoning, suggesting their potential for embodied intelligence. While recent studies have evaluated embodied MLLMs in interactive settings, current benchmarks mainly target capabilities to perceive, understand, and interact with external objects, lacking a systematic evaluation of self-centric intelligence. To address this, we introduce MirrorBench, a simulation-based benchmark inspired by the classical Mirror Self-Recognition (MSR) test in psychology. MirrorBench extends this paradigm to embodied MLLMs through a tiered framework of progressively challenging tasks, assessing agents from basic visual perception to high-level self-representation. Experiments on leading MLLMs show that even at the lowest level, their performance remains substantially inferior to human performance, revealing fundamental limitations in self-referential understanding. Our study bridges psychological paradigms and embodied intelligence, offering a principled framework for evaluating the emergence of general intelligence in large models. Project page: https://fflahm.github.io/mirror-bench-page/.

AI.tldr: MirrorBench：基于心理学镜像自我识别测试的仿真基准，用于系统评估具身MLLMs的自我中心智能，揭示当前模型在自我参照理解上的根本局限性
AI.motivation: 当前具身MLLMs的基准主要关注对外部物体的感知、理解和交互能力，缺乏对自我中心智能的系统性评估。心理学中的镜像自我识别测试为评估自我意识提供了经典范式，但尚未被应用于评估大型模型
AI.method: 引入MirrorBench基准，基于心理学镜像自我识别测试，构建分层框架：从基础视觉感知到高级自我表征的渐进式挑战任务，在仿真环境中评估具身MLLMs的自我中心智能
AI.result: 实验表明，即使在最基础的任务层级，领先MLLMs的表现也显著低于人类水平，揭示了模型在自我参照理解方面的根本局限性
AI.conclusion: MirrorBench将心理学范式与具身智能相结合，为评估大型模型中通用智能的出现提供了原则性框架，揭示了当前MLLMs在自我中心智能方面的不足

title: PAINT: Partner-Agnostic Intent-Aware Cooperative Transport with Legged Robots
summary: Collaborative transport requires robots to infer partner intent through physical interaction while maintaining stable loco-manipulation. This becomes particularly challenging in complex environments, where interaction signals are difficult to capture and model. We present PAINT, a lightweight yet efficient hierarchical learning framework for partner-agonistic intent-aware collaborative legged transport that infers partner intent directly from proprioceptive feedback. PAINT decouples intent understanding from terrain-robust locomotion: A high-level policy infers the partner interaction wrench using an intent estimator and a teacher-student training scheme, while a low-level locomotion backbone ensures robust execution. This enables lightweight deployment without external force-torque sensing or payload tracking. Extensive simulation and real-world experiments demonstrate compliant cooperative transport across diverse terrains, payloads, and partners. Furthermore, we show that PAINT naturally scales to decentralized multi-robot transport and transfers across robot embodiments by swapping the underlying locomotion backbone. Our results suggest that proprioceptive signals in payload-coupled interaction provide a scalable interface for partner-agnostic intent-aware collaborative transport.

AI.tldr: PAINT是一个轻量级的分层学习框架，用于无特定伙伴意图感知的协作式腿式运输，仅通过本体感知反馈推断伙伴意图，无需外部力-扭矩传感或负载跟踪。
AI.motivation: 协作运输需要机器人在物理交互中推断伙伴意图，同时保持稳定的移动操作。在复杂环境中，交互信号难以捕捉和建模，这成为一个特别具有挑战性的问题。
AI.method: PAINT采用分层学习框架：高层策略通过意图估计器和师生训练方案推断伙伴交互力矩；底层运动骨干确保鲁棒执行。该方法将意图理解与地形鲁棒性运动解耦，支持轻量级部署。
AI.result: 广泛的仿真和真实世界实验表明，PAINT能在不同地形、负载和伙伴条件下实现顺从的协作运输。此外，PAINT能自然扩展到去中心化多机器人运输，并通过交换底层运动骨干在不同机器人平台上迁移。
AI.conclusion: 负载耦合交互中的本体感知信号为无特定伙伴意图感知的协作运输提供了一个可扩展的接口。PAINT框架展示了仅通过本体感知反馈实现意图推断的可行性，为协作机器人系统提供了轻量级解决方案。

title: Mean Flow Policy Optimization
summary: Diffusion models have recently emerged as expressive policy representations for online reinforcement learning (RL). However, their iterative generative processes introduce substantial training and inference overhead. To overcome this limitation, we propose to represent policies using MeanFlow models, a class of few-step flow-based generative models, to improve training and inference efficiency over diffusion-based RL approaches. To promote exploration, we optimize MeanFlow policies under the maximum entropy RL framework via soft policy iteration, and address two key challenges specific to MeanFlow policies: action likelihood evaluation and soft policy improvement. Experiments on MuJoCo and DeepMind Control Suite benchmarks demonstrate that our method, Mean Flow Policy Optimization (MFPO), achieves performance comparable to or exceeding current diffusion-based baselines while considerably reducing training and inference time. Our code is available at https://github.com/MFPolicy/MFPO.

AI.tldr: 提出MeanFlow模型作为策略表示，替代计算开销大的扩散模型，在保持性能的同时显著提升训练和推理效率
AI.motivation: 扩散模型作为策略表示在在线强化学习中计算开销大，需要迭代生成过程，导致训练和推理效率低下
AI.method: 使用MeanFlow模型（少步流式生成模型）表示策略，在最大熵强化学习框架下通过软策略迭代优化，解决动作似然评估和软策略改进两个关键挑战
AI.result: 在MuJoCo和DeepMind Control Suite基准测试中，MFPO方法性能达到或超过当前扩散基线，同时显著减少训练和推理时间
AI.conclusion: MeanFlow模型是扩散模型的有效替代方案，在强化学习中提供更好的计算效率，同时保持或提升性能

title: CoTEvol: Self-Evolving Chain-of-Thoughts for Data Synthesis in Mathematical Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit strong mathematical reasoning when trained on high-quality Chain-of-Thought (CoT) that articulates intermediate steps, yet costly CoT curation hinders further progress. While existing remedies such as distillation from stronger LLMs and self-synthesis based on test-time search alleviate this issue, they often suffer from diminishing returns or high computing overhead.In this work, we propose CoTEvol, a genetic evolutionary framework that casts CoT generation as a population-based search over reasoning trajectories.Candidate trajectories are iteratively evolved through reflective global crossover at the trajectory level and local mutation guided by uncertainty at the step level, enabling holistic recombination and fine-grained refinement. Lightweight, task-aware fitness functions are designed to guide the evolutionary process toward accurate and diverse reasoning. Empirically, CoTEvol improves correct-CoT synthesis success by over 30% and enhances structural diversity, with markedly improved efficiency. LLMs trained on these evolutionary CoT data achieve an average gain of 6.6% across eight math benchmarks, outperforming previous distillation and self-synthesis approaches. These results underscore the promise of evolutionary CoT synthesis as a scalable and effective method for mathematical reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: CoTEvol：一种基于遗传进化的思维链生成框架，通过种群搜索优化推理轨迹，显著提升数学推理能力
AI.motivation: 现有思维链生成方法（如从强LLM蒸馏或基于测试时搜索的自合成）存在收益递减或计算开销大的问题，高质量思维链标注成本高昂限制了LLM数学推理能力的进一步提升
AI.method: 提出CoTEvol框架，将思维链生成视为基于种群的推理轨迹搜索。通过轨迹层面的全局交叉和步骤层面的局部突变迭代演化候选轨迹，设计轻量级任务感知适应度函数引导进化过程
AI.result: CoTEvol将正确思维链合成成功率提升30%以上，增强结构多样性且效率显著提高。基于进化思维链数据训练的LLM在8个数学基准上平均提升6.6%，优于现有蒸馏和自合成方法
AI.conclusion: 进化思维链合成是一种可扩展且有效的数学推理方法，为LLM数学能力提升提供了新途径

title: GGD-SLAM: Monocular 3DGS SLAM Powered by Generalizable Motion Model for Dynamic Environments
summary: Visual SLAM algorithms achieve significant improvements through the exploration of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) representations, particularly in generating high-fidelity dense maps. However, they depend on a static environment assumption and experience significant performance degradation in dynamic environments. This paper presents GGD-SLAM, a framework that employs a generalizable motion model to address the challenges of localization and dense mapping in dynamic environments - without predefined semantic annotations or depth input. Specifically, the proposed system employs a First-In-First-Out (FIFO) queue to manage incoming frames, facilitating dynamic semantic feature extraction through a sequential attention mechanism. This is integrated with a dynamic feature enhancer to separate static and dynamic components. Additionally, to minimize dynamic distractors' impact on the static components, we devise a method to fill occluded areas via static information sampling and design a distractor-adaptive Structure Similarity Index Measure (SSIM) loss tailored for dynamic environments, significantly enhancing the system's resilience. Experiments conducted on real-world dynamic datasets demonstrate that the proposed system achieves state-of-the-art performance in camera pose estimation and dense reconstruction in dynamic scenes.

AI.tldr: GGD-SLAM：一种基于通用运动模型的动态环境视觉SLAM框架，无需预定义语义标注或深度输入，通过FIFO队列、序列注意力机制和动态特征增强器实现动态场景下的精确定位和稠密重建。
AI.motivation: 传统基于3D高斯溅射表示的视觉SLAM算法在静态环境中表现优异，但在动态环境中性能显著下降，因为它们依赖于静态环境假设。现有方法通常需要预定义的语义标注或深度输入，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 1. 使用FIFO队列管理输入帧，通过序列注意力机制提取动态语义特征；2. 集成动态特征增强器分离静态和动态分量；3. 通过静态信息采样填充遮挡区域；4. 设计针对动态环境的干扰自适应SSIM损失函数。
AI.result: 在真实世界动态数据集上的实验表明，GGD-SLAM在动态场景的相机姿态估计和稠密重建方面达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: GGD-SLAM通过通用运动模型有效解决了动态环境中的SLAM挑战，无需额外语义或深度信息，显著提升了系统在动态场景中的鲁棒性和重建质量。

title: Geometrically Consistent Multi-View Scene Generation from Freehand Sketches
summary:
We tackle a new problem: generating geometrically consistent multi-view scenes from a single freehand sketch. Freehand sketches are the most geometrically impoverished input one could offer a multi-view generator. They convey scene intent through abstract strokes while introducing spatial distortions that actively conflict with any consistent 3D interpretation. No prior method attempts this; existing multi-view approaches require photographs or text, while sketch-to-3D methods need multiple views or costly per-scene optimisation.
  We address three compounding challenges; absent training data, the need for geometric reasoning from distorted 2D input, and cross-view consistency, through three mutually reinforcing contributions: (i) a curated dataset of $\sim$9k sketch-to-multiview samples, constructed via an automated generation and filtering pipeline; (ii) Parallel Camera-Aware Attention Adapters (CA3) that inject geometric inductive biases into the video transformer; and (iii) a Sparse Correspondence Supervision Loss (CSL) derived from Structure-from-Motion reconstructions.
  Our framework synthesizes all views in a single denoising process without requiring reference images, iterative refinement, or per-scene optimization. Our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art two-stage baselines, improving realism (FID) by over 60% and geometric consistency (Corr-Acc) by 23%, while providing up to a 3.7$\times$ inference speedup.

AI.tldr: 从单张手绘草图生成几何一致的多视角场景，解决了现有方法需要照片、文本或多视角输入的限制
AI.motivation: 手绘草图是几何信息最贫乏的多视角生成输入，通过抽象笔画传达场景意图但包含空间扭曲，与一致3D解释相冲突。现有方法需要照片、文本或多视角输入，缺乏从单张草图生成多视角场景的方法。
AI.method: 提出三个相互增强的贡献：(1) 构建约9k个草图到多视角样本的数据集；(2) 并行相机感知注意力适配器(CA3)，将几何归纳偏置注入视频变换器；(3) 从运动结构重建导出的稀疏对应监督损失(CSL)。
AI.result: 在单次去噪过程中合成所有视角，无需参考图像、迭代细化或每场景优化。相比最先进的两阶段基线，真实感(FID)提升60%以上，几何一致性(Corr-Acc)提升23%，推理速度提升3.7倍。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现从单张手绘草图生成几何一致的多视角场景，通过数据集构建、几何感知架构和监督损失解决了训练数据缺失、几何推理和跨视角一致性三大挑战。

title: Temporal Cross-Modal Knowledge-Distillation-Based Transfer-Learning for Gas Turbine Vibration Fault Detection
summary: Preventing machine failure is inherently superior to reactive remediation, particularly for critical assets like gas turbines, where early fault detection (FD) is a cornerstone of industrial sustainability. However, modern deep learning-based FD models often face a significant trade-off between architectural complexity and real-time operational constraints, often hindered by a lack of temporal context within restricted vibration signal windows. To address these challenges, this study proposes a Temporal Cross-Modal Knowledge-Distillation Transfer-Learning (TCMKDTL) framework. The framework employs a "privileged" teacher model trained on expansive temporal windows incorporating both past and future signal context to distill latent feature-based knowledge into a compact student model. To mitigate issues of data scarcity and domain shift, the framework leverages robust pre-training on benchmark datasets (such as CWRU) followed by adaptation to target industrial data. Extensive evaluation using experimental and industrial gas turbine (MGT-40) datasets demonstrates that TCMKDTL achieves superior feature separability and diagnostic accuracy compared to conventional pre-trained architectures. Ultimately, this approach enables high-performance, unsupervised anomaly detection suitable for deployment on resource-constrained industrial hardware.

AI.tldr: 提出TCMKDTL框架，通过时间跨模态知识蒸馏解决燃气轮机早期故障检测中模型复杂度与实时性之间的矛盾
AI.motivation: 燃气轮机等关键资产的早期故障检测对工业可持续性至关重要，但现有深度学习模型面临架构复杂性与实时操作约束的权衡，且受限于振动信号窗口缺乏时间上下文
AI.method: 提出时间跨模态知识蒸馏迁移学习框架，使用包含过去和未来信号上下文的扩展时间窗口训练"特权"教师模型，将潜在特征知识蒸馏到紧凑的学生模型中；通过基准数据集预训练后适应目标工业数据来解决数据稀缺和域偏移问题
AI.result: 在实验和工业燃气轮机数据集上的评估表明，TCMKDTL相比传统预训练架构实现了更优的特征可分性和诊断准确性
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了高性能、无监督的异常检测，适合部署在资源受限的工业硬件上

title: VULCAN: Vision-Language-Model Enhanced Multi-Agent Cooperative Navigation for Indoor Fire-Disaster Response
summary: Indoor fire disasters pose severe challenges to autonomous search and rescue due to dense smoke, high temperatures, and dynamically evolving indoor environments. In such time-critical scenarios, multi-agent cooperative navigation is particularly useful, as it enables faster and broader exploration than single-agent approaches. However, existing multi-agent navigation systems are primarily vision-based and designed for benign indoor settings, leading to significant performance degradation under fire-driven dynamic conditions. In this paper, we present VULCAN, a multi-agent cooperative navigation framework based on multi-modal perception and vision-language models (VLMs), tailored for indoor fire disaster response. We extend the Habitat-Matterport3D benchmark by simulating physically realistic fire scenarios, including smoke diffusion, thermal hazards, and sensor degradation. We evaluate representative multi-agent cooperative navigation baselines under both normal and fire-driven environments. Our results reveal critical failure modes of existing methods in fire scenarios and underscore the necessity of robust perception and hazard-aware planning for reliable multi-agent search and rescue.

AI.tldr: VULCAN：基于多模态感知和视觉语言模型的多智能体协同导航框架，专为室内火灾救援设计，在模拟真实火灾场景中评估现有方法并揭示其关键失效模式
AI.motivation: 室内火灾灾害对自主搜救构成严峻挑战，现有基于视觉的多智能体导航系统主要针对良性室内环境设计，在火灾驱动的动态条件下性能显著下降
AI.method: 提出VULCAN框架，基于多模态感知和视觉语言模型；扩展Habitat-Matterport3D基准，模拟物理真实的火灾场景（烟雾扩散、热危害、传感器退化）；评估代表性多智能体协同导航基线方法
AI.result: 揭示了现有方法在火灾场景中的关键失效模式，强调了鲁棒感知和危害感知规划对于可靠多智能体搜救的必要性
AI.conclusion: 室内火灾救援需要专门的多智能体协同导航框架，VULCAN通过多模态感知和VLM技术为这一挑战提供了解决方案，现有视觉方法在火灾动态条件下存在严重局限性

title: One Token per Highly Selective Frame: Towards Extreme Compression for Long Video Understanding
comment: Appear in the proceedings of NeurIPS 2025
summary: Long video understanding is inherently challenging for vision-language models (VLMs) because of the extensive number of frames. With each video frame typically expanding into tens or hundreds of tokens, the limited context length of large language models (LLMs) forces the VLMs to perceive the frames sparsely and lose temporal information. To address this, we explore extreme video token compression towards one token per frame at the final LLM layer. Our key insight is that heuristic-based compression, widely adopted by previous methods, is prone to information loss, and this necessitates supervising LLM layers into learnable and progressive modules for token-level compression (LP-Comp). Such compression enables our VLM to digest 2x-4x more frames with improved performance. To further increase the token efficiency, we investigate frame-level compression, which selects the frames most relevant to the queries via the internal attention scores of the LLM layers, named question-conditioned compression (QC-Comp). As a notable distinction from previous studies, we mitigate the position bias of LLM attention in long contexts, i.e., the over-concentration on the beginning and end of a sequence, by splitting long videos into short segments and employing local attention. Collectively, our combined token-level and frame-level leads to an extreme compression model for long video understanding, named XComp, achieving a significantly larger compression ratio and enabling denser frame sampling. Our XComp is finetuned from VideoChat-Flash with a data-efficient supervised compression tuning stage that only requires 2.5% of the supervised fine-tuning data, yet boosts the accuracy from 42.9% to 46.2% on LVBench and enhances multiple other long video benchmarks.

AI.tldr: XComp提出了一种用于长视频理解的极端压缩方法，通过可学习的渐进式token级压缩和基于查询的帧级压缩，显著提高视频帧处理能力，仅需少量数据微调即可提升多个长视频基准性能。
AI.motivation: 长视频理解对视觉语言模型具有挑战性，因为帧数多且每帧产生大量token，受限于LLM的上下文长度，现有方法只能稀疏采样帧，导致时间信息丢失。需要探索更高效的视频token压缩方法。
AI.method: 提出XComp模型，包含两个核心组件：1) LP-Comp：可学习的渐进式token级压缩，在LLM层中逐步压缩每帧到单个token；2) QC-Comp：基于查询的帧级压缩，利用LLM内部注意力分数选择与查询最相关的帧。同时通过分割长视频为短片段并使用局部注意力来缓解LLM的位置偏差问题。
AI.result: XComp能够处理2-4倍更多的视频帧，在LVBench上准确率从42.9%提升到46.2%，仅需2.5%的监督微调数据。在多个长视频基准测试中表现均有提升，实现了显著更高的压缩比和更密集的帧采样。
AI.conclusion: XComp通过结合token级和帧级的极端压缩，有效解决了长视频理解中的token效率问题，为视觉语言模型处理长视频提供了一种高效且数据效率高的解决方案。

title: Which bird does not have wings: Negative-constrained KGQA with Schema-guided Semantic Matching and Self-directed Refinement
summary: Large language models still struggle with faithfulness and hallucinations despite their remarkable reasoning abilities. In Knowledge Graph Question Answering (KGQA), semantic parsing-based approaches address the limitations by understanding constraints in a user's question and converting them into a logical form to execute on a knowledge graph. However, existing KGQA benchmarks and methods are biased toward positive and calculation constraints. Negative constraints are neglected, although they frequently appear in real-world questions. In this paper, we introduce a new task, NEgative-conSTrained (NEST) KGQA, where each question contains at least one negative constraint, and a corresponding dataset, NestKGQA. We also design PyLF, a Python-formatted logical form, since existing logical forms are hardly suitable to express negation clearly while maintaining readability. Furthermore, NEST questions naturally contain multiple constraints. To mitigate their semantic complexity, we present a novel framework named CUCKOO, specialized to multiple-constrained questions and ensuring semantic executability. CUCKOO first generates a constraint-aware logical form draft and performs schema-guided semantic matching. It then selectively applies self-directed refinement only when executing improper logical forms yields an empty result, reducing cost while improving robustness. Experimental results demonstrate that CUCKOO consistently outperforms baselines on both conventional KGQA and NEST-KGQA benchmarks under few-shot settings.

AI.tldr: 论文提出NEST-KGQA新任务，专注于知识图谱问答中的否定约束问题，并开发了NestKGQA数据集、PyLF逻辑形式表示和CUCKOO框架来有效处理多约束问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型具有强大的推理能力，但在知识图谱问答中仍存在忠实性和幻觉问题。现有KGQA基准和方法偏向于正向和计算约束，忽视了实际中频繁出现的否定约束。需要专门处理包含否定约束和多约束的复杂问题。
AI.method: 1) 提出NEST-KGQA新任务，要求每个问题至少包含一个否定约束；2) 创建NestKGQA数据集；3) 设计Python格式的逻辑形式PyLF，以清晰表达否定并保持可读性；4) 提出CUCKOO框架，通过生成约束感知的逻辑形式草稿、模式引导的语义匹配，以及选择性应用自导向精炼来处理多约束问题。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，CUCKOO在少样本设置下，在传统KGQA基准和NEST-KGQA基准上都持续优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了KGQA中否定约束处理的空白，提出的NEST-KGQA任务、NestKGQA数据集、PyLF表示和CUCKOO框架为处理复杂多约束问题提供了有效解决方案，显著提升了模型在包含否定约束的问答任务上的性能。

title: Multi-modal panoramic 3D outdoor datasets for place categorization
comment: This is the authors' manuscript. The final published article was presented at IROS 2026, and it is available at https://doi.org/10.1109/IROS.2016.7759669
summary: We present two multi-modal panoramic 3D outdoor (MPO) datasets for semantic place categorization with six categories: forest, coast, residential area, urban area and indoor/outdoor parking lot. The first dataset consists of 650 static panoramic scans of dense (9,000,000 points) 3D color and reflectance point clouds obtained using a FARO laser scanner with synchronized color images. The second dataset consists of 34,200 real-time panoramic scans of sparse (70,000 points) 3D reflectance point clouds obtained using a Velodyne laser scanner while driving a car. The datasets were obtained in the city of Fukuoka, Japan and are publicly available in [1], [2]. In addition, we compare several approaches for semantic place categorization with best results of 96.42% (dense) and 89.67% (sparse).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两个多模态全景3D室外数据集（MPO）用于语义场所分类，包含森林、海岸、居住区、城市区域和室内/外停车场六类。第一个数据集包含650个静态全景扫描，第二个包含34,200个实时全景扫描，均在福冈市采集并公开可用。
AI.motivation: 为语义场所分类任务提供高质量的多模态全景3D室外数据集，解决现有数据集中缺乏全景3D点云与图像同步数据的问题，支持密集和稀疏两种点云类型的算法研究。
AI.method: 使用FARO激光扫描仪获取650个密集静态全景扫描（900万点），同步采集彩色图像；使用Velodyne激光扫描仪在车辆行驶中获取34,200个稀疏实时全景扫描（7万点）。数据集包含六类语义标签。
AI.result: 构建了两个公开可用的MPO数据集：密集数据集（650个扫描）和稀疏数据集（34,200个扫描）。语义分类实验显示最佳准确率：密集数据96.42%，稀疏数据89.67%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多模态全景3D室外数据集为语义场所分类研究提供了有价值的资源，实验结果表明在密集和稀疏点云上都能实现高精度分类，验证了数据集的有效性。

title: Seedance 2.0: Advancing Video Generation for World Complexity
summary: Seedance 2.0 is a new native multi-modal audio-video generation model, officially released in China in early February 2026. Compared with its predecessors, Seedance 1.0 and 1.5 Pro, Seedance 2.0 adopts a unified, highly efficient, and large-scale architecture for multi-modal audio-video joint generation. This allows it to support four input modalities: text, image, audio, and video, by integrating one of the most comprehensive suites of multi-modal content reference and editing capabilities available in the industry to date. It delivers substantial, well-rounded improvements across all key sub-dimensions of video and audio generation. In both expert evaluations and public user tests, the model has demonstrated performance on par with the leading levels in the field. Seedance 2.0 supports direct generation of audio-video content with durations ranging from 4 to 15 seconds, with native output resolutions of 480p and 720p. For multi-modal inputs as reference, its current open platform supports up to 3 video clips, 9 images, and 3 audio clips. In addition, we provide Seedance 2.0 Fast version, an accelerated variant of Seedance 2.0 designed to boost generation speed for low-latency scenarios. Seedance 2.0 has delivered significant improvements to its foundational generation capabilities and multi-modal generation performance, bringing an enhanced creative experience for end users.

AI.tldr: Seedance 2.0是中国2026年2月发布的多模态音视频生成模型，采用统一高效架构，支持文本、图像、音频、视频四种输入，能生成4-15秒音视频内容，提供480p/720p原生分辨率输出。
AI.motivation: 开发一个统一、高效、大规模的多模态音视频联合生成架构，以支持更全面的多模态内容参考和编辑能力，提升音视频生成在关键子维度上的性能，为用户提供增强的创作体验。
AI.method: 采用统一的多模态音视频联合生成架构，支持四种输入模态（文本、图像、音频、视频），集成行业最全面的多模态内容参考和编辑套件。提供标准版和快速版（Seedance 2.0 Fast）两种变体，后者针对低延迟场景优化生成速度。
AI.result: 在专家评估和公开用户测试中，模型性能达到领域领先水平。支持生成4-15秒音视频内容，原生输出分辨率480p和720p。多模态输入支持最多3个视频片段、9张图像和3个音频片段。基础生成能力和多模态生成性能均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: Seedance 2.0通过统一的多模态架构实现了全面的音视频生成能力提升，在性能上达到行业领先水平，为用户提供了增强的创作体验，并通过快速版本满足了不同场景的需求。

title: Disentangle-then-Refine: LLM-Guided Decoupling and Structure-Aware Refinement for Graph Contrastive Learning
summary: Conventional Graph Contrastive Learning (GCL) on Text-Attributed Graphs (TAGs) relies on blind stochastic augmentations, inadvertently entangling task-relevant signals with noise. We propose SDM-SCR, a robust framework anchored in Approximate Orthogonal Decomposition. First, the Semantic Decoupling Module (SDM) leverages the instruction-following capability of Large Language Models (LLMs) to actively parse raw attributes into asymmetric, task-oriented signal and noise views. This shifts the paradigm from random perturbation to semantic-aware disentanglement. Subsequently, Semantic Consistency Regularization (SCR) exploits the spectral observation that semantic signals are topologically smooth while residual noise is high-frequency. SCR functions as a selective spectral filter, enforcing consistency only on the signal subspace to eliminate LLM hallucinations without over-smoothing. This ``Disentangle-then-Refine'' mechanism ensures rigorous signal purification. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SDM-SCR achieves SOTA performance in accuracy and efficiency.

AI.tldr: SDM-SCR是一种基于近似正交分解的图对比学习框架，通过LLM语义解耦和谱一致性正则化，在文本属性图上实现任务相关信号与噪声的有效分离。
AI.motivation: 传统文本属性图上的图对比学习依赖于盲目的随机增强，无意中将任务相关信号与噪声纠缠在一起，导致学习效果受限。需要一种能够主动分离信号与噪声的方法。
AI.method: 提出SDM-SCR框架：1) 语义解耦模块(SDM)利用大语言模型的指令跟随能力，将原始属性解析为不对称的任务导向信号视图和噪声视图；2) 语义一致性正则化(SCR)基于谱观察，强制信号子空间的一致性，同时过滤高频噪声，避免过度平滑。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，SDM-SCR在准确性和效率方面达到了最先进的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: SDM-SCR通过"解耦-精炼"机制实现了严格的信号纯化，为文本属性图上的图对比学习提供了更稳健的解决方案。

title: Actuation space reduction to facilitate insightful shape matching in a novel reconfigurable tendon driven continuum manipulator
summary: In tendon driven continuum manipulators (TDCMs), reconfiguring the tendon routing enables tailored spatial deformation of the backbone. This work presents a design in which tendons can be rerouted either prior to or after actuation by actively rotating the individual spacer disks. Each disk rotation thus adds a degree of freedom to the actuation space, complicating the mapping from a desired backbone curve to the corresponding actuator inputs. However, when the backbone shape is projected into an intermediate space defined by curvature and torsion (C-T), patterns emerge that highlight which disks are most influential in achieving a global shape. This insight enables a simplified, sequential shape-matching strategy: first, the proximal and intermediate disks are rotated to approximate the global shape; then, the distal disks are adjusted to fine-tune the end-effector position with minimal impact on the overall shape. The proposed actuation framework offers a model-free alternative to conventional control approaches, bypassing the complexities of modeling reconfigurable TDCMs.

AI.tldr: 提出一种肌腱驱动连续体机械臂的主动可重构设计，通过旋转间隔盘改变肌腱路径，实现定制化空间变形。开发基于曲率-扭率空间的简化顺序形状匹配控制策略。
AI.motivation: 传统肌腱驱动连续体机械臂（TDCMs）的肌腱路径固定，限制了变形能力。通过主动重构肌腱路径可以增强空间变形定制性，但增加了从期望形状到执行器输入的映射复杂性，需要简化控制方法。
AI.method: 设计可旋转的间隔盘，允许肌腱在驱动前或驱动后重新布线。将骨干形状投影到曲率-扭率（C-T）空间，识别对全局形状影响最大的关键盘。提出顺序形状匹配策略：先旋转近端和中间盘近似全局形状，再调整远端盘微调末端执行器位置。
AI.result: 在曲率-扭率空间中观察到模式，揭示了哪些盘对实现全局形状最具影响力。顺序形状匹配策略能够有效控制可重构TDCMs，无需复杂建模，提供模型无关的替代控制方案。
AI.conclusion: 主动可重构肌腱路径设计增强了TDCMs的变形能力。基于曲率-扭率空间的洞察简化了控制，顺序形状匹配策略为可重构TDCMs提供了实用的模型无关控制框架，避免了复杂建模需求。

title: Personalized and Context-Aware Transformer Models for Predicting Post-Intervention Physiological Responses from Wearable Sensor Data
summary: Consumer wearables enable continuous measurement of physiological data related to stress and recovery, but turning these streams into actionable, personalized stress-management recommendations remains a challenge. In practice, users often do not know how a given intervention, defined as an activity intended to reduce stress, will affect heart rate (HR), heart rate variability (HRV), or inter-beat intervals (BBI) over the next 15 to 120 minutes. We present a framework that predicts post-intervention trajectories and the direction of change for these physiological indicators across time windows. Our methodology combines a Transformer model for multi-horizon trajectories of percent change relative to a pre-intervention baseline, direction-of-change calls (positive, negative, or neutral) at each horizon, and an empirical study using wearable sensor data overlaid with user-tagged events and interventions. This proof of concept shows that personalized post-intervention prediction is feasible. We encourage future integration into stress-management tools for personalized intervention recommendations tailored to each person's day following further validation in larger studies and, where applicable, appropriate regulatory review.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于Transformer的框架，用于预测个性化干预后生理指标（心率、心率变异性等）的变化轨迹和方向，为可穿戴设备提供可操作的应激管理建议。
AI.motivation: 虽然消费者可穿戴设备能够连续测量与应激和恢复相关的生理数据，但将这些数据流转化为可操作的、个性化的应激管理建议仍然具有挑战性。用户通常不知道特定干预措施（旨在减轻应激的活动）会如何影响未来15-120分钟内的生理指标变化。
AI.method: 结合Transformer模型预测多时间窗口内相对于干预前基线的百分比变化轨迹，在每个时间窗口进行变化方向分类（正向、负向或中性），并使用可穿戴传感器数据叠加用户标记的事件和干预措施进行实证研究。
AI.result: 概念验证表明，个性化的干预后预测是可行的。该框架能够预测生理指标的变化轨迹和方向，为个性化应激管理建议提供了技术基础。
AI.conclusion: 鼓励将该框架整合到应激管理工具中，为每个人提供个性化的干预建议，但需要在更大规模的研究中进一步验证，并在适用时经过适当的监管审查。

title: Reliability-Guided Depth Fusion for Glare-Resilient Navigation Costmaps
summary: Specular glare on reflective floors and glass surfaces frequently corrupts RGB-D depth measurements, producing holes and spikes that accumulate as persistent phantom obstacles in occupancy-grid costmaps. This paper proposes a glare-resilient costmap construction method based on explicit depth-reliability modeling. A lightweight Depth Reliability Map (DRM) estimator predicts per-pixel measurement trustworthiness under specular interference, and a Reliability-Guided Fusion (RGF) mechanism uses this signal to modulate occupancy updates before corrupted measurements are accumulated into the map. Experiments on a real mobile robotic platform equipped with an Intel RealSense D435 and a Jetson Orin Nano show that the proposed method substantially reduces false obstacle insertion and improves free-space preservation under real reflective-floor and glass-surface conditions, while introducing only modest computational overhead. These results indicate that treating glare as a measurement-reliability problem provides a practical and lightweight solution for improving costmap correctness and navigation robustness in safety-critical indoor environments.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于深度可靠性建模的抗眩光代价地图构建方法，通过预测像素级测量可信度来减少反射表面导致的虚假障碍物
AI.motivation: 反射地板和玻璃表面的镜面眩光会损坏RGB-D深度测量，产生空洞和尖峰，这些错误测量在占据栅格代价地图中积累为持久性虚假障碍物，影响机器人导航安全
AI.method: 提出基于显式深度可靠性建模的眩光弹性代价地图构建方法：1) 轻量级深度可靠性图(DRM)估计器预测像素级测量可信度；2) 可靠性引导融合(RGF)机制利用该信号在测量积累到地图前调制占据更新
AI.result: 在配备Intel RealSense D435和Jetson Orin Nano的真实移动机器人平台上实验表明，该方法在真实反射地板和玻璃表面条件下显著减少虚假障碍物插入，改善自由空间保持，同时仅引入适度计算开销
AI.conclusion: 将眩光视为测量可靠性问题，为改善安全关键室内环境中代价地图正确性和导航鲁棒性提供了实用且轻量的解决方案

title: CURaTE: Continual Unlearning in Real Time with Ensured Preservation of LLM Knowledge
summary: The inability to filter out in advance all potentially problematic data from the pre-training of large language models has given rise to the need for methods for unlearning specific pieces of knowledge after training. Existing techniques overlook the need for continuous and immediate action, causing them to suffer from degraded utility as updates accumulate and protracted exposure of sensitive information. To address these issues, we propose Continual Unlearning in Real Time with Ensured Preservation of LLM Knowledge (CURaTE). Our method begins by training a sentence embedding model on a dataset designed to enable the formation of sharp decision boundaries for determining whether a given input prompt corresponds to any stored forget requests. The similarity of a given input to the forget requests is then used to determine whether to answer or return a refusal response. We show that even with such a simple approach, not only does CURaTE achieve more effective forgetting than existing methods, but by avoiding modification of the language model parameters, it also maintains near perfect knowledge preservation over any number of updates and is the only method capable of continual unlearning in real-time.

AI.tldr: CURaTE是一种实时持续遗忘方法，通过训练句子嵌入模型来识别需要遗忘的请求，避免修改LLM参数，实现高效遗忘和知识保留。
AI.motivation: 现有遗忘方法无法持续实时处理敏感信息，导致效用下降和敏感信息长期暴露。需要在训练后遗忘特定知识，同时保持模型实用性。
AI.method: 训练句子嵌入模型形成清晰决策边界，通过输入提示与遗忘请求的相似度决定是否回答或拒绝响应，避免修改语言模型参数。
AI.result: CURaTE比现有方法实现更有效的遗忘，通过避免参数修改保持近乎完美的知识保留，是唯一能实时持续遗忘的方法。
AI.conclusion: CURaTE提供了一种简单有效的实时持续遗忘解决方案，在保持模型知识完整性的同时实现敏感信息的即时遗忘。

title: HY-World 2.0: A Multi-Modal World Model for Reconstructing, Generating, and Simulating 3D Worlds
summary: We introduce HY-World 2.0, a multi-modal world model framework that advances our prior project HY-World 1.0. HY-World 2.0 accommodates diverse input modalities, including text prompts, single-view images, multi-view images, and videos, and produces 3D world representations. With text or single-view image inputs, the model performs world generation, synthesizing high-fidelity, navigable 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) scenes. This is achieved through a four-stage method: a) Panorama Generation with HY-Pano 2.0, b) Trajectory Planning with WorldNav, c) World Expansion with WorldStereo 2.0, and d) World Composition with WorldMirror 2.0. Specifically, we introduce key innovations to enhance panorama fidelity, enable 3D scene understanding and planning, and upgrade WorldStereo, our keyframe-based view generation model with consistent memory. We also upgrade WorldMirror, a feed-forward model for universal 3D prediction, by refining model architecture and learning strategy, enabling world reconstruction from multi-view images or videos. Also, we introduce WorldLens, a high-performance 3DGS rendering platform featuring a flexible engine-agnostic architecture, automatic IBL lighting, efficient collision detection, and training-rendering co-design, enabling interactive exploration of 3D worlds with character support. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HY-World 2.0 achieves state-of-the-art performance on several benchmarks among open-source approaches, delivering results comparable to the closed-source model Marble. We release all model weights, code, and technical details to facilitate reproducibility and support further research on 3D world models.

AI.tldr: HY-World 2.0是一个多模态世界模型框架，能够处理文本、单视图图像、多视图图像和视频输入，生成可导航的3D高斯泼溅场景，在多个基准测试中达到开源方法的最先进水平。
AI.motivation: 在HY-World 1.0基础上进一步推进3D世界建模技术，开发一个能够处理多种输入模态并生成高质量3D世界表示的统一框架，同时提供完整的开源实现以促进相关研究。
AI.method: 采用四阶段方法：1) HY-Pano 2.0全景图生成；2) WorldNav轨迹规划；3) WorldStereo 2.0世界扩展（带一致性记忆的关键帧视图生成）；4) WorldMirror 2.0世界组合（改进架构和学习策略的通用3D预测）。同时开发了WorldLens高性能3DGS渲染平台。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中达到开源方法的最先进水平，性能可与闭源模型Marble相媲美。模型能够生成高保真、可导航的3D高斯泼溅场景，支持从多种输入模态重建3D世界。
AI.conclusion: HY-World 2.0成功构建了一个强大的多模态3D世界模型框架，通过技术创新在多个方面提升了性能，并开源所有模型权重、代码和技术细节以支持可重复性和进一步研究。

title: FeaXDrive: Feasibility-aware Trajectory-Centric Diffusion Planning for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-end diffusion planning has shown strong potential for autonomous driving, but the physical feasibility of generated trajectories remains insufficiently addressed. In particular, generated trajectories may exhibit local geometric irregularities, violate trajectory-level kinematic constraints, or deviate from the drivable area, indicating that the commonly used noise-centric formulation in diffusion planning is not yet well aligned with the trajectory space where feasibility is more naturally characterized. To address this issue, we propose FeaXDrive, a feasibility-aware trajectory-centric diffusion planning method for end-to-end autonomous driving. The core idea is to treat the clean trajectory as the unified object for feasibility-aware modeling throughout the diffusion process. Built on this trajectory-centric formulation, FeaXDrive integrates adaptive curvature-constrained training to improve intrinsic geometric and kinematic feasibility, drivable-area guidance within reverse diffusion sampling to enhance consistency with the drivable area, and feasibility-aware GRPO post-training to further improve planning performance while balancing trajectory-space feasibility. Experiments on the NAVSIM benchmark show that FeaXDrive achieves strong closed-loop planning performance while substantially improving trajectory-space feasibility. These findings highlight the importance of explicitly modeling trajectory-space feasibility in end-to-end diffusion planning and provide a step toward more reliable and physically grounded autonomous driving planners.

AI.tldr: FeaXDrive：一种面向端到端自动驾驶的可行性感知轨迹中心扩散规划方法，通过轨迹中心化建模、自适应曲率约束训练、可行驶区域引导和可行性感知GRPO后训练，显著提升生成轨迹的物理可行性。
AI.motivation: 当前端到端扩散规划方法生成的轨迹存在物理可行性不足的问题，包括局部几何不规则、违反轨迹级运动学约束、偏离可行驶区域等。这表明常用的噪声中心化公式与轨迹空间（可行性更自然表征的空间）尚未良好对齐。
AI.method: 提出FeaXDrive方法，核心是将干净轨迹作为扩散过程中可行性感知建模的统一对象。基于此轨迹中心化公式，整合：1）自适应曲率约束训练以提升内在几何和运动学可行性；2）反向扩散采样中的可行驶区域引导以增强与可行驶区域的一致性；3）可行性感知GRPO后训练以在平衡轨迹空间可行性的同时进一步提升规划性能。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM基准测试中，FeaXDrive实现了强大的闭环规划性能，同时显著提升了轨迹空间可行性。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调了在端到端扩散规划中显式建模轨迹空间可行性的重要性，为更可靠、物理基础更强的自动驾驶规划器迈出了一步。

title: SpatialEvo: Self-Evolving Spatial Intelligence via Deterministic Geometric Environments
summary: Spatial reasoning over three-dimensional scenes is a core capability for embodied intelligence, yet continuous model improvement remains bottlenecked by the cost of geometric annotation. The self-evolving paradigm offers a promising path, but its reliance on model consensus to construct pseudo-labels causes training to reinforce rather than correct the model's own geometric errors. We identify a property unique to 3D spatial reasoning that circumvents this limitation: ground truth is a deterministic consequence of the underlying geometry, computable exactly from point clouds and camera poses without any model involvement. Building on this insight, we present SpatialEvo, a self-evolving framework for 3D spatial reasoning, centered on the Deterministic Geometric Environment (DGE). The DGE formalizes 16 spatial reasoning task categories under explicit geometric validation rules and converts unannotated 3D scenes into zero-noise interactive oracles, replacing model consensus with objective physical feedback. A single shared-parameter policy co-evolves across questioner and solver roles under DGE constraints: the questioner generates physically valid spatial questions grounded in scene observations, while the solver derives precise answers against DGE-verified ground truth. A task-adaptive scheduler endogenously concentrates training on the model's weakest categories, producing a dynamic curriculum without manual design. Experiments across nine benchmarks demonstrate that SpatialEvo achieves the highest average score at both 3B and 7B scales, with consistent gains on spatial reasoning benchmarks and no degradation on general visual understanding.

AI.tldr: SpatialEvo：基于确定性几何环境（DGE）的自进化3D空间推理框架，通过几何验证规则而非模型共识生成无噪声伪标签，实现单策略在提问者与求解者角色间的协同进化
AI.motivation: 3D空间推理是具身智能的核心能力，但连续模型改进受限于几何标注成本。现有自进化范式依赖模型共识构建伪标签，导致训练强化而非纠正模型的几何错误。作者发现3D空间推理的独特属性：真实标签是底层几何的确定性结果，可直接从点云和相机位姿计算得到，无需模型参与。
AI.method: 提出SpatialEvo框架，核心是确定性几何环境（DGE）。DGE将16个空间推理任务类别形式化为显式几何验证规则，将未标注的3D场景转换为零噪声交互式oracle，用客观物理反馈替代模型共识。单共享参数策略在DGE约束下协同进化：提问者基于场景观察生成物理有效的空间问题，求解者针对DGE验证的真实标签推导精确答案。任务自适应调度器内生地集中训练于模型最弱类别，无需手动设计动态课程。
AI.result: 在9个基准测试中，SpatialEvo在3B和7B规模上均获得最高平均分，在空间推理基准上取得一致增益，且在通用视觉理解上无性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用3D空间推理的几何确定性特性，SpatialEvo实现了有效的自进化训练，避免了模型共识的误差强化问题，为3D空间推理提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: Bounded Autonomy for Enterprise AI: Typed Action Contracts and Consumer-Side Execution
summary: Large language models are increasingly used as natural-language interfaces to enterprise software, but their direct use as system operators remains unsafe. Model errors can propagate into unauthorized actions, malformed requests, cross-workspace execution, and other costly failures. We argue this is primarily an execution architecture problem. We present a bounded-autonomy architecture in which language models may interpret intent and propose actions, but all executable behavior is constrained by typed action contracts, permission-aware capability exposure, scoped context, validation before side effects, consumer-side execution boundaries, and optional human approval. The enterprise application remains the source of truth for business logic and authorization, while the orchestration engine operates over an explicit published actions manifest. We evaluate the architecture in a deployed multi-tenant enterprise application across three conditions: manual operation, unconstrained AI with safety layers disabled, and full bounded autonomy. Across 25 scenario trials spanning seven failure families, the bounded-autonomy system completed 23 of 25 tasks with zero unsafe executions, while the unconstrained configuration completed only 17 of 25. Two wrong-entity mutations escaped all consumer-contributed layers; only disambiguation and confirmation mechanisms intercept this class. Both AI conditions delivered 13-18x speedup over manual operation. Critically, removing safety layers made the system less useful: structured validation feedback guided the model to correct outcomes in fewer turns, while the unconstrained system hallucinated success. Several safety properties are structurally enforced by code and intercepted all targeted violations regardless of model output. The result is a practical, deployed architecture for making imperfect language models operationally useful in enterprise systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种有界自主架构，通过类型化动作契约、权限感知能力暴露、作用域上下文等机制，约束LLM在企业系统中的执行行为，确保安全性
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型作为企业软件的自然语言接口越来越普遍，但直接用作系统操作员存在安全隐患，模型错误可能导致未授权操作、错误请求、跨工作空间执行等代价高昂的故障
AI.method: 采用有界自主架构：LLM解释意图并提出动作，但所有可执行行为受类型化动作契约、权限感知能力暴露、作用域上下文、副作用前验证、消费者端执行边界和可选人工批准约束。企业应用保持业务逻辑和授权的唯一来源，编排引擎基于显式发布动作清单操作
AI.result: 在部署的多租户企业应用中评估三种条件：手动操作、无约束AI（安全层禁用）和完整有界自主。25个场景试验中，有界自主系统完成23/25任务且零不安全执行，无约束配置仅完成17/25。两种配置相比手动操作实现13-18倍加速。移除安全层反而降低系统实用性
AI.conclusion: 该架构通过代码结构强制执行多个安全属性，拦截所有目标违规，为不完美的语言模型在企业系统中提供实用、可部署的操作架构

title: Contextual Multi-Task Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Reef Monitoring
comment: To be published in IEEE OCEANS 2026 (Sanya) conference proceedings
summary: Although autonomous underwater vehicles promise the capability of marine ecosystem monitoring, their deployment is fundamentally limited by the difficulty of controlling vehicles under highly uncertain and non-stationary underwater dynamics. To address these challenges, we employ a data-driven reinforcement learning approach to compensate for unknown dynamics and task variations.Traditional single-task reinforcement learning has a tendency to overfit the training environment, thus, limit the long-term usefulness of the learnt policy. Hence, we propose to use a contextual multi-task reinforcement learning paradigm instead, allowing us to learn controllers that can be reused for various tasks, e.g., detecting oysters in one reef and detecting corals in another. We evaluate whether contextual multi-task reinforcement learning can efficiently learn robust and generalisable control policies for autonomous underwater reef monitoring. We train a single context-dependent policy that is able to solve multiple related monitoring tasks in a simulated reef environment in HoloOcean. In our experiments, we empirically evaluate the contextual policies regarding sample-efficiency, zero-shot generalisation to unseen tasks, and robustness to varying water currents. By utilising multi-task reinforcement learning, we aim to improve the training effectiveness, as well as the reusability of learnt policies to take a step towards more sustainable procedures in autonomous reef monitoring.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出使用上下文多任务强化学习来训练自主水下航行器，以应对不确定和非平稳的水下动力学，实现可重用的控制策略用于珊瑚礁监测。
AI.motivation: 自主水下航行器在海洋生态系统监测中具有潜力，但其部署受到高度不确定和非平稳水下动力学控制困难的限制。传统单任务强化学习容易过拟合训练环境，限制了学习策略的长期实用性。
AI.method: 采用数据驱动的上下文多任务强化学习方法，学习单一上下文依赖策略，能够在模拟珊瑚礁环境（HoloOcean）中解决多个相关监测任务。该方法通过上下文参数化实现策略重用。
AI.result: 实验评估了上下文策略在样本效率、对未见任务的零样本泛化能力以及对变化水流的鲁棒性方面的表现。多任务强化学习提高了训练效果和学习策略的可重用性。
AI.conclusion: 上下文多任务强化学习能够为自主水下珊瑚礁监测学习稳健且可泛化的控制策略，为实现更可持续的自主监测程序迈出一步。

title: Geometric Context Transformer for Streaming 3D Reconstruction
summary: Streaming 3D reconstruction aims to recover 3D information, such as camera poses and point clouds, from a video stream, which necessitates geometric accuracy, temporal consistency, and computational efficiency. Motivated by the principles of Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM), we introduce LingBot-Map, a feed-forward 3D foundation model for reconstructing scenes from streaming data, built upon a geometric context transformer (GCT) architecture. A defining aspect of LingBot-Map lies in its carefully designed attention mechanism, which integrates an anchor context, a pose-reference window, and a trajectory memory to address coordinate grounding, dense geometric cues, and long-range drift correction, respectively. This design keeps the streaming state compact while retaining rich geometric context, enabling stable efficient inference at around 20 FPS on 518 x 378 resolution inputs over long sequences exceeding 10,000 frames. Extensive evaluations across a variety of benchmarks demonstrate that our approach achieves superior performance compared to both existing streaming and iterative optimization-based approaches.

AI.tldr: LingBot-Map：基于几何上下文Transformer的流式3D重建基础模型，通过创新的注意力机制实现坐标锚定、密集几何线索和长程漂移校正，在518×378分辨率下达到约20FPS的实时性能。
AI.motivation: 流式3D重建需要同时满足几何精度、时间一致性和计算效率的要求。受SLAM原理启发，研究者希望开发一个能够从流式数据中重建场景的前馈式3D基础模型，解决现有方法在坐标锚定、几何线索利用和长程漂移校正方面的不足。
AI.method: 提出LingBot-Map模型，基于几何上下文Transformer架构。核心创新是精心设计的注意力机制，包含三个关键组件：1）锚点上下文用于坐标锚定；2）位姿参考窗口提供密集几何线索；3）轨迹记忆用于长程漂移校正。这种设计保持流式状态紧凑的同时保留丰富的几何上下文，支持长序列（超过10,000帧）的高效推理。
AI.result: 模型在518×378分辨率输入下实现约20FPS的稳定高效推理，能够处理超过10,000帧的长序列。在多个基准测试上的广泛评估表明，该方法在性能上优于现有的流式方法和基于迭代优化的方法。
AI.conclusion: LingBot-Map通过创新的注意力机制设计，成功实现了高效、准确的流式3D重建，在保持紧凑状态的同时解决了坐标锚定、几何线索利用和长程漂移校正等关键问题，为实时3D场景重建提供了有效的解决方案。

title: The Agentification of Scientific Research: A Physicist's Perspective
summary: This article argues that the most important significance of the AI revolution, especially the rise of large language models, lies not simply in automation, but in a fundamental change in how complex information and human know-how are carried, replicated, and shared. From this perspective, AI for Science is especially important because it may transform not only the efficiency of research, but also the structure of scientific collaboration, discovery, publishing, and evaluation. The article outlines a gradual path from AI as a research tool to AI as a scientific collaborator, and discusses how AI is likely to fundamentally reshape scientific publication. It also argues that continuous learning and diversity of ideas are essential if AI is to play a meaningful role in original scientific discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文认为AI革命的核心意义在于改变复杂信息和人类知识的承载、复制与共享方式，AI for Science将重塑科研协作、发现、出版和评价的结构
AI.motivation: 探讨AI革命（特别是大语言模型）对科学研究的深远影响，强调其不仅在于自动化，更在于从根本上改变复杂信息和人类知识的传播与共享方式
AI.method: 通过理论分析，提出从AI作为研究工具到AI作为科学合作者的渐进路径，并讨论AI如何重塑科学出版体系
AI.result: AI for Science将不仅提高研究效率，还将改变科学协作结构、发现过程、出版模式和评价体系，持续学习和思想多样性对AI参与原创科学发现至关重要
AI.conclusion: AI革命的核心价值在于重塑知识传播方式，AI for Science将引发科研范式的根本变革，需要持续学习和思想多样性来确保AI在原创科学发现中发挥实质性作用

title: ELMoE-3D: Leveraging Intrinsic Elasticity of MoE for Hybrid-Bonding-Enabled Self-Speculative Decoding in On-Premises Serving
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models have become the dominant architecture for large-scale language models, yet on-premises serving remains fundamentally memory-bound as batching turns sparse per-token compute into dense memory activation. Memory-centric architectures (PIM, NMP) improve bandwidth but leave compute underutilized under MoE's low arithmetic intensity at high batch sizes. Speculative decoding (SD) trades idle compute for fewer target invocations, yet verification must load experts even for rejected tokens, severely limiting its benefit in MoE especially at low batch sizes. We propose ELMoE-3D, a hybrid-bonding (HB)-based HW-SW co-designed framework that unifies cache-based acceleration and speculative decoding to offer overall speedup across batch sizes. We identify two intrinsic elasticity axes of MoE-expert and bit-and jointly scale them to construct Elastic Self-Speculative Decoding (Elastic-SD), which serves as both an expert cache and a strongly aligned self-draft model accelerated by high HB bandwidth. Our LSB-augmented bit-sliced architecture exploits inherent redundancy in bit-slice representations to natively support bit-nested execution. On our 3D-stacked hardware, ELMoE-3D achieves an average $6.6\times$ speedup and $4.4\times$ energy efficiency gain over naive MoE serving on xPU across batch sizes 1-16, and delivers $2.2\times$ speedup and $1.4\times$ energy efficiency gain over the best-performing prior accelerator baseline.

AI.tldr: ELMoE-3D是一个基于混合键合技术的软硬件协同设计框架，通过统一基于缓存的加速和推测解码技术，在MoE模型推理中实现了跨批处理大小的整体加速。
AI.motivation: MoE模型已成为大规模语言模型的主流架构，但在本地部署时面临内存瓶颈问题。现有的内存中心架构（PIM、NMP）虽然提高了带宽，但在高批处理大小下MoE的低算术强度导致计算利用率不足。推测解码技术虽然能用空闲计算换取更少的目标调用，但验证阶段仍需加载专家模型，特别是在低批处理大小下严重限制了其在MoE中的效益。
AI.method: 提出ELMoE-3D框架，采用混合键合技术实现软硬件协同设计。识别MoE的两个内在弹性轴：专家轴和比特轴，并联合扩展它们构建弹性自推测解码（Elastic-SD），既作为专家缓存，又作为强对齐的自草稿模型。采用LSB增强的比特切片架构，利用比特切片表示中的固有冗余来原生支持比特嵌套执行。
AI.result: 在3D堆叠硬件上，ELMoE-3D在批处理大小1-16范围内，相比xPU上的朴素MoE推理实现了平均6.6倍的加速和4.4倍的能效提升。相比先前最佳性能的加速器基线，实现了2.2倍的加速和1.4倍的能效提升。
AI.conclusion: ELMoE-3D通过统一缓存加速和推测解码，利用混合键合技术的高带宽优势，有效解决了MoE模型推理中的内存瓶颈问题，实现了跨批处理大小的显著性能提升和能效改进。

title: Don't Let the Video Speak: Audio-Contrastive Preference Optimization for Audio-Visual Language Models
summary: While Audio-Visual Language Models (AVLMs) have achieved remarkable progress over recent years, their reliability is bottlenecked by cross-modal hallucination. A particularly pervasive manifestation is video-driven audio hallucination: models routinely exploit visual shortcuts to hallucinate expected sounds, discarding true auditory evidence. To counteract this deeply ingrained visual dominance, we propose Audio-Contrastive Preference Optimization (ACPO). This dual-axis preference learning framework introduces an output-contrastive objective to penalize visual descriptions masquerading as audio facts, alongside an input-contrastive objective that swaps audio tracks to explicitly penalize generation invariant to the true auditory signal. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ACPO establishes highly faithful audio grounding and mitigates audio hallucination without compromising overarching multimodal capabilities.

AI.tldr: 提出Audio-Contrastive Preference Optimization (ACPO)方法，通过双轴偏好学习框架解决音频-视觉语言模型中的跨模态幻觉问题，特别是视频驱动的音频幻觉
AI.motivation: 音频-视觉语言模型存在跨模态幻觉瓶颈，特别是视频驱动的音频幻觉问题：模型经常利用视觉捷径来幻觉预期声音，而忽略真实的听觉证据。这种视觉主导性严重影响了模型的可靠性
AI.method: 提出Audio-Contrastive Preference Optimization (ACPO)双轴偏好学习框架：1) 输出对比目标：惩罚伪装成音频事实的视觉描述；2) 输入对比目标：通过交换音频轨道来明确惩罚对真实听觉信号不变的生成
AI.result: 大量实验表明，ACPO建立了高度忠实的音频基础，减轻了音频幻觉，同时不损害整体的多模态能力
AI.conclusion: ACPO框架有效解决了音频-视觉语言模型中的跨模态幻觉问题，特别是对抗了视觉主导性，提高了音频推理的可靠性

title: Habitat-GS: A High-Fidelity Navigation Simulator with Dynamic Gaussian Splatting
summary: Training embodied AI agents depends critically on the visual fidelity of simulation environments and the ability to model dynamic humans. Current simulators rely on mesh-based rasterization with limited visual realism, and their support for dynamic human avatars, where available, is constrained to mesh representations, hindering agent generalization to human-populated real-world scenarios. We present Habitat-GS, a navigation-centric embodied AI simulator extended from Habitat-Sim that integrates 3D Gaussian Splatting scene rendering and drivable gaussian avatars while maintaining full compatibility with the Habitat ecosystem. Our system implements a 3DGS renderer for real-time photorealistic rendering and supports scalable 3DGS asset import from diverse sources. For dynamic human modeling, we introduce a gaussian avatar module that enables each avatar to simultaneously serve as a photorealistic visual entity and an effective navigation obstacle, allowing agents to learn human-aware behaviors in realistic settings. Experiments on point-goal navigation demonstrate that agents trained on 3DGS scenes achieve stronger cross-domain generalization, with mixed-domain training being the most effective strategy. Evaluations on avatar-aware navigation further confirm that gaussian avatars enable effective human-aware navigation. Finally, performance benchmarks validate the system's scalability across varying scene complexity and avatar counts.

AI.tldr: Habitat-GS：基于3D高斯溅射的具身AI仿真器，支持可驱动高斯化身，提升视觉真实性和跨域泛化能力
AI.motivation: 当前具身AI仿真器存在两个主要限制：1）基于网格的光栅化渲染视觉真实感有限；2）动态人类化身通常局限于网格表示，阻碍了智能体在真实人类场景中的泛化能力。需要更真实的视觉仿真和更灵活的人类建模方法。
AI.method: 扩展Habitat-Sim构建Habitat-GS系统，集成3D高斯溅射（3DGS）场景渲染和可驱动高斯化身。系统包含：1）实时逼真渲染的3DGS渲染器；2）支持从多种来源导入可扩展3DGS资产；3）高斯化身模块，使化身既能作为逼真视觉实体，又能作为有效导航障碍。
AI.result: 点目标导航实验表明，在3DGS场景训练的智能体具有更强的跨域泛化能力，混合域训练策略最有效。化身感知导航评估确认高斯化身能实现有效的人类感知导航。性能基准测试验证了系统在不同场景复杂度和化身数量下的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: Habitat-GS通过集成3D高斯溅射渲染和高斯化身，显著提升了具身AI仿真的视觉真实性和人类建模能力，为在逼真人类场景中训练具有泛化能力的智能体提供了有效平台。

title: Differentially Private Conformal Prediction
summary: Conformal prediction (CP) has attracted broad attention as a simple and flexible framework for uncertainty quantification through prediction sets. In this work, we study how to deploy CP under differential privacy (DP) in a statistically efficient manner. We first introduce differential CP, a non-splitting conformal procedure that avoids the efficiency loss caused by data splitting and serves as a bridge between oracle CP and private conformal inference. By exploiting the stability properties of DP mechanisms, differential CP establishes a direct connection to oracle CP and inherits corresponding validity behavior. Building on this idea, we develop Differentially Private Conformal Prediction (DPCP), a fully private procedure that combines DP model training with a private quantile mechanism for calibration. We establish the end-to-end privacy guarantee of DPCP and investigate its coverage properties under additional regularity conditions. We further study the efficiency of both differential CP and DPCP under empirical risk minimization and general regression models, showing that DPCP can produce tighter prediction sets than existing private split conformal approaches under the same privacy budget. Numerical experiments on synthetic and real datasets demonstrate the practical effectiveness of the proposed methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出差分私有保形预测（DPCP）框架，通过非分割的差分保形预测方法避免数据分割带来的效率损失，在保证差分隐私的同时提供更紧的预测集。
AI.motivation: 保形预测（CP）作为不确定性量化的灵活框架，在差分隐私（DP）下的部署面临效率损失问题。传统分割方法会降低统计效率，需要开发更高效的私有保形预测方法。
AI.method: 提出差分保形预测（differential CP）作为非分割方法，避免数据分割损失；在此基础上开发DPCP，结合DP模型训练和私有分位数机制进行校准；利用DP机制的稳定性建立与oracle CP的直接连接。
AI.result: DPCP在相同隐私预算下比现有私有分割保形方法产生更紧的预测集；建立了端到端隐私保证；在经验风险最小化和一般回归模型下分析了效率；通过合成和真实数据实验验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的DPCP框架在保证差分隐私的同时，通过非分割方法显著提高了保形预测的统计效率，为私有不确定性量化提供了更优的解决方案。

title: SGA-MCTS: Decoupling Planning from Execution via Training-Free Atomic Experience Retrieval
summary: LLM-powered systems require complex multi-step decision-making abilities to solve real-world tasks, yet current planning approaches face a trade-off between the high latency of inference-time search and the limited generalization of supervised fine-tuning. To address this limitation, we introduce \textbf{SGA-MCTS}, a framework that casts LLM planning as non-parametric retrieval. Offline, we leverage Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) to explore the solution space and distill high-fidelity trajectories into State-Goal-Action (SGA) atoms. These atoms are de-lexicalized primitives that abstract concrete entities into symbolic slots, preserving reusable causal logic while discarding domain-specific noise. Online, a retrieval-augmented agent employs a hybrid symbolic-semantic mechanism to fetch relevant SGAs and re-ground them into the current context as soft reasoning hints. Empirical results on complex benchmarks demonstrate that this paradigm enables frozen, open-weights models to match the performance of SOTA systems (e.g., GPT-5) without task-specific fine-tuning. By effectively amortizing the heavy computational cost of search, SGA-MCTS achieves System 2 reasoning depth at System 1 inference speeds, rendering autonomous planning both scalable and real-time feasible.

AI.tldr: SGA-MCTS：通过蒙特卡洛树搜索探索解空间，将高质量轨迹提炼为去词法化的状态-目标-动作原子，在线检索并重接地作为软推理提示，实现系统2推理深度与系统1推理速度的平衡
AI.motivation: 当前LLM规划方法面临推理时搜索的高延迟与监督微调的有限泛化能力之间的权衡，需要一种既能实现深度推理又具备实时性能的规划框架
AI.method: 离线阶段使用蒙特卡洛树搜索探索解空间，将高质量轨迹提炼为去词法化的状态-目标-动作原子；在线阶段通过混合符号-语义机制检索相关SGA原子，并在当前上下文中重接地作为软推理提示
AI.result: 在复杂基准测试中，该方法使冻结的开源模型能够在不进行任务特定微调的情况下达到最先进系统（如GPT-5）的性能水平，有效分摊搜索的计算成本
AI.conclusion: SGA-MCTS框架实现了系统2推理深度与系统1推理速度的平衡，使自主规划既具有可扩展性又具备实时可行性

title: Machine Learning-Based Real-Time Detection of Compensatory Trunk Movements Using Trunk-Wrist Inertial Measurement Units
comment: This manuscript has been submitted to IEEE Transactions on Neural Systems and Rehabilitation Engineering for possible publication. This version is a preprint and has not undergone peer review
summary: Compensatory trunk movements (CTMs) are commonly observed after stroke and can lead to maladaptive movement patterns, limiting targeted training of affected structures. Objective, continuous detection of CTMs during therapy and activities of daily living remains challenging due to the typically complex measurements setups required, as well as limited applicability for real-time use. This study investigates whether a two-inertial measurement unit configuration enables reliable, real-time CTM detection using machine learning. Data were collected from ten able-bodied participants performing activities of daily living under simulated impairment conditions (elbow brace restricting flexion-extension, resistance band inducing flexor-synergy-like patterns), with synchronized optical motion capture (OMC) and manually annotated video recordings serving as reference. A systematic location-reduction analysis using OMC identified wrist and trunk kinematics as a minimal yet sufficient set of anatomical sensing locations.
