Using an extreme gradient boosting classifier (XGBoost) evaluated with leave-one-subject-out cross-validation, our two-IMU model achieved strong discriminative performance (macro-F1 = 0.80 +/- 0.07, MCC = 0.73 +/- 0.08; ROC-AUC > 0.93), with performance comparable to an OMC-based model and prediction timing suitable for real-time applications. Explainability analysis revealed dominant contributions from trunk dynamics and wrist-trunk interaction features. In preliminary evaluation using recordings from four participants with neurological conditions, the model retained good discriminative capability (ROC-AUC ~ 0.78), but showed reduced and variable threshold-dependent performance, highlighting challenges in clinical generalization. These results support sparse wearable sensing as a viable pathway toward scalable, real-time monitoring of CTMs during therapy and daily living.

AI.tldr: 使用两个惯性测量单元(IMU)的机器学习方法实现卒中后代偿性躯干运动的实时检测，在健康参与者中表现良好，但在神经疾病患者中泛化能力有限。
AI.motivation: 卒中后常见的代偿性躯干运动(CTMs)会导致不良运动模式，限制受影响结构的针对性训练。目前客观、连续的CTM检测在治疗和日常生活中面临挑战，因为需要复杂的测量设置且难以实时应用。
AI.method: 采用两个IMU配置，使用极端梯度提升分类器(XGBoost)进行机器学习。数据来自10名健康参与者模拟损伤条件下执行日常生活活动，使用光学运动捕捉和手动视频标注作为参考。通过系统性的位置减少分析确定手腕和躯干作为最小但足够的传感位置。
AI.result: 两IMU模型在留一受试者交叉验证中表现出强判别性能(宏F1=0.80±0.07，MCC=0.73±0.08；ROC-AUC>0.93)，性能与基于光学运动捕捉的模型相当，预测时间适合实时应用。可解释性分析显示躯干动力学和手腕-躯干交互特征贡献最大。在4名神经疾病患者的初步评估中，模型保持良好判别能力(ROC-AUC~0.78)，但阈值依赖性能有所降低且变化较大。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏可穿戴传感是实现治疗和日常生活中CTMs可扩展、实时监测的可行途径，但在临床泛化方面仍面临挑战。

title: The Acoustic Camouflage Phenomenon: Re-evaluating Speech Features for Financial Risk Prediction
summary: In computational paralinguistics, detecting cognitive load and deception from speech signals is a heavily researched domain. Recent efforts have attempted to apply these acoustic frameworks to corporate earnings calls to predict catastrophic stock market volatility. In this study, we empirically investigate the limits of acoustic feature extraction (pitch, jitter, and hesitation) when applied to highly trained speakers in in-the-wild teleconference environments. Utilizing a two-stream late-fusion architecture, we contrast an acoustic-based stream with a baseline Natural Language Processing (NLP) stream. The isolated NLP model achieved a recall of 66.25% for tail-risk downside events. Surprisingly, integrating acoustic features via late fusion significantly degraded performance, reducing recall to 47.08%. We identify this degradation as Acoustic Camouflage, where media-trained vocal regulation introduces contradictory noise that disrupts multimodal meta-learners. We present these findings as a boundary condition for speech processing applications in high-stakes financial forecasting.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，在金融预测中，经过媒体训练的高管语音特征（音高、抖动、犹豫）会干扰多模态模型性能，导致"声学伪装"现象
AI.motivation: 探索声学特征提取（音高、抖动、犹豫）在高度训练过的演讲者（如企业高管）和真实电话会议环境中的局限性，特别是在预测股票市场极端波动方面的应用边界
AI.method: 采用双流延迟融合架构，对比声学特征流与自然语言处理（NLP）基线流。使用音高、抖动、犹豫等声学特征，通过延迟融合将声学特征与NLP特征整合
AI.result: 孤立NLP模型对尾部风险下跌事件的召回率达到66.25%，但通过延迟融合整合声学特征后，召回率显著下降至47.08%。这表明声学特征引入了干扰噪声
AI.conclusion: 提出了"声学伪装"概念，即经过媒体训练的语音调节会引入矛盾噪声，破坏多模态元学习器性能。这为高风险金融预测中的语音处理应用设定了边界条件

title: UI-Zoomer: Uncertainty-Driven Adaptive Zoom-In for GUI Grounding
summary: GUI grounding, which localizes interface elements from screenshots given natural language queries, remains challenging for small icons and dense layouts. Test-time zoom-in methods improve localization by cropping and re-running inference at higher resolution, but apply cropping uniformly across all instances with fixed crop sizes, ignoring whether the model is actually uncertain on each case. We propose \textbf{UI-Zoomer}, a training-free adaptive zoom-in framework that treats both the trigger and scale of zoom-in as a prediction uncertainty quantification problem. A confidence-aware gate fuses spatial consensus among stochastic candidates with token-level generation confidence to selectively trigger zoom-in only when localization is uncertain. When triggered, an uncertainty-driven crop sizing module decomposes prediction variance into inter-sample positional spread and intra-sample box extent, deriving a per-instance crop radius via the law of total variance. Extensive experiments on ScreenSpot-Pro, UI-Vision, and ScreenSpot-v2 demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines across multiple model architectures, achieving gains of up to +13.4\%, +10.3\%, and +4.2\% respectively, with no additional training required.

AI.tldr: UI-Zoomer：一种无需训练的自适应放大框架，通过预测不确定性量化来智能触发和调整放大操作，提升GUI元素定位精度
AI.motivation: 现有测试时放大方法对所有实例采用统一的裁剪尺寸和固定放大策略，忽略了模型对每个案例的实际不确定性程度，导致对小图标和密集布局的GUI元素定位效果不佳
AI.method: 提出UI-Zoomer框架：1）置信度感知门控机制，融合随机候选的空间共识和token级生成置信度，仅在定位不确定时触发放大；2）不确定性驱动的裁剪尺寸模块，将预测方差分解为样本间位置扩散和样本内边界框范围，通过总方差定律计算每个实例的裁剪半径
AI.result: 在ScreenSpot-Pro、UI-Vision和ScreenSpot-v2数据集上的实验表明，该方法在多种模型架构上均优于强基线，分别获得+13.4%、+10.3%和+4.2%的性能提升，且无需额外训练
AI.conclusion: UI-Zoomer通过将放大触发和尺度视为预测不确定性量化问题，实现了自适应、智能的GUI元素定位增强，显著提升了小图标和密集布局场景下的定位精度

title: Scalable Trajectory Generation for Whole-Body Mobile Manipulation
summary: Robots deployed in unstructured environments must coordinate whole-body motion -- simultaneously moving a mobile base and arm -- to interact with the physical world. This coupled mobility and dexterity yields a state space that grows combinatorially with scene and object diversity, demanding datasets far larger than those sufficient for fixed-base manipulation. Yet existing acquisition methods, including teleoperation and planning, are either labor-intensive or computationally prohibitive at scale. The core bottleneck is the lack of a scalable pipeline for generating large-scale, physically valid, coordinated trajectory data across diverse embodiments and environments. Here we introduce AutoMoMa, a GPU-accelerated framework that unifies AKR modeling, which consolidates base, arm, and object kinematics into a single chain, with parallelized trajectory optimization. AutoMoMa achieves 5,000 episodes per GPU-hour (over $80\times$ faster than CPU-based baselines), producing a dataset of over 500k physically valid trajectories spanning 330 scenes, diverse articulated objects, and multiple robot embodiments. Prior datasets were forced to compromise on scale, diversity, or kinematic fidelity; AutoMoMa addresses all three simultaneously. Training downstream IL policies further reveals that even a single articulated-object task requires tens of thousands of demonstrations for SOTA methods to reach $\approx 80\%$ success, confirming that data scarcity -- not algorithmic limitations -- has been the binding constraint. AutoMoMa thus bridges high-performance planning and reliable IL-based control, providing the infrastructure previously missing for coordinated mobile manipulation research. By making large-scale, kinematically valid training data practical, AutoMoMa showcases generalizable whole-body robot policies capable of operating in the diverse, unstructured settings of the real world.

AI.tldr: AutoMoMa：GPU加速的框架，通过统一AKR建模和并行轨迹优化，实现大规模、物理有效的协调移动操作轨迹生成，速度比CPU基线快80倍以上。
AI.motivation: 非结构化环境中的机器人需要协调全身运动（移动基座和机械臂），但现有数据采集方法（遥操作或规划）在规模上要么劳动密集要么计算成本过高，缺乏可扩展的物理有效轨迹生成管道。
AI.method: AutoMoMa框架统一了AKR建模（将基座、机械臂和物体运动学整合为单一链）与并行轨迹优化，实现GPU加速，达到每小时5000个轨迹的生成速度。
AI.result: 生成超过50万个物理有效轨迹，涵盖330个场景、多样化关节物体和多种机器人本体，速度比CPU基线快80倍以上。下游IL策略训练显示，单个关节物体任务需要数万次演示才能达到约80%成功率。
AI.conclusion: AutoMoMa解决了移动操作研究中数据稀缺的核心瓶颈，为协调移动操作研究提供了之前缺失的基础设施，使大规模、运动学有效的训练数据变得实用，展示了在真实世界多样化非结构化环境中可泛化的全身机器人策略。

title: Retrieve, Then Classify: Corpus-Grounded Automation of Clinical Value Set Authoring
summary: Clinical value set authoring -- the task of identifying all codes in a standardized vocabulary that define a clinical concept -- is a recurring bottleneck in clinical quality measurement and phenotyping. A natural approach is to prompt a large language model (LLM) to generate the required codes directly, but structured clinical vocabularies are large, version-controlled, and not reliably memorized during pretraining. We propose Retrieval-Augmented Set Completion (RASC): retrieve the $K$ most similar existing value sets from a curated corpus to form a candidate pool, then apply a classifier to each candidate code. Theoretically, retrieve-and-select can reduce statistical complexity by shrinking the effective output space from the full vocabulary to a much smaller retrieved candidate pool. We demonstrate the utility of RASC on 11,803 publicly available VSAC value sets, constructing the first large-scale benchmark for this task. A cross-encoder fine-tuned on SAPBert achieves AUROC~0.852 and value-set-level F1~0.298, outperforming a simpler three-layer Multilayer Perceptron (AUROC~0.799, F1~0.250) and both reduce the number of irrelevant candidates per true positive from 12.3 (retrieval-only) to approximately 3.2 and 4.4 respectively. Zero-shot GPT-4o achieves value-set-level F1~0.105, with 48.6\% of returned codes absent from VSAC entirely. This performance gap widens with increasing value set size, consistent with RASC's theoretical advantage. We observe similar performance gains across two other classifier model types, namely a cross-encoder initialized from pre-trained SAPBert and a LightGBM model, demonstrating that RASC's benefits extend beyond a single model class. The code to download and create the benchmark dataset, as well as the model training code is available at: \href{https://github.com/mukhes3/RASC}{https://github.com/mukhes3/RASC}.

AI.tldr: 提出RASC（检索增强集合补全）方法，通过检索相似值集形成候选池，再应用分类器筛选代码，显著提升临床值集构建的准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 临床值集构建是临床质量测量和表型分析中的瓶颈任务。直接使用大语言模型生成代码存在局限性，因为结构化临床词汇表规模大、版本控制严格，且预训练时未可靠记忆。
AI.method: 提出RASC方法：1) 从已标注语料库中检索K个最相似的现有值集形成候选代码池；2) 对每个候选代码应用分类器进行筛选。该方法将输出空间从完整词汇表缩小到较小的候选池，降低统计复杂度。
AI.result: 在11,803个公开VSAC值集上构建首个大规模基准测试。基于SAPBert微调的交叉编码器达到AUROC~0.852和值集级F1~0.298，优于三层MLP（AUROC~0.799，F1~0.250）。两种方法都将每个真阳性的无关候选数从12.3（仅检索）分别降至约3.2和4.4。零样本GPT-4o的F1仅0.105，48.6%的返回代码在VSAC中不存在。
AI.conclusion: RASC方法通过检索-选择策略有效解决了临床值集构建问题，显著优于直接使用LLM的方法。该方法在不同模型类型（交叉编码器、LightGBM）上均表现良好，证明了其通用性。性能优势随值集规模增大而扩大，符合理论预期。

title: A deep learning framework for glomeruli segmentation with boundary attention
summary: Accurate detection and segmentation of glomeruli in kidney tissue are essential for diagnostic applications. Traditional deep learning methods primarily rely on semantic segmentation, which often fails to precisely delineate adjacent glomeruli. To address this challenge, we propose a novel glomerulus detection and segmentation model that emphasises boundary separation. Leveraging pathology foundation models, the proposed U-Net-based architecture incorporates a specialised attention decoder designed to highlight critical regions and improve instancelevel segmentation. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that our approach surpasses state-of-the-art methods in both Dice score and Intersection over Union, indicating superior performance in glomerular delineation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于U-Net的肾小球检测分割模型，通过边界分离和注意力解码器提升相邻肾小球的分割精度
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法主要依赖语义分割，难以精确区分相邻肾小球，需要改进肾小球检测和分割的边界分离能力
AI.method: 基于病理基础模型的U-Net架构，集成专门设计的注意力解码器，强调关键区域并改进实例级分割
AI.result: 在Dice分数和交并比指标上超越现有最优方法，显示在肾小球轮廓描绘方面的优越性能
AI.conclusion: 提出的强调边界分离的肾小球检测分割模型能有效解决相邻肾小球分割问题，为诊断应用提供更精确的工具

title: SynHAT: A Two-stage Coarse-to-Fine Diffusion Framework for Synthesizing Human Activity Traces
summary: Human activity traces (HATs) are critical for many applications, including human mobility modeling and point-of-interest (POI) recommendation. However, growing privacy concerns have severely limited access to authentic large-scale HAT datasets. Recent advances in generative AI provide new opportunities to synthesize realistic and privacy-preserving HATs for such applications. Yet two major challenges remain: (i) HATs are highly irregular and dynamic, with long and varying time intervals, making it difficult to capture their complex spatio-temporal dependencies and underlying distributions; and (ii) generative models are often computationally expensive, making long-term, fine-grained HAT synthesis inefficient. To address these challenges, we propose SynHAT, a computationally efficient coarse-to-fine HAT synthesis framework built on a novel spatio-temporal denoising diffusion model. In Stage 1, we develop Coarse-HADiff, which models the overall spatio-temporal dependencies of coarse-grained latent spatio-temporal traces. It incorporates a novel Latent Spatio-Temporal U-Net with dual Drift-Jitter branches to jointly model smooth spatial transitions and temporal variations during denoising. In Stage 2, we introduce a three-step pipeline consisting of Behavior Pattern Extraction, Fine-HADiff, which shares the same architecture as Coarse-HADiff, and Semantic Alignment to generate fine-grained latent spatio-temporal traces from the Stage 1 outputs. We extensively evaluate SynHAT in terms of data fidelity, utility, privacy, robustness, and scalability. Experiments on real-world HAT datasets from four cities across three countries show that SynHAT substantially outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving 52% and 33% improvements on spatial and temporal metrics, respectively.

AI.tldr: SynHAT：一种基于时空去噪扩散模型的高效粗到细人类活动轨迹合成框架，解决真实大规模HAT数据访问受限问题
AI.motivation: 人类活动轨迹对许多应用至关重要，但隐私问题严重限制了真实大规模HAT数据集的访问。生成式AI提供了合成真实且保护隐私的HAT的机会，但面临两个主要挑战：HAT的高度不规则性和动态性，以及生成模型计算成本高昂的问题。
AI.method: 提出SynHAT框架，采用两阶段粗到细方法：第一阶段开发Coarse-HADiff，使用具有双漂移-抖动分支的潜在时空U-Net建模粗粒度潜在时空轨迹的总体时空依赖关系；第二阶段通过行为模式提取、Fine-HADiff（与Coarse-HADiff相同架构）和语义对齐三步流程，从第一阶段输出生成细粒度潜在时空轨迹。
AI.result: 在来自三个国家四个城市的真实世界HAT数据集上进行广泛评估，SynHAT在数据保真度、实用性、隐私性、鲁棒性和可扩展性方面显著优于现有基线方法，空间和时间指标分别实现了52%和33%的改进。
AI.conclusion: SynHAT通过创新的粗到细扩散模型框架，有效解决了人类活动轨迹合成中的不规则性、动态性和计算效率问题，为隐私保护下的大规模HAT生成提供了高效解决方案。

title: Whole-Body Mobile Manipulation using Offline Reinforcement Learning on Sub-optimal Controllers
summary: Mobile Manipulation (MoMa) of articulated objects, such as opening doors, drawers, and cupboards, demands simultaneous, whole-body coordination between a robot's base and arms. Classical whole-body controllers (WBCs) can solve such problems via hierarchical optimization, but require extensive hand-tuned optimization and remain brittle. Learning-based methods, on the other hand, show strong generalization capabilities but typically rely on expensive whole-body teleoperation data or heavy reward engineering. We observe that even a sub-optimal WBC is a powerful structural prior: it can be used to collect data in a constrained, task-relevant region of the state-action space, and its behavior can still be improved upon using offline reinforcement learning. Building on this, we propose WHOLE-MoMa, a two-stage pipeline that first generates diverse demonstrations by randomizing a lightweight WBC, and then applies offline RL to identify and stitch together improved behaviors via a reward signal. To support the expressive action-chunked diffusion policies needed for complex coordination tasks, we extend offline implicit Q-learning with Q-chunking for chunk-level critic evaluation and advantage-weighted policy extraction. On three tasks of increasing difficulty using a TIAGo++ mobile manipulator in simulation, WHOLE-MoMa significantly outperforms WBC, behavior cloning, and several offline RL baselines. Policies transfer directly to the real robot without finetuning, achieving 80% success in bimanual drawer manipulation and 68% in simultaneous cupboard opening and object placement, all without any teleoperated or real-world training data.

AI.tldr: WHOLE-MoMa：一种两阶段框架，通过随机化轻量级全身控制器生成多样化演示，然后应用离线强化学习改进行为，实现移动机械臂对铰接物体的操作，无需遥操作或真实世界训练数据。
AI.motivation: 移动机械臂操作铰接物体需要基座和手臂的全身协调。传统全身控制器需要大量手工调优且脆弱，而学习方法通常依赖昂贵的遥操作数据或复杂的奖励工程。作者发现即使次优的全身控制器也是强大的结构先验，可用于收集任务相关的状态-动作空间数据。
AI.method: 提出WHOLE-MoMa两阶段框架：1）通过随机化轻量级全身控制器生成多样化演示；2）应用离线强化学习通过奖励信号识别和拼接改进行为。为支持复杂协调任务，扩展离线隐式Q学习，引入Q-chunking进行块级评价器评估和优势加权策略提取。
AI.result: 在TIAGo++移动机械臂的三个难度递增任务中，WHOLE-MoMa显著优于全身控制器、行为克隆和多个离线强化学习基线。策略无需微调即可直接迁移到真实机器人，在双手抽屉操作中达到80%成功率，在同时打开橱柜和放置物体中达到68%成功率，且无需任何遥操作或真实世界训练数据。
AI.conclusion: WHOLE-MoMa展示了将次优控制器作为结构先验的有效性，结合离线强化学习能够生成高性能策略，成功解决复杂移动操作任务，实现从仿真到真实世界的零样本迁移。

title: Tight Bounds for Learning Polyhedra with a Margin
summary: We give an algorithm for PAC learning intersections of $k$ halfspaces with a $ρ$ margin to within error $\varepsilon$ that runs in time $\textsf{poly}(k, \varepsilon^{-1}, ρ^{-1}) \cdot \exp \left(O(\sqrt{n \log(1/ρ) \log k})\right)$. Notably, this improves on prior work which had an exponential dependence on either $k$ or $ρ^{-1}$ and matches known cryptographic and Statistical Query lower bounds up to the logarithmic factors in $k$ and $ρ$ in the exponent. Our learning algorithm extends to the more general setting when we are only promised that most points have distance at least $ρ$ from the boundary of the polyhedron, making it applicable to continuous distributions as well.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种学习k个半空间交集的高效算法，在多项式时间依赖k、ε和ρ的基础上，指数项仅包含√(n log(1/ρ) log k)，显著改进了先前工作。
AI.motivation: 先前关于学习半空间交集的工作在k或ρ^{-1}上存在指数依赖，这在实际应用中效率低下。需要开发更高效的算法来匹配已知的密码学和统计查询下界。
AI.method: 设计了一种PAC学习算法，用于学习具有ρ边距的k个半空间交集。算法运行时间为poly(k, ε^{-1}, ρ^{-1})·exp(O(√(n log(1/ρ) log k)))，并扩展到更一般的设置，即只保证大多数点距离多面体边界至少ρ。
AI.result: 算法在k和ρ^{-1}上消除了指数依赖，仅保留指数项中的√(n log(1/ρ) log k)因子。这与已知的密码学和统计查询下界在k和ρ的对数因子范围内匹配。
AI.conclusion: 该算法显著改进了学习半空间交集的效率，达到了接近最优的复杂度，并可应用于连续分布，为实际机器学习应用提供了更实用的理论保证。

title: CAMO: An Agentic Framework for Automated Causal Discovery from Micro Behaviors to Macro Emergence in LLM Agent Simulations
summary: LLM-empowered agent simulations are increasingly used to study social emergence, yet the micro-to-macro causal mechanisms behind macro outcomes often remain unclear. This is challenging because emergence arises from intertwined agent interactions and meso-level feedback and nonlinearity, making generative mechanisms hard to disentangle. To this end, we introduce \textbf{\textsc{CAMO}}, an automated \textbf{Ca}usal discovery framework from \textbf{M}icr\textbf{o} behaviors to \textbf{M}acr\textbf{o} Emergence in LLM agent simulations. \textsc{CAMO} converts mechanistic hypotheses into computable factors grounded in simulation records and learns a compact causal representation centered on an emergent target $Y$. \textsc{CAMO} outputs a computable Markov boundary and a minimal upstream explanatory subgraph, yielding interpretable causal chains and actionable intervention levers. It also uses simulator-internal counterfactual probing to orient ambiguous edges and revise hypotheses when evidence contradicts the current view. Experiments across four emergent settings demonstrate the promise of \textsc{CAMO}.

AI.tldr: CAMO是一个从LLM智能体模拟的微观行为到宏观涌现的自动因果发现框架，通过将机制假设转化为可计算因素，学习以涌现目标为中心的紧凑因果表示，输出可计算的马尔可夫边界和最小上游解释子图。
AI.motivation: LLM赋能的智能体模拟越来越多地用于研究社会涌现现象，但宏观结果背后的微观到宏观因果机制往往不清晰。涌现源于智能体交互、中观层面反馈和非线性的交织，使得生成机制难以分离。
AI.method: CAMO将机制假设转化为基于模拟记录的可计算因素，学习以涌现目标Y为中心的紧凑因果表示。它输出可计算的马尔可夫边界和最小上游解释子图，提供可解释的因果链和可操作的干预杠杆。还使用模拟器内部反事实探测来定向模糊边，并在证据与当前观点矛盾时修正假设。
AI.result: 在四个涌现设置上的实验证明了CAMO的潜力。
AI.conclusion: CAMO框架为LLM智能体模拟中的微观到宏观涌现提供了自动化的因果发现方法，能够揭示复杂的因果机制并提供可解释的因果表示。

title: DeCoNav: Dialog enhanced Long-Horizon Collaborative Vision-Language Navigation
summary: Long-horizon collaborative vision-language navigation (VLN) is critical for multi-robot systems to accomplish complex tasks beyond the capability of a single agent. CoNavBench takes a first step by introducing the first collaborative long-horizon VLN benchmark with relay-style multi-robot tasks, a collaboration taxonomy, along with graph-grounded generation and evaluation to model handoffs and rendezvous in shared environments. However, existing benchmarks and evaluations often do not enforce strictly synchronized dual-robot rollout on a shared world timeline, and they typically rely on static coordination policies that cannot adapt when new cross-agent evidence emerges. We present Dialog enhanced Long-Horizon Collaborative Vision-Language Navigation (DeCoNav), a decentralized framework that couples event-triggered dialogue with dynamic task allocation and replanning for real-time, adaptive coordination. In DeCoNav, robots exchange compact semantic states via dialogue without a central controller. When informative events such as new evidence, uncertainty, or conflicts arise, dialogue is triggered to dynamically reassign subgoals and replan under synchronized execution. Implemented in DeCoNavBench with 1,213 tasks across 176 HM3D scenes, DeCoNav improves the both-success rate (BSR) by 69.2%, demonstrating the effectiveness of dialogue-driven, dynamically reallocated planning for multi-robot collaboration.

AI.tldr: DeCoNav是一个去中心化的长时程协作视觉语言导航框架，通过事件触发对话实现动态任务分配和重规划，在共享环境中提升多机器人协作效率。
AI.motivation: 现有协作导航基准和评估方法存在两个主要问题：1）缺乏严格同步的双机器人共享时间线执行；2）依赖静态协调策略，无法在出现新的跨智能体证据时进行自适应调整。这限制了多机器人系统在复杂长时程任务中的协作能力。
AI.method: DeCoNav采用去中心化框架，将事件触发对话与动态任务分配和重规划相结合。机器人通过对话交换紧凑的语义状态，无需中央控制器。当出现新证据、不确定性或冲突等信息性事件时，触发对话以动态重新分配子目标并在同步执行下重新规划。
AI.result: 在DeCoNavBench上实现，包含176个HM3D场景中的1,213个任务。DeCoNav将双成功率（BSR）提高了69.2%，证明了对话驱动、动态重分配规划在多机器人协作中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DeCoNav通过事件触发对话和动态任务分配机制，解决了现有协作导航系统在同步执行和自适应协调方面的局限性，显著提升了多机器人在长时程复杂任务中的协作性能。

title: ConfLayers: Adaptive Confidence-based Layer Skipping for Self-Speculative Decoding
summary: Self-speculative decoding is an inference technique for large language models designed to speed up generation without sacrificing output quality. It combines fast, approximate decoding using a compact version of the model as a draft model with selective re-evaluation by the full target model. Some existing methods form the draft model by dynamically learning which layers to skip during inference, effectively creating a smaller subnetwork to speed up computation. However, using heuristic-based approaches to select layers to skip can often be simpler and more effective. In this paper, we propose ConfLayers, a dynamic plug-and-play approach to forming the draft model in self-speculative decoding via confidence-based intermediate layer skipping. The process iteratively computes confidence scores for all layers, selects layers to skip based on an adaptive threshold, evaluates the performance of the resulting set, and updates the best selection until no further improvement is achieved or a maximum number of iterations is reached. This framework avoids the overhead and complexity of training a layer skipping policy and can provide more consistent speed-quality trade-offs while preserving the adaptivity of the draft model to diverse tasks and datasets. The performance evaluation of ConfLayers across different models and datasets shows that our novel approach offers up to 1.4x speedup over vanilla LLM generation.

AI.tldr: ConfLayers提出了一种基于置信度的动态层跳过方法，用于自推测解码中的草稿模型构建，无需训练即可实现1.4倍加速
AI.motivation: 现有自推测解码方法中，动态学习跳过层的草稿模型构建方法复杂且训练开销大，而启发式方法虽然简单但效果有限。需要一种既能保持自适应能力又无需训练开销的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出ConfLayers框架：迭代计算所有层的置信度分数，基于自适应阈值选择跳过层，评估性能并更新最佳选择，直到性能不再提升或达到最大迭代次数。这是一种即插即用的动态方法。
AI.result: 在不同模型和数据集上的性能评估显示，ConfLayers相比原始LLM生成实现了最高1.4倍的加速，同时保持了输出质量。
AI.conclusion: ConfLayers提供了一种无需训练层跳过策略的动态草稿模型构建方法，在保持自适应能力的同时实现了更一致的加速-质量权衡，简化了自推测解码的实现。

title: Towards Unconstrained Human-Object Interaction
comment: Accepted to the 20th IEEE International Conference on Automatic Face and Gesture Recognition (FG 2026)
summary: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection is a longstanding computer vision problem concerned with predicting the interaction between humans and objects. Current HOI models rely on a vocabulary of interactions at training and inference time, limiting their applicability to static environments. With the advent of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), it has become feasible to explore more flexible paradigms for interaction recognition. In this work, we revisit HOI detection through the lens of MLLMs and apply them to in-the-wild HOI detection. We define the Unconstrained HOI (U-HOI) task, a novel HOI domain that removes the requirement for a predefined list of interactions at both training and inference. We evaluate a range of MLLMs on this setting and introduce a pipeline that includes test-time inference and language-to-graph conversion to extract structured interactions from free-form text. Our findings highlight the limitations of current HOI detectors and the value of MLLMs for U-HOI. Code will be available at https://github.com/francescotonini/anyhoi

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了无约束人-物交互检测任务，利用多模态大语言模型在开放环境中识别人类与物体的交互，无需预定义交互词汇表。
AI.motivation: 传统人-物交互检测模型依赖预定义的交互词汇表，限制了其在动态开放环境中的应用。随着多模态大语言模型的发展，有必要探索更灵活的交互识别范式。
AI.method: 定义了无约束人-物交互检测任务，评估了多种多模态大语言模型在该任务上的表现，并提出了包含测试时推理和语言到图转换的流程，从自由文本中提取结构化交互信息。
AI.result: 研究结果揭示了当前人-物交互检测器的局限性，并证明了多模态大语言模型在无约束人-物交互检测中的价值。
AI.conclusion: 多模态大语言模型为无约束人-物交互检测提供了可行的解决方案，突破了传统方法对预定义交互词汇表的依赖，为开放环境中的交互识别开辟了新方向。

title: M2-PALE: A Framework for Explaining Multi-Agent MCTS--Minimax Hybrids via Process Mining and LLMs
summary: Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) is a fundamental sampling-based search algorithm widely used for online planning in sequential decision-making domains. Despite its success in driving recent advances in artificial intelligence, understanding the behavior of MCTS agents remains a challenge for both developers and users. This difficulty stems from the complex search trees produced through the simulation of numerous future states and their intricate relationships. A known weakness of standard MCTS is its reliance on highly selective tree construction, which may lead to the omission of crucial moves and a vulnerability to tactical traps. To resolve this, we incorporate shallow, full-width Minimax search into the rollout phase of multi-agent MCTS to enhance strategic depth. Furthermore, to demystify the resulting decision-making logic, we introduce \textsf{M2-PALE} (MCTS--Minimax Process-Aided Linguistic Explanations). This framework employs process mining techniques, specifically the Alpha Miner, iDHM, and Inductive Miner algorithms, to extract underlying behavioral workflows from agent execution traces. These process models are then synthesized by LLMs to generate human-readable causal and distal explanations. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach in a small-scale checkers environment, establishing a scalable foundation for interpreting hybrid agents in increasingly complex strategic domains.

AI.tldr: 将浅层完全宽度Minimax搜索集成到多智能体MCTS的rollout阶段以增强战略深度，并引入M2-PALE框架通过过程挖掘和LLM生成可解释的决策逻辑。
AI.motivation: MCTS作为在线规划算法在人工智能领域取得显著成功，但其复杂搜索树结构使得智能体行为难以理解，且标准MCTS依赖高度选择性树构建可能导致关键走法遗漏和战术陷阱脆弱性。
AI.method: 1) 在多智能体MCTS的rollout阶段集成浅层完全宽度Minimax搜索以增强战略深度；2) 提出M2-PALE框架，使用Alpha Miner、iDHM和Inductive Miner等过程挖掘算法从智能体执行轨迹中提取行为工作流，再通过LLM合成生成人类可读的因果和远端解释。
AI.result: 在小规模跳棋环境中验证了方法的有效性，为在日益复杂的战略领域中解释混合智能体建立了可扩展的基础。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合Minimax搜索增强MCTS的战略深度，并利用过程挖掘和LLM技术提供可解释的决策逻辑，为解决MCTS智能体行为理解难题提供了系统化框架。

title: Social Learning Strategies for Evolved Virtual Soft Robots
summary: Optimizing the body and brain of a robot is a coupled challenge: the morphology determines what control strategies are effective, while the control parameters influence how well the morphology performs. This joint optimization can be done through nested loops of evolutionary and learning processes, where the control parameters of each robot are learned independently. However, the control parameters learned by one robot may contain valuable information for others. Thus, we introduce a social learning approach in which robots can exploit optimized parameters from their peers to accelerate their own brain optimization. Within this framework, we systematically investigate how the selection of teachers, deciding which and how many robots to learn from, affects performance, experimenting with virtual soft robots in four tasks and environments. In particular, we study the effect of inheriting experience from morphologically similar robots due to the tightly coupled body and brain in robot optimization. Our results confirm the effectiveness of building on others' experience, as social learning clearly outperforms learning from scratch under equivalent computational budgets. In addition, while the optimal teacher selection strategy remains open, our findings suggest that incorporating knowledge from multiple teachers can yield more consistent and robust improvements.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种机器人形态与控制联合优化的社会学习方法，让机器人能够从同伴的经验中学习，加速大脑优化过程。
AI.motivation: 机器人形态与控制的联合优化是一个耦合挑战：形态决定有效控制策略，控制参数影响形态性能。传统嵌套进化学习方法中，每个机器人的控制参数独立学习，但一个机器人学到的参数可能对其他机器人有价值。
AI.method: 引入社会学习方法，机器人可以从同伴优化的参数中学习，加速自身大脑优化。系统研究了教师选择策略（选择哪些机器人、学习多少机器人）对性能的影响，在四个任务和环境中使用虚拟软体机器人进行实验，特别关注从形态相似机器人继承经验的效果。
AI.result: 社会学习方法在相同计算预算下明显优于从零开始学习。虽然最优教师选择策略仍有待探索，但研究发现从多个教师获取知识能产生更一致和稳健的改进。
AI.conclusion: 社会学习在机器人形态与控制联合优化中有效，机器人可以利用同伴经验加速优化过程。多教师知识整合能带来更稳定的性能提升，为机器人协同进化提供了新思路。

title: A Synonymous Variational Perspective on the Rate-Distortion-Perception Tradeoff
comment: 23 pages, 6 figures. This paper is submitted to the special issue on "Data Compression: Classical Theories Meet Modern Advances" of the IEEE Journal of Selected Areas in Information Theory (IEEE JSAIT)
summary: The fundamental limit of natural signal compression has traditionally been characterized by classical rate-distortion (RD) theory through the tradeoff between coding rate and reconstruction distortion, while the rate-distortion-perception (RDP) framework introduces a divergence-based measure of perceptual quality as a modeling principle rather than a theoretically-derived principle, leaving its theoretical origin unclear. In this paper, motivated by a synonymity-based semantic information perspective, we reformulate perceptual reconstruction as recovering any admissible sample within an ideal synonymous set (synset) associated with the source, rather than the source sample itself, and correspondingly establish a synonymous source coding architecture. On this basis, we develop a synonymous variational inference (SVI) analysis framework with a synonymous variational lower bound (SVLBO) for tractable analysis of synset-oriented compression. Within this framework, we establish a synonymity-perception consistency principle, showing that optimal identification of semantic information is theoretically consistent with perceptual optimization. Based on its derivation result, we prove a synonymous RDP tradeoff for the proposed synonymous source coding. These analytical results show that the distributional divergence term arises naturally from the synset-based reconstruction objective, clarify its compatibility with existing RDP formulations and classical RD theory, and suggest the potential advantages of synonymous source coding.

AI.tldr: 论文从语义信息视角重新定义感知重建，提出基于同义集（synset）的源编码架构，建立了同义变分推断分析框架，证明了同义率失真感知权衡，阐明了分布散度项的理论起源。
AI.motivation: 传统率失真理论仅关注编码率与重建失真之间的权衡，而率失真感知框架中的感知质量度量缺乏明确的理论基础。本文从同义性语义信息视角出发，旨在阐明感知重建的理论起源，建立更坚实的理论基础。
AI.method: 提出同义源编码架构，将感知重建重新定义为恢复源样本的理想同义集内的任何可接受样本。开发同义变分推断分析框架，包含同义变分下界用于可处理分析。建立同义性-感知一致性原则，证明语义信息最优识别与感知优化的理论一致性。
AI.result: 证明了所提同义源编码的同义率失真感知权衡。分析结果表明分布散度项自然源于基于同义集的重建目标，阐明了其与现有率失真感知框架和经典率失真理论的兼容性，并揭示了同义源编码的潜在优势。
AI.conclusion: 从同义性语义信息视角为感知重建提供了坚实的理论基础，阐明了率失真感知框架中分布散度项的理论起源，建立了同义性-感知一致性原则，证明了同义率失真感知权衡，为同义源编码提供了理论支撑。

title: OneHOI: Unifying Human-Object Interaction Generation and Editing
comment: Accepted at CVPR2026. This paper moves toward unifying HOI generation and editing within a single model
summary: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) modelling captures how humans act upon and relate to objects, typically expressed as <person, action, object> triplets. Existing approaches split into two disjoint families: HOI generation synthesises scenes from structured triplets and layout, but fails to integrate mixed conditions like HOI and object-only entities; and HOI editing modifies interactions via text, yet struggles to decouple pose from physical contact and scale to multiple interactions. We introduce OneHOI, a unified diffusion transformer framework that consolidates HOI generation and editing into a single conditional denoising process driven by shared structured interaction representations. At its core, the Relational Diffusion Transformer (R-DiT) models verb-mediated relations through role- and instance-aware HOI tokens, layout-based spatial Action Grounding, a Structured HOI Attention to enforce interaction topology, and HOI RoPE to disentangle multi-HOI scenes. Trained jointly with modality dropout on our HOI-Edit-44K, along with HOI and object-centric datasets, OneHOI supports layout-guided, layout-free, arbitrary-mask, and mixed-condition control, achieving state-of-the-art results across both HOI generation and editing. Code is available at https://jiuntian.github.io/OneHOI/.

AI.tldr: OneHOI是一个统一的扩散Transformer框架，将HOI生成和编辑整合到单个条件去噪过程中，通过关系扩散Transformer建模动词介导的关系，支持多种控制方式并达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有HOI方法存在局限性：HOI生成方法只能从结构化三元组和布局合成场景，无法整合混合条件（如HOI和仅对象实体）；HOI编辑方法通过文本修改交互，但难以解耦姿势与物理接触，且难以扩展到多个交互。需要统一的框架来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出OneHOI框架，核心是关系扩散Transformer（R-DiT），通过角色和实例感知的HOI token、基于布局的空间动作接地、结构化HOI注意力来强制交互拓扑、以及HOI RoPE来解耦多HOI场景。采用模态dropout在HOI-Edit-44K数据集上联合训练，支持布局引导、无布局、任意掩码和混合条件控制。
AI.result: 在HOI生成和编辑任务上都达到了最先进的性能，支持多种控制方式，包括布局引导、无布局、任意掩码和混合条件控制。
AI.conclusion: OneHOI成功地将HOI生成和编辑统一到一个框架中，通过结构化交互表示和关系扩散Transformer有效解决了现有方法的局限性，为人类-物体交互建模提供了更灵活和强大的解决方案。

title: From Kinematics to Dynamics: Learning to Refine Hybrid Plans for Physically Feasible Execution
summary: In many robotic tasks, agents must traverse a sequence of spatial regions to complete a mission. Such problems are inherently mixed discrete-continuous: a high-level action sequence and a physically feasible continuous trajectory. The resulting trajectory and action sequence must also satisfy problem constraints such as deadlines, time windows, and velocity or acceleration limits. While hybrid temporal planners attempt to address this challenge, they typically model motion using linear (first-order) dynamics, which cannot guarantee that the resulting plan respects the robot's true physical constraints. Consequently, even when the high-level action sequence is fixed, producing a dynamically feasible trajectory becomes a bi-level optimization problem. We address this problem via reinforcement learning in continuous space. We define a Markov Decision Process that explicitly incorporates analytical second-order constraints and use it to refine first-order plans generated by a hybrid planner. Our results show that this approach can reliably recover physical feasibility and effectively bridge the gap between a planner's initial first-order trajectory and the dynamics required for real execution.

AI.tldr: 使用强化学习在连续空间中解决混合离散-连续机器人任务，通过二阶约束精炼一阶规划器生成的轨迹
AI.motivation: 机器人任务中的混合离散-连续规划问题：高层动作序列需要与物理可行的连续轨迹结合，现有混合时序规划器通常使用一阶线性动力学模型，无法保证满足真实物理约束，导致即使高层动作序列固定，生成动态可行轨迹仍成为双层优化问题
AI.method: 定义包含解析二阶约束的马尔可夫决策过程，使用强化学习在连续空间中精炼混合规划器生成的一阶规划，将规划器初始的一阶轨迹与真实执行所需的动力学要求桥接起来
AI.result: 该方法能够可靠地恢复物理可行性，有效填补规划器初始一阶轨迹与实际执行所需动力学之间的差距
AI.conclusion: 通过强化学习结合二阶约束的方法，成功解决了混合离散-连续机器人任务中动态可行性问题，为真实物理约束下的轨迹规划提供了有效解决方案

title: CLion: Efficient Cautious Lion Optimizer with Enhanced Generalization
summary:
Lion optimizer is a popular learning-based optimization algorithm in machine learning, which shows impressive performance in training many deep learning models. Although convergence property of the Lion optimizer has been studied, its generalization analysis is still missing. To fill this gap, we study generalization property of the Lion via algorithmic stability based on the mathematical induction. Specifically, we prove that the Lion has a generalization error of $O(\frac{1}{Nτ^T})$, where $N$ is training sample size, and $τ>0$ denotes the smallest absolute value of non-zero element in gradient estimator, and $T$ is the total iteration number. In addition, we obtain an interesting byproduct that the SignSGD algorithm has the same generalization error as the Lion. To enhance generalization of the Lion, we design a novel efficient Cautious Lion (i.e., CLion) optimizer by cautiously using sign function. Moreover, we prove that our CLion has a lower generalization error of $O(\frac{1}{N})$ than $O(\frac{1}{Nτ^T})$ of the Lion, since the parameter $τ$ generally is very small. Meanwhile, we study convergence property of our CLion optimizer, and prove that our CLion has a fast convergence rate of $O(\frac{\sqrt{d}}{T^{1/4}})$ under $\ell_1$-norm of gradient for nonconvex stochastic optimization, where $d$ denotes the model dimension.
  Extensive numerical experiments demonstrate effectiveness of our CLion optimizer.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了Lion优化器的泛化性能，提出了具有更好泛化能力的CLion优化器，并证明了其理论优势。
AI.motivation: 虽然Lion优化器在训练深度学习模型方面表现出色，但其泛化分析仍然缺失。为了填补这一空白，本文旨在研究Lion优化器的泛化特性，并设计具有更好泛化性能的新优化器。
AI.method: 使用基于数学归纳法的算法稳定性来分析Lion优化器的泛化性能。设计了一种新颖的CLion优化器，通过谨慎使用符号函数来增强泛化能力。从理论上证明了CLion的泛化误差和收敛速率。
AI.result: 证明了Lion优化器的泛化误差为O(1/(Nτ^T))，其中τ是梯度估计器中非零元素的最小绝对值。发现SignSGD具有与Lion相同的泛化误差。提出的CLion优化器具有更低的泛化误差O(1/N)，并在非凸随机优化下具有O(√d/T^{1/4})的收敛速率。
AI.conclusion: CLion优化器在泛化性能上优于原始Lion优化器，具有更低的泛化误差和良好的收敛性能，数值实验验证了其有效性。

title: Free Geometry: Refining 3D Reconstruction from Longer Versions of Itself
summary: Feed-forward 3D reconstruction models are efficient but rigid: once trained, they perform inference in a zero-shot manner and cannot adapt to the test scene. As a result, visually plausible reconstructions often contain errors, particularly under occlusions, specularities, and ambiguous cues. To address this, we introduce Free Geometry, a framework that enables feed-forward 3D reconstruction models to self-evolve at test time without any 3D ground truth. Our key insight is that, when the model receives more views, it produces more reliable and view-consistent reconstructions. Leveraging this property, given a testing sequence, we mask a subset of frames to construct a self-supervised task. Free Geometry enforces cross-view feature consistency between representations from full and partial observations, while maintaining the pairwise relations implied by the held-out frames. This self-supervision allows for fast recalibration via lightweight LoRA updates, taking less than 2 minutes per dataset on a single GPU. Our approach consistently improves state-of-the-art foundation models, including Depth Anything 3 and VGGT, across 4 benchmark datasets, yielding an average improvement of 3.73% in camera pose accuracy and 2.88% in point map prediction. Code is available at https://github.com/hiteacherIamhumble/Free-Geometry .

AI.tldr: Free Geometry是一个让前馈3D重建模型在测试时自我演化的框架，通过自监督学习实现快速适应，无需3D真值数据
AI.motivation: 前馈3D重建模型在训练后以零样本方式推理，无法适应测试场景，导致在遮挡、镜面反射和模糊线索下产生错误。需要一种方法让模型在测试时自我改进。
AI.method: 基于"更多视角产生更可靠重建"的洞察，在测试序列中掩码部分帧构建自监督任务。通过强制完整观测和部分观测之间的跨视角特征一致性，同时保持被掩码帧的成对关系，实现快速LoRA微调。
AI.result: 在Depth Anything 3和VGGT等最先进基础模型上，在4个基准数据集上平均提升相机姿态精度3.73%，点云预测精度2.88%。单GPU上每个数据集更新耗时不到2分钟。
AI.conclusion: Free Geometry框架成功使前馈3D重建模型在测试时自我演化，通过自监督学习显著提升重建质量，为3D视觉系统提供了灵活高效的适应能力。

title: Acceptance Dynamics Across Cognitive Domains in Speculative Decoding
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates large language model (LLM) inference. It uses a small draft model to propose a tree of future tokens. A larger target model then verifies these tokens in a single batched forward pass. Despite the growing body of work on speculative methods, the degree to which the cognitive characteristics of a task affect acceptance probability remains largely unexplored. We present an empirical study of tree-based speculative decoding acceptance dynamics. Our study spans four well-established NLP benchmark domains: code generation, mathematical reasoning, logical reasoning, and open-ended chat. For this, we use TinyLlama-1.1B as the draft model against Llama-2-7B-Chat-GPTQ as the target. Over 99,768 speculative nodes collected from 200 prompts, we derive per-domain acceptance rates, expected accepted lengths, depth-acceptance profiles, and entropy-acceptance correlations. We find that task type is a stronger predictor of acceptance than tree depth. Furthermore, only the chat domain consistently yields an expected accepted length exceeding 1.0 token per step. We also show that the entropy-acceptance correlation is consistently negative but weak across all domains (rho in [-0.20, -0.15]). Counterintuitively, chat produces the highest entropy yet the highest acceptance rate. We attribute this divergence to the lexical predictability of RLHF-aligned register. These findings have direct implications for domain-aware speculation budgets and draft-model selection strategies. Index Terms--speculative decoding, large language model inference, tree attention, draft model, acceptance probability, LLM efficiency

AI.tldr: 该研究实证分析了树状推测解码在不同NLP任务中的接受率动态，发现任务类型比树深度更能预测接受概率，且只有聊天领域能稳定实现每步超过1个token的预期接受长度。
AI.motivation: 尽管推测解码方法日益增多，但任务认知特性对接受概率的影响程度仍未充分探索。本研究旨在通过实证分析树状推测解码在不同NLP任务中的接受动态，填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 使用TinyLlama-1.1B作为草稿模型，Llama-2-7B-Chat-GPTQ作为目标模型，在四个NLP基准领域（代码生成、数学推理、逻辑推理、开放聊天）收集99,768个推测节点，分析每领域接受率、预期接受长度、深度-接受分布和熵-接受相关性。
AI.result: 1) 任务类型比树深度更能预测接受概率；2) 只有聊天领域能稳定实现每步超过1个token的预期接受长度；3) 熵-接受相关性在所有领域均为负但较弱（rho在[-0.20, -0.15]之间）；4) 聊天领域熵最高但接受率也最高，这与RLHF对齐的词汇可预测性有关。
AI.conclusion: 任务认知特性显著影响推测解码性能，聊天领域因RLHF对齐的词汇可预测性而表现最佳。这些发现对领域感知的推测预算和草稿模型选择策略具有直接指导意义。

title: Designing for Error Recovery in Human-Robot Interaction
summary: This position paper looks briefly at the way we attempt to program robotic AI systems. Many AI systems are based on the idea of trying to improve the performance of one individual system to beyond so-called human baselines. However, these systems often look at one shot and one-way decisions, whereas the real world is more continuous and interactive. Humans, however, are often able to recover from and learn from errors - enabling a much higher rate of success. We look at the challenges of building a system that can detect/recover from its own errors, using the example of robotic nuclear gloveboxes as a use case to help illustrate examples. We then go on to talk about simple starting designs.

AI.tldr: 该立场论文探讨了当前机器人AI系统编程方法的局限性，提出需要构建能够检测和从错误中恢复的系统，并以核手套箱机器人为例说明
AI.motivation: 当前许多AI系统专注于将单个系统的性能提升到超越人类基准水平，但这些系统通常处理一次性、单向决策，而现实世界是连续且交互的。人类能够从错误中恢复和学习，从而实现更高的成功率，因此需要构建能够检测和从自身错误中恢复的机器人系统。
AI.method: 论文采用立场分析的方法，首先审视当前机器人AI编程的局限性，然后以核手套箱机器人为具体用例来阐述问题，最后提出简单的初始设计思路。
AI.result: 论文识别了构建能够检测和从错误中恢复的机器人系统所面临的挑战，并通过核手套箱机器人的实例具体说明了这些挑战，为后续系统设计提供了基础框架。
AI.conclusion: 需要从当前专注于超越人类基准的一次性决策系统转向能够检测和从错误中恢复的连续交互系统，这代表了机器人AI编程的重要范式转变，核手套箱机器人为此提供了有价值的应用场景。

title: Decoding the Delta: Unifying Remote Sensing Change Detection and Understanding with Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) excel in general vision-language tasks, their application to remote sensing change understanding is hindered by a fundamental "temporal blindness". Existing architectures lack intrinsic mechanisms for multi-temporal contrastive reasoning and struggle with precise spatial grounding. To address this, we first introduce Delta-QA, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 180k visual question-answering samples. Delta-QA unifies pixel-level segmentation and visual question answering across bi- and tri-temporal scenarios, structuring change interpretation into four progressive cognitive dimensions. Methodologically, we propose Delta-LLaVA, a novel MLLM framework explicitly tailored for multi-temporal remote sensing interpretation. It overcomes the limitations of naive feature concatenation through three core innovations: a Change-Enhanced Attention module that systematically isolates and amplifies visual differences, a Change-SEG module utilizing Change Prior Embedding to extract differentiable difference features as input for the LLM, and Local Causal Attention to prevent cross-temporal contextual leakage. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Delta-LLaVA decisively outperforms leading generalist MLLMs and specialized segmentation models in complex change deduction and high-precision boundary localization, establishing a unified framework for earth observation intelligence.

AI.tldr: Delta-LLaVA：针对多时相遥感变化理解的新型MLLM框架，通过Delta-QA基准和三个核心创新模块解决现有模型的"时间盲性"问题
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型在通用视觉语言任务表现出色，但在遥感变化理解中存在"时间盲性"问题，缺乏多时相对比推理的内在机制和精确的空间定位能力
AI.method: 1) 引入Delta-QA基准，包含18万个视觉问答样本，统一像素级分割和视觉问答；2) 提出Delta-LLaVA框架，包含三个核心模块：变化增强注意力模块、Change-SEG模块（使用变化先验嵌入提取可微分差异特征）、局部因果注意力模块
AI.result: Delta-LLaVA在复杂变化推理和高精度边界定位方面显著优于领先的通用MLLM和专用分割模型，建立了地球观测智能的统一框架
AI.conclusion: Delta-LLaVA通过专门设计的多时相遥感解释框架，有效解决了MLLM在变化理解中的"时间盲性"问题，为地球观测智能提供了统一的解决方案

title: HazardArena: Evaluating Semantic Safety in Vision-Language-Action Models
comment: Submitted to conference; 12 pages, 8 figures, including supplementary material
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models inherit rich world knowledge from vision-language backbones and acquire executable skills via action demonstrations. However, existing evaluations largely focus on action execution success, leaving action policies loosely coupled with visual-linguistic semantics. This decoupling exposes a systematic vulnerability whereby correct action execution may induce unsafe outcomes under semantic risk. To expose this vulnerability, we introduce HazardArena, a benchmark designed to evaluate semantic safety in VLAs under controlled yet risk-bearing contexts. HazardArena is constructed from safe/unsafe twin scenarios that share matched objects, layouts, and action requirements, differing only in the semantic context that determines whether an action is unsafe. We find that VLA models trained exclusively on safe scenarios often fail to behave safely when evaluated in their corresponding unsafe counterparts. HazardArena includes over 2,000 assets and 40 risk-sensitive tasks spanning 7 real-world risk categories grounded in established robotic safety standards. To mitigate this vulnerability, we propose a training-free Safety Option Layer that constrains action execution using semantic attributes or a vision-language judge, substantially reducing unsafe behaviors with minimal impact on task performance. We hope that HazardArena highlights the need to rethink how semantic safety is evaluated and enforced in VLAs as they scale toward real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了HazardArena基准测试，用于评估视觉-语言-动作模型在语义安全方面的系统性漏洞，发现仅用安全场景训练的模型在语义风险下会执行不安全行为，并提出无需训练的安全选项层进行缓解。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型评估主要关注动作执行成功率，但忽略了动作策略与视觉-语言语义的紧密耦合。这种解耦暴露了系统性漏洞：正确的动作执行可能在语义风险下导致不安全结果。需要评估和解决VLA模型在语义安全方面的脆弱性。
AI.method: 1) 构建HazardArena基准测试，包含安全/不安全双胞胎场景，这些场景共享相同的对象、布局和动作要求，仅在决定动作是否不安全的语义上下文上不同；2) 提出无需训练的安全选项层，通过语义属性或视觉-语言判断器约束动作执行。
AI.result: 1) 仅用安全场景训练的VLA模型在对应的不安全场景中经常无法安全行为；2) HazardArena包含2000多个资产和40个风险敏感任务，涵盖基于机器人安全标准的7个现实世界风险类别；3) 安全选项层显著减少了不安全行为，对任务性能影响最小。
AI.conclusion: HazardArena揭示了VLA模型在语义安全方面的系统性漏洞，强调了在VLA模型向现实世界部署扩展时，需要重新思考如何评估和执行语义安全。提出的安全选项层为缓解这一漏洞提供了有效方法。

title: D-BDM: A Direct and Efficient Boundary-Based Occupancy Grid Mapping Framework for LiDARs
summary: Efficient and scalable 3D occupancy mapping is essential for autonomous robot applications in unknown environments. However, traditional occupancy grid representations suffer from two fundamental limitations. First, explicitly storing all voxels in three-dimensional space leads to prohibitive memory consumption. Second, exhaustive ray casting incurs high update latency. A recent representation alleviate memory demands by maintaining only the voxels on the two-dimensional boundary, yet they still rely on full ray casting updates. This work advances the boundary-based framework with a highly efficient update scheme. We introduce a truncated ray casting strategy that restricts voxel traversal to the exterior of the boundary, which dramatically reduces the number of updated voxels. In addition, we propose a direct boundary update mechanism that removes the need for an auxiliary local 3D occupancy grid, further reducing memory usage and simplifying the map update pipeline. We name our framework as D-BDM. Extensive evaluations on public datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves significantly lower update time and reduced memory consumption compared with the baseline methods, as well as the prior boundary-based approach.

AI.tldr: D-BDM：一种高效的3D占据地图更新框架，通过截断射线投射和直接边界更新机制，显著降低内存消耗和更新延迟。
AI.motivation: 传统3D占据地图存在两个基本限制：1）显式存储所有体素导致内存消耗过高；2）完全射线投射更新带来高延迟。现有边界表示方法虽然缓解了内存问题，但仍依赖完全射线投射更新。
AI.method: 提出D-BDM框架：1）截断射线投射策略，将体素遍历限制在边界外部，大幅减少更新的体素数量；2）直接边界更新机制，无需辅助的局部3D占据网格，简化地图更新流程并进一步降低内存使用。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上的广泛评估表明，与基线方法和现有边界方法相比，D-BDM实现了显著更低的更新时间和减少的内存消耗。
AI.conclusion: D-BDM通过高效的截断射线投射和直接边界更新，为自主机器人在未知环境中的3D占据地图构建提供了更高效、可扩展的解决方案。

title: Learning step-level dynamic soaring in shear flow
summary: Dynamic soaring enables sustained flight by extracting energy from wind shear, yet it is commonly understood as a cycle-level maneuver that assumes stable flow conditions. In realistic unsteady environments, however, such assumptions are often violated, raising the question of whether explicit cycle-level planning is necessary. Here, we show that dynamic soaring can emerge from step-level, state-feedback control using only local sensing, without explicit trajectory planning. Using deep reinforcement learning as a tool, we obtain policies that achieve robust omnidirectional navigation across diverse shear-flow conditions. The learned behavior organizes into a structured control law that coordinates turning and vertical motion, giving rise to a two-phase strategy governed by a trade-off between energy extraction and directional progress. The resulting policy generalizes across varying conditions and reproduces key features observed in biological flight and optimal-control solutions. These findings identify a feedback-based control structure underlying dynamic soaring, demonstrating that efficient energy-harvesting flight can emerge from local interactions with the flow without explicit planning, and providing insights for biological flight and autonomous systems in complex, flow-coupled environments.

AI.tldr: 动态翱翔可以通过仅使用局部感知的状态反馈控制实现，无需显式轨迹规划，利用深度强化学习获得在多种剪切流条件下实现鲁棒全向导航的策略。
AI.motivation: 传统动态翱翔被视为需要稳定流条件的循环级机动，但在实际非稳态环境中这种假设常被违反，因此需要探究是否必须进行显式循环级规划。
AI.method: 使用深度强化学习作为工具，获得仅基于局部感知的状态反馈控制策略，学习在多样剪切流条件下的飞行控制。
AI.result: 学习到的行为组织成结构化控制律，协调转向和垂直运动，形成由能量提取与方向进展权衡支配的两阶段策略，该策略在不同条件下具有泛化能力，并再现了生物飞行和最优控制解的关键特征。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了动态翱翔的反馈控制结构，表明高效能量采集飞行可以通过与流动的局部相互作用而无需显式规划，为生物飞行和复杂流耦合环境中的自主系统提供了见解。

title: DEEP-GAP: Deep-learning Evaluation of Execution Parallelism in GPU Architectural Performance
comment: 16 pages, 42 figures. Evaluation of inference performance on NVIDIA T4 and L4 GPUs across precision modes (FP32, FP16, INT8)
summary:
Modern datacenters increasingly rely on low-power, single-slot inference accelerators to balance performance, energy efficiency, and rack density constraints. The NVIDIA T4 GPU has become widely deployed due to strong performance per watt and mature software support. Its successor, the NVIDIA L4 GPU, introduces improvements in Tensor Core throughput, cache capacity, memory bandwidth, and parallel execution capability. However, limited empirical evidence quantifies the practical inference performance gap between these two generations under controlled and reproducible conditions.
  This work introduces DEEP-GAP, a systematic evaluation extending the GDEV-AI methodology to GPU inference. Using identical configurations and workloads, we evaluate ResNet18, ResNet50, and ResNet101 across FP32, FP16, and INT8 precision modes using PyTorch and TensorRT.
  Results show that reduced precision significantly improves performance, with INT8 achieving up to 58x throughput improvement over CPU baselines. L4 achieves up to 4.4x higher throughput than T4 while reaching peak efficiency at smaller batch sizes between 16 and 32, improving latency-throughput tradeoffs for latency-sensitive workloads. T4 remains competitive for large batch workloads where cost or power efficiency is important.
  DEEP-GAP provides practical guidance for selecting precision modes, batch sizes, and GPU architectures for modern inference deployments.

AI.tldr: DEEP-GAP系统评估了NVIDIA T4与L4 GPU在推理性能上的差异，发现L4在吞吐量上可达T4的4.4倍，且在较小批次（16-32）达到峰值效率，适合延迟敏感应用；T4在大批次工作负载中仍具竞争力。
AI.motivation: 现代数据中心依赖低功耗单槽推理加速器平衡性能、能效和机架密度。虽然NVIDIA T4因性能功耗比和软件支持广泛部署，其继任者L4在Tensor Core吞吐量、缓存容量、内存带宽和并行执行能力方面有改进，但缺乏在受控可复现条件下量化两代GPU实际推理性能差距的实证证据。
AI.method: 引入DEEP-GAP系统评估框架，扩展GDEV-AI方法至GPU推理。在相同配置和工作负载下，使用PyTorch和TensorRT评估ResNet18、ResNet50和ResNet101在FP32、FP16和INT8精度模式下的性能。
AI.result: 降低精度显著提升性能，INT8相比CPU基线可达58倍吞吐量提升。L4吞吐量最高可达T4的4.4倍，在较小批次（16-32）达到峰值效率，改善延迟敏感工作负载的延迟-吞吐量权衡。T4在大批次工作负载中仍具竞争力，特别是在成本或能效重要时。
AI.conclusion: DEEP-GAP为现代推理部署提供了选择精度模式、批次大小和GPU架构的实用指导。L4在延迟敏感场景中表现优异，而T4在大批次工作负载中仍保持成本效益优势。

title: Targeted Exploration via Unified Entropy Control for Reinforcement Learning
comment: Accepted for publication in Findings of the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026)
summary: Recent advances in reinforcement learning (RL) have improved the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs). However, the widely used Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) consistently suffers from entropy collapse, causing the policy to converge prematurely and lose diversity. Existing exploration methods introduce additional bias or variance during exploration, making it difficult to maintain optimization stability. We propose Unified Entropy Control for Reinforcement Learning (UEC-RL), a framework that provides targeted mechanisms for exploration and stabilization. UEC-RL activates more exploration on difficult prompts to search for potential and valuable reasoning trajectories. In parallel, a stabilizer prevents entropy from growing uncontrollably, thereby keeping training stable as the model consolidates reliable behaviors. Together, these components expand the search space when needed while maintaining robust optimization throughout training. Experiments on both LLM and VLM reasoning tasks show consistent gains over RL baselines on both Pass@1 and Pass@$k$. On Geometry3K, UEC-RL achieves a 37.9\% relative improvement over GRPO, indicating that it sustains effective exploration without compromising convergence and underscoring UEC-RL as a key for scaling RL-based reasoning in large models. Our code is available at https://github.com/597358816/UEC-RL.

AI.tldr: UEC-RL框架通过统一熵控制解决强化学习中GRPO方法的熵崩溃问题，在需要时激活探索同时防止熵失控，在LLM和VLM推理任务上取得显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法如GRPO存在熵崩溃问题，导致策略过早收敛、失去多样性；现有探索方法引入额外偏差或方差，难以保持优化稳定性。
AI.method: 提出统一熵控制强化学习框架(UEC-RL)，包含两个核心组件：1) 在困难提示上激活更多探索以搜索潜在有价值的推理轨迹；2) 稳定器防止熵失控增长，在模型巩固可靠行为时保持训练稳定。
AI.result: 在LLM和VLM推理任务上，UEC-RL相比RL基线在Pass@1和Pass@k指标上均取得一致提升；在Geometry3K任务上相对GRPO获得37.9%的相对改进。
AI.conclusion: UEC-RL能够在不损害收敛性的情况下维持有效探索，是扩展基于强化学习的大型模型推理的关键技术。

title: Defining and Evaluation Method for External Human-Machine Interfaces
summary: As the number of fatalities involving Autonomous Vehicles increase, the need for a universal method of communicating between vehicles and other agents on the road has also increased. Over the past decade, numerous proposals of external Human-Machine Interfaces (eHMIs) have been brought forward with the purpose of bridging this communication gap, with none yet to be determined as the ideal one. This work proposes a universal evaluation method conformed of 223 questions to objectively evaluate and compare different proposals and arrive at a conclusion. The questionnaire is divided into 7 categories that evaluate different aspects of any given proposal that uses eHMIs: ease of standardization, cost effectiveness, accessibility, ease of understanding, multifacetedness in communication, positioning, and readability. In order to test the method it was used on four existing proposals, plus a baseline using only kinematic motions, in order to both exemplify the application of the evaluation method and offer a baseline score for future comparison. The result of this testing suggests that the ideal method of machine-human communication is a combination of intentionally-designed vehicle kinematics and distributed well-placed text-based displays, but it also reveals knowledge gaps in the readability of eHMIs and the speed at which different observers may learn their meaning. This paper proposes future work related to these uncertainties, along with future testing with the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 提出包含223个问题的通用评估方法，用于客观评价和比较自动驾驶车辆外部人机界面（eHMIs）设计方案，并通过测试四个现有方案验证该方法。
AI.motivation: 随着自动驾驶车辆事故增加，需要建立车辆与道路其他参与者之间的通用通信方法。现有多种外部人机界面提案，但缺乏客观评估标准来确定最佳方案。
AI.method: 开发包含223个问题的问卷评估方法，分为7个类别：标准化便利性、成本效益、可访问性、易理解性、通信多面性、定位和可读性。使用该方法测试四个现有eHMI提案和仅使用运动学运动的基线方案。
AI.result: 测试结果表明，理想的机器-人类通信方法是精心设计的车辆运动学与分布式、位置合理的文本显示相结合。同时揭示了eHMIs可读性方面的知识空白，以及不同观察者学习其含义的速度差异。
AI.conclusion: 提出通用评估方法可用于客观比较eHMI提案，发现最佳通信方案是运动学与文本显示的结合。未来工作需要解决可读性不确定性和学习速度差异问题，并继续使用该方法进行测试。

title: VeriGraphi: A Multi-Agent Framework of Hierarchical RTL Generation for Large Hardware Designs
summary: Generating synthesizable Verilog for large, hierarchical hardware designs remains a significant challenge for large language models (LLMs), which struggle to replicate the structured reasoning that human experts employ when translating complex specifications into RTL. When tasked with producing hierarchical Verilog, LLMs frequently lose context across modules, hallucinate interfaces, fabricate inter-module wiring, and fail to maintain structural coherence - failures that intensify as design complexity grows and specifications involve informal prose, figures, and tables that resist direct operationalization. To address these challenges, we present VeriGraphi, a framework that introduces a spec-anchored Knowledge Graph as the architectural substrate driving the RTL generation pipeline. VeriGraphi constructs a HDA, a structured knowledge graph that explicitly encodes module hierarchy, port-level interfaces, wiring semantics, and inter-module dependencies as first-class graph entities and relations. Built through iterative multi-agent analysis of the specification, this Knowledge Graph provides a deterministic, machine-checkable structural scaffold before code generation. Guided by the KG, a progressive coding module incrementally generates pseudo-code and synthesizable RTL while enforcing interface consistency and dependency correctness at each submodule stage. We evaluate VeriGraphi on a benchmark of three representative specification documents from the National Institute of Standards and Technology and their corresponding implementations, and we present a RV32I processor as a detailed case study to illustrate the full pipeline. The results demonstrate that VeriGraphi enables reliable hierarchical RTL generation with minimal human intervention for RISC-V, marking a significant milestone for LLM-generated hardware design while maintaining strong functional correctness.

AI.tldr: VeriGraphi：基于知识图谱的层次化Verilog生成框架，通过构建结构化知识图谱来指导LLM生成可综合的RTL代码，解决LLM在复杂硬件设计中上下文丢失、接口幻觉等问题。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在生成层次化Verilog时面临重大挑战：随着设计复杂度增加，LLM经常丢失模块间上下文、产生接口幻觉、虚构模块间连线，并无法保持结构一致性。当规范包含非正式文本、图表和表格时，这些问题更加严重。
AI.method: 提出VeriGraphi框架，引入规范锚定的知识图谱作为RTL生成管道的架构基板。构建HDA（层次化设计架构）知识图谱，显式编码模块层次结构、端口级接口、连线语义和模块间依赖关系。通过多智能体迭代分析规范构建知识图谱，然后基于KG指导渐进式编码模块逐步生成伪代码和可综合RTL，并在每个子模块阶段强制保持接口一致性和依赖正确性。
AI.result: 在NIST的三个代表性规范文档及其对应实现上进行评估，并以RV32I处理器作为详细案例研究展示完整流程。结果表明VeriGraphi能够以最少的人工干预为RISC-V实现可靠的层次化RTL生成，在保持强功能正确性的同时，标志着LLM生成硬件设计的重大里程碑。
AI.conclusion: VeriGraphi通过知识图谱驱动的结构化方法，有效解决了LLM在复杂硬件设计中的局限性，实现了可靠的层次化RTL生成，为自动化硬件设计提供了新范式。

title: Depth-Aware Image and Video Orientation Estimation
summary: This paper introduces a novel approach for image and video orientation estimation by leveraging depth distribution in natural images. The proposed method estimates the orientation based on the depth distribution across different quadrants of the image, providing a robust framework for orientation estimation suited for applications such as virtual reality (VR), augmented reality (AR), autonomous navigation, and interactive surveillance systems. To further enhance fine-scale perceptual alignment, we incorporate depth gradient consistency (DGC) and horizontal symmetry analysis (HSA), enabling precise orientation correction. This hybrid strategy effectively exploits depth cues to support spatial coherence and perceptual stability in immersive visual content. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate the robustness and accuracy of the proposed approach, outperforming existing techniques across diverse scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出基于深度分布估计图像和视频方向的新方法，通过分析图像不同象限的深度分布进行方向估计，结合深度梯度一致性和水平对称性分析增强感知对齐
AI.motivation: 为虚拟现实、增强现实、自主导航和交互式监控系统等应用提供鲁棒的图像/视频方向估计框架，解决现有技术在方向估计方面的不足
AI.method: 基于深度分布的方向估计方法，分析图像不同象限的深度分布，结合深度梯度一致性（DGC）和水平对称性分析（HSA）进行精细尺度感知对齐
AI.result: 定性和定量评估表明该方法具有鲁棒性和准确性，在多样化场景中优于现有技术
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合策略有效利用深度线索支持空间一致性和感知稳定性，为沉浸式视觉内容提供精确的方向估计解决方案

title: Asymptotically Stable Gait Generation and Instantaneous Walkability Determination for Planar Almost Linear Biped with Knees
comment: Accepted for presentation at the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2026. This version includes a correction to a typographical error in one equation
summary: A class of planar bipedal robots with unique mechanical properties has been proposed, where all links are balanced around the hip joint, preventing natural swinging motion due to gravity. A common property of their equations of motion is that the inertia matrix is a constant matrix, there are no nonlinear velocity terms, and the gravity term contains simple nonlinear terms. By performing a Taylor expansion of the gravity term and making a linear approximation, it is easy to derive a linearized model, and calculations for future states or walkability determination can be performed instantaneously without the need for numerical integration. This paper extends the method to a planar biped robot model with knees. First, we derive the equations of motion, constraint conditions, and inelastic collisions for a planar 6-DOF biped robot, design its control system, and numerically generate a stable bipedal gait on a horizontal plane. Next, we reduce the equations of motion to a 3-DOF model, and derive a linearized model by approximating the gravity term as linear around the expansion point for the thigh frame angle. Through numerical simulations, we demonstrate that calculations for future states and walkability determination can be completed in negligible time. By applying control inputs to the obtained model, performing state-space realization, and then discretizing it, instantaneous walkability determination through iterative calculation becomes possible. Through detailed gait analysis, we discuss how the knee joint flexion angle and the expansion point affect the accuracy of the linear approximation, and the issues that arise when descending a small step.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种针对具有平衡连杆的平面双足机器人（包括膝关节）的线性化建模方法，通过近似重力项实现瞬时步态分析和行走能力判断。
AI.motivation: 针对一类具有特殊机械特性的平面双足机器人（所有连杆围绕髋关节平衡），其运动方程具有惯性矩阵恒定、无非线性速度项的特点。传统方法需要数值积分计算未来状态，而本文旨在开发一种线性化模型，实现瞬时计算未来状态和行走能力判断，并将该方法扩展到带膝关节的模型。
AI.method: 1. 推导平面6自由度双足机器人的运动方程、约束条件和非弹性碰撞模型，设计控制系统并在水平面上数值生成稳定步态。2. 将运动方程简化为3自由度模型，通过对大腿框架角度的展开点进行重力项的线性近似，推导线性化模型。3. 对获得的模型施加控制输入，进行状态空间实现并离散化，实现通过迭代计算的瞬时行走能力判断。
AI.result: 通过数值仿真验证，未来状态计算和行走能力判断可在可忽略的时间内完成。详细步态分析表明：膝关节屈曲角度和展开点影响线性近似的精度，下小台阶时会出现特定问题。
AI.conclusion: 成功将线性化建模方法扩展到带膝关节的平面双足机器人，实现了瞬时步态分析和行走能力判断。该方法为实时步态规划和控制提供了有效工具，但需要注意膝关节角度和展开点选择对近似精度的影响，以及下台阶时的特殊挑战。

title: VoxSafeBench: Not Just What Is Said, but Who, How, and Where
summary: As speech language models (SLMs) transition from personal devices into shared, multi-user environments, their responses must account for far more than the words alone. Who is speaking, how they sound, and where the conversation takes place can each turn an otherwise benign request into one that is unsafe, unfair, or privacy-violating. Existing benchmarks, however, largely focus on basic audio comprehension, study individual risks in isolation, or conflate content that is inherently harmful with content that only becomes problematic due to its acoustic context. We introduce VoxSafeBench, among the first benchmarks to jointly evaluate social alignment in SLMs across three dimensions: safety, fairness, and privacy. VoxSafeBench adopts a Two-Tier design: Tier1 evaluates content-centric risks using matched text and audio inputs, while Tier2 targets audio-conditioned risks in which the transcript is benign but the appropriate response hinges on the speaker, paralinguistic cues, or the surrounding environment. To validate Tier2, we include intermediate perception probes and confirm that frontier SLMs can successfully detect these acoustic cues yet still fail to act on them appropriately. Across 22 tasks with bilingual coverage, we find that safeguards appearing robust on text often degrade in speech: safety awareness drops for speaker- and scene-conditioned risks, fairness erodes when demographic differences are conveyed vocally, and privacy protections falter when contextual cues arrive acoustically. Together, these results expose a pervasive speech grounding gap: current SLMs frequently recognize the relevant social norm in text but fail to apply it when the decisive cue must be grounded in speech. Code and data are publicly available at: https://amphionteam.github.io/VoxSafeBench_demopage/

AI.tldr: VoxSafeBench是一个评估语音语言模型在社会对齐方面的基准测试，涵盖安全性、公平性和隐私三个维度，采用双层设计区分内容风险和音频条件风险，揭示了当前SLMs在语音接地方面存在显著差距。
AI.motivation: 随着语音语言模型从个人设备扩展到共享的多用户环境，其响应需要考虑更多因素：说话者身份、声音特征和对话环境。现有基准测试主要关注基本音频理解能力，孤立研究个体风险，或将固有有害内容与因声学上下文而变得有问题的内容混为一谈。需要开发一个能联合评估SLMs在社会对齐多个维度表现的基准测试。
AI.method: 提出VoxSafeBench基准测试，采用双层设计：Tier1评估内容中心风险，使用匹配的文本和音频输入；Tier2评估音频条件风险，其中转录文本是良性的，但适当响应取决于说话者、副语言线索或环境。包含22个双语任务，并通过中间感知探针验证Tier2的有效性。
AI.result: 研究发现：1) 在文本上看似稳健的安全措施在语音中常常退化；2) 安全意识在说话者和场景条件风险中下降；3) 当人口统计差异通过声音传达时，公平性受到侵蚀；4) 当上下文线索以声学方式到达时，隐私保护失效。前沿SLMs能够成功检测这些声学线索，但仍无法适当采取行动。
AI.conclusion: 当前语音语言模型存在普遍的语音接地差距：它们经常能在文本中识别相关社会规范，但当决定性线索必须基于语音时却无法应用。这暴露了SLMs在将声学上下文与社会对齐要求相结合方面的系统性弱点，需要更强大的语音接地能力。

title: Remote Sensing Image Super-Resolution for Imbalanced Textures: A Texture-Aware Diffusion Framework
summary: Generative diffusion priors have recently achieved state-of-the-art performance in natural image super-resolution, demonstrating a powerful capability to synthesize photorealistic details. However, their direct application to remote sensing image super-resolution (RSISR) reveals significant shortcomings. Unlike natural images, remote sensing images exhibit a unique texture distribution where ground objects are globally stochastic yet locally clustered, leading to highly imbalanced textures. This imbalance severely hinders the model's spatial perception. To address this, we propose TexADiff, a novel framework that begins by estimating a Relative Texture Density Map (RTDM) to represent the texture distribution. TexADiff then leverages this RTDM in three synergistic ways: as an explicit spatial conditioning to guide the diffusion process, as a loss modulation term to prioritize texture-rich regions, and as a dynamic adapter for the sampling schedule. These modifications are designed to endow the model with explicit texture-aware capabilities. Experiments demonstrate that TexADiff achieves superior or competitive quantitative metrics. Furthermore, qualitative results show that our model generates faithful high-frequency details while effectively suppressing texture hallucinations. This improved reconstruction quality also results in significant gains in downstream task performance. The source code of our method can be found at https://github.com/ZezFuture/TexAdiff.

AI.tldr: TexADiff是一个针对遥感图像超分辨率的纹理感知扩散框架，通过相对纹理密度图来引导扩散过程，解决遥感图像纹理分布不平衡的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有生成扩散先验在自然图像超分辨率中表现优异，但直接应用于遥感图像超分辨率时存在显著不足。遥感图像具有独特的纹理分布特征：地面物体全局随机但局部聚集，导致高度不平衡的纹理分布，严重阻碍模型的空间感知能力。
AI.method: 提出TexADiff框架：1) 估计相对纹理密度图(RTDM)来表示纹理分布；2) 将RTDM作为显式空间条件引导扩散过程；3) 作为损失调制项优先处理纹理丰富区域；4) 作为采样计划的动态适配器。这些修改赋予模型显式的纹理感知能力。
AI.result: TexADiff在定量指标上达到优越或竞争性结果。定性结果显示模型能够生成忠实的高频细节，同时有效抑制纹理幻觉。改进的重建质量还带来了下游任务性能的显著提升。
AI.conclusion: TexADiff通过纹理感知的扩散框架成功解决了遥感图像超分辨率中的纹理不平衡问题，实现了更高质量的图像重建和更好的下游任务性能，为遥感图像处理提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Learning to Draw ASCII Improves Spatial Reasoning in Language Models
summary: When faced with complex spatial problems, humans naturally sketch layouts to organize their thinking, and the act of drawing further sharpens their understanding. In this work, we ask whether a similar principle holds for Large Language Models (LLMs): can learning to construct explicit visual layouts from spatial descriptions instill genuine spatial understanding? We introduce Text2Space, a dataset that pairs natural language descriptions with ground-truth ASCII grid layouts and spatial QA pairs, enabling us to separate failures in constructing spatial representations from failures in reasoning over them. We adopt ASCII because it is human-readable, operates entirely within the token space of language models, and encodes spatial relations in a structurally verifiable form. Our evaluation reveals a pronounced "Read-Write Asymmetry": LLMs interpret ASCII representations effectively but struggle to produce them from text, and these construction errors propagate to incorrect answers downstream. To address this limitation, we train models on layout construction (Text$\rightarrow$ASCII) and find that it significantly improves spatial reasoning from text alone, even without producing any ASCII at inference time. Combining construction with comprehension training further amplifies these gains. Crucially, these improvements transfer to three external spatial reasoning benchmarks, demonstrating that, much as sketching sharpens human spatial thinking, learning to construct explicit layouts instills spatial understanding that generalizes beyond the training format.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Text2Space数据集，研究LLMs通过构建ASCII网格布局来学习空间理解的能力，发现"读写不对称"现象，并通过布局构建训练提升空间推理能力
AI.motivation: 受人类通过绘制草图来组织和深化空间理解的启发，研究是否可以通过让大语言模型学习构建显式视觉布局来培养真正的空间理解能力
AI.method: 引入Text2Space数据集，包含自然语言描述、真实ASCII网格布局和空间问答对；采用ASCII表示法，因为它可读、在语言模型token空间内操作且结构可验证；训练模型进行布局构建（文本→ASCII）和空间推理
AI.result: 发现明显的"读写不对称"：LLMs能有效解释ASCII表示但难以从文本生成它们；布局构建训练显著改善了仅从文本的空间推理能力；构建与理解训练结合进一步放大效果；这些改进能迁移到三个外部空间推理基准测试
AI.conclusion: 正如草图绘制能增强人类空间思维一样，学习构建显式布局能培养超越训练格式的空间理解能力，为提升LLMs空间推理提供新途径

title: Predicting Post-Traumatic Epilepsy from Clinical Records using Large Language Model Embeddings
summary: Objective: Post-traumatic epilepsy (PTE) is a debilitating neurological disorder that develops after traumatic brain injury (TBI). Early prediction of PTE remains challenging due to heterogeneous clinical data, limited positive cases, and reliance on resource-intensive neuroimaging data. We investigate whether routinely collected acute clinical records alone can support early PTE prediction using language model-based approaches. Methods: Using a curated subset of the TRACK-TBI cohort, we developed an automated PTE prediction framework that implements pretrained large language models (LLMs) as fixed feature extractors to encode clinical records. Tabular features, LLM-generated embeddings, and hybrid feature representations were evaluated using gradient-boosted tree classifiers under stratified cross-validation. Results: LLM embeddings achieved performance improvements by capturing contextual clinical information compared to using tabular features alone. The best performance was achieved by a modality-aware feature fusion strategy combining tabular features and LLM embeddings, achieving an AUC-ROC of 0.892 and AUPRC of 0.798. Acute post-traumatic seizures, injury severity, neurosurgical intervention, and ICU stay are key contributors to the predictive performance. Significance: These findings demonstrate that routine acute clinical records contain information suitable for early PTE risk prediction using LLM embeddings in conjunction with gradient-boosted tree classifiers. This approach represents a promising complement to imaging-based prediction.

AI.tldr: 使用预训练大语言模型编码临床记录，结合梯度提升树分类器，实现创伤后癫痫的早期预测，AUC-ROC达0.892
AI.motivation: 创伤后癫痫（PTE）是创伤性脑损伤后的严重并发症，早期预测面临临床数据异质性、阳性病例有限、依赖资源密集型神经影像数据等挑战。研究探索常规收集的急性临床记录是否能够支持早期PTE预测。
AI.method: 使用TRACK-TBI队列的精选子集，开发自动化PTE预测框架：1）将预训练大语言模型（LLMs）作为固定特征提取器编码临床记录；2）评估表格特征、LLM生成嵌入和混合特征表示；3）在分层交叉验证下使用梯度提升树分类器进行预测。
AI.result: LLM嵌入通过捕捉上下文临床信息，相比单独使用表格特征实现了性能提升。最佳性能通过模态感知特征融合策略实现，结合表格特征和LLM嵌入，AUC-ROC达0.892，AUPRC达0.798。急性创伤后癫痫发作、损伤严重程度、神经外科干预和ICU住院是关键预测因素。
AI.conclusion: 常规急性临床记录包含适合早期PTE风险预测的信息，使用LLM嵌入结合梯度提升树分类器的方法具有临床应用潜力，可作为影像学预测的有力补充。

title: Reward Design for Physical Reasoning in Vision-Language Models
summary: Physical reasoning over visual inputs demands tight integration of visual perception, domain knowledge, and multi-step symbolic inference. Yet even state-of-the-art Vision Language Models (VLMs) fall far short of human performance on physics benchmarks. While post-training algorithms such as Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) have demonstrated strong reasoning gains in language models, how reward design shapes VLM physical reasoning behavior remains poorly understood. We present a systematic reward ablation study for GRPO-based VLM training on physical reasoning. We compare four reward signals of increasing semantic richness: format compliance, answer accuracy, a composite rubric reward (answer correctness, physics principle identification, and unit consistency), and a novel internal reward derived from model attention weights over input image regions. We evaluate on PhyX, a 3,000-problem benchmark spanning six physics domains and six reasoning types across multiple-choice and open-ended formats, using IBM Granite Vision 3.3 (2B). Across both formats, GRPO with accuracy-based rewards outperforms SFT on most domains, though gains vary substantially by reward type and domain. Reward design does not uniformly improve performance. Instead, it induces domain-specific reasoning behaviors. Accuracy-based rewards provide the strongest overall gains. Rubric rewards improve structured reasoning quality without consistent accuracy improvements. Attention-based rewards enhance spatial reasoning while degrading performance in symbolic domains. Our internal attention-weight reward requires no spatial annotations and improves spatial relation accuracy from 0.27 to 0.50, suggesting that supervising where the model attends during generation is a promising direction for visually grounded physical reasoning.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统研究了不同奖励信号对基于GRPO的视觉语言模型物理推理训练的影响，发现奖励设计会诱导领域特定的推理行为，而非统一提升性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管监督微调（SFT）和组相对策略优化（GRPO）等后训练算法在语言模型中显示出强大的推理增益，但奖励设计如何影响视觉语言模型的物理推理行为仍不清楚。当前最先进的视觉语言模型在物理基准测试上仍远低于人类表现。
AI.method: 采用系统奖励消融研究，比较四种语义丰富度递增的奖励信号：格式合规性、答案准确性、复合评分奖励（答案正确性、物理原理识别和单位一致性），以及基于模型对输入图像区域注意力权重的新型内部奖励。在PhyX基准（3000个问题，涵盖六个物理领域和六种推理类型）上使用IBM Granite Vision 3.3（2B）模型进行评估。
AI.result: 基于准确性的奖励在大多数领域上优于SFT，但增益因奖励类型和领域而异。奖励设计不会统一提升性能，而是诱导领域特定的推理行为：准确性奖励提供最强整体增益；评分奖励提高结构化推理质量但无一致准确性改进；注意力奖励增强空间推理但降低符号领域性能；内部注意力权重奖励无需空间标注，将空间关系准确性从0.27提升至0.50。
AI.conclusion: 奖励设计对视觉语言模型的物理推理行为具有领域特异性影响，监督模型在生成过程中的注意力位置是视觉基础物理推理的有前景方向。基于注意力的内部奖励在无需空间标注的情况下显著提升了空间推理能力。

title: Fact4ac at the Financial Misinformation Detection Challenge Task: Reference-Free Financial Misinformation Detection via Fine-Tuning and Few-Shot Prompting of Large Language Models
summary: The proliferation of financial misinformation poses a severe threat to market stability and investor trust, misleading market behavior and creating critical information asymmetry. Detecting such misleading narratives is inherently challenging, particularly in real-world scenarios where external evidence or supplementary references for cross-verification are strictly unavailable. This paper presents our winning methodology for the "Reference-Free Financial Misinformation Detection" shared task. Built upon the recently proposed RFC-BENCH framework (Jiang et al. 2026), this task challenges models to determine the veracity of financial claims by relying solely on internal semantic understanding and contextual consistency, rather than external fact-checking. To address this formidable evaluation setup, we propose a comprehensive framework that capitalizes on the reasoning capabilities of state-of-the-art Large Language Models (LLMs). Our approach systematically integrates in-context learning, specifically zero-shot and few-shot prompting strategies, with Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) via Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) to optimally align the models with the subtle linguistic cues of financial manipulation. Our proposed system demonstrated superior efficacy, successfully securing the first-place ranking on both official leaderboards. Specifically, we achieved an accuracy of 95.4% on the public test set and 96.3% on the private test set, highlighting the robustness of our method and contributing to the acceleration of context-aware misinformation detection in financial Natural Language Processing. Our models (14B and 32B) are available at https://huggingface.co/KaiNKaiho.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型的参考无关金融虚假信息检测方法，在RFC-BENCH框架的共享任务中取得了第一名，准确率超过95%
AI.motivation: 金融虚假信息泛滥严重威胁市场稳定和投资者信任，导致市场行为误导和信息不对称。在现实场景中，由于缺乏外部证据或参考信息进行交叉验证，检测这类误导性叙述具有极大挑战性。
AI.method: 提出一个综合框架，利用最先进大语言模型的推理能力。系统性地整合上下文学习（零样本和少样本提示策略）与参数高效微调（通过LoRA低秩适应），使模型能够最优地捕捉金融操纵的微妙语言线索。
AI.result: 在官方排行榜上获得第一名：公开测试集准确率95.4%，私有测试集准确率96.3%。模型（14B和32B参数版本）已在HuggingFace平台公开。
AI.conclusion: 该方法展示了基于大语言模型的参考无关金融虚假信息检测的有效性，为金融自然语言处理中上下文感知的虚假信息检测提供了加速方案。

title: Robotic Nanoparticle Synthesis via Solution-based Processes
summary: We present a screw geometry-based manipulation planning framework for the robotic automation of solution-based synthesis, exemplified through the preparation of gold and magnetite nanoparticles. The synthesis protocols are inherently long-horizon, multi-step tasks, requiring skills such as pick-and-place, pouring, turning a knob, and periodic visual inspection to detect reaction completion. A central challenge is that some skills, notably pouring, transferring containers with solutions, and turning a knob, impose geometric and kinematic constraints on the end-effector motion. To address this, we use a programming by demonstration paradigm where the constraints can be extracted from a single demonstration. This combination of screw-based motion representation and demonstration-driven specification enables domain experts, such as chemists, to readily adapt and reprogram the system for new experimental protocols and laboratory setups without requiring expertise in robotics or motion planning. We extract sequences of constant screws from demonstrations, which compactly encode the motion constraints while remaining coordinate-invariant. This representation enables robust generalization across variations in grasp placement and allows parameterized reuse of a skill learned from a single example. By composing these screw-parameterized primitives according to the synthesis protocol, the robot autonomously generates motion plans that execute the complete experiment over repeated runs. Our results highlight that screw-theoretic planning, combined with programming by demonstration, provides a rigorous and generalizable foundation for long-horizon laboratory automation, thereby enabling fundamental kinematics to have a translational impact on the use of robots in developing scalable solution-based synthesis protocols.

AI.tldr: 基于螺旋几何的机器人操作规划框架，用于溶液合成自动化，通过演示提取运动约束，实现长时程多步骤实验的自主执行
AI.motivation: 解决溶液合成（如金和磁铁矿纳米颗粒制备）中长时程多步骤任务的机器人自动化问题，这些任务涉及拾取放置、倾倒、旋钮转动和周期性视觉检查等技能，其中某些技能对末端执行器运动施加了几何和运动学约束
AI.method: 采用基于螺旋几何的运动表示和演示编程范式：从单次演示中提取恒定螺旋序列，紧凑编码运动约束并保持坐标不变性；通过组合这些螺旋参数化的基元，机器人自主生成执行完整实验的运动计划
AI.result: 该框架能够稳健地泛化到抓取位置变化，允许从单个示例学习的技能进行参数化重用，使机器人能够自主执行完整的实验协议，为长时程实验室自动化提供了严谨且可泛化的基础
AI.conclusion: 螺旋理论规划与演示编程相结合，为基础运动学在机器人开发可扩展溶液合成协议中的应用提供了严谨且可泛化的基础，使领域专家能够轻松适应和重新编程系统，无需机器人学或运动规划专业知识

title: An unsupervised decision-support framework for multivariate biomarker analysis in athlete monitoring
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables, submitted to Springer Nature Scientific Reports
summary: Purpose. Athlete monitoring is constrained by small cohorts, heterogeneous biomarker scales, limited feasibility of repeated sampling, and the lack of reliable injury ground truth. These limitations reduce the interpretability and utility of traditional univariate and binary risk models. This study addresses these challenges by proposing an unsupervised multivariate framework to identify latent physiological states in athletes using real data. Methods.
