We propose a modular computational framework that operates in the joint biomarker space, integrating preprocessing, clinical safety screening, unsupervised clustering, and centroid-based physiological interpretation. Profiles are learned exclusively from amateur soccer players during a competitive microcycle. Synthetic data augmentation evaluates robustness and scalability. Ward hierarchical clustering supports monitoring and etiological differentiation, while Gaussian Mixture Models (GMM) enable structural stability analysis in high-dimensional settings. Results. The framework identifies coherent profiles that distinguish mechanical damage from metabolic stress while preserving homeostatic states. Synthetic data augmentation demonstrates feasibility and detection of latent silent risk phenotypes typically missed by univariate monitoring. Structural analyses indicate robustness under augmentation and higher-dimensional settings. Conclusion. The framework enables interpretable identification of latent physiological states from multivariate biomarker data without injury labels. By distinguishing mechanisms and revealing silent risk patterns not captured by conventional monitoring, it provides actionable insights for individualized athlete monitoring and decision making.

AI.tldr: 提出无监督多元框架，从运动员生物标志物数据中识别潜在生理状态，无需损伤标签，区分机械损伤与代谢应激，发现传统监测遗漏的沉默风险表型。
AI.motivation: 运动员监测面临小样本、异质生物标志物尺度、重复采样可行性有限以及缺乏可靠损伤真实标签等限制，这些因素降低了传统单变量和二元风险模型的解释性和实用性。
AI.method: 提出模块化计算框架，在联合生物标志物空间中操作，集成预处理、临床安全筛查、无监督聚类和基于质心的生理解释。使用业余足球运动员在竞争性微周期中的数据学习特征。采用合成数据增强评估鲁棒性和可扩展性，Ward层次聚类支持监测和病因学区分，高斯混合模型支持高维设置下的结构稳定性分析。
AI.result: 框架识别出区分机械损伤与代谢应激的连贯特征，同时保持稳态状态。合成数据增强证明了可行性，并检测到通常被单变量监测遗漏的潜在沉默风险表型。结构分析表明在增强和高维设置下具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够从多元生物标志物数据中无需损伤标签即可解释性地识别潜在生理状态。通过区分机制并揭示传统监测未捕获的沉默风险模式，为个体化运动员监测和决策制定提供可操作的见解。

title: HiProto: Hierarchical Prototype Learning for Interpretable Object Detection Under Low-quality Conditions
summary: Interpretability is essential for deploying object detection systems in critical applications, especially under low-quality imaging conditions that degrade visual information and increase prediction uncertainty. Existing methods either enhance image quality or design complex architectures, but often lack interpretability and fail to improve semantic discrimination. In contrast, prototype learning enables interpretable modeling by associating features with class-centered semantics, which can provide more stable and interpretable representations under degradation. Motivated by this, we propose HiProto, a new paradigm for interpretable object detection based on hierarchical prototype learning. By constructing structured prototype representations across multiple feature levels, HiProto effectively models class-specific semantics, thereby enhancing both semantic discrimination and interpretability. Building upon prototype modeling, we first propose a Region-to-Prototype Contrastive Loss (RPC-Loss) to enhance the semantic focus of prototypes on target regions. Then, we propose a Prototype Regularization Loss (PR-Loss) to improve the distinctiveness among class prototypes. Finally, we propose a Scale-aware Pseudo Label Generation Strategy (SPLGS) to suppress mismatched supervision for RPC-Loss, thereby preserving the robustness of low-level prototype representations. Experiments on ExDark, RTTS, and VOC2012-FOG demonstrate that HiProto achieves competitive results while offering clear interpretability through prototype responses, without relying on image enhancement or complex architectures. Our code will be available at https://github.com/xjlDestiny/HiProto.git.

AI.tldr: HiProto：基于分层原型学习的可解释目标检测新范式，通过多层级原型表示增强语义区分和可解释性，适用于低质量成像条件
AI.motivation: 在关键应用中部署目标检测系统时，可解释性至关重要，尤其是在低质量成像条件下，视觉信息退化会增加预测不确定性。现有方法要么增强图像质量，要么设计复杂架构，但往往缺乏可解释性且无法改善语义区分。原型学习通过将特征与类中心语义关联，能够在退化条件下提供更稳定和可解释的表示。
AI.method: 提出HiProto，一种基于分层原型学习的可解释目标检测范式。通过构建跨多个特征层的结构化原型表示，有效建模类特定语义。具体包括：1）区域到原型对比损失（RPC-Loss）增强原型对目标区域的语义关注；2）原型正则化损失（PR-Loss）提高类原型间的区分度；3）尺度感知伪标签生成策略（SPLGS）抑制RPC-Loss中的不匹配监督，保护低层原型表示的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在ExDark、RTTS和VOC2012-FOG数据集上的实验表明，HiProto取得了有竞争力的结果，同时通过原型响应提供清晰的可解释性，无需依赖图像增强或复杂架构。
AI.conclusion: HiProto通过分层原型学习为低质量成像条件下的目标检测提供了一种可解释的解决方案，在保持性能的同时增强了语义区分和模型透明度，为关键应用中的可靠部署提供了新途径。

title: StoryCoder: Narrative Reformulation for Structured Reasoning in LLM Code Generation
summary: Effective code generation requires both model capability and a problem representation that carefully structures how models reason and plan. Existing approaches augment reasoning steps or inject specific structure into how models think, but leave scattered problem conditions unchanged. Inspired by the way humans organize fragmented information into coherent explanations, we propose StoryCoder, a narrative reformulation framework that transforms code generation questions into coherent natural language narratives, providing richer contextual structure than simple rephrasings. Each narrative consists of three components: a task overview, constraints, and example test cases, guided by the selected algorithm and genre. Experiments across 11 models on HumanEval, LiveCodeBench, and CodeForces demonstrate consistent improvements, with an average gain of 18.7% in zero-shot pass@10. Beyond accuracy, our analyses reveal that narrative reformulation guides models toward correct algorithmic strategies, reduces implementation errors, and induces a more modular code structure. The analyses further show that these benefits depend on narrative coherence and genre alignment, suggesting that structured problem representation is important for code generation regardless of model scale or architecture. Our code is available at https://github.com/gu-ni/StoryCoder.

AI.tldr: StoryCoder：将代码生成问题转化为连贯自然语言叙事的框架，通过叙事重构提供比简单重述更丰富的上下文结构，在多个基准测试中显著提升模型性能
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要增强推理步骤或注入特定结构，但未改变分散的问题条件。受人类将碎片化信息组织成连贯解释的启发，需要更结构化的代码生成问题表示方法
AI.method: 提出StoryCoder叙事重构框架，将代码生成问题转化为包含任务概述、约束条件和示例测试用例三部分的连贯自然语言叙事，由选定算法和体裁指导
AI.result: 在HumanEval、LiveCodeBench和CodeForces上对11个模型的实验显示，零样本pass@10平均提升18.7%。叙事重构引导模型采用正确算法策略，减少实现错误，促进模块化代码结构
AI.conclusion: 结构化问题表示对代码生成至关重要，与模型规模或架构无关。叙事连贯性和体裁对齐是实现这些效益的关键因素

title: Uncertainty Guided Exploratory Trajectory Optimization for Sampling-Based Model Predictive Control
comment: This paper has been accepted for presentation at the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2026
summary: Trajectory optimization depends heavily on initialization. In particular, sampling-based approaches are highly sensitive to initial solutions, and limited exploration frequently leads them to converge to local minima in complex environments. We present Uncertainty Guided Exploratory Trajectory Optimization (UGE-TO), a trajectory optimization algorithm that generates well-separated samples to achieve a better coverage of the configuration space. UGE-TO represents trajectories as probability distributions induced by uncertainty ellipsoids. Unlike sampling-based approaches that explore only in the action space, this representation captures the effects of both system dynamics and action selection. By incorporating the impact of dynamics, in addition to the action space, into our distributions, our method enhances trajectory diversity by enforcing distributional separation via the Hellinger distance between them. It enables a systematic exploration of the configuration space and improves robustness against local minima. Further, we present UGE-MPC, which integrates UGE-TO into sampling-based model predictive controller methods. Experiments demonstrate that UGE-MPC achieves higher exploration and faster convergence in trajectory optimization compared to baselines under the same sampling budget, achieving 72.1% faster convergence in obstacle-free environments and 66% faster convergence with a 6.7% higher success rate in the cluttered environment compared to the best-performing baseline. Additionally, we validate the approach through a range of simulation scenarios and real-world experiments. Our results indicate that UGE-MPC has higher success rates and faster convergence, especially in environments that demand significant deviations from nominal trajectories to avoid failures. The project and code are available at https://ogpoyrazoglu.github.io/cuniform_sampling/.

AI.tldr: UGE-TO是一种轨迹优化算法，通过不确定性引导的探索性采样提高配置空间覆盖率，避免局部最优解，其MPC版本在复杂环境中实现更快的收敛和更高的成功率。
AI.motivation: 传统基于采样的轨迹优化方法对初始解高度敏感，在复杂环境中容易陷入局部最小值，探索能力有限。需要一种能够更好覆盖配置空间、提高轨迹多样性的方法。
AI.method: 提出UGE-TO算法，将轨迹表示为不确定性椭球诱导的概率分布，同时考虑系统动力学和动作选择的影响。通过Hellinger距离强制分布分离，增强轨迹多样性。进一步开发UGE-MPC，将UGE-TO集成到基于采样的模型预测控制器中。
AI.result: 实验表明，在相同采样预算下，UGE-MPC比基线方法实现更高的探索性和更快的收敛速度：在无障碍环境中收敛速度快72.1%，在杂乱环境中收敛速度快66%且成功率提高6.7%。在需要显著偏离名义轨迹以避免失败的场景中表现尤为突出。
AI.conclusion: UGE-TO通过不确定性引导的探索性采样有效提高了轨迹优化的配置空间覆盖率，其MPC集成版本UGE-MPC在复杂环境中展现出更高的成功率和更快的收敛性能，为解决局部最小值问题提供了有效方案。

title: CSRA: Controlled Spectral Residual Augmentation for Robust Sepsis Prediction
summary: Accurate prediction of future risk and disease progression in sepsis is clinically important for early warning and timely intervention in intensive care. However, short-window sepsis prediction remains challenging, because shorter observation windows provide limited historical evidence, whereas longer prediction horizons reduce the number of patient trajectories with valid future supervision. To address this problem, we propose CSRA, a Controlled Spectral Residual Augmentation framework for short-window multi-system ICU time series. CSRA first groups variables by clinical systems and extracts system-level and global representations. It then performs input-adaptive residual perturbation in the spectral domain to generate structured and clinically plausible trajectory variations. To improve augmentation stability and controllability, CSRA is trained end-to-end with the downstream predictor under a unified objective, together with anchor consistency loss and controller regularization. Experiments on a MIMIC-IV sepsis cohort across multiple downstream models show that CSRA is consistently competitive and often superior, reducing regression error by 10.2\% in MSE and 3.7\% in MAE over the non-augmentation baseline, while also yielding consistent gains on classification. CSRA further maintains more favorable performance under shorter observation windows, longer prediction horizons, and smaller training data scales, while also remaining effective on an external clinical dataset~(ZiGongICUinfection), indicating stronger robustness and generalizability in clinically constrained settings.

AI.tldr: CSRA框架通过控制性谱残差增强解决ICU短窗口脓毒症预测难题，利用系统分组和谱域扰动生成临床合理的轨迹变化，提升预测性能
AI.motivation: 脓毒症早期预警需要准确的短期风险预测，但短观察窗口提供的历史证据有限，而长预测时域又减少了有效监督样本，这构成了临床预测的挑战
AI.method: CSRA框架首先按临床系统分组变量，提取系统级和全局表征；然后在谱域进行输入自适应的残差扰动，生成结构化且临床合理的轨迹变化；通过端到端训练结合锚点一致性损失和控制器正则化来提升增强稳定性和可控性
AI.result: 在MIMIC-IV脓毒症队列上的实验表明，CSRA相比无增强基线在回归任务上MSE降低10.2%，MAE降低3.7%，分类任务也有持续提升；在更短观察窗口、更长预测时域和更小训练数据规模下保持更好性能，在外部数据集(ZiGongICUinfection)上同样有效
AI.conclusion: CSRA通过控制性谱残差增强有效解决了短窗口脓毒症预测的挑战，在临床约束条件下展现出更强的鲁棒性和泛化能力，为ICU时间序列分析提供了有前景的增强框架

title: MApLe: Multi-instance Alignment of Diagnostic Reports and Large Medical Images
comment: Accepted for MIDL 2026; Reviews available at https://openreview.net/forum?id=M8OO3CRbL9#discussion
summary: In diagnostic reports, experts encode complex imaging data into clinically actionable information. They describe subtle pathological findings that are meaningful in their anatomical context. Reports follow relatively consistent structures, expressing diagnostic information with few words that are often associated with tiny but consequential image observations. Standard vision language models struggle to identify the associations between these informative text components and small locations in the images. Here, we propose "MApLe", a multi-task, multi-instance vision language alignment approach that overcomes these limitations. It disentangles the concepts of anatomical region and diagnostic finding, and links local image information to sentences in a patch-wise approach. Our method consists of a text embedding trained to capture anatomical and diagnostic concepts in sentences, a patch-wise image encoder conditioned on anatomical structures, and a multi-instance alignment of these representations. We demonstrate that MApLe can successfully align different image regions and multiple diagnostic findings in free-text reports. We show that our model improves the alignment performance compared to state-of-the-art baseline models when evaluated on several downstream tasks. The code is available at https://github.com/cirmuw/MApLe.

AI.tldr: MApLe是一种多任务、多实例视觉语言对齐方法，专门针对医学影像诊断报告，能够将微小但重要的图像区域与报告中的文本描述进行精确对齐。
AI.motivation: 医学诊断报告中，专家将复杂的影像数据编码为临床可操作信息，描述在解剖背景下有意义的细微病理发现。标准视觉语言模型难以将这些信息丰富的文本组件与图像中的微小位置关联起来。
AI.method: 提出MApLe方法：1）训练文本嵌入捕获句子中的解剖和诊断概念；2）基于解剖结构条件的补丁级图像编码器；3）这些表示的多实例对齐。该方法解耦解剖区域和诊断发现的概念，以补丁级方法将局部图像信息与句子关联。
AI.result: MApLe能够成功对齐不同图像区域和自由文本报告中的多个诊断发现。与最先进的基线模型相比，在多个下游任务评估中显示出对齐性能的提升。
AI.conclusion: MApLe通过多任务、多实例视觉语言对齐方法，有效解决了医学影像诊断报告中微小图像区域与文本描述的关联问题，为医学影像分析提供了更精确的视觉语言对齐能力。

title: A Parallel Approach to Counting Exact Covers Based on Decomposability Property
summary: The exact cover problem is a classical NP-hard problem with broad applications in the area of AI. Algorithm DXZ is a method to count exact covers representing by zero-suppressed binary decision diagrams (ZBDDs). In this paper, we propose a zero-suppressed variant of decision decomposable negation normal form (in short, decision-ZDNNF), which is strictly more succinct than ZBDDs. We then design a novel parallel algorithm, namely DXD, which constructs a decision-ZDNNF representing the set of all exact covers. Furthermore, we improve DXD by dynamically updating connected components. The experimental results demonstrate that the improved DXD algorithm outperforms all of state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 提出决策-ZDNNF表示形式，比ZBDD更简洁，并设计并行算法DXD及其改进版本用于精确覆盖计数，性能优于现有方法
AI.motivation: 精确覆盖问题是NP难问题，在AI领域有广泛应用。现有DXZ算法使用ZBDD表示精确覆盖，但ZBDD的表达能力有限，需要更简洁的数据结构来提高算法效率
AI.method: 1. 提出决策-ZDNNF（decision-ZDNNF），这是决策可分解否定范式（DNNF）的零抑制变体，比ZBDD更简洁；2. 设计并行算法DXD，构建表示所有精确覆盖的决策-ZDNNF；3. 改进DXD算法，通过动态更新连通分量来优化性能
AI.result: 实验结果表明，改进后的DXD算法在所有基准测试中都优于现有最先进方法，证明了决策-ZDNNF表示形式的优越性和改进算法的有效性
AI.conclusion: 决策-ZDNNF是一种比ZBDD更简洁的表示形式，基于此设计的DXD算法及其改进版本在解决精确覆盖计数问题上表现出色，为AI领域的组合问题求解提供了新的有效工具

title: Learning Probabilistic Responsibility Allocations for Multi-Agent Interactions
summary: Human behavior in interactive settings is shaped not only by individual objectives but also by shared constraints with others, such as safety. Understanding how people allocate responsibility, i.e., how much one deviates from their desired policy to accommodate others, can inform the design of socially compliant and trustworthy autonomous systems. In this work, we introduce a method for learning a probabilistic responsibility allocation model that captures the multimodal uncertainty inherent in multi-agent interactions. Specifically, our approach leverages the latent space of a conditional variational autoencoder, combined with techniques from multi-agent trajectory forecasting, to learn a distribution over responsibility allocations conditioned on scene and agent context. Although ground-truth responsibility labels are unavailable, the model remains tractable by incorporating a differentiable optimization layer that maps responsibility allocations to induced controls, which are available. We evaluate our method on the INTERACTION driving dataset and demonstrate that it not only achieves strong predictive performance but also provides interpretable insights, through the lens of responsibility, into patterns of multi-agent interaction.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于条件变分自编码器的概率责任分配模型，用于捕捉多智能体交互中的不确定性，通过可微分优化层解决无真实标签问题，在驾驶数据集上验证了预测性能和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 人类交互行为不仅受个体目标影响，还受与他人共享的安全等约束影响。理解责任分配（个体为适应他人而偏离期望策略的程度）对于设计社会合规且可信的自主系统至关重要。
AI.method: 结合条件变分自编码器的潜在空间与多智能体轨迹预测技术，学习基于场景和智能体上下文的责任分配概率分布。通过可微分优化层将责任分配映射到可观测的控制信号，解决无真实责任标签的问题。
AI.result: 在INTERACTION驾驶数据集上评估，模型不仅实现了强大的预测性能，还通过责任视角提供了对多智能体交互模式的可解释性洞察。
AI.conclusion: 提出的概率责任分配模型能够有效捕捉多智能体交互中的不确定性，为设计社会合规的自主系统提供了有价值的工具，通过责任视角增强了交互行为的可解释性。

title: Heuristic Style Transfer for Real-Time, Efficient Weather Attribute Detection
summary: We present lightweight and efficient architectures to detect weather conditions from RGB images, predicting the weather type (sunny, rain, snow, fog) and 11 complementary attributes such as intensity, visibility, and ground condition, for a total of 53 classes across the tasks. This work examines to what extent weather conditions manifest as variations in visual style. We investigate style-inspired techniques, including Gram matrices, a truncated ResNet-50 targeting lower and intermediate layers, and PatchGAN-style architectures, within a multi-task framework with attention mechanisms. Two families are introduced: RTM (ResNet50-Truncated-MultiTasks) and PMG (PatchGAN-MultiTasks-Gram), together with their variants. Our contributions include automation of Gram-matrix computation, integration of PatchGAN into supervised multi-task learning, and local style capture through local Gram for improved spatial coherence. We also release a dataset of 503,875 images annotated with 12 weather attributes under a Creative Commons Attribution (CC-BY) license. The models achieve F1 scores above 96 percent on our internal test set and above 78 percent in zero-shot evaluation on several external datasets, confirming their generalization ability. The PMG architecture, with fewer than 5 million parameters, runs in real time with a small memory footprint, making it suitable for embedded systems. The modular design of the models also allows style-related or weather-related tasks to be added or removed as needed.

AI.tldr: 提出轻量高效的天气检测架构，通过风格分析预测天气类型和11个补充属性，共53个类别，模型参数量少且适合嵌入式系统实时运行
AI.motivation: 研究天气条件在多大程度上表现为视觉风格的变化，开发能够同时预测多种天气属性和类型的轻量级模型，适用于嵌入式系统
AI.method: 采用风格启发技术：Gram矩阵、截断ResNet-50（针对低层和中间层）、PatchGAN风格架构，构建多任务框架并加入注意力机制。提出两个模型家族：RTM（ResNet50截断多任务）和PMG（PatchGAN多任务Gram）及其变体
AI.result: 内部测试集F1分数超过96%，在多个外部数据集上的零样本评估超过78%，证实了泛化能力。PMG架构参数量少于500万，实时运行且内存占用小，适合嵌入式系统
AI.conclusion: 天气条件确实表现为视觉风格变化，提出的轻量级多任务模型能有效检测天气属性和类型，具有高精度、强泛化能力和嵌入式适用性，并发布了包含503,875张图像的数据集

title: Asking What Matters: Reward-Driven Clarification for Software Engineering Tasks
summary: Humans often specify tasks incompletely, so assistants must know when and how to ask clarifying questions. However, effective clarification remains challenging in software engineering tasks as not all missing information is equally valuable, and questions must target information users can realistically provide. We study clarification in real software engineering tasks by quantifying which types of information most affect task success and which questions elicit useful responses from simulated users. Using Shapley attribution and distributional comparisons, we identify two key properties of effective clarification: task relevance (which information predicts success) and user answerability (what users can realistically provide). We operationalize these properties as multi-stage reinforcement learning rewards to train CLARITI, an 8B-parameter clarification module, that matches GPT-5's resolution rate on underspecified issues while generating 41% fewer questions. Our results suggest that grounding reward design in empirical analysis of information impact and user answerability improves clarification efficiency.

AI.tldr: 研究软件工程任务中的澄清问题，提出基于任务相关性和用户可回答性的强化学习方法，训练出高效的澄清模块CLARITI
AI.motivation: 人类经常不完整地指定任务，助手需要知道何时以及如何提出澄清问题。在软件工程任务中，有效的澄清具有挑战性，因为并非所有缺失信息都同等重要，且问题必须针对用户实际能够提供的信息。
AI.method: 使用Shapley归因和分布比较分析哪些类型的信息最影响任务成功，以及哪些问题能从模拟用户那里获得有用回答。将任务相关性和用户可回答性操作化为多阶段强化学习奖励，训练8B参数的澄清模块CLARITI。
AI.result: CLARITI在未充分指定问题上的解决率与GPT-5匹配，同时生成的问题数量减少了41%。
AI.conclusion: 基于信息影响和用户可回答性的实证分析来设计奖励机制，能够提高澄清效率。

title: Dynamic Modeling and Robust Gait Optimization of a Compliant Worm Robot
summary: Worm-inspired robots provide an effective locomotion strategy for constrained environments by combining cyclic body deformation with alternating anchoring. For compliant robots, however, the interaction between deformable anchoring structures and the environment makes predictive modeling and deployable gait optimization challenging. This paper presents an experimentally grounded modeling and optimization framework for a compliant worm robot capable of traversing corrugated pipes. First, a hybrid dynamic locomotion model is derived, in which the robot motion is represented by continuous dynamics within a corrugation groove and discrete switching of anchoring positions between adjacent grooves. A slack-aware actuation model is further introduced to map the commanded gait input to the realized body-length change, and an energy model is developed based on physics and calibrated with empirical power measurement. Based on these models, a multi-objective gait optimization problem is formulated to maximize average speed while minimizing average power. To reduce the fragility of nominal boundary-seeking solutions, a kinematic robustness margin is introduced into the anchoring-transition conditions, leading to a margin-based robust gait optimization framework. Experimental results show that the proposed framework captures the dominant locomotion and energy-consumption behavior of the robot over the tested conditions, and enables robust gait optimization for achieving speed-power trade-off.

AI.tldr: 提出用于柔性蠕虫机器人的实验建模与优化框架，通过混合动力学模型、松弛感知驱动模型和能量模型，实现稳健步态优化以平衡速度与功耗。
AI.motivation: 柔性蠕虫机器人在受限环境中具有有效运动能力，但其可变形锚定结构与环境的相互作用使得预测建模和可部署步态优化具有挑战性，需要开发实验验证的建模与优化框架。
AI.method: 1) 推导混合动力学运动模型，将机器人运动表示为波纹管沟槽内的连续动力学和相邻沟槽间锚定位置的离散切换；2) 引入松弛感知驱动模型，将指令步态输入映射到实际体长变化；3) 基于物理原理开发能量模型，并通过经验功率测量进行校准；4) 建立多目标步态优化问题，最大化平均速度同时最小化平均功率；5) 引入运动学鲁棒性裕度到锚定转换条件，形成基于裕度的稳健步态优化框架。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的框架能够捕捉机器人在测试条件下的主要运动和能耗行为，并实现稳健的步态优化以达到速度-功耗权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为柔性蠕虫机器人提供了一种有效的实验建模与优化框架，通过混合动力学建模和鲁棒性增强的优化方法，成功解决了柔性锚定结构与环境交互带来的挑战，实现了可预测的运动控制和性能优化。

title: SceneGlue: Scene-Aware Transformer for Feature Matching without Scene-Level Annotation
summary: Local feature matching plays a critical role in understanding the correspondence between cross-view images. However, traditional methods are constrained by the inherent local nature of feature descriptors, limiting their ability to capture non-local scene information that is essential for accurate cross-view correspondence. In this paper, we introduce SceneGlue, a scene-aware feature matching framework designed to overcome these limitations. SceneGlue leverages a hybridizable matching paradigm that integrates implicit parallel attention and explicit cross-view visibility estimation. The parallel attention mechanism simultaneously exchanges information among local descriptors within and across images, enhancing the scene's global context. To further enrich the scene awareness, we propose the Visibility Transformer, which explicitly categorizes features into visible and invisible regions, providing an understanding of cross-view scene visibility. By combining explicit and implicit scene-level awareness, SceneGlue effectively compensates for the local descriptor constraints. Notably, SceneGlue is trained using only local feature matches, without requiring scene-level groundtruth annotations. This scene-aware approach not only improves accuracy and robustness but also enhances interpretability compared to traditional methods. Extensive experiments on applications such as homography estimation, pose estimation, image matching, and visual localization validate SceneGlue's superior performance. The source code is available at https://github.com/songlin-du/SceneGlue.

AI.tldr: SceneGlue：一种场景感知的特征匹配框架，通过混合匹配范式结合隐式并行注意力和显式跨视图可见性估计，克服传统局部特征描述符的局限性，提升跨视图图像对应关系的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统局部特征匹配方法受限于描述符的局部性质，难以捕捉对跨视图对应至关重要的非局部场景信息，需要一种能够理解全局场景上下文的方法来提升匹配性能。
AI.method: 提出SceneGlue框架，采用混合匹配范式：1）隐式并行注意力机制，在图像内和跨图像间同时交换局部描述符信息，增强全局上下文；2）显式可见性变换器，将特征分类为可见和不可见区域，理解跨视图场景可见性。仅使用局部特征匹配进行训练，无需场景级标注。
AI.result: 在单应性估计、姿态估计、图像匹配和视觉定位等应用上进行广泛实验，验证了SceneGlue相比传统方法的优越性能，不仅提高了准确性和鲁棒性，还增强了可解释性。
AI.conclusion: SceneGlue通过结合显式和隐式场景级感知，有效补偿了局部描述符的局限性，为跨视图图像对应提供了一种更准确、鲁棒且可解释的解决方案，代码已开源。

title: 3DRO: Lidar-level SE(3) Direct Radar Odometry Using a 2D Imaging Radar and a Gyroscope
summary: Recently, the robotics community has regained interest in radar-based perception and state estimation. A 2D imaging radar provides dense 360deg information about the environment. Despite the radar antenna's cone of emission and reception, the collected data is generally assumed to be limited to the plane orthogonal to the radar's spinning axis. Accordingly, most methods based on 2D imaging radars only perform SE(2) state estimation. This paper presents 3DRO, an extension of the SE(2) Direct Radar Odometry (DRO) framework to perform state estimation in SE(3). While still assuming planarity of the data through DRO's 2D velocity estimates, it integrates 3D gyroscope measurements over SO(3) to estimate SE(3) ego motion. While simple, this approach provides lidar-level odometry accuracy as demonstrated using 643km of data from the Boreas-RT dataset.

AI.tldr: 3DRO：将SE(2)直接雷达里程计框架扩展到SE(3)，通过集成3D陀螺仪测量实现三维状态估计，在643km数据上达到激光雷达级精度
AI.motivation: 尽管2D成像雷达提供密集的360度环境信息，但现有方法通常假设数据仅限于雷达旋转轴正交平面，仅进行SE(2)状态估计。需要将雷达里程计扩展到三维空间以实现更精确的位姿估计。
AI.method: 扩展SE(2)直接雷达里程计(DRO)框架至SE(3)，在保持DRO的2D速度估计假设数据平面性的基础上，集成SO(3)上的3D陀螺仪测量来估计SE(3)自运动。
AI.result: 使用Boreas-RT数据集的643km数据进行验证，该方法实现了激光雷达级别的里程计精度，证明了简单而有效的三维状态估计能力。
AI.conclusion: 3DRO方法成功将2D雷达里程计扩展到三维空间，通过结合雷达的2D速度估计和陀螺仪的3D旋转测量，实现了精确的SE(3)状态估计，为雷达感知提供了新的可能性。

title: Improving Machine Learning Performance with Synthetic Augmentation
summary:
Synthetic augmentation is increasingly used to mitigate data scarcity in financial machine learning, yet its statistical role remains poorly understood. We formalize synthetic augmentation as a modification of the effective training distribution and show that it induces a structural bias--variance trade-off: while additional samples may reduce estimation error, they may also shift the population objective whenever the synthetic distribution deviates from regions relevant under evaluation. To isolate informational gains from mechanical sample-size effects, we introduce a size-matched null augmentation and a finite-sample, non-parametric block permutation test that remains valid under weak temporal dependence.
  We evaluate this framework in both controlled Markov-switching environments and real financial datasets, including high-frequency option trade data and a daily equity panel. Across generators spanning bootstrap, copula-based models, variational autoencoders, diffusion models, and TimeGAN, we vary augmentation ratio, model capacity, task type, regime rarity, and signal-to-noise. We show that synthetic augmentation is beneficial only in variance-dominant regimes, such as persistent volatility forecasting-while it deteriorates performance in bias-dominant settings, including near-efficient directional prediction. Rare-regime targeting can improve domain-specific metrics but may conflict with unconditional permutation inference. Our results provide a structural perspective on when synthetic data improves financial learning performance and when it induces persistent distributional distortion.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了金融机器学习中合成数据增强的统计效应，揭示了其引发的结构偏差-方差权衡，并开发了区分信息增益与样本量效应的测试框架。
AI.motivation: 合成数据增强在金融机器学习中被广泛用于缓解数据稀缺问题，但其统计作用机制尚未得到充分理解。研究者需要明确合成数据如何影响模型性能，区分其带来的信息增益与单纯的样本量效应。
AI.method: 将合成数据增强形式化为训练分布的有效修改，引入尺寸匹配的零增强作为对照，开发了在弱时间依赖下有效的有限样本非参数块置换检验。在受控的马尔可夫切换环境和真实金融数据集上进行评估，涵盖多种生成器类型。
AI.result: 合成数据增强仅在方差主导的机制中（如持续性波动率预测）有益，而在偏差主导的设置中（如接近有效的方向预测）会降低性能。罕见机制定向可以改善特定领域指标，但可能与无条件置换推断相冲突。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据增强在金融学习中存在结构性的偏差-方差权衡，其效果取决于具体任务特性。研究为理解何时合成数据能改善性能、何时会导致持续性分布扭曲提供了结构性视角。

title: A Multi-Stage Optimization Pipeline for Bethesda Cell Detection in Pap Smear Cytology
comment: ISBI 2026 Accepted Paper & Second Place Solution for the RIVA Cervical Cytology Challenge Track B
summary: Computer vision techniques have advanced significantly in recent years, finding diverse and impactful applications within the medical field. In this paper, we introduce a new framework for the detection of Bethesda cells in Pap smear images, developed for Track B of the Riva Cytology Challenge held in association with the International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI). This work focuses on enhancing computer vision models for cell detection, with performance evaluated using the mAP50-95 metric. We propose a solution based on an ensemble of YOLO and U-Net architectures, followed by a refinement stage utilizing overlap removal techniques and a binary classifier. Our framework achieved second place with a mAP50-95 score of 0.5909 in the competition. The implementation and source code are available at the following repository: github.com/martinamster/riva-trackb

AI.tldr: 提出基于YOLO和U-Net集成的新框架，用于Pap涂片图像中Bethesda细胞检测，在Riva细胞学挑战赛Track B中获得第二名，mAP50-95得分为0.5909
AI.motivation: 计算机视觉技术在医学领域应用日益广泛，但Pap涂片图像中Bethesda细胞的准确检测仍具挑战性。Riva细胞学挑战赛Track B旨在推动细胞检测技术的发展，需要开发更精确的检测框架
AI.method: 采用YOLO和U-Net架构的集成方法，结合重叠去除技术和二元分类器进行细化处理。通过多模型融合提升检测性能，后处理阶段优化检测结果
AI.result: 在Riva细胞学挑战赛Track B中获得第二名，mAP50-95得分为0.5909，证明了所提框架的有效性
AI.conclusion: 提出的集成框架在Bethesda细胞检测任务中表现出色，为医学图像分析提供了有效的解决方案，代码已开源供研究社区使用

title: CoDaS: AI Co-Data-Scientist for Biomarker Discovery via Wearable Sensors
summary: Scientific discovery in digital health requires converting continuous physiological signals from wearable devices into clinically actionable biomarkers. We introduce CoDaS (AI Co-Data-Scientist), a multi-agent system that structures biomarker discovery as an iterative process combining hypothesis generation, statistical analysis, adversarial validation, and literature-grounded reasoning with human oversight using large-scale wearable datasets. Across three cohorts totaling 9,279 participant-observations, CoDaS identified 41 candidate digital biomarkers for mental health and 25 for metabolic outcomes, each subjected to an internal validation battery spanning replication, stability, robustness, and discriminative power. Across two independent depression cohorts, CoDaS surfaced circadian instability-related features in both datasets, reflected in sleep duration variability (DWB, ρ= 0.252, p < 0.001) and sleep onset variability (GLOBEM, ρ= 0.126, p < 0.001). In a metabolic cohort, CoDaS derived a cardiovascular fitness index (steps/resting heart rate; ρ= -0.374, p < 0.001), and recovered established clinical associations, including the hepatic function ratio (AST/ALT; ρ= -0.375, p < 0.001), a known correlate of insulin resistance. Incorporating CoDaS-derived features alongside demographic variables led to modest but consistent improvements in predictive performance, with cross-validated ΔR^2 increases of 0.040 for depression and 0.021 for insulin resistance. These findings suggest that CoDaS enables systematic and traceable hypothesis generation and prioritization for biomarker discovery from large-scale wearable data.

AI.tldr: CoDaS是一个多智能体系统，通过结合假设生成、统计分析、对抗验证和文献推理，从大规模可穿戴设备数据中系统性地发现数字生物标志物，应用于心理健康和代谢疾病预测。
AI.motivation: 数字健康领域的科学发现需要将可穿戴设备采集的连续生理信号转化为临床可操作的生物标志物。当前缺乏系统性的方法来从大规模可穿戴数据中发现和验证这些生物标志物。
AI.method: CoDaS是一个多智能体系统，将生物标志物发现构建为一个迭代过程，结合假设生成、统计分析、对抗验证和基于文献的推理，并包含人类监督。系统使用大规模可穿戴数据集（三个队列共9,279个参与者观察），对候选生物标志物进行内部验证，包括复制性、稳定性、鲁棒性和区分能力测试。
AI.result: CoDaS识别出41个心理健康候选数字生物标志物和25个代谢结果候选标志物。在两个独立的抑郁队列中，发现了昼夜节律不稳定性相关特征（睡眠持续时间变异性和睡眠开始时间变异性）。在代谢队列中，推导出心血管健康指数（步数/静息心率）并恢复了已知的临床关联（AST/ALT比值）。将CoDaS衍生的特征与人口统计学变量结合，使抑郁预测的交叉验证ΔR²提高0.040，胰岛素抵抗预测提高0.021。
AI.conclusion: CoDaS能够从大规模可穿戴数据中实现系统性、可追溯的假设生成和优先级排序，为数字生物标志物发现提供了一种有效方法，尽管预测性能提升有限但具有一致性。

title: A Foot Resistive Force Model for Legged Locomotion on Muddy Terrains
summary: Legged robots face significant challenges in moving and navigating on deformable and highly yielding terrain such as mud. We present a resistive force model for legged foot-mud interactions. The model captures rheological behaviors such as visco-elasticity, thixotropy of the mud suspension and retractive suction. One attractive property of this new model lies in its effective, uniform formulation to provide underlying physical interpretation and accurate resistive force predictions. We further take advantage of the resistive force model to design a new morphing robotic foot for effective and efficient legged locomotion. We conduct extensive experiments to validate the force model, and the results demonstrate that the morphing foot enhances not only the locomotion mobility but also energy-efficiency of walking in mud. The new resistive force model can be further used to develop data-driven simulation and locomotion control of legged robots on muddy terrains.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于足部-泥泞相互作用的新型阻力模型，并基于该模型设计了变形机器人足部，显著提高了腿式机器人在泥泞地形上的移动性和能效。
AI.motivation: 腿式机器人在可变形和高屈服性地形（如泥泞）上的移动和导航面临重大挑战，需要更准确的相互作用模型来改进机器人足部设计和控制策略。
AI.method: 开发了一个捕捉泥浆流变行为的阻力模型（包括粘弹性、触变性和收缩吸力），并利用该模型设计了新型变形机器人足部，通过大量实验验证模型和足部性能。
AI.result: 实验验证表明该阻力模型能准确预测阻力，变形足部不仅显著提高了在泥泞中的移动性，还提升了行走的能效。
AI.conclusion: 新型阻力模型为腿式机器人在泥泞地形上的数据驱动仿真和运动控制提供了理论基础，变形足部设计有效解决了软地形移动的挑战。

title: Uncertainty-aware Generative Learning Path Recommendation with Cognition-Adaptive Diffusion
summary: Learning Path Recommendation (LPR) is critical for personalized education, yet current methods often fail to account for historical interaction uncertainty (e.g., lucky guesses or accidental slips) and lack adaptability to diverse learning goals. We propose U-GLAD (Uncertainty-aware Generative Learning Path Recommendation with Cognition-Adaptive Diffusion). To address representation bias, the framework models cognitive states as probability distributions, capturing the learner's underlying true state via a Gaussian LSTM. To ensure highly personalized recommendation, a goal-oriented concept encoder utilizes multi-head attention and objective-specific transformations to dynamically align concept semantics with individual learning goals, generating uniquely tailored embeddings. Unlike traditional discriminative ranking approaches, our model employs a generative diffusion model to predict the latent representation of the next optimal concept. Extensive evaluations on three public datasets demonstrate that U-GLAD significantly outperforms representative baselines. Further analyses confirm its superior capability in perceiving interaction uncertainty and providing stable, goal-driven recommendation paths.

AI.tldr: U-GLAD：一种不确定性感知的生成式学习路径推荐框架，通过高斯LSTM建模认知状态分布，结合目标导向概念编码和扩散模型生成个性化学习路径
AI.motivation: 现有学习路径推荐方法存在两个主要问题：1）未能考虑历史交互中的不确定性（如侥幸猜对或偶然失误）；2）缺乏对不同学习目标的适应性。需要开发能够感知认知不确定性并提供目标驱动的个性化推荐的方法。
AI.method: U-GLAD框架包含三个核心组件：1）高斯LSTM建模认知状态为概率分布，捕捉学习者的真实认知状态；2）目标导向概念编码器使用多头注意力和目标特定变换，动态对齐概念语义与个体学习目标；3）生成式扩散模型预测下一个最优概念的潜在表示，而非传统的判别式排序方法。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上的广泛评估表明，U-GLAD显著优于代表性基线方法。进一步分析证实了其在感知交互不确定性和提供稳定、目标驱动的推荐路径方面的卓越能力。
AI.conclusion: U-GLAD通过建模认知不确定性、目标导向概念编码和生成式扩散方法，有效解决了学习路径推荐中的表示偏差和个性化不足问题，为个性化教育提供了更准确、适应性更强的推荐框架。

title: ReefMapGS: Enabling Large-Scale Underwater Reconstruction by Closing the Loop Between Multimodal SLAM and Gaussian Splatting
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting is a powerful visual representation, providing high-quality and efficient 3D scene reconstruction, but it is crucially dependent on accurate camera poses typically obtained from computationally intensive processes like structure-from-motion that are unsuitable for field robot applications. However, in these domains, multimodal sensor data from acoustic, inertial, pressure, and visual sensors are available and suitable for pose-graph optimization-based SLAM methods that can estimate the vehicle's trajectory and thus our needed camera poses while providing uncertainty. We propose a 3DGS-based incremental reconstruction framework, ReefMapGS, that builds an initial model from a high certainty region and progressively expands to incorporate the whole scene. We reconstruct the scene incrementally by interleaving local tracking of new image observations with optimization of the underlying 3DGS scene. These refined poses are integrated back into the pose-graph to globally optimize the whole trajectory. We show COLMAP-free 3D reconstruction of two underwater reef sites with complex geometry as well as more accurate global pose estimation of our AUV over survey trajectories spanning up to 700 m.

AI.tldr: ReefMapGS：基于3D高斯泼溅的增量式水下场景重建框架，无需COLMAP，利用多模态传感器数据通过位姿图优化实现相机位姿估计和场景重建
AI.motivation: 3D高斯泼溅技术依赖准确相机位姿，通常需要计算密集的结构运动方法获取，不适合野外机器人应用。水下环境中多模态传感器数据（声学、惯性、压力、视觉）可用于位姿图优化SLAM方法，但需要与3DGS重建有效结合。
AI.method: 提出ReefMapGS增量重建框架：1）从高置信度区域构建初始模型；2）逐步扩展至整个场景；3）交替进行新图像观测的局部跟踪与底层3DGS场景优化；4）将优化后的位姿集成到位姿图中进行全局轨迹优化。
AI.result: 在两个具有复杂几何结构的水下珊瑚礁站点实现了无需COLMAP的3D重建，并在长达700米的调查轨迹上获得了更准确的自主水下航行器全局位姿估计。
AI.conclusion: ReefMapGS成功将3D高斯泼溅与基于多模态传感器的位姿图优化SLAM相结合，实现了无需传统结构运动方法的水下场景增量式高质量重建，适用于野外机器人应用。

title: Scouting By Reward: VLM-TO-IRL-Driven Player Selection For Esports
summary: Traditional esports scouting workflows rely heavily on manual video review and aggregate performance metrics, which often fail to capture the nuanced decision-making patterns necessary to determine if a prospect fits a specific tactical archetype. To address this, we reframe style-based player evaluation in esports as an Inverse Reinforcement Learning (IRL) problem. In this paper, we introduce a novel player selection framework that learns professional-specific reward functions from logged gameplay demonstrations, allowing organizations to rank candidates by their stylistic alignment with a target star player. Our proposed architecture utilizes a multimodal, two-branch intake: one branch encodes structured state-action trajectories derived from high-resolution in-game telemetry, while the second encodes temporally aligned tactical pseudo-commentary generated by Vision-Language Models (VLMs) from broadcast footage. These representations are fused and evaluated via a Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning (GAIL) objective, where a discriminator learns to capture the unique mechanical and tactical signatures of elite professionals. By transitioning from generic skill estimation to scouting "by reward," this framework provides a scalable, workflow-aware digital twin system that enables data-driven roster construction and targeted talent discovery across massive candidate pools.

AI.tldr: 将电竞选手选拔重构为逆强化学习问题，通过学习职业选手的奖励函数来评估候选人与目标明星选手的风格匹配度
AI.motivation: 传统电竞选拔方法依赖人工视频分析和聚合性能指标，无法捕捉决定选手是否符合特定战术原型的细微决策模式，需要更精准的风格评估方法
AI.method: 提出多模态双分支架构：一个分支编码来自高分辨率游戏遥测的结构化状态-动作轨迹，另一个分支编码从广播录像生成的时序对齐战术伪解说；通过生成对抗模仿学习目标融合表示，判别器学习精英选手独特的机械和战术特征
AI.result: 框架从通用技能评估转向基于奖励的选拔，提供可扩展的工作流程感知数字孪生系统，支持数据驱动的阵容构建和大规模候选人池的定向人才发现
AI.conclusion: 通过逆强化学习框架实现风格驱动的电竞选手选拔，能够学习职业选手特定的奖励函数，使组织能够根据候选人与目标明星选手的风格匹配度进行排名，为电竞人才发现提供新范式

title: ASTER: Latent Pseudo-Anomaly Generation for Unsupervised Time-Series Anomaly Detection
summary: Time-series anomaly detection (TSAD) is critical in domains such as industrial monitoring, healthcare, and cybersecurity, but it remains challenging due to rare and heterogeneous anomalies and the scarcity of labelled data. This scarcity makes unsupervised approaches predominant, yet existing methods often rely on reconstruction or forecasting, which struggle with complex data, or on embedding-based approaches that require domain-specific anomaly synthesis and fixed distance metrics. We propose ASTER, a framework that generates pseudo-anomalies directly in the latent space, avoiding handcrafted anomaly injections and the need for domain expertise. A latent-space decoder produces tailored pseudo-anomalies to train a Transformer-based anomaly classifier, while a pre-trained LLM enriches the temporal and contextual representations of this space. Experiments on three benchmark datasets show that ASTER achieves state-of-the-art performance and sets a new standard for LLM-based TSAD.

AI.tldr: ASTER是一个新的时间序列异常检测框架，通过在潜在空间生成伪异常来训练Transformer分类器，利用预训练LLM增强时间上下文表示，无需领域专业知识或手工异常注入。
AI.motivation: 时间序列异常检测面临异常罕见、异质性强和标注数据稀缺的挑战。现有无监督方法依赖重构或预测，难以处理复杂数据；基于嵌入的方法需要领域特定的异常合成和固定距离度量。
AI.method: 提出ASTER框架：1) 在潜在空间直接生成伪异常，避免手工异常注入和领域专业知识需求；2) 使用潜在空间解码器生成定制化伪异常训练Transformer异常分类器；3) 利用预训练LLM增强潜在空间的时间上下文表示。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上的实验表明，ASTER实现了最先进的性能，为基于LLM的时间序列异常检测设立了新标准。
AI.conclusion: ASTER通过潜在空间伪异常生成和LLM增强的时间上下文表示，有效解决了时间序列异常检测中的数据稀缺和复杂模式识别问题，无需领域专业知识，性能优于现有方法。

title: El Agente Forjador: Task-Driven Agent Generation for Quantum Simulation
summary: AI for science promises to accelerate the discovery process. The advent of large language models (LLMs) and agentic workflows enables the expediting of a growing range of scientific tasks. However, most of the current generation of agentic systems depend on static, hand-curated toolsets that hinder adaptation to new domains and evolving libraries. We present El Agente Forjador, a multi-agent framework in which universal coding agents autonomously forge, validate, and reuse computational tools through a four-stage workflow of tool analysis, tool generation, task execution, and iterative solution evaluation. Evaluated across 24 tasks spanning quantum chemistry and quantum dynamics on five coding agent setups, we compare three operating modes: zero-shot generation of tools per task, reuse of a curriculum-built toolset, and direct problem-solving with the coding agents as the baseline. We find that our tool generation and reuse framework consistently improves accuracy over the baseline. We also show that reusing a toolset built by a stronger coding agent can reduce API cost and substantially raises the solution quality for weaker coding agents. Case studies further demonstrate that tools forged for different domains can be combined to solve hybrid tasks. Taken together, these results show that LLM-based agents can use their scientific knowledge and coding capabilities to autonomously build reusable scientific tools, pointing toward a paradigm in which agent capabilities are defined by the tasks they are designed to solve rather than by explicitly engineered implementations.

AI.tldr: 提出El Agente Forjador多智能体框架，让通用编码智能体通过四阶段工作流自主锻造、验证和重用计算工具，在量子化学和量子动力学任务中显著提升准确性。
AI.motivation: 当前基于大语言模型的智能体系统大多依赖静态、手工策划的工具集，这阻碍了它们适应新领域和不断发展的库。需要一种能够自主创建和重用工具的方法来加速科学发现。
AI.method: 提出El Agente Forjador多智能体框架，采用四阶段工作流：工具分析、工具生成、任务执行和迭代解决方案评估。通用编码智能体通过该流程自主锻造、验证和重用计算工具。在24个量子化学和量子动力学任务上评估了三种操作模式：零-shot工具生成、课程构建工具集重用、以及直接问题解决作为基线。
AI.result: 工具生成和重用框架始终优于基线。重用由更强编码智能体构建的工具集可以降低API成本，并显著提升较弱编码智能体的解决方案质量。案例研究显示，为不同领域锻造的工具可以组合解决混合任务。
AI.conclusion: 基于大语言模型的智能体可以利用其科学知识和编码能力自主构建可重用的科学工具，指向一种新范式：智能体能力由其设计解决的任务定义，而非显式工程实现。

title: Complementarity by Construction: A Lie-Group Approach to Solving Quadratic Programs with Linear Complementarity Constraints
summary: Many problems in robotics require reasoning over a mix of continuous dynamics and discrete events, such as making and breaking contact in manipulation and locomotion. These problems are locally well modeled by linear complementarity quadratic programs (LCQPs), an extension to QPs that introduce complementarity constraints. While very expressive, LCQPs are non-convex, and few solvers exist for computing good local solutions for use in planning pipelines. In this work, we observe that complementarity constraints form a Lie group under infinitesimal relaxation, and leverage this structure to perform on-manifold optimization. We introduce a retraction map that is numerically well behaved, and use it to parameterize the constraints so that they are satisfied by construction. The resulting solver avoids many of the classical issues with complementarity constraints. We provide an open-source solver, Marble, that is implemented in C++ with Julia and Python bindings. We demonstrate that Marble is competitive on a suite of benchmark problems, and solves a number of robotics problems where existing approaches fail to converge.

AI.tldr: 提出Marble求解器，利用李群结构处理线性互补二次规划中的互补约束，通过流形优化避免传统方法的问题
AI.motivation: 机器人学中许多问题需要同时处理连续动力学和离散事件（如接触的建立与断开）。线性互补二次规划能很好地局部建模这些问题，但LCQP是非凸的，现有求解器难以在规划流程中提供良好的局部解
AI.method: 观察到互补约束在无穷小松弛下形成李群结构，利用该结构进行流形优化。引入数值稳定的回缩映射，参数化约束使其自动满足，避免互补约束的经典问题
AI.result: 开发了开源求解器Marble（C++实现，提供Julia和Python接口）。在基准测试中表现具有竞争力，能解决现有方法无法收敛的多个机器人学问题
AI.conclusion: 通过将互补约束视为李群并采用流形优化方法，成功开发了能有效处理LCQP问题的求解器，为机器人学中的混合连续-离散问题提供了新的解决方案

title: Auxiliary Finite-Difference Residual-Gradient Regularization for PINNs
summary:
Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) are often selected by a single scalar loss even when the quantity of interest is more specific. We study a hybrid design in which the governing PDE residual remains automatic-differentiation (AD) based, while finite differences (FD) appear only in a weak auxiliary term that penalizes gradients of the sampled residual field. The FD term regularizes the residual field without replacing the PDE residual itself.
  We examine this idea in two stages. Stage 1 is a controlled Poisson benchmark comparing a baseline PINN, the FD residual-gradient regularizer, and a matched AD residual-gradient baseline. Stage 2 transfers the same logic to a three-dimensional annular heat-conduction benchmark (PINN3D), where baseline errors concentrate near a wavy outer wall and the auxiliary grid is implemented as a body-fitted shell adjacent to the wall.
  In Stage 1, the FD regularizer reproduces the main effect of residual-gradient control while exposing a trade-off between field accuracy and residual cleanliness. In Stage 2, the shell regularizer improves the application-facing quantities, namely outer-wall flux and boundary-condition behavior. Across seeds 0-5 and 100k epochs, the most reliable tested configuration is a fixed shell weight of 5e-4 under the Kourkoutas-beta optimizer regime: relative to a matched run without the shell term, it reduces the mean outer-wall BC RMSE from 1.22e-2 to 9.29e-4 and the mean wall-flux RMSE from 9.21e-3 to 9.63e-4. Adam with beta2=0.999 becomes usable when the initial learning rate is reduced to 1e-3, although its shell benefit is less robust than under Kourkoutas-beta. Overall, the results support a targeted view of hybrid PINNs: an auxiliary-only FD regularizer is most valuable when it is aligned with the physical quantity of interest, here the outer-wall flux.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种混合PINN设计，在保持自动微分PDE残差的同时，引入有限差分残差梯度正则化项，通过两阶段实验验证了该方法在提高边界条件和壁面通量精度方面的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统PINN通常使用单一标量损失函数，即使关注的具体物理量更为特定。作者旨在探索一种混合设计，在保持自动微分PDE残差的同时，通过有限差分正则化残差梯度场，以更针对性地提高特定物理量的精度。
AI.method: 提出混合PINN架构：主要PDE残差仍基于自动微分，而有限差分仅出现在弱辅助项中，用于惩罚采样残差场的梯度。该方法分两阶段验证：阶段1在受控泊松基准测试中比较基线PINN、FD残差梯度正则器和匹配的AD残差梯度基线；阶段2将相同逻辑应用于三维环形热传导基准测试（PINN3D），在波浪形外壁附近实现贴合壁面的体拟合壳层网格正则化。
AI.result: 阶段1显示FD正则器能重现残差梯度控制的主要效果，同时揭示了场精度与残差清洁度之间的权衡。阶段2中，壳层正则器显著改善了应用相关物理量：外壁通量和边界条件行为。在种子0-5和100k轮次下，最优配置为固定壳层权重5e-4配合Kourkoutas-beta优化器，相比无壳层项的运行，将平均外壁BC RMSE从1.22e-2降至9.29e-4，平均壁面通量RMSE从9.21e-3降至9.63e-4。
AI.conclusion: 研究支持混合PINN的针对性观点：当辅助FD正则器与关注的物理量（如外壁通量）对齐时最为有效。该方法通过有限差分正则化残差梯度场，在不替换PDE残差本身的情况下改善了特定物理量的精度，为PINN设计提供了新的思路。

title: GDPR Auto-Formalization with AI Agents and Human Verification
summary: We study the overall process of automatic formalization of GDPR provisions using large language models, within a human-in-the-loop verification framework. Rather than aiming for full autonomy, we adopt a role-specialized workflow in which LLM-based AI components, operating in a multi-agent setting with iterative feedback, generate legal scenarios, formal rules, and atomic facts. This is coupled with independent verification modules which include human reviewers' assessment of representational, logical, and legal correctness. Using this approach, we construct a high-quality dataset to be used for GDPR auto-formalization, and analyze both successful and problematic cases. Our results show that structured verification and targeted human oversight are essential for reliable legal formalization, especially in the presence of legal nuance and context-sensitive reasoning.

AI.tldr: 使用大语言模型在人类参与验证框架下自动形式化GDPR条款的研究，采用角色专业化工作流程和多智能体迭代反馈，构建高质量数据集并分析成功与问题案例
AI.motivation: 研究如何利用大语言模型自动形式化GDPR条款，但认识到完全自主形式化的局限性，因此采用人类参与验证框架来确保法律形式化的可靠性和准确性
AI.method: 采用角色专业化工作流程，在多智能体环境中使用LLM组件通过迭代反馈生成法律场景、形式规则和原子事实，结合独立验证模块（包括人类评审员对表示、逻辑和法律正确性的评估）
AI.result: 构建了用于GDPR自动形式化的高质量数据集，分析了成功和问题案例，结果表明结构化验证和针对性人类监督对于可靠的法律形式化至关重要，特别是在存在法律细微差别和上下文敏感推理的情况下
AI.conclusion: 结构化验证和针对性人类监督是可靠法律形式化的关键要素，尤其是在处理法律细微差别和上下文敏感推理时，多智能体迭代反馈与人类验证相结合的方法能够产生高质量的法律形式化结果

title: Bipedal-Walking-Dynamics Model on Granular Terrains
summary: Bipeds have demonstrated high agility and mobility in unstructured environments such as sand. The yielding of such granular media brings significant sinkage and slip of the bipedal feet, leading to uncertainty and instability of walking locomotion. We present a new dynamics-modeling approach to capture and predict bipedal-walking locomotion on granular media. A dynamic foot-terrain interaction model is integrated to compute the ground reaction force (GRF). The proposed granular dynamic model has three additional degree-of-freedom (DoF) to estimate foot sinkage and slip that are critical to capturing robot-walking kinematics and kinetics such as cost of transport (CoT). Using the new model, we analyze bipedal kinetics, CoT, and foot-terrain rolling and intrusion affects. Experiments are conducted using a biped robotic walker on sand to validate the proposed dynamic model with robot-gait profiles, media-intrusion prediction, and GRF estimations. This new dynamics model can further serve as an enabling tool for locomotion control and optimization of bipedal robots to efficiently walk on granular terrains.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的动力学建模方法，用于预测双足机器人在颗粒介质（如沙子）上的行走运动，通过集成动态足-地形交互模型计算地面反作用力，并分析行走动力学和运输成本。
AI.motivation: 颗粒介质（如沙子）的屈服特性导致双足机器人脚部显著下沉和滑动，带来行走运动的不确定性和不稳定性，需要新的动力学模型来准确预测和优化此类环境下的双足行走。
AI.method: 提出一种新的动力学建模方法，集成动态足-地形交互模型计算地面反作用力；模型包含三个额外自由度来估计脚部下沉和滑动；使用该模型分析双足动力学、运输成本以及足-地形滚动和侵入效应；通过双足机器人行走器在沙地上的实验验证模型。
AI.result: 新动力学模型能够准确预测机器人步态轮廓、介质侵入预测和地面反作用力估计；实验验证了模型在颗粒地形上的有效性；模型可作为双足机器人在颗粒地形上高效行走的运动控制和优化的工具。
AI.conclusion: 提出的动力学建模方法能够有效捕捉和预测双足机器人在颗粒介质上的行走运动，为优化双足机器人在此类复杂地形上的运动控制和效率提供了重要工具。

title: Bias in Surface Electromyography Features across a Demographically Diverse Cohort
summary:
Neuromotor decoding from upper-limb electromyography (sEMG) can enhance human-machine interfaces and offer a more natural means of controlling prosthetic limbs, virtual reality, and household electronics. Unfortunately, current sEMG technology does not always perform consistently across users because individual differences such as age and body mass index, among many others, can substantially alter signal quality. This variability makes sEMG characteristics highly idiosyncratic, often necessitating laborious personalization and iterative tuning to achieve reliable performance. This variability has particular import for sEMG-based assistive devices and neural interfaces, where demographic biases in sEMG features could undermine broad and fair deployment.
  In this study, we explore how demographic differences affect the sEMG signals produced and their implications for machine learning-based gesture decoding. We analyze the data set provided by, in which we derive 147 common sEMG features extracted from 81 demographically diverse individuals performing discrete hand gestures. Using mixed-effects linear models and partial least squares (PLS) analysis, which take into consideration demographic variables (including age, sex, height, weight, skin properties, subcutaneous fat, and hair density), we identify that 33\% (49 of 147) of commonly used sEMG features show significant associations with demographic characteristics. These results may help guide the development of fair and unbiased sEMG-based neural interfaces across a diverse population.

AI.tldr: 研究发现33%的常用sEMG特征与人口统计学特征显著相关，这可能导致基于sEMG的神经接口存在人口统计学偏差，影响公平部署。
AI.motivation: 当前表面肌电信号(sEMG)技术在不同用户间表现不一致，个体差异如年龄、BMI等会显著影响信号质量，导致sEMG特征高度个性化，需要繁琐的个性化调整才能获得可靠性能。这种变异性对基于sEMG的辅助设备和神经接口尤为重要，其中的人口统计学偏差可能阻碍广泛公平的部署。
AI.method: 研究分析了来自81名人口统计学多样化个体的离散手势sEMG数据集，提取了147个常用sEMG特征。使用混合效应线性模型和偏最小二乘(PLS)分析方法，考虑人口统计学变量（包括年龄、性别、身高、体重、皮肤特性、皮下脂肪和毛发密度）。
AI.result: 33%（147个中的49个）常用sEMG特征显示出与人口统计学特征的显著关联。这些发现揭示了sEMG特征中可能存在的人口统计学偏差。
AI.conclusion: 人口统计学差异显著影响sEMG信号特征，这为开发适用于多样化人群的公平、无偏的sEMG神经接口提供了重要指导，有助于减少个性化调整需求并促进更广泛的公平部署。

title: Blind Bitstream-corrupted Video Recovery via Metadata-guided Diffusion Model
summary: Bitstream-corrupted video recovery aims to restore realistic content degraded during video storage or transmission. Existing methods typically assume that predefined masks of corrupted regions are available, but manually annotating these masks is labor-intensive and impractical in real-world scenarios. To address this limitation, we introduce a new blind video recovery setting that removes the reliance on predefined masks. This setting presents two major challenges: accurately identifying corrupted regions and recovering content from extensive and irregular degradations. We propose a Metadata-Guided Diffusion Model (M-GDM) to tackle these challenges. Specifically, intrinsic video metadata are leveraged as corruption indicators through a dual-stream metadata encoder that separately embeds motion vectors and frame types before fusing them into a unified representation. This representation interacts with corrupted latent features via cross-attention at each diffusion step. To preserve intact regions, we design a prior-driven mask predictor that generates pseudo masks using both metadata and diffusion priors, enabling the separation and recombination of intact and recovered regions through hard masking. To mitigate boundary artifacts caused by imperfect masks, a post-refinement module enhances consistency between intact and recovered regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method and its superiority in blind video recovery. Code is available at: https://github.com/Shuyun-Wang/M-GDM.

AI.tldr: 提出M-GDM模型用于比特流损坏视频的盲恢复，无需预定义掩码，利用元数据作为损坏指示器，通过双流编码器处理运动向量和帧类型，结合先验驱动的掩码预测器和后处理模块实现高质量恢复。
AI.motivation: 现有视频恢复方法通常需要预定义的损坏区域掩码，但人工标注这些掩码既耗时又不切实际。因此需要开发一种无需掩码的盲视频恢复方法，能够自动识别损坏区域并恢复内容。
AI.method: 提出元数据引导的扩散模型(M-GDM)：1) 使用双流元数据编码器分别嵌入运动向量和帧类型，融合为统一表示；2) 通过交叉注意力在扩散过程中与损坏的潜在特征交互；3) 设计先验驱动的掩码预测器生成伪掩码，分离并重组完整和恢复区域；4) 引入后处理模块减少边界伪影。
AI.result: 大量实验证明该方法在盲视频恢复任务中有效且优于现有方法，能够准确识别损坏区域并恢复严重不规则损坏的内容。
AI.conclusion: M-GDM成功解决了比特流损坏视频的盲恢复问题，无需预定义掩码，通过利用视频元数据作为损坏指示器，结合扩散模型和先验知识，实现了高质量的自动视频恢复。

title: M2HRI: An LLM-Driven Multimodal Multi-Agent Framework for Personalized Human-Robot Interaction
summary: Multi-robot systems hold significant promise for social environments such as homes and hospitals, yet existing multi-robot works treat robots as functionally identical, overlooking how robots individual identity shape user perception and how coordination shapes multi-robot behavior when such individuality is present. To address this, we introduce M2HRI, a multimodal multi-agent framework built on large language models that equips each robot with distinct personality and long-term memory, alongside a coordination mechanism conditioned on these differences. In a controlled user study (n = 105) in a multi-agent human-robot interaction (HRI) scenario, we find that LLM-driven personality traits are significantly distinguishable and enhance interaction quality, long-term memory improves personalization and preference awareness, and centralized coordination significantly reduces overlap while improving overall interaction quality. Together, these results demonstrate that both agent individuality and structured coordination are essential for coherent and socially appropriate multi-agent HRI. Project website and code are available at https://project-m2hri.github.io/.

AI.tldr: M2HRI：基于大语言模型的多模态多智能体框架，为每个机器人配备独特个性和长期记忆，通过集中协调机制提升多机器人人机交互的社会适宜性和一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有多机器人系统将机器人视为功能相同的个体，忽视了机器人个体身份对用户感知的影响，以及在这种个体差异性存在时协调机制如何塑造多机器人行为。
AI.method: 提出M2HRI框架，基于大语言模型为每个机器人配备：1）可区分的个性特征；2）长期记忆系统；3）基于个体差异的集中协调机制。在受控用户研究（n=105）中验证多智能体人机交互场景。
AI.result: LLM驱动的个性特征显著可区分且提升交互质量；长期记忆改善个性化和偏好感知；集中协调显著减少行为重叠并提升整体交互质量。
AI.conclusion: 智能体个体性和结构化协调对于连贯且社会适宜的多智能体人机交互都至关重要，M2HRI框架为此提供了有效解决方案。

title: Rethinking Image-to-3D Generation with Sparse Queries: Efficiency, Capacity, and Input-View Bias
summary: We present SparseGen, a novel framework for efficient image-to-3D generation, which exhibits low input-view bias while being significantly faster. Unlike traditional approaches that rely on dense volumetric grids, triplanes, or pixel-aligned primitives, we model scenes with a compact sparse set of learned 3D anchor queries and a learned expansion operator that decodes each transformed query into a small local set of 3D Gaussian primitives. Trained under a rectified-flow reconstruction objective without 3D supervision, our model learns to allocate representation capacity where geometry and appearance matter, achieving significant reductions in memory and inference time while preserving multi-view fidelity. We introduce quantitative measures of input-view bias and utilization to show that sparse queries reduce overfitting to conditioning views while being representationally efficient. Our results argue that sparse set-latent expansion is a principled, practical alternative for efficient 3D generative modeling.

AI.tldr: SparseGen是一个高效图像到3D生成框架，使用稀疏3D锚点查询和扩展算子，相比传统密集方法显著降低内存和推理时间，同时减少输入视图偏差。
AI.motivation: 传统图像到3D生成方法依赖密集体积网格、三平面或像素对齐基元，存在内存消耗大、推理时间长、容易过拟合输入视图的问题。需要一种更高效且能减少输入视图偏差的3D生成方法。
AI.method: 提出SparseGen框架：1) 使用紧凑的稀疏学习3D锚点查询建模场景；2) 学习扩展算子将每个变换后的查询解码为局部3D高斯基元集合；3) 在无3D监督下通过整流流重建目标训练；4) 自动在几何和外观重要区域分配表示容量。
AI.result: 1) 显著减少内存使用和推理时间；2) 保持多视图保真度；3) 减少对条件视图的过拟合；4) 引入输入视图偏差和利用率定量指标，证明稀疏查询在表示效率上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏集合潜在扩展是高效3D生成建模的原则性、实用替代方案，在保持多视图质量的同时实现了效率和泛化性的平衡。

title: CausalDetox: Causal Head Selection and Intervention for Language Model Detoxification
summary: Large language models (LLMs) frequently generate toxic content, posing significant risks for safe deployment. Current mitigation strategies often degrade generation quality or require costly human annotation. We propose CAUSALDETOX, a framework that identifies and intervenes on the specific attention heads causally responsible for toxic generation. Using the Probability of Necessity and Sufficiency (PNS), we isolate a minimal set of heads that are necessary and sufficient for toxicity. We utilize these components via two complementary strategies: (1) Local Inference-Time Intervention, which constructs dynamic, input-specific steering vectors for context-aware detoxification, and (2) PNS-Guided Fine-Tuning, which permanently unlearns toxic representations. We also introduce PARATOX, a novel benchmark of aligned toxic/non-toxic sentence pairs enabling controlled counterfactual evaluation. Experiments on ToxiGen, ImplicitHate, and ParaDetox show that CAUSALDETOX achieves up to 5.34% greater toxicity reduction compared to baselines while preserving linguistic fluency, and offers a 7x speedup in head selection.

AI.tldr: CAUSALDETOX：通过因果干预特定注意力头来减少LLM毒性生成，使用PNS识别关键注意力头，结合局部推理时干预和PNS引导微调，在保持流畅性的同时显著降低毒性
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型经常生成有毒内容，现有缓解策略要么降低生成质量，要么需要昂贵的人工标注。需要一种既能有效降低毒性又不损害生成质量的方法。
AI.method: 提出CAUSALDETOX框架：1) 使用概率必要性和充分性(PNS)识别导致毒性生成的关键注意力头；2) 局部推理时干预：构建动态、输入特定的引导向量进行上下文感知的去毒；3) PNS引导微调：永久消除有毒表征。同时提出PARATOX基准用于受控反事实评估。
AI.result: 在ToxiGen、ImplicitHate和ParaDetox数据集上，CAUSALDETOX相比基线实现高达5.34%的毒性降低，同时保持语言流畅性，注意力头选择速度提升7倍。
AI.conclusion: CAUSALDETOX通过因果干预特定注意力头，在有效降低LLM毒性生成的同时保持生成质量，提供了一种高效、可解释的去毒方法。

title: Mechanistic Decoding of Cognitive Constructs in LLMs
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate increasingly sophisticated affective capabilities, the internal mechanisms by which they process complex emotions remain unclear. Existing interpretability approaches often treat models as black boxes or focus on coarse-grained basic emotions, leaving the cognitive structure of more complex affective states underexplored. To bridge this gap, we propose a Cognitive Reverse-Engineering framework based on Representation Engineering (RepE) to analyze social-comparison jealousy. By combining appraisal theory with subspace orthogonalization, regression-based weighting, and bidirectional causal steering, we isolate and quantify two psychological antecedents of jealousy, Superiority of Comparison Person and Domain Self-Definitional Relevance, and examine their causal effects on model judgments. Experiments on eight LLMs from the Llama, Qwen, and Gemma families suggest that models natively encode jealousy as a structured linear combination of these constituent factors. Their internal representations are broadly consistent with the human psychological construct, treating Superiority as the foundational trigger and Relevance as the ultimate intensity multiplier. Our framework also demonstrates that toxic emotional states can be mechanically detected and surgically suppressed, suggesting a possible route toward representational monitoring and intervention for AI safety in multi-agent environments.

AI.tldr: 提出基于表征工程的认知逆向工程框架，用于分析大语言模型中复杂情感（社会比较嫉妒）的内部机制，发现模型将嫉妒编码为优越性和领域自我定义相关性的线性组合，与人类心理结构一致。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型展现出日益复杂的情感能力，但其处理复杂情感的内部机制尚不明确。现有可解释性方法通常将模型视为黑箱或仅关注粗粒度的基本情绪，对更复杂情感状态的认知结构探索不足。
AI.method: 提出基于表征工程（RepE）的认知逆向工程框架，结合评价理论与子空间正交化、基于回归的加权和双向因果导向技术，分离并量化嫉妒的两个心理前因：比较对象优越性和领域自我定义相关性，并检验它们对模型判断的因果效应。
AI.result: 在Llama、Qwen和Gemma家族的八个LLM上的实验表明，模型将嫉妒原生编码为这些构成因素的线性组合。内部表征与人类心理结构基本一致：将优越性视为基础触发因素，相关性作为最终强度乘数。框架还能机械检测并精确抑制有毒情感状态。
AI.conclusion: 该框架揭示了LLM中复杂情感的认知结构，表明模型内部表征与人类心理构造具有一致性。为多智能体环境中AI安全的表征监控和干预提供了可能途径，能够检测和抑制有毒情感状态。

title: Solving Physics Olympiad via Reinforcement Learning on Physics Simulators
summary: We have witnessed remarkable advances in LLM reasoning capabilities with the advent of DeepSeek-R1. However, much of this progress has been fueled by the abundance of internet question-answer (QA) pairs, a major bottleneck going forward, since such data is limited in scale and concentrated mainly in domains like mathematics. In contrast, other sciences such as physics lack large-scale QA datasets to effectively train reasoning-capable models. In this work, we show that physics simulators can serve as a powerful alternative source of supervision for training LLMs for physical reasoning. We generate random scenes in physics engines, create synthetic question-answer pairs from simulated interactions, and train LLMs using reinforcement learning on this synthetic data. Our models exhibit zero-shot sim-to-real transfer to real-world physics benchmarks: for example, training solely on synthetic simulated data improves performance on IPhO (International Physics Olympiad) problems by 5-10 percentage points across model sizes. These results demonstrate that physics simulators can act as scalable data generators, enabling LLMs to acquire deep physical reasoning skills beyond the limitations of internet-scale QA data. Code available at: https://sim2reason.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 使用物理模拟器生成合成数据训练LLM进行物理推理，实现零样本模拟到真实迁移
AI.motivation: 当前LLM推理能力提升主要依赖互联网QA数据，但这些数据规模有限且集中在数学等领域，物理等科学领域缺乏大规模QA数据集来有效训练推理模型
AI.method: 在物理引擎中生成随机场景，从模拟交互创建合成QA对，使用强化学习在合成数据上训练LLM
AI.result: 模型在真实物理基准测试中表现出零样本模拟到真实迁移：仅使用合成模拟数据训练，在IPhO问题上性能提升5-10个百分点
AI.conclusion: 物理模拟器可作为可扩展的数据生成器，使LLM能够获得超越互联网规模QA数据限制的深度物理推理能力

title: PostureObjectstitch: Anomaly Image Generation Considering Assembly Relationships in Industrial Scenarios
summary: Image generation technology can synthesize condition-specific images to supplement real-world industrial anomaly data and enhance anomaly detection model performance. Existing generation techniques rarely account for the pose and orientation of industrial components in assembly, making the generated images difficult to utilize for downstream application. To solve this, we propose a novel image synthesis approach, called PostureObjectStitch, that achieves accurate generation to meet the requirement of industrial assembly. A condition decoupling approach is introduced to separate input multi-view images into high-frequency, texture, and RGB features. The feature temporal modulation mechanism adapts these features across diffusion model time-steps, enabling progressive generation from coarse to fine details while maintaining consistency. To ensure semantic accuracy, we introduce a conditional loss that enhances critical industrial elements and a geometric prior that guides component positioning for correct assembly relationships. Comprehensive experimental results on the MureCom dataset, our newly contributed DreamAssembly dataset, and the downstream application validate the outstanding performance of our method.

AI.tldr: 提出PostureObjectStitch方法，通过条件解耦、特征时序调制和几何先验，生成满足工业装配要求的姿态准确图像，补充异常检测数据。
AI.motivation: 现有图像生成技术很少考虑工业组件在装配中的姿态和方向，导致生成的图像难以用于下游应用。需要解决工业装配场景中姿态准确的图像生成问题。
AI.method: 1. 条件解耦：将多视角输入图像分离为高频、纹理和RGB特征；2. 特征时序调制机制：在扩散模型时间步中自适应调整特征，实现从粗到细的渐进生成；3. 条件损失：增强关键工业元素；4. 几何先验：指导组件定位以保持正确的装配关系。
AI.result: 在MureCom数据集、新贡献的DreamAssembly数据集和下游应用上的综合实验验证了方法的优异性能。
AI.conclusion: PostureObjectStitch方法能够生成满足工业装配要求的姿态准确图像，有效补充工业异常检测数据，提升模型性能。

title: Disentangled Point Diffusion for Precise Object Placement
summary: Recent advances in robotic manipulation have highlighted the effectiveness of learning from demonstration. However, while end-to-end policies excel in expressivity and flexibility, they struggle both in generalizing to novel object geometries and in attaining a high degree of precision. An alternative, object-centric approach frames the task as predicting the placement pose of the target object, providing a modular decomposition of the problem. Building on this goal-prediction paradigm, we propose TAX-DPD, a hierarchical, disentangled point diffusion framework that achieves state-of-the-art performance in placement precision, multi-modal coverage, and generalization to variations in object geometries and scene configurations. We model global scene-level placements through a novel feed-forward Dense Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) that yields a spatially dense prior over global placements; we then model the local object-level configuration through a novel disentangled point cloud diffusion module that separately diffuses the object geometry and the placement frame, enabling precise local geometric reasoning. Interestingly, we demonstrate that our point cloud diffusion achieves substantially higher accuracy than a prior approach based on SE(3)-diffusion, even in the context of rigid object placement. We validate our approach across a suite of challenging tasks in simulation and in the real-world on high-precision industrial insertion tasks. Furthermore, we present results on a cloth-hanging task in simulation, indicating that our framework can further relax assumptions on object rigidity.

AI.tldr: TAX-DPD是一个分层解耦的点扩散框架，通过全局场景级放置建模和局部对象级配置建模，实现了高精度的物体放置，在放置精度、多模态覆盖和几何泛化方面达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 端到端策略虽然在表达性和灵活性方面表现出色，但在泛化到新物体几何形状和实现高精度方面存在困难。基于目标预测的物体中心方法提供了模块化分解，但需要更精确的放置框架。
AI.method: 提出分层解耦的点扩散框架：1) 全局场景级放置通过前馈密集高斯混合模型生成空间密集先验；2) 局部对象级配置通过解耦点云扩散模块分别扩散物体几何和放置框架，实现精确的局部几何推理。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实世界的高精度工业插入任务中验证了方法的有效性，在放置精度、多模态覆盖和几何泛化方面达到最先进性能。点云扩散比基于SE(3)-扩散的方法精度更高，且框架可扩展到非刚性物体（如布料悬挂任务）。
AI.conclusion: TAX-DPD通过分层解耦的点扩散框架，成功解决了物体放置任务中的精度和泛化问题，为机器人操作提供了有效的目标预测范式，并可扩展到非刚性物体场景。

title: Any3DAvatar: Fast and High-Quality Full-Head 3D Avatar Reconstruction from Single Portrait Image
summary: Reconstructing a complete 3D head from a single portrait remains challenging because existing methods still face a sharp quality-speed trade-off: high-fidelity pipelines often rely on multi-stage processing and per-subject optimization, while fast feed-forward models struggle with complete geometry and fine appearance details. To bridge this gap, we propose Any3DAvatar, a fast and high-quality method for single-image 3D Gaussian head avatar generation, whose fastest setting reconstructs a full head in under one second while preserving high-fidelity geometry and texture. First, we build AnyHead, a unified data suite that combines identity diversity, dense multi-view supervision, and realistic accessories, filling the main gaps of existing head data in coverage, full-head geometry, and complex appearance. Second, rather than sampling unstructured noise, we initialize from a Plücker-aware structured 3D Gaussian scaffold and perform one-step conditional denoising, formulating full-head reconstruction into a single forward pass while retaining high fidelity. Third, we introduce auxiliary view-conditioned appearance supervision on the same latent tokens alongside 3D Gaussian reconstruction, improving novel-view texture details at zero extra inference cost. Experiments show that Any3DAvatar outperforms prior single-image full-head reconstruction methods in rendering fidelity while remaining substantially faster.

AI.tldr: Any3DAvatar：一种快速高质量的单图像3D高斯头像生成方法，最快可在1秒内重建完整头部，同时保持高保真几何和纹理
AI.motivation: 现有单肖像3D头部重建方法面临质量与速度的权衡：高保真方法依赖多阶段处理和逐主体优化，而快速前馈模型难以处理完整几何和精细外观细节
AI.method: 1) 构建AnyHead统一数据集，结合身份多样性、密集多视角监督和真实配饰；2) 从Plücker感知的结构化3D高斯支架初始化，执行一步条件去噪，将全头重建转化为单次前向传递；3) 在相同潜在标记上引入辅助视角条件外观监督，提升新视角纹理细节
AI.result: Any3DAvatar在渲染保真度上优于先前单图像全头重建方法，同时保持显著更快的速度（最快设置下重建完整头部不到1秒）
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功弥合了质量与速度之间的差距，实现了快速且高质量的3D高斯头部头像生成

title: Identifying Inductive Biases for Robot Co-Design
summary: Co-designing a robot's morphology and control can ensure synergistic interactions between them, prevalent in biological organisms. However, co-design is a high-dimensional search problem. To make this search tractable, we need a systematic method for identifying inductive biases tailored to its structure. In this paper, we analyze co-design landscapes for soft locomotion and manipulation tasks and identify three patterns that are consistent across regions of their co-design spaces. We observe that within regions of co-design space, quality varies along a low-dimensional manifold. Higher-quality regions exhibit variations spread across more dimensions, while tightly coupling morphology and control. We leverage these insights to devise an efficient co-design algorithm. Since the precise instantiation of this structure varies across tasks and is not known a priori, our algorithm infers it from information gathered during search and adapts to each task's specific structure. This yields $36\%$ more improvement than benchmark algorithms. Moreover, our algorithm achieved more than two orders of magnitude in sample efficiency compared to these benchmark algorithms, demonstrating the effectiveness of leveraging inductive biases to co-design.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种利用归纳偏置进行机器人形态与控制协同设计的高效算法，通过分析协同设计空间的结构模式，自适应地推断任务特定结构，实现了比基准算法36%的改进和两个数量级的样本效率提升。
AI.motivation: 机器人形态与控制的协同设计能够确保两者之间的协同交互，这在生物有机体中很普遍。然而，协同设计是一个高维搜索问题，需要系统性的方法来识别适合其结构的归纳偏置，以使搜索变得可处理。
AI.method: 论文分析了软体机器人在运动和操作任务中的协同设计空间，识别了三个跨区域一致的模式：1）在协同设计空间区域内，质量变化沿着低维流形；2）高质量区域的变化分布在更多维度上；3）形态与控制紧密耦合。基于这些洞察，开发了一种高效协同设计算法，该算法在搜索过程中推断任务特定结构并自适应调整。
AI.result: 提出的算法比基准算法实现了36%的改进，并且在样本效率上提高了两个数量级以上，证明了利用归纳偏置进行协同设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过分析协同设计空间的结构模式并自适应地利用这些归纳偏置，可以显著提高机器人形态与控制协同设计的效率和性能，为复杂机器人系统的设计提供了新的方法论。

title: Timescale Separation Enables Deep Reinforcement Learning Control of Rotating Detonation Engine Mode Transitions
summary: Rotating detonation engines (RDEs) are a promising propulsion concept that may offer higher thermodynamic efficiency and specific impulse than conventional systems, but nonlinear phenomena, including transitions to oscillatory or chaotic propagation modes, can hinder practical operation. Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) has emerged as a promising method for controlling complex nonlinear dynamics such as those observed in RDEs. However, the multi-timescale nature of the RDE system makes direct application of DRL challenging. We address this challenge by reformulating the DRL problem in a moving reference frame that follows the detonation-wave pattern, making the wave structure appear quasi-steady to the agent. This reformulation enables scale separation between fast detonation propagation and slower operating-mode dynamics. We train DRL controllers to modulate spatially segmented injection pressure in a one-dimensional reduced-order RDE model and induce rapid transitions between different mode-locked states. Across a range of actuation periods, initial states, and target modes, controllers trained in the moving frame learn more reliably than those trained in a stationary frame and remain effective over a broader range of actuation periods. These results suggest that symmetry-aware moving reference frame formulations may be useful for related multiscale flow-control problems and that scale separation should be exploited whenever possible to enable DRL control of multi-timescale systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在移动参考系中训练深度强化学习控制器的方法，用于控制旋转爆震发动机中的多时间尺度非线性动力学问题。
AI.motivation: 旋转爆震发动机(RDEs)具有比传统系统更高的热力学效率和比冲，但其非线性现象（如振荡或混沌传播模式的转变）会阻碍实际运行。深度强化学习(DRL)是控制这类复杂非线性动力学的有前景方法，但RDE系统的多时间尺度特性使得直接应用DRRL具有挑战性。
AI.method: 通过将DRL问题重新表述在跟随爆震波模式的移动参考系中，使波结构对智能体呈现准稳态。这种重新表述实现了快速爆震传播和较慢运行模式动力学之间的尺度分离。在移动参考系中训练DRL控制器来调制一维降阶RDE模型中的空间分段注入压力，并诱导不同模式锁定状态之间的快速转变。
AI.result: 在移动参考系中训练的控制器比在静止参考系中训练的控制器学习更可靠，并且在更广泛的驱动周期范围内保持有效。这些控制器能够在不同的驱动周期、初始状态和目标模式下诱导快速模式转变。
AI.conclusion: 对称感知的移动参考系表述可能对相关的多尺度流动控制问题有用，应尽可能利用尺度分离来实现对多时间尺度系统的DRL控制。

title: DiffMagicFace: Identity Consistent Facial Editing of Real Videos
summary: Text-conditioned image editing has greatly benefitted from the advancements in Image Diffusion Models. However, extending these techniques to facial video editing introduces challenges in preserving facial identity throughout the source video and ensuring consistency of the edited subject across frames. In this paper, we introduce DiffMagicFace, a unique video editing framework that integrates two fine-tuned models for text and image control. These models operate concurrently during inference to produce video frames that maintain identity features while seamlessly aligning with the editing semantics. To ensure the consistency of the edited videos, we develop a dataset comprising images showcasing various facial perspectives for each edited subject. The creation of a data set is achieved through rendering techniques and the subsequent application of optimization algorithms. Remarkably, our approach does not depend on video datasets but still delivers high-quality results in both consistency and content. The excellent effect holds even for complex tasks like talking head videos and distinguishing closely related categories. The videos edited using our framework exhibit parity with videos that are made using traditional rendering software. Through comparative analysis with current state-of-the-art methods, our framework demonstrates superior performance in both visual appeal and quantitative metrics.

AI.tldr: DiffMagicFace：一种基于文本条件图像编辑的扩散模型视频编辑框架，专注于面部视频编辑，通过集成两个微调模型实现身份保持和编辑语义对齐，无需视频数据集即可生成高质量一致的面部编辑视频。
AI.motivation: 文本条件图像编辑在扩散模型推动下取得进展，但扩展到面部视频编辑面临两大挑战：1）如何在源视频中保持面部身份一致性；2）如何确保编辑后的主体在帧间保持一致性。现有方法难以同时解决这两个问题。
AI.method: 提出DiffMagicFace框架，集成两个微调模型：一个用于文本控制，一个用于图像控制。推理时两模型并行运行生成视频帧。为确保一致性，构建包含每个编辑主体多种面部视角的数据集，通过渲染技术和优化算法创建数据集。框架不依赖视频数据集。
AI.result: 框架在一致性和内容质量方面均表现出色，即使对于复杂的说话头部视频和区分密切相关的类别任务也有效。编辑的视频与传统渲染软件制作的视频质量相当。与当前SOTA方法相比，在视觉吸引力和定量指标上均表现更优。
AI.conclusion: DiffMagicFace成功解决了面部视频编辑中的身份保持和帧间一致性问题，通过创新的双模型集成方法和专门构建的数据集，实现了高质量的面部视频编辑，无需依赖视频数据集，为文本条件视频编辑提供了有效解决方案。

title: StarVLA-$α$: Reducing Complexity in Vision-Language-Action Systems
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have recently emerged as a promising paradigm for building general-purpose robotic agents. However, the VLA landscape remains highly fragmented and complex: as existing approaches vary substantially in architectures, training data, embodiment configurations, and benchmark-specific engineering. In this work, we introduce StarVLA-$α$, a simple yet strong baseline designed to study VLA design choices under controlled conditions. StarVLA-$α$ deliberately minimizes architectural and pipeline complexity to reduce experimental confounders and enable systematic analysis. Specifically, we re-evaluate several key design axes, including action modeling strategies, robot-specific pretraining, and interface engineering. Across unified multi-benchmark training on LIBERO, SimplerEnv, RoboTwin, and RoboCasa, the same simple baseline remains highly competitive, indicating that a strong VLM backbone combined with minimal design is already sufficient to achieve strong performance without relying on additional architectural complexity or engineering tricks. Notably, our single generalist model outperforms $π_{0.5}$ by 20\% on the public real-world RoboChallenge benchmark. We expect StarVLA-$α$ to serve as a solid starting point for future research in the VLA regime. Code will be released at https://github.com/starVLA/starVLA.

AI.tldr: StarVLA-α是一个简单但强大的Vision-Language-Action模型基线，通过最小化架构复杂性来系统研究VLA设计选择，在多个基准测试中表现出色。
AI.motivation: 当前VLA模型领域高度碎片化且复杂，不同方法在架构、训练数据、具身配置和基准工程方面差异巨大，缺乏系统性的设计选择研究。
AI.method: 设计简单的StarVLA-α基线，最小化架构和流程复杂性以减少实验混杂因素。系统评估动作建模策略、机器人特定预训练和接口工程等关键设计轴。在LIBERO、SimplerEnv、RoboTwin和RoboCasa等多个基准上进行统一训练。
AI.result: 相同的简单基线与复杂方法相比保持高度竞争力，表明强大的VLM骨干结合最小化设计已足够实现强大性能，无需额外架构复杂性或工程技巧。单一通用模型在真实世界RoboChallenge基准上比π₀.₅高出20%。
AI.conclusion: StarVLA-α可作为VLA领域未来研究的坚实起点，证明简单设计结合强大VLM骨干足以实现优异性能，为系统研究VLA设计选择提供了基础。

title: A Resource-Efficient Hybrid CNN-LSTM network for image-based bean leaf disease classification
summary: Accurate and resource-efficient automated diagnosis is a cornerstone of modern agricultural expert systems. While Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have established benchmarks in plant pathology, their ability to capture long-range spatial dependencies is often limited by standard pooling layers, and their high memory footprint hinders deployment on portable devices. This paper proposes a lightweight hybrid CNN-LSTM system for bean leaf disease classification. By integrating an LSTM layer to model the spatial-sequential relationships within feature maps, our hybrid architecture achieves a 94.38% accuracy while maintaining an exceptionally small footprint of 1.86 MB; a 70% reduction in size compared to traditional CNN-based systems. Furthermore, we provide a systematic evaluation of image augmentation strategies, demonstrating that tailored transformations are superior to generic combinations for maintaining the integrity of diagnostic patterns. Results on the $\textit{ibean}$ dataset confirm that the proposed system achieves state-of-the-art F1 scores of 99.22% with EfficientNet-B7+LSTM, providing a robust and scalable framework for real-time agricultural decision support in resource-constrained environments. The code and augmented datasets used in this study are publicly available on this $\href{https://github.com/HJin-R/bean_disease}{Github}$ repo.

AI.tldr: 提出轻量级CNN-LSTM混合系统用于豆叶病害分类，在保持94.38%准确率的同时模型大小仅1.86MB，比传统CNN系统减少70%，并在ibean数据集上达到99.22%的F1分数。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在植物病理学中虽然表现优异，但其标准池化层难以捕捉长距离空间依赖关系，且高内存占用阻碍了在便携设备上的部署。需要开发既准确又资源高效的农业专家系统诊断方案。
AI.method: 提出轻量级混合CNN-LSTM架构，通过集成LSTM层来建模特征图中的空间序列关系。系统评估了图像增强策略，证明定制化变换优于通用组合。在ibean数据集上验证了EfficientNet-B7+LSTM等配置。
AI.result: 混合架构达到94.38%的准确率，模型大小仅1.86MB（比传统CNN减少70%）。在ibean数据集上获得99.22%的F1分数，实现最先进性能。证明了定制化图像增强策略对保持诊断模式完整性的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的轻量级CNN-LSTM混合系统为资源受限环境中的实时农业决策支持提供了鲁棒且可扩展的框架，在保持高精度的同时显著减少了模型大小，适合部署在便携设备上。

title: Enhancing Mental Health Counseling Support in Bangladesh using Culturally-Grounded Knowledge
summary: Large language models (LLMs) show promise in generating supportive responses for mental health and counseling applications. However, their responses often lack cultural sensitivity, contextual grounding, and clinically appropriate guidance. This work addresses the gap of how to systematically incorporate domain-specific, clinically validated knowledge into LLMs to improve counseling quality. We utilize and compare two approaches, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and a knowledge graph (KG)-based method, designed to support para-counselors. Our KG is constructed manually and clinically validated, capturing causal relationships between stressors, interventions, and outcomes, with contributions from multidisciplinary people. We evaluated multiple LLMs in both settings using BERTScore F1 and SBERT cosine similarity, as well as human evaluation across five metrics, which is designed to directly measure the effectiveness of counseling beyond similarity at the surface level.
