The results show that KG-based approaches consistently improve contextual relevance, clinical appropriateness, and practical usability compared to RAG alone, demonstrating that structured, expert-validated knowledge plays a critical role in addressing LLMs limitations in counseling tasks.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了基于知识图谱和检索增强生成两种方法，将临床验证知识整合到LLMs中，以提升心理咨询质量。知识图谱方法在上下文相关性、临床适宜性和实用性方面表现更优。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在心理健康和心理咨询应用中显示出潜力，但其回应往往缺乏文化敏感性、上下文基础和临床适宜性指导。需要系统性地将领域特定、临床验证的知识整合到LLMs中，以提升心理咨询质量。
AI.method: 研究比较了两种方法：检索增强生成和基于知识图谱的方法。知识图谱是手动构建并经过临床验证的，捕捉了压力源、干预措施和结果之间的因果关系，由多学科人员贡献。使用BERTScore F1和SBERT余弦相似度评估多个LLMs，同时进行人工评估，设计了五个直接衡量心理咨询效果而非表面相似性的指标。
AI.result: 结果显示，与单独的RAG相比，基于知识图谱的方法在上下文相关性、临床适宜性和实际可用性方面持续改善。结构化、专家验证的知识在解决LLMs在心理咨询任务中的局限性方面发挥着关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 结构化、专家验证的知识对于提升LLMs在心理咨询任务中的表现至关重要。基于知识图谱的方法比检索增强生成更能有效整合临床知识，改善咨询质量，为解决LLMs在专业领域应用中的局限性提供了有效途径。

title: Gaslight, Gatekeep, V1-V3: Early Visual Cortex Alignment Shields Vision-Language Models from Sycophantic Manipulation
summary: Vision-language models are increasingly deployed in high-stakes settings, yet their susceptibility to sycophantic manipulation remains poorly understood, particularly in relation to how these models represent visual information internally. Whether models whose visual representations more closely mirror human neural processing are also more resistant to adversarial pressure is an open question with implications for both neuroscience and AI safety. We investigate this question by evaluating 12 open-weight vision-language models spanning 6 architecture families and a 40$\times$ parameter range (256M--10B) along two axes: brain alignment, measured by predicting fMRI responses from the Natural Scenes Dataset across 8 human subjects and 6 visual cortex regions of interest, and sycophancy, measured through 76,800 two-turn gaslighting prompts spanning 5 categories and 10 difficulty levels. Region-of-interest analysis reveals that alignment specifically in early visual cortex (V1--V3) is a reliable negative predictor of sycophancy ($r = -0.441$, BCa 95\% CI $[-0.740, -0.031]$), with all 12 leave-one-out correlations negative and the strongest effect for existence denial attacks ($r = -0.597$, $p = 0.040$). This anatomically specific relationship is absent in higher-order category-selective regions, suggesting that faithful low-level visual encoding provides a measurable anchor against adversarial linguistic override in vision-language models. We release our code on \href{https://github.com/aryashah2k/Gaslight-Gatekeep-Sycophantic-Manipulation}{GitHub} and dataset on \href{https://huggingface.co/datasets/aryashah00/Gaslight-Gatekeep-V1-V3}{Hugging Face}

AI.tldr: 研究发现视觉语言模型早期视觉皮层（V1-V3）的脑对齐程度与模型对谄媚性操纵的抵抗性呈负相关，即早期视觉编码越忠实，模型越不容易被语言攻击误导。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型在高风险场景中部署日益增多，但其对谄媚性操纵的易感性仍不清楚。特别是，模型的视觉表征与人类神经处理的相似程度是否影响其对对抗性压力的抵抗性，这对神经科学和AI安全都有重要意义。
AI.method: 评估12个开源视觉语言模型（涵盖6种架构，参数范围256M-10B），从两个维度测量：1）脑对齐：使用自然场景数据集预测8名受试者在6个视觉皮层感兴趣区域的fMRI响应；2）谄媚性：使用76,800个两轮"煤气灯"提示，涵盖5个类别和10个难度级别。
AI.result: 早期视觉皮层（V1-V3）的对齐程度是谄媚性的可靠负向预测因子（r=-0.441），所有12个留一法相关性均为负值，其中存在否认攻击的效果最强（r=-0.597，p=0.040）。这种解剖特异性关系在高级类别选择区域中不存在。
AI.conclusion: 忠实的低层次视觉编码为视觉语言模型提供了可测量的锚点，能够抵抗对抗性语言覆盖。这一发现表明早期视觉处理的质量可能是视觉语言模型鲁棒性的重要指标。

title: Grounded World Model for Semantically Generalizable Planning
summary: In Model Predictive Control (MPC), world models predict the future outcomes of various action proposals, which are then scored to guide the selection of the optimal action. For visuomotor MPC, the score function is a distance metric between a predicted image and a goal image, measured in the latent space of a pretrained vision encoder like DINO and JEPA. However, it is challenging to obtain the goal image in advance of the task execution, particularly in new environments. Additionally, conveying the goal through an image offers limited interactivity compared with natural language. In this work, we propose to learn a Grounded World Model (GWM) in a vision-language-aligned latent space. As a result, each proposed action is scored based on how close its future outcome is to the task instruction, reflected by the similarity of embeddings. This approach transforms the visuomotor MPC to a VLA that surpasses VLM-based VLAs in semantic generalization. On the proposed WISER benchmark, GWM-MPC achieves a 87% success rate on the test set comprising 288 tasks that feature unseen visual signals and referring expressions, yet remain solvable with motions demonstrated during training. In contrast, traditional VLAs achieve an average success rate of 22%, even though they overfit the training set with a 90% success rate.

AI.tldr: 提出GWM-MPC方法，在视觉语言对齐的潜在空间中学习基础世界模型，将视觉运动模型预测控制转化为视觉语言智能体，实现基于任务指令而非目标图像的语义泛化。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉运动MPC需要预先获取目标图像，但在新环境中难以提前获得；同时图像目标相比自然语言交互性有限。需要一种能够直接基于任务指令进行预测控制的方法。
AI.method: 学习一个在视觉语言对齐潜在空间中的基础世界模型(GWM)，使每个动作提案的评分基于其未来结果与任务指令的接近程度，通过嵌入相似性来衡量。将视觉运动MPC转化为视觉语言智能体。
AI.result: 在提出的WISER基准测试中，GWM-MPC在包含288个任务的测试集上达到87%的成功率，这些任务具有未见过的视觉信号和指代表达式。传统VLA方法平均成功率仅为22%，尽管在训练集上过拟合达到90%成功率。
AI.conclusion: GWM-MPC方法通过在视觉语言对齐空间中学习世界模型，实现了基于任务指令的模型预测控制，显著提升了语义泛化能力，超越了基于VLM的传统视觉语言智能体。

title: DRG-Font: Dynamic Reference-Guided Few-shot Font Generation via Contrastive Style-Content Disentanglement
summary: Few-shot Font Generation aims to generate stylistically consistent glyphs from a few reference glyphs. However, capturing complex font styles from a few exemplars remains challenging, and the existing methods often struggle to retain discernible local characteristics in generated samples. This paper introduces DRG-Font, a contrastive font generation strategy that learns complex glyph attributes by decomposing style and content embedding spaces. For optimal style supervision, the proposed architecture incorporates a Reference Selection (RS) Module to dynamically select the best style reference from an available pool of candidates. The network learns to decompose glyph attributes into style and shape priors through a Multi-scale Style Head Block (MSHB) and a Multi-scale Content Head Block (MCHB). For style adaptation, a Multi-Fusion Upsampling Block (MFUB) produces the target glyph by combining the reference style prior and target content prior. The proposed method demonstrates significant improvements over state-of-the-art approaches across multiple visual and analytical benchmarks.

AI.tldr: DRG-Font是一种基于对比学习的少样本字体生成方法，通过解耦风格和内容嵌入空间来学习复杂字形属性，并引入动态参考选择和多尺度融合模块提升生成质量。
AI.motivation: 少样本字体生成面临从少量参考字形中捕捉复杂字体风格的挑战，现有方法难以在生成样本中保留可辨识的局部特征，需要更有效的风格表示和生成机制。
AI.method: 提出DRG-Font框架：1) 参考选择模块动态选择最佳风格参考；2) 多尺度风格头块和多尺度内容头块解耦字形属性为风格和形状先验；3) 多融合上采样块结合参考风格先验和目标内容先验生成目标字形。
AI.result: 该方法在多个视觉和分析基准测试中显著优于现有最先进方法，能够生成风格一致且保留局部特征的高质量字形。
AI.conclusion: DRG-Font通过解耦风格和内容表示、动态参考选择以及多尺度融合机制，有效解决了少样本字体生成中复杂风格捕捉和局部特征保留的挑战。

title: Artificial intelligence application in lymphoma diagnosis with Vision Transformer using weakly supervised training
summary: Vision transformers (ViT) have been shown to allow for more flexible feature detection and can outperform convolutional neural network (CNN) when pre-trained on sufficient data. Due to their promising feature detection capabilities, we deployed ViTs for morphological classification of anaplastic large cell lymphoma (ALCL) versus classic Hodgkin lymphoma (cHL). We had previously designed a ViT model which was trained on a small dataset of 1,200 image patches in fully supervised training. That model achieved a diagnostic accuracy of 100% and an F1 score of 1.0 on the independent test set. Since fully supervised training is not a practical method due to lack of expertise resources in both the training and testing phases, we conducted a recent study on a modified approach to training data (weakly supervised training) and show that labeling training image patch automatically at the slide level of each whole-slide-image is a more practical solution for clinical use of Vision Transformer. Our ViT model, trained on a larger dataset of 100,000 image patches, yields evaluation metrics with significant accuracy, F1 score, and area under the curve (AUC) at 91.85%, 0.92, and 0.98, respectively. These are respectable values that qualify this ViT model, with weakly supervised training, as a suitable tool for a deep learning module in clinical model development using automated image patch extraction.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用弱监督训练的视觉Transformer进行ALCL与cHL的形态学分类，相比完全监督训练更实用，在10万张图像块上达到91.85%准确率、0.92 F1分数和0.98 AUC。
AI.motivation: 由于完全监督训练在临床实践中不实用（需要专家标注大量图像块），研究旨在开发更实用的弱监督训练方法，使Vision Transformer能够在临床环境中实际应用。
AI.method: 采用弱监督训练方法，在整张切片级别自动标注训练图像块，使用Vision Transformer模型在10万张图像块上进行训练，用于ALCL与cHL的形态学分类。
AI.result: 弱监督训练的ViT模型在独立测试集上达到91.85%准确率、0.92 F1分数和0.98 AUC，虽然略低于完全监督训练的100%准确率，但更具临床实用性。
AI.conclusion: 弱监督训练的Vision Transformer是临床模型开发中合适的深度学习模块，通过自动图像块提取实现了实用性与性能的平衡。

title: MARS$^2$: Scaling Multi-Agent Tree Search via Reinforcement Learning for Code Generation
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) paradigms have demonstrated strong performance on reasoning-intensive tasks such as code generation. However, limited trajectory diversity often leads to diminishing returns, which constrains the achievable performance ceiling. Search-enhanced RL alleviates this issue by introducing structured exploration, which remains constrained by the single-agent policy priors. Meanwhile, leveraging multiple interacting policies can acquire more diverse exploratory signals, but existing approaches are typically decoupled from structured search. We propose \textbf{MARS$^2$} (Multi-Agent Reinforced Tree-Search Scaling), a unified RL framework in which multiple independently-optimized agents collaborate within a shared tree-structured search environment. MARS$^2$ models the search tree as a learnable multi-agent interaction environment, enabling heterogeneous agents to collaboratively generate and refine candidate solutions within a shared search topology. To support effective learning, we introduce a path-level group advantage formulation based on tree-consistent reward shaping, which facilitates effective credit assignment across complex search trajectories. Experiments on code generation benchmarks show that MARS$^2$ consistently improves performance across diverse model combinations and training settings, demonstrating the effectiveness of coupling multi-agent collaboration with tree search for enhancing reinforcement learning. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/TsinghuaC3I/MARTI.

AI.tldr: MARS²是一个将多智能体协作与树搜索相结合的统一强化学习框架，用于解决代码生成等推理密集型任务中轨迹多样性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在代码生成等推理任务中存在轨迹多样性有限的问题，导致性能提升受限。搜索增强的RL虽然通过结构化探索缓解了这一问题，但仍受限于单智能体策略先验。而现有的多智能体方法虽然能获得更多样化的探索信号，但通常与结构化搜索解耦。
AI.method: 提出MARS²框架，将搜索树建模为可学习的多智能体交互环境，让多个独立优化的智能体在共享的树结构搜索环境中协作。引入基于树一致性奖励塑造的路径级群体优势公式，支持跨复杂搜索轨迹的有效信用分配。
AI.result: 在代码生成基准测试中，MARS²在不同模型组合和训练设置下均能持续提升性能，证明了将多智能体协作与树搜索耦合对于增强强化学习的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MARS²通过统一多智能体协作与树搜索，有效解决了强化学习中轨迹多样性不足的问题，为推理密集型任务提供了更强大的解决方案。

title: ACT: Automated CPS Testing for Open-Source Robotic Platforms
summary: Open-source software for cyber-physical systems (CPS) often lacks robust testing involving robotic platforms, resulting in critical errors that remain undetected. This is especially challenging when multiple modules of CPS software are developed by various open-source contributors. To address this gap, we propose Automated CPS Testing (ACT) that performs automated, continuous testing of open-source software with its robotic platforms, integrated with the open-source infrastructure such as GitHub. We implement an ACT prototype and conduct a case study on an open-source CPS with an educational robotic platform to demonstrate its capabilities.

AI.tldr: 提出ACT框架，用于自动化持续测试开源CPS软件与机器人平台，集成GitHub基础设施
AI.motivation: 开源CPS软件缺乏涉及机器人平台的鲁棒测试，导致关键错误未被发现，特别是当多个模块由不同贡献者开发时
AI.method: 提出自动化CPS测试（ACT）框架，执行开源软件与机器人平台的自动化持续测试，并与GitHub等开源基础设施集成
AI.result: 实现了ACT原型，并在具有教育机器人平台的开源CPS上进行了案例研究，展示了其能力
AI.conclusion: ACT框架能够有效解决开源CPS软件缺乏机器人平台测试的问题，通过自动化持续测试集成到开源基础设施中

title: From Synchrony to Sequence: Exo-to-Ego Generation via Interpolation
summary: Exo-to-Ego video generation aims to synthesize a first-person video from a synchronized third-person view and corresponding camera poses. While paired supervision is available, synchronized exo-ego data inherently introduces substantial spatio-temporal and geometric discontinuities, violating the smooth-motion assumptions of standard video generation benchmarks. We identify this synchronization-induced jump as the central challenge and propose Syn2Seq-Forcing, a sequential formulation that interpolates between the source and target videos to form a single continuous signal. By reframing Exo2Ego as sequential signal modeling rather than a conventional condition-output task, our approach enables diffusion-based sequence models, e.g. Diffusion Forcing Transformers (DFoT), to capture coherent transitions across frames more effectively. Empirically, we show that interpolating only the videos, without performing pose interpolation already produces significant improvements, emphasizing that the dominant difficulty arises from spatio-temporal discontinuities. Beyond immediate performance gains, this formulation establishes a general and flexible framework capable of unifying both Exo2Ego and Ego2Exo generation within a single continuous sequence model, providing a principled foundation for future research in cross-view video synthesis.

AI.tldr: 提出Syn2Seq-Forcing方法，将Exo-to-Ego视频生成重新定义为连续序列建模问题，通过视频插值解决同步数据中的时空不连续性挑战
AI.motivation: 同步的外视角-第一人称视频数据存在显著的时空和几何不连续性，违反了标准视频生成基准的平滑运动假设，这种同步引起的跳跃是主要挑战
AI.method: 提出Syn2Seq-Forcing顺序公式，在源视频和目标视频之间进行插值形成单一连续信号，将Exo2Ego重新定义为序列信号建模而非传统的条件-输出任务，使基于扩散的序列模型能够更有效地捕捉帧间连贯过渡
AI.result: 仅对视频进行插值（不进行姿态插值）已能产生显著改进，强调主要困难源于时空不连续性；该框架能够统一Exo2Ego和Ego2Exo生成于单一连续序列模型中
AI.conclusion: Syn2Seq-Forcing为解决跨视角视频合成中的时空不连续性提供了原则性基础，建立了通用灵活的框架，为未来研究奠定基础

title: Path-Sampled Integrated Gradients
summary: We introduce path-sampled integrated gradients (PS-IG), a framework that generalizes feature attribution by computing the expected value over baselines sampled along the linear interpolation path. We prove that PS-IG is mathematically equivalent to path-weighted integrated gradients, provided the weighting function matches the cumulative distribution function of the sampling density. This equivalence allows the stochastic expectation to be evaluated via a deterministic Riemann sum, improving the error convergence rate from $O(m^{-1/2})$ to $O(m^{-1})$ for smooth models. Furthermore, we demonstrate analytically that PS-IG functions as a variance-reducing filter against gradient noise - strictly lowering attribution variance by a factor of 1/3 under uniform sampling - while preserving key axiomatic properties such as linearity and implementation invariance.

AI.tldr: PS-IG是一种通过沿线性插值路径对基线采样来计算期望值的特征归因框架，它等价于路径加权积分梯度，可将误差收敛率从O(m^{-1/2})提升到O(m^{-1})，并能将归因方差降低1/3。
AI.motivation: 改进特征归因方法的计算效率和稳定性，通过路径采样框架来降低方差并提高收敛速度，同时保持重要的公理性质。
AI.method: 提出路径采样积分梯度(PS-IG)框架，通过对线性插值路径上的基线进行采样来计算期望值；证明PS-IG与路径加权积分梯度在数学上等价，前提是加权函数与采样密度的累积分布函数匹配；通过确定性黎曼和计算随机期望，提高收敛速度。
AI.result: PS-IG将误差收敛率从O(m^{-1/2})提高到O(m^{-1})；在均匀采样下能将归因方差严格降低1/3；同时保持线性、实现不变性等关键公理性质；作为对抗梯度噪声的方差减少滤波器。
AI.conclusion: PS-IG提供了一个统一的框架，通过路径采样改进特征归因的计算效率和稳定性，在保持公理性质的同时显著降低方差并提高收敛速度，为可解释AI提供了更可靠的工具。

title: PBE-UNet: A light weight Progressive Boundary-Enhanced U-Net with Scale-Aware Aggregation for Ultrasound Image Segmentation
summary: Accurate lesion segmentation in ultrasound images is essential for preventive screening and clinical diagnosis, yet remains challenging due to low contrast, blurry boundaries, and significant scale variations. Although existing deep learning-based methods have achieved remarkable performance, these methods still struggle with scale variations and indistinct tumor boundaries. To address these challenges, we propose a progressive boundary enhanced U-Net (PBE-UNet). Specially, we first introduce a scale-aware aggregation module (SAAM) that dynamically adjusts its receptive field to capture robust multi-scale contextual information. Then, we propose a boundary-guided feature enhancement (BGFE) module to enhance the feature representations. We find that there are large gaps between the narrow boundary and the wide segmentation error areas. Unlike existing methods that treat boundaries as static masks, the BGFE module progressively expands the narrow boundary prediction into broader spatial attention maps. Thus, broader spatial attention maps could effectively cover the wider segmentation error regions and enhance the model's focus on these challenging areas. We conduct expensive experiments on four benchmark ultrasound datasets, BUSI, Dataset B, TN3K, and BP. The experimental results how that our proposed PBE-UNet outperforms state-of-the-art ultrasound image segmentation methods. The code is at https://github.com/cruelMouth/PBE-UNet.

AI.tldr: PBE-UNet：一种渐进式边界增强的U-Net架构，通过尺度感知聚合模块和边界引导特征增强模块，解决超声图像中病灶分割的尺度变化和模糊边界问题。
AI.motivation: 超声图像病灶分割面临低对比度、模糊边界和显著尺度变化的挑战。现有深度学习方法虽然性能显著，但仍难以处理尺度变化和模糊的肿瘤边界。
AI.method: 提出渐进式边界增强U-Net（PBE-UNet），包含两个核心模块：1）尺度感知聚合模块（SAAM）动态调整感受野以捕获鲁棒的多尺度上下文信息；2）边界引导特征增强（BGFE）模块将狭窄边界预测逐步扩展为更宽的空间注意力图，有效覆盖更广的分割误差区域。
AI.result: 在四个超声图像基准数据集（BUSI、Dataset B、TN3K、BP）上的实验表明，PBE-UNet优于最先进的超声图像分割方法。
AI.conclusion: PBE-UNet通过尺度感知聚合和渐进式边界增强机制，有效解决了超声图像分割中的尺度变化和模糊边界问题，在多个数据集上取得了优越性能。

title: LARY: A Latent Action Representation Yielding Benchmark for Generalizable Vision-to-Action Alignment
summary: While the shortage of explicit action data limits Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, human action videos offer a scalable yet unlabeled data source. A critical challenge in utilizing large-scale human video datasets lies in transforming visual signals into ontology-independent representations, known as latent actions. However, the capacity of latent action representation to derive robust control from visual observations has yet to be rigorously evaluated. We introduce the Latent Action Representation Yielding (LARY) Benchmark, a unified framework for evaluating latent action representations on both high-level semantic actions (what to do) and low-level robotic control (how to do). The comprehensively curated dataset encompasses over one million videos (1,000 hours) spanning 151 action categories, alongside 620K image pairs and 595K motion trajectories across diverse embodiments and environments. Our experiments reveal two crucial insights: (i) General visual foundation models, trained without any action supervision, consistently outperform specialized embodied latent action models. (ii) Latent-based visual space is fundamentally better aligned to physical action space than pixel-based space. These results suggest that general visual representations inherently encode action-relevant knowledge for physical control, and that semantic-level abstraction serves as a fundamentally more effective pathway from vision to action than pixel-level reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了LARY基准测试，用于评估潜在动作表示在高级语义动作和低级机器人控制中的表现，发现通用视觉基础模型优于专门的具身潜在动作模型，且潜在空间比像素空间更接近物理动作空间。
AI.motivation: 显式动作数据的缺乏限制了视觉-语言-动作模型的发展，而人类动作视频提供了可扩展但未标记的数据源。关键挑战在于将视觉信号转换为本体无关的潜在动作表示，但潜在动作表示从视觉观察中推导鲁棒控制的能力尚未得到严格评估。
AI.method: 提出了LARY基准测试框架，包含超过100万个视频（1000小时）涵盖151个动作类别，以及62万张图像对和59.5万个运动轨迹，覆盖多样化的具身和环境设置。通过该基准系统评估潜在动作表示的性能。
AI.result: 实验发现两个关键洞察：1）未经任何动作监督训练的通用视觉基础模型始终优于专门的具身潜在动作模型；2）基于潜在表示的视觉空间比基于像素的空间更接近物理动作空间。
AI.conclusion: 通用视觉表示固有地编码了物理控制相关的动作知识，语义级抽象是从视觉到动作的更有效途径，而非像素级重建。这为利用大规模无标签人类视频数据开发更好的VLA模型提供了理论基础。

title: When Missing Becomes Structure: Intent-Preserving Policy Completion from Financial KOL Discourse
comment: Main paper with supplementary material included
summary: Key Opinion Leader (KOL) discourse on social media is widely consumed as investment guidance, yet turning it into executable trading strategies without injecting assumptions about unspecified execution decisions remains an open problem. We observe that the gaps in KOL statements are not random deficiencies but a structured separation: KOLs express directional intent (what to buy or sell and why) while leaving execution decisions (when, how much, how long) systematically unspecified. Building on this observation, we propose an intent-preserving policy completion framework that treats KOL discourse as a partial trading policy and uses offline reinforcement learning to complete the missing execution decisions around the KOL-expressed intent. Experiments on multimodal KOL discourse from YouTube and X (2022-2025) show that KICL achieves the best return and Sharpe ratio on both platforms while maintaining zero unsupported entries and zero directional reversals, and ablations confirm that the full framework yields an 18.9% return improvement over the KOL-aligned baseline.

AI.tldr: 提出KICL框架，将KOL社交媒体言论视为部分交易策略，使用离线强化学习补全缺失的执行决策，在保持KOL意图的同时实现可执行的交易策略。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体上KOL言论被广泛用作投资指导，但将其转化为可执行的交易策略而不对未指定的执行决策注入假设仍是一个开放问题。KOL陈述中的空白不是随机缺陷，而是结构化分离：KOL表达方向意图（买/卖什么及原因），而将执行决策（何时、多少、多久）系统性地留白。
AI.method: 提出意图保持策略补全框架，将KOL言论视为部分交易策略，使用离线强化学习补全围绕KOL表达意图的缺失执行决策。在YouTube和X平台的多模态KOL言论数据集（2022-2025）上进行实验。
AI.result: KICL在两个平台上均实现最佳回报和夏普比率，同时保持零无支持入场和零方向反转。消融实验确认完整框架相比KOL对齐基线带来18.9%的回报改进。
AI.conclusion: KOL言论中的结构化空白可以通过意图保持策略补全框架有效处理，离线强化学习能够补全缺失的执行决策，在保持KOL原始意图的同时实现可执行的交易策略，显著提升投资表现。

title: Temporally Consistent Long-Term Memory for 3D Single Object Tracking
summary: 3D Single Object Tracking (3D-SOT) aims to localize a target object across a sequence of LiDAR point clouds, given its 3D bounding box in the first frame. Recent methods have adopted a memory-based approach to utilize previously observed features of the target object, but remain limited to only a few recent frames. This work reveals that their temporal capacity is fundamentally constrained to short-term context due to severe temporal feature inconsistency and excessive memory overhead. To this end, we propose a robust long-term 3D-SOT framework, ChronoTrack, which preserves the temporal feature consistency while efficiently aggregating the diverse target features via long-term memory. Based on a compact set of learnable memory tokens, ChronoTrack leverages long-term information through two complementary objectives: a temporal consistency loss and a memory cycle consistency loss. The former enforces feature alignment across frames, alleviating temporal drift and improving the reliability of proposed long-term memory. In parallel, the latter encourages each token to encode diverse and discriminative target representations observed throughout the sequence via memory-point-memory cyclic walks. As a result, ChronoTrack achieves new state-of-the-art performance on multiple 3D-SOT benchmarks, demonstrating its effectiveness in long-term target modeling with compact memory while running at real-time speed of 42 FPS on a single RTX 4090 GPU. The code is available at https://github.com/ujaejoon/ChronoTrack

AI.tldr: ChronoTrack是一个用于3D单目标跟踪的长期记忆框架，通过可学习记忆令牌和双重一致性损失解决传统方法的时间特征不一致和内存开销问题，在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D单目标跟踪方法主要基于短期记忆，仅利用最近几帧的特征，这受到时间特征不一致和内存开销过大的限制，无法有效利用长期上下文信息。
AI.method: 提出ChronoTrack框架，使用一组可学习的记忆令牌来聚合长期目标特征。通过两个互补目标：时间一致性损失确保跨帧特征对齐，减少时间漂移；记忆循环一致性损失通过记忆-点-记忆循环行走使每个令牌编码序列中观察到的多样且具有判别性的目标表示。
AI.result: 在多个3D-SOT基准测试中达到新的最先进性能，证明了其在紧凑内存下进行长期目标建模的有效性，同时在单个RTX 4090 GPU上以42 FPS的实时速度运行。
AI.conclusion: ChronoTrack通过解决时间特征不一致和内存开销问题，成功实现了长期3D单目标跟踪，为3D-SOT领域提供了有效的长期记忆解决方案。

title: Dual-Control Frequency-Aware Diffusion Model for Depth-Dependent Optical Microrobot Microscopy Image Generation
summary: Optical microrobots actuated by optical tweezers (OT) are important for cell manipulation and microscale assembly, but their autonomous operation depends on accurate 3D perception. Developing such perception systems is challenging because large-scale, high-quality microscopy datasets are scarce, owing to complex fabrication processes and labor-intensive annotation. Although generative AI offers a promising route for data augmentation, existing generative adversarial network (GAN)-based methods struggle to reproduce key optical characteristics, particularly depth-dependent diffraction and defocus effects. To address this limitation, we propose Du-FreqNet, a dual-control, frequency-aware diffusion model for physically consistent microscopy image synthesis. The framework features two independent ControlNet branches to encode microrobot 3D point clouds and depth-specific mesh layers, respectively. We introduce an adaptive frequency-domain loss that dynamically reweights high- and low-frequency components based on the distance to the focal plane. By leveraging differentiable FFT-based supervision, Du-FreqNet captures physically meaningful frequency distributions often missed by pixel-space methods. Trained on a limited dataset (e.g., 80 images per pose), our model achieves controllable, depth-dependent image synthesis, improving SSIM by 20.7% over baselines. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Du-FreqNet generalizes effectively to unseen poses and significantly enhances downstream tasks, including 3D pose and depth estimation, thereby facilitating robust closed-loop control in microrobotic systems.

AI.tldr: 提出Du-FreqNet，一种双控制频率感知扩散模型，用于物理一致的显微镜图像合成，解决光学微机器人3D感知中数据稀缺和现有GAN方法难以捕捉深度相关光学特性的问题。
AI.motivation: 光学微机器人的自主操作需要准确的3D感知，但大规模高质量显微镜数据集稀缺，主要由于复杂的制造过程和劳动密集的标注。现有基于GAN的生成方法难以再现关键光学特性，特别是深度相关的衍射和散焦效应。
AI.method: 提出Du-FreqNet，一种双控制频率感知扩散模型：1) 两个独立的ControlNet分支分别编码微机器人3D点云和深度特定网格层；2) 引入自适应频域损失，根据到焦平面的距离动态重新加权高频和低频分量；3) 利用基于可微分FFT的监督，捕捉像素空间方法常忽略的物理意义频率分布。
AI.result: 在有限数据集（如每个姿态80张图像）上训练，模型实现了可控的深度相关图像合成，SSIM比基线提高20.7%。大量实验表明Du-FreqNet能有效泛化到未见过的姿态，并显著提升下游任务（包括3D姿态和深度估计），从而促进微机器人系统中的鲁棒闭环控制。
AI.conclusion: Du-FreqNet通过双控制结构和自适应频域损失，实现了物理一致的显微镜图像合成，解决了光学微机器人3D感知中的数据稀缺问题，为微机器人系统的鲁棒闭环控制提供了有效解决方案。

title: AffordSim: A Scalable Data Generator and Benchmark for Affordance-Aware Robotic Manipulation
summary: Simulation-based data generation has become a dominant paradigm for training robotic manipulation policies, yet existing platforms do not incorporate object affordance information into trajectory generation. As a result, tasks requiring precise interaction with specific functional regions--grasping a mug by its handle, pouring from a cup's rim, or hanging a mug on a hook--cannot be automatically generated with semantically correct trajectories. We introduce AffordSim, the first simulation framework that integrates open-vocabulary 3D affordance prediction into the manipulation data generation pipeline. AffordSim uses our VoxAfford model, an open-vocabulary 3D affordance detector that enhances MLLM output tokens with multi-scale geometric features, to predict affordance maps on object point clouds, guiding grasp pose estimation toward task-relevant functional regions. Built on NVIDIA Isaac Sim with cross-embodiment support (Franka FR3, Panda, UR5e, Kinova), VLM-powered task generation, and novel domain randomization using DA3-based 3D Gaussian reconstruction from real photographs, AffordSim enables automated, scalable generation of affordance-aware manipulation data. We establish a benchmark of 50 tasks across 7 categories (grasping, placing, stacking, pushing/pulling, pouring, mug hanging, long-horizon composite) and evaluate 4 imitation learning baselines (BC, Diffusion Policy, ACT, Pi 0.5). Our results reveal that while grasping is largely solved (53-93% success), affordance-demanding tasks such as pouring into narrow containers (1-43%) and mug hanging (0-47%) remain significantly more challenging for current imitation learning methods, highlighting the need for affordance-aware data generation. Zero-shot sim-to-real experiments on a real Franka FR3 validate the transferability of the generated data.

AI.tldr: AffordSim：首个将开放词汇3D功能预测集成到机器人操作数据生成中的仿真框架，通过VoxAfford模型预测物体点云的功能图，指导抓取姿态估计，解决需要与特定功能区域精确交互的任务。
AI.motivation: 现有仿真平台在轨迹生成中未纳入物体功能信息，导致需要与特定功能区域（如杯柄、杯沿）精确交互的任务无法自动生成语义正确的轨迹。
AI.method: 基于NVIDIA Isaac Sim构建，集成VoxAfford模型（开放词汇3D功能检测器），使用多尺度几何特征增强MLLM输出token，预测物体点云功能图；支持跨本体（Franka FR3等）、VLM任务生成，以及基于DA3的3D高斯重建域随机化。
AI.result: 建立包含7类50个任务的基准测试，评估4种模仿学习方法：抓取任务基本解决（53-93%成功率），但需要功能感知的任务如向窄容器倒水（1-43%）和挂杯子（0-47%）仍具挑战性；零样本仿真到真实实验验证了生成数据的可迁移性。
AI.conclusion: 功能感知数据生成对需要精确功能交互的任务至关重要，当前模仿学习方法在功能需求任务上表现不佳，AffordSim框架为自动化、可扩展的功能感知操作数据生成提供了解决方案。

title: Heat and Matérn Kernels on Matchings
summary: Applying kernel methods to matchings is challenging due to their discrete, non-Euclidean nature. In this paper, we develop a principled framework for constructing geometric kernels that respect the natural geometry of the space of matchings. To this end, we first provide a complete characterization of stationary kernels, i.e. kernels that respect the inherent symmetries of this space. Because the class of stationary kernels is too broad, we specifically focus on the heat and Matérn kernel families, adding an appropriate inductive bias of smoothness to stationarity. While these families successfully extend widely popular Euclidean kernels to matchings, evaluating them naively incurs a prohibitive super-exponential computational cost. To overcome this difficulty, we introduce and analyze a novel, sub-exponential algorithm leveraging zonal polynomials for efficient kernel evaluation. Finally, motivated by the known bijective correspondence between matchings and phylogenetic trees-a crucial data modality in biology-we explore whether our framework can be seamlessly transferred to the space of trees, establishing novel negative results and identifying a significant open problem.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个用于匹配空间的几何核框架，通过平稳核、热核和Matérn核扩展欧几里得核到匹配空间，并开发了基于zonal多项式的次指数算法进行高效计算，同时探讨了向系统发育树空间的迁移可能性。
AI.motivation: 核方法应用于匹配空间面临挑战，因为匹配具有离散、非欧几里得的特性。需要构建尊重匹配空间自然几何结构的几何核，同时解决计算复杂度问题。
AI.method: 1. 完全刻画平稳核（尊重空间固有对称性的核）；2. 专注于热核和Matérn核家族，在平稳性基础上加入平滑性归纳偏置；3. 提出基于zonal多项式的新颖次指数算法进行高效核评估；4. 探索框架向系统发育树空间的迁移。
AI.result: 成功将广泛使用的欧几里得核扩展到匹配空间，克服了朴素评估的超指数计算成本问题，通过次指数算法实现了高效计算。在向树空间迁移方面，建立了新的负面结果并识别了重要的开放问题。
AI.conclusion: 构建了一个原则性的几何核框架，能够尊重匹配空间的自然几何结构，通过高效算法解决了计算瓶颈。虽然向树空间的迁移面临挑战，但为匹配空间上的核方法应用提供了理论基础和实用工具。

title: Who Gets Flagged? The Pluralistic Evaluation Gap in AI Content Watermarking
summary: Watermarking is becoming the default mechanism for AI content authentication, with governance policies and frameworks referencing it as infrastructure for content provenance. Yet across text, image, and audio modalities, watermark signal strength, detectability, and robustness depend on statistical properties of the content itself, properties that vary systematically across languages, cultural visual traditions, and demographic groups. We examine how this content dependence creates modality-specific pathways to bias. Reviewing the major watermarking benchmarks across modalities, we find that, with one exception, none report performance across languages, cultural content types, or population groups. To address this, we propose three concrete evaluation dimensions for pluralistic watermark benchmarking: cross-lingual detection parity, culturally diverse content coverage, and demographic disaggregation of detection metrics. We connect these to the governance frameworks currently mandating watermarking deployment and show that watermarking is held to a lower fairness standard than the generative systems it is meant to govern. Our position is that evaluation must precede deployment, and that the same bias auditing requirements applied to AI models should extend to the verification layer.

AI.tldr: 论文指出当前AI水印技术存在内容依赖性偏见，缺乏跨语言、文化和人口群体的公平性评估，呼吁在部署前建立多元化的水印基准测试标准。
AI.motivation: 水印技术已成为AI内容认证的默认机制，但现有研究表明水印的信号强度、可检测性和鲁棒性依赖于内容本身的统计特性，这些特性在不同语言、文化视觉传统和人口群体中存在系统性差异。当前水印基准测试大多未报告跨语言、文化内容类型或人口群体的性能表现，存在公平性缺陷。
AI.method: 通过审查跨模态（文本、图像、音频）的主要水印基准测试，分析其评估方法的局限性。提出三个具体的多元化水印基准测试评估维度：跨语言检测公平性、文化多样性内容覆盖、检测指标的群体分解分析。将这些维度与当前要求水印部署的治理框架联系起来。
AI.result: 研究发现除一个例外，所有主要水印基准测试均未报告跨语言、文化内容类型或人口群体的性能表现。水印技术相比其旨在监管的生成式AI系统，被赋予了更低的公平性标准。内容依赖性创造了特定模态的偏见路径。
AI.conclusion: 评估必须先于部署，应用于AI模型的偏见审计要求应扩展到验证层。需要建立多元化的水印基准测试标准，确保水印技术在跨语言、文化和人口群体中的公平性和可靠性。

title: Dissecting Failure Dynamics in Large Language Model Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve strong performance through extended inference-time deliberation, yet how their reasoning failures arise remains poorly understood. By analyzing model-generated reasoning trajectories, we find that errors are not uniformly distributed but often originate from a small number of early transition points, after which reasoning remains locally coherent but globally incorrect. These transitions coincide with localized spikes in token-level entropy, and alternative continuations from the same intermediate state can still lead to correct solutions. Based on these observations, we introduce GUARD, a targeted inference-time framework that probes and redirects critical transitions using uncertainty signals. Empirical evaluations across multiple benchmarks confirm that interventions guided by these failure dynamics lead to more reliable reasoning outcomes. Our findings highlight the importance of understanding when and how reasoning first deviates, complementing existing approaches that focus on scaling inference-time computation.

AI.tldr: GUARD框架通过探测和重定向推理过程中的关键转折点，利用不确定性信号改善LLM推理可靠性
AI.motivation: 尽管大型语言模型通过扩展推理时间获得了强大性能，但对其推理失败如何产生仍缺乏深入理解。现有研究主要关注扩展推理计算，而忽视了理解推理何时以及如何首次偏离正确路径的重要性。
AI.method: 通过分析模型生成的推理轨迹，发现错误并非均匀分布，而是源于少数早期转折点。这些转折点与token级熵的局部峰值重合。基于此观察，提出了GUARD框架——一个针对性的推理时框架，利用不确定性信号探测和重定向关键转折点。
AI.result: 实证评估表明，基于这些失败动态的干预能够带来更可靠的推理结果。从相同中间状态的替代延续仍然可以导向正确解决方案，验证了转折点探测的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 理解推理何时以及如何首次偏离正确路径对于改善LLM推理可靠性至关重要，这补充了现有主要关注扩展推理计算的方法。GUARD框架通过针对关键转折点的干预，为实现更可靠的推理提供了新途径。

title: VLMaterial: Vision-Language Model-Based Camera-Radar Fusion for Physics-Grounded Material Identification
summary: Accurate material recognition is a fundamental capability for intelligent perception systems to interact safely and effectively with the physical world. For instance, distinguishing visually similar objects like glass and plastic cups is critical for safety but challenging for vision-based methods due to specular reflections, transparency, and visual deception. While millimeter-wave (mmWave) radar offers robust material sensing regardless of lighting, existing camera-radar fusion methods are limited to closed-set categories and lack semantic interpretability. In this paper, we introduce VLMaterial, a training-free framework that fuses vision-language models (VLMs) with domain-specific radar knowledge for physics-grounded material identification. First, we propose a dual-pipeline architecture: an optical pipeline uses the segment anything model and VLM for material candidate proposals, while an electromagnetic characterization pipeline extracts the intrinsic dielectric constant from radar signals via an effective peak reflection cell area (PRCA) method and weighted vector synthesis. Second, we employ a context-augmented generation (CAG) strategy to equip the VLM with radar-specific physical knowledge, enabling it to interpret electromagnetic parameters as stable references. Third, an adaptive fusion mechanism is introduced to intelligently integrate outputs from both sensors by resolving cross-modal conflicts based on uncertainty estimation. We evaluated VLMaterial in over 120 real-world experiments involving 41 diverse everyday objects and 4 typical visually deceptive counterfeits across varying environments. Experimental results demonstrate that VLMaterial achieves a recognition accuracy of 96.08%, delivering performance on par with state-of-the-art closed-set benchmarks while eliminating the need for extensive task-specific data collection and training.

AI.tldr: VLMaterial：一种免训练框架，融合视觉语言模型与雷达领域知识，通过物理基础材料识别解决视觉欺骗问题
AI.motivation: 准确的材料识别对于智能感知系统与物理世界安全有效交互至关重要。现有视觉方法难以处理镜面反射、透明度和视觉欺骗等问题，而现有的相机-雷达融合方法仅限于封闭集类别且缺乏语义可解释性。
AI.method: 提出三部分方法：1) 双流水线架构：光学流水线使用SAM和VLM生成材料候选提案，电磁表征流水线通过PRCA方法和加权向量合成从雷达信号提取固有介电常数；2) 上下文增强生成策略：为VLM配备雷达特定物理知识，使其能够解释电磁参数作为稳定参考；3) 自适应融合机制：基于不确定性估计解决跨模态冲突，智能集成双传感器输出。
AI.result: 在超过120个真实世界实验中，涉及41种不同日常物品和4种典型视觉欺骗仿制品，VLMaterial实现了96.08%的识别准确率，性能与最先进的封闭集基准相当，同时无需大量任务特定数据收集和训练。
AI.conclusion: VLMaterial通过融合视觉语言模型与雷达领域知识，实现了免训练的物理基础材料识别，在保持高准确率的同时解决了视觉欺骗问题，为智能感知系统提供了更可靠的材料识别能力。

title: Doubly Outlier-Robust Online Infinite Hidden Markov Model
summary: We derive a robust update rule for the online infinite hidden Markov model (iHMM) for when the streaming data contains outliers and the model is misspecified. Leveraging recent advances in generalised Bayesian inference, we define robustness via the posterior influence function (PIF), and provide conditions under which the online iHMM has bounded PIF. Imposing robustness inevitably induces an adaptation lag for regime switching. Our method, which is called Batched Robust iHMM (BR-iHMM), balances adaptivity and robustness with two additional tunable parameters. Across limit order book data, hourly electricity demand, and a synthetic high-dimensional linear system, BR-iHMM reduces one-step-ahead forecasting error by up to 67% relative to competing online Bayesian methods. Together with theoretical guarantees of bounded PIF, our results highlight the practicality of our approach for both forecasting and interpretable online learning.

AI.tldr: 提出一种批处理鲁棒无限隐马尔可夫模型(BR-iHMM)，用于处理包含异常值和模型误设的流数据，通过有界后验影响函数保证鲁棒性，在适应性和鲁棒性间取得平衡。
AI.motivation: 在线无限隐马尔可夫模型(iHMM)在处理包含异常值和模型误设的流数据时缺乏鲁棒性，需要开发能够平衡适应性和鲁棒性的方法。
AI.method: 基于广义贝叶斯推断，通过后验影响函数(PIF)定义鲁棒性，提出批处理鲁棒iHMM(BR-iHMM)，引入两个可调参数平衡适应性和鲁棒性，确保有界PIF。
AI.result: 在限价订单簿数据、小时电力需求和合成高维线性系统上，BR-iHMM相比其他在线贝叶斯方法将一步预测误差降低了高达67%，同时提供有界PIF的理论保证。
AI.conclusion: BR-iHMM方法在保持理论鲁棒性保证的同时，在实际应用中显著提高了预测性能，为可解释的在线学习提供了实用解决方案。

title: Quantifying Cross-Query Contradictions in Multi-Query LLM Reasoning
comment: Accepted at the ICLR 2026 Workshop on Logical Reasoning of Large Language Models. 9 pages, 6 tables, code and data at https://huggingface.co/datasets/rohitspider/cross_query_benchmark
summary: Large language models frequently produce mutually inconsistent answers when reasoning over multiple related queries. We study case-file logical consistency: maintaining a globally satisfiable belief state across interdependent queries. We introduce a benchmark of 390 multi-query reasoning instances with entailment/contradiction/unknown labels and propose set-level metrics including Case Satisfiability Rate, Contradiction Density and Revision Cost. Our solver-augmented approach extracts commitments, verifies global satisfiability and performs counterexample-guided repair. Across four reasoning domains, our method substantially reduces cross-query contradictions (SetCons: 0.56 to 0.94) while preserving per-query accuracy, demonstrating that global coherence is critical for robust multi-query reasoning.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种解决大语言模型在多查询推理中逻辑不一致问题的方法，通过承诺提取、全局可满足性验证和反例引导修复来确保跨查询的一致性。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在处理多个相关查询时经常产生相互矛盾的答案，这影响了推理的可靠性。论文旨在解决跨查询的全局逻辑一致性问题，即在整个相关查询集合中保持可满足的信念状态。
AI.method: 提出了基于求解器增强的方法：1) 从模型回答中提取承诺；2) 验证全局可满足性；3) 进行反例引导的修复。同时引入了包含390个多查询推理实例的基准，以及集合层面的评估指标（案例可满足率、矛盾密度和修订成本）。
AI.result: 在四个推理领域中，该方法显著减少了跨查询矛盾（SetCons从0.56提升到0.94），同时保持了每个查询的准确性，证明了全局一致性对鲁棒多查询推理的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 全局一致性对于鲁棒的多查询推理至关重要。提出的求解器增强方法能有效减少跨查询矛盾，同时保持单个查询的准确性，为解决大语言模型在多查询场景下的逻辑不一致问题提供了有效方案。

title: Combining Bayesian and Frequentist Inference for Laboratory-Specific Performance Guarantees in Copy Number Variation Detection
summary: Targeted amplicon panels are widely used in oncology diagnostics, but providing per-gene performance guarantees for copy number variant (CNV) detection remains challenging due to amplification artifacts, process-mismatch heterogeneity, and limited validation sample sizes. While Bayesian CNV callers naturally quantify per-sample uncertainty, translating this into the frequentist population-level guarantees required for clinical validation, coverage rates, false-positive bounds, and minimum detectable copy-number changes, is a fundamentally different inferential problem. We show empirically that even robust Bayesian credible intervals, including coarsened posteriors and sandwich-adjusted intervals, are severely miscalibrated on panels with small amplicon counts per gene. To address this, we propose a hybrid framework that evaluates Bayesian posterior functionals on validation samples and models the resulting squared losses with a Gamma distribution, yielding tolerance intervals with valid frequentist coverage. Three components make the method practical under real-world constraints: (1) imputation that removes the influence of true CNV-positive samples without requiring known ground truth, (2) regularization to address small sample variability, and (3) evidence-based stratification on the log model evidence to accommodate non-exchangeable noise profiles arising from process mismatch. Evaluated on two targeted amplicon panels using leave-one-out cross-validation, the proposed method achieves single-digit mean absolute coverage error across all genes under both process-matched and unmatched conditions, whereas Bayesian comparators exhibit mean absolute errors exceeding 60\% on clinically relevant genes such as ERBB2.

AI.tldr: 提出一种混合框架，将贝叶斯后验函数在验证样本上评估，用Gamma分布建模平方损失，生成具有有效频率论覆盖的容忍区间，解决了靶向扩增子panel中CNV检测的临床验证难题。
AI.motivation: 靶向扩增子panel在肿瘤诊断中广泛应用，但由于扩增伪影、过程不匹配异质性和有限验证样本量，为拷贝数变异检测提供每基因性能保证具有挑战性。贝叶斯CNV调用器虽然能自然量化每样本不确定性，但将其转换为临床验证所需的频率论群体水平保证（覆盖率、假阳性界限、最小可检测拷贝数变化）是根本不同的推断问题。
AI.method: 提出混合框架：在验证样本上评估贝叶斯后验函数，用Gamma分布对产生的平方损失建模，生成具有有效频率论覆盖的容忍区间。包含三个实用组件：(1) 插值去除真实CNV阳性样本影响而不需要已知真实值，(2) 正则化处理小样本变异性，(3) 基于对数模型证据的分层以适应过程不匹配产生的非交换噪声分布。
AI.result: 在两个靶向扩增子panel上使用留一交叉验证评估，该方法在过程匹配和不匹配条件下，所有基因的平均绝对覆盖误差均达到个位数，而贝叶斯比较器在ERBB2等临床相关基因上表现出超过60%的平均绝对误差。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功解决了靶向扩增子panel中CNV检测的临床验证挑战，通过混合贝叶斯和频率论方法，在有限验证样本下实现了可靠的群体水平性能保证，显著优于传统贝叶斯方法。

title: MedRCube: A Multidimensional Framework for Fine-Grained and In-Depth Evaluation of MLLMs in Medical Imaging
summary: The potential of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) in domain of medical imaging raise the demands of systematic and rigorous evaluation frameworks that are aligned with the real-world medical imaging practice. Existing practices that report single or coarse-grained metrics are lack the granularity required for specialized clinical support and fail to assess the reliability of reasoning mechanisms. To address this, we propose a paradigm shift toward multidimensional, fine-grained and in-depth evaluation. Based on a two-stage systematic construction pipeline designed for this paradigm, we instantiate it with MedRCube. We benchmark 33 MLLMs, \textit{Lingshu-32B} achieve top-tier performance. Crucially, MedRCube exposes a series of pronounced insights inaccessible under prior evaluation settings. Furthermore, we introduce a credibility evaluation subset to quantify reasoning credibility, uncover a highly significant positive association between shortcut behavior and diagnostic task performance, raising concerns for clinically trustworthy deployment. The resources of this work can be found at https://github.com/F1mc/MedRCube.

AI.tldr: 提出MedRCube，一个针对医学影像多模态大语言模型的多维度、细粒度评估框架，用于系统评估33个MLLMs，揭示传统粗粒度评估无法发现的模型行为特征和可靠性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有医学影像MLLMs评估方法存在局限性：仅报告单一或粗粒度指标，缺乏临床专业支持所需的细粒度分析，无法评估推理机制的可靠性，与真实世界医学影像实践需求不匹配。
AI.method: 提出多维、细粒度、深入评估范式，基于两阶段系统构建流程实例化为MedRCube评估框架，包含可信度评估子集以量化推理可信度，并分析捷径行为与诊断性能的关联。
AI.result: 评估33个MLLMs，Lingshu-32B表现最佳；MedRCube揭示了传统评估无法发现的显著洞察；发现捷径行为与诊断任务性能存在高度显著正相关，这对临床可信部署提出警示。
AI.conclusion: MedRCube为医学影像MLLMs提供了系统、严谨的评估框架，揭示了模型推理可靠性问题，强调需要超越传统粗粒度评估，关注细粒度临床适用性和可信度，对临床可信部署具有重要意义。

title: Mind DeepResearch Technical Report
summary: We present \textbf{Mind DeepResearch (MindDR)}, an efficient multi-agent deep research framework that achieves leading performance with only \textasciitilde30B-parameter models through a meticulously designed data synthesis and multi-stage training pipeline. The core innovation of MindDR lies in a collaborative three-agent architecture (Planning Agent, DeepSearch Agent, and Report Agent) and a four-stage agent-specialized training pipeline comprising SFT cold-start, Search-RL, Report-RL and preference alignment. With this regime, MindDR demonstrates competitive performance even with \textasciitilde30B-scale models. Specifically, MindDR achieves 45.7\% on BrowseComp-ZH, 42.8\% on BrowseComp, 46.5\% on WideSearch, 75.0\% on xbench-DS, and 52.5 on DeepResearch Bench, outperforming comparable-scale open-source agent systems and rivaling larger-scale models. MindDR has been deployed as an online product in Li Auto. Furthermore, we introduce \textbf{MindDR Bench}, a curated benchmark of 500 real-world Chinese queries from our internal product user interactions, evaluated through a comprehensive multi-dimensional rubric system rather than relying on a single RACE metric. On MindDR Bench, MindDR achieves a state-of-the-art score of 51.8.

AI.tldr: MindDR是一个高效的多智能体深度研究框架，通过精心设计的数据合成和多阶段训练流程，仅使用约300亿参数模型就实现了领先性能，已部署在理想汽车作为在线产品。
AI.motivation: 开发一个高效的多智能体深度研究框架，能够在相对较小的模型规模（约300亿参数）下实现与更大规模模型相媲美的性能，同时解决实际产品部署需求。
AI.method: 采用协作式三智能体架构（规划智能体、深度搜索智能体、报告智能体）和四阶段专业化训练流程：SFT冷启动、搜索强化学习、报告强化学习和偏好对齐，结合精心设计的数据合成方法。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中表现优异：BrowseComp-ZH 45.7%、BrowseComp 42.8%、WideSearch 46.5%、xbench-DS 75.0%、DeepResearch Bench 52.5分，超越了可比规模的开源系统并与更大规模模型竞争。在自建的MindDR Bench上达到最先进的51.8分。
AI.conclusion: MindDR证明了通过精心设计的架构和训练流程，相对较小的模型也能在深度研究任务中实现卓越性能，已成功部署为实际产品，并为该领域提供了新的评估基准。

title: ClipGStream: Clip-Stream Gaussian Splatting for Any Length and Any Motion Multi-View Dynamic Scene Reconstruction
summary: Dynamic 3D scene reconstruction is essential for immersive media such as VR, MR, and XR, yet remains challenging for long multi-view sequences with large-scale motion. Existing dynamic Gaussian approaches are either Frame-Stream, offering scalability but poor temporal stability, or Clip, achieving local consistency at the cost of high memory and limited sequence length. We propose ClipGStream, a hybrid reconstruction framework that performs stream optimization at the clip level rather than the frame level. The sequence is divided into short clips, where dynamic motion is modeled using clip-independent spatio-temporal fields and residual anchor compensation to capture local variations efficiently, while inter-clip inherited anchors and decoders maintain structural consistency across clips. This Clip-Stream design enables scalable, flicker-free reconstruction of long dynamic videos with high temporal coherence and reduced memory overhead. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ClipGStream achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction quality and efficiency. The project page is available at: https://liangjie1999.github.io/ClipGStreamWeb/

AI.tldr: ClipGStream：一种混合动态3D场景重建框架，通过将长序列分割为短片段，在片段级别进行流式优化，结合片段内时空场建模和片段间锚点继承，实现高时间一致性、低内存消耗的长动态视频重建。
AI.motivation: 现有动态高斯方法存在局限性：Frame-Stream方法可扩展但时间稳定性差；Clip方法能保证局部一致性但内存消耗大且序列长度受限。需要一种能同时实现长时间序列重建、高时间一致性和低内存开销的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出Clip-Stream混合框架：1) 将长序列分割为短片段；2) 片段内使用独立的时空场和残差锚点补偿高效建模局部动态变化；3) 片段间通过继承锚点和解码器保持结构一致性；4) 在片段级别而非帧级别进行流式优化。
AI.result: ClipGStream在长动态视频重建中实现了最先进的重建质量和效率，具有高时间一致性、无闪烁效果，同时显著降低了内存开销，能够处理大规模运动的长时间多视角序列。
AI.conclusion: ClipGStream通过创新的Clip-Stream设计，成功解决了现有动态高斯方法在可扩展性、时间稳定性和内存效率之间的权衡问题，为沉浸式媒体应用提供了高质量的动态3D场景重建方案。

title: Perspective on Bias in Biomedical AI: Preventing Downstream Healthcare Disparities
summary: Healthcare disparities persist across socioeconomic boundaries, often attributed to unequal access to screening, diagnostics, and therapeutics. However, this perspective highlights that critical biases can emerge much earlier, during data collection and research prioritization, long before clinical implementation in cases where the focus of the studies and the data that is collected is at the molecular level. A vast number of studies focus on collecting omics data but the demographic information associated with these datasets is often not reported in the studies, and when it is reported, it shows big biases. An automated analysis of 4719 PubMed-indexed omics publications from 2015 to 2024 reveals that only a small fraction report ancestry or ethnicity information, with ancestry reporting improving slightly. Analysis of large-scale datasets commonly used for model training, such as CellxGene and GEO, reveals substantial population bias where European-ancestry data dominates. As biomedical foundation models become central to biomedical discovery with a paradigm in which base models are pretrained on large datasets and reusing them time and again for many different downstream tasks, they risk perpetuating or amplifying these early-stage biases, leading to cascading inequities that regulatory interventions cannot fully reverse. We propose a community-wide focus on three foundational principles: Provenance, Openness, and Evaluation Transparency to improve equity and robustness in biomedical AI. This approach aims to foster biomedical innovation that more effectively serves underserved populations and improves health outcomes.

AI.tldr: 论文通过分析4719篇组学文献和大型数据集，揭示生物医学研究中存在严重的群体偏倚问题，特别是在数据收集和研究优先级设定阶段，欧洲裔数据占据主导地位，这可能导致生物医学基础模型放大早期偏倚，加剧健康不平等。
AI.motivation: 当前健康不平等问题通常归因于筛查、诊断和治疗的可及性差异，但本研究指出关键偏倚更早出现在数据收集和研究优先级设定阶段。组学研究虽然收集大量分子数据，但往往缺乏人口统计学信息报告，或报告时显示严重偏倚，这可能导致生物医学AI模型延续并放大这些偏倚。
AI.method: 1. 对2015-2024年PubMed索引的4719篇组学出版物进行自动化分析，评估其祖先/种族信息报告情况；2. 分析常用于模型训练的大型数据集（如CellxGene和GEO），评估其群体代表性偏倚；3. 提出基于三个基础原则（来源可追溯性、开放性和评估透明度）的社区框架来改善生物医学AI的公平性和鲁棒性。
AI.result: 1. 仅有小部分组学出版物报告祖先或种族信息，虽然祖先报告略有改善；2. 大型数据集存在显著群体偏倚，欧洲裔数据占据主导地位；3. 生物医学基础模型在预训练和下游任务重用过程中，可能延续并放大这些早期偏倚，导致监管干预无法完全逆转的级联不平等。
AI.conclusion: 生物医学研究中早期数据收集阶段的群体偏倚问题严重，可能通过基础模型放大并导致健康不平等。作者提出社区应关注来源可追溯性、开放性和评估透明度三个基础原则，以促进更公平、鲁棒的生物医学AI发展，更好地服务未充分服务人群并改善健康结果。

title: Micro-Dexterity in Biological Micromanipulation: Embodiment, Perception, and Control
summary: Microscale manipulation has advanced substantially in controlled locomotion and targeted transport, yet many biomedical applications require precise and adaptive interaction with biological micro-objects. At these scales, manipulation is realized through three main classes of platforms: embodied microrobots that physically interact as mobile agents, field-mediated systems that generate contactless trapping or manipulation forces, and externally actuated end-effectors that interact through remotely driven physical tools. Unlike macroscale manipulators, these systems function in fluidic, confined, and surface-dominated environments characterized by negligible inertia, dominant interfacial forces, and soft, heterogeneous, and fragile targets. Consequently, classical assumptions of dexterous manipulation, including rigid-body contact, stable grasping, and rich proprioceptive feedback, become difficult to maintain. This review introduces micro-dexterity as a framework for analyzing biological micromanipulation through the coupled roles of embodiment, perception, and control. We examine how classical manipulation primitives, including pushing, reorientation, grasping, and cooperative manipulation, are reformulated at the microscale; compare the architectures that enable them, from contact-based micromanipulators to contactless field-mediated systems and cooperative multi-agent platforms; and review the perception and control strategies required for task execution. We identify the current dexterity gap between laboratory demonstrations and clinically relevant biological manipulation, and outline key challenges for future translation.

AI.tldr: 该综述提出"微灵巧性"框架，分析微尺度生物操作中的体现、感知与控制耦合作用，比较接触式、场介导和多平台系统，指出实验室演示与临床应用间的灵巧性差距。
AI.motivation: 尽管微尺度操控在受控运动和靶向运输方面已有显著进展，但许多生物医学应用需要与生物微物体进行精确、自适应交互。现有系统在流体、受限、表面主导的环境中面临挑战，传统灵巧操作假设难以维持。
AI.method: 提出微灵巧性框架，分析微尺度生物操作中的体现、感知与控制耦合作用。系统比较三类平台：体现式微机器人、场介导系统和外部驱动末端执行器。研究推、重定向、抓取和协同操作等基本操作在微尺度的重新表述。
AI.result: 识别了实验室演示与临床相关生物操作之间的灵巧性差距。分析了微尺度操作的特殊挑战：可忽略的惯性、主导的界面力、软异质脆弱目标，以及刚性接触、稳定抓取和丰富本体感知反馈等传统假设的失效。
AI.conclusion: 微灵巧性框架为分析生物微操作提供了系统方法。未来转化的关键挑战包括：开发适应微尺度环境的感知与控制策略，弥合实验室演示与临床应用间的差距，以及实现与生物微物体的精确自适应交互。

title: From $P(y|x)$ to $P(y)$: Investigating Reinforcement Learning in Pre-train Space
comment: Preprint. Our code is available at https://github.com/Trae1ounG/Pretrain_Space_RLVR
summary: While reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) significantly enhances LLM reasoning by optimizing the conditional distribution P(y|x), its potential is fundamentally bounded by the base model's existing output distribution. Optimizing the marginal distribution P(y) in the Pre-train Space addresses this bottleneck by encoding reasoning ability and preserving broad exploration capacity. Yet, conventional pre-training relies on static corpora for passive learning, leading to a distribution shift that hinders targeted reasoning enhancement. In this paper, we introduce PreRL (Pre-train Space RL), which applies reward-driven online updates directly to P(y). We theoretically and empirically validate the strong gradient alignment between log P(y) and log P(y|x), establishing PreRL as a viable surrogate for standard RL. Furthermore, we uncover a critical mechanism: Negative Sample Reinforcement (NSR) within PreRL serves as an exceptionally effective driver for reasoning. NSR-PreRL rapidly prunes incorrect reasoning spaces while stimulating endogenous reflective behaviors, increasing transition and reflection thoughts by 14.89x and 6.54x, respectively. Leveraging these insights, we propose Dual Space RL (DSRL), a Policy Reincarnation strategy that initializes models with NSR-PreRL to expand the reasoning horizon before transitioning to standard RL for fine-grained optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DSRL consistently outperforms strong baselines, proving that pre-train space pruning effectively steers the policy toward a refined correct reasoning subspace.

AI.tldr: 提出PreRL方法，在预训练空间直接优化边际分布P(y)，通过负样本强化机制有效剪枝错误推理空间，并设计双空间强化学习策略实现推理能力提升
AI.motivation: 传统RLVR方法受限于基础模型的输出分布，而预训练空间优化能突破这一瓶颈，但静态语料库导致分布偏移，阻碍针对性推理增强
AI.method: 提出PreRL方法在预训练空间直接应用奖励驱动的在线更新；发现负样本强化机制能有效驱动推理；设计双空间强化学习策略，先用NSR-PreRL初始化模型扩展推理视野，再转向标准RL进行细粒度优化
AI.result: 理论验证log P(y)和log P(y|x)的梯度对齐；NSR-PreRL使转换思维和反思思维分别增加14.89倍和6.54倍；DSRL策略在广泛实验中持续超越强基线
AI.conclusion: 预训练空间剪枝能有效引导策略进入精炼的正确推理子空间，双空间强化学习策略为LLM推理优化提供了新范式

title: LongCoT: Benchmarking Long-Horizon Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
summary: As language models are increasingly deployed for complex autonomous tasks, their ability to reason accurately over longer horizons becomes critical. An essential component of this ability is planning and managing a long, complex chain-of-thought (CoT). We introduce LongCoT, a scalable benchmark of 2,500 expert-designed problems spanning chemistry, mathematics, computer science, chess, and logic to isolate and directly measure the long-horizon CoT reasoning capabilities of frontier models. Problems consist of a short input with a verifiable answer; solving them requires navigating a graph of interdependent steps that span tens to hundreds of thousands of reasoning tokens. Each local step is individually tractable for frontier models, so failures reflect long-horizon reasoning limitations. At release, the best models achieve <10% accuracy (GPT 5.2: 9.8%; Gemini 3 Pro: 6.1%) on LongCoT, revealing a substantial gap in current capabilities. Overall, LongCoT provides a rigorous measure of long-horizon reasoning, tracking the ability of frontier models to reason reliably over extended periods.

AI.tldr: LongCoT是一个包含2500个专家设计问题的基准测试，专门用于衡量语言模型在长链思维推理方面的能力，覆盖化学、数学、计算机科学、国际象棋和逻辑等领域，当前最先进模型准确率低于10%。
AI.motivation: 随着语言模型被部署执行复杂的自主任务，其在长时域上的准确推理能力变得至关重要。当前需要一种能够直接测量模型长链思维推理能力的基准测试，以评估模型在需要数十万推理token的复杂任务中的表现。
AI.method: 研究者引入了LongCoT基准，包含2500个专家设计的问题，这些问题具有短输入和可验证答案的特点。每个问题需要模型在一个相互依赖的步骤图中导航，这些步骤跨越数十万推理token。每个局部步骤对前沿模型来说都是可处理的，因此失败反映了长时域推理的局限性。
AI.result: 在发布时，最佳模型在LongCoT上的准确率低于10%（GPT 5.2：9.8%；Gemini 3 Pro：6.1%），显示出当前能力存在显著差距。这表明前沿模型在长链思维推理方面仍有很大提升空间。
AI.conclusion: LongCoT为长时域推理提供了一个严格的衡量标准，能够跟踪前沿模型在扩展时间段内进行可靠推理的能力。该基准揭示了当前语言模型在长链思维推理方面的局限性，为未来模型改进提供了重要参考。

title: Granularity-Aware Transfer for Tree Instance Segmentation in Synthetic and Real Forests
summary: We address the challenge of synthetic-to-real transfer in forestry perception where real data have only coarse Tree labels while synthetic data provide fine-grained trunk/crown annotations. We introduce MGTD, a mixed-granularity dataset with 53k synthetic and 3.6k real images, and a four-stage protocol isolating domain shift and granularity mismatch. Our core contribution is granularity-aware distillation, which transfers structural priors from fine-grained synthetic teachers to a coarse-label student via logit-space merging and mask unification. Experiments show consistent mask AP gains, especially for small/distant trees, establishing a testbed for Sim-Real transfer under label granularity constraints.

AI.tldr: MGTD数据集与粒度感知蒸馏方法解决林业感知中合成到真实迁移问题，其中真实数据只有粗粒度树标签而合成数据提供细粒度树干/树冠标注
AI.motivation: 解决林业感知中合成到真实迁移的挑战：真实数据只有粗粒度树标签，而合成数据提供细粒度树干/树冠标注，存在域偏移和粒度不匹配问题
AI.method: 提出MGTD混合粒度数据集（53k合成+3.6k真实图像）和四阶段协议分离域偏移与粒度不匹配；核心是粒度感知蒸馏，通过logit空间合并和掩码统一将细粒度合成教师的结构先验转移到粗标签学生
AI.result: 实验显示一致的掩码AP增益，特别是对小/远距离树木，为标签粒度约束下的Sim-Real迁移建立了测试基准
AI.conclusion: 提出的MGTD数据集和粒度感知蒸馏方法有效解决了林业感知中合成到真实迁移的粒度不匹配问题，为标签粒度约束下的域适应提供了新基准

title: NewsTorch: A PyTorch-based Toolkit for Learner-oriented News Recommendation
summary: News recommender systems are devised to alleviate the information overload, attracting more and more researchers' attention in recent years. The lack of a dedicated learner-oriented news recommendation toolkit hinders the advancement of research in news recommendation. We propose a PyTorch-based news recommendation toolkit called NewsTorch, developed to support learners in acquiring both conceptual understanding and practical experience. This toolkit provides a modular, decoupled, and extensible framework with a learner-friendly GUI platform that supports dataset downloading and preprocessing. It also enables training, validation, and testing of state-of-the-art neural news recommendation models with standardized evaluation metrics, ensuring fair comparison and reproducible experiments. Our open-source toolkit is released on Github: https://github.com/whonor/NewsTorch.

AI.tldr: NewsTorch是一个基于PyTorch的新闻推荐系统工具包，旨在为学习者提供模块化、可扩展的框架和用户友好的GUI平台，支持数据集处理、模型训练和标准化评估。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏专门面向学习者的新闻推荐工具包，这阻碍了新闻推荐研究的发展。需要提供一个既能帮助学习者理解概念又能获得实践经验的工具。
AI.method: 开发了基于PyTorch的NewsTorch工具包，采用模块化、解耦和可扩展的架构，提供学习者友好的GUI平台，支持数据集下载和预处理，以及最先进的神经新闻推荐模型的训练、验证和测试。
AI.result: NewsTorch工具包已在GitHub上开源发布，提供了完整的新闻推荐研究框架，支持标准化评估指标，确保公平比较和可重复实验。
AI.conclusion: NewsTorch填补了新闻推荐领域缺乏学习者专用工具包的空白，为研究者和学习者提供了实用的工具，有助于推动新闻推荐研究的发展。

title: GeomPrompt: Geometric Prompt Learning for RGB-D Semantic Segmentation Under Missing and Degraded Depth
comment: Accepted to the CVPR 2026 URVIS Workshop. Project page: https://geomprompt.github.io
summary: Multimodal perception systems for robotics and embodied AI often assume reliable RGB-D sensing, but in practice, depth is frequently missing, noisy, or corrupted. We thus present GeomPrompt, a lightweight cross-modal adaptation module that synthesizes a task-driven geometric prompt from RGB alone for the fourth channel of a frozen RGB-D semantic segmentation model, without depth supervision. We further introduce GeomPrompt-Recovery, an adaptation module that compensates for degraded depth by predicting the fourth channel correction relevant for the frozen segmenter. Both modules are trained solely with downstream segmentation supervision, enabling recovery of the geometric prior useful for segmentation, rather than estimating depth signals. On SUN RGB-D, GeomPrompt improves over RGB-only inference by +6.1 mIoU on DFormer and +3.0 mIoU on GeminiFusion, while remaining competitive with strong monocular depth estimators. For degraded depth, GeomPrompt-Recovery consistently improves robustness, yielding gains up to +3.6 mIoU under severe depth corruptions. GeomPrompt is also substantially more efficient than monocular depth baselines, reaching 7.8 ms latency versus 38.3 ms and 71.9 ms. These results suggest that task-driven geometric prompting is an efficient mechanism for cross-modal compensation under missing and degraded depth inputs in RGB-D perception.

AI.tldr: GeomPrompt是一个轻量级跨模态适配模块，能够在没有深度监督的情况下，仅从RGB图像合成任务驱动的几何提示，用于冻结的RGB-D语义分割模型的第四通道，以补偿缺失或退化的深度信息。
AI.motivation: 机器人和具身AI的多模态感知系统通常假设可靠的RGB-D感知，但实践中深度信息经常缺失、有噪声或损坏。现有方法需要深度监督或估计完整的深度信号，而本文旨在开发无需深度监督的任务驱动几何提示方法。
AI.method: 提出GeomPrompt：轻量级跨模态适配模块，仅从RGB图像合成任务驱动的几何提示，作为冻结RGB-D分割模型的第四通道输入。还提出GeomPrompt-Recovery：适配模块，通过预测对冻结分割器相关的第四通道校正来补偿退化的深度。两个模块仅使用下游分割监督进行训练，恢复对分割有用的几何先验而非估计深度信号。
AI.result: 在SUN RGB-D数据集上，GeomPrompt相比仅RGB推理在DFormer上提升+6.1 mIoU，在GeminiFusion上提升+3.0 mIoU，与强单目深度估计器保持竞争力。对于退化深度，GeomPrompt-Recory在严重深度损坏下提升达+3.6 mIoU。GeomPrompt效率显著更高：延迟7.8ms vs 基线38.3ms和71.9ms。
AI.conclusion: 任务驱动的几何提示是RGB-D感知中在缺失和退化深度输入下进行跨模态补偿的高效机制，无需深度监督即可恢复对分割有用的几何先验，同时保持计算效率。

title: From Feelings to Metrics: Understanding and Formalizing How Users Vibe-Test LLMs
comment: Under review. 42 pages, 18 figures. Code and data at https://technion-cs-nlp.github.io/vibe-testing-llms
summary: Evaluating LLMs is challenging, as benchmark scores often fail to capture models' real-world usefulness. Instead, users often rely on ``vibe-testing'': informal experience-based evaluation, such as comparing models on coding tasks related to their own workflow. While prevalent, vibe-testing is often too ad hoc and unstructured to analyze or reproduce at scale. In this work, we study how vibe-testing works in practice and then formalize it to support systematic analysis. We first analyze two empirical resources: (1) a survey of user evaluation practices, and (2) a collection of in-the-wild model comparison reports from blogs and social media. Based on these resources, we formalize vibe-testing as a two-part process: users personalize both what they test and how they judge responses. We then introduce a proof-of-concept evaluation pipeline that follows this formulation by generating personalized prompts and comparing model outputs using user-aware subjective criteria. In experiments on coding benchmarks, we find that combining personalized prompts and user-aware evaluation can change which model is preferred, reflecting the role of vibe-testing in practice. These findings suggest that formalized vibe-testing can serve as a useful approach for bridging benchmark scores and real-world experience.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出将非正式的"氛围测试"（vibe-testing）形式化，通过个性化提示和用户感知评估来弥合基准测试分数与实际使用体验之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM评估存在挑战：基准测试分数无法准确反映模型在实际使用中的价值，而用户常用的"氛围测试"（非正式、经验性评估）又过于临时和缺乏结构，难以进行规模化分析和复现。
AI.method: 1. 分析用户评估实践：通过调查和收集博客/社交媒体上的模型比较报告；2. 将氛围测试形式化为两个部分：用户个性化测试内容和个性化评判标准；3. 提出概念验证评估管道，生成个性化提示并使用用户感知的主观标准比较模型输出。
AI.result: 在编码基准测试实验中，结合个性化提示和用户感知评估会改变模型的偏好排序，这反映了氛围测试在实际中的作用。形式化的氛围测试能够作为连接基准分数和实际体验的有用方法。
AI.conclusion: 形式化的氛围测试可以成为弥合基准测试分数与实际使用体验之间差距的有效方法，通过系统化用户个性化的测试内容和评判标准，能够更好地反映模型在真实场景中的价值。

title: DA-PTQ: Drift-Aware Post-Training Quantization for Efficient Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs) have demonstrated strong potential for embodied AI, yet their deployment on resource-limited robots remains challenging due to high memory and computational demands. While Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) provides an efficient solution, directly applying PTQ to VLAs often results in severe performance degradation during sequential control. We identify temporal error accumulation as a key factor, where quantization perturbations at the vision-language-to-action interface are progressively amplified, leading to kinematic drift in executed trajectories. To address this issue, we propose Drift-Aware Post-Training Quantization (DA-PTQ), which formulates quantization as a drift-aware optimization problem over sequential decision processes. DA-PTQ consists of two components: (1) Cross-Space Representation Compensation, which mitigates structured distortions between multimodal representations and action space to improve action consistency, and (2) Motion-Driven Mixed-Precision Allocation, which assigns bit-widths by minimizing trajectory-level motion errors. Extensive experiments show that DA-PTQ significantly reduces kinematic drift and achieves comparable performance to full-precision models under low-bit settings, enabling practical deployment of VLAs on resource-limited robotic platforms.

AI.tldr: DA-PTQ：一种针对视觉-语言-动作模型的漂移感知后训练量化方法，通过跨空间表示补偿和运动驱动混合精度分配，减少时序误差累积，实现资源受限机器人的高效部署。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言-动作模型在具身AI中表现出强大潜力，但其高内存和计算需求限制了在资源受限机器人上的部署。后训练量化虽然高效，但直接应用于VLA会导致序列控制中的严重性能下降，主要原因是时序误差累积导致运动轨迹漂移。
AI.method: 提出漂移感知后训练量化方法，将量化问题建模为序列决策过程中的漂移感知优化问题。包含两个核心组件：1）跨空间表示补偿，通过补偿多模态表示与动作空间之间的结构化失真来提高动作一致性；2）运动驱动混合精度分配，通过最小化轨迹级运动误差来分配比特宽度。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，DA-PTQ显著减少了运动学漂移，在低比特设置下实现了与全精度模型相当的性能，使VLA能够在资源受限的机器人平台上实际部署。
AI.conclusion: DA-PTQ通过解决量化过程中的时序误差累积问题，为视觉-语言-动作模型在资源受限机器人上的高效部署提供了有效的后训练量化解决方案，平衡了模型压缩与性能保持的需求。

title: Rhetorical Questions in LLM Representations: A Linear Probing Study
summary: Rhetorical questions are asked not to seek information but to persuade or signal stance. How large language models internally represent them remains unclear. We analyze rhetorical questions in LLM representations using linear probes on two social-media datasets with different discourse contexts, and find that rhetorical signals emerge early and are most stably captured by last-token representations. Rhetorical questions are linearly separable from information-seeking questions within datasets, and remain detectable under cross-dataset transfer, reaching AUROC around 0.7-0.8. However, we demonstrate that transferability does not simply imply a shared representation. Probes trained on different datasets produce different rankings when applied to the same target corpus, with overlap among the top-ranked instances often below 0.2. Qualitative analysis shows that these divergences correspond to distinct rhetorical phenomena: some probes capture discourse-level rhetorical stance embedded in extended argumentation, while others emphasize localized, syntax-driven interrogative acts. Together, these findings suggest that rhetorical questions in LLM representations are encoded by multiple linear directions emphasizing different cues, rather than a single shared direction.

AI.tldr: LLM对修辞问句的表示分析：修辞问句在LLM表示中早期出现，主要通过最后词元表示捕获，在不同数据集间可迁移检测（AUROC 0.7-0.8），但可迁移性不代表共享表示，不同数据集训练的探针捕获不同的修辞现象。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是理解大型语言模型如何内部表示修辞问句——这种不寻求信息而是用于说服或表达立场的特殊问句。目前LLM如何编码这种语用功能尚不清楚。
AI.method: 在两个不同话语语境的社会媒体数据集上，使用线性探针分析LLM表示中的修辞问句。分析修辞信号的出现时机、稳定性，以及跨数据集的可迁移性，并通过定性分析探究不同探针捕获的修辞现象差异。
AI.result: 1) 修辞信号在LLM表示中早期出现，最后词元表示最稳定捕获；2) 修辞问句在数据集内线性可分；3) 跨数据集可迁移检测达到AUROC 0.7-0.8；4) 可迁移性不意味着共享表示：不同数据集训练的探针对相同目标语料产生不同排名（重叠度<0.2）；5) 定性分析显示不同探针捕获不同修辞现象：有的捕获话语层面的修辞立场，有的强调局部的句法驱动问句行为。
AI.conclusion: LLM表示中的修辞问句由多个强调不同线索的线性方向编码，而非单一共享方向。不同数据集训练的探针捕获修辞问句的不同方面，表明修辞问句在LLM内部是多维度的表示。

title: Geometric Metrics for MoE Specialization: From Fisher Information to Early Failure Detection
summary: Expert specialization is fundamental to Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model success, yet existing metrics (cosine similarity, routing entropy) lack theoretical grounding and yield inconsistent conclusions under reparameterization. We present an information-geometric framework providing the first rigorous characterization of MoE specialization dynamics. Our key insight is that expert routing distributions evolve on the probability simplex equipped with the Fisher information metric, enabling formal analysis via Riemannian geometry. We prove that standard heuristic metrics violate parameterization invariance (Theorem 1), establish that specialization corresponds to geodesic flow with quantified approximation bounds (Theorem 2), and derive a failure predictor with theoretical threshold justification (Theorem 3). The framework introduces two principled metrics: Fisher Specialization Index (FSI) achieving r=0.91+/-0.02 correlation with downstream performance, and Fisher Heterogeneity Score (FHS) predicting training failure at 10% completion with AUC=0.89+/-0.03 -- outperforming validation-loss-based early stopping by 23% while requiring 40x fewer compute cycles. We validate intervention protocols achieving 87% recovery rate when FHS>1 is detected. Comprehensive experiments across language modeling (WikiText-103, C4), vision MoE (ImageNet), and scaling studies (8-64 experts, 125M-2.7B parameters) validate our theoretical predictions.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个信息几何框架，首次为MoE模型中的专家专业化提供了严格的理论基础，解决了现有启发式指标缺乏理论依据和参数化不变性的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有评估MoE专家专业化的指标（如余弦相似度、路由熵）缺乏理论基础，在重新参数化下会得出不一致的结论，需要建立严格的理论框架来准确表征MoE专业化动态。
AI.method: 采用信息几何框架，将专家路由分布视为概率单纯形上的演化过程，使用Fisher信息度量进行黎曼几何分析，提出了两个原则性指标：Fisher专业化指数(FSI)和Fisher异质性分数(FHS)。
AI.result: FSI与下游性能相关性达r=0.91±0.02；FHS在训练完成10%时预测失败的能力达到AUC=0.89±0.03，比基于验证损失的早停方法提升23%，同时减少40倍计算周期；当检测到FHS>1时，干预协议实现87%的恢复率。
AI.conclusion: 该信息几何框架为MoE专业化动态提供了首个严格的理论表征，提出的原则性指标在语言建模、视觉MoE和扩展研究中均验证了理论预测的有效性，显著提升了MoE模型的训练效率和可靠性。

title: Human Centered Non Intrusive Driver State Modeling Using Personalized Physiological Signals in Real World Automated Driving
summary: In vehicles with partial or conditional driving automation (SAE Levels 2-3), the driver remains responsible for supervising the system and responding to take-over requests. Therefore, reliable driver monitoring is essential for safe human-automation collaboration. However, most existing Driver Monitoring Systems rely on generalized models that ignore individual physiological variability. In this study, we examine the feasibility of personalized driver state modeling using non-intrusive physiological sensing during real-world automated driving. We conducted experiments in an SAE Level 2 vehicle using an Empatica E4 wearable sensor to capture multimodal physiological signals, including electrodermal activity, heart rate, temperature, and motion data. To leverage deep learning architectures designed for images, we transformed the physiological signals into two-dimensional representations and processed them using a multimodal architecture based on pre-trained ResNet50 feature extractors. Experiments across four drivers demonstrate substantial interindividual variability in physiological patterns related to driver awareness. Personalized models achieved an average accuracy of 92.68%, whereas generalized models trained on multiple users dropped to an accuracy of 54%, revealing substantial limitations in cross-user generalization. These results underscore the necessity of adaptive, personalized driver monitoring systems for future automated vehicles and imply that autonomous systems should adapt to each driver's unique physiological profile.

AI.tldr: 个性化驾驶员状态监测在L2-L3级自动驾驶中的可行性研究，通过非侵入式生理信号采集和深度学习模型，证明个性化模型（92.68%准确率）显著优于通用模型（54%准确率）
AI.motivation: 在SAE L2-L3级自动驾驶中，驾驶员仍需监督系统并响应接管请求，但现有驾驶员监控系统大多使用忽略个体生理差异的通用模型，无法可靠监测驾驶员状态，因此需要研究个性化驾驶员状态建模的可行性
AI.method: 在真实L2级车辆中进行实验，使用Empatica E4可穿戴传感器采集多模态生理信号（皮电活动、心率、温度、运动数据），将生理信号转换为二维表示，采用基于预训练ResNet50特征提取器的多模态架构进行深度学习处理
AI.result: 四个驾驶员的实验显示驾驶员意识相关的生理模式存在显著个体间差异，个性化模型平均准确率达92.68%，而跨用户训练的通用模型准确率降至54%，表明跨用户泛化能力存在严重局限
AI.conclusion: 研究结果强调了未来自动驾驶车辆需要自适应、个性化的驾驶员监控系统，自主系统应适应每个驾驶员独特的生理特征，个性化建模是实现安全人机协作的关键

title: Complex Interpolation of Matrices with an application to Multi-Manifold Learning
summary: Given two symmetric positive-definite matrices $A, B \in \mathbb{R}^{n \times n}$, we study the spectral properties of the interpolation $A^{1-x} B^x$ for $0 \leq x \leq 1$. The presence of `common structures' in $A$ and $B$, eigenvectors pointing in a similar direction, can be investigated using this interpolation perspective. Generically, exact log-linearity of the operator norm $\|A^{1-x} B^x\|$ is equivalent to the existence of a shared eigenvector in the original matrices; stability bounds show that approximate log-linearity forces principal singular vectors to align with leading eigenvectors of both matrices. These results give rise to and provide theoretical justification for a multi-manifold learning framework that identifies common and distinct latent structures in multiview data.

AI.tldr: 研究对称正定矩阵插值A^{1-x}B^x的谱性质，探索矩阵间"共同结构"的存在性及其在多流形学习中的应用
AI.motivation: 研究两个对称正定矩阵A和B之间是否存在共同特征结构，通过矩阵插值方法探索多视图数据中的共享和独特潜在结构
AI.method: 使用矩阵插值A^{1-x}B^x(0≤x≤1)分析谱性质，研究算子范数‖A^{1-x}B^x‖的对数线性性质与共享特征向量的关系，建立稳定性界限
AI.result: 算子范数精确对数线性等价于原始矩阵存在共享特征向量；近似对数线性迫使主奇异向量与两个矩阵的主导特征向量对齐
AI.conclusion: 这些结果为多流形学习框架提供了理论基础，能够识别多视图数据中的共同和独特潜在结构

title: Beyond Voxel 3D Editing: Learning from 3D Masks and Self-Constructed Data
summary: 3D editing refers to the ability to apply local or global modifications to 3D assets. Effective 3D editing requires maintaining semantic consistency by performing localized changes according to prompts, while also preserving local invariance so that unchanged regions remain consistent with the original. However, existing approaches have significant limitations: multi-view editing methods incur losses when projecting back to 3D, while voxel-based editing is constrained in both the regions that can be modified and the scale of modifications. Moreover, the lack of sufficiently large editing datasets for training and evaluation remains a challenge. To address these challenges, we propose a Beyond Voxel 3D Editing (BVE) framework with a self-constructed large-scale dataset specifically tailored for 3D editing. Building upon this dataset, our model enhances a foundational image-to-3D generative architecture with lightweight, trainable modules, enabling efficient injection of textual semantics without the need for expensive full-model retraining. Furthermore, we introduce an annotation-free 3D masking strategy to preserve local invariance, maintaining the integrity of unchanged regions during editing. Extensive experiments demonstrate that BVE achieves superior performance in generating high-quality, text-aligned 3D assets, while faithfully retaining the visual characteristics of the original input.

AI.tldr: BVE框架通过自建大规模3D编辑数据集、轻量可训练模块和无标注3D掩码策略，解决了现有3D编辑方法在语义一致性、局部不变性和数据集不足方面的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有3D编辑方法存在显著局限性：多视图编辑方法在投影回3D时会产生损失，而基于体素的编辑在可修改区域和修改规模上都受到限制。此外，缺乏足够大规模的训练和评估数据集也是一个挑战。
AI.method: 提出BVE框架：1）自建专门针对3D编辑的大规模数据集；2）在基础图像到3D生成架构上增强轻量可训练模块，实现文本语义的高效注入而无需昂贵的全模型重训练；3）引入无标注3D掩码策略来保持局部不变性。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，BVE在生成高质量、文本对齐的3D资产方面表现出优越性能，同时忠实地保留了原始输入的视觉特征。
AI.conclusion: BVE框架通过创新的数据集构建、轻量模块设计和局部不变性保护策略，有效解决了3D编辑中的关键挑战，实现了语义一致且局部不变的3D编辑效果。

title: Safe Human-to-Humanoid Motion Imitation Using Control Barrier Functions
summary: Ensuring operational safety is critical for human-to-humanoid motion imitation. This paper presents a vision-based framework that enables a humanoid robot to imitate human movements while avoiding collisions. Human skeletal keypoints are captured by a single camera and converted into joint angles for motion retargeting. Safety is enforced through a Control Barrier Function (CBF) layer formulated as a Quadratic Program (QP), which filters imitation commands to prevent both self-collisions and human-robot collisions. Simulation results validate the effectiveness of the proposed framework for real-time collision-aware motion imitation.

AI.tldr: 基于视觉的人形机器人运动模仿框架，通过控制屏障函数确保操作安全，避免自碰撞和人机碰撞
AI.motivation: 确保人形机器人模仿人类运动时的操作安全性至关重要，需要解决运动模仿过程中的碰撞风险问题
AI.method: 使用单摄像头捕捉人体骨骼关键点并转换为关节角度进行运动重定向；通过控制屏障函数层（CBF）作为二次规划问题（QP）来过滤模仿指令，防止自碰撞和人机碰撞
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了所提框架在实时碰撞感知运动模仿中的有效性
AI.conclusion: 提出的视觉框架能够实现安全的人形机器人运动模仿，通过CBF-QP方法有效防止碰撞，为实时操作提供了可行方案

title: Dyadic Partnership(DP): A Missing Link Towards Full Autonomy in Medical Robotics
summary: For the past decades medical robotic solutions were mostly based on the concept of tele-manipulation. While their design was extremely intelligent, allowing for better access, improved dexterity, reduced tremor, and improved imaging, their intelligence was limited. They therefore left cognition and decision making to the surgeon. As medical robotics advances towards high-level autonomy, the scientific community needs to explore the required pathway towards partial and full autonomy. Here, we introduce the concept of Dyadic Partnership(DP), a new paradigm in which robots and clinicians engage in intelligent, expert interaction and collaboration. The Dyadic Partners would discuss and agree on decisions and actions during their dynamic and interactive collaboration relying also on intuitive advanced media using generative AI, such as a world model, and advanced multi-modal visualization. This article outlines the foundational components needed to enable such systems, including foundation models for clinical intelligence, multi-modal intent recognition, co-learning frameworks, advanced visualization, and explainable, trust-aware interaction. We further discuss key challenges such as data scarcity, lack of standardization, and ethical acceptance. Dyadic partnership is introduced and is positioned as a powerful yet achievable, acceptable milestone offering a promising pathway toward safer, more intuitive collaboration and a gradual transition to full autonomy across diverse clinical settings.

AI.tldr: 论文提出"二元伙伴关系"新范式，让机器人与临床医生进行智能专家级交互协作，共同决策，作为实现医疗机器人完全自主化的可行中间路径。
AI.motivation: 当前医疗机器人主要基于遥操作概念，虽然设计智能但认知和决策仍由外科医生承担。随着医疗机器人向高级自主性发展，需要探索实现部分和完全自主的路径。
AI.method: 引入"二元伙伴关系"范式，机器人与临床医生通过生成式AI（如世界模型）和多模态可视化进行智能交互协作，共同讨论和决策。包括临床智能基础模型、多模态意图识别、共同学习框架、高级可视化和可解释信任感知交互等核心组件。
AI.result: 提出了一种可实现、可接受的里程碑式方案，为更安全、更直观的协作提供了有前景的路径，并促进向完全自主的渐进过渡。
AI.conclusion: 二元伙伴关系是医疗机器人实现完全自主化的强大且可行的中间步骤，能够应对数据稀缺、缺乏标准化和伦理接受等关键挑战，适用于多样化的临床环境。

title: Pushing the Limits of On-Device Streaming ASR: A Compact, High-Accuracy English Model for Low-Latency Inference
summary: Deploying high-quality automatic speech recognition (ASR) on edge devices requires models that jointly optimize accuracy, latency, and memory footprint while operating entirely on CPU without GPU acceleration. We conduct a systematic empirical study of state-of-the-art ASR architectures, encompassing encoder-decoder, transducer, and LLM-based paradigms, evaluated across batch, chunked, and streaming inference modes. Through a comprehensive benchmark of over 50 configurations spanning OpenAI Whisper, NVIDIA Nemotron, Parakeet TDT, Canary, Conformer Transducer, and Qwen3-ASR, we identify NVIDIA's Nemotron Speech Streaming as the strongest candidate for real-time English streaming on resource-constrained hardware. We then re-implement the complete streaming inference pipeline in ONNX Runtime and conduct a controlled evaluation of multiple post-training quantization strategies, including importance-weighted k-quant, mixed-precision schemes, and round-to-nearest quantization, combined with graph-level operator fusion. These optimizations reduce the model from 2.47 GB to as little as 0.67 GB while maintaining word error rate (WER) within 1% absolute of the full-precision PyTorch baseline. Our recommended configuration, the int4 k-quant variant, achieves 8.20% average streaming WER across eight standard benchmarks, running comfortably faster than real-time on CPU with 0.56 s algorithmic latency, establishing a new quality-efficiency Pareto point for on-device streaming ASR.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统研究了边缘设备上ASR模型的优化，通过评估多种架构和量化策略，将NVIDIA Nemotron Speech Streaming模型从2.47GB压缩至0.67GB，在保持WER误差1%以内的同时实现CPU实时处理。
AI.motivation: 在边缘设备上部署高质量ASR需要同时优化准确性、延迟和内存占用，且需在无GPU加速的CPU上运行。现有研究缺乏对多种ASR架构在资源受限硬件上的系统性比较和优化。
AI.method: 1. 系统评估6种ASR架构（Whisper、Nemotron、Parakeet TDT等）超过50种配置；2. 在ONNX Runtime中重新实现完整流式推理管道；3. 评估多种后训练量化策略（重要性加权k-quant、混合精度、最近邻量化）结合图级算子融合。
AI.result: 1. 确定NVIDIA Nemotron Speech Streaming为最佳候选；2. 量化优化将模型从2.47GB压缩至0.67GB；3. int4 k-quant变体在8个标准基准测试中平均WER为8.20%，算法延迟0.56秒，在CPU上快于实时处理。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过系统评估和量化优化，为边缘设备流式ASR建立了新的质量-效率帕累托最优点，证明了在保持准确性的同时大幅减少内存占用的可行性。

title: Efficient Emotion-Aware Iconic Gesture Prediction for Robot Co-Speech
summary: Co-speech gestures increase engagement and improve speech understanding. Most data-driven robot systems generate rhythmic beat-like motion, yet few integrate semantic emphasis. To address this, we propose a lightweight transformer that derives iconic gesture placement and intensity from text and emotion alone, requiring no audio input at inference time. The model outperforms GPT-4o in both semantic gesture placement classification and intensity regression on the BEAT2 dataset, while remaining computationally compact and suitable for real-time deployment on embodied agents.

AI.tldr: 提出基于文本和情感的轻量级Transformer模型，无需音频输入即可生成语义手势，在BEAT2数据集上超越GPT-4o
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动的机器人系统主要生成节奏性节拍动作，但缺乏语义强调。协同语音手势能提高参与度和语音理解，因此需要开发能生成语义手势的系统。
