To support this iterative process, we demonstrate Pneuma-Seeker, a system that reifies a user's information need as explicit, inspectable relational specifications, enabling iterative refinement of the information need, targeted data discovery, and provenance-aware execution. Through two real-world procurement use cases, we show how Pneuma-Seeker leverages LLMs as transparent, interactive analytical collaborators rather than opaque answer engines.

AI.tldr: Pneuma-Seeker系统将用户信息需求转化为可检查的关系规范，支持迭代式数据探索和溯源感知执行，利用LLM作为透明交互分析协作工具而非黑盒答案引擎。
AI.motivation: 数据分析师在处理关系数据时通常从模糊或不明确的问题开始，需要通过迭代探索来逐步细化问题。现有工具缺乏对信息需求进行明确表示和迭代优化的支持。
AI.method: 开发Pneuma-Seeker系统，将用户信息需求具体化为明确、可检查的关系规范。系统支持信息需求的迭代细化、针对性数据发现和溯源感知执行。利用LLM作为透明、交互式的分析协作工具。
AI.result: 通过两个实际采购用例展示了Pneuma-Seeker的有效性。系统能够将LLM从黑盒答案引擎转变为透明的分析协作工具，支持分析师迭代地细化和执行信息需求。
AI.conclusion: Pneuma-Seeker通过将信息需求具体化为关系规范，为数据分析师提供了迭代探索关系数据的新范式，使LLM成为透明、交互式的分析协作伙伴而非黑盒工具。

title: AIM: Intent-Aware Unified world action Modeling with Spatial Value Maps
summary: Pretrained video generation models provide strong priors for robot control, but existing unified world action models still struggle to decode reliable actions without substantial robot-specific training. We attribute this limitation to a structural mismatch: while video models capture how scenes evolve, action generation requires explicit reasoning about where to interact and the underlying manipulation intent. We introduce AIM, an intent-aware unified world action model that bridges this gap via an explicit spatial interface. Instead of decoding actions directly from future visual representations, AIM predicts an aligned spatial value map that encodes task-relevant interaction structure, enabling a control-oriented abstraction of future dynamics. Built on a pretrained video generation model, AIM jointly models future observations and value maps within a shared mixture-of-transformers architecture. It employs intent-causal attention to route future information to the action branch exclusively through the value representation. We further propose a self-distillation reinforcement learning stage that freezes the video and value branches and optimizes only the action head using dense rewards derived from projected value-map responses together with sparse task-level signals. To support training and evaluation, we construct a simulation dataset of 30K manipulation trajectories with synchronized multi-view observations, actions, and value-map annotations. Experiments on RoboTwin 2.0 benchmark show that AIM achieves a 94.0% average success rate, significantly outperforming prior unified world action baselines. Notably, the improvement is more pronounced in long-horizon and contact-sensitive manipulation tasks, demonstrating the effectiveness of explicit spatial-intent modeling as a bridge between visual world modeling and robot control.

AI.tldr: AIM是一个意图感知的统一世界动作模型，通过显式空间接口连接视频生成模型与机器人控制，使用空间价值图编码任务相关交互结构，显著提升长时程和接触敏感操作任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有统一世界动作模型直接从未来视觉表示解码动作，但缺乏对交互位置和操作意图的显式推理，导致动作不可靠。视频生成模型捕捉场景演化，但动作生成需要更结构化的空间意图表示。
AI.method: 1) 基于预训练视频生成模型构建混合变换器架构，联合建模未来观测和空间价值图；2) 使用意图因果注意力，通过价值表示将未来信息路由到动作分支；3) 提出自蒸馏强化学习阶段，冻结视频和价值分支，仅优化动作头；4) 构建包含3万条轨迹的仿真数据集，包含多视角观测、动作和价值图标注。
AI.result: 在RoboTwin 2.0基准测试中，AIM达到94.0%的平均成功率，显著优于先前统一世界动作基线。在长时程和接触敏感操作任务中改进尤为明显。
AI.conclusion: 显式空间意图建模作为视觉世界建模与机器人控制之间的桥梁是有效的。空间价值图提供了控制导向的未来动态抽象，解决了视频模型与动作生成之间的结构不匹配问题。

title: GFT: From Imitation to Reward Fine-Tuning with Unbiased Group Advantages and Dynamic Coefficient Rectification
summary: Large language models are typically post-trained using supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL), yet effectively unifying efficient knowledge injection with robust generalization remains challenging. In this work, we provide a training-dynamics analysis showing that SFT can be interpreted as a special case of policy gradient optimization with an extremely sparse implicit reward and unstable inverse-probability weighting, which together lead to single-path dependency, entropy collapse, and gradient explosion. Motivated by this diagnosis, we propose Group Fine-Tuning (GFT), a unified post-training framework that addresses these intrinsic limitations through two mechanisms: Group Advantage Learning, which constructs diverse response groups and derives normalized contrastive supervision to alleviate reward sparsity, and Dynamic Coefficient Rectification, which adaptively bounds inverse-probability weights to stabilize optimization while preserving efficient knowledge injection. Experiments demonstrate that GFT consistently surpasses SFT-based methods and yields policies that integrate more smoothly with subsequent RL training.

AI.tldr: GFT提出一种统一后训练框架，通过分组优势学习和动态系数校正解决SFT的奖励稀疏和优化不稳定问题，提升知识注入与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型后训练通常使用监督微调(SFT)和强化学习(RL)，但有效统一高效知识注入与鲁棒泛化仍具挑战。研究发现SFT可解释为具有极端稀疏隐式奖励和不稳定逆概率加权的策略梯度优化特例，导致单一路径依赖、熵崩溃和梯度爆炸。
AI.method: 提出分组微调(GFT)框架：1) 分组优势学习：构建多样化响应组并推导归一化对比监督以缓解奖励稀疏；2) 动态系数校正：自适应约束逆概率权重以稳定优化，同时保持高效知识注入。
AI.result: 实验表明GFT持续超越基于SFT的方法，并产生与后续RL训练更平滑集成的策略。
AI.conclusion: GFT通过解决SFT的内在限制，提供了一种统一后训练框架，能更好地平衡知识注入与泛化能力，为后续RL训练提供更优基础。

title: Enhancing Mixture-of-Experts Specialization via Cluster-Aware Upcycling
comment: Comments: Accepted to CVPR 2026. Project page: https://sanghyeokchu.github.io/cluster-aware-upcycling/
summary: Sparse Upcycling provides an efficient way to initialize a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model from pretrained dense weights instead of training from scratch. However, since all experts start from identical weights and the router is randomly initialized, the model suffers from expert symmetry and limited early specialization. We propose Cluster-aware Upcycling, a strategy that incorporates semantic structure into MoE initialization. Our method first partitions the dense model's input activations into semantic clusters. Each expert is then initialized using the subspace representations of its corresponding cluster via truncated SVD, while setting the router's initial weights to the cluster centroids. This cluster-aware initialization breaks expert symmetry and encourages early specialization aligned with the data distribution. Furthermore, we introduce an expert-ensemble self-distillation loss that stabilizes training by providing reliable routing guidance using an ensemble teacher. When evaluated on CLIP ViT-B/32 and ViT-B/16, Cluster-aware Upcycling consistently outperforms existing methods across both zero-shot and few-shot benchmarks. The proposed method also produces more diverse and disentangled expert representations, reduces inter-expert similarity, and leads to more confident routing behavior.

AI.tldr: 提出Cluster-aware Upcycling方法，通过语义聚类初始化MoE模型，打破专家对称性并促进早期专业化，提升CLIP模型的零样本和少样本性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Sparse Upcycling方法从预训练密集权重初始化MoE模型，但由于所有专家从相同权重开始且路由器随机初始化，存在专家对称性和早期专业化受限的问题。
AI.method: 1) 对密集模型的输入激活进行语义聚类；2) 使用截断SVD为每个专家初始化对应的聚类子空间表示；3) 将路由器初始权重设为聚类中心；4) 引入专家集成自蒸馏损失，通过集成教师提供可靠的路由指导。
AI.result: 在CLIP ViT-B/32和ViT-B/16上评估，Cluster-aware Upcycling在零样本和少样本基准测试中始终优于现有方法。该方法产生更多样化和解耦的专家表示，降低专家间相似度，并导致更自信的路由行为。
AI.conclusion: Cluster-aware Upcycling通过将语义结构融入MoE初始化，有效解决了专家对称性问题，促进了早期专业化，提升了模型性能，为MoE模型的初始化提供了更有效的方法。

title: Equifinality in Mixture of Experts: Routing Topology Does Not Determine Language Modeling Quality
summary: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures employ increasingly sophisticated routing mechanisms -- learned routers, multi-hop trajectories, token-dependent gating. We ask: does routing topology actually determine language modeling quality? We build a geometric MoE (ST-MoE) using cosine-similarity routing against learned centroids in a low-dimensional space ($d_{space} = 64$), requiring 80% fewer routing parameters than standard linear routers. Through 62 controlled experiments on WikiText-103 at 76--84M parameters trained to convergence (50K steps, 1.64B tokens), we find that routing topology does not determine asymptotic perplexity (PPL): five cosine-routing variants are statistically equivalent within a 1-PPL margin (Two One-Sided Tests [TOST], $p < 0.05$ for all 10 pairwise comparisons; 15 runs across 3 seeds, observed range 33.93--34.72). The finding extends to hash, random-fixed, and top-1 routing (single-seed; graceful 1.1--2.2 PPL degradation) and replicates on OpenWebText (0.03 PPL gap, 6 runs, 3 seeds each). A standard linear router with 5.3$\times$ more routing parameters reaches PPL 32.76, but iso-parameter cosine routing closes 67% of this gap -- the true mechanism advantage is $\sim$1.2%. The mechanistic explanation is convergent redundancy: multi-hop updates are collinear ($\cos(Δh_0, Δh_1) = 0.805$), implementing magnitude amplification rather than compositional reasoning; a single learnable scalar replicates multi-hop performance. As a practical payoff, zero-shot relative-norm halting saves 25% of MoE FLOPs at +0.12% PPL. Expert-level specialization and causal controllability -- which coexist with topology-level equifinality -- are explored in a companion paper.

AI.tldr: 研究发现路由拓扑结构并不决定语言建模的渐近困惑度，五种余弦路由变体在统计上等效，标准线性路由器的优势主要来自参数数量而非路由机制本身。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探究稀疏混合专家架构中日益复杂的路由机制（学习型路由器、多跳轨迹、令牌相关门控）是否真正决定了语言建模质量，特别是路由拓扑结构对性能的影响。
AI.method: 构建几何MoE（ST-MoE），使用余弦相似度路由在低维空间（d_space=64）中针对学习到的质心进行路由，比标准线性路由器减少80%的路由参数。在WikiText-103上进行62个受控实验，参数规模76-84M，训练至收敛（50K步，1.64B令牌）。使用双单侧检验（TOST）进行统计比较，并在OpenWebText上进行复制实验。
AI.result: 路由拓扑结构不决定渐近困惑度：五种余弦路由变体在1-PPL范围内统计等效（p<0.05，所有10对比较）。这一发现扩展到哈希、随机固定和top-1路由。标准线性路由器（参数多5.3倍）达到PPL 32.76，但等参数余弦路由缩小了67%的差距，机制优势仅为~1.2%。机制解释是收敛冗余：多跳更新是共线的（cos(Δh_0, Δh_1)=0.805），实现幅度放大而非组合推理。
AI.conclusion: 路由拓扑结构在语言建模质量中并非决定性因素，多种路由机制在统计上等效。实际应用中，零射相对范数停止可节省25%的MoE FLOPs，仅增加0.12% PPL。专家级专业化和因果可控性与拓扑级等效性共存。

title: Simulator Adaptation for Sim-to-Real Learning of Legged Locomotion via Proprioceptive Distribution Matching
summary: Simulation trained legged locomotion policies often exhibit performance loss on hardware due to dynamics discrepancies between the simulator and the real world, highlighting the need for approaches that adapt the simulator itself to better match hardware behavior. Prior work typically quantify these discrepancies through precise, time-aligned matching of joint and base trajectories. This process requires motion capture, privileged sensing, and carefully controlled initial conditions. We introduce a practical alternative based on proprioceptive distribution matching, which compares hardware and simulation rollouts as distributions of joint observations and actions, eliminating the need for time alignment or external sensing. Using this metric as a black-box objective, we explore adapting simulator dynamics through parameter identification, action-delta models, and residual actuator models. Our approach matches the parameter recovery and policy-performance gains of privileged state-matching baselines across extensive sim-to-sim ablations on the Go2 quadruped. Real-world experiments demonstrate substantial drift reduction using less than five minutes of hardware data, even for a challenging two-legged walking behavior. These results demonstrate that proprioceptive distribution matching provides a practical and effective route to simulator adaptation for sim-to-real transfer of learned legged locomotion.

AI.tldr: 提出基于本体感觉分布匹配的模拟器自适应方法，无需运动捕捉或时间对齐，通过关节观测和动作的分布匹配来减少仿真与真实世界的动力学差异。
AI.motivation: 仿真训练的四足机器人运动策略在硬件上常因仿真与真实世界动力学差异而性能下降，传统方法需要运动捕捉、特权感知和精确时间对齐，过程复杂且不实用。
AI.method: 提出本体感觉分布匹配方法，将硬件和仿真运行数据视为关节观测和动作的分布进行比较，无需时间对齐或外部感知。使用该指标作为黑盒目标，通过参数识别、动作增量模型和残差执行器模型来调整仿真器动力学。
AI.result: 在Go2四足机器人上的仿真到仿真消融实验中，该方法在参数恢复和策略性能增益方面与特权状态匹配基线相当。真实世界实验表明，使用不到5分钟的硬件数据即可显著减少漂移，即使在具有挑战性的两足行走行为中也是如此。
AI.conclusion: 本体感觉分布匹配为学习型四足机器人运动的仿真到真实迁移提供了一种实用有效的模拟器自适应途径，简化了传统方法所需的复杂设置和精确对齐要求。

title: Diffusion Language Models for Speech Recognition
summary: Diffusion language models have recently emerged as a leading alternative to standard language models, due to their ability for bidirectional attention and parallel text generation. In this work, we explore variants for their use in speech recognition. Specifically, we introduce a comprehensive guide to incorporating masked diffusion language models (MDLM) and uniform-state diffusion models (USDMs) for rescoring ASR hypotheses. Additionally, we design a new joint-decoding method that combines CTC and USDM by integrating the framewise probability distributions derived from CTC with the labelwise probability distributions computed by USDM at each decoding step, thereby generating new candidates that combine strong language knowledge from USDM and acoustic information from CTC. Our findings reveal that USDM, as well as MDLM, can significantly improve the accuracy of recognized text. We publish all our code and recipes.

AI.tldr: 该论文探索了扩散语言模型在语音识别中的应用，提出了基于掩码扩散语言模型和均匀状态扩散模型的ASR假设重打分方法，并设计了CTC与USDM联合解码的新方法。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型因其双向注意力和并行文本生成能力成为标准语言模型的有力替代品，本研究旨在探索其在语音识别中的应用潜力，特别是用于ASR假设重打分。
AI.method: 1. 引入掩码扩散语言模型和均匀状态扩散模型用于ASR假设重打分；2. 设计新的联合解码方法，将CTC的帧级概率分布与USDM的标签级概率分布在每个解码步骤中结合，生成结合USDM语言知识和CTC声学信息的新候选。
AI.result: 研究发现USDM和MDLM都能显著提高识别文本的准确性，证明了扩散语言模型在语音识别中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 扩散语言模型（特别是USDM和MDLM）是语音识别中有效的重打分工具，提出的CTC-USDM联合解码方法能有效结合声学和语言信息，所有代码和配方已公开。

title: ADP-DiT: Text-Guided Diffusion Transformer for Brain Image Generation in Alzheimer's Disease Progression
summary: Alzheimer's disease (AD) progresses heterogeneously across individuals, motivating subject-specific synthesis of follow-up magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) to support progression assessment. While Diffusion Transformers (DiT), an emerging transformer-based diffusion model, offer a scalable backbone for image synthesis, longitudinal AD MRI generation with clinically interpretable control over follow-up time and participant metadata remains underexplored. We present ADP-DiT, an interval-aware, clinically text-conditioned diffusion transformer for longitudinal AD MRI synthesis. ADP-DiT encodes follow-up interval together with multi-domain demographic, diagnostic (CN/MCI/AD), and neuropsychological information as a natural-language prompt, enabling time-specific control beyond coarse diagnostic stages. To inject this conditioning effectively, we use dual text encoders-OpenCLIP for vision-language alignment and T5 for richer clinical-language understanding. Their embeddings are fused into DiT through cross-attention for fine-grained guidance and adaptive layer normalization for global modulation. We further enhance anatomical fidelity by applying rotary positional embeddings to image tokens and performing diffusion in a pre-trained SDXL-VAE latent space to enable efficient high-resolution reconstruction. On 3,321 longitudinal 3T T1-weighted scans from 712 participants (259,038 image slices), ADP-DiT achieves SSIM 0.8739 and PSNR 29.32 dB, improving over a DiT baseline by +0.1087 SSIM and +6.08 dB PSNR while capturing progression-related changes such as ventricular enlargement and shrinking hippocampus. These results suggest that integrating comprehensive, subject-specific clinical conditions with architectures can improve longitudinal AD MRI synthesis.

AI.tldr: ADP-DiT：一种基于扩散变换器的纵向阿尔茨海默病MRI合成模型，通过临床文本条件控制随访时间和患者元数据，实现个体化疾病进展模拟
AI.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病在不同个体间进展存在异质性，需要个体化的随访MRI合成来支持疾病进展评估。现有方法在纵向MRI生成方面，特别是对随访时间和临床元数据的精细控制方面仍显不足
AI.method: 提出ADP-DiT模型，采用双文本编码器架构：OpenCLIP用于视觉-语言对齐，T5用于临床语言理解。将随访间隔、人口统计学、诊断信息（CN/MCI/AD）和神经心理学数据编码为自然语言提示，通过交叉注意力注入扩散变换器，并使用旋转位置编码和SDXL-VAE潜在空间进行高效高分辨率重建
AI.result: 在712名参与者的3,321个纵向3T T1加权扫描（259,038个图像切片）上，ADP-DiT达到SSIM 0.8739和PSNR 29.32 dB，相比DiT基线分别提升0.1087 SSIM和6.08 dB PSNR，能够捕捉脑室扩大和海马萎缩等进展相关变化
AI.conclusion: 将全面的个体特异性临床条件与先进架构相结合，能够显著改善纵向阿尔茨海默病MRI合成质量，为疾病进展评估提供更精确的模拟工具

title: Credo: Declarative Control of LLM Pipelines via Beliefs and Policies
summary: Agentic AI systems are becoming commonplace in domains that require long-lived, stateful decision-making in continuously evolving conditions. As such, correctness depends not only on the output of individual model calls, but also on how to best adapt when incorporating new evidence or revising prior conclusions. However, existing frameworks rely on imperative control loops, ephemeral memory, and prompt-embedded logic, making agent behavior opaque, brittle, and difficult to verify. This paper introduces Credo, which represents semantic state as beliefs and regulates behavior using declarative policies defined over these beliefs. This design supports adaptive, auditable, and composable execution through a database-backed semantic control plane. We showcase these concepts in a decision-control scenario, where beliefs and policies declaratively guide critical execution choices (e.g., model selection, retrieval, corrective re-execution), enabling dynamic behavior without requiring any changes to the underlying pipeline code.

AI.tldr: Credo框架将语义状态表示为信念，并使用基于这些信念的声明式策略来规范智能体行为，解决了传统基于命令式控制循环的AI系统在长期状态决策中的不透明和脆弱性问题。
AI.motivation: 当前基于命令式控制循环、短暂记忆和提示嵌入逻辑的AI系统框架，在处理需要长期状态决策的持续演化环境时，存在行为不透明、脆弱且难以验证的问题。随着智能体AI系统在需要长期状态决策的领域变得普遍，正确性不仅取决于单个模型调用的输出，还取决于如何最佳地适应新证据或修改先前结论。
AI.method: Credo框架将语义状态表示为信念，并使用基于这些信念的声明式策略来规范智能体行为。该设计通过数据库支持的语义控制平面支持自适应、可审计和可组合的执行。在决策控制场景中，信念和策略以声明式方式指导关键执行选择（如模型选择、检索、纠正性重新执行），无需修改底层管道代码即可实现动态行为。
AI.result: Credo框架实现了自适应、可审计和可组合的执行，通过声明式策略和信念表示，使智能体行为更加透明、健壮且易于验证，能够在持续演化的环境中进行长期状态决策。
AI.conclusion: Credo通过将语义状态表示为信念并使用声明式策略来规范行为，为智能体AI系统提供了一种更透明、健壮和可验证的框架，特别适用于需要长期状态决策和持续适应的应用场景。

title: Federated Single-Agent Robotics: Multi-Robot Coordination Without Intra-Robot Multi-Agent Fragmentation
summary: As embodied robots move toward fleet-scale operation, multi-robot coordination is becoming a central systems challenge. Existing approaches often treat this as motivation for increasing internal multi-agent decomposition within each robot. We argue for a different principle: multi-robot coordination does not require intra-robot multi-agent fragmentation. Each robot should remain a single embodied agent with its own persistent runtime, local policy scope, capability state, and recovery authority, while coordination emerges through federation across robots at the fleet level. We present Federated Single-Agent Robotics (FSAR), a runtime architecture for multi-robot coordination built on single-agent robot runtimes. Each robot exposes a governed capability surface rather than an internally fragmented agent society. Fleet coordination is achieved through shared capability registries, cross-robot task delegation, policy-aware authority assignment, trust-scoped interaction, and layered recovery protocols. We formalize key coordination relations including authority delegation, inter-robot capability requests, local-versus-fleet recovery boundaries, and hierarchical human supervision, and describe a fleet runtime architecture supporting shared Embodied Capability Module (ECM) discovery, contract-aware cross-robot coordination, and fleet-level governance. We evaluate FSAR on representative multi-robot coordination scenarios against decomposition-heavy baselines. Results show statistically significant gains in governance locality (d=2.91, p<.001 vs. centralized control) and recovery containment (d=4.88, p<.001 vs. decomposition-heavy), while reducing authority conflicts and policy violations across all scenarios. Our results support the view that the path from embodied agents to embodied fleets is better served by federation across coherent robot runtimes than by fragmentation within them.

AI.tldr: FSAR提出联邦单智能体机器人架构，反对在单个机器人内部进行多智能体分解，主张通过机器人间的联邦实现多机器人协调，保持每个机器人为单一智能体。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人向规模化集群发展，多机器人协调成为系统挑战。现有方法倾向于在单个机器人内部进行多智能体分解，但作者认为这并非必要，主张保持每个机器人为单一智能体，通过联邦实现协调。
AI.method: 提出联邦单智能体机器人（FSAR）运行时架构：每个机器人作为单一智能体运行，暴露受治理的能力接口；通过共享能力注册表、跨机器人任务委托、策略感知权限分配、信任范围交互和分层恢复协议实现协调；形式化关键协调关系。
AI.result: 在代表性多机器人协调场景中，相比分解密集型基线，FSAR在治理局部性（d=2.91, p<.001）和恢复包容性（d=4.88, p<.001）方面获得显著提升，同时减少了所有场景中的权限冲突和策略违规。
AI.conclusion: 从个体机器人到机器人集群的发展路径，更适合通过连贯机器人运行时之间的联邦实现，而非在机器人内部进行分解。FSAR架构支持这一理念，在多机器人协调中表现出优越性。

title: Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Methane Sorption: Cross-Gas Transfer Learning, Ensemble Collapse Under Physics Constraints, and Monte Carlo Dropout Uncertainty Quantification
summary: Accurate methane sorption prediction across heterogeneous coal ranks requires models that combine thermodynamic consistency, efficient knowledge transfer across data-scarce geological systems, and calibrated uncertainty estimates, capabilities that are rarely addressed together in existing frameworks. We present a physics-informed transfer learning framework that adapts a hydrogen sorption PINN to methane sorption prediction via Elastic Weight Consolidation, coal-specific feature engineering, and a three-phase curriculum that progressively balances transfer preservation with thermodynamic fine-tuning. Trained on 993 equilibrium measurements from 114 independent coal experiments spanning lignite to anthracite, the framework achieves R2 = 0.932 on held-out coal samples, a 227% improvement over pressure-only classical isotherms, while hydrogen pre-training delivers 18.9% lower RMSE and 19.4% faster convergence than random initialization. Five Bayesian uncertainty quantification approaches reveal a systematic divergence in performance across physics-constrained architectures. Monte Carlo Dropout achieves well-calibrated uncertainty at minimal overhead, while deep ensembles, regardless of architectural diversity or initialization strategy, exhibit performance degradation because shared physics constraints narrow the admissible solution manifold. SHAP and ALE analyses confirm that learned representations remain physically interpretable and aligned with established coal sorption mechanisms: moisture-volatile interactions are most influential, pressure-temperature coupling captures thermodynamic co-dependence, and features exhibit non-monotonic effects. These results identify Monte Carlo Dropout as the best-performing UQ method in this physics-constrained transfer learning framework, and demonstrate cross-gas transfer learning as a data-efficient strategy for geological material modeling.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种物理信息迁移学习框架，通过弹性权重整合、煤质特征工程和三阶段课程学习，将氢吸附PINN迁移到甲烷吸附预测，在993个平衡测量数据上实现R²=0.932，比传统等温线提升227%，并评估了五种贝叶斯不确定性量化方法。
AI.motivation: 现有甲烷吸附预测模型缺乏将热力学一致性、跨数据稀缺地质系统的知识迁移效率以及校准的不确定性估计相结合的能力，需要开发一个能同时解决这些问题的统一框架。
AI.method: 采用物理信息迁移学习框架：1) 通过弹性权重整合将氢吸附PINN迁移到甲烷吸附预测；2) 煤质特征工程；3) 三阶段课程学习，逐步平衡迁移保持与热力学微调；4) 在114个独立煤样实验的993个平衡测量数据上训练；5) 评估五种贝叶斯不确定性量化方法。
AI.result: 框架在保留煤样上达到R²=0.932，比仅基于压力的经典等温线提升227%；氢预训练比随机初始化降低18.9%的RMSE并加速19.4%收敛；蒙特卡洛Dropout在最小开销下实现良好校准的不确定性，而深度集成因共享物理约束导致性能下降；SHAP和ALE分析确认学习表示具有物理可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 蒙特卡洛Dropout是该物理约束迁移学习框架中最佳的不确定性量化方法，跨气体迁移学习是地质材料建模的数据高效策略，学习表示与已建立的煤吸附机制保持一致。

title: Inferring World Belief States in Dynamic Real-World Environments
summary: We investigate estimating a human's world belief state using a robot's observations in a dynamic, 3D, and partially observable environment. The methods are grounded in mental model theory, which posits that human decision making, contextual reasoning, situation awareness, and behavior planning draw from an internal simulation or world belief state. When in teams, the mental model also includes a team model of each teammate's beliefs and capabilities, enabling fluent teamwork without the need for constant and explicit communication. In this work we replicate a core component of the team model by inferring a teammate's belief state, or level one situation awareness, as a human-robot team navigates a household environment. We evaluate our methods in a realistic simulation, extend to a real-world robot platform, and demonstrate a downstream application of the belief state through an active assistance semantic reasoning task.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过机器人观测在动态3D部分可观测环境中估计人类的世界信念状态，基于心理模型理论，并应用于人机团队的家庭环境导航
AI.motivation: 研究动机是基于心理模型理论，认为人类决策、情境推理、态势感知和行为规划都源于内部模拟或世界信念状态。在团队中，心理模型还包括对队友信念和能力的团队模型，从而实现无需持续显式沟通的流畅团队协作。本研究旨在通过推断队友的信念状态（一级态势感知）来复制团队模型的核心组件
AI.method: 方法基于心理模型理论，在动态、3D、部分可观测环境中使用机器人观测来估计人类的世界信念状态。研究在真实仿真环境中评估方法，扩展到真实机器人平台，并通过主动辅助语义推理任务展示信念状态的下游应用
AI.result: 研究在真实仿真环境中评估了方法，成功扩展到真实机器人平台，并通过主动辅助语义推理任务展示了信念状态的实际应用价值
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功实现了在动态3D部分可观测环境中通过机器人观测估计人类世界信念状态的方法，验证了心理模型理论在人机团队协作中的应用，为流畅的人机协作提供了技术基础

title: Adaptive Conformal Prediction for Improving Factuality of Generations by Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are prone to generating factually incorrect outputs. Recent work has applied conformal prediction to provide uncertainty estimates and statistical guarantees for the factuality of LLM generations. However, existing approaches are typically not prompt-adaptive, limiting their ability to capture input-dependent variability. As a result, they may filter out too few items (leading to over-coverage) or too many (under-coverage) for a given task or prompt. We propose an adaptive conformal prediction approach that extends conformal score transformation methods to LLMs, with applications to long-form generation and multiple-choice question answering. This enables prompt-dependent calibration, retaining marginal coverage guarantees while improving conditional coverage. In addition, the approach naturally supports selective prediction, allowing unreliable claims or answer choices to be filtered out in downstream applications. We evaluate our approach on multiple white-box models across diverse domains and show that it significantly outperforms existing baselines in terms of conditional coverage.

AI.tldr: 提出自适应共形预测方法，通过提示依赖的校准改进LLM事实性输出的不确定性估计，在保持边际覆盖率的同时提升条件覆盖率。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型容易产生事实性错误输出。现有共形预测方法通常不是提示自适应的，无法捕捉输入依赖的变异性，导致对特定任务或提示过滤过多或过少项目。
AI.method: 提出自适应共形预测方法，将共形分数变换方法扩展到LLMs，支持长文本生成和多选题回答。该方法实现提示依赖的校准，自然支持选择性预测，允许在下游应用中过滤不可靠的声明或答案选项。
AI.result: 在多个白盒模型和不同领域上评估该方法，结果显示在条件覆盖率方面显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 自适应共形预测方法能够为LLM生成提供更好的不确定性估计，在保持统计保证的同时提高条件覆盖率，支持更可靠的下游应用。

title: Enhanced Text-to-Image Generation by Fine-grained Multimodal Reasoning
summary: With the rapid progress of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), unified MLLMs that jointly perform image understanding and generation have advanced significantly. However, despite the inherent reasoning capabilities of unified MLLMs for self-reflection and self-refinement, their use in text-to-image generation remains largely underexplored. Meanwhile, existing multimodal reasoning-based image generation methods mostly rely on holistic image-text alignment judgments, without fine-grained reflection and refinement of detailed prompt attributes, leading to limited fine-grained control. Therefore, we propose Fine-grained Multimodal Reasoning (FiMR), a framework that leverages decomposed visual question answering (VQA) to break down an input prompt into minimal semantic units-such as entities and attributes-and verify each unit via VQA to generate explicit, fine-grained feedback. Based on this feedback, FiMR then applies targeted, localized refinements. This fine-grained self-reasoning and self-refinement enable MLLMs to achieve more precise improvements in image-prompt alignment and overall generation quality at test time. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FiMR consistently outperforms image generation baselines, including reasoning-based methods, particularly on compositional text-to-image benchmarks. The code and models are available at https://github.com/KU-AGI/FiMR

AI.tldr: FiMR是一个利用分解视觉问答进行细粒度多模态推理的框架，通过将输入提示分解为最小语义单元并验证每个单元，实现图像生成的细粒度自我反思和精炼。
AI.motivation: 尽管统一多模态大语言模型具有自我反思和精炼的内在推理能力，但在文本到图像生成中的应用仍未被充分探索。现有基于多模态推理的图像生成方法大多依赖整体图像-文本对齐判断，缺乏对详细提示属性的细粒度反思和精炼，导致细粒度控制有限。
AI.method: 提出细粒度多模态推理（FiMR）框架：1）使用分解的视觉问答将输入提示分解为最小语义单元（如实体和属性）；2）通过VQA验证每个单元以生成明确的细粒度反馈；3）基于此反馈进行有针对性的局部精炼。这种细粒度自我推理和自我精炼使MLLM能够在测试时实现更精确的图像-提示对齐和整体生成质量改进。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，FiMR在图像生成基准测试中始终优于基线方法，包括基于推理的方法，特别是在组合性文本到图像基准测试上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: FiMR通过细粒度多模态推理和自我精炼机制，显著提升了统一MLLM在文本到图像生成中的性能，实现了更精确的图像-提示对齐和生成质量改进。

title: Generating Concept Lexicalizations via Dictionary-Based Cross-Lingual Sense Projection
comment: To be published in the proceedings of Canadian AI 2026
summary: We study the task of automatically expanding WordNet-style lexical resources to new languages through sense generation. We generate senses by associating target-language lemmas with existing lexical concepts via semantic projection. Given a sense-tagged English corpus and its translation, our method projects English synsets onto aligned target-language tokens and assigns the corresponding lemmas to those synsets. To generate these alignments and ensure their quality, we augment a pre-trained base aligner with a bilingual dictionary, which is also used to filter out incorrect sense projections. We evaluate the method on multiple languages, comparing it to prior methods, as well as dictionary-based and large language model baselines. Results show that the proposed project-and-filter strategy improves precision while remaining interpretable and requiring few external resources. We plan to make our code, documentation, and generated sense inventories accessible.

AI.tldr: 通过语义投影自动扩展WordNet式词汇资源到新语言的方法，使用对齐和过滤策略提高精度
AI.motivation: 解决跨语言自动扩展词汇资源的问题，特别是将WordNet式词汇资源扩展到新语言，避免传统方法的高成本和低效率
AI.method: 基于语义投影的方法：使用英语语料库及其翻译，将英语同义词集投影到对齐的目标语言标记上，通过双语词典增强预训练对齐器并进行过滤
AI.result: 在多种语言上评估显示，提出的投影-过滤策略在保持可解释性和较少外部资源需求的同时提高了精度，优于先前方法和基线
AI.conclusion: 该方法为跨语言词汇资源扩展提供了一种有效且实用的解决方案，计划公开代码、文档和生成的语义清单

title: MVAdapt: Zero-Shot Multi-Vehicle Adaptation for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-End (E2E) autonomous driving models are usually trained and evaluated with a fixed ego-vehicle, even though their driving policy is implicitly tied to vehicle dynamics. When such a model is deployed on a vehicle with different size, mass, or drivetrain characteristics, its performance can degrade substantially; we refer to this problem as the vehicle-domain gap. To address it, we propose MVAdapt, a physics-conditioned adaptation framework for multi-vehicle E2E driving. MVAdapt combines a frozen TransFuser++ scene encoder with a lightweight physics encoder and a cross-attention module that conditions scene features on vehicle properties before waypoint decoding. In the CARLA Leaderboard 1.0 benchmark, MVAdapt improves over naive transfer and multi-embodiment adaptation baselines on both in-distribution and unseen vehicles. We further show two complementary behaviors: strong zero-shot transfer on many unseen vehicles, and data-efficient few-shot calibration for severe physical outliers. These results suggest that explicitly conditioning E2E driving policies on vehicle physics is an effective step toward more transferable autonomous driving models. All codes are available at https://github.com/hae-sung-oh/MVAdapt

AI.tldr: MVAdapt：一种物理条件化的多车辆端到端自动驾驶适应框架，通过显式地将驾驶策略与车辆物理特性关联来解决车辆领域差距问题。
AI.motivation: 端到端自动驾驶模型通常在固定自车配置下训练和评估，但其驾驶策略隐式依赖于车辆动力学。当部署到不同尺寸、质量或传动特性的车辆时，性能会显著下降，这被称为车辆领域差距问题。
AI.method: MVAdapt结合冻结的TransFuser++场景编码器、轻量级物理编码器和交叉注意力模块，在路径点解码前将场景特征条件化于车辆物理特性。该框架支持零样本迁移和少样本校准。
AI.result: 在CARLA Leaderboard 1.0基准测试中，MVAdapt优于朴素迁移和多体现适应基线方法，在分布内和未见车辆上均表现更好。展示了两种互补行为：对许多未见车辆的强零样本迁移能力，以及对严重物理异常值的数据高效少样本校准能力。
AI.conclusion: 显式地将端到端驾驶策略条件化于车辆物理特性是构建更具可迁移性自动驾驶模型的有效步骤。MVAdapt框架为解决车辆领域差距问题提供了实用解决方案。

title: Learning Class Difficulty in Imbalanced Histopathology Segmentation via Dynamic Focal Attention
summary: Semantic segmentation of histopathology images under class imbalance is typically addressed through frequency-based loss reweighting, which implicitly assumes that rare classes are difficult. However, true difficulty also arises from morphological variability, boundary ambiguity, and contextual similarity-factors that frequency cannot capture. We propose Dynamic Focal Attention (DFA), a simple and efficient mechanism that learns class-specific difficulty directly within the cross-attention of query-based mask decoders. DFA introduces a learnable per-class bias to attention logits, enabling representation-level reweighting prior to prediction rather than gradient-level reweighting after prediction. Initialised from a log-frequency prior to prevent gradient starvation, the bias is optimised end-to-end, allowing the model to adaptively capture difficulty signals through training, effectively unifying frequency-based and difficulty-aware approaches under a common attention-bias framework. On three histopathology benchmarks (BDSA, BCSS, CRAG), DFA consistently improves Dice and IoU, matching or exceeding a difficulty-aware baseline without a separate estimator or additional training stage. These results demonstrate that encoding class difficulty at the representation level provides a principled alternative to conventional loss reweighting for imbalanced segmentation.

AI.tldr: DFA是一种在基于查询的掩码解码器中学习类别特定难度的动态焦点注意力机制，通过可学习的注意力偏置实现表示级重加权，优于传统的基于频率的损失重加权方法。
AI.motivation: 组织病理学图像语义分割中的类别不平衡问题通常通过基于频率的损失重加权来解决，但这种方法隐含地假设稀有类别就是困难类别。然而，真正的分割难度还来自形态学变异性、边界模糊性和上下文相似性等因素，这些是频率无法捕捉的。
AI.method: 提出动态焦点注意力（DFA）机制，在基于查询的掩码解码器的交叉注意力中直接学习类别特定难度。DFA为注意力对数引入可学习的每类别偏置，实现预测前的表示级重加权而非预测后的梯度级重加权。偏置从对数频率先验初始化以防止梯度饥饿，并通过端到端优化自适应捕捉难度信号。
AI.result: 在三个组织病理学基准数据集（BDSA、BCSS、CRAG）上，DFA持续改进Dice和IoU指标，匹配或超过了需要单独估计器或额外训练阶段的难度感知基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 在表示级别编码类别难度为不平衡分割提供了原则性的替代方案，优于传统的损失重加权方法，统一了基于频率和难度感知的方法到一个共同的注意力偏置框架中。

title: BiCon-Gate: Consistency-Gated De-colloquialisation for Dialogue Fact-Checking
summary: Automated fact-checking in dialogue involves multi-turn conversations where colloquial language is frequent yet understudied. To address this gap, we propose a conservative rewrite candidate for each response claim via staged de-colloquialisation, combining lightweight surface normalisation with scoped in-claim coreference resolution. We then introduce BiCon-Gate, a semantics-aware consistency gate that selects the rewrite candidate only when it is semantically supported by the dialogue context, otherwise falling back to the original claim. This gated selection stabilises downstream fact-checking and yields gains in both evidence retrieval and fact verification. On the DialFact benchmark, our approach improves retrieval and verification, with particularly strong gains on SUPPORTS, and outperforms competitive baselines, including a decoder-based one-shot LLM rewrite that attempts to perform all de-colloquialisation steps in a single pass.

AI.tldr: 提出一种对话式事实核查方法，通过分阶段去口语化重写和语义感知一致性门控机制，提升证据检索和事实验证性能
AI.motivation: 对话式事实核查中口语化语言频繁但研究不足，需要处理多轮对话中的非正式表达以提升事实核查效果
AI.method: 采用分阶段去口语化重写：轻量级表面规范化+范围内指代消解，引入BiCon-Gate语义感知一致性门控选择重写候选或保留原声明
AI.result: 在DialFact基准上改进检索和验证性能，特别是SUPPORTS类别表现突出，优于包括单次LLM重写在内的竞争基线
AI.conclusion: 分阶段去口语化重写配合语义感知一致性门控能稳定下游事实核查，在证据检索和事实验证方面均有提升

title: Ψ-Map: Panoptic Surface Integrated Mapping Enables Real2Sim Transfer
summary: Open-vocabulary panoptic reconstruction is essential for advanced robotics perception and simulation. However, existing methods based on 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) often struggle to simultaneously achieve geometric accuracy, coherent panoptic understanding, and real-time inference frequency in large-scale scenes. In this paper, we propose a comprehensive framework that integrates geometric reinforcement, end-to-end panoptic learning, and efficient rendering. First, to ensure physical realism in large-scale environments, we leverage LiDAR data to construct plane-constrained multimodal Gaussian Mixture Models (GMMs) and employ 2D Gaussian surfels as the map representation, enabling high-precision surface alignment and continuous geometric supervision. Building upon this, to overcome the error accumulation and cumbersome cross-frame association inherent in traditional multi-stage panoptic segmentation pipelines, we design a query-guided end-to-end learning architecture. By utilizing a local cross-attention mechanism within the view frustum, the system lifts 2D mask features directly into 3D space, achieving globally consistent panoptic understanding. Finally, addressing the computational bottlenecks caused by high-dimensional semantic features, we introduce Precise Tile Intersection and a Top-K Hard Selection strategy to optimize the rendering pipeline. Experimental results demonstrate that our system achieves superior geometric and panoptic reconstruction quality in large-scale scenes while maintaining an inference rate exceeding 40 FPS, meeting the real-time requirements of robotic control loops.

AI.tldr: 提出一个用于大规模场景的开放词汇全景重建框架，结合几何增强、端到端全景学习和高效渲染，在保持40+FPS实时性能的同时实现高质量的几何和全景重建。
AI.motivation: 现有基于3D高斯泼溅的方法在大规模场景中难以同时实现几何精度、连贯的全景理解和实时推理频率，需要一种综合解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 利用LiDAR数据构建平面约束的多模态高斯混合模型，使用2D高斯面元作为地图表示；2) 设计查询引导的端到端学习架构，通过视锥体内的局部交叉注意力机制将2D掩码特征直接提升到3D空间；3) 引入精确瓦片相交和Top-K硬选择策略优化渲染流水线。
AI.result: 系统在大规模场景中实现了优越的几何和全景重建质量，同时保持超过40FPS的推理速率，满足机器人控制回路的实时要求。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功解决了大规模开放词汇全景重建中几何精度、全景一致性和实时性能的平衡问题，为机器人感知和仿真提供了有效的解决方案。

title: PRiMeFlow: Capturing Complex Expression Heterogeneity in Perturbation Response Modelling
summary: Predicting the effects of perturbations in-silico on cell state can identify drivers of cell behavior at scale and accelerate drug discovery. However, modeling challenges remain due to the inherent heterogeneity of single cell gene expression and the complex, latent gene dependencies. Here, we present PRiMeFlow, an end-to-end flow matching based approach to directly model the effects of genetic and small molecule perturbations in the gene expression space. The distribution-fitting approach taken by PRiMeFlow enables it to accurately approximate the empirical distribution of single-cell gene expression, which we demonstrate through extensive benchmarking inside PerturBench. Through ablation studies, we also validate important model design choices such as operating in gene expression space and parameterizing the velocity field with a U-Net architecture. The PRiMeFlow architecture was used as the basis for the model that won the Generalist Prize in the first ARC Virtual Cell Challenge.

AI.tldr: PRiMeFlow是一种基于流匹配的端到端方法，直接在基因表达空间中建模遗传和小分子扰动效应，能够准确近似单细胞基因表达的经验分布。
AI.motivation: 预测细胞状态扰动的计算效应可以大规模识别细胞行为驱动因素并加速药物发现，但单细胞基因表达的异质性和复杂的潜在基因依赖关系给建模带来挑战。
AI.method: PRiMeFlow采用基于流匹配的端到端方法，直接在基因表达空间中建模扰动效应，使用U-Net架构参数化速度场，通过分布拟合方法近似单细胞基因表达的经验分布。
AI.result: 在PerturBench中进行广泛基准测试表明，PRiMeFlow能够准确近似单细胞基因表达的经验分布；消融研究验证了在基因表达空间操作和使用U-Net架构等重要设计选择；基于PRiMeFlow架构的模型在首届ARC虚拟细胞挑战赛中获得通用奖。
AI.conclusion: PRiMeFlow为单细胞扰动建模提供了一种有效的端到端流匹配方法，能够准确捕捉基因表达分布，在计算生物学和药物发现领域具有应用潜力。

title: A Study of Failure Modes in Two-Stage Human-Object Interaction Detection
comment: Accepted to SAUAFG Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: Human-object interaction (HOI) detection aims to detect interactions between humans and objects in images. While recent advances have improved performance on existing benchmarks, their evaluations mainly focus on overall prediction accuracy and provide limited insight into the underlying causes of model failures. In particular, modern models often struggle in complex scenes involving multiple people and rare interaction combinations. In this work, we present a study to better understand the failure modes of two-stage HOI models, which form the basis of many current HOI detection approaches. Rather than constructing a large-scale benchmark, we instead decompose HOI detection into multiple interpretable perspectives and analyze model behavior across these dimensions to study different types of failure patterns. We curate a subset of images from an existing HOI dataset organized by human-object-interaction configurations (e.g., multi-person interactions and object sharing), and analyze model behavior under these configurations to examine different failure modes. This design allows us to analyze how these HOI models behave under different scene compositions and why their predictions fail. Importantly, high overall benchmark performance does not necessarily reflect robust visual reasoning about human-object relationships. We hope that this study can provide useful insights into the limitations of HOI models and offer observations for future research in this area.

AI.tldr: 该论文对两阶段人-物交互检测模型的失败模式进行了系统性分析，通过分解多个可解释维度来理解模型在复杂场景中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 当前HOI检测模型虽然在基准测试上表现良好，但缺乏对模型失败原因的深入理解。现有评估主要关注整体预测准确率，而忽略了模型在复杂场景（如多人交互、罕见交互组合）中的具体失败模式。需要更深入地分析模型为何在特定配置下失败，以揭示其视觉推理能力的局限性。
AI.method: 1. 将HOI检测分解为多个可解释的视角进行分析；2. 从现有HOI数据集中精心挑选图像子集，按人-物-交互配置（如多人交互、物体共享等）组织；3. 分析模型在这些特定配置下的行为，研究不同类型的失败模式；4. 通过这种设计分析模型在不同场景组合下的表现及其预测失败的原因。
AI.result: 研究发现，尽管两阶段HOI模型在整体基准测试中表现良好，但在复杂场景中（特别是涉及多人交互和罕见交互组合时）存在显著局限性。高整体性能并不一定代表对人-物关系的稳健视觉推理能力。研究揭示了模型在不同场景配置下的具体失败模式，为理解HOI模型的局限性提供了实证依据。
AI.conclusion: 该研究强调了对HOI模型失败模式进行系统性分析的重要性，指出整体基准性能不能完全反映模型的视觉推理能力。通过分解分析不同配置下的模型行为，研究为未来HOI检测研究提供了有价值的观察和见解，有助于开发更稳健的模型。

title: MaMe & MaRe: Matrix-Based Token Merging and Restoration for Efficient Visual Perception and Synthesis
comment: 20 pages. Extended version of CVPR 2026 Findings paper. Neurocomputing (Elsevier) under review
summary: Token compression is crucial for mitigating the quadratic complexity of self-attention mechanisms in Vision Transformers (ViTs), which often involve numerous input tokens. Existing methods, such as ToMe, rely on GPU-inefficient operations (e.g., sorting, scattered writes), introducing overheads that limit their effectiveness. We introduce MaMe, a training-free, differentiable token merging method based entirely on matrix operations, which is GPU-friendly to accelerate ViTs. Additionally, we present MaRe, its inverse operation, for token restoration, forming a MaMe+MaRe pipeline for image synthesis. When applied to pre-trained models, MaMe doubles ViT-B throughput with a 2% accuracy drop. Notably, fine-tuning the last layer with MaMe boosts ViT-B accuracy by 1.0% at 1.1x speed. In SigLIP2-B@512 zero-shot classification, MaMe provides 1.3x acceleration with negligible performance degradation. In video tasks, MaMe accelerates VideoMAE-L by 48.5% on Kinetics-400 with only a 0.84% accuracy loss. Furthermore, MaMe achieves simultaneous improvements in both performance and speed on some tasks. In image synthesis, the MaMe+MaRe pipeline enhances quality while reducing Stable Diffusion v2.1 generation latency by 31%. Collectively, these results demonstrate MaMe's and MaRe's effectiveness in accelerating vision models. The code is available at https://github.com/cominder/mame}{https://github.com/cominder/mame.

AI.tldr: MaMe是一种基于矩阵运算的训练无关、可微分token合并方法，用于加速Vision Transformers，其逆操作MaRe用于token恢复，形成图像合成pipeline。
AI.motivation: 现有token压缩方法（如ToMe）依赖GPU效率低的操作（排序、分散写入），引入开销限制其有效性，需要更GPU友好的解决方案来缓解ViT中自注意力机制的二次复杂度问题。
AI.method: 提出MaMe：完全基于矩阵运算的训练无关、可微分token合并方法，具有GPU友好特性；提出MaRe作为其逆操作用于token恢复，形成MaMe+MaRe pipeline用于图像合成。
AI.result: 在预训练模型上，MaMe使ViT-B吞吐量翻倍，精度下降仅2%；微调最后一层后，ViT-B精度提升1.0%，速度1.1倍；SigLIP2-B@512零样本分类中1.3倍加速，性能损失可忽略；VideoMAE-L在Kinetics-400上加速48.5%，精度损失仅0.84%；某些任务实现性能与速度同时提升；Stable Diffusion v2.1生成延迟降低31%。
AI.conclusion: MaMe和MaRe在加速视觉模型方面具有显著效果，提供GPU友好的token压缩和恢复方案，在多种视觉任务中实现性能与效率的平衡提升。

title: Fast-SegSim: Real-Time Open-Vocabulary Segmentation for Robotics in Simulation
summary: Open-vocabulary panoptic reconstruction is crucial for advanced robotics and simulation. However, existing 3D reconstruction methods, such as NeRF or Gaussian Splatting variants, often struggle to achieve the real-time inference frequency required by robotic control loops. Existing methods incur prohibitive latency when processing the high-dimensional features required for robust open-vocabulary segmentation. We propose Fast-SegSim, a novel, simple, and end-to-end framework built upon 2D Gaussian Splatting, designed to realize real-time, high-fidelity, and 3D-consistent open-vocabulary segmentation reconstruction. Our core contribution is a highly optimized rendering pipeline that specifically addresses the computational bottleneck of high-channel segmentation feature accumulation. We introduce two key optimizations: Precise Tile Intersection to reduce rasterization redundancy, and a novel Top-K Hard Selection strategy. This strategy leverages the geometric sparsity inherent in the 2D Gaussian representation to greatly simplify feature accumulation and alleviate bandwidth limitations, achieving render rates exceeding 40 FPS. Fast-SegSim provides critical value in robotic applications: it serves both as a high-frequency sensor input for simulation platforms like Gazebo, and its 3D-consistent outputs provide essential multi-view 'ground truth' labels for fine-tuning downstream perception tasks. We demonstrate this utility by using the generated labels to fine-tune the perception module in object goal navigation, successfully doubling the navigation success rate. Our superior rendering speed and practical utility underscore Fast-SegSim's potential to bridge the sim-to-real gap.

AI.tldr: Fast-SegSim：基于2D高斯泼溅的实时开放词汇全景重建框架，通过优化渲染流水线实现超过40FPS的3D一致分割重建，用于机器人仿真和感知任务微调。
AI.motivation: 现有3D重建方法（如NeRF或高斯泼溅变体）在处理开放词汇分割所需的高维特征时存在过高延迟，无法满足机器人控制回路的实时性要求（通常需要高频推理）。
AI.method: 基于2D高斯泼溅构建端到端框架，核心是高度优化的渲染流水线，包含两个关键优化：1）精确瓦片相交以减少光栅化冗余；2）新颖的Top-K硬选择策略，利用2D高斯表示的几何稀疏性简化特征累积并缓解带宽限制。
AI.result: 实现超过40FPS的渲染速度，显著超越现有方法。生成的3D一致输出可作为仿真平台（如Gazebo）的高频传感器输入，并为下游感知任务提供多视角"真值"标签。在物体目标导航任务中，使用生成标签微调感知模块使导航成功率翻倍。
AI.conclusion: Fast-SegSim通过优化的渲染流水线实现了实时、高保真、3D一致的开放词汇分割重建，在机器人应用中具有重要价值，既能作为高频仿真输入，又能为下游感知任务提供训练数据，有效弥合仿真与现实之间的差距。

title: HINTBench: Horizon-agent Intrinsic Non-attack Trajectory Benchmark
summary: Existing agent-safety evaluation has focused mainly on externally induced risks. Yet agents may still enter unsafe trajectories under benign conditions. We study this complementary but underexplored setting through the lens of \emph{intrinsic} risk, where intrinsic failures remain latent, propagate across long-horizon execution, and eventually lead to high-consequence outcomes. To evaluate this setting, we introduce \emph{non-attack intrinsic risk auditing} and present \textbf{HINTBench}, a benchmark of 629 agent trajectories (523 risky, 106 safe; 33 steps on average) supporting three tasks: risk detection, risk-step localization, and intrinsic failure-type identification. Its annotations are organized under a unified five-constraint taxonomy. Experiments reveal a substantial capability gap: strong LLMs perform well on trajectory-level risk detection, but their performance drops to below 35 Strict-F1 on risk-step localization, while fine-grained failure diagnosis proves even harder. Existing guard models transfer poorly to this setting. These findings establish intrinsic risk auditing as an open challenge for agent safety.

AI.tldr: HINTBench是一个专注于智能体内在风险的基准测试，包含629个轨迹（523个有风险，106个安全），支持风险检测、风险步骤定位和内在故障类型识别三个任务，揭示了现有模型在内在风险评估方面的显著能力差距。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体安全评估主要关注外部诱导风险，但智能体在良性条件下仍可能进入不安全轨迹。本文研究这种互补但未被充分探索的内在风险设置，其中内在故障保持潜伏状态，在长期执行中传播，最终导致严重后果。
AI.method: 引入非攻击性内在风险审计方法，提出HINTBench基准测试，包含629个智能体轨迹（平均33步），支持三个任务：风险检测、风险步骤定位和内在故障类型识别。标注基于统一的五约束分类法组织。
AI.result: 实验显示显著能力差距：强LLM在轨迹级风险检测上表现良好，但在风险步骤定位上的性能降至35 Strict-F1以下，细粒度故障诊断更加困难。现有防护模型在此设置下迁移效果差。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现确立了内在风险审计作为智能体安全的一个开放挑战，强调了需要专门方法来解决智能体在良性条件下的内在风险问题。

title: A Unified Conditional Flow for Motion Generation, Editing, and Intra-Structural Retargeting
summary: Text-driven motion editing and intra-structural retargeting, where source and target share topology but may differ in bone lengths, are traditionally handled by fragmented pipelines with incompatible inputs and representations: editing relies on specialized generative steering, while retargeting is deferred to geometric post-processing. We present a unifying perspective where both tasks are cast as instances of conditional transport within a single generative framework. By leveraging recent advances in flow matching, we demonstrate that editing and retargeting are fundamentally the same generative task, distinguished only by which conditioning signal, semantic or structural, is modulated during inference. We implement this vision via a rectified-flow motion model jointly conditioned on text prompts and target skeletal structures. Our architecture extends a DiT-style transformer with per-joint tokenization and explicit joint self-attention to strictly enforce kinematic dependencies, while a multi-condition classifier-free guidance strategy balances text adherence with skeletal conformity. Experiments on SnapMoGen and a multi-character Mixamo subset show that a single trained model supports text-to-motion generation, zero-shot editing, and zero-shot intra-structural retargeting. This unified approach simplifies deployment and improves structural consistency compared to task-specific baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出统一框架，将文本驱动运动编辑和同拓扑结构重定向视为条件传输的同一生成任务，基于流匹配技术实现
AI.motivation: 传统方法将运动编辑和结构重定向作为碎片化流程处理，使用不兼容的输入和表示。编辑依赖专门的生成引导，而重定向则推迟到几何后处理。需要统一视角简化部署并提高结构一致性。
AI.method: 基于流匹配技术，将编辑和重定向视为同一生成任务，仅区别在于推理时调制的条件信号（语义或结构）。采用DiT风格transformer架构，通过每关节标记化和显式关节自注意力严格强制执行运动学依赖，使用多条件分类器自由引导策略平衡文本遵循与骨骼一致性。
AI.result: 在SnapMoGen和多角色Mixamo子集上的实验表明，单个训练模型支持文本到运动生成、零样本编辑和零样本同拓扑结构重定向。统一方法简化了部署，相比任务特定基线提高了结构一致性。
AI.conclusion: 通过条件传输的统一视角，将运动编辑和结构重定向整合到单一生成框架中，基于流匹配技术实现，简化了部署流程并提高了结构一致性，为运动生成任务提供了更统一的解决方案。

title: Ro-SLM: Onboard Small Language Models for Robot Task Planning and Operation Code Generation
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) provide robots with contextual reasoning abilities to comprehend human instructions. Yet, current LLM-enabled robots typically depend on cloud-based models or high-performance computing infrastructure, which limit their deployment on robots under unreliable internet environments or with constrained computational resources, such as UAVs and small ground vehicles. Thus, deploying fine-tuned small language models (SLMs) that support onboard deployment offers a promising alternative. This paper introduces Ro-SLM, a framework that enables reliable SLM-driven robot operation by distilling LLMs' knowledge and reasoning. Ro-SLM starts from dataset synthesis by leveraging LLMs to generate diverse task instructions, produce corresponding ground truth code with minimal human assistance, and augment instructions into real-world application scenarios. Ro-SLM is then fine-tuned with the dataset, in which LLM serves as a reward function to guide the training. Extensive experiments on UAV operation tasks demonstrate that Ro-SLM improves the performance of SLM from being incapable of supporting robotic task planning and code generation to achieving performance that approaches LLM.

AI.tldr: Ro-SLM框架通过知识蒸馏使小型语言模型具备机器人任务规划能力，支持在资源受限设备上部署，性能接近大型语言模型
AI.motivation: 当前基于大型语言模型的机器人系统依赖云端或高性能计算基础设施，限制了在无人机等资源受限设备上的部署。需要开发支持本地部署的小型语言模型解决方案。
AI.method: 1. 利用大型语言模型合成多样化任务指令数据集；2. 生成对应的地面实况代码；3. 将指令增强到实际应用场景；4. 使用数据集微调小型语言模型；5. 以大型语言模型作为奖励函数指导训练。
AI.result: 在无人机操作任务上的实验表明，Ro-SLM显著提升了小型语言模型的性能，从无法支持机器人任务规划和代码生成，到性能接近大型语言模型水平。
AI.conclusion: Ro-SLM框架通过知识蒸馏实现了小型语言模型在机器人任务中的可靠部署，为资源受限环境下的机器人智能化提供了可行解决方案。

title: Teaching Robots to Interpret Social Interactions through Lexically-guided Dynamic Graph Learning
summary: For a robot to be called socially intelligent, it must be able to infer users internal states from their current behaviour, predict the users future behaviour, and if required, respond appropriately. In this work, we investigate how robots can be endowed with such social intelligence by modelling the dynamic relationship between user's internal states (latent) and actions (observable state). Our premise is that these states arise from the same underlying socio-cognitive process and influence each other dynamically. Drawing inspiration from theories in Cognitive Science, we propose a novel multi-task learning framework, termed as \textbf{SocialLDG} that explicitly models the dynamic relationship among the states represent as six distinct tasks. Our framework uses a language model to introduce lexical priors for each task and employs dynamic graph learning to model task affinity evolving with time. SocialLDG has three advantages: First, it achieves state-of-the-art performance on two challenging human-robot social interaction datasets available publicly. Second, it supports strong task scalability by learning new tasks seamlessly without catastrophic forgetting. Finally, benefiting from explicit modelling task affinity, it offers insights on how different interactions unfolds in time and how the internal states and observable actions influence each other in human decision making.

AI.tldr: 提出SocialLDG框架，通过多任务学习建模人机交互中用户内部状态与可观测行为间的动态关系，实现社交智能机器人
AI.motivation: 为实现社交智能机器人，需要从用户当前行为推断其内部状态、预测未来行为并适当响应。现有方法未能充分建模内部状态（潜在）与行为（可观测）之间的动态关系，这些状态源于相同的底层社会认知过程并相互影响
AI.method: 提出SocialLDG多任务学习框架，将六种不同任务表示为状态，使用语言模型为每个任务引入词汇先验，采用动态图学习建模随时间演化的任务亲和性
AI.result: 在两个公开的人机社交交互数据集上达到最先进性能；支持强任务可扩展性，可无缝学习新任务而无灾难性遗忘；通过显式建模任务亲和性，提供关于不同交互如何随时间展开以及内部状态与可观测行为如何相互影响的洞察
AI.conclusion: SocialLDG框架通过建模内部状态与可观测行为间的动态关系，有效赋予机器人社交智能，在性能、可扩展性和可解释性方面均有优势

title: Unsupervised Anomaly Detection in Process-Complex Industrial Time Series: A Real-World Case Study
summary:
Industrial time-series data from real production environments exhibits substantially higher complexity than commonly used benchmark datasets, primarily due to heterogeneous, multi-stage operational processes. As a result, anomaly detection methods validated under simplified conditions often fail to generalize to industrial settings. This work presents an empirical study on a unique dataset collected from fully operational industrial machinery, explicitly capturing pronounced process-induced variability.
  We evaluate which model classes are capable of capturing this complexity, starting with a classical Isolation Forest baseline and extending to multiple autoencoder architectures. Experimental results show that Isolation Forest is insufficient for modeling the non-periodic, multi-scale dynamics present in the data, whereas autoencoders consistently perform better. Among them, temporal convolutional autoencoders achieve the most robust performance, while recurrent and variational variants require more careful tuning.

AI.tldr: 对工业时间序列数据的实证研究表明，传统异常检测方法在复杂工业环境中表现不足，而自编码器特别是时序卷积自编码器在捕获非周期性多尺度动态方面表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 工业时间序列数据比常用基准数据集复杂得多，主要由于异构的多阶段操作过程。在简化条件下验证的异常检测方法往往无法泛化到工业环境，需要研究能处理这种复杂性的模型。
AI.method: 使用从完全运行的工业机械收集的真实数据集进行实证研究，评估多种模型类别：从经典的孤立森林基线扩展到多种自编码器架构，包括时序卷积自编码器、循环自编码器和变分自编码器。
AI.result: 孤立森林不足以建模数据中的非周期性多尺度动态，而自编码器表现更好。其中时序卷积自编码器获得最稳健的性能，循环和变分变体需要更仔细的调参。
AI.conclusion: 工业时间序列异常检测需要专门处理复杂过程诱导变异性的方法，时序卷积自编码器在捕获工业数据复杂性方面表现出色，为实际应用提供了有前景的解决方案。

title: VibeFlow: Versatile Video Chroma-Lux Editing through Self-Supervised Learning
summary: Video chroma-lux editing, which aims to modify illumination and color while preserving structural and temporal fidelity, remains a significant challenge. Existing methods typically rely on expensive supervised training with synthetic paired data. This paper proposes VibeFlow, a novel self-supervised framework that unleashes the intrinsic physical understanding of pre-trained video generation models. Instead of learning color and light transitions from scratch, we introduce a disentangled data perturbation pipeline that enforces the model to adaptively recombine structure from source videos and color-illumination cues from reference images, enabling robust disentanglement in a self-supervised manner. Furthermore, to rectify discretization errors inherent in flow-based models, we introduce Residual Velocity Fields alongside a Structural Distortion Consistency Regularization, ensuring rigorous structural preservation and temporal coherence. Our framework eliminates the need for costly training resources and generalizes in a zero-shot manner to diverse applications, including video relighting, recoloring, low-light enhancement, day-night translation, and object-specific color editing. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VibeFlow achieves impressive visual quality with significantly reduced computational overhead. Our project is publicly available at https://lyf1212.github.io/VibeFlow-webpage.

AI.tldr: VibeFlow是一种自监督视频色彩-光照编辑框架，利用预训练视频生成模型的物理理解能力，通过解耦数据扰动实现结构保持和色彩光照编辑，无需合成配对数据训练。
AI.motivation: 视频色彩-光照编辑需要同时修改光照和颜色并保持结构和时间一致性，现有方法依赖昂贵的监督训练和合成配对数据，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 提出自监督框架VibeFlow：1）利用预训练视频生成模型的物理理解能力；2）引入解耦数据扰动管道，自适应重组源视频结构和参考图像色彩-光照线索；3）提出残差速度场和结构失真一致性正则化，纠正基于流模型的离散化误差。
AI.result: VibeFlow在零样本设置下实现多种应用：视频重照明、重新着色、低光增强、日夜转换和对象特定颜色编辑。实验显示其视觉质量优异且计算开销显著降低。
AI.conclusion: VibeFlow通过自监督方式利用预训练模型的物理理解能力，实现了高质量的视频色彩-光照编辑，无需昂贵训练资源，具有广泛的应用潜力。

title: When PCOS Meets Eating Disorders: An Explainable AI Approach to Detecting the Hidden Triple Burden
summary: Women with polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) face substantially elevated risks of body image distress, disordered eating, and metabolic challenges, yet existing natural language processing approaches for detecting these conditions lack transparency and cannot identify co-occurring presentations. We developed small, open-source language models to automatically detect this triple burden in social media posts with grounded explainability. We collected 1,000 PCOS-related posts from six subreddits, with two trained annotators labeling posts using guidelines operationalizing Lee et al. (2017) clinical framework. Three models (Gemma-2-2B, Qwen3-1.7B, DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B) were fine-tuned using Low-Rank Adaptation to generate structured explanations with textual evidence. The best model achieved 75.3 percent exact match accuracy on 150 held-out posts, with robust comorbidity detection and strong explainability. Performance declined with diagnostic complexity, indicating their best use is for screening rather than autonomous diagnosis.

AI.tldr: 开发小型开源语言模型，用于在社交媒体帖子中自动检测PCOS患者的三重负担（身体形象困扰、饮食失调、代谢问题），并提供可解释性
AI.motivation: PCOS女性面临身体形象困扰、饮食失调和代谢问题的显著风险，但现有NLP方法缺乏透明度且无法识别共病表现
AI.method: 收集1000个PCOS相关Reddit帖子，由两名标注员使用Lee等人（2017）临床框架进行标注；对三个模型（Gemma-2-2B、Qwen3-1.7B、DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B）使用LoRA进行微调，生成结构化解释和文本证据
AI.result: 最佳模型在150个保留测试帖子上达到75.3%的精确匹配准确率，具有强大的共病检测能力和良好的可解释性；性能随诊断复杂性下降，表明最适合用于筛查而非自主诊断
AI.conclusion: 开发的小型开源语言模型能够有效检测PCOS三重负担，具有良好的可解释性和共病检测能力，但更适合作为筛查工具而非自主诊断系统

title: HECTOR: Human-centric Hierarchical Coordination and Supervision of Robotic Fleets under Continual Temporal Tasks
summary: Robotic fleets can be extremely efficient when working concurrently and collaboratively, e.g., for delivery, surveillance, search and rescue. However, it can be demanding or even impractical for an operator to directly control each robot. Thus, autonomy of the fleet and its online interaction with the operator are both essential, particularly in dynamic and partially unknown environments. The operator might need to add new tasks, cancel some tasks, change priorities and modify planning results. How to design the procedure for these interactions and efficient algorithms to fulfill these needs have been mostly neglected in the related literature. Thus, this work proposes a human-centric coordination and supervision scheme (HECTOR) for large-scale robotic fleets under continual and uncertain temporal tasks. It consists of three hierarchical layers: (I) the bidirectional and multimodal protocol of online human-fleet interaction, where the operator interacts with and supervises the whole fleet; (II) the rolling assignment of currently-known tasks to teams within a certain horizon, and (III) the dynamic coordination within a team given the detected subtasks during online execution. The overall mission can be as general as temporal logic formulas over collaborative actions. Such hierarchical structure allows human interaction and supervision at different granularities and triggering conditions, to both improve computational efficiency and reduce human effort. Extensive human-in-the-loop simulations are performed over heterogeneous fleets under various temporal tasks and environmental uncertainties.

AI.tldr: HECTOR：面向大规模机器人编队的人本协调与监督框架，支持持续不确定时序任务下的在线人机交互与分层协调
AI.motivation: 机器人编队在并发协作任务中效率显著，但直接控制每个机器人对操作员负担过重。现有研究缺乏对在线人机交互流程和高效算法的系统设计，特别是在动态未知环境中操作员需要实时添加/取消任务、调整优先级和修改规划结果的需求。
AI.method: 提出三层分层架构HECTOR：(I)双向多模态在线人机交互协议，支持操作员与整个编队的交互监督；(II)滚动任务分配，在特定时间范围内将已知任务分配给团队；(III)动态团队协调，在线执行期间根据检测到的子任务进行协调。支持协作动作上的时序逻辑公式描述任务。
AI.result: 通过大量人在环仿真实验，在异构机器人编队、多种时序任务和环境不确定性条件下验证了框架有效性。分层结构允许在不同粒度和触发条件下进行人机交互与监督，既提高了计算效率又减少了人工负担。
AI.conclusion: HECTOR为大规模机器人编队在持续不确定时序任务下的协调与监督提供了系统解决方案，通过分层架构实现了高效的人机交互、任务分配和动态协调，为实际应用中的机器人编队管理提供了可行框架。

title: Physically-Guided Optical Inversion Enable Non-Contact Side-Channel Attack on Isolated Screens
summary: Noncontact exfiltration of electronic screen content poses a security challenge, with side-channel incursions as the principal vector. We introduce an optical projection side-channel paradigm that confronts two core instabilities: (i) the near-singular Jacobian spectrum of projection mapping breaches Hadamard stability, rendering inversion hypersensitive to perturbations; (ii) irreversible compression in light transport obliterates global semantic cues, magnifying reconstruction ambiguity. Exploiting passive speckle patterns formed by diffuse reflection, our Irradiance Robust Radiometric Inversion Network (IR4Net) fuses a Physically Regularized Irradiance Approximation (PRIrr-Approximation), which embeds the radiative transfer equation in a learnable optimizer, with a contour-to-detail cross-scale reconstruction mechanism that arrests noise propagation. Moreover, an Irreversibility Constrained Semantic Reprojection (ICSR) module reinstates lost global structure through context-driven semantic mapping. Evaluated across four scene categories, IR4Net achieves fidelity beyond competing neural approaches while retaining resilience to illumination perturbations.

AI.tldr: IR4Net：一种利用被动散斑模式进行非接触式屏幕内容提取的光学投影侧信道方法，通过物理正则化辐照度近似和轮廓到细节跨尺度重建机制解决投影映射的稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 非接触式电子屏幕内容提取存在安全挑战，光学投影侧信道面临两个核心不稳定性问题：投影映射的雅可比谱接近奇异导致反演对扰动高度敏感；光传输中的不可逆压缩破坏了全局语义线索，增加了重建模糊性。
AI.method: 提出IR4Net框架，包含：1）物理正则化辐照度近似（PRIrr-Approximation），将辐射传输方程嵌入可学习优化器；2）轮廓到细节跨尺度重建机制，抑制噪声传播；3）不可逆约束语义重投影（ICSR）模块，通过上下文驱动的语义映射恢复丢失的全局结构。
AI.result: 在四个场景类别上评估，IR4Net实现了超越竞争神经方法的保真度，同时保持对光照扰动的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: IR4Net通过融合物理建模和深度学习，有效解决了光学投影侧信道中的稳定性和语义恢复问题，为非接触式屏幕内容提取提供了更可靠的技术方案。

title: BridgeSim: Unveiling the OL-CL Gap in End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: Open-loop (OL) to closed-loop (CL) gap (OL-CL gap) exists when OL-pretrained policies scoring high in OL evaluations fail to transfer effectively in closed-loop (CL) deployment. In this paper, we unveil the root causes of this systemic failure and propose a practical remedy. Specifically, we demonstrate that OL policies suffer from Observational Domain Shift and Objective Mismatch. We show that while the former is largely recoverable with adaptation techniques, the latter creates a structural inability to model complex reactive behaviors, which forms the primary OL-CL gap. We find that a wide range of OL policies learn a biased Q-value estimator that neglects both the reactive nature of CL simulations and the temporal awareness needed to reduce compounding errors. To this end, we propose a Test-Time Adaptation (TTA) framework that calibrates observational shift, reduces state-action biases, and enforces temporal consistency. Extensive experiments show that TTA effectively mitigates planning biases and yields superior scaling dynamics than its baseline counterparts. Furthermore, our analysis highlights the existence of blind spots in standard OL evaluation protocols that fail to capture the realities of closed-loop deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了开环到闭环性能差距的根本原因，并提出了一种测试时自适应框架来解决这一问题。研究发现开环策略存在观测域偏移和目标不匹配问题，其中目标不匹配导致无法建模复杂反应行为，形成了主要的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 开环预训练策略在开环评估中表现良好，但在闭环部署中效果不佳，存在明显的性能差距。本文旨在揭示这一系统性失败的根本原因，并提出实用的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出测试时自适应框架，通过校准观测偏移、减少状态-动作偏差和强制时间一致性来缓解规划偏差。该方法能够适应闭环部署的实际需求。
AI.result: 实验表明测试时自适应框架有效缓解了规划偏差，相比基线方法展现出更好的扩展动态。分析还揭示了标准开环评估协议存在盲点，无法捕捉闭环部署的实际需求。
AI.conclusion: 开环策略的主要性能差距源于目标不匹配导致的反应行为建模能力不足。提出的测试时自适应框架能够有效解决这一问题，为开环到闭环的迁移提供了实用解决方案。

title: Nested Fourier-enhanced neural operator for efficient modeling of radiation transfer in fires
summary: Computational fluid dynamics (CFD) has become an essential tool for predicting fire behavior, yet maintaining both efficiency and accuracy remains challenging. A major source of computational cost in fire simulations is the modeling of radiation transfer, which is usually the dominant heat transfer mechanism in fires. Solving the high-dimensional radiative transfer equation (RTE) with traditional numerical methods can be a performance bottleneck. Here, we present a machine learning framework based on Fourier-enhanced multiple-input neural operators (Fourier-MIONet) as an efficient alternative to direct numerical integration of the RTE. We first investigate the performance of neural operator architectures for a small-scale 2D pool fire and find that Fourier-MIONet provides the most accurate radiative solution predictions. The approach is then extended to 3D CFD fire simulations, where the computational mesh is locally refined across multiple levels. In these high-resolution settings, monolithic surrogate models for direct field-to-field mapping become difficult to train and computationally inefficient. To address this issue, a nested Fourier-MIONet is proposed to predict radiation solutions across multiple mesh-refinement levels. We validate the approach on 3D McCaffrey pool fires simulated with FireFOAM, including fixed fire sizes and a unified model trained over a continuous range of heat release rates (HRRs). The proposed method achieves global relative errors of 2-4% for 3D varying-HRR scenarios while providing faster inference than the estimated cost of one finite-volume radiation solve in FireFOAM for the 16-solid-angle case. With fast and accurate inference, the surrogate makes higher-fidelity radiation treatments practical and enables the incorporation of more spectrally resolved radiation models into CFD fire simulations for engineering applications.

AI.tldr: 提出基于傅里叶增强多输入神经算子(Fourier-MIONet)的机器学习框架，替代传统辐射传输方程数值求解，提升火灾CFD模拟中辐射计算效率与精度
AI.motivation: 火灾CFD模拟中辐射传热是主要传热机制，传统辐射传输方程数值求解计算成本高，成为性能瓶颈，需要高效准确的替代方法
AI.method: 1) 在2D池火中评估神经算子架构，发现Fourier-MIONet最准确；2) 扩展到3D CFD火灾模拟，提出嵌套Fourier-MIONet处理多级网格细化；3) 在FireFOAM模拟的3D McCaffrey池火中验证，包括固定火源和连续热释放率范围训练的统一模型
AI.result: 1) 3D变热释放率场景全局相对误差2-4%；2) 推理速度比FireFOAM中16立体角有限体积辐射求解更快；3) 使高保真辐射处理和光谱分辨辐射模型在工程应用中更实用
AI.conclusion: Fourier-MIONet框架为火灾CFD模拟提供了高效准确的辐射求解替代方案，显著降低计算成本，使更高保真度的辐射模型在工程应用中变得可行

title: HO-Flow: Generalizable Hand-Object Interaction Generation with Latent Flow Matching
summary: Generating realistic 3D hand-object interactions (HOI) is a fundamental challenge in computer vision and robotics, requiring both temporal coherence and high-fidelity physical plausibility. Existing methods remain limited in their ability to learn expressive motion representations for generation and perform temporal reasoning. In this paper, we present HO-Flow, a framework for synthesizing realistic hand-object motion sequences from texts and canoncial 3D objects. HO-Flow first employs an interaction-aware variational autoencoder to encode sequences of hand and object motions into a unified latent manifold by incorporating hand and object kinematics, enabling the representation to capture rich interaction dynamics. It then leverages a masked flow matching model that combines auto-regressive temporal reasoning with continuous latent generation, improving temporal coherence. To further enhance generalization, HO-Flow predicts object motions relative to the initial frame, enabling effective pre-training on large-scale synthetic data. Experiments on the GRAB, OakInk, and DexYCB benchmarks demonstrate that HO-Flow achieves state-of-the-art performance in both physical plausibility and motion diversity for interaction motion synthesis.

AI.tldr: HO-Flow：基于文本和规范3D对象生成逼真手-物体交互运动序列的框架，通过交互感知VAE和掩码流匹配模型实现时空一致性和物理合理性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成手-物体交互运动时，难以同时保证时间一致性和物理合理性，且在运动表示学习和时间推理方面存在局限。需要一种能够从文本和3D对象生成逼真交互运动序列的方法。
AI.method: 1. 使用交互感知变分自编码器将手和物体运动序列编码到统一潜在流形，结合手和物体运动学捕捉丰富的交互动态；2. 采用掩码流匹配模型结合自回归时间推理和连续潜在生成，提升时间一致性；3. 预测物体相对于初始帧的运动，便于在大规模合成数据上进行预训练以增强泛化能力。
AI.result: 在GRAB、OakInk和DexYCB基准测试中，HO-Flow在交互运动合成的物理合理性和运动多样性方面均达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: HO-Flow通过统一的潜在表示学习和改进的时间推理机制，成功实现了从文本和3D对象生成逼真手-物体交互运动序列，在物理合理性和多样性方面表现优异。

title: DiPO: Disentangled Perplexity Policy Optimization for Fine-grained Exploration-Exploitation Trade-Off
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has catalyzed significant advances in the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, effectively managing the exploration and exploitation trade-off remains a critical challenge. In this paper, we fully analyze the exploration and exploitation dilemma of extremely hard and easy samples during the training and propose a new fine-grained trade-off mechanism. Concretely, we introduce a perplexity space disentangling strategy that divides the sample space into distinct exploration (high perplexity) and exploitation (low perplexity) subspaces, thereby mining fine-grained samples requiring exploration-exploitation trade-off. Subsequently, we propose a bidirectional reward allocation mechanism with a minimum impact on verification rewards to implement perplexity-guided exploration and exploitation, enabling more stable policy optimization. Finally, we have evaluated our method on two mainstream tasks: mathematical reasoning and function calling, and experimental results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method, confirming its effectiveness in enhancing LLM performance by fine-grained exploration-exploitation trade-off.

AI.tldr: 提出RLVR-PET方法，通过困惑度空间解耦和双向奖励分配机制，实现细粒度的探索-利用权衡，提升LLM在数学推理和函数调用任务上的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于可验证奖励的强化学习显著提升了大型语言模型的推理能力，但在训练过程中有效管理探索与利用的权衡仍然是一个关键挑战，特别是在处理极难和极简单样本时。
AI.method: 1. 困惑度空间解耦策略：将样本空间划分为高困惑度（探索）和低困惑度（利用）子空间，识别需要探索-利用权衡的细粒度样本；2. 双向奖励分配机制：以最小化对验证奖励影响的方式，实现困惑度引导的探索与利用，确保更稳定的策略优化。
AI.result: 在两个主流任务（数学推理和函数调用）上的实验结果表明，该方法具有优越性，证实了通过细粒度探索-利用权衡能够有效提升LLM性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的RLVR-PET方法通过细粒度的探索-利用权衡机制，成功解决了强化学习中探索与利用的困境，为提升LLM在复杂任务上的性能提供了有效解决方案。

title: DF3DV-1K: A Large-Scale Dataset and Benchmark for Distractor-Free Novel View Synthesis
summary: Advances in radiance fields have enabled photorealistic novel view synthesis. In several domains, large-scale real-world datasets have been developed to support comprehensive benchmarking and to facilitate progress beyond scene-specific reconstruction. However, for distractor-free radiance fields, a large-scale dataset with clean and cluttered images per scene remains lacking, limiting the development. To address this gap, we introduce DF3DV-1K, a large-scale real-world dataset comprising 1,048 scenes, each providing clean and cluttered image sets for benchmarking. In total, the dataset contains 89,924 images captured using consumer cameras to mimic casual capture, spanning 128 distractor types and 161 scene themes across indoor and outdoor environments. A curated subset of 41 scenes, DF3DV-41, is systematically designed to evaluate the robustness of distractor-free radiance field methods under challenging scenarios. Using DF3DV-1K, we benchmark nine recent distractor-free radiance field methods and 3D Gaussian Splatting, identifying the most robust methods and the most challenging scenarios. Beyond benchmarking, we demonstrate an application of DF3DV-1K by fine-tuning a diffusion-based 2D enhancer to improve radiance field methods, achieving average improvements of 0.96 dB PSNR and 0.057 LPIPS on the held-out set (e.g., DF3DV-41) and the On-the-go dataset. We hope DF3DV-1K facilitates the development of distractor-free vision and promotes progress beyond scene-specific approaches.

AI.tldr: DF3DV-1K是一个大规模真实世界数据集，包含1,048个场景，每个场景提供干净和杂乱图像集，用于无干扰辐射场方法的基准测试和开发。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏包含干净和杂乱图像的大规模真实世界数据集，限制了无干扰辐射场方法的发展。现有数据集主要支持场景特定重建，而非无干扰辐射场方法的全面评估。
AI.method: 构建了包含1,048个场景的DF3DV-1K数据集，每个场景提供干净和杂乱图像集，共89,924张图像，涵盖128种干扰类型和161个场景主题。同时创建了DF3DV-41子集用于评估挑战性场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 使用DF3DV-1K对9种无干扰辐射场方法和3D高斯泼溅进行了基准测试，识别了最鲁棒的方法和最挑战的场景。通过微调基于扩散的2D增强器，在DF3DV-41和On-the-go数据集上实现了平均0.96 dB PSNR和0.057 LPIPS的改进。
AI.conclusion: DF3DV-1K填补了无干扰辐射场领域大规模数据集的空白，为方法开发和基准测试提供了重要资源，有望推动超越场景特定方法的研究进展。

title: WARPED: Wrist-Aligned Rendering for Robot Policy Learning from Egocentric Human Demonstrations
summary: Recent advancements in learning from human demonstration have shown promising results in addressing the scalability and high cost of data collection required to train robust visuomotor policies. However, existing approaches are often constrained by a reliance on multiview camera setups, depth sensors, or custom hardware and are typically limited to policy execution from third-person or egocentric cameras. In this paper, we present WARPED, a framework designed to synthesize realistic wrist-view observations from human demonstration videos to facilitate the training of visuomotor policies using only monocular RGB data. With data collected from an egocentric RGB camera, our system leverages vision foundation models to initialize the interactive scene. A hand-object interaction pipeline is then employed to track the hand and manipulated object and retarget the trajectories to a robotic end-effector. Lastly, photo-realistic wrist-view observations are synthesized via Gaussian Splatting to directly train a robotic policy. We demonstrate that WARPED achieves success rates comparable to policies trained on teleoperated demonstration data for five tabletop manipulation tasks, while requiring 5-8x less data collection time.

AI.tldr: WARPED框架使用单目RGB视频合成逼真的腕部视角观测，通过视觉基础模型、手-物交互跟踪和Gaussian Splatting技术训练机器人策略，在桌面操作任务中达到与遥操作演示数据相当的成功率，同时减少5-8倍数据收集时间。
AI.motivation: 现有基于人类演示的视觉运动策略学习方法通常依赖多视角相机、深度传感器或定制硬件，且仅限于第三人称或自我中心视角执行策略。这限制了方法的可扩展性和数据收集效率，需要开发仅使用单目RGB数据就能训练策略的框架。
AI.method: 1) 使用自我中心RGB相机收集数据；2) 利用视觉基础模型初始化交互场景；3) 通过手-物交互流程跟踪手和操作物体，并将轨迹重定向到机器人末端执行器；4) 使用Gaussian Splatting技术合成逼真的腕部视角观测；5) 直接使用合成观测训练机器人策略。
AI.result: 在五个桌面操作任务中，WARPED训练的策略达到与基于遥操作演示数据训练的策略相当的成功率，同时数据收集时间减少了5-8倍。
AI.conclusion: WARPED框架仅使用单目RGB视频就能有效训练视觉运动策略，显著降低了数据收集成本和时间，为从人类演示中学习机器人策略提供了更高效、更易获取的解决方案。

title: MolCryst-MLIPs: A Machine-Learned Interatomic Potentials Database for Molecular Crystals
summary: We present an open Molecular Crystal (MC) database of Machine-Learned Interatomic Potentials (MLIP) called MolCryst-MLIPs. The first release comprises fine-tuned MACE models for nine molecular crystal systems -- Benzamide, Benzoic acid, Coumarin, Durene, Isonicotinamide, Niacinamide, Nicotinamide, Pyrazinamide, and Resorcinol -- developed using the Automated Machine Learning Pipeline (AMLP), which streamlines the entire MLIP development workflow, from reference data generation to model training and validation, into a reproducible and user-friendly pipeline. Models are fine-tuned from the MACE-MH-1 foundation model (omol head), yielding a mean energy MAE of 0.141 kJ/mol/atom and a mean force MAE of 0.648 kJ/mol/Angstrom across all systems. Dynamical stability and structural integrity, as assessed through energy conservation, P2 orientational order parameters, and radial distribution functions, are evaluated using molecular dynamics simulations. The released models and datasets constitute a growing open database of validated MLIPs, ready for production MD simulations of molecular crystal polymorphism under different thermodynamic conditions.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个名为MolCryst-MLIPs的分子晶体机器学习原子间势能数据库，包含9个分子晶体系统的微调MACE模型，通过自动化机器学习流程开发，平均能量MAE为0.141 kJ/mol/atom，平均力MAE为0.648 kJ/mol/Å，可用于分子晶体多晶型研究。
AI.motivation: 为分子晶体多晶型研究提供经过验证的机器学习原子间势能模型，解决传统势能函数在分子晶体模拟中的局限性，通过自动化流程提高MLIP开发的可重复性和易用性。
AI.method: 使用自动化机器学习流程从MACE-MH-1基础模型微调得到9个分子晶体系统的MLIP模型，通过分子动力学模拟评估模型的动态稳定性和结构完整性，包括能量守恒、P2取向序参数和径向分布函数分析。
AI.result: 开发了9个分子晶体系统的MLIP模型，平均能量MAE为0.141 kJ/mol/atom，平均力MAE为0.648 kJ/mol/Å，模型表现出良好的动态稳定性和结构完整性，可用于生产级分子动力学模拟。
AI.conclusion: MolCryst-MLIPs数据库提供了经过验证的分子晶体MLIP模型，为研究不同热力学条件下的分子晶体多晶型现象提供了可靠的计算工具，数据库将持续扩展。

title: CausalDisenSeg: A Causality-Guided Disentanglement Framework with Counterfactual Reasoning for Robust Brain Tumor Segmentation Under Missing Modalities
summary: In clinical practice, the robustness of deep learning models for multimodal brain tumor segmentation is severely compromised by incomplete MRI data. This vulnerability stems primarily from modality bias, where models exploit spurious correlations as shortcuts rather than learning true anatomical structures. Existing feature fusion methods fail to fundamentally eliminate this dependency. To address this, we propose CausalDisenSeg, a novel Structural Causal Model (SCM)-grounded framework that achieves robust segmentation via causality-guided disentanglement and counterfactual reasoning. We reframe the problem as isolating the anatomical Causal Factor from the stylistic Bias Factor. Our framework implements a three-stage causal intervention: (1) Explicit Causal Disentanglement: A Conditional Variational Autoencoder (CVAE) coupled with an HSIC constraint mathematically enforces statistical orthogonality between anatomical and style features. (2) Causal Representation Reinforcement: A Region Causality Module (RCM) explicitly grounds causal features in physical tumor regions. (3) Counterfactual Reasoning: A dual-adversarial strategy actively suppresses the residual Natural Direct Effect (NDE) of the bias, forcing its spatial attention to be mutually exclusive from the causal path. Extensive experiments on the BraTS 2020 dataset demonstrate that CausalDisenSeg significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in accuracy and consistency across severe missing-modality scenarios. Furthermore, cross-dataset evaluation on BraTS 2023 under the same protocol yields a state-of-the-art macro-average DSC of 84.49.

AI.tldr: 提出CausalDisenSeg框架，通过因果解耦和反事实推理解决脑肿瘤多模态分割中因数据缺失导致的模态偏差问题，显著提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 临床实践中，多模态脑肿瘤分割深度学习模型的鲁棒性因不完整的MRI数据而严重受损。这种脆弱性主要源于模态偏差，即模型利用虚假相关性作为捷径而非学习真实的解剖结构。现有的特征融合方法未能从根本上消除这种依赖性。
AI.method: 提出CausalDisenSeg框架，基于结构因果模型(SCM)，通过因果引导的解耦和反事实推理实现鲁棒分割。包含三阶段因果干预：1) 显式因果解耦：使用条件变分自编码器(CVAE)和HSIC约束强制解剖特征与风格特征的统计正交性；2) 因果表示强化：区域因果模块(RCM)将因果特征显式地锚定在物理肿瘤区域；3) 反事实推理：双对抗策略主动抑制偏差的自然直接效应(NDE)，强制其空间注意力与因果路径互斥。
AI.result: 在BraTS 2020数据集上的大量实验表明，CausalDisenSeg在严重缺失模态场景下的准确性和一致性显著优于现有最先进方法。在相同协议下，对BraTS 2023的跨数据集评估获得了84.49%的宏观平均DSC，达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: CausalDisenSeg通过因果解耦和反事实推理有效解决了多模态脑肿瘤分割中的模态偏差问题，显著提升了模型在数据缺失情况下的鲁棒性和泛化能力，为临床实践提供了更可靠的解决方案。

title: LIDEA: Human-to-Robot Imitation Learning via Implicit Feature Distillation and Explicit Geometry Alignment
summary: Scaling up robot learning is hindered by the scarcity of robotic demonstrations, whereas human videos offer a vast, untapped source of interaction data. However, bridging the embodiment gap between human hands and robot arms remains a critical challenge. Existing cross-embodiment transfer strategies typically rely on visual editing, but they often introduce visual artifacts due to intrinsic discrepancies in visual appearance and 3D geometry. To address these limitations, we introduce LIDEA (Implicit Feature Distillation and Explicit Geometric Alignment), an imitation learning framework in which policy learning benefits from human demonstrations. In the 2D visual domain, LIDEA employs a dual-stage transitive distillation pipeline that aligns human and robot representations in a shared latent space. In the 3D geometric domain, we propose an embodiment-agnostic alignment strategy that explicitly decouples embodiment from interaction geometry, ensuring consistent 3D-aware perception. Extensive experiments empirically validate LIDEA from two perspectives: data efficiency and OOD robustness. Results show that human data substitutes up to 80% of costly robot demonstrations, and the framework successfully transfers unseen patterns from human videos for out-of-distribution generalization.

AI.tldr: LIDEA框架通过隐式特征蒸馏和显式几何对齐，利用人类视频数据解决机器人学习中的数据稀缺问题，实现跨具身模仿学习。
AI.motivation: 机器人学习面临演示数据稀缺的瓶颈，而人类视频提供了丰富的交互数据来源。但人类手部与机器人手臂之间的具身差距是主要挑战，现有跨具身转移方法依赖视觉编辑，常因视觉外观和3D几何差异引入伪影。
AI.method: 提出LIDEA框架：1）在2D视觉域，采用双阶段传递蒸馏管道，在共享潜在空间中对齐人类和机器人表示；2）在3D几何域，提出具身无关对齐策略，显式解耦具身与交互几何，确保一致的3D感知。
AI.result: 人类数据可替代高达80%的昂贵机器人演示，框架成功从人类视频中转移未见模式，实现分布外泛化。实验从数据效率和OOD鲁棒性两个角度验证了LIDEA的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LIDEA通过隐式特征蒸馏和显式几何对齐有效解决了跨具身模仿学习中的视觉和几何差异问题，显著提高了机器人学习的数据效率和泛化能力。

title: Why Multimodal In-Context Learning Lags Behind? Unveiling the Inner Mechanisms and Bottlenecks
summary: In-context learning (ICL) enables models to adapt to new tasks via inference-time demonstrations. Despite its success in large language models, the extension of ICL to multimodal settings remains poorly understood in terms of its internal mechanisms and how it differs from text-only ICL.
