In this work, we conduct a systematic analysis of ICL in multimodal large language models. Using identical task formulations across modalities, we show that multimodal ICL performs comparably to text-only ICL in zero-shot settings but degrades significantly under few-shot demonstrations. To understand this gap, we decompose multimodal ICL into task mapping construction and task mapping transfer, and analyze how models establish cross-modal task mappings, and transfer them to query samples across layers. Our analysis reveals that current models lack reasoning-level alignment between visual and textual representations, and fail to reliably transfer learned task mappings to queries. Guided by these findings, we further propose a simple inference-stage enhancement method that reinforces task mapping transfer. Our results provide new insights into the mechanisms and limitations of multimodal ICL and suggest directions for more effective multimodal adaptation. Our code is available \href{https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/Multimocal-ICL-Analysis-Framework-MGI}{here}.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统分析了多模态大语言模型中的上下文学习机制，发现多模态ICL在零样本设置下与纯文本ICL表现相当，但在少样本演示下显著退化，揭示了视觉与文本表征之间缺乏推理级对齐的问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管上下文学习在大语言模型中取得了成功，但其在多模态环境中的内部机制以及与纯文本ICL的差异仍不清楚。研究者旨在系统分析多模态大语言模型中的ICL机制，理解其局限性并为更有效的多模态适应提供方向。
AI.method: 采用跨模态统一的任务表述，将多模态ICL分解为任务映射构建和任务映射传递两个阶段。通过分析模型如何建立跨模态任务映射以及如何在各层间将映射传递到查询样本，揭示了当前模型的局限性。基于分析结果，提出了一个简单的推理阶段增强方法来强化任务映射传递。
AI.result: 研究发现：1）多模态ICL在零样本设置下与纯文本ICL表现相当，但在少样本演示下性能显著下降；2）当前模型缺乏视觉与文本表征之间的推理级对齐；3）模型无法可靠地将学习到的任务映射传递到查询样本。提出的增强方法有效改善了任务映射传递。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了多模态ICL的机制和局限性，表明当前模型在跨模态任务映射构建和传递方面存在不足。提出的简单增强方法展示了改进潜力，为开发更有效的多模态适应方法提供了新见解和方向。

title: Faithfulness Serum: Mitigating the Faithfulness Gap in Textual Explanations of LLM Decisions via Attribution Guidance
comment: 24 pages, multiple figures (e.g., at least 6 main figures), includes experiments across several benchmarks (MMLU, CommonsenseQA, SciQ, ARC, OpenBookQA); code available on GitHub
summary: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance and have revolutionized NLP, but their lack of explainability keeps them treated as black boxes, limiting their use in domains that demand transparency and trust. A promising direction to address this issue is post-hoc text-based explanations, which aim to explain model decisions in natural language. Prior work has focused on generating convincing rationales that appear to be subjectively faithful, but it remains unclear whether these explanations are epistemically faithful, whether they reflect the internal evidence the model actually relied on for its decision. In this paper, we first assess the epistemic faithfulness of LLM-generated explanations via counterfactuals and show that they are often unfaithful. We then introduce a training-free method that enhances faithfulness by guiding explanation generation through attention-level interventions, informed by token-level heatmaps extracted via a faithful attribution method. This method significantly improves epistemic faithfulness across multiple models, benchmarks, and prompts.

AI.tldr: 本文研究LLM生成解释的认知忠实性问题，提出基于注意力干预的训练无关方法提升解释忠实性
AI.motivation: LLM在NLP领域表现出色但缺乏可解释性，限制了其在需要透明度和信任的领域应用。现有事后文本解释方法主要关注生成主观上可信的推理，但缺乏对模型实际依赖的内部证据的认知忠实性评估。
AI.method: 首先通过反事实方法评估LLM生成解释的认知忠实性；然后提出训练无关方法，通过基于忠实归因方法提取的token级热图进行注意力级干预，指导解释生成。
AI.result: 评估显示LLM生成解释通常不忠实；提出的方法在多个模型、基准和提示下显著提升了认知忠实性。
AI.conclusion: LLM生成解释存在认知忠实性问题，通过注意力干预的训练无关方法能有效提升解释忠实性，为构建更可信的LLM解释提供了可行路径。

title: OmniUMI: Towards Physically Grounded Robot Learning via Human-Aligned Multimodal Interaction
summary: UMI-style interfaces enable scalable robot learning, but existing systems remain largely visuomotor, relying primarily on RGB observations and trajectory while providing only limited access to physical interaction signals. This becomes a fundamental limitation in contact-rich manipulation, where success depends on contact dynamics such as tactile interaction, internal grasping force, and external interaction wrench that are difficult to infer from vision alone. We present OmniUMI, a unified framework for physically grounded robot learning via human-aligned multimodal interaction. OmniUMI synchronously captures RGB, depth, trajectory, tactile sensing, internal grasping force, and external interaction wrench within a compact handheld system, while maintaining collection--deployment consistency through a shared embodiment design. To support human-aligned demonstration, OmniUMI provides dual-force feedback through bilateral gripper feedback and natural perception of external interaction wrench in the handheld embodiment. Built on this interface, we extend diffusion policy with visual, tactile, and force-related observations, and deploy the learned policy through impedance-based execution for unified regulation of motion and contact behavior. Experiments demonstrate reliable sensing and strong downstream performance on force-sensitive pick-and-place, interactive surface erasing, and tactile-informed selective release. Overall, OmniUMI combines physically grounded multimodal data acquisition with human-aligned interaction, providing a scalable foundation for learning contact-rich manipulation.

AI.tldr: OmniUMI是一个用于接触丰富操作任务的统一机器人学习框架，通过手持式系统同步采集RGB、深度、轨迹、触觉、内部抓握力和外部交互力矩等多模态物理信号，并保持采集-部署一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有UMI风格界面主要依赖视觉和轨迹信息，对物理交互信号访问有限，这在接触丰富的操作任务中成为根本限制，因为成功依赖于触觉交互、内部抓握力和外部交互力矩等难以仅从视觉推断的接触动力学。
AI.method: 开发了紧凑的手持式系统，同步采集RGB、深度、轨迹、触觉传感、内部抓握力和外部交互力矩；采用共享体现设计保持采集-部署一致性；提供双边夹持器反馈和手持体现中外部交互力矩的自然感知；基于扩散策略扩展视觉、触觉和力相关观测，通过基于阻抗的执行部署学习策略以统一调节运动和接触行为。
AI.result: 实验展示了可靠的传感能力和在力敏感抓取放置、交互表面擦除和触觉信息选择性释放等任务上的强大下游性能。
AI.conclusion: OmniUMI将物理基础的多模态数据采集与人类对齐的交互相结合，为学习接触丰富的操作任务提供了可扩展的基础。

title: A Multimodal Clinically Informed Coarse-to-Fine Framework for Longitudinal CT Registration in Proton Therapy
summary: Proton therapy offers superior organ-at-risk sparing but is highly sensitive to anatomical changes, making accurate deformable image registration (DIR) across longitudinal CT scans essential. Conventional DIR methods are often too slow for emerging online adaptive workflows, while existing deep learning-based approaches are primarily designed for generic benchmarks and underutilize clinically relevant information beyond images. To address this gap, we propose a clinically scalable coarse-to-fine deformable registration framework that integrates multimodal information from the proton radiotherapy workflow to accommodate diverse clinical scenarios. The model employs dual CNN-based encoders for hierarchical feature extraction and a transformer-based decoder to progressively refine deformation fields. Beyond CT intensities, clinically critical priors, including target and organ-at-risk contours, dose distributions, and treatment planning text, are incorporated through anatomy- and risk-guided attention, text-conditioned feature modulation, and foreground-aware optimization, enabling anatomically focused and clinically informed deformation estimation. We evaluate the proposed framework on a large-scale proton therapy DIR dataset comprising 1,222 paired planning and repeat CT scans across multiple anatomical regions and disease types. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent improvements over state-of-the-art methods, enabling fast and robust clinically meaningful registration.

AI.tldr: 提出用于质子治疗中纵向CT图像配准的临床可扩展粗到细变形配准框架，整合多模态临床信息，实现快速、鲁棒的临床有意义配准。
AI.motivation: 质子治疗对解剖结构变化高度敏感，需要准确的变形图像配准。传统方法速度慢，不适应在线自适应工作流程；现有深度学习方法主要针对通用基准，未能充分利用临床相关信息。
AI.method: 提出临床可扩展的粗到细变形配准框架，整合质子放疗工作流程中的多模态信息。采用双CNN编码器进行分层特征提取，基于Transformer的解码器逐步细化变形场。整合CT强度、靶区和危及器官轮廓、剂量分布、治疗计划文本等临床先验，通过解剖和风险引导注意力、文本条件特征调制、前景感知优化实现解剖聚焦和临床信息化的变形估计。
AI.result: 在包含1,222对计划和重复CT扫描的大规模质子治疗DIR数据集上评估，涵盖多个解剖区域和疾病类型。广泛实验表明相比最先进方法取得一致改进，实现快速鲁棒的临床有意义配准。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架通过整合多模态临床信息，解决了质子治疗中快速准确变形配准的挑战，为在线自适应工作流程提供了临床可扩展的解决方案。

title: Challenges and Future Directions in Agentic Reverse Engineering Systems
summary: Agentic systems built on large language models (LLMs) are increasingly being used for complex security tasks, including binary reverse engineering (RE). Despite recent growth in popularity and capability, these systems continue to face limitations in realistic settings. Cutting-edge systems still fail in complex RE scenarios that involve obfuscation, timing, and unique architecture. In this work, we examine how agentic systems perform reverse engineering tasks with static, dynamic, and hybrid agents. Through an analysis of existing agentic tool usage, we identify several limitations, including token constraints, struggles with obfuscation, and a lack of program guardrails. From these findings, we outline current challenges and position future directions for system designers to overcome from a security perspective.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了基于大语言模型的智能体系统在二进制逆向工程中的表现，识别了现有系统的局限性，并提出了未来的研究方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于大语言模型的智能体系统在复杂安全任务（特别是二进制逆向工程）中的应用日益增多，但这些系统在现实场景中仍面临显著限制。现有系统在处理涉及混淆、时序和独特架构的复杂逆向工程场景时仍然失败，需要系统性地评估和改进。
AI.method: 通过分析静态、动态和混合智能体在逆向工程任务中的表现，评估现有智能体工具的使用情况。识别了包括令牌约束、混淆处理困难、缺乏程序防护机制在内的多个局限性。
AI.result: 研究发现当前智能体系统存在多个关键限制：令牌约束限制了分析深度，难以有效处理混淆代码，缺乏程序防护机制导致安全风险。这些限制阻碍了智能体在复杂逆向工程场景中的实际应用。
AI.conclusion: 本文从安全角度概述了当前挑战，并为系统设计者定位了未来的研究方向，旨在克服现有智能体系统在二进制逆向工程中的局限性，推动更强大、更安全的智能体系统发展。

title: Evaluating Supervised Machine Learning Models: Principles, Pitfalls, and Metric Selection
summary: The evaluation of supervised machine learning models is a critical stage in the development of reliable predictive systems. Despite the widespread availability of machine learning libraries and automated workflows, model assessment is often reduced to the reporting of a small set of aggregate metrics, which can lead to misleading conclusions about real-world performance. This paper examines the principles, challenges, and practical considerations involved in evaluating supervised learning algorithms across classification and regression tasks. In particular, it discusses how evaluation outcomes are influenced by dataset characteristics, validation design, class imbalance, asymmetric error costs, and the choice of performance metrics. Through a series of controlled experimental scenarios using diverse benchmark datasets, the study highlights common pitfalls such as the accuracy paradox, data leakage, inappropriate metric selection, and overreliance on scalar summary measures. The paper also compares alternative validation strategies and emphasizes the importance of aligning model evaluation with the intended operational objective of the task. By presenting evaluation as a decision-oriented and context-dependent process, this work provides a structured foundation for selecting metrics and validation protocols that support statistically sound, robust, and trustworthy supervised machine learning systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨了监督机器学习模型评估中的原则、挑战和实践考虑，强调当前评估方法过于依赖少量聚合指标可能导致误导性结论，并提出了基于任务目标和统计严谨性的结构化评估框架。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器学习库和自动化工作流程广泛可用，但模型评估通常简化为报告少量聚合指标，这可能导致对真实世界性能的误导性结论。当前评估实践未能充分考虑数据集特性、验证设计、类别不平衡、非对称错误成本等因素的影响。
AI.method: 通过使用多样化基准数据集进行一系列受控实验场景，分析评估结果如何受数据集特征、验证设计、类别不平衡、非对称错误成本和性能指标选择的影响。比较替代验证策略，并将模型评估呈现为面向决策和上下文依赖的过程。
AI.result: 研究揭示了常见的评估陷阱，包括准确率悖论、数据泄漏、不适当的指标选择以及过度依赖标量汇总度量。实验表明，评估结果对数据集特性、验证设计和指标选择高度敏感，需要根据具体任务目标进行定制化评估。
AI.conclusion: 模型评估应作为面向决策和上下文依赖的过程，需要选择与任务预期操作目标一致的指标和验证协议。该工作为选择支持统计严谨、稳健和可信赖的监督机器学习系统的指标和验证协议提供了结构化基础。

title: UniBlendNet: Unified Global, Multi-Scale, and Region-Adaptive Modeling for Ambient Lighting Normalization
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026 NTIRE Workshop on New Trends in Image Restoration and Enhancement. 8 pages, 4 figures
summary: Ambient Lighting Normalization (ALN) aims to restore images degraded by complex, spatially varying illumination conditions. Existing methods, such as IFBlend, leverage frequency-domain priors to model illumination variations, but still suffer from limited global context modeling and insufficient spatial adaptivity, leading to suboptimal restoration in challenging regions. In this paper, we propose UniBlendNet, a unified framework for ambient lighting normalization that jointly models global illumination, multi-scale structures, and region-adaptive refinement. Specifically, we enhance global illumination understanding by integrating a UniConvNet-based module to capture long-range dependencies. To better handle complex lighting variations, we introduce a Scale-Aware Aggregation Module (SAAM) that performs pyramid-based multi-scale feature aggregation with dynamic reweighting. Furthermore, we design a mask-guided residual refinement mechanism to enable region-adaptive correction, allowing the model to selectively enhance degraded regions while preserving well-exposed areas. This design effectively improves illumination consistency and structural fidelity under complex lighting conditions. Extensive experiments on the NTIRE Ambient Lighting Normalization benchmark demonstrate that UniBlendNet consistently outperforms the baseline IFBlend and achieves improved restoration quality, while producing visually more natural and stable restoration results.

AI.tldr: UniBlendNet：一个统一的框架，通过联合建模全局光照、多尺度结构和区域自适应细化来改进环境光照归一化，在NTIRE基准测试中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有环境光照归一化方法（如IFBlend）在全局上下文建模和空间适应性方面存在不足，导致在复杂光照区域恢复效果不佳，需要更全面的解决方案来处理空间变化的光照条件。
AI.method: 提出UniBlendNet统一框架，包含三个核心组件：1) UniConvNet模块用于捕获长距离依赖以增强全局光照理解；2) 尺度感知聚合模块(SAAM)通过金字塔多尺度特征聚合和动态重加权处理复杂光照变化；3) 掩码引导的残差细化机制实现区域自适应校正。
AI.result: 在NTIRE环境光照归一化基准测试中，UniBlendNet始终优于基线IFBlend，实现了改进的恢复质量，并产生视觉上更自然和稳定的恢复结果。
AI.conclusion: UniBlendNet通过联合建模全局光照、多尺度结构和区域自适应细化，有效提升了环境光照归一化的性能，在复杂光照条件下改善了光照一致性和结构保真度。

title: Seeing Through Experts Eyes A Foundational Vision Language Model Trained on Radiologists Gaze and Reasoning
summary: Large scale vision language models have shown promise in automating chest Xray interpretation, yet their clinical utility remains limited by a gap between model outputs and radiologist reasoning. Most systems optimize for semantic information without emulating how experts visually examine medical images, often overlooking critical findings or diverging from established diagnostic workflows. Radiologists follow structured protocols (e.g., the ABCDEF approach) that ensure all clinically relevant regions are systematically examined, reducing missed findings and supporting reliable diagnostic reasoning. We introduce GazeX, a vision language model that leverages radiologists' eye tracking data as a behavioral prior to model expert diagnostic reasoning. By incorporating gaze trajectories and fixation patterns into pretraining, GazeX learns to follow the spatial and temporal structure of radiologist attention and integrates observations in a clinically meaningful sequence. Using a curated dataset of over 30,000 gaze key frames from five radiologists, we demonstrate that GazeX produces more accurate, interpretable, and expert consistent outputs across radiology report generation, disease grounding, and visual question answering, utilizing 231,835 radiographic studies, 780,014 question answer pairs, and 1,162 image sentence pairs with bounding boxes. Unlike autonomous reporting systems, GazeX produces verifiable evidence artifacts, including inspection trajectories and finding linked localized regions, enabling efficient human verification and safe human AI collaboration. Learning through expert eyes provides a practical route toward more trustworthy, explainable, and diagnostically robust AI systems for radiology and beyond.

AI.tldr: GazeX：利用放射科医生眼动数据作为行为先验的视觉语言模型，通过模拟专家视觉检查过程提升胸部X光解读的准确性和可解释性
AI.motivation: 现有大规模视觉语言模型在胸部X光解读中存在局限性，模型输出与放射科医生推理过程存在差距。大多数系统仅优化语义信息，未能模拟专家如何视觉检查医学图像，常忽略关键发现或偏离既定诊断流程。放射科医生遵循结构化协议（如ABCDEF方法）确保系统检查所有临床相关区域，减少遗漏发现并支持可靠的诊断推理。
AI.method: 引入GazeX视觉语言模型，利用放射科医生眼动数据作为行为先验来建模专家诊断推理。通过将注视轨迹和注视模式整合到预训练中，GazeX学习遵循放射科医生注意力的空间和时间结构，并以临床有意义的序列整合观察结果。使用来自5名放射科医生的超过30,000个注视关键帧的精选数据集进行训练。
AI.result: GazeX在放射学报告生成、疾病定位和视觉问答任务中产生更准确、可解释且与专家一致的输出。模型在231,835个放射学研究、780,014个问答对和1,162个带边界框的图像-句子对上进行评估。与自主报告系统不同，GazeX产生可验证的证据工件，包括检查轨迹和发现关联的定位区域，支持高效的人工验证和安全的人机协作。
AI.conclusion: 通过专家眼睛学习为放射学及其他领域提供了实现更可信、可解释且诊断稳健的AI系统的实用途径。GazeX通过模拟放射科医生的视觉检查过程，弥合了AI输出与临床推理之间的差距，支持可验证的证据生成和安全的人机协作。

title: MonoEM-GS: Monocular Expectation-Maximization Gaussian Splatting SLAM
summary: Feed-forward geometric foundation models can infer dense point clouds and camera motion directly from RGB streams, providing priors for monocular SLAM. However, their predictions are often view-dependent and noisy: geometry can vary across viewpoints and under image transformations, and local metric properties may drift between frames. We present MonoEM-GS, a monocular mapping pipeline that integrates such geometric predictions into a global Gaussian Splatting representation while explicitly addressing these inconsistencies. MonoEM-GS couples Gaussian Splatting with an Expectation--Maximization formulation to stabilize geometry, and employs ICP-based alignment for monocular pose estimation. Beyond geometry, MonoEM-GS parameterizes Gaussians with multi-modal features, enabling in-place open-set segmentation and other downstream queries directly on the reconstructed map. We evaluate MonoEM-GS on 7-Scenes, TUM RGB-D and Replica, and compare against recent baselines.

AI.tldr: MonoEM-GS：一种单目建图框架，将前馈几何基础模型的预测集成到全局高斯泼溅表示中，通过EM算法稳定几何，使用ICP进行位姿估计，并支持多模态特征查询
AI.motivation: 前馈几何基础模型可以从RGB序列直接推断密集点云和相机运动，为单目SLAM提供先验。但这些预测存在视图依赖性和噪声问题：几何在不同视角和图像变换下会变化，局部度量属性在帧间会漂移。
AI.method: 提出MonoEM-GS单目建图流程：1）将几何预测集成到全局高斯泼溅表示中；2）采用期望最大化（EM）公式与高斯泼溅耦合以稳定几何；3）使用基于ICP的对齐方法进行单目位姿估计；4）用多模态特征参数化高斯，支持开放集分割等下游查询。
AI.result: 在7-Scenes、TUM RGB-D和Replica数据集上评估MonoEM-GS，并与近期基线方法进行比较。
AI.conclusion: MonoEM-GS能够有效处理前馈几何基础模型的视图依赖性和噪声问题，通过EM稳定几何、ICP对齐位姿，并支持多模态特征查询，为单目建图提供了鲁棒的解决方案。

title: A 3D SAM-Based Progressive Prompting Framework for Multi-Task Segmentation of Radiotherapy-induced Normal Tissue Injuries in Limited-Data Settings
summary: Radiotherapy-induced normal tissue injury is a clinically important complication, and accurate segmentation of injury regions from medical images could facilitate disease assessment, treatment planning, and longitudinal monitoring. However, automatic segmentation of these lesions remains largely unexplored because of limited voxel-level annotations and substantial heterogeneity across injury types, lesion size, and imaging modality. To address this gap, we curate a dedicated head-and-neck radiotherapy-induced normal tissue injury dataset covering three manifestations: osteoradionecrosis (ORN), cerebral edema (CE), and cerebral radiation necrosis (CRN). We further propose a 3D SAM-based progressive prompting framework for multi-task segmentation in limited-data settings. The framework progressively incorporates three complementary prompts: text prompts for task-aware adaptation, dose-guided box prompts for coarse localization, and click prompts for iterative refinement. A small-target focus loss is introduced to improve local prediction and boundary delineation for small and sparse lesions. Experiments on ORN, CE, and CRN demonstrate that the proposed method achieves reliable segmentation performance across diverse injury types and outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 提出基于3D SAM的渐进提示框架，用于头颈部放疗后正常组织损伤的多任务分割，解决标注数据有限和损伤异质性问题
AI.motivation: 放疗引起的正常组织损伤是重要临床并发症，但自动分割面临挑战：体素级标注有限、损伤类型异质性大（ORN、CE、CRN）、病灶大小差异显著、成像模态多样
AI.method: 构建头颈部放疗损伤数据集；提出3D SAM渐进提示框架，包含三种互补提示：文本提示用于任务感知适应、剂量引导框提示用于粗定位、点击提示用于迭代细化；引入小目标聚焦损失改善小病灶分割
AI.result: 在ORN、CE、CRN三种损伤类型上的实验表明，该方法实现了可靠的跨损伤类型分割性能，优于现有最先进方法
AI.conclusion: 提出的渐进提示框架在有限数据场景下有效解决了放疗损伤的多任务分割问题，为临床评估和治疗规划提供了可靠工具

title: AffordGen: Generating Diverse Demonstrations for Generalizable Object Manipulation with Afford Correspondence
summary: Despite the recent success of modern imitation learning methods in robot manipulation, their performance is often constrained by geometric variations due to limited data diversity. Leveraging powerful 3D generative models and vision foundation models (VFMs), the proposed AffordGen framework overcomes this limitation by utilizing the semantic correspondence of meaningful keypoints across large-scale 3D meshes to generate new robot manipulation trajectories. This large-scale, affordance-aware dataset is then used to train a robust, closed-loop visuomotor policy, combining the semantic generalizability of affordances with the reactive robustness of end-to-end learning. Experiments in simulation and the real world show that policies trained with AffordGen achieve high success rates and enable zero-shot generalization to truly unseen objects, significantly improving data efficiency in robot learning.

AI.tldr: AffordGen框架利用3D生成模型和视觉基础模型，通过大规模3D网格中的语义关键点对应关系生成新的机器人操作轨迹，训练出具有零样本泛化能力的闭环视觉运动策略。
AI.motivation: 现代模仿学习方法在机器人操作中受限于几何变化导致的数据多样性不足，需要提高数据效率和泛化能力。
AI.method: 利用3D生成模型和视觉基础模型，通过大规模3D网格的语义关键点对应关系生成新的操作轨迹，构建大规模、可负担感知的数据集，训练闭环视觉运动策略。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实世界实验中，AffordGen训练的策略实现了高成功率，能够零样本泛化到完全未见过的物体，显著提高了机器人学习的数据效率。
AI.conclusion: AffordGen框架通过结合可负担的语义泛化能力和端到端学习的反应鲁棒性，有效解决了机器人操作中的数据多样性限制问题。

title: Hardware-Efficient Neuro-Symbolic Networks with the Exp-Minus-Log Operator
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) deliver state-of-the-art accuracy on regression and classification tasks, yet two structural deficits persistently obstruct their deployment in safety-critical, resource-constrained settings: (i) opacity of the learned function, which precludes formal verification, and (ii) reliance on heterogeneous, library-bound activation functions that inflate latency and silicon area on edge hardware. The recently introduced Exp-Minus-Log (EML) Sheffer operator, eml(x, y) = exp(x) - ln(y), was shown by Odrzywolek (2026) to be sufficient - together with the constant 1 - to express every standard elementary function as a binary tree of identical nodes. We propose to embed EML primitives inside conventional DNN architectures, yielding a hybrid DNN-EML model in which the trunk learns distributed representations and the head is a depth-bounded, weight-sparse EML tree whose snapped weights collapse to closed-form symbolic sub-expressions. We derive the forward equations, prove computational-cost bounds, analyse inference and training acceleration relative to multilayer perceptrons (MLPs) and physics-informed neural networks (PINNs), and quantify the trade-offs for FPGA/analog deployment. We argue that the DNN-EML pairing closes a literature gap: prior neuro-symbolic and equation-learner approaches (EQL, KAN, AI-Feynman) work with heterogeneous primitive sets and do not exploit a single hardware-realisable Sheffer element. A balanced assessment shows that EML is unlikely to accelerate training, and on commodity CPU/GPU it is also unlikely to accelerate inference; however, on a custom EML cell (FPGA logic block or analog circuit) the asymptotic latency advantage can reach an order of magnitude with simultaneous gain in interpretability and formal-verification tractability.

AI.tldr: 提出DNN-EML混合模型，将EML Sheffer算子嵌入传统DNN架构，实现可解释性和硬件效率的平衡
AI.motivation: 解决DNN在安全关键、资源受限场景中的两个结构缺陷：1) 学习函数不透明，无法进行形式化验证；2) 依赖异构激活函数，增加边缘硬件延迟和硅面积
AI.method: 将EML(exp(x)-ln(y))算子嵌入DNN架构，形成混合模型：主干学习分布式表示，头部是深度有界、权重稀疏的EML树，其截断权重可折叠为闭式符号子表达式
AI.result: 推导前向方程、证明计算成本边界、分析相对于MLP和PINN的推理和训练加速，量化FPGA/模拟部署的权衡。在定制EML单元上，延迟优势可达一个数量级，同时提升可解释性和形式验证可处理性
AI.conclusion: DNN-EML配对填补了文献空白：先前神经符号和方程学习方法使用异构原语集，未利用单一硬件可实现的Sheffer元素。EML虽不太可能加速训练，在通用CPU/GPU上也不太可能加速推理，但在定制EML单元上具有显著优势

title: Gradient Descent's Last Iterate is Often (slightly) Suboptimal
summary: We consider the well-studied setting of minimizing a convex Lipschitz function using either gradient descent (GD) or its stochastic variant (SGD), and examine the last iterate convergence. By now, it is known that standard stepsize choices lead to a last iterate convergence rate of $\log T/\sqrt{T}$ after $T$ steps. A breakthrough result of Jain et al. [2019] recovered the optimal $1/\sqrt{T}$ rate by constructing a non-standard stepsize sequence. However, this sequence requires choosing $T$ in advance, as opposed to common stepsize schedules which apply for any time horizon. Moreover, Jain et al. conjectured that without prior knowledge of $T$, no stepsize sequence can ensure the optimal error for SGD's last iterate, a claim which so far remained unproven. We prove this conjecture, and in fact show that even in the noiseless case of GD, it is impossible to avoid an excess poly-log factor in $T$ when considering an anytime last iterate guarantee. Our proof further suggests that such (slightly) suboptimal stopping times are unavoidably common.

AI.tldr: 该论文证明了在不知道总迭代次数T的情况下，对于梯度下降(GD)和随机梯度下降(SGD)的最后迭代，无法避免额外的poly-log因子损失，验证了Jain等人的猜想。
AI.motivation: 研究梯度下降(GD)和随机梯度下降(SGD)的最后迭代收敛问题。已知标准步长选择导致最后迭代收敛率为log T/√T，而Jain等人通过非标准步长序列恢复了最优的1/√T速率，但该序列需要预先知道T。Jain等人猜想在没有T先验知识的情况下，没有步长序列能确保SGD最后迭代的最优误差，这一猜想尚未被证明。
AI.method: 通过理论证明方法，证明了在没有总迭代次数T先验知识的情况下，对于GD和SGD的最后迭代收敛，无法避免额外的poly-log因子损失。证明表明这种（略微）次优的停止时间在某种程度上是不可避免的。
AI.result: 证明了Jain等人的猜想：在没有T先验知识的情况下，对于SGD的最后迭代，确实无法确保最优的1/√T误差率。进一步证明即使在无噪声的GD情况下，考虑任意时间的最后迭代保证时，也无法避免T的多对数因子损失。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为梯度下降和随机梯度下降的最后迭代收敛提供了重要的理论界限，确认了在没有总迭代次数先验知识的情况下，最后迭代收敛必然存在poly-log因子的次优性，这一现象在某种程度上是不可避免的。

title: MSGS: Multispectral 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: We present a multispectral extension to 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) for wavelength-aware view synthesis. Each Gaussian is augmented with spectral radiance, represented via per-band spherical harmonics, and optimized under a dual-loss supervision scheme combining RGB and multispectral signals. To improve rendering fidelity, we perform spectral-to-RGB conversion at the pixel level, allowing richer spectral cues to be retained during optimization. Our method is evaluated on both public and self-captured real-world datasets, demonstrating consistent improvements over the RGB-only 3DGS baseline in terms of image quality and spectral consistency. Notably, it excels in challenging scenes involving translucent materials and anisotropic reflections. The proposed approach maintains the compactness and real-time efficiency of 3DGS while laying the foundation for future integration with physically based shading models.

AI.tldr: 将3D高斯泼溅扩展为多光谱版本，通过每个高斯添加光谱辐射度表示，结合RGB和多光谱信号的双重损失监督，在像素级进行光谱到RGB转换，提升渲染保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有3D高斯泼溅(3DGS)仅支持RGB渲染，缺乏对光谱信息的建模能力，限制了在复杂材质（如半透明材料和各向异性反射）场景下的渲染质量。
AI.method: 扩展3DGS为多光谱版本：1) 每个高斯添加光谱辐射度表示，使用每波段球谐函数；2) 采用RGB和多光谱信号的双重损失监督优化；3) 在像素级进行光谱到RGB转换，保留更丰富的光谱线索。
AI.result: 在公开和自采集的真实世界数据集上评估，相比RGB-only 3DGS基线，在图像质量和光谱一致性方面均有持续改进，在涉及半透明材料和各向异性反射的挑战性场景中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法保持了3DGS的紧凑性和实时效率，同时为未来与基于物理的着色模型集成奠定了基础，实现了波长感知的视图合成。

title: EuropeMedQA Study Protocol: A Multilingual, Multimodal Medical Examination Dataset for Language Model Evaluation
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated high proficiency on English-centric medical examinations, their performance often declines when faced with non-English languages and multimodal diagnostic tasks. This study protocol describes the development of EuropeMedQA, the first comprehensive, multilingual, and multimodal medical examination dataset sourced from official regulatory exams in Italy, France, Spain, and Portugal. Following FAIR data principles and SPIRIT-AI guidelines, we describe a rigorous curation process and an automated translation pipeline for comparative analysis. We evaluate contemporary multimodal LLMs using a zero-shot, strictly constrained prompting strategy to assess cross-lingual transfer and visual reasoning. EuropeMedQA aims to provide a contamination-resistant benchmark that reflects the complexity of European clinical practices and fosters the development of more generalizable medical AI.

AI.tldr: 开发EuropeMedQA——首个基于欧洲官方医学考试的多语言多模态医学问答数据集，用于评估LLM在非英语医学任务中的表现
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在英语医学考试中表现优异，但在非英语语言和多模态诊断任务中性能下降。欧洲临床实践具有语言多样性和复杂性，需要专门的评估基准来促进更具普适性的医学AI发展。
AI.method: 遵循FAIR数据原则和SPIRIT-AI指南，从意大利、法国、西班牙和葡萄牙的官方监管考试中收集数据，建立严格的数据筛选流程和自动翻译管道，采用零样本、严格约束的提示策略评估多模态LLM的跨语言迁移和视觉推理能力。
AI.result: 创建了EuropeMedQA数据集，这是首个全面、多语言、多模态的医学考试数据集，旨在提供抗污染基准，反映欧洲临床实践的复杂性。
AI.conclusion: EuropeMedQA为评估医学AI在非英语环境中的表现提供了标准化基准，有助于推动更具普适性和适应性的医学人工智能系统的发展，特别针对欧洲多语言临床环境。

title: VLN-NF: Feasibility-Aware Vision-and-Language Navigation with False-Premise Instructions
comment: Accepted at ACL 2026. The first two authors contributed equally to the technical work
summary: Conventional Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) benchmarks assume instructions are feasible and the referenced target exists, leaving agents ill-equipped to handle false-premise goals. We introduce VLN-NF, a benchmark with false-premise instructions where the target is absent from the specified room and agents must navigate, gather evidence through in-room exploration, and explicitly output NOT-FOUND. VLN-NF is constructed via a scalable pipeline that rewrites VLN instructions using an LLM and verifies target absence with a VLM, producing plausible yet factually incorrect goals. We further propose REV-SPL to jointly evaluate room reaching, exploration coverage, and decision correctness. To address this challenge, we present ROAM, a two-stage hybrid that combines supervised room-level navigation with LLM/VLM-driven in-room exploration guided by a free-space clearance prior. ROAM achieves the best REV-SPL among compared methods, while baselines often under-explore and terminate prematurely under unreliable instructions. VLN-NF project page can be found at https://vln-nf.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 提出VLN-NF基准测试，针对视觉语言导航中的错误前提指令问题，要求智能体在目标不存在时进行探索并输出"NOT-FOUND"
AI.motivation: 传统VLN基准假设指令可行且目标存在，导致智能体无法处理错误前提目标。需要评估智能体在目标不存在时的导航、探索和决策能力。
AI.method: 1) 构建VLN-NF基准：使用LLM重写VLN指令，VLM验证目标不存在；2) 提出REV-SPL评估指标；3) 提出ROAM方法：两阶段混合方法，结合监督式房间级导航和LLM/VLM驱动的室内探索，使用自由空间清除先验。
AI.result: ROAM方法在REV-SPL指标上表现最佳，而基线方法通常在不可靠指令下探索不足且过早终止。
AI.conclusion: VLN-NF基准填补了VLN领域处理错误前提指令的空白，ROAM方法展示了处理此类挑战的有效性，为未来研究提供了重要方向。

title: Simulation-Based Optimisation of Batting Order and Bowling Plans in T20 Cricket
comment: Improved abstract wording and readability; minor textual edits, no change to methodology or results. Submitted to the Journal of Quantitative Analysis in Sports (JQAS), April 2026. 23 pages, 8 figures
summary: This paper develops a unified Markov Decision Process (MDP) framework for optimising two recurring in-match decisions in T20 cricket, namely batting order selection and bowling plan assignment, directly in terms of win and defend probability rather than expected runs. A three-phase player profile engine (Powerplay, Middle, Death) with James-Stein shrinkage (a technique that blends a player's individual statistics toward the league average when their phase-specific data is sparse) is estimated from 1,161 IPL ball-by-ball records (2008-2025). Win/defend probabilities are evaluated using vectorised Monte Carlo simulation over N = 50,000 innings trajectories. Batting orders are evaluated by comparing all feasible arrangements of the remaining players and selecting the one that maximises win probability. Bowling plans are optimised through a guided search over possible over assignments, progressively improving the allocation while respecting constraints such as the prohibition on consecutive overs by the same bowler. Applied to two 2026 IPL matches, the optimal batting order improves Mumbai Indians' win probability by 4.1 percentage points (52.4% to 56.5%), and the optimal Gujarat Titans bowling plan improves defend probability by 5.2 percentage points (39.1% to 44.3%). In both cases, the observed sub-optimality is consistent with phase-agnostic deployment: decisions that appear reasonable under aggregate metrics are shown to be costly when phase-specific profiles are applied.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个统一的MDP框架来优化T20板球中的击球顺序选择和投球计划分配，直接基于获胜和防守概率而非预期得分，通过三阶段球员档案引擎和向量化蒙特卡洛模拟实现。
AI.motivation: 传统板球决策通常基于预期得分等聚合指标，但忽略了比赛不同阶段（强力击球、中场、死亡阶段）的战术差异。现有方法未能直接优化获胜概率，且缺乏对球员阶段特异性表现的准确建模。
AI.method: 1. 构建三阶段球员档案引擎（强力击球、中场、死亡阶段），使用James-Stein收缩法处理稀疏数据；2. 基于1,161个IPL逐球记录（2008-2025）估计参数；3. 使用向量化蒙特卡洛模拟（N=50,000次局轨迹）评估获胜/防守概率；4. 通过比较所有可行排列优化击球顺序；5. 通过引导搜索优化投球计划分配，考虑约束条件（如禁止同一投球手连续投球）。
AI.result: 应用于2026年IPL两场比赛：1. 最优击球顺序将孟买印度人队的获胜概率提高4.1个百分点（52.4%至56.5%）；2. 最优古吉拉特泰坦队投球计划将防守概率提高5.2个百分点（39.1%至44.3%）。次优决策主要源于阶段无关的部署策略。
AI.conclusion: 阶段特异性球员档案对于优化板球战术决策至关重要。基于聚合指标的决策看似合理，但在考虑阶段特异性表现时可能代价高昂。统一的MDP框架能够有效优化击球顺序和投球计划，显著提高获胜概率。

title: SEDTalker: Emotion-Aware 3D Facial Animation Using Frame-Level Speech Emotion Diarization
summary: We introduce SEDTalker, an emotion-aware framework for speech-driven 3D facial animation that leverages frame-level speech emotion diarization to achieve fine-grained expressive control. Unlike prior approaches that rely on utterance-level or manually specified emotion labels, our method predicts temporally dense emotion categories and intensities directly from speech, enabling continuous modulation of facial expressions over time. The diarized emotion signals are encoded as learned embeddings and used to condition a speech-driven 3D animation model based on a hybrid Transformer-Mamba architecture. This design allows effective disentanglement of linguistic content and emotional style while preserving identity and temporal coherence. We evaluate our approach on a large-scale multi-corpus dataset for speech emotion diarization and on the EmoVOCA dataset for emotional 3D facial animation. Quantitative results demonstrate strong frame-level emotion recognition performance and low geometric and temporal reconstruction errors, while qualitative results show smooth emotion transitions and consistent expression control. These findings highlight the effectiveness of frame-level emotion diarization for expressive and controllable 3D talking head generation.

AI.tldr: SEDTalker：基于帧级语音情感日记化的情感感知语音驱动3D面部动画框架，通过细粒度情感控制实现连续表情调制
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖话语级或手动指定的情感标签，缺乏对情感表达的细粒度时序控制，需要更精细的情感建模来实现连续的表情调制
AI.method: 1. 从语音中预测密集的帧级情感类别和强度；2. 将情感信号编码为学习嵌入；3. 基于混合Transformer-Mamba架构的语音驱动3D动画模型；4. 情感嵌入作为条件输入，实现语言内容和情感风格的解耦
AI.result: 1. 在语音情感日记化任务上获得强帧级情感识别性能；2. 在EmoVOCA数据集上实现低几何和时序重建误差；3. 定性结果显示平滑的情感过渡和一致的表情控制
AI.conclusion: 帧级情感日记化对于表达性和可控的3D说话头生成是有效的，能够实现连续的情感调制和细粒度表情控制

title: PRoID: Predicted Rate of Information Delivery in Multi-Robot Exploration and Relaying
summary: We address Multi-Robot Exploration and Relaying (MRER): a team of robots must explore an unknown environment and deliver acquired information to a fixed base station within a mission time limit. The central challenge is deciding when each robot should stop exploring and relay: this depends on what the robot is likely to find ahead, what information it uniquely holds, and whether immediate or future delivery is more valuable. Prior approaches either ignore the reporting requirement entirely or rely on fixed-schedule relay strategies that cannot adapt to environment structure, team composition, or mission progress. We introduce PRoID (Predicted Rate of Information Delivery), a relay criterion that uses learned map prediction to estimate each robot's future information gain along its planned path, accounting for what teammates are already relaying. PRoID triggers relay when immediate return yields higher information delivery per unit time. We further propose PRoID-Safe, a failure-aware extension that incorporates robot survival probability into the relay criterion, naturally biasing decisions toward earlier relay as failure risk grows. We evaluate on real-world indoor floor plan datasets and show that PRoID and PRoID-Safe outperform fixed-schedule baselines, with stronger relative gains in failure scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出PRoID和PRoID-Safe算法解决多机器人探索与中继问题，通过预测信息增益和考虑机器人故障风险，自适应决定中继时机，优于固定调度基线。
AI.motivation: 解决多机器人探索与中继(MRER)中的核心挑战：如何自适应决定每个机器人何时停止探索并中继信息。现有方法要么忽略报告要求，要么依赖无法适应环境结构、团队组成或任务进度的固定调度策略。
AI.method: 提出PRoID（预测信息交付率）中继准则，使用学习的地图预测来估计每个机器人沿规划路径的未来信息增益，同时考虑队友正在中继的信息。PRoID在立即返回产生更高单位时间信息交付时触发中继。进一步提出PRoID-Safe，将机器人存活概率纳入中继准则，在故障风险增加时自然偏向早期中继。
AI.result: 在真实室内平面图数据集上评估，PRoID和PRoID-Safe优于固定调度基线，在故障场景中表现出更强的相对优势。
AI.conclusion: PRoID和PRoID-Safe通过自适应中继决策有效解决了多机器人探索与中继问题，特别是在考虑机器人故障风险的情况下，能够显著提升信息交付效率。

title: SparseBalance: Load-Balanced Long Context Training with Dynamic Sparse Attention
summary: While sparse attention mitigates the computational bottleneck of long-context LLM training, its distributed training process exhibits extreme heterogeneity in both \textit{1)} sequence length and \textit{2)} sparsity sensitivity, leading to a severe imbalance problem and sub-optimal model accuracy. Existing algorithms and training frameworks typically focus on single issue, failing to systematically co-optimize these two problems. Therefore, we propose SparseBalance, a novel algorithm-system co-design framework, which exploits the sparsity and sequence heterogeneity to optimize model accuracy and system efficiency jointly. First, we propose workload-aware dynamic sparsity tuning, which employs a bidirectional sparsity adjustment to eliminate stragglers and exploit inherent bubbles for free accuracy. Second, we propose a sparsity-aware batching strategy to achieve coarse-grained balance, which complements dynamic sparsity tuning. Experimental results demonstrate that SparseBalance achieves up to a 1.33$\times$ end-to-end speedup while still improving the long-context capability by 0.46\% on the LongBench benchmark.

AI.tldr: SparseBalance是一个算法-系统协同设计框架，通过动态稀疏度调整和稀疏感知批处理策略，解决长上下文LLM训练中的序列长度和稀疏敏感性异质性问题，提升训练效率和模型精度。
AI.motivation: 稀疏注意力虽然缓解了长上下文LLM训练的计算瓶颈，但其分布式训练过程存在序列长度和稀疏敏感性的极端异质性，导致严重的负载不平衡问题和次优的模型精度。现有算法和训练框架通常只关注单一问题，未能系统性地协同优化这两个问题。
AI.method: 提出SparseBalance框架：1）工作负载感知的动态稀疏度调整，采用双向稀疏度调整消除落后节点并利用固有气泡实现免费精度提升；2）稀疏感知的批处理策略，实现粗粒度平衡，与动态稀疏度调整互补。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，SparseBalance在LongBench基准测试上实现了最高1.33倍的端到端加速，同时将长上下文能力提升了0.46%。
AI.conclusion: SparseBalance通过算法-系统协同设计，有效解决了长上下文LLM训练中的异质性问题，在提升系统效率的同时改善了模型精度，为分布式稀疏注意力训练提供了系统化解决方案。

title: AnySlot: Goal-Conditioned Vision-Language-Action Policies for Zero-Shot Slot-Level Placement
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies have emerged as a versatile paradigm for generalist robotic manipulation. However, precise object placement under compositional language instructions remains a major challenge for modern monolithic VLA policies. Slot-level tasks require both reliable slot grounding and sub-centimeter execution accuracy. To this end, we propose AnySlot, a framework that reduces compositional complexity by introducing an explicit spatial visual goal as an intermediate representation between language grounding and control. AnySlot turns language into an explicit visual goal by generating a scene marker, then executes this goal with a goal-conditioned VLA policy. This hierarchical design effectively decouples high-level slot selection from low-level execution, ensuring both semantic accuracy and spatial robustness. Furthermore, recognizing the lack of existing benchmarks for such precision-demanding tasks, we introduce SlotBench, a comprehensive simulation benchmark featuring nine task categories tailored to evaluate structured spatial reasoning in slot-level placement. Extensive experiments show that AnySlot significantly outperforms flat VLA baselines and previous modular grounding methods in zero-shot slot-level placement.

AI.tldr: AnySlot框架通过引入显式空间视觉目标作为中间表示，将语言指令转换为场景标记，然后使用目标条件VLA策略执行，显著提升了组合式语言指令下的精确物体放置性能。
AI.motivation: 现代单体VLA策略在组合式语言指令下的精确物体放置方面面临挑战，特别是需要可靠槽位定位和亚厘米级执行精度的槽级任务。现有方法在语义准确性和空间鲁棒性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出AnySlot框架，采用分层设计：1) 将语言指令转换为显式视觉目标（生成场景标记）；2) 使用目标条件VLA策略执行该目标。这种设计将高层槽位选择与低层执行解耦，并引入SlotBench基准测试来评估结构化空间推理能力。
AI.result: 实验表明AnySlot在零样本槽级放置任务中显著优于平面VLA基线和先前的模块化定位方法，在语义准确性和空间鲁棒性方面都有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入显式空间视觉目标作为中间表示，AnySlot有效解决了组合式语言指令下的精确物体放置问题，为VLA策略在需要高精度空间推理的任务中提供了有效解决方案。

title: Right Regions, Wrong Labels: Semantic Label Flips in Segmentation under Correlation Shift
comment: Accepted at the CAO Workshop, ICLR 2026
summary: The robustness of machine learning models can be compromised by spurious correlations between non-causal features in the input data and target labels. A common way to test for such correlations is to train on data where the label is strongly tied to some non-causal cue, then evaluate on examples where that tie no longer holds. This idea is well established for classification tasks, but for semantic segmentation the specific failure modes are not well understood. We show that a model may achieve reasonable overlap while assigning the wrong semantic label, swapping one plausible foreground class for another, even when object boundaries are largely correct. We focus on this semantic label-flip behaviour and quantify it with a simple diagnostic (Flip) that counts how often ground truth foreground pixels are assigned the wrong foreground identity while remaining predicted as foreground. In a setting where category and scene are correlated during training, increasing the correlation consistently widens the gap between common and rare test conditions and increases these within-object label swaps on counterfactual groups. Overall, our results motivate assessing segmentation robustness under distribution shift beyond overlap by decomposing foreground errors into correct pixels, flipped-identity pixels, and missed-to-background pixels. We also propose an entropy-based, ground truth label-free `flip-risk' score, which is computed from foreground identity uncertainty, and show that it can flag flip-prone cases at inference time. Code is available at https://github.com/acharaakshit/label-flips.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了语义分割模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性问题，重点关注模型可能出现的语义标签翻转行为，即正确预测前景像素但分配错误的前景类别标签。
AI.motivation: 机器学习模型的鲁棒性可能受到输入数据中非因果特征与目标标签之间虚假相关性的影响。虽然分类任务中已有成熟的测试方法，但语义分割的具体失效模式尚未被充分理解。作者旨在探究语义分割模型在分布偏移下可能出现的特定错误行为。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种简单的诊断方法（Flip），用于量化地面真实前景像素被错误分配为其他前景类别但仍被预测为前景的情况。在训练数据中类别与场景存在相关性的设置下，研究增加相关性对模型性能的影响。同时提出了一种基于熵的、无需真实标签的"翻转风险"评分，该评分通过前景身份不确定性计算，可用于在推理时识别易发生翻转的案例。
AI.result: 研究表明，模型可能在获得合理重叠度的同时分配错误的语义标签，即使物体边界基本正确。在类别与场景相关的训练设置中，增加相关性会持续扩大常见与罕见测试条件之间的差距，并在反事实组中增加这些物体内部的标签翻转。基于熵的翻转风险评分能够在推理时有效识别易发生翻转的案例。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果支持在分布偏移下评估分割鲁棒性时，应将前景错误分解为正确像素、翻转身份像素和遗漏到背景像素。提出的翻转风险评分提供了一种无需真实标签的实用工具，可用于识别模型在推理时可能出现的语义标签翻转问题。

title: Point2Pose: Occlusion-Recovering 6D Pose Tracking and 3D Reconstruction for Multiple Unknown Objects Via 2D Point Trackers
summary: We present Point2Pose, a model-free method for causal 6D pose tracking of multiple rigid objects from monocular RGB-D video. Initialized only from sparse image points on the objects to be tracked, our approach tracks multiple unseen objects without requiring object CAD models or category priors. Point2Pose leverages a 2D point tracker to obtain long-range correspondences, enabling instant recovery after complete occlusion. Simultaneously, the system incrementally reconstructs an online Truncated Signed Distance Function (TSDF) representation of the tracked targets. Alongside the method, we introduce a new multi-object tracking dataset comprising both simulation and real-world sequences, with motion-capture ground truth for evaluation. Experiments show that Point2Pose achieves performance comparable to the state-of-the-art methods on a severe-occlusion benchmark, while additionally supporting multi-object tracking and recovery from complete occlusion, capabilities that are not supported by previous model-free tracking approaches.

AI.tldr: Point2Pose是一种无需模型、基于单目RGB-D视频的多刚体物体6D姿态因果跟踪方法，仅需物体上的稀疏图像点初始化，无需CAD模型或类别先验，支持多目标跟踪和完全遮挡恢复。
AI.motivation: 现有模型无关的6D姿态跟踪方法通常需要物体CAD模型或类别先验，且难以处理多目标跟踪和完全遮挡恢复问题。Point2Pose旨在开发一种无需模型、仅需稀疏图像点初始化、能同时跟踪多个未见物体并处理完全遮挡的通用跟踪方法。
AI.method: Point2Pose结合2D点跟踪器获取长程对应关系以实现完全遮挡后的即时恢复，同时增量式重建跟踪目标的在线TSDF表示。系统仅需物体上的稀疏图像点初始化，无需CAD模型或类别先验，支持多目标跟踪。
AI.result: 在严重遮挡基准测试中，Point2Pose达到与最先进方法相当的性能，同时具备多目标跟踪和完全遮挡恢复能力，这些是先前模型无关跟踪方法所不具备的。作者还创建了包含仿真和真实世界序列的多目标跟踪数据集。
AI.conclusion: Point2Pose展示了无需CAD模型或类别先验即可实现多目标6D姿态跟踪的可行性，通过结合2D点跟踪和在线TSDF重建，解决了完全遮挡恢复问题，为模型无关的通用物体跟踪提供了新思路。

title: Towards Successful Implementation of Automated Raveling Detection: Effects of Training Data Size, Illumination Difference, and Spatial Shift
summary: Raveling, the loss of aggregates, is a major form of asphalt pavement surface distress, especially on highways. While research has shown that machine learning and deep learning-based methods yield promising results for raveling detection by classification on range images, their performance often degrades in large-scale deployments where more diverse inference data may originate from different runs, sensors, and environmental conditions. This degradation highlights the need of a more generalizable and robust solution for real-world implementation. Thus, the objectives of this study are to 1) identify and assess potential variations that impact model robustness, such as the quantity of training data, illumination difference, and spatial shift; and 2) leverage findings to enhance model robustness under real-world conditions. To this end, we propose RavelingArena, a benchmark designed to evaluate model robustness to variations in raveling detection. Instead of collecting extensive new data, it is built by augmenting an existing dataset with diverse, controlled variations, thereby enabling variation-controlled experiments to quantify the impact of each variation. Results demonstrate that both the quantity and diversity of training data are critical to the accuracy of models, achieving at least a 9.2% gain in accuracy under the most diverse conditions in experiments. Additionally, a case study applying these findings to a multi-year test section in Georgia, U.S., shows significant improvements in year-to-year consistency, laying foundations for future studies on temporal deterioration modeling. These insights provide guidance for more reliable model deployment in raveling detection and other real-world tasks that require adaptability to diverse conditions.

AI.tldr: 提出RavelingArena基准测试框架，通过数据增强评估沥青路面松散检测模型的鲁棒性，发现训练数据量和多样性对模型性能至关重要，在真实道路测试中显著提升年际一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于机器学习和深度学习的沥青路面松散检测方法在实验室环境下表现良好，但在大规模实际部署中，由于数据来源（不同运行、传感器、环境条件）的多样性导致性能下降，需要更通用和鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出RavelingArena基准测试框架，通过对现有数据集进行多样化、受控的数据增强来构建，而非收集新数据。该框架支持变体控制实验，量化各种变异因素（训练数据量、光照差异、空间偏移等）对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验结果表明训练数据量和多样性对模型准确性至关重要，在最多样化条件下至少获得9.2%的准确率提升。在美国乔治亚州多年测试段的案例研究中，应用这些发现显著提高了年际一致性，为未来时间退化建模研究奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: 研究为沥青路面松散检测及其他需要适应多样化条件的实际任务提供了更可靠模型部署的指导，强调了数据多样性和鲁棒性评估在现实世界应用中的重要性。

title: Why MLLMs Struggle to Determine Object Orientations
summary:
Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) struggle with tasks that require reasoning about 2D object orientation in images, as documented in prior work. Tong et al. and Nichols et al. hypothesize that these failures originate in the visual encoder, since commonly used encoders such as CLIP and SigLIP are trained for image-text semantic alignment rather than geometric reasoning. We design a controlled empirical protocol to test this claim by measuring whether rotations can be recovered from encoder representations. In particular, we examine SigLIP and ViT features from LLaVA OneVision and Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct models, respectively, using full images, and examine CLIP representations in LLaVA 1.5 and 1.6 using rotated foreground patches against natural background images. Our null hypothesis is that orientation information is not preserved in the encoder embeddings and we test this by training linear regressors to predict object orientation from encoded features. Contrary to the hypothesis, we find that orientation information is recoverable from encoder representations: simple linear models accurately predict object orientations from embeddings. This contradicts the assumption that MLLM orientation failures originate in the visual encoder.
  Having rejected the accepted hypothesis that MLLMs struggle with 2D orientation tasks because of visual encoder limitations, we still don't know why they fail. Although a full explanation is beyond the scope of this paper, we show that although present, orientation information is spread diffusely across tens of thousands of features. This may or may not be while MLLMs fail to exploit the available orientation information.

AI.tldr: 研究发现MLLMs的2D方向识别失败并非源于视觉编码器，因为线性回归器可以从编码器特征中准确预测物体方向，但方向信息分散在数万个特征中，可能难以被MLLMs有效利用。
AI.motivation: 先前研究认为MLLMs在2D方向推理任务上的失败源于视觉编码器（如CLIP、SigLIP）是为图像-文本语义对齐而非几何推理而训练的。本文旨在通过实证检验这一假设。
AI.method: 设计了受控实证协议，从编码器表示中测量旋转信息是否可恢复。具体方法：1）检查LLaVA OneVision的SigLIP特征和Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct的ViT特征；2）在LLaVA 1.5和1.6中检查CLIP表示（使用旋转前景补丁与自然背景图像）；3）训练线性回归器从编码特征预测物体方向，检验零假设（方向信息未保存在编码器嵌入中）。
AI.result: 与假设相反，方向信息可以从编码器表示中恢复：简单线性模型能够从嵌入中准确预测物体方向。这反驳了MLLM方向失败源于视觉编码器的假设。然而，方向信息虽然存在，但分散在数万个特征中。
AI.conclusion: MLLMs在2D方向任务上的失败并非由于视觉编码器缺乏方向信息，而是因为方向信息在特征空间中分散分布，可能难以被MLLMs有效利用。虽然完整解释超出本文范围，但研究推翻了先前关于编码器限制的假设。

title: The Spectrascapes Dataset: Street-view imagery beyond the visible captured using a mobile platform
summary: High-resolution data in spatial and temporal contexts is imperative for developing climate resilient cities. Current datasets for monitoring urban parameters are developed primarily using manual inspections, embedded-sensing, remote sensing, or standard street-view imagery (RGB). These methods and datasets are often constrained respectively by poor scalability, inconsistent spatio-temporal resolutions, overhead views or low spectral information. We present a novel method and its open implementation: a multi-spectral terrestrial-view dataset that circumvents these limitations. This dataset consists of 17,718 street level multi-spectral images captured with RGB, Near-infrared, and Thermal imaging sensors on bikes, across diverse urban morphologies (village, town, small city, and big urban area) in the Netherlands. Strict emphasis is put on data calibration and quality while also providing the details of our data collection methodology (including the hardware and software details). To the best of our knowledge, Spectrascapes is the first open-access dataset of its kind. Finally, we demonstrate two downstream use-cases enabled using this dataset and provide potential research directions in the machine learning, urban planning and remote sensing domains.

AI.tldr: Spectrascapes是一个开源的多光谱街景数据集，包含17,718张RGB、近红外和热成像图像，覆盖荷兰不同城市形态，用于气候韧性城市研究。
AI.motivation: 现有城市参数监测数据集存在可扩展性差、时空分辨率不一致、俯视视角或光谱信息不足等限制，需要高分辨率时空数据来开发气候韧性城市。
AI.method: 使用自行车搭载RGB、近红外和热成像传感器采集街景图像，覆盖村庄、城镇、小城市和大城市等不同城市形态，强调数据校准和质量控制。
AI.result: 创建了包含17,718张多光谱图像的开源数据集，展示了两个下游应用案例，并提供了机器学习、城市规划和遥感领域的研究方向。
AI.conclusion: Spectrascapes是首个此类开源数据集，通过多光谱地面视角克服了现有方法的局限性，为气候韧性城市研究提供了重要数据资源。

title: Trajectory-based actuator identification via differentiable simulation
summary: Accurate actuation models are critical for bridging the gap between simulation and real robot behavior, yet obtaining high-fidelity actuator dynamics typically requires dedicated test stands and torque sensing. We present a trajectory-based actuator identification method that uses differentiable simulation to fit system-level actuator models from encoder motion alone. Identification is posed as a trajectory-matching problem: given commanded joint positions and measured joint angles and velocities, we optimize actuator and simulator parameters by backpropagating through the simulator, without torque sensors, current/voltage measurements, or access to embedded motor-control internals. The framework supports multiple model classes, ranging from compact structured parameterizations to neural actuator mappings, within a unified optimization pipeline. On held-out real-robot trajectories for a high-gear-ratio actuator with an embedded PD controller, the proposed torque-sensor-free identification achieves much tighter trajectory alignment than a supervised stand-trained baseline dominated by steady-state data, reducing mean absolute position error from 14.20 mrad to as low as 7.54 mrad (1.88 times). Finally, we demonstrate downstream impact for the same actuator class in a real-robot locomotion study: training policies with the refined actuator model increases travel distance by 46% and reduces rotational deviation by 75% relative to the baseline.

AI.tldr: 提出基于轨迹匹配和可微分仿真的无扭矩传感器执行器辨识方法，仅使用编码器运动数据优化执行器模型参数，显著提升仿真与真实机器人行为的一致性。
AI.motivation: 获取高保真执行器动力学模型通常需要专用测试台和扭矩传感器，这增加了成本和技术门槛。现有方法依赖稳态数据，难以准确捕捉动态特性，导致仿真与真实机器人行为存在显著差距。
AI.method: 将执行器辨识构建为轨迹匹配问题：给定指令关节位置、测量关节角度和速度，通过可微分仿真反向传播优化执行器和仿真器参数。支持从紧凑结构化参数化到神经执行器映射的多种模型类别，无需扭矩传感器、电流/电压测量或访问嵌入式电机控制内部信息。
AI.result: 在高减速比执行器（带嵌入式PD控制器）的保留真实机器人轨迹上，无扭矩传感器辨识比基于稳态数据的监督基准方法显著改善轨迹对齐：平均绝对位置误差从14.20 mrad降至最低7.54 mrad（提升1.88倍）。在真实机器人运动研究中，使用精炼执行器模型训练策略使行进距离增加46%，旋转偏差减少75%。
AI.conclusion: 基于轨迹匹配和可微分仿真的执行器辨识方法仅使用编码器数据即可获得高保真系统级执行器模型，显著缩小仿真与真实机器人行为的差距，为机器人控制策略训练提供更准确的仿真环境。

title: Composite Silhouette: A Subsampling-based Aggregation Strategy
summary: Determining the number of clusters is a central challenge in unsupervised learning, where ground-truth labels are unavailable. The Silhouette coefficient is a widely used internal validation metric for this task, yet its standard micro-averaged form tends to favor larger clusters under size imbalance. Macro-averaging mitigates this bias by weighting clusters equally, but may overemphasize noise from under-represented groups. We introduce Composite Silhouette, an internal criterion for cluster-count selection that aggregates evidence across repeated subsampled clusterings rather than relying on a single partition. For each subsample, micro- and macro-averaged Silhouette scores are combined through an adaptive convex weight determined by their normalized discrepancy and smoothed by a bounded nonlinearity; the final score is then obtained by averaging these subsample-level composites. We establish key properties of the criterion and derive finite-sample concentration guarantees for its subsampling estimate. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show that Composite Silhouette effectively reconciles the strengths of micro- and macro-averaging, yielding more accurate recovery of the ground-truth number of clusters.

AI.tldr: 提出Composite Silhouette方法，通过子采样聚类和自适应加权结合微平均与宏平均轮廓系数，更准确地确定聚类数量。
AI.motivation: 在无监督学习中确定聚类数量是一个核心挑战。标准微平均轮廓系数在聚类大小不平衡时倾向于偏好较大聚类，而宏平均虽然缓解了这种偏差，但可能过度强调少数群体的噪声。需要一种能够平衡这两种方法优点的内部验证指标。
AI.method: 提出Composite Silhouette方法：1) 通过重复子采样聚类收集证据；2) 对每个子样本计算微平均和宏平均轮廓系数；3) 通过自适应凸权重结合这两种分数，权重由它们的归一化差异决定并通过有界非线性函数平滑；4) 最终得分通过平均这些子样本级复合分数获得。该方法还建立了理论性质并推导了子采样估计的有限样本集中性保证。
AI.result: 在合成和真实世界数据集上的实验表明，Composite Silhouette有效地调和了微平均和宏平均的优点，能够更准确地恢复真实聚类数量。
AI.conclusion: Composite Silhouette通过子采样聚类和自适应加权策略，提供了一种鲁棒的内部验证标准，能够在聚类大小不平衡的情况下更可靠地确定聚类数量，优于传统的微平均或宏平均轮廓系数方法。

title: Deep Spatially-Regularized and Superpixel-Based Diffusion Learning for Unsupervised Hyperspectral Image Clustering
summary: An unsupervised framework for hyperspectral image (HSI) clustering is proposed that incorporates masked deep representation learning with diffusion-based clustering, extending the Spatially-Regularized Superpixel-based Diffusion Learning ($S^2DL$) algorithm. Initially, a denoised latent representation of the original HSI is learned via an unsupervised masked autoencoder (UMAE) model with a Vision Transformer backbone. The UMAE takes spatial context and long-range spectral correlations into account and incorporates an efficient pretraining process via masking that utilizes only a small subset of training pixels. In the next stage, the entropy rate superpixel (ERS) algorithm is used to segment the image into superpixels, and a spatially regularized diffusion graph is constructed using Euclidean and diffusion distances within the compressed latent space instead of the HSI space. The proposed algorithm, Deep Spatially-Regularized Superpixel-based Diffusion Learning ($DS^2DL$), leverages more faithful diffusion distances and subsequent diffusion graph construction that better reflect the intrinsic geometry of the underlying data manifold, improving labeling accuracy and clustering quality. Experiments on Botswana and KSC datasets demonstrate the efficacy of $DS^2DL$.

AI.tldr: 提出DS²DL框架，结合掩码深度表示学习与扩散聚类，通过无监督掩码自编码器学习HSI的降噪潜在表示，再基于超像素构建空间正则化扩散图进行聚类。
AI.motivation: 传统HSI聚类方法在原始光谱空间构建扩散图可能无法准确反映数据内在几何结构，需要更有效的潜在表示和扩散距离计算方法来提高聚类质量。
AI.method: 1. 使用Vision Transformer骨干的无监督掩码自编码器(UMAE)学习HSI的降噪潜在表示；2. 利用熵率超像素算法分割图像；3. 在压缩潜在空间而非原始HSI空间构建基于欧氏和扩散距离的空间正则化扩散图；4. 扩展S²DL算法为DS²DL。
AI.result: 在Botswana和KSC数据集上的实验表明，DS²DL能够利用更准确的扩散距离和扩散图构建，更好地反映数据流形内在几何结构，提高了标记准确性和聚类质量。
AI.conclusion: DS²DL框架通过深度表示学习和改进的扩散图构建，有效提升了HSI无监督聚类的性能，证明了在潜在空间计算扩散距离的优势。

title: A Coordinate-Invariant Local Representation of Motion and Force Trajectories for Identification and Generalization Across Coordinate Systems
comment: This preprint has been accepted for presentation at the 17th World Symposium on the Algorithmic Foundations of Robotics (WAFR 2026). The preprint corresponds to the version submitted for peer review
summary: Identifying the trajectories of rigid bodies and of interaction forces is essential for a wide range of tasks in robotics, biomechanics, and related domains. These tasks include trajectory segmentation, recognition, and prediction. For these tasks, a key challenge lies in achieving consistent results when the trajectory is expressed in different coordinate systems. A way to address this challenge is to utilize trajectory models that can generalize across coordinate systems. The focus of this paper is on such trajectory models obtained by transforming the trajectory into a coordinate-invariant representation. However, coordinate-invariant representations often suffer from sensitivity to measurement noise and the manifestation of singularities in the representation, where the representation is not uniquely defined. This paper aims to address this limitation by introducing the novel Dual-Upper-Triangular Invariant Representation (DUTIR), with improved robustness to singularities, along with its computational algorithm. The proposed representation is formulated at a level of abstraction that makes it applicable to both rigid-body trajectories and interaction-force trajectories, hence making it a versatile tool for robotics, biomechanics, and related domains.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的对偶上三角不变表示(DUTIR)，用于刚体轨迹和交互力轨迹的坐标不变表示，具有更好的奇异性鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 在机器人学、生物力学等领域，刚体轨迹和交互力轨迹的识别、分割和预测需要在不同坐标系下保持一致结果。坐标不变表示方法存在对测量噪声敏感和奇异性问题，需要更鲁棒的方法。
AI.method: 提出对偶上三角不变表示(DUTIR)及其计算算法，将轨迹转换为坐标不变表示，具有改进的奇异性鲁棒性，适用于刚体轨迹和交互力轨迹。
AI.result: DUTIR提供了一种坐标不变表示，相比现有方法具有更好的奇异性鲁棒性，适用于多种轨迹分析任务。
AI.conclusion: DUTIR为机器人学、生物力学及相关领域提供了一种通用的坐标不变轨迹表示工具，解决了现有方法对奇异性敏感的问题。

title: Robust Ultra Low-Bit Post-Training Quantization via Stable Diagonal Curvature Estimate
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are widely used across many domains, but their scale makes deployment challenging. Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) reduces memory footprint without retraining by leveraging a small calibration set. Recent Hessian-based PTQ methods compensate quantization error via cross-channel dependencies, but such approaches degrade at low bit-widths due to noisy curvature estimates from limited calibration data. We propose DASH-Q, a robust PTQ framework using diagonal Hessian approximation and iterative weighted least squares. By discarding noise-prone dependencies, DASH-Q filters sampling noise while prioritizing the preservation of salient feature power. We outperform other PTQ baselines in ultra low-bit regime, improving zero-shot accuracy by 7.01% on average and up to 14.01% over the strongest baselines across five baseline LLM models, while showing robust and stable performance with very small calibration data.

AI.tldr: DASH-Q：一种基于对角Hessian近似和迭代加权最小二乘的鲁棒后训练量化框架，在超低比特量化中显著提升大语言模型的零样本准确率
AI.motivation: 大语言模型部署面临规模挑战，后训练量化可减少内存占用但无需重新训练。现有基于Hessian的PTQ方法通过跨通道依赖补偿量化误差，但在低比特量化时由于有限校准数据导致的噪声曲率估计而性能下降。
AI.method: 提出DASH-Q框架，采用对角Hessian近似和迭代加权最小二乘法。通过丢弃噪声敏感的依赖关系，过滤采样噪声，同时优先保留显著特征功率。
AI.result: 在超低比特量化中优于其他PTQ基线方法，在五个基线LLM模型上平均提升零样本准确率7.01%，最高提升14.01%，且在极小校准数据下表现出鲁棒稳定的性能。
AI.conclusion: DASH-Q通过简化Hessian近似和噪声过滤机制，有效解决了低比特量化中噪声曲率估计问题，为大语言模型的高效部署提供了实用的量化解决方案。

title: Bias at the End of the Score
comment: Accepted to The IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026
summary: Reward models (RMs) are inherently non-neutral value functions designed and trained to encode specific objectives, such as human preferences or text-image alignment. RMs have become crucial components of text-to-image (T2I) generation systems where they are used at various stages for dataset filtering, as evaluation metrics, as a supervisory signal during optimization of parameters, and for post-generation safety and quality filtering of T2I outputs. While specific problems with the integration of RMs into the T2I pipeline have been studied (e.g. reward hacking or mode collapse), their robustness and fairness as scoring functions remains largely unknown. We conduct a large scale audit of RM robustness with respect to demographic biases during T2I model training and generation. We provide quantitative and qualitative evidence that while originally developed as quality measures, RMs encode demographic biases, which cause reward-guided optimization to disproportionately sexualize female image subjects reinforce gender/racial stereotypes, and collapse demographic diversity. These findings highlight shortcomings in current reward models, challenge their reliability as quality metrics, and underscore the need for improved data collection and training procedures to enable more robust scoring.

AI.tldr: 该研究对文本到图像生成中的奖励模型进行大规模审计，发现这些模型编码了人口统计学偏见，导致奖励引导的优化过程不成比例地性化女性图像主体、强化性别/种族刻板印象，并减少人口多样性。
AI.motivation: 奖励模型在文本到图像生成系统中被广泛用于数据集过滤、评估指标、优化监督信号和输出后处理，但其作为评分函数的鲁棒性和公平性尚未得到充分研究。虽然奖励模型整合到T2I流程中的特定问题（如奖励黑客攻击或模式崩溃）已被研究，但其评分函数的鲁棒性和公平性仍不清楚。
AI.method: 对奖励模型在T2I模型训练和生成过程中的人口统计学偏见进行大规模审计，提供定量和定性证据来分析奖励模型编码的偏见及其影响。
AI.result: 研究发现，虽然奖励模型最初被开发为质量度量工具，但它们编码了人口统计学偏见，导致奖励引导的优化过程：1）不成比例地性化女性图像主体；2）强化性别和种族刻板印象；3）减少人口多样性。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现揭示了当前奖励模型的缺陷，挑战了其作为质量指标的可靠性，并强调了需要改进数据收集和训练程序以实现更鲁棒的评分。

title: ReaLiTy and LADS: A Unified Framework and Dataset Suite for LiDAR Adaptation Across Sensors and Adverse Weather Conditions
summary: Reliable LiDAR perception requires robustness across sensors, environments, and adverse weather. However, existing datasets rarely provide physically consistent observations of the same scene under varying sensor configurations and weather conditions, limiting systematic analysis of domain shifts. This work presents ReaLiTy, a unified physics-informed framework that transforms LiDAR data to match target sensor specifications and weather conditions. The framework integrates physically grounded cues with a learning-based module to generate realistic intensity patterns, while a physics-based weather model introduces consistent geometric and radiometric degradations. Building on this framework, we introduce the LiDAR Adaptation Dataset Suite (LADS), a collection of physically consistent, transformation-ready point clouds with one-to-one correspondence to original datasets. Experiments demonstrate improved cross-domain consistency and realistic weather effects. ReaLiTy and LADS provide a reproducible foundation for studying LiDAR adaptation and simulation-driven perception in intelligent transportation systems.

AI.tldr: ReaLiTy是一个统一的物理信息框架，用于将LiDAR数据转换为匹配目标传感器规格和天气条件，并引入LiDAR适应数据集套件(LADS)用于系统性的跨域分析。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR数据集很少提供在变化传感器配置和天气条件下同一场景的物理一致观测，这限制了领域偏移的系统性分析，而可靠的LiDAR感知需要在传感器、环境和恶劣天气条件下具有鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出ReaLiTy框架，整合物理基础线索与学习模块生成真实强度模式，同时使用基于物理的天气模型引入一致的几何和辐射度量退化；并基于此框架构建LiDAR适应数据集套件(LADS)，提供物理一致、可转换的点云数据。
AI.result: 实验证明该方法提高了跨域一致性并实现了真实的天气效果，ReaLiTy和LADS为研究LiDAR适应和智能交通系统中的仿真驱动感知提供了可复现的基础。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过物理信息框架和一致性数据集解决了LiDAR感知中的领域偏移问题，为系统分析传感器配置和天气条件变化的影响提供了有效工具。

title: PAT-VCM: Plug-and-Play Auxiliary Tokens for Video Coding for Machines
summary: Existing video coding for machines is often trained for a specific downstream task and model. As a result, the compressed representation becomes tightly coupled to the end task, making it difficult to scale across multiple tasks or adapt to model updates. We propose PAT-VCM, a plug-and-play auxiliary-token framework for video coding for machines. PAT-VCM keeps a shared baseline compressed stream and augments it with lightweight task-aware auxiliary tokens, allowing different downstream tasks to recover the information they need without retraining a separate codec for each task. The framework supports three forms of auxiliary information: visual residual tokens, prompt/control tokens, and semantic tokens. We evaluate PAT-VCM on segmentation, depth estimation, and semantic recognition. A shared detection-oriented auxiliary branch provides a reusable first refinement, task-specific visual branches improve segmentation and depth, prompt tokens provide further segmentation gains at negligible bitrate, and semantic tokens achieve strong recognition performance with extremely low overhead. These results suggest that a shared compressed representation, combined with lightweight task-aware auxiliary tokens, is a practical and scalable alternative to tightly task-coupled VCM design.

AI.tldr: PAT-VCM提出了一种用于机器视觉视频编码的即插即用辅助令牌框架，通过共享基线压缩流和轻量级任务感知辅助令牌，支持多任务而不需要为每个任务单独训练编解码器。
AI.motivation: 现有机器视觉视频编码通常针对特定下游任务和模型进行训练，导致压缩表示与终端任务紧密耦合，难以跨多个任务扩展或适应模型更新。
AI.method: 提出PAT-VCM框架，保持共享基线压缩流，并通过轻量级任务感知辅助令牌进行增强，支持三种辅助信息形式：视觉残差令牌、提示/控制令牌和语义令牌。
AI.result: 在分割、深度估计和语义识别任务上评估PAT-VCM。共享检测导向辅助分支提供可重用的一级细化，任务特定视觉分支改善分割和深度，提示令牌以可忽略比特率提供进一步分割增益，语义令牌以极低开销实现强识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 共享压缩表示结合轻量级任务感知辅助令牌是紧密任务耦合VCM设计的实用且可扩展的替代方案。

title: MoRI: Mixture of RL and IL Experts for Long-Horizon Manipulation Tasks
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) and Imitation Learning (IL) are the standard frameworks for policy acquisition in manipulation. While IL offers efficient policy derivation, it suffers from compounding errors and distribution shift. Conversely, RL facilitates autonomous exploration but is frequently hindered by low sample efficiency and the high cost of trial and error. Since existing hybrid methods often struggle with complex tasks, we introduce Mixture of RL and IL Experts (MoRI). This system dynamically switches between IL and RL experts based on the variance of expert actions to handle coarse movements and fine-grained manipulations. MoRI employs an offline pre-training stage followed by online fine-tuning to accelerate convergence. To maintain exploration safety and minimize human intervention, the system applies IL-based regularization to the RL component. Evaluation across four complex real-world tasks shows that MoRI achieves an average success rate of 97.5% within 2 to 5 hours of fine-tuning. Compared to baseline RL algorithms, MoRI reduces human intervention by 85.8% and shortens convergence time by 21%, demonstrating its capability in robotic manipulation.

AI.tldr: MoRI是一种结合强化学习和模仿学习的混合方法，通过动态切换专家策略来处理机器人操作任务中的粗粒度运动和细粒度操作，显著提高了样本效率和成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有混合方法在处理复杂任务时存在困难：模仿学习存在复合误差和分布偏移问题，而强化学习样本效率低且试错成本高。需要一种能够结合两者优势、减少人工干预并加速收敛的方法。
AI.method: MoRI系统基于专家动作方差动态切换IL和RL专家，处理粗粒度运动和细粒度操作。采用离线预训练和在线微调两阶段方法，对RL组件应用IL正则化以保证探索安全性并最小化人工干预。
AI.result: 在四个复杂真实世界任务中，MoRI平均成功率97.5%，仅需2-5小时微调。相比基线RL算法，减少85.8%人工干预，缩短21%收敛时间。
AI.conclusion: MoRI通过动态混合RL和IL专家，有效解决了复杂机器人操作任务中的样本效率、安全性和收敛速度问题，展示了在机器人操作中的强大能力。

title: See&Say: Vision Language Guided Safe Zone Detection for Autonomous Package Delivery Drones
summary: Autonomous drone delivery systems are rapidly advancing, but ensuring safe and reliable package drop-offs remains highly challenging in cluttered urban and suburban environments where accurately identifying suitable package drop zones is critical. Existing approaches typically rely on either geometry-based analysis or semantic segmentation alone, but these methods lack the integrated semantic reasoning required for robust decision-making. To address this gap, we propose See&Say, a novel framework that combines geometric safety cues with semantic perception, guided by a Vision-Language Model (VLM) for iterative refinement. The system fuses monocular depth gradients with open-vocabulary detection masks to produce safety maps, while the VLM dynamically adjusts object category prompts and refines hazard detection across time, enabling reliable reasoning under dynamic conditions during the final delivery phase. When the primary drop-pad is occupied or unsafe, the proposed See&Say also identifies alternative candidate zones for package delivery. We curated a dataset of urban delivery scenarios with moving objects and human activities to evaluate the approach. Experimental results show that See&Say outperforms all baselines, achieving the highest accuracy and IoU for safety map prediction as well as superior performance in alternative drop zone evaluation across multiple thresholds. These findings highlight the promise of VLM-guided segmentation-depth fusion for advancing safe and practical drone-based package delivery.

AI.tldr: See&Say：结合几何安全线索与语义感知的VLM引导框架，用于无人机包裹投递的安全区域识别和替代投递区评估
AI.motivation: 当前自主无人机投递系统在复杂城市和郊区环境中面临安全挑战，现有方法仅依赖几何分析或语义分割，缺乏集成语义推理能力，无法进行鲁棒决策
AI.method: 提出See&Say框架，融合单目深度梯度与开放词汇检测掩码生成安全地图，利用视觉语言模型(VLM)进行迭代优化，动态调整对象类别提示并跨时间细化危险检测，支持主投递区不可用时识别替代候选区
AI.result: 在包含移动物体和人类活动的城市投递场景数据集上评估，See&Say在所有基线方法中表现最佳，安全地图预测的准确率和IoU最高，在不同阈值下的替代投递区评估也表现最优
AI.conclusion: VLM引导的分割-深度融合方法为推进安全实用的无人机包裹投递系统提供了有前景的解决方案

title: A Ray Intersection Algorithm for Fast Growth Distance Computation Between Convex Sets
summary: In this paper, we discuss an efficient algorithm for computing the growth distance between two compact convex sets with representable support functions. The growth distance between two sets is the minimum scaling factor such that the sets intersect when scaled about some center points. Unlike the minimum distance between sets, the growth distance provides a unified measure for set intersection and separation. We first reduce the growth distance problem to an equivalent ray intersection problem on the Minkowski difference set. Then, we propose an algorithm to solve the ray intersection problem by iteratively constructing inner and outer polyhedral approximations of the Minkowski difference set. We show that our algorithm satisfies several key properties, such as primal and dual feasibility and monotone convergence. We provide extensive benchmark results for our algorithm and show that our open-source implementation achieves state-of-the-art performance across a wide variety of convex sets. Finally, we demonstrate robotics applications of our algorithm in motion planning and rigid-body simulation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种计算两个紧凸集之间增长距离的高效算法，该算法通过将问题转化为Minkowski差集上的射线相交问题，并迭代构造多面体近似来求解。
AI.motivation: 增长距离为集合相交和分离提供了统一的度量，相比最小距离更具一般性。在机器人运动规划和刚体仿真等应用中，需要高效计算凸集之间的增长距离。
AI.method: 首先将增长距离问题转化为Minkowski差集上的射线相交问题。然后提出迭代算法，通过构造Minkowski差集的内外多面体近似来求解射线相交问题。算法保持原始和对偶可行性，并具有单调收敛性。
AI.result: 算法在广泛测试中表现出最先进的性能。开源实现验证了算法的有效性，并在机器人运动规划和刚体仿真应用中展示了实际应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法能够高效计算紧凸集之间的增长距离，具有理论保证和实际应用价值，为机器人学等领域的几何计算问题提供了有效解决方案。

title: Soft $Q(λ)$: A multi-step off-policy method for entropy regularised reinforcement learning using eligibility traces
summary: Soft Q-learning has emerged as a versatile model-free method for entropy-regularised reinforcement learning, optimising for returns augmented with a penalty on the divergence from a reference policy. Despite its success, the multi-step extensions of soft Q-learning remain relatively unexplored and limited to on-policy action sampling under the Boltzmann policy. In this brief research note, we first present a formal $n$-step formulation for soft Q-learning and then extend this framework to the fully off-policy case by introducing a novel Soft Tree Backup operator. Finally, we unify these developments into Soft $Q(λ)$, an elegant online, off-policy, eligibility trace framework that allows for efficient credit assignment under arbitrary behaviour policies. Our derivations propose a model-free method for learning entropy-regularised value functions that can be utilised in future empirical experiments.

AI.tldr: 提出软Q学习的n步扩展和完全离策略的软树备份算子，统一为软Q(λ)框架，实现高效的信用分配
AI.motivation: 软Q学习作为熵正则化强化学习的通用无模型方法，其多步扩展研究相对不足，且局限于玻尔兹曼策略下的同策略动作采样。需要开发更通用的离策略多步方法。
AI.method: 1. 提出软Q学习的正式n步公式化；2. 引入新颖的软树备份算子，将框架扩展到完全离策略情况；3. 统一为软Q(λ)框架，这是一个优雅的在线、离策略、资格迹框架，支持任意行为策略下的高效信用分配。
AI.result: 开发了一种无模型学习熵正则化价值函数的方法，可用于未来的实证实验。软Q(λ)框架允许在任意行为策略下进行高效的信用分配。
AI.conclusion: 成功扩展了软Q学习，提出了n步公式化、离策略软树备份算子和统一的软Q(λ)框架，为熵正则化强化学习提供了更灵活和高效的信用分配方法。

title: Explainable Fall Detection for Elderly Care via Temporally Stable SHAP in Skeleton-Based Human Activity Recognition
summary: Fall detection in elderly care requires not only accurate classification but also reliable explanations that clinicians can trust. However, existing post-hoc explainability methods, when applied frame-by-frame to sequential data, produce temporally unstable attribution maps that clinicians cannot reliably act upon. To address this issue, we propose a lightweight and explainable framework for skeleton-based fall detection that combines an efficient LSTM model with T-SHAP, a temporally aware post-hoc aggregation strategy that stabilizes SHAP-based feature attributions over contiguous time windows. Unlike standard SHAP, which treats each frame independently, T-SHAP applies a linear smoothing operator to the attribution sequence, reducing high-frequency variance while preserving the theoretical guarantees of Shapley values, including local accuracy and consistency. Experiments on the NTU RGB+D Dataset demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves 94.3% classification accuracy with an end-to-end inference latency below 25 milliseconds, satisfying real-time constraints on mid-range hardware and indicating strong potential for deployment in clinical monitoring scenarios. Quantitative evaluation using perturbation-based faithfulness metrics shows that T-SHAP improves explanation reliability compared to standard SHAP (AUP: 0.89 vs. 0.91) and Grad-CAM (0.82), with consistent improvements observed across five-fold cross-validation, indicating enhanced explanation reliability. The resulting attributions consistently highlight biomechanically relevant motion patterns, including lower-limb instability and changes in spinal alignment, aligning with established clinical observations of fall dynamics and supporting their use as transparent decision aids in long-term care environments

AI.tldr: 提出T-SHAP框架，通过时间平滑聚合稳定骨架跌倒检测的SHAP特征归因，提高解释可靠性，满足实时临床部署需求
AI.motivation: 现有后验可解释方法应用于序列数据时产生时间不稳定的归因图，临床医生无法可靠使用，需要稳定可靠的可解释框架
AI.method: 结合高效LSTM模型与T-SHAP（时间感知后验聚合策略），通过线性平滑算子稳定SHAP特征归因，保持Shapley值理论保证
AI.result: NTU RGB+D数据集上达到94.3%分类准确率，端到端推理延迟低于25毫秒；T-SHAP相比标准SHAP和Grad-CAM提高解释可靠性（AUP: 0.91 vs 0.89/0.82）
AI.conclusion: T-SHAP框架提供稳定可靠的特征归因，突出生物力学相关运动模式，支持作为长期护理环境中透明的决策辅助工具

title: Natural Gradient Gaussian Approximation Filter on Lie Groups for Robot State Estimation
summary: Accurate state estimation for robotic systems evolving on Lie group manifolds, such as legged robots, is a prerequisite for achieving agile control. However, this task is challenged by nonlinear observation models defined on curved manifolds, where existing filters rely on local linearization in the tangent space to handle such nonlinearity, leading to accumulated estimation errors. To address this limitation, we reformulate manifold filtering as a parameter optimization problem over a Gaussian-distributed increment variable, thereby avoiding linearization. Under this formulation, the increment can be mapped to the Lie group through the exponential operator, where it acts multiplicatively on the prior estimate to yield the posterior state. We further propose a natural gradient optimization scheme for solving this problem, whose iteration process leverages the Fisher information matrix of the increment variable to account for the curvature of the tangent space. This results in an iterative algorithm named the Natural Gradient Gaussian Approximation on Lie Groups (NANO-L) filter. Leveraging the perturbation model in Lie derivative, we prove that for the invariant observation model widely adopted in robotic localization tasks, the covariance update in NANO-L admits an exact closed-form solution, eliminating the need for iterative updates thus improving computational efficiency. Hardware experiments on a Unitree GO2 legged robot operating across different terrains demonstrate that NANO-L achieves approximately 40% lower estimation error than commonly used filters at a comparable computational cost.

AI.tldr: 提出NANO-L滤波器，通过将流形滤波重构为增量变量的参数优化问题，避免线性化，利用自然梯度优化和Fisher信息矩阵处理切空间曲率，在不变观测模型下获得闭式协方差更新
AI.motivation: 在Lie群流形上演化的机器人系统（如足式机器人）需要精确状态估计，但现有滤波器依赖切空间局部线性化处理非线性观测模型，导致累积估计误差
AI.method: 将流形滤波重构为高斯分布增量变量的参数优化问题，通过指数算子将增量映射到Lie群，采用自然梯度优化方案，利用增量变量的Fisher信息矩阵考虑切空间曲率，提出NANO-L滤波器
AI.result: 对于机器人定位任务中广泛采用的不变观测模型，NANO-L的协方差更新具有精确闭式解，无需迭代更新；硬件实验显示在Unitree GO2足式机器人上，NANO-L比常用滤波器估计误差降低约40%，计算成本相当
AI.conclusion: NANO-L滤波器通过避免线性化和利用自然梯度优化，显著提高了Lie群流形上机器人系统状态估计的精度，同时保持了计算效率

title: DroneScan-YOLO: Redundancy-Aware Lightweight Detection for Tiny Objects in UAV Imagery
summary: Aerial object detection in UAV imagery presents unique challenges due to the high prevalence of tiny objects, adverse environmental conditions, and strict computational constraints. Standard YOLO-based detectors fail to address these jointly: their minimum detection stride of 8 pixels renders sub-32px objects nearly undetectable, their CIoU loss produces zero gradients for non-overlapping tiny boxes, and their architectures contain significant filter redundancy. We propose DroneScan-YOLO, a holistic system contribution that addresses these limitations through four coordinated design choices: (1) increased input resolution of 1280x1280 to maximize spatial detail for tiny objects, (2) RPA-Block, a dynamic filter pruning mechanism based on lazy cosine-similarity updates with a 10-epoch warm-up period, (3) MSFD, a lightweight P2 detection branch at stride 4 adding only 114,592 parameters (+1.1%), and (4) SAL-NWD, a hybrid loss combining Normalized Wasserstein Distance with size-adaptive CIoU weighting, integrated into YOLOv8's TaskAligned assignment pipeline. Evaluated on VisDrone2019-DET, DroneScan-YOLO achieves 55.3% mAP@50 and 35.6% mAP@50-95, outperforming the YOLOv8s baseline by +16.6 and +12.3 points respectively, improving recall from 0.374 to 0.518, and maintaining 96.7 FPS inference speed with only +4.1% parameters. Gains are most pronounced on tiny object classes: bicycle AP@50 improves from 0.114 to 0.328 (+187%), and awning-tricycle from 0.156 to 0.237 (+52%).

AI.tldr: DroneScan-YOLO：针对无人机图像小目标检测的改进YOLO系统，通过提高分辨率、动态剪枝、增加检测分支和混合损失函数，显著提升小目标检测性能
AI.motivation: 无人机图像中的目标检测面临三大挑战：大量微小目标（<32像素）、恶劣环境条件和严格计算约束。标准YOLO检测器存在最小检测步长为8像素导致微小目标几乎无法检测、CIoU损失对非重叠微小框产生零梯度、以及架构中存在显著滤波器冗余等问题
AI.method: 提出DroneScan-YOLO系统，包含四个协同设计：1）1280×1280输入分辨率以最大化微小目标空间细节；2）RPA-Block基于惰性余弦相似度更新的动态滤波器剪枝机制，含10轮预热期；3）MSFD轻量级P2检测分支（步长4），仅增加114,592参数（+1.1%）；4）SAL-NWD混合损失函数，结合归一化Wasserstein距离与尺寸自适应CIoU加权，集成到YOLOv8的TaskAligned分配流程中
AI.result: 在VisDrone2019-DET数据集上，DroneScan-YOLO达到55.3% mAP@50和35.6% mAP@50-95，相比YOLOv8s基线分别提升16.6和12.3个百分点，召回率从0.374提升至0.518，推理速度保持96.7 FPS，参数仅增加4.1%。微小目标类别提升最显著：自行车AP@50从0.114提升至0.328（+187%），遮阳三轮车从0.156提升至0.237（+52%）
AI.conclusion: DroneScan-YOLO通过协调的架构改进有效解决了无人机图像中小目标检测的核心挑战，在保持实时推理速度的同时显著提升了检测精度，特别是对微小目标的检测能力

title: STRONG-VLA: Decoupled Robustness Learning for Vision-Language-Action Models under Multimodal Perturbations
summary: Despite their strong performance in embodied tasks, recent Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models remain highly fragile under multimodal perturbations, where visual corruption and linguistic noise jointly induce distribution shifts that degrade task-level execution. Existing robustness approaches typically rely on joint training with perturbed data, treating robustness as a static objective, which leads to conflicting optimization between robustness and task fidelity. In this work, we propose STRONG-VLA, a decoupled fine-tuning framework that explicitly separates robustness acquisition from task-aligned refinement. In Stage I, the model is exposed to a curriculum of multimodal perturbations with increasing difficulty, enabling progressive robustness learning under controlled distribution shifts. In Stage II, the model is re-aligned with clean task distributions to recover execution fidelity while preserving robustness. We further establish a comprehensive benchmark with 28 perturbation types spanning both textual and visual modalities, grounded in realistic sources of sensor noise, occlusion, and instruction corruption.
