Extensive experiments on the LIBERO benchmark show that STRONG-VLA consistently improves task success rates across multiple VLA architectures. On OpenVLA, our method achieves gains of up to 12.60% under seen perturbations and 7.77% under unseen perturbations. Notably, similar or larger improvements are observed on OpenVLA-OFT (+14.48% / +13.81%) and pi0 (+16.49% / +5.58%), demonstrating strong cross-architecture generalization. Real-world experiments on an AIRBOT robotic platform further validate its practical effectiveness. These results highlight the importance of decoupled optimization for multimodal robustness and establish STRONG-VLA as a simple yet principled framework for robust embodied control.

AI.tldr: STRONG-VLA：一种解耦微调框架，通过分阶段训练（先鲁棒性获取，后任务对齐）提升VLA模型在多模态扰动下的鲁棒性，在多个VLA架构上显著提升任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型在多模态扰动（视觉损坏+语言噪声）下表现脆弱，传统联合训练方法将鲁棒性作为静态目标，导致鲁棒性与任务保真度之间的优化冲突。
AI.method: 提出两阶段解耦微调框架：第一阶段通过难度递增的多模态扰动课程学习，在受控分布偏移下进行渐进式鲁棒性学习；第二阶段使用干净任务数据重新对齐，恢复执行保真度同时保持鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在LIBERO基准测试中，STRONG-VLA显著提升多个VLA架构的任务成功率：OpenVLA在已知扰动下提升12.60%，未知扰动下提升7.77%；OpenVLA-OFT提升14.48%/13.81%；pi0提升16.49%/5.58%。真实机器人实验进一步验证其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 解耦优化对多模态鲁棒性至关重要，STRONG-VLA作为一个简单而原则性的框架，能够有效提升具身控制任务的鲁棒性，并具有良好的跨架构泛化能力。

title: Indexing Multimodal Language Models for Large-scale Image Retrieval
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong cross-modal reasoning capabilities, yet their potential for vision-only tasks remains underexplored. We investigate MLLMs as training-free similarity estimators for instance-level image-to-image retrieval. Our approach prompts the model with paired images and converts next-token probabilities into similarity scores, enabling zero-shot re-ranking within large-scale retrieval pipelines. This design avoids specialized architectures and fine-tuning, leveraging the rich visual discrimination learned during multimodal pre-training. We address scalability by combining MLLMs with memory-efficient indexing and top-$k$ candidate re-ranking. Experiments across diverse benchmarks show that MLLMs outperform task-specific re-rankers outside their native domains and exhibit superior robustness to clutter, occlusion, and small objects. Despite strong results, we identify failure modes under severe appearance changes, highlighting opportunities for future research. Our findings position MLLMs as a promising alternative for open-world large-scale image retrieval.

AI.tldr: MLLMs作为无需训练的图像相似度估计器，通过提示配对图像并将下一个token概率转换为相似度分数，实现零样本重排序，在大规模图像检索中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 虽然多模态大语言模型在跨模态推理方面表现出色，但其在纯视觉任务中的潜力尚未充分探索。本研究旨在探索MLLMs作为无需训练的相似度估计器在实例级图像检索中的应用。
AI.method: 提出将MLLMs作为无需训练的相似度估计器：1）向模型输入成对图像作为提示；2）将下一个token的概率转换为相似度分数；3）在大规模检索流程中实现零样本重排序；4）结合内存高效索引和top-k候选重排序解决可扩展性问题。
AI.result: 在多样化基准测试中，MLLMs在非原生领域超越了特定任务的重排序器，对杂乱、遮挡和小物体表现出更强的鲁棒性。尽管在严重外观变化下存在失败模式，但整体表现优异。
AI.conclusion: MLLMs作为无需训练的相似度估计器为开放世界大规模图像检索提供了有前景的替代方案，其利用多模态预训练学到的丰富视觉判别能力，避免了专用架构和微调需求。

title: ReviewGrounder: Improving Review Substantiveness with Rubric-Guided, Tool-Integrated Agents
summary: The rapid rise in AI conference submissions has driven increasing exploration of large language models (LLMs) for peer review support. However, LLM-based reviewers often generate superficial, formulaic comments lacking substantive, evidence-grounded feedback. We attribute this to the underutilization of two key components of human reviewing: explicit rubrics and contextual grounding in existing work. To address this, we introduce REVIEWBENCH, a benchmark evaluating review text according to paper-specific rubrics derived from official guidelines, the paper's content, and human-written reviews. We further propose REVIEWGROUNDER, a rubric-guided, tool-integrated multi-agent framework that decomposes reviewing into drafting and grounding stages, enriching shallow drafts via targeted evidence consolidation. Experiments on REVIEWBENCH show that REVIEWGROUNDER, using a Phi-4-14B-based drafter and a GPT-OSS-120B-based grounding stage, consistently outperforms baselines with substantially stronger/larger backbones (e.g., GPT-4.1 and DeepSeek-R1-670B) in both alignment with human judgments and rubric-based review quality across 8 dimensions. The code is available \href{https://github.com/EigenTom/ReviewGrounder}{here}.

AI.tldr: 提出REVIEWBENCH基准和REVIEWGROUNDER框架，通过基于具体论文的评分标准和证据整合，解决LLM同行评审中评论肤浅、缺乏实质证据的问题。
AI.motivation: 随着AI会议投稿量激增，人们越来越多地探索使用大语言模型辅助同行评审。然而，现有LLM评审者生成的评论往往肤浅、公式化，缺乏实质性和基于证据的反馈。作者认为这源于未能充分利用人类评审的两个关键组成部分：明确的评分标准和基于现有工作的上下文基础。
AI.method: 1. 提出REVIEWBENCH基准，根据官方指南、论文内容和人工评审意见制定论文特定的评分标准来评估评审文本质量。2. 提出REVIEWGROUNDER框架，这是一个基于评分标准、集成工具的多智能体系统，将评审过程分解为草拟和基础构建两个阶段：先生成初步草稿，然后通过有针对性的证据整合来丰富浅层内容。
AI.result: 在REVIEWBENCH上的实验表明，REVIEWGROUNDER（使用Phi-4-14B作为草拟器，GPT-OSS-120B作为基础构建阶段）在8个维度上，无论是与人类判断的一致性还是基于评分标准的评审质量，都持续优于使用更强大/更大规模骨干模型（如GPT-4.1和DeepSeek-R1-670B）的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合明确的评分标准和上下文证据整合，REVIEWGROUNDER框架能够显著提升LLM同行评审的质量，生成更实质、基于证据的评审意见，优于现有大型模型方法。

title: Towards Multi-Source Domain Generalization for Sleep Staging with Noisy Labels
comment: The benchmark and code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/KNWang970918/FF-TRUST.git
summary: Automatic sleep staging is a multimodal learning problem involving heterogeneous physiological signals such as EEG and EOG, which often suffer from domain shifts across institutions, devices, and populations. In practice, these data are also affected by noisy annotations, yet label-noise-robust multi-source domain generalization remains underexplored. We present the first benchmark for Noisy Labels in Multi-Source Domain-Generalized Sleep Staging (NL-DGSS) and show that existing noisy-label learning methods degrade substantially when domain shifts and label noise coexist. To address this challenge, we propose FF-TRUST, a domain-invariant multimodal sleep staging framework with Joint Time-Frequency Early Learning Regularization (JTF-ELR). By jointly exploiting temporal and spectral consistency together with confidence-diversity regularization, FF-TRUST improves robustness under noisy supervision. Experiments on five public datasets demonstrate consistent state-of-the-art performance under diverse symmetric and asymmetric noise settings. The benchmark and code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/KNWang970918/FF-TRUST.git.

AI.tldr: FF-TRUST：首个针对多源域泛化睡眠分期中标签噪声问题的基准与框架，通过联合时频早期学习正则化提升噪声监督下的鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 自动睡眠分期面临多模态生理信号的域偏移问题，同时实际数据常受噪声标签影响。现有噪声标签学习方法在域偏移和标签噪声共存时性能显著下降，而多源域泛化下的标签噪声鲁棒性研究尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 提出FF-TRUST框架，包含域不变多模态睡眠分期架构和联合时频早期学习正则化（JTF-ELR）。通过联合利用时域和频域一致性以及置信度多样性正则化，提升噪声监督下的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在五个公开数据集上的实验表明，FF-TRUST在多种对称和非对称噪声设置下均取得一致的SOTA性能，显著优于现有噪声标签学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了首个多源域泛化睡眠分期中标签噪声的基准，提出的FF-TRUST框架能有效应对域偏移和标签噪声共存的实际挑战，为实际临床应用提供了鲁棒解决方案。

title: Rethinking Uncertainty in Segmentation: From Estimation to Decision
comment: 29 pages, 12 tables, 9 figures, Github repo: Saket-Maganti/medical-seg-uncertainity
summary: In medical image segmentation, uncertainty estimates are often reported but rarely used to guide decisions. We study the missing step: how uncertainty maps are converted into actionable policies such as accepting, flagging, or deferring predictions. We formulate segmentation as a two-stage pipeline, estimation followed by decision, and show that optimizing uncertainty alone fails to capture most of the achievable safety gains. Using retinal vessel segmentation benchmarks (DRIVE, STARE, CHASE_DB1), we evaluate two uncertainty sources (Monte Carlo Dropout and Test-Time Augmentation) combined with three deferral strategies, and introduce a simple confidence-aware deferral rule that prioritizes uncertain and low-confidence predictions. Our results show that the best method and policy combination removes up to 80 percent of segmentation errors at only 25 percent pixel deferral, while achieving strong cross-dataset robustness. We further show that calibration improvements do not translate to better decision quality, highlighting a disconnect between standard uncertainty metrics and real-world utility. These findings suggest that uncertainty should be evaluated based on the decisions it enables, rather than in isolation.

AI.tldr: 医学图像分割中，不确定性估计通常被报告但很少用于指导决策。本研究探讨如何将不确定性图转化为可操作的策略（接受、标记或推迟预测），发现仅优化不确定性无法实现大部分安全增益。通过视网膜血管分割基准测试，提出简单的置信感知推迟规则，可在仅推迟25%像素的情况下消除80%的分割错误。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割中，不确定性估计虽然常被报告，但很少被实际用于指导临床决策。研究者希望填补这一空白，研究如何将不确定性图转化为可操作的决策策略（如接受、标记或推迟预测），以提升分割的安全性和实用性。
AI.method: 将分割建模为两阶段流程：估计阶段和决策阶段。评估两种不确定性来源（蒙特卡洛Dropout和测试时间增强）与三种推迟策略的组合。提出简单的置信感知推迟规则，优先处理不确定性和低置信度的预测。在视网膜血管分割基准数据集（DRIVE、STARE、CHASE_DB1）上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 最佳方法和策略组合可在仅推迟25%像素的情况下消除高达80%的分割错误，同时展现出强大的跨数据集鲁棒性。研究发现校准改进并不能转化为更好的决策质量，揭示了标准不确定性指标与实际效用之间的脱节。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性应该基于其能够实现的决策效果来评估，而不是孤立地评估。仅优化不确定性无法捕捉到大部分可实现的安全增益。研究强调了将不确定性估计与实际决策策略相结合的重要性，为医学图像分割中的安全应用提供了实用指导。

title: GPU-Accelerated Continuous-Time Successive Convexification for Contact-Implicit Legged Locomotion
summary: Contact-implicit trajectory optimization (CITO) enables the automatic discovery of contact sequences, but most methods rely on fine time discretization to capture all contact events accurately, which increases problem size and runtime while tying solution quality to grid resolution. We extend the recently proposed sequential convex programming (SCP) approach for trajectory optimization, continuous-time successive convexification (ct-SCvx), to CITO by introducing integral cross-complementarity constraints, which eliminate the risk of missing contact events between discretization nodes while preserving the flexibility of contact mode changes. The resulting framework, contact-implicit successive convexification (ci-SCvx), models full multibody dynamics in maximal coordinates, including stick-slip friction and partially elastic impacts. To handle complementarity constraints, we embed a backtracking homotopy scheme within SCP for reliable convergence. We implement this framework in a stand-alone Python software, leveraging JAX for GPU acceleration and a custom canonical-form parser for the convex subproblems of SCP to avoid the overhead of general-purpose modeling tools such as CVXPY. We demonstrate ci-SCvx on diverse legged-locomotion tasks. In particular, we validate the approach in MuJoCo with the Gymnasium HalfCheetah model against the MuJoCo MPC baseline, showing that a tracking simulation with the optimized torque profiles from ci-SCvx produces physically consistent trajectories with lesser energy consumption. We also show that the resulting software achieves faster solve times than existing state-of-the-art SCP implementations by over an order of magnitude, thereby demonstrating a practically important contribution to scalable real-time trajectory optimization.

AI.tldr: 提出ci-SCvx框架，将连续时间逐次凸化方法扩展到接触隐式轨迹优化，通过积分交叉互补约束避免离散化节点间接触事件丢失，实现更高效的求解。
AI.motivation: 传统接触隐式轨迹优化方法依赖精细时间离散化来准确捕捉接触事件，这会增加问题规模和计算时间，且解的质量受网格分辨率限制。需要一种能避免接触事件丢失同时保持接触模式灵活变化的方法。
AI.method: 扩展连续时间逐次凸化(ct-SCvx)方法到接触隐式轨迹优化，引入积分交叉互补约束来避免离散化节点间接触事件丢失。框架建模完整多体动力学（最大坐标），包含粘滑摩擦和部分弹性碰撞。采用回溯同伦方案处理互补约束，在JAX中实现GPU加速，使用自定义规范形式解析器避免通用建模工具开销。
AI.result: 在多种足式运动任务上验证ci-SCvx。与MuJoCo MPC基线相比，ci-SCvx优化的扭矩配置文件在跟踪仿真中产生物理一致轨迹且能耗更低。软件求解速度比现有最先进SCP实现快一个数量级以上。
AI.conclusion: ci-SCvx框架通过积分交叉互补约束有效解决了接触隐式轨迹优化中的接触事件捕捉问题，实现了更高效、可扩展的实时轨迹优化，在求解速度和物理一致性方面均有显著提升。

title: Online learning with noisy side observations
comment: Published at International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS) 2016. 13 pages, 7 figures
summary: We propose a new partial-observability model for online learning problems where the learner, besides its own loss, also observes some noisy feedback about the other actions, depending on the underlying structure of the problem. We represent this structure by a weighted directed graph, where the edge weights are related to the quality of the feedback shared by the connected nodes. Our main contribution is an efficient algorithm that guarantees a regret of $\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{α^* T})$ after $T$ rounds, where $α^*$ is a novel graph property that we call the effective independence number. Our algorithm is completely parameter-free and does not require knowledge (or even estimation) of $α^*$. For the special case of binary edge weights, our setting reduces to the partial-observability models of Mannor and Shamir (2011) and Alon et al. (2013) and our algorithm recovers the near-optimal regret bounds.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的部分可观测在线学习模型，其中学习者除了自身损失外，还能观察到关于其他动作的噪声反馈，反馈质量由加权有向图结构决定。算法保证$\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{α^* T})$的遗憾界，其中$α^*$是新的图属性"有效独立数"。
AI.motivation: 现有部分可观测在线学习模型通常假设反馈是二元的（有或无），但实际应用中反馈质量可能连续变化。需要一种更通用的模型来捕捉不同动作间反馈质量的连续变化，并设计参数无关的高效算法。
AI.method: 使用加权有向图表示动作间的反馈结构，边权重反映反馈质量。提出基于图结构的在线学习算法，无需预先知道图属性$α^*$（有效独立数）。算法通过自适应策略处理连续变化的反馈质量。
AI.result: 算法保证$\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{α^* T})$的遗憾界，其中$α^*$是图的有效独立数。对于二元边权重的特殊情况，算法恢复Mannor和Shamir(2011)以及Alon等人(2013)模型中的近乎最优遗憾界。
AI.conclusion: 提出的部分可观测模型扩展了现有框架，允许连续变化的反馈质量。参数无关算法在实际应用中具有优势，有效独立数$α^*$是决定遗憾界的关键图属性。该工作为具有复杂反馈结构的在线学习问题提供了理论保证。

title: Large Language Models to Enhance Business Process Modeling: Past, Present, and Future Trends
summary: Recent advances in Generative Artificial Intelligence, particularly Large Language Models (LLMs), have stimulated growing interest in automating or assisting Business Process Modeling tasks using natural language. Several approaches have been proposed to transform textual process descriptions into BPMN and related workflow models. However, the extent to which these approaches effectively support complex process modeling in organizational settings remains unclear. This article presents a literature review of AI-driven methods for transforming natural language into BPMN process models, with a particular focus on the role of LLMs. Following a structured review strategy, relevant studies were identified and analyzed to classify existing approaches, examine how LLMs are integrated into text-to-model pipelines, and investigate the evaluation practices used to assess generated models. The analysis reveals a clear shift from rule-based and traditional NLP pipelines toward LLM-based architectures that rely on prompt engineering, intermediate representations, and iterative refinement mechanisms. While these approaches significantly expand the capabilities of automated process model generation, the literature also exposes persistent challenges related to semantic correctness, evaluation fragmentation, reproducibility, and limited validation in real-world organizational contexts. Based on these findings, this review identifies key research gaps and discusses promising directions for future research, including the integration of contextual knowledge through Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), its integration with LLMs, the development of interactive modeling architectures, and the need for more comprehensive and standardized evaluation frameworks.

AI.tldr: 本文对AI驱动的自然语言到BPMN流程模型转换方法进行文献综述，重点关注LLMs的作用，揭示了从传统方法向LLM架构的转变趋势，并识别了现有挑战和未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 随着生成式人工智能特别是大语言模型的发展，人们对使用自然语言自动化或辅助业务流程建模任务的兴趣日益增长。然而，这些方法在组织环境中支持复杂流程建模的有效性仍不明确，需要系统性的文献综述来理解当前研究现状。
AI.method: 采用结构化文献综述策略，识别和分析相关研究，对现有方法进行分类，考察LLMs如何集成到文本到模型管道中，并调查用于评估生成模型的实践方法。
AI.result: 分析显示从基于规则和传统NLP管道向LLM架构的明显转变，这些架构依赖提示工程、中间表示和迭代优化机制。虽然显著扩展了自动化流程模型生成能力，但也暴露了语义正确性、评估碎片化、可重复性以及现实组织环境中验证有限等持续挑战。
AI.conclusion: 基于研究发现，本文识别了关键研究空白并讨论了未来研究方向，包括通过检索增强生成集成上下文知识、与LLMs的整合、交互式建模架构开发，以及需要更全面和标准化的评估框架。

title: CableTract: A Co-Designed Cable-Driven Field Robot for Low-Compaction, Off-Grid Capable Agriculture
summary: Conventional field operations spend most of their energy moving the tractor body, not the implement. Yet feasibility studies for novel agricultural vehicles rarely tie mechanics, energy harvest, draft, field geometry, economics, life-cycle CO2, and uncertainty quantification together on a single reproducible code path. This paper builds such a framework and applies it to CableTract, a two-module cable-driven field robot. A stationary Main Unit (winch + motor + battery + harvester module) (MU) and a lighter Anchor module (held by helical screw piles) tension a cable across a strip while a lightweight implement carriage rolls along it. The heavy bodies stay on the headland; only the carriage enters the field. The carriage runs a 10-implement library co-designed for the cable architecture. This co-design is the paper's central analytical lever. The framework is prototype-free. It chains a catenary cable model, a drivetrain efficiency chain, a stochastic draft model fitted to the co-designed library, an hourly solar + wind + battery simulator on six sites, a polygon coverage planner on a 50-field corpus, a contact-pressure compaction model, a discounted cash-flow economics engine with battery replacement and life-cycle CO2, and a global sensitivity analysis on 20 inputs. An operating-envelope sweep and an architectural-variant comparison close the loop. The full implementation is open source. Applied to the codesigned reference, the framework yields energy, compaction advantages and potential off-grid operation.

AI.tldr: 提出CableTract电缆驱动农业机器人框架，通过固定主单元和锚点模块实现田间作业，仅轻量级机具进入农田，显著降低能耗和土壤压实
AI.motivation: 传统田间作业大部分能量消耗在拖拉机本体移动而非机具上，现有研究缺乏将机械、能量收集、牵引力、田间几何、经济性、生命周期CO2和不确定性量化整合到单一可复现代码路径的框架
AI.method: 建立原型无关的集成框架，包含悬链线电缆模型、传动效率链、随机牵引力模型、六站点小时级太阳能+风能+电池模拟器、50个田块多边形覆盖规划器、接触压力压实模型、带电池更换和生命周期CO2的折现现金流经济引擎，以及20个输入的全局敏感性分析
AI.result: 应用于协同设计的参考系统，框架显示出能源和压实优势，并具备潜在离网运行能力
AI.conclusion: CableTract框架成功整合多学科分析，为新型农业车辆评估提供全面工具，证明电缆驱动架构在能耗和土壤保护方面的优势

title: Spectral Thompson sampling
comment: Published at AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI) 2014
summary: Thompson Sampling (TS) has attracted a lot of interest due to its good empirical performance, in particular in the computational advertising. Though successful, the tools for its performance analysis appeared only recently. In this paper, we describe and analyze SpectralTS algorithm for a bandit problem, where the payoffs of the choices are smooth given an underlying graph. In this setting, each choice is a node of a graph and the expected payoffs of the neighboring nodes are assumed to be similar. Although the setting has application both in recommender systems and advertising, the traditional algorithms would scale poorly with the number of choices. For that purpose we consider an effective dimension d, which is small in real-world graphs. We deliver the analysis showing that the regret of SpectralTS scales as d*sqrt(T ln N) with high probability, where T is the time horizon and N is the number of choices. Since a d*sqrt(T ln N) regret is comparable to the known results, SpectralTS offers a computationally more efficient alternative. We also show that our algorithm is competitive on both synthetic and real-world data.

AI.tldr: SpectralTS是一种基于图结构的汤普森采样算法，用于解决期望收益平滑的赌博机问题，通过有效维度d实现计算效率提升，遗憾界为d√(T ln N)。
AI.motivation: 汤普森采样在实践中表现良好但理论分析工具较新。在计算广告和推荐系统中，选择项（节点）的期望收益在图结构上平滑，传统算法在选项数量大时计算效率低，需要利用图结构设计更高效的算法。
AI.method: 提出SpectralTS算法，将选择项建模为图节点，假设相邻节点期望收益相似。利用图拉普拉斯矩阵的谱分解定义有效维度d（真实世界图中较小），通过谱方法实现高效的汤普森采样。
AI.result: 理论分析证明SpectralTS的遗憾以高概率为d√(T ln N)，其中T是时间范围，N是选择项数量。该遗憾界与已知结果相当，但计算效率更高。在合成和真实数据上的实验验证了算法的竞争力。
AI.conclusion: SpectralTS为图结构赌博机问题提供了计算高效的汤普森采样方案，利用图的光滑性和有效维度实现理论保证和实际性能的平衡，适用于大规模推荐和广告系统。

title: DINO_4D: Semantic-Aware 4D Reconstruction
summary: In the intersection of computer vision and robotic perception, 4D reconstruction of dynamic scenes serve as the critical bridge connecting low-level geometric sensing with high-level semantic understanding. We present DINO\_4D, introducing frozen DINOv3 features as structural priors, injecting semantic awareness into the reconstruction process to effectively suppress semantic drift during dynamic tracking. Experiments on the Point Odyssey and TUM-Dynamics benchmarks demonstrate that our method maintains the linear time complexity $O(T)$ of its predecessors while significantly improving Tracking Accuracy (APD) and Reconstruction Completeness. DINO\_4D establishes a new paradigm for constructing 4D World Models that possess both geometric precision and semantic understanding.

AI.tldr: DINO_4D利用冻结的DINOv3特征作为结构先验，将语义感知注入动态场景的4D重建过程，有效抑制语义漂移，在保持线性时间复杂度的同时显著提升跟踪精度和重建完整性。
AI.motivation: 在计算机视觉和机器人感知的交叉领域，动态场景的4D重建是连接低层几何感知与高层语义理解的关键桥梁。现有方法在动态跟踪过程中容易出现语义漂移问题，需要引入语义感知来提升重建质量。
AI.method: 提出DINO_4D方法，引入冻结的DINOv3特征作为结构先验，将语义感知注入重建过程。该方法保持了前驱方法的线性时间复杂度O(T)，同时通过语义特征有效抑制动态跟踪过程中的语义漂移。
AI.result: 在Point Odyssey和TUM-Dynamics基准测试上的实验表明，DINO_4D在保持线性时间复杂度的同时，显著提高了跟踪精度(APD)和重建完整性。该方法为构建兼具几何精度和语义理解的4D世界模型建立了新范式。
AI.conclusion: DINO_4D通过引入冻结的DINOv3特征作为语义结构先验，成功地将语义感知融入4D动态场景重建，有效解决了语义漂移问题，为构建具有几何精度和语义理解的4D世界模型提供了新范式。

title: Covariance-adapting algorithm for semi-bandits with application to sparse rewards
comment: Published at Conference on Learning Theory (COLT) 2020
summary: We investigate stochastic combinatorial semi-bandits, where the entire joint distribution of outcomes impacts the complexity of the problem instance (unlike in the standard bandits). Typical distributions considered depend on specific parameter values, whose prior knowledge is required in theory but quite difficult to estimate in practice; an example is the commonly assumed sub-Gaussian family. We alleviate this issue by instead considering a new general family of sub-exponential distributions, which contains bounded and Gaussian ones. We prove a new lower bound on the expected regret on this family, that is parameterized by the unknown covariance matrix of outcomes, a tighter quantity than the sub-Gaussian matrix. We then construct an algorithm that uses covariance estimates, and provide a tight asymptotic analysis of the regret. Finally, we apply and extend our results to the family of sparse outcomes, which has applications in many recommender systems.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了随机组合半赌博机问题，提出了基于协方差矩阵的新下界和算法，适用于更广泛的次指数分布族，并扩展到稀疏结果的应用场景。
AI.motivation: 传统随机组合半赌博机问题中，整个结果的联合分布影响问题复杂度，但常用分布（如次高斯分布）需要先验参数知识，这些参数在实践中难以估计。作者旨在解决这一问题，考虑更一般的次指数分布族，该族包含有界分布和高斯分布。
AI.method: 1. 提出新的次指数分布族，包含有界分布和高斯分布；2. 证明基于未知结果协方差矩阵的期望遗憾下界，该下界比次高斯矩阵更紧；3. 构建使用协方差估计的算法；4. 对遗憾进行严格的渐近分析；5. 将结果应用于稀疏结果族，这在推荐系统中有应用。
AI.result: 1. 建立了次指数分布族上的新下界，该下界由结果协方差矩阵参数化；2. 设计了使用协方差估计的算法；3. 提供了遗憾的紧渐近分析；4. 将结果扩展到稀疏结果族，适用于推荐系统等应用。
AI.conclusion: 论文通过考虑更一般的次指数分布族，解决了传统方法需要难以估计的先验参数的问题。提出的基于协方差矩阵的下界比次高斯矩阵更紧，算法和渐近分析为随机组合半赌博机问题提供了更实用的解决方案，特别适用于稀疏结果的推荐系统应用。

title: Reachability Constraints in Variational Quantum Circuits: Optimization within Polynomial Group Module
summary: This work identifies a necessary condition for any variational quantum approach to reach the exact ground state. Briefly, the norms of the projections of the input and the ground state onto each group module must match, implying that module weights of the solution state have to be known in advance in order to reach the exact ground state. An exemplary case is provided by matchgate circuits applied to problems whose solutions are classical bit strings, since all computational basis states share the same module-wise weights. Combined with the known classical simulability of quantum circuits for which observables lie in a small linear subspace, this implies that certain problems admit a classical surrogate for exact solution with each step taking $O(n^5)$ time. The Maximum Cut problem serves as an illustrative example.

AI.tldr: 论文发现变分量子方法达到精确基态的必要条件：输入态与基态在每个群模上的投影范数必须匹配，这意味着需要提前知道解态的模权重。以匹配门电路应用于经典比特串问题为例，所有计算基态具有相同的模权重，结合量子电路经典可模拟性，某些问题存在经典替代方法，每步时间复杂度为O(n⁵)。
AI.motivation: 研究变分量子方法达到精确基态的理论限制条件，探索量子计算与经典计算在解决特定问题时的边界，特别是识别哪些问题可以通过经典方法高效模拟而无需量子计算。
AI.method: 通过群表示理论分析变分量子方法，推导出达到精确基态的必要条件：输入态与基态在每个群模上的投影范数必须匹配。以匹配门电路和经典比特串问题为例，结合已知的量子电路经典可模拟性理论，构建理论框架。
AI.result: 发现了变分量子方法达到精确基态的必要条件，即模权重必须匹配。对于匹配门电路应用于经典比特串问题，由于所有计算基态具有相同的模权重，结合量子电路经典可模拟性，某些问题存在经典替代方法，每步时间复杂度为O(n⁵)。最大割问题作为示例验证了这一理论。
AI.conclusion: 变分量子方法达到精确基态需要满足模权重匹配条件，这意味着在某些情况下需要提前知道解的信息。对于特定类型的问题（如匹配门电路处理的经典比特串问题），存在高效的经典替代方法，这揭示了量子计算与经典计算在某些问题上的边界。

title: Neural 3D Reconstruction of Planetary Surfaces from Descent-Phase Wide-Angle Imagery
summary: Digital elevation modeling of planetary surfaces is essential for studying past and ongoing geological processes. Wide-angle imagery acquired during spacecraft descent promises to offer a low-cost option for high-resolution terrain reconstruction. However, accurate 3D reconstruction from such imagery is challenging due to strong radial distortion and limited parallax from vertically descending, predominantly nadir-facing cameras. Conventional multi-view stereo exhibits limited depth range and reduced fidelity under these conditions and also lacks domain-specific priors. We present the first study of modern neural reconstruction methods for planetary descent imaging. We also develop a novel approach that incorporates an explicit neural height field representation, which provides a strong prior since planetary surfaces are generally continuous, smooth, solid, and free from floating objects. This study demonstrates that neural approaches offer a strong and competitive alternative to traditional multi-view stereo (MVS) methods. Experiments on simulated descent sequences over high-fidelity lunar and Mars terrains demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves increased spatial coverage while maintaining satisfactory estimation accuracy.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于行星下降成像的神经重建方法，通过显式神经高度场表示来克服传统多视图立体的局限性，在模拟的月球和火星地形上实现了更好的空间覆盖和精度。
AI.motivation: 行星表面的数字高程建模对研究地质过程至关重要。航天器下降期间获取的广角图像为高分辨率地形重建提供了低成本选择，但由于强烈的径向畸变和垂直下降、主要面向天底的相机带来的有限视差，传统多视图立体方法在这些条件下深度范围有限、保真度降低，且缺乏领域特定先验。
AI.method: 提出了首个用于行星下降成像的现代神经重建方法研究，并开发了一种新颖方法，该方法包含显式神经高度场表示。这种表示提供了强大的先验，因为行星表面通常是连续、平滑、坚固且没有漂浮物体的。
AI.result: 在高保真月球和火星地形的模拟下降序列实验中，所提出的方法实现了增加的空间覆盖，同时保持了令人满意的估计精度。
AI.conclusion: 神经方法为传统多视图立体方法提供了强大且有竞争力的替代方案，特别适用于行星下降成像场景，能够克服传统方法的局限性并利用行星表面的领域特定先验。

title: Multitasking Embedding for Embryo Blastocyst Grading Prediction (MEmEBG)
summary: Reliable evaluation of blastocyst quality is critical for the success of in vitro fertilization (IVF) treatments. Current embryo grading practices primarily rely on visual assessment of morphological features, which introduces subjectivity, inter-embryologist variability, and challenges in standardizing quality assurance. In this study, we propose a multitask embedding-based approach for the automated analysis and prediction of key blastocyst components, including the trophectoderm (TE), inner cell mass (ICM), and blastocyst expansion (EXP). The method leverages biological and physical characteristics extracted from images of day-5 human embryos. A pretrained ResNet-18 architecture, enhanced with an embedding layer, is employed to learn discriminative representations from a limited dataset and to automatically identify TE and ICM regions along with their corresponding grades, structures that are visually similar and inherently difficult to distinguish. Experimental results demonstrate the promise of the multitask embedding approach and potential for robust and consistent blastocyst quality assessment.

AI.tldr: 提出基于多任务嵌入的方法，利用ResNet-18架构自动分析囊胚的关键组成部分（滋养层、内细胞团、扩张程度），以解决传统形态学评估的主观性和不一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 当前体外受精治疗中，囊胚质量评估主要依赖形态学特征的视觉评估，存在主观性、胚胎学家间差异以及质量保证标准化困难等问题，需要更可靠、一致的自动化评估方法。
AI.method: 采用多任务嵌入方法，利用预训练的ResNet-18架构增强嵌入层，从第5天人类胚胎图像中提取生物和物理特征，自动识别滋养层、内细胞团区域及其相应等级，这些结构在视觉上相似且难以区分。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，多任务嵌入方法在囊胚质量评估方面展现出潜力，能够实现稳健且一致的自动化分析。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为解决传统囊胚评估中的主观性和不一致性问题提供了有前景的解决方案，有望提高体外受精治疗的成功率。

title: Towards Patient-Specific Deformable Registration in Laparoscopic Surgery
summary: Unsafe surgical care is a critical health concern, often linked to limitations in surgeon experience, skills, and situational awareness. Integrating patient-specific 3D models into the surgical field can enhance visualization, provide real-time anatomical guidance, and reduce intraoperative complications. However, reliably registering these models in general surgery remains challenging due to mismatches between preoperative and intraoperative organ surfaces, such as deformations and noise. To overcome these challenges, we introduce the first patient-specific non-rigid point cloud registration method, which leverages a novel data generation strategy to optimize outcomes for individual patients. Our approach combines a Transformer encoder-decoder architecture with overlap estimation and a dedicated matching module to predict dense correspondences, followed by a physics-based algorithm for registration. Experimental results on both synthetic and real data demonstrate that our patient-specific method significantly outperforms traditional agnostic approaches, achieving 45% Matching Score with 92% Inlier Ratio on synthetic data, highlighting its potential to improve surgical care.

AI.tldr: 提出首个患者特异性非刚性点云配准方法，通过Transformer编码器-解码器架构和物理算法，解决手术中术前与术中器官表面变形不匹配问题，显著优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 不安全手术护理是严重健康问题，常因外科医生经验、技能和情境意识有限导致。将患者特异性3D模型整合到手术视野可增强可视化、提供实时解剖引导并减少术中并发症，但术前与术中器官表面变形和噪声导致配准困难。
AI.method: 提出首个患者特异性非刚性点云配准方法：1) 使用新颖数据生成策略优化个体患者结果；2) 结合Transformer编码器-解码器架构、重叠估计和专用匹配模块预测密集对应关系；3) 采用基于物理的算法进行配准。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据上的实验表明，患者特异性方法显著优于传统通用方法：合成数据上达到45%匹配分数和92%内点比率，证明其在改善手术护理方面的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过患者特异性优化解决了手术中非刚性点云配准的挑战，为增强手术可视化、提供实时解剖引导和减少并发症提供了有效解决方案，有望改善手术护理质量。

title: Kinematics of continuum planar grasping
summary: This paper presents an analytical framework to study the geometry arising when a soft continuum arm grasps a planar object. Both the arm centerline and the object boundary are modeled as smooth curves. The grasping problem is formulated as a kinematic boundary following problem, in which the object boundary acts as the arm's 'shadow curve'. This formulation leads to a set of reduced kinematic equations expressed in terms of relative geometric shape variables, with the arm curvature serving as the control input. An optimal control problem is formulated to determine feasible arm shapes that achieve optimal grasping configurations, and its solution is obtained using Pontryagin's Maximum Principle. Based on the resulting optimal grasp kinematics, a class of continuum grasp quality metrics is proposed using the algebraic properties of the associated continuum grasp map. Feedback control aspects in the dynamic setting are also discussed. The proposed methodology is illustrated through systematic numerical simulations.

AI.tldr: 提出分析软体连续臂抓取平面物体几何形状的框架，将抓取问题建模为运动学边界跟随问题，通过最优控制确定可行臂形，并基于连续抓取映射提出抓取质量度量
AI.motivation: 研究软体连续臂抓取平面物体时的几何特性，建立系统分析框架以理解抓取过程中的形状匹配和运动学约束
AI.method: 将臂中心线和物体边界建模为光滑曲线，将抓取问题表述为运动学边界跟随问题，建立简化运动学方程，使用庞特里亚金极大值原理求解最优控制问题，基于连续抓取映射代数特性提出抓取质量度量
AI.result: 建立了软体连续臂抓取平面物体的几何分析框架，推导出最优抓取构型，提出连续抓取质量度量方法，并通过系统数值仿真验证了方法论的有效性
AI.conclusion: 该框架为软体连续臂抓取提供了系统的几何分析和控制方法，能够确定最优抓取构型并评估抓取质量，为动态环境下的反馈控制奠定了基础

title: Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Solving Derivative-Constrained PDEs
summary: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) recast PDE solving as an optimisation problem in function space by minimising a residual-based objective, yet many applications require additional derivative-based relations that are just as fundamental as the governing equations. In this paper, we present Derivative-Constrained PINNs (DC-PINNs), a general framework that treats constrained PDE solving as an optimisation guided by a minimum objective function criterion where the physics resides in the minimum principle. DC-PINNs embed general nonlinear constraints on states and derivatives, e.g., bounds, monotonicity, convexity, incompressibility, computed efficiently via automatic differentiation, and they employ self-adaptive loss balancing to tune the influence of each objective, reducing reliance on manual hyperparameters and problem-specific architectures. DC-PINNs consistently reduce constraint violations and improve physical fidelity versus baseline PINN variants, representative hard-constraint formulations on benchmarks, including heat diffusion with bounds, financial volatilities with arbitrage-free, and fluid flow with vortices shed. Explicitly encoding derivative constraints stabilises training and steers optimisation toward physically admissible minima even when the PDE residual alone is small, providing reliable solutions of constrained PDEs grounded in energy minimum principles.

AI.tldr: DC-PINNs扩展PINNs框架，通过嵌入状态和导数的非线性约束（如边界、单调性、凸性、不可压缩性）来求解约束PDE，使用自适应损失平衡减少手动超参数依赖，在多个基准测试中优于基线PINN和硬约束方法。
AI.motivation: 传统PINNs将PDE求解转化为基于残差的目标函数优化问题，但许多应用需要额外的基于导数的约束条件，这些约束与支配方程同样重要。现有方法在处理这些约束时存在不足，需要更通用的框架来嵌入非线性约束并提高物理保真度。
AI.method: 提出DC-PINNs框架，将约束PDE求解转化为基于最小目标函数准则的优化问题，其中物理原理体现在最小原理中。方法包括：1）通过自动微分高效嵌入状态和导数的通用非线性约束；2）采用自适应损失平衡技术调节各目标函数的影响；3）减少对手动超参数和问题特定架构的依赖。
AI.result: DC-PINNs在多个基准测试中（包括带边界的热扩散、无套利金融波动率、带涡旋脱落的流体流动）相比基线PINN变体和代表性硬约束方法，能持续减少约束违反并提高物理保真度。显式编码导数约束能稳定训练过程，即使PDE残差较小时也能引导优化朝向物理可接受的最小值。
AI.conclusion: DC-PINNs提供了一个通用框架，通过显式编码导数约束来求解约束PDE，基于能量最小原理提供可靠解。该方法通过自适应损失平衡减少超参数依赖，在多种物理问题上表现出优越性能，为基于最小原理的约束PDE求解提供了新途径。

title: GeoLink: A 3D-Aware Framework Towards Better Generalization in Cross-View Geo-Localization
summary: Generalizable cross-view geo-localization aims to match the same location across views in unseen regions and conditions without GPS supervision. Its core difficulty lies in severe semantic inconsistency caused by viewpoint variation and poor generalization under domain shift. Existing methods mainly rely on 2D correspondence, but they are easily distracted by redundant shared information across views, leading to less transferable representations. To address this, we propose GeoLink, a 3D-aware semantic-consistent framework for Generalizable cross-view geo-localization. Specifically, we offline reconstruct scene point clouds from multi-view drone images using VGGT, providing stable structural priors. Based on these 3D anchors, we improve 2D representation learning in two complementary ways. A Geometric-aware Semantic Refinement module mitigates potentially redundant and view-biased dependencies in 2D features under 3D guidance. In addition, a Unified View Relation Distillation module transfers 3D structural relations to 2D features, improving cross-view alignment while preserving a 2D-only inference pipeline. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks show that GeoLink consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods and achieves superior generalization across unseen domains and diverse weather environments.

AI.tldr: GeoLink：基于3D感知的语义一致性框架，用于可泛化的跨视角地理定位，通过3D结构先验改进2D表示学习，提升在未见区域和条件下的定位性能。
AI.motivation: 可泛化跨视角地理定位的核心难点在于视角变化导致的严重语义不一致性，以及领域偏移下的泛化能力差。现有基于2D对应关系的方法容易被跨视角冗余共享信息干扰，导致表示可迁移性差。
AI.method: 提出GeoLink框架：1）使用VGGT从多视角无人机图像离线重建场景点云，提供稳定的3D结构先验；2）几何感知语义细化模块在3D指导下缓解2D特征中的冗余和视角偏差依赖；3）统一视角关系蒸馏模块将3D结构关系转移到2D特征，改善跨视角对齐，同时保持仅需2D推理的流程。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上的广泛实验表明，GeoLink始终优于最先进方法，并在未见领域和多样化天气环境中实现了卓越的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: GeoLink通过3D结构先验指导2D表示学习，有效解决了跨视角地理定位中的语义不一致和泛化难题，为无GPS监督的地理定位提供了更鲁棒和可泛化的解决方案。

title: EMGFlow: Robust and Efficient Surface Electromyography Synthesis via Flow Matching
summary: Deep learning-based surface electromyography (sEMG) gesture recognition is frequently bottlenecked by data scarcity and limited subject diversity. While synthetic data generation via Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) and diffusion models has emerged as a promising augmentation strategy, these approaches often face challenges regarding training stability or inference efficiency. To bridge this gap, we propose EMGFlow, a conditional sEMG generation framework. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to investigate the application of Flow Matching (FM) and continuous-time generative modeling in the sEMG domain. To validate EMGFlow across three benchmark sEMG datasets, we employ a unified evaluation protocol integrating feature-based fidelity, distributional geometry, and downstream utility. Extensive evaluations show that EMGFlow outperforms conventional augmentation and GAN baselines, and provides stronger standalone utility than the diffusion baselines considered here under the train-on-synthetic test-on-real (TSTR) protocol. Furthermore, by optimizing generation dynamics through advanced numerical solvers and targeted time sampling, EMGFlow achieves improved quality-efficiency trade-offs. Taken together, these results suggest that Flow Matching is a promising and efficient paradigm for addressing data bottlenecks in myoelectric control systems. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Open-EXG/EMGFlow.

AI.tldr: EMGFlow：首个将Flow Matching和连续时间生成建模应用于表面肌电信号生成的条件生成框架，在三个基准数据集上优于传统增强方法和GAN基线，在合成训练-真实测试协议下比扩散模型基线具有更强的独立效用。
AI.motivation: 基于深度学习的表面肌电信号手势识别常受数据稀缺和受试者多样性有限的瓶颈制约。虽然基于GAN和扩散模型的合成数据生成已成为有前景的增强策略，但这些方法在训练稳定性或推理效率方面面临挑战。
AI.method: 提出EMGFlow，一个条件表面肌电信号生成框架，首次将Flow Matching和连续时间生成建模应用于肌电信号领域。通过先进的数值求解器和针对性时间采样优化生成动态，实现质量-效率权衡的改进。
AI.result: 在三个基准表面肌电信号数据集上的广泛评估表明，EMGFlow优于传统增强方法和GAN基线，在合成训练-真实测试协议下比考虑的扩散模型基线具有更强的独立效用。通过优化生成动态，实现了改进的质量-效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: Flow Matching是解决肌电控制系统数据瓶颈的一个有前景且高效的范式。EMGFlow为表面肌电信号生成提供了稳定高效的解决方案，代码已开源。

title: PatchPoison: Poisoning Multi-View Datasets to Degrade 3D Reconstruction
comment: CVPR Workshop on Security, Privacy, and Adversarial Robustness in 3D Generative Vision Models (SPAR-3D), 2026
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has recently enabled highly photorealistic 3D reconstruction from casually captured multi-view images. However, this accessibility raises a privacy concern: publicly available images or videos can be exploited to reconstruct detailed 3D models of scenes or objects without the owner's consent. We present PatchPoison, a lightweight dataset-poisoning method that prevents unauthorized 3D reconstruction. Unlike global perturbations, PatchPoison injects a small high-frequency adversarial patch, a structured checkerboard, into the periphery of each image in a multi-view dataset. The patch is designed to corrupt the feature-matching stage of Structure-from-Motion (SfM) pipelines such as COLMAP by introducing spurious correspondences that systematically misalign estimated camera poses. Consequently, downstream 3DGS optimization diverges from the correct scene geometry. On the NeRF-Synthetic benchmark, inserting a 12 X 12 pixel patch increases reconstruction error by 6.8x in LPIPS, while the poisoned images remain unobtrusive to human viewers. PatchPoison requires no pipeline modifications, offering a practical, "drop-in" preprocessing step for content creators to protect their multi-view data.

AI.tldr: PatchPoison是一种轻量级数据集投毒方法，通过在图像边缘注入微小高频对抗性补丁来防止未经授权的3D高斯溅射重建，破坏SfM特征匹配而不影响人眼感知。
AI.motivation: 3D高斯溅射技术使得从多视角图像进行高真实感3D重建变得容易，但这也带来了隐私风险：公开的图像或视频可能被未经授权地用于重建详细3D模型。需要一种保护多视角数据的方法。
AI.method: PatchPoison在每张多视角图像的边缘注入一个微小的高频对抗性补丁（结构化棋盘格）。该补丁专门设计用于破坏SfM流水线（如COLMAP）的特征匹配阶段，通过引入虚假对应关系来系统性地误导相机姿态估计，从而影响下游3DGS优化。
AI.result: 在NeRF-Synthetic基准测试中，仅插入12×12像素的补丁就能使重建误差（LPIPS）增加6.8倍，而投毒后的图像对人眼观察者来说仍然不显眼。该方法无需修改重建流水线。
AI.conclusion: PatchPoison提供了一种实用的"即插即用"预处理方法，内容创作者可以通过这种轻量级数据集投毒技术保护其多视角数据，防止未经授权的3D重建，同时保持图像对人眼的可接受性。

title: Lyra 2.0: Explorable Generative 3D Worlds
summary: Recent advances in video generation enable a new paradigm for 3D scene creation: generating camera-controlled videos that simulate scene walkthroughs, then lifting them to 3D via feed-forward reconstruction techniques. This generative reconstruction approach combines the visual fidelity and creative capacity of video models with 3D outputs ready for real-time rendering and simulation. Scaling to large, complex environments requires 3D-consistent video generation over long camera trajectories with large viewpoint changes and location revisits, a setting where current video models degrade quickly. Existing methods for long-horizon generation are fundamentally limited by two forms of degradation: spatial forgetting and temporal drifting. As exploration proceeds, previously observed regions fall outside the model's temporal context, forcing the model to hallucinate structures when revisited. Meanwhile, autoregressive generation accumulates small synthesis errors over time, gradually distorting scene appearance and geometry. We present Lyra 2.0, a framework for generating persistent, explorable 3D worlds at scale. To address spatial forgetting, we maintain per-frame 3D geometry and use it solely for information routing -- retrieving relevant past frames and establishing dense correspondences with the target viewpoints -- while relying on the generative prior for appearance synthesis. To address temporal drifting, we train with self-augmented histories that expose the model to its own degraded outputs, teaching it to correct drift rather than propagate it. Together, these enable substantially longer and 3D-consistent video trajectories, which we leverage to fine-tune feed-forward reconstruction models that reliably recover high-quality 3D scenes.

AI.tldr: Lyra 2.0是一个生成持久可探索3D世界的框架，通过解决视频生成中的空间遗忘和时间漂移问题，实现大规模3D场景创建
AI.motivation: 当前视频生成模型在长相机轨迹、大视角变化和位置重访时存在空间遗忘和时间漂移问题，限制了生成3D一致视频的能力，从而阻碍了大规模3D场景的创建
AI.method: 1) 为解决空间遗忘：维护每帧3D几何信息用于信息路由（检索相关历史帧并建立与目标视角的密集对应），同时依赖生成先验进行外观合成；2) 为解决时间漂移：使用自增强历史数据进行训练，让模型接触自身退化的输出，学习纠正而非传播漂移
AI.result: 实现了显著更长且3D一致的视频轨迹，利用这些轨迹微调前馈重建模型，可靠地恢复高质量3D场景
AI.conclusion: Lyra 2.0通过解决长时视频生成中的空间遗忘和时间漂移问题，实现了大规模、持久可探索3D世界的生成，将视频模型的视觉保真度和创造力与实时渲染就绪的3D输出相结合

title: Incremental Semantics-Aided Meshing from LiDAR-Inertial Odometry and RGB Direct Label Transfer
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables. Accepted in ISPRS Archives 2026
summary: Geometric high-fidelity mesh reconstruction from LiDAR-inertial scans remains challenging in large, complex indoor environments -- such as cultural buildings -- where point cloud sparsity, geometric drift, and fixed fusion parameters produce holes, over-smoothing, and spurious surfaces at structural boundaries. We propose a modular, incremental RGB+LiDAR pipeline that generates incremental semantics-aided high-quality meshes from indoor scans through scan frame-based direct label transfer. A vision foundation model labels each incoming RGB frame; labels are incrementally projected and fused onto a LiDAR-inertial odometry map; and an incremental semantics-aware Truncated Signed Distance Function (TSDF) fusion step produces the final mesh via marching cubes. This frame-level fusion strategy preserves the geometric fidelity of LiDAR while leveraging rich visual semantics to resolve geometric ambiguities at reconstruction boundaries caused by LiDAR point-cloud sparsity and geometric drift. We demonstrate that semantic guidance improves geometric reconstruction quality; quantitative evaluation is therefore performed using geometric metrics on the Oxford Spires dataset, while results from the NTU VIRAL dataset are analyzed qualitatively. The proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art geometric baselines ImMesh and Voxblox, demonstrating the benefit of semantics-aided fusion for geometric mesh quality. The resulting semantically labelled meshes are of value when reconstructing Universal Scene Description (USD) assets, offering a path from indoor LiDAR scanning to XR and digital modeling.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种模块化、增量式的RGB+LiDAR管道，通过扫描帧级直接标签传输，从室内扫描生成增量语义辅助的高质量网格，利用视觉语义解决LiDAR点云稀疏性和几何漂移导致的边界模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 在大型复杂室内环境（如文化建筑）中，从LiDAR惯性扫描进行几何高保真网格重建仍然具有挑战性。点云稀疏性、几何漂移和固定融合参数会导致结构边界出现空洞、过度平滑和虚假表面。
AI.method: 提出模块化增量RGB+LiDAR管道：1) 视觉基础模型标记每个传入的RGB帧；2) 标签增量投影并融合到LiDAR惯性里程计地图；3) 增量语义感知TSDF融合步骤通过行进立方体生成最终网格。采用帧级融合策略，在保持LiDAR几何保真度的同时，利用丰富的视觉语义解决重建边界处的几何模糊问题。
AI.result: 在Oxford Spires数据集上使用几何指标进行定量评估，在NTU VIRAL数据集上进行定性分析。该方法在几何网格质量方面优于最先进的几何基线ImMesh和Voxblox，证明了语义辅助融合对几何网格质量的益处。
AI.conclusion: 语义指导提高了几何重建质量，生成的语义标记网格在重建通用场景描述资产方面具有价值，为从室内LiDAR扫描到XR和数字建模提供了路径。

title: SceneCritic: A Symbolic Evaluator for 3D Indoor Scene Synthesis
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs) increasingly generate indoor scenes through intermediate structures such as layouts and scene graphs, yet evaluation still relies on LLM or VLM judges that score rendered views, making judgments sensitive to viewpoint, prompt phrasing, and hallucination. When the evaluator is unstable, it becomes difficult to determine whether a model has produced a spatially plausible scene or whether the output score reflects the choice of viewpoint, rendering, or prompt. We introduce SceneCritic, a symbolic evaluator for floor-plan-level layouts. SceneCritic's constraints are grounded in SceneOnto, a structured spatial ontology we construct by aggregating indoor scene priors from 3D-FRONT, ScanNet, and Visual Genome. SceneOnto traverses this ontology to jointly verify semantic, orientation, and geometric coherence across object relationships, providing object-level and relationship-level assessments that identify specific violations and successful placements. Furthermore, we pair SceneCritic with an iterative refinement test bed that probes how models build and revise spatial structure under different critic modalities: a rule-based critic using collision constraints as feedback, an LLM critic operating on the layout as text, and a VLM critic operating on rendered observations. Through extensive experiments, we show that (a) SceneCritic aligns substantially better with human judgments than VLM-based evaluators, (b) text-only LLMs can outperform VLMs on semantic layout quality, and (c) image-based VLM refinement is the most effective critic modality for semantic and orientation correction.

AI.tldr: SceneCritic：基于符号化空间本体论（SceneOnto）的室内场景布局评估器，通过语义、朝向和几何一致性验证，比基于VLM的评估器更稳定且与人类判断更一致。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM/VLM生成室内场景时依赖布局和场景图等中间结构，但评估仍使用LLM/VLM作为评判者，导致评分受视角、提示词和幻觉影响而不稳定。需要一种可靠的符号化评估方法来准确判断场景的空间合理性。
AI.method: 1. 构建SceneOnto空间本体论，聚合3D-FRONT、ScanNet和Visual Genome的室内场景先验知识；2. 开发SceneCritic符号评估器，遍历本体论验证语义、朝向和几何一致性；3. 建立迭代精化测试平台，比较基于规则的碰撞约束、基于文本的LLM和基于图像的VLM三种批评模式的效果。
AI.result: 1. SceneCritic与人类判断的一致性显著优于VLM评估器；2. 纯文本LLM在语义布局质量上可以超越VLM；3. 基于图像的VLM精化在语义和朝向校正方面最有效。
AI.conclusion: SceneCritic提供了一种稳定可靠的符号化评估框架，能够准确评估室内场景布局的空间合理性，并为不同批评模式的效果提供了实证分析，为场景生成模型的评估和改进提供了新方法。

title: Leveraging LLM-GNN Integration for Open-World Question Answering over Knowledge Graphs
summary: Open-world Question Answering (OW-QA) over knowledge graphs (KGs) aims to answer questions over incomplete or evolving KGs. Traditional KGQA assumes a closed world where answers must exist in the KG, limiting real-world applicability. In contrast, open-world QA requires inferring missing knowledge based on graph structure and context. Large language models (LLMs) excel at language understanding but lack structured reasoning. Graph neural networks (GNNs) model graph topology but struggle with semantic interpretation. Existing systems integrate LLMs with GNNs or graph retrievers. Some support open-world QA but rely on structural embeddings without semantic grounding. Most assume observed paths or complete graphs, making them unreliable under missing links or multi-hop reasoning. We present GLOW, a hybrid system that combines a pre-trained GNN and an LLM for open-world KGQA. The GNN predicts top-k candidate answers from the graph structure. These, along with relevant KG facts, are serialized into a structured prompt (e.g., triples and candidates) to guide the LLM's reasoning. This enables joint reasoning over symbolic and semantic signals, without relying on retrieval or fine-tuning. To evaluate generalization, we introduce GLOW-BENCH, a 1,000-question benchmark over incomplete KGs across diverse domains. GLOW outperforms existing LLM-GNN systems on standard benchmarks and GLOW-BENCH, achieving up to 53.3% and an average 38% improvement. GitHub code and data are available.

AI.tldr: GLOW是一个结合预训练GNN和LLM的混合系统，用于开放世界知识图谱问答，通过GNN从图结构中预测候选答案，然后序列化为结构化提示指导LLM推理，在标准基准和新的GLOW-BENCH上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统KGQA假设封闭世界，要求答案必须存在于知识图谱中，限制了实际应用。开放世界QA需要基于图结构和上下文推断缺失知识。现有方法要么依赖结构嵌入缺乏语义基础，要么假设完整图谱或观察路径，在缺失链接或多跳推理下不可靠。
AI.method: 提出GLOW混合系统：1) 预训练GNN从图结构预测top-k候选答案；2) 将候选答案和相关KG事实序列化为结构化提示（如三元组和候选）；3) 使用该提示指导LLM进行推理，实现符号和语义信号的联合推理，无需检索或微调。
AI.result: 在标准基准和新提出的GLOW-BENCH（包含1000个问题的不完整知识图谱跨域基准）上评估。GLOW优于现有LLM-GNN系统，在标准基准上提升达53.3%，平均提升38%。
AI.conclusion: GLOW通过结合GNN的结构推理能力和LLM的语义理解能力，有效解决了开放世界知识图谱问答问题，在不完整图谱上表现出强大的泛化能力，为实际应用提供了可靠解决方案。

title: SafeMind: A Risk-Aware Differentiable Control Framework for Adaptive and Safe Quadruped Locomotion
summary: Learning-based quadruped controllers achieve impressive agility but typically lack formal safety guarantees under model uncertainty, perception noise, and unstructured contact conditions. We introduce SafeMind, a differentiable stochastic safety-control framework that unifies probabilistic Control Barrier Functions with semantic context understanding and meta-adaptive risk calibration. SafeMind explicitly models epistemic and aleatoric uncertainty through a variance-aware barrier constraint embedded in a differentiable quadratic program, thereby preserving gradient flow for end-to-end training. A semantics-to-constraint encoder modulates safety margins using perceptual or language cues, while a meta-adaptive learner continuously adjusts risk sensitivity across environments. We provide theoretical conditions for probabilistic forward invariance, feasibility, and stability under stochastic dynamics. SafeMind is deployed on Unitree A1 and ANYmal C at 200~Hz and validated across 12 terrain types, dynamic obstacles, morphology perturbations, and semantically defined tasks. Experiments show that SafeMind reduces safety violations by 3--10x and energy consumption by 10--15% relative to state-of-the-art CBF, MPC, and hybrid RL baselines, while maintaining real-time control performance.

AI.tldr: SafeMind：一种可微分的随机安全控制框架，将概率控制屏障函数与语义上下文理解和元自适应风险校准相结合，为四足机器人在不确定环境下提供形式化安全保证
AI.motivation: 基于学习的四足控制器虽然实现了令人印象深刻的敏捷性，但通常缺乏在模型不确定性、感知噪声和非结构化接触条件下的形式化安全保证。现有方法难以在动态环境中同时处理认知不确定性和偶然不确定性，需要一种能够统一安全控制与语义理解的框架。
AI.method: SafeMind框架包含：1）通过方差感知屏障约束嵌入可微二次规划的概率控制屏障函数，显式建模认知和偶然不确定性；2）语义到约束编码器，利用感知或语言线索调节安全边界；3）元自适应学习器，跨环境连续调整风险敏感性。该框架保持端到端训练的梯度流，并提供随机动力学下的概率前向不变性、可行性和稳定性理论条件。
AI.result: 在Unitree A1和ANYmal C平台上以200Hz部署，验证了12种地形类型、动态障碍物、形态扰动和语义定义任务。实验表明，相对于最先进的CBF、MPC和混合RL基线，SafeMind将安全违规减少了3-10倍，能耗降低了10-15%，同时保持实时控制性能。
AI.conclusion: SafeMind成功地将概率安全保证与语义上下文理解相结合，为四足机器人在复杂不确定环境中提供了形式化的安全控制框架。该框架不仅显著提高了安全性，还降低了能耗，为实际部署中的学习型控制器提供了可靠的安全保障。

title: Automatically Inferring Teachers' Geometric Content Knowledge: A Skills Based Approach
comment: The work is accepted for publication as a full paper (Main Track) at the 27th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education (AIED 2026)
summary: Assessing teachers' geometric content knowledge is essential for geometry instructional quality and student learning, but difficult to scale. The Van Hiele model characterizes geometric reasoning through five hierarchical levels. Traditional Van Hiele assessment relies on manual expert analysis of open-ended responses. This process is time-consuming, costly, and prevents large-scale evaluation. This study develops an automated approach for diagnosing teachers' Van Hiele reasoning levels using large language models grounded in educational theory. Our central hypothesis is that integrating explicit skills information significantly improves Van Hiele classification. In collaboration with mathematics education researchers, we built a structured skills dictionary decomposing the Van Hiele levels into 33 fine-grained reasoning skills. Through a custom web platform, 31 pre-service teachers solved geometry problems, yielding 226 responses. Expert researchers then annotated each response with its Van Hiele level and demonstrated skills from the dictionary. Using this annotated dataset, we implemented two classification approaches: (1) retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and (2) multi-task learning (MTL). Each approach compared a skills-aware variant incorporating the skills dictionary against a baseline without skills information. Results showed that for both methods, skills-aware variants significantly outperformed baselines across multiple evaluation metrics. This work provides the first automated approach for Van Hiele level classification from open-ended responses. It offers a scalable, theory-grounded method for assessing teachers' geometric reasoning that can enable large-scale evaluation and support adaptive, personalized teacher learning systems.

AI.tldr: 开发基于大语言模型的自动化方法，通过整合显式技能信息来诊断教师的范希尔几何推理水平，显著提升分类性能
AI.motivation: 评估教师的几何内容知识对几何教学质量和学生学习至关重要，但传统范希尔评估依赖专家手动分析开放式回答，耗时耗力且难以大规模实施
AI.method: 与数学教育研究者合作构建结构化技能词典，将范希尔水平分解为33个细粒度推理技能；收集31名职前教师的226个几何问题回答，专家标注范希尔水平和技能；实现两种分类方法：检索增强生成(RAG)和多任务学习(MTL)，每种方法都对比了整合技能信息的变体与无技能信息的基线
AI.result: 对于两种方法，整合技能信息的变体在多个评估指标上均显著优于基线，证明了显式技能信息对范希尔分类的重要改进作用
AI.conclusion: 首次实现了从开放式回答中自动分类范希尔水平的方法，提供了可扩展、理论基础的教师几何推理评估方法，能够支持大规模评估和自适应个性化教师学习系统

title: Adaptor: Advancing Assistive Teleoperation with Few-Shot Learning and Cross-Operator Generalization
comment: Accepted to the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2026)
summary: Assistive teleoperation enhances efficiency via shared control, yet inter-operator variability, stemming from diverse habits and expertise, induces highly heterogeneous trajectory distributions that undermine intent recognition stability. We present Adaptor, a few-shot framework for robust cross-operator intent recognition. The Adaptor bridges the domain gap through two stages: (i) preprocessing, which models intent uncertainty by synthesizing trajectory perturbations via noise injection and performs geometry-aware keyframe extraction; and (ii) policy learning, which encodes the processed trajectories with an Intention Expert and fuses them with the pre-trained vision-language model context to condition an Action Expert for action generation. Experiments on real-world and simulated benchmarks demonstrate that Adaptor achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving success rates and efficiency over baselines. Moreover, the method exhibits low variance across operators with varying expertise, demonstrating robust cross-operator generalization.

AI.tldr: Adaptor：一个用于鲁棒跨操作者意图识别的少样本框架，通过噪声注入合成轨迹扰动和几何感知关键帧提取来建模意图不确定性，结合意图专家编码和预训练视觉语言模型进行动作生成。
AI.motivation: 辅助遥操作通过共享控制提高效率，但不同操作者因习惯和专业知识差异导致高度异构的轨迹分布，这会破坏意图识别的稳定性。需要解决跨操作者意图识别中的领域差距问题。
AI.method: Adaptor框架包含两个阶段：1) 预处理阶段：通过噪声注入合成轨迹扰动来建模意图不确定性，并进行几何感知关键帧提取；2) 策略学习阶段：使用意图专家编码处理后的轨迹，将其与预训练视觉语言模型上下文融合，条件化动作专家进行动作生成。
AI.result: 在真实世界和模拟基准测试中，Adaptor实现了最先进的性能，相比基线方法提高了成功率和效率。此外，该方法在不同专业水平的操作者间表现出低方差，展示了鲁棒的跨操作者泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Adaptor框架通过建模意图不确定性和融合多模态信息，有效解决了辅助遥操作中跨操作者意图识别的挑战，实现了稳定且高效的共享控制。

title: Visual Preference Optimization with Rubric Rewards
summary: The effectiveness of Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) depends on preference data that reflect the quality differences that matter in multimodal tasks. Existing pipelines often rely on off-policy perturbations or coarse outcome-based signals, which are not well suited to fine-grained visual reasoning. We propose rDPO, a preference optimization framework based on instance-specific rubrics. For each image-instruction pair, we create a checklist-style rubric of essential and additional criteria to score responses from any possible policies. The instruction-rubric pool is built offline and reused during the construction of on-policy data. On public reward modeling benchmarks, rubric-based prompting massively improves a 30B-A3B judge and brings it close to GPT-5.4. On public downstream benchmarks, rubric-based filtering raises the macro average to 82.69, whereas outcome-based filtering drops it to 75.82 from 81.14. When evaluating scalability on a comprehensive benchmark, rDPO achieves 61.01, markedly outperforming the style-constrained baseline (52.36) and surpassing the 59.48 base model. Together, these results show that visual preference optimization benefits from combining on-policy data construction with instance-specific criterion-level feedback.

AI.tldr: rDPO：基于实例特定量规的多模态偏好优化框架，通过检查表式量规提供细粒度反馈，显著提升视觉推理任务的性能
AI.motivation: 现有DPO方法依赖离策略扰动或粗粒度结果信号，不适合细粒度视觉推理任务。需要更精细的偏好数据来反映多模态任务中的质量差异
AI.method: 提出rDPO框架：为每个图像-指令对创建检查表式量规，包含基本和附加标准来评分任何策略的响应。离线构建指令-量规池，在在线策略数据构建中重复使用
AI.result: 在奖励建模基准上，量规提示大幅改进30B-A3B评判器，接近GPT-5.4水平。下游基准上，量规过滤将宏观平均提升至82.69，而结果过滤降至75.82。综合基准评估显示rDPO达到61.01，显著优于风格约束基线(52.36)和基础模型(59.48)
AI.conclusion: 视觉偏好优化受益于在线策略数据构建与实例特定标准级反馈的结合，量规方法为多模态任务提供了更有效的偏好优化框架

title: [Emerging Ideas] Artificial Tripartite Intelligence: A Bio-Inspired, Sensor-First Architecture for Physical AI
summary: As AI moves from data centers to robots and wearables, scaling ever-larger models becomes insufficient. Physical AI operates under tight latency, energy, privacy, and reliability constraints, and its performance depends not only on model capacity but also on how signals are acquired through controllable sensors in dynamic environments. We present Artificial Tripartite Intelligence (ATI), a bio-inspired, sensor-first architectural contract for physical AI. ATI is tripartite at the systems level: a Brainstem (L1) provides reflexive safety and signal-integrity control, a Cerebellum (L2) performs continuous sensor calibration, and a Cerebral Inference Subsystem spanning L3/L4 supports routine skill selection and execution, coordination, and deep reasoning. This modular organization allows sensor control, adaptive sensing, edge-cloud execution, and foundation model reasoning to co-evolve within one closed-loop architecture, while keeping time-critical sensing and control on device and invoking higher-level inference only when needed. We instantiate ATI in a mobile camera prototype under dynamic lighting and motion. In our routed evaluation (L3-L4 split inference), compared to the default auto-exposure setting, ATI (L1/L2 adaptive sensing) improves end-to-end accuracy from 53.8% to 88% while reducing remote L4 invocations by 43.3%. These results show the value of co-designing sensing and inference for embodied AI.

AI.tldr: ATI是一种受生物启发的传感器优先架构，用于物理AI系统，通过三层模块化设计实现传感与推理的协同优化，在动态环境中显著提升端到端精度并减少远程推理调用。
AI.motivation: 随着AI从数据中心扩展到机器人和可穿戴设备，仅扩大模型规模已不足够。物理AI面临严格的延迟、能耗、隐私和可靠性约束，其性能不仅取决于模型容量，还取决于如何在动态环境中通过可控传感器获取信号。
AI.method: 提出人工三重智能(ATI)架构：脑干(L1)提供反射性安全和信号完整性控制；小脑(L2)执行连续传感器校准；大脑推理子系统(L3/L4)支持常规技能选择执行、协调和深度推理。该模块化设计允许传感控制、自适应感知、边缘-云执行和基础模型推理在闭环架构中协同进化。
AI.result: 在移动相机原型测试中，与默认自动曝光设置相比，ATI(L1/L2自适应感知)将端到端精度从53.8%提升至88%，同时减少43.3%的远程L4调用。路由评估(L3-L4分割推理)验证了架构有效性。
AI.conclusion: ATI展示了传感与推理协同设计对具身AI的价值，通过模块化分层架构在保持设备端时间关键传感控制的同时，按需调用高级推理，显著提升系统性能。

title: Musculoskeletal Motion Imitation for Learning Personalized Exoskeleton Control Policy in Impaired Gait
summary: Designing generalizable control policies for lower-limb exoskeletons remains fundamentally constrained by exhaustive data collection or iterative optimization procedures, which limit accessibility to clinical populations. To address this challenge, we introduce a device-agnostic framework that combines physiologically plausible musculoskeletal simulation with reinforcement learning to enable scalable personalized exoskeleton assistance for both able-bodied and clinical populations. Our control policies not only generate physiologically plausible locomotion dynamics but also capture clinically observed compensatory strategies under targeted muscular deficits, providing a unified computational model of both healthy and pathological gait. Without task-specific tuning, the resulting exoskeleton control policies produce assistive torque profiles at the hip and ankle that align with state-of-the-art profiles validated in human experiments, while consistently reducing metabolic cost across walking speeds. For simulated impaired-gait models, the learned control policies yield asymmetric, deficit-specific exoskeleton assistance that improves both energetic efficiency and bilateral kinematic symmetry without explicit prescription of the target gait pattern. These results demonstrate that physiologically plausible musculoskeletal simulation via reinforcement learning can serve as a scalable foundation for personalized exoskeleton control across both able-bodied and clinical populations, eliminating the need for extensive physical trials.

AI.tldr: 提出基于肌肉骨骼模拟与强化学习的设备无关框架，用于为健全和临床人群生成个性化外骨骼控制策略，无需大量物理试验。
AI.motivation: 传统下肢外骨骼控制策略设计依赖大量数据收集或迭代优化，限制了临床人群的可及性，需要更可扩展的个性化辅助方法。
AI.method: 结合生理合理的肌肉骨骼模拟与强化学习，构建设备无关框架，生成个性化外骨骼控制策略，适用于健全和临床人群的步态模式。
AI.result: 控制策略生成与实验验证一致的髋踝辅助力矩，降低代谢成本；对模拟受损步态模型，提供非对称、缺陷特异性辅助，改善能量效率和双侧运动对称性。
AI.conclusion: 生理合理的肌肉骨骼模拟结合强化学习可作为可扩展基础，为健全和临床人群提供个性化外骨骼控制，无需大量物理试验。

title: A Bayesian Framework for Uncertainty-Aware Explanations in Power Quality Disturbance Classification
summary: Advanced deep learning methods have shown remarkable success in power quality disturbance (PQD) classification. To enhance model transparency, explainable AI (XAI) techniques have been developed to provide instance-specific interpretations of classifier decisions. However, conventional XAI methods yield deterministic explanations, overlooking uncertainty and limiting reliability in safety-critical applications. This paper proposes a Bayesian explanation framework that models explanation uncertainty by generating a relevance attribution distribution for each instance. This method allows experts to select explanations based on confidence percentiles, thereby tailoring interpretability according to specific disturbance types. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world power quality datasets demonstrate that the proposed framework improves the transparency and reliability of PQD classifiers through uncertainty-aware explanations.

AI.tldr: 提出贝叶斯解释框架，通过生成每个实例的相关性归因分布来建模解释不确定性，提高电力质量扰动分类器的透明度和可靠性
AI.motivation: 传统可解释AI方法产生确定性解释，忽略了不确定性，限制了在安全关键应用中的可靠性。需要为电力质量扰动分类提供考虑不确定性的解释框架。
AI.method: 提出贝叶斯解释框架，为每个实例生成相关性归因分布，建模解释的不确定性。专家可以根据置信百分位数选择解释，针对特定扰动类型定制可解释性。
AI.result: 在合成和真实世界电力质量数据集上的广泛实验表明，该框架通过不确定性感知的解释提高了PQD分类器的透明度和可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的贝叶斯解释框架能够有效建模解释不确定性，为电力质量扰动分类提供更可靠和透明的解释，适用于安全关键应用。

title: PhysInOne: Visual Physics Learning and Reasoning in One Suite
comment: CVPR 2026. Siyuan, Hejun, Hu, Jinxi, Dongsheng, Junwei, Yixiao, Jiayue, and Shiwei are co-first authors. Project page: https://vlar-group.github.io/PhysInOne.html
summary: We present PhysInOne, a large-scale synthetic dataset addressing the critical scarcity of physically-grounded training data for AI systems. Unlike existing datasets limited to merely hundreds or thousands of examples, PhysInOne provides 2 million videos across 153,810 dynamic 3D scenes, covering 71 basic physical phenomena in mechanics, optics, fluid dynamics, and magnetism. Distinct from previous works, our scenes feature multiobject interactions against complex backgrounds, with comprehensive ground-truth annotations including 3D geometry, semantics, dynamic motion, physical properties, and text descriptions. We demonstrate PhysInOne's efficacy across four emerging applications: physics-aware video generation, long-/short-term future frame prediction, physical property estimation, and motion transfer. Experiments show that fine-tuning foundation models on PhysInOne significantly enhances physical plausibility, while also exposing critical gaps in modeling complex physical dynamics and estimating intrinsic properties. As the largest dataset of its kind, orders of magnitude beyond prior works, PhysInOne establishes a new benchmark for advancing physics-grounded world models in generation, simulation, and embodied AI.

AI.tldr: PhysInOne是一个包含200万视频、15.3万动态3D场景的大规模合成数据集，涵盖71种物理现象，为物理基础AI系统提供训练数据。
AI.motivation: 当前AI系统缺乏物理基础的训练数据，现有数据集仅包含数百或数千个示例，无法满足物理建模需求。
AI.method: 创建大规模合成数据集，包含多物体交互、复杂背景，并提供3D几何、语义、动态运动、物理属性和文本描述等全面的真实标注。
AI.result: 在四个应用领域验证有效性：物理感知视频生成、长短时未来帧预测、物理属性估计和运动迁移。微调基础模型显著提升物理合理性，同时暴露了复杂物理动态建模和内在属性估计的差距。
AI.conclusion: PhysInOne作为同类最大数据集，比先前工作大几个数量级，为推进物理基础世界模型在生成、仿真和具身AI中建立了新基准。

title: Representation geometry shapes task performance in vision-language modeling for CT enterography
summary: Computed tomography (CT) enterography is a primary imaging modality for assessing inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), yet the representational choices that best support automated analysis of this modality are unknown. We present the first study of vision-language transfer learning on abdominal CT enterography and identify two main findings. First, mean pooling of slice embeddings gives better categorical disease assessment (59.2\% three-class accuracy), whereas attention pooling gives better cross-modal retrieval (0.235 text-to-image MRR). This pattern holds across all LoRA configurations tested and suggests that the two aggregators emphasize different properties of the learned representation. Second, per-slice tissue contrast matters more than broader spatial coverage: multi-window RGB encoding, which maps complementary Hounsfield Unit windows to RGB channels, outperforms all strategies that increase spatial coverage through multiplanar sampling, and in this setting adding coronal and sagittal views reduces classification performance. For report generation, fine-tuning without retrieval context yields within-1 severity accuracy at the prevalence-matched chance level (70.4\% vs.\ 71\% random), suggesting little learned ordering beyond the class distribution. Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) improves this across all configurations, scoring 7--14 percentage points above the chance baseline and improving ordinal MAE from 0.98 to 0.80--0.89. A three-teacher pseudolabel framework enables all comparisons without expert annotations. Together, these findings provide the first baselines for this underexplored modality and offer practical guidance for building vision-language systems for volumetric medical imaging.

AI.tldr: 该研究首次探索了腹部CT小肠造影的视觉-语言迁移学习，发现切片嵌入的平均池化更适合疾病分类，注意力池化更适合跨模态检索；多窗口RGB编码比多平面采样更有效；检索增强生成显著提升报告生成性能。
AI.motivation: CT小肠造影是评估炎症性肠病的主要成像方式，但支持该模态自动化分析的最佳表示选择尚不清楚。本研究旨在填补这一空白，为这一未充分探索的模态建立基线，并为构建体积医学成像的视觉-语言系统提供实用指导。
AI.method: 采用视觉-语言迁移学习方法，比较不同切片嵌入聚合策略（平均池化 vs 注意力池化）和图像编码策略（多窗口RGB编码 vs 多平面采样）。使用三教师伪标签框架进行无专家标注的比较，并评估检索增强生成在报告生成任务中的效果。
AI.result: 1) 平均池化在疾病分类任务上表现更好（59.2%三分类准确率），而注意力池化在跨模态检索上更优（0.235文本到图像MRR）；2) 多窗口RGB编码优于所有增加空间覆盖的多平面采样策略，添加冠状面和矢状面视图反而降低分类性能；3) 检索增强生成将报告生成的准确率提升7-14个百分点，将序数MAE从0.98改善到0.80-0.89。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为腹部CT小肠造影的视觉-语言学习提供了首个基线，发现切片级表示聚合策略和图像编码策略对任务性能有显著影响，检索增强生成能有效提升报告生成质量，为构建体积医学成像的视觉-语言系统提供了实用指导。

title: VAG: Dual-Stream Video-Action Generation for Embodied Data Synthesis
summary: Recent advances in robot foundation models trained on large-scale human teleoperation data have enabled robots to perform increasingly complex real-world tasks. However, scaling these systems remains difficult because collecting task-specific demonstrations is expensive and labor-intensive. Synthetic data, especially generated videos, offer a promising direction, but existing World Models (WMs) are not directly suitable for policy learning since they do not provide paired action trajectories. World-Action (WA) models partially address this by predicting actions with visual outputs, yet often lack strong video-action alignment, while two-stage pipelines that generate video first and then infer actions introduce inefficiency and error accumulation. To address these limitations, we propose VAG, a unified flow-matching-based dual-stream framework that jointly generates video and action under visual and language conditioning. By synchronizing denoising in both branches and using an adaptive 3D pooling mechanism to transfer compact global video context to the action branch, VAG improves cross-modal consistency during generation. Across both simulated and real-world settings, VAG produces aligned video-action pairs with competitive prediction quality, supports executable trajectory replay, and provides useful synthetic pretraining data that improves downstream policy generalization, indicating its potential as a practical world-action model for embodied data synthesis.

AI.tldr: VAG是一个统一的流匹配双流框架，联合生成视频和动作，通过同步去噪和自适应3D池化机制提高跨模态一致性，为机器人策略学习提供对齐的视频-动作对合成数据。
AI.motivation: 机器人基础模型需要大量人类遥操作数据进行训练，但收集任务特定演示成本高昂。现有世界模型不适合策略学习，因为它们不提供配对的动作轨迹；世界-动作模型虽然预测动作但缺乏视频-动作对齐；两阶段流水线效率低且误差累积。
AI.method: 提出VAG：基于流匹配的统一双流框架，在视觉和语言条件下联合生成视频和动作。通过同步两个分支的去噪过程，并使用自适应3D池化机制将紧凑的全局视频上下文传输到动作分支，提高生成过程中的跨模态一致性。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实世界设置中，VAG生成对齐的视频-动作对，具有竞争力的预测质量，支持可执行轨迹回放，并提供有用的合成预训练数据，改善下游策略泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: VAG作为一个实用的世界-动作模型，在具身数据合成方面具有潜力，能够生成高质量的对齐视频-动作对，支持机器人策略学习和泛化。

title: Calibrated Speculative Decoding: Frequency-Guided Candidate Selection for Efficient Inference
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates autoregressive generation by letting draft tokens bypass full verification, but conventional frameworks suffer from frequent false rejections, particularly when draft models produce semantically correct but lexically divergent outputs. In this paper, we present Calibrated Speculative Decoding (CSD), a training-free framework that recovers valid tokens discarded by standard verification. Guided by the principle of "Frequency-Guided Candidate Selection and Probability-Guarded Acceptance," CSD incorporates two lightweight modules: Online Correction Memory, which aggregates historical rejections to propose recurring divergence patterns as rescue candidates, and Semantic Consistency Gating, which verifies candidate admissibility using probability ratios instead of exact token matching. Our evaluation across diverse large language models demonstrates that CSD outperforms existing methods, achieving a peak throughput speedup of 2.33x. CSD preserves model accuracy across all tasks while further boosting performance on complex reasoning datasets. These results establish CSD as a highly effective, lightweight solution for practical LLM deployments.

AI.tldr: CSD是一种无需训练的推测解码框架，通过历史拒绝模式聚合和概率比验证来恢复被标准验证丢弃的有效标记，显著提升生成吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 传统推测解码框架存在频繁的虚假拒绝问题，特别是当草稿模型产生语义正确但词汇不同的输出时，导致有效标记被错误丢弃，限制了加速效果。
AI.method: 提出校准推测解码框架，包含两个轻量级模块：在线校正记忆（聚合历史拒绝模式作为救援候选）和语义一致性门控（使用概率比而非精确标记匹配验证候选可接受性）。
AI.result: 在多样化大语言模型上的评估显示，CSD优于现有方法，峰值吞吐量加速达到2.33倍，在所有任务上保持模型准确性，在复杂推理数据集上进一步提升性能。
AI.conclusion: CSD为实际LLM部署提供了一个高效、轻量级的解决方案，通过恢复被标准验证丢弃的有效标记，显著改善了推测解码的性能。

title: AI-Assisted Peer Review at Scale: The AAAI-26 AI Review Pilot
summary: Scientific peer review faces mounting strain as submission volumes surge, making it increasingly difficult to sustain review quality, consistency, and timeliness. Recent advances in AI have led the community to consider its use in peer review, yet a key unresolved question is whether AI can generate technically sound reviews at real-world conference scale. Here we report the first large-scale field deployment of AI-assisted peer review: every main-track submission at AAAI-26 received one clearly identified AI review from a state-of-the-art system. The system combined frontier models, tool use, and safeguards in a multi-stage process to generate reviews for all 22,977 full-review papers in less than a day. A large-scale survey of AAAI-26 authors and program committee members showed that participants not only found AI reviews useful, but actually preferred them to human reviews on key dimensions such as technical accuracy and research suggestions. We also introduce a novel benchmark and find that our system substantially outperforms a simple LLM-generated review baseline at detecting a variety of scientific weaknesses. Together, these results show that state-of-the-art AI methods can already make meaningful contributions to scientific peer review at conference scale, opening a path toward the next generation of synergistic human-AI teaming for evaluating research.

AI.tldr: AAAI-26首次大规模部署AI辅助同行评审，为22,977篇论文生成AI评审，参与者认为AI评审在技术准确性和研究建议方面优于人类评审。
AI.motivation: 科学同行评审面临提交量激增的压力，难以维持评审质量、一致性和及时性。虽然AI在同行评审中的应用备受关注，但关键问题是AI能否在真实会议规模上生成技术可靠的评审。
AI.method: 结合前沿模型、工具使用和安全措施的多阶段流程，在不到一天时间内为所有22,977篇完整评审论文生成AI评审。系统还引入新的基准测试来评估检测科学弱点的能力。
AI.result: 大规模调查显示，AAAI-26的作者和程序委员会成员不仅认为AI评审有用，而且在技术准确性和研究建议等关键维度上更偏好AI评审而非人类评审。系统在检测科学弱点方面显著优于简单的LLM生成评审基线。
AI.conclusion: 最先进的AI方法已经能够在会议规模上对科学同行评审做出有意义的贡献，为下一代人机协同评估研究开辟了道路。

title: Multimodal Anomaly Detection for Human-Robot Interaction
summary: Ensuring safety and reliability in human-robot interaction (HRI) requires the timely detection of unexpected events that could lead to system failures or unsafe behaviours. Anomaly detection thus plays a critical role in enabling robots to recognize and respond to deviations from normal operation during collaborative tasks. While reconstruction models have been actively explored in HRI, approaches that operate directly on feature vectors remain largely unexplored. In this work, we propose MADRI, a framework that first transforms video streams into semantically meaningful feature vectors before performing reconstruction-based anomaly detection. Additionally, we augment these visual feature vectors with the robot's internal sensors' readings and a Scene Graph, enabling the model to capture both external anomalies in the visual environment and internal failures within the robot itself. To evaluate our approach, we collected a custom dataset consisting of a simple pick-and-place robotic task under normal and anomalous conditions. Experimental results demonstrate that reconstruction on vision-based feature vectors alone is effective for detecting anomalies, while incorporating other modalities further improves detection performance, highlighting the benefits of multimodal feature reconstruction for robust anomaly detection in human-robot collaboration.

AI.tldr: MADRI框架通过将视频流转换为语义特征向量，结合机器人内部传感器数据和场景图，实现多模态重建异常检测，提升人机协作中的异常检测性能。
AI.motivation: 在人机交互中确保安全性和可靠性需要及时检测可能导致系统故障或不安全行为的意外事件。虽然重建模型在HRI中已被积极研究，但直接在特征向量上操作的方法仍未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出MADRI框架：首先将视频流转换为语义特征向量，然后执行基于重建的异常检测。此外，用机器人内部传感器读数和场景图增强这些视觉特征向量，使模型能够捕捉视觉环境中的外部异常和机器人内部的故障。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，仅基于视觉特征向量的重建就能有效检测异常，而结合其他模态进一步提高了检测性能，突出了多模态特征重建在人机协作中实现鲁棒异常检测的优势。
AI.conclusion: MADRI框架通过多模态特征重建方法，为人机协作中的异常检测提供了有效解决方案，结合视觉、传感器和场景图信息能够更全面地检测异常情况。

title: (How) Learning Rates Regulate Catastrophic Overtraining
summary: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is a common first stage of LLM post-training, teaching the model to follow instructions and shaping its behavior as a helpful assistant. At the same time, SFT may harm the fundamental capabilities of an LLM, particularly after long pretraining: a phenomenon known as catastrophic overtraining (Springer et al., 2025). To understand overtraining, we first investigate catastrophic forgetting in finetuning through the lens of implicit regularization of the learning rate. For models trained to the same SFT loss, we identify how the learning rate mediates optimization: finetuning with large and small steps converges to qualitatively different models. Next, we link forgetting to overtraining: learning rate decay increases the sharpness of the pretrained model, which in turn exacerbates catastrophic forgetting during SFT, leading to overtraining. Our findings paint a picture of the overtraining mechanism in LLMs and broadly contribute to the understanding of the interplay between optimization dynamics during pretraining and finetuning.

AI.tldr: 论文研究SFT中的灾难性过训练现象，发现学习率通过隐式正则化影响模型收敛性质，学习率衰减会增加预训练模型的锐度，从而加剧SFT期间的灾难性遗忘，导致过训练。
AI.motivation: 监督微调（SFT）作为LLM后训练的第一阶段，虽然能教会模型遵循指令并塑造其作为助手的行文，但可能损害LLM的基本能力，特别是在长时间预训练后出现灾难性过训练现象。需要理解过训练机制及其与优化动态的关系。
AI.method: 首先从学习率的隐式正则化角度研究微调中的灾难性遗忘。对于达到相同SFT损失的模型，分析学习率如何调节优化过程：使用大步长和小步长微调会收敛到性质不同的模型。然后将遗忘与过训练联系起来：学习率衰减会增加预训练模型的锐度，进而加剧SFT期间的灾难性遗忘，导致过训练。
AI.result: 研究发现学习率在微调优化中起关键作用，不同学习率会导致模型收敛到不同性质的解。学习率衰减会增加预训练模型的锐度，这种锐度增加会加剧SFT期间的灾难性遗忘，最终导致过训练现象。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了LLM中过训练机制的全貌，对理解预训练和微调期间优化动态的相互作用有广泛贡献。学习率作为隐式正则化因子，通过影响模型锐度和遗忘程度，在过训练现象中起关键作用。

title: GlotOCR Bench: OCR Models Still Struggle Beyond a Handful of Unicode Scripts
summary: Optical character recognition (OCR) has advanced rapidly with the rise of vision-language models, yet evaluation has remained concentrated on a small cluster of high- and mid-resource scripts. We introduce GlotOCR Bench, a comprehensive benchmark evaluating OCR generalization across 100+ Unicode scripts. Our benchmark comprises clean and degraded image variants rendered from real multilingual texts. Images are rendered using fonts from the Google Fonts repository, shaped with HarfBuzz and rasterized with FreeType, supporting both LTR and RTL scripts. Samples of rendered images were manually reviewed to verify correct rendering across all scripts. We evaluate a broad suite of open-weight and proprietary vision-language models and find that most perform well on fewer than ten scripts, and even the strongest frontier models fail to generalize beyond thirty scripts. Performance broadly tracks script-level pretraining coverage, suggesting that current OCR systems rely on language model pretraining as much as on visual recognition. Models confronted with unfamiliar scripts either produce random noise or hallucinate characters from similar scripts they already know. We release the benchmark and pipeline for reproducibility. Pipeline Code: https://github.com/cisnlp/glotocr-bench, Benchmark: https://hf.co/datasets/cis-lmu/glotocr-bench.

AI.tldr: GlotOCR Bench是一个包含100多种Unicode文字的OCR基准测试，评估模型在干净和退化图像上的跨文字泛化能力，发现当前模型仅能处理少数文字，前沿模型也无法超越30种文字。
AI.motivation: 当前OCR评估主要集中在高资源和中资源文字上，缺乏对多种Unicode文字泛化能力的全面评估。需要建立一个全面的基准测试来评估OCR模型在不同文字上的真实泛化性能。
AI.method: 从真实多语言文本渲染图像，使用Google Fonts字体库，通过HarfBuzz进行字形塑造，FreeType进行光栅化，支持LTR和RTL文字。创建干净和退化图像变体，手动验证所有文字的正确渲染。评估开源和专有视觉语言模型。
AI.result: 大多数模型在少于10种文字上表现良好，即使最强的前沿模型也无法泛化到30种以上文字。性能与文字级预训练覆盖度相关，表明当前OCR系统依赖语言模型预训练和视觉识别。面对陌生文字时，模型要么产生随机噪声，要么从已知相似文字中产生幻觉字符。
AI.conclusion: 当前OCR系统在跨文字泛化方面存在显著局限性，过度依赖特定文字的预训练数据。需要开发更具泛化能力的OCR方法，减少对语言模型预训练的依赖。发布了基准测试和管道以促进可重复性研究。

title: Robust Adaptive Backstepping Impedance Control of Robots in Unknown Environments
summary: This paper presents a Robust Adaptive Backstepping Impedance Control (RABIC) strategy for robots operating in contact-rich and uncertain environments. The proposed control strategy considers the complete coupled dynamics of the system and explicitly accounts for key sources of uncertainty, including external disturbances and unmodeled dynamics, while not requiring the robot's dynamic parameters in implementation. We propose a backstepping-based adaptive impedance control scheme for the inner loop to track the reference impedance model. To handle uncertainties, we employ a Taylor series-based estimator for system dynamics and an adaptive estimator for determining the upper bound of external forces. Stability analysis demonstrates the semi-global practical finite-time stability of the overall system. To demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method, a simulated mobile manipulator scenario and experimental evaluations on a real Franka Emika Panda robot were conducted. The proposed approach exhibits safer performance compared to PD control while ensuring trajectory tracking and force monitoring. Overall, the RABIC framework provides a solid basis for future research on adaptive and learning-based impedance control for coupled mobile and fixed serially linked manipulators.

AI.tldr: 提出一种鲁棒自适应反步阻抗控制(RABIC)策略，用于接触丰富且不确定环境中的机器人操作，无需机器人动态参数即可处理外部扰动和未建模动态。
AI.motivation: 针对机器人在接触丰富和不确定环境中操作时面临的挑战，需要一种能够处理系统耦合动态、外部扰动和未建模动态的控制策略，同时不依赖机器人动态参数。
AI.method: 采用反步法自适应阻抗控制作为内环跟踪参考阻抗模型，使用泰勒级数估计器估计系统动态，自适应估计器确定外力的上界，实现鲁棒控制。
AI.result: 稳定性分析证明系统具有半全局实用有限时间稳定性，仿真和Franka Emika Panda机器人实验表明该方法比PD控制更安全，同时确保轨迹跟踪和力监测。
AI.conclusion: RABIC框架为移动和固定串联机械臂的自适应和学习型阻抗控制研究提供了坚实基础，在不确定环境中表现出优越的安全性和跟踪性能。

title: Formalizing Kantian Ethics: Formula of the Universal Law Logic (FULL)
summary: The field of machine ethics aims to build Artificial Moral Agents (AMAs) to better understand morality and make AI agents safer. To do so, many approaches encode human moral intuition as a set of axioms on actions e.g., do not harm, you must help others. However, this introduces (at least) two limitations for future AMAs. First, it does not consider the agent's purposes in performing the action. Second, it assumes that we humans can enumerate our moral intuition. This paper explores formalizing a moral procedure that alleviates these two limitations. We specifically consider Kantian ethics and present a multi-sorted quantified modal logic we call the Formula of the Universal Law Logic (FULL). The FULL formalizes Kant's first formulation of the categorical imperative, the Formula of the Universal Law (FUL), and concepts such as causality and agency. We demonstrate on three cases from Kantian ethics that the FULL can reason to evaluate agents' actions for certain purposes without built-in moral intuition, given that it has sufficient (non-normative) background knowledge.
