We systematically demonstrate that exposing a temporal attention routing mechanism to policy gradients results in surrogate objective hacking, while adopting gradient-free uncertainty weighting triggers irreversible myopic degeneration, a phenomenon we term the Paradox of Temporal Uncertainty. To address these issues, we propose a Target Decoupling architecture: on the Critic side, we retain multi-timescale predictions to enforce auxiliary representation learning, while on the Actor side, we strictly isolate short-term signals and update the policy based solely on long-term advantages. Rigorous empirical evaluations across multiple independent random seeds in the LunarLander-v2 environment demonstrate that our proposed architecture achieves statistically significant performance improvements. Without relying on hyperparameter hacking, it consistently surpasses the ''Environment Solved'' threshold with minimal variance, completely eliminates policy collapse, and escapes the hovering local optima that trap single-timescale baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了在Actor-Critic架构中盲目融合多时间尺度信号会导致算法病理问题，提出了目标解耦架构，在Critic侧保留多时间尺度预测以增强表征学习，在Actor侧严格隔离短期信号仅基于长期优势更新策略，在LunarLander-v2环境中实现了显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 受神经生物学中多巴胺系统多时间尺度编码的启发，近期研究尝试在Actor-Critic架构中引入多个折扣因子以平衡短期响应和长期规划。然而，本文发现盲目融合多时间尺度信号在复杂延迟奖励任务中会导致严重的算法病理问题。
AI.method: 提出目标解耦架构：在Critic侧保留多时间尺度预测以强制辅助表征学习，在Actor侧严格隔离短期信号，仅基于长期优势更新策略。该方法避免了策略梯度中的替代目标黑客攻击和梯度自由不确定性加权引发的不可逆近视退化。
AI.result: 在LunarLander-v2环境中的严格实证评估表明，该架构实现了统计显著的性能提升。无需超参数黑客攻击，就能持续超越"环境解决"阈值，方差最小，完全消除策略崩溃，并逃逸单时间尺度基线陷入的悬停局部最优。
AI.conclusion: 目标解耦架构有效解决了多时间尺度信号融合中的算法病理问题，通过Critic侧的多时间尺度表征学习和Actor侧的长期优势隔离，实现了更稳定和高效的强化学习性能，为时间信用分配问题提供了新的解决方案。

title: PianoFlow: Music-Aware Streaming Piano Motion Generation with Bimanual Coordination
summary: Audio-driven bimanual piano motion generation requires precise modeling of complex musical structures and dynamic cross-hand coordination. However, existing methods often rely on acoustic-only representations lacking symbolic priors, employ inflexible interaction mechanisms, and are limited to computationally expensive short-sequence generation. To address these limitations, we propose PianoFlow, a flow-matching framework for precise and coordinated bimanual piano motion synthesis. Our approach strategically leverages MIDI as a privileged modality during training, distilling these structured musical priors to achieve deep semantic understanding while maintaining audio-only inference. Furthermore, we introduce an asymmetric role-gated interaction module to explicitly capture dynamic cross-hand coordination through role-aware attention and temporal gating. To enable real-time streaming generation for arbitrarily long sequences, we design an autoregressive flow continuation scheme that ensures seamless cross-chunk temporal coherence. Extensive experiments on the PianoMotion10M dataset demonstrate that PianoFlow achieves superior quantitative and qualitative performance, while accelerating inference by over 9\times compared to previous methods.

AI.tldr: PianoFlow：基于流匹配的音频驱动双手钢琴动作生成框架，通过MIDI先验、角色门控交互和自回归流延续实现精确协调的长序列实时生成
AI.motivation: 现有音频驱动双手钢琴动作生成方法存在三个主要问题：1）仅依赖声学表示缺乏符号先验；2）交互机制不灵活；3）只能生成计算昂贵的短序列。需要解决这些限制以实现精确协调的实时长序列生成。
AI.method: 提出PianoFlow流匹配框架：1）训练时利用MIDI作为特权模态，蒸馏结构化音乐先验实现深度语义理解，同时保持仅音频推理；2）引入非对称角色门控交互模块，通过角色感知注意力和时间门控显式捕捉动态跨手协调；3）设计自回归流延续方案，确保跨块时间连贯性，实现任意长序列的实时流式生成。
AI.result: 在PianoMotion10M数据集上的大量实验表明，PianoFlow在定量和定性性能上均优于现有方法，同时推理速度比之前方法加速超过9倍。
AI.conclusion: PianoFlow通过结合MIDI先验、角色门控交互和自回归流延续，成功解决了音频驱动双手钢琴动作生成中的关键挑战，实现了精确协调、实时高效的长序列生成。

title: FRAGATA: Semantic Retrieval of HPC Support Tickets via Hybrid RAG over 20 Years of Request Tracker History
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures, a Spanish version of this paper has been submitted at Jornadas SARTECO 2026
summary: The technical support team of a supercomputing centre accumulates, over the course of decades, a large volume of resolved incidents that constitute critical operational knowledge. At the Galician Supercomputing Center (CESGA) this history has been managed for over twenty years with Request Tracker (RT), whose built-in search engine has significant limitations that hinder knowledge reuse by the support staff. This paper presents Fragata, a semantic ticket search system that combines modern information retrieval techniques with the full RT history. The system can find relevant past incidents regardless of language, the presence of typos, or the specific wording of the query. The architecture is deployed on CESGA's infrastructure, supports incremental updates without service interruption, and offloads the most expensive stages to the FinisTerrae III supercomputer. Preliminary results show a substantial qualitative improvement over RT's native search.

AI.tldr: Fragata：一个结合现代信息检索技术的语义工单搜索系统，用于改善超级计算中心技术支持团队的知识重用
AI.motivation: Galician超级计算中心（CESGA）使用Request Tracker（RT）管理超过20年的已解决事件历史，但RT内置搜索引擎存在显著限制，阻碍了支持人员对关键操作知识的重用。
AI.method: 开发Fragata语义工单搜索系统，结合现代信息检索技术与完整的RT历史记录。系统能够跨语言、容忍拼写错误和不同查询措辞找到相关历史事件，架构部署在CESGA基础设施上，支持增量更新而不中断服务，并将计算密集型阶段卸载到FinisTerrae III超级计算机。
AI.result: 初步结果显示，与RT原生搜索相比，Fragata在语义搜索能力方面有显著的定性改进。
AI.conclusion: Fragata系统有效解决了传统工单管理系统中知识重用的技术限制，通过语义搜索技术提升了超级计算中心技术支持团队的操作效率和知识管理能力。

title: HTNav: A Hybrid Navigation Framework with Tiered Structure for Urban Aerial Vision-and-Language Navigation
summary: Inspired by the general Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) task, aerial VLN has attracted widespread attention, owing to its significant practical value in applications such as logistics delivery and urban inspection. However, existing methods face several challenges in complex urban environments, including insufficient generalization to unseen scenes, suboptimal performance in long-range path planning, and inadequate understanding of spatial continuity. To address these challenges, we propose HTNav, a new collaborative navigation framework that integrates Imitation Learning (IL) and Reinforcement Learning (RL) within a hybrid IL-RL framework. This framework adopts a staged training mechanism to ensure the stability of the basic navigation strategy while enhancing its environmental exploration capability. By integrating a tiered decision-making mechanism, it achieves collaborative interaction between macro-level path planning and fine-grained action control. Furthermore, a map representation learning module is introduced to deepen its understanding of spatial continuity in open domains. On the CityNav benchmark, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance across all scene levels and task difficulties. Experimental results demonstrate that this framework significantly improves navigation precision and robustness in complex urban environments.

AI.tldr: HTNav：一种结合模仿学习与强化学习的混合导航框架，用于解决复杂城市环境中空中视觉语言导航的泛化性、长距离路径规划和空间连续性理解等挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有空中视觉语言导航方法在复杂城市环境中面临三个主要挑战：1）对未见场景的泛化能力不足；2）长距离路径规划性能欠佳；3）对空间连续性的理解不足。这些限制影响了在物流配送、城市巡检等实际应用中的效果。
AI.method: 提出HTNav框架，采用混合IL-RL架构：1）分阶段训练机制确保基础导航策略稳定性，同时增强环境探索能力；2）分层决策机制实现宏观路径规划与细粒度动作控制的协同交互；3）引入地图表示学习模块，深化对开放域空间连续性的理解。
AI.result: 在CityNav基准测试中，该方法在所有场景级别和任务难度上都达到了最先进的性能。实验结果表明，该框架显著提升了复杂城市环境中的导航精度和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: HTNav框架通过整合模仿学习与强化学习的优势，结合分层决策机制和地图表示学习，有效解决了空中视觉语言导航在复杂城市环境中的关键挑战，为实现更智能、更可靠的无人机导航提供了有前景的解决方案。

title: SFT-GRPO Data Overlap as a Post-Training Hyperparameter for Autoformalization
summary: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) followed by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is a common post-training recipe. We conduct a controlled ablation over SFT-GRPO data overlap, evaluating Qwen3-8B (thinking disabled) post-trained for Lean 4 autoformalization under six conditions that differ solely in training recipe: a base model, SFT-only, GRPO-only, and three SFT+GRPO configurations where 0 percent, 30 percent, or 100 percent of the GRPO prompts coincide with the SFT corpus. Keeping SFT and GRPO data disjoint consistently outperforms full overlap at zero additional compute cost. Evaluating on Gaokao-Formal and PutnamBench under both compile pass at k and semantic pass at k assessed by an LLM judge, we find that lower overlap is monotonically associated with higher compilation and semantic accuracy. At 0 percent overlap, GRPO yields a 10.4 percentage point semantic gain over SFT alone on Gaokao, while at 100 percent overlap both metrics remain flat, rendering the GRPO stage effectively redundant. We further show that dual-metric evaluation reveals compile semantic gaps exceeding 30 percentage points for the highest compiling models, a disparity invisible under compile-only benchmarking. To our knowledge, this is the first controlled investigation of SFT-GRPO data overlap as a post-training hyperparameter, demonstrating how model behavior varies based on the degree of data sharing between training stages.

AI.tldr: SFT-GRPO数据重叠度对模型性能有显著影响：保持两个阶段数据完全分离（0%重叠）在零额外计算成本下优于完全重叠（100%重叠），且重叠度越低，编译和语义准确率越高
AI.motivation: 研究监督微调（SFT）后接组相对策略优化（GRPO）这一常见后训练流程中，两个阶段数据重叠度对模型性能的影响，进行首次受控实验探索这一后训练超参数
AI.method: 对Qwen3-8B模型在Lean 4自动形式化任务上进行受控消融实验，设置六种仅训练流程不同的条件：基础模型、仅SFT、仅GRPO，以及三种SFT+GRPO配置（GRPO提示与SFT语料重叠0%、30%、100%）。使用Gaokao-Formal和PutnamBench数据集，通过编译通过率（compile pass@k）和LLM评估的语义通过率（semantic pass@k）进行双指标评估
AI.result: 数据完全分离（0%重叠）表现最佳：在Gaokao上，GRPO相比仅SFT带来10.4个百分点的语义增益；完全重叠（100%）时两个指标保持平坦，GRPO阶段基本冗余。重叠度越低，编译和语义准确率越高。双指标评估揭示最高编译模型存在超过30个百分点的编译-语义差距，这在仅编译基准测试中无法发现
AI.conclusion: SFT-GRPO数据重叠度是重要的后训练超参数，保持两个阶段数据分离能显著提升模型性能而不增加计算成本。双指标评估对于全面评估模型能力至关重要，能揭示仅编译基准测试无法发现的性能差距

title: Challenging Vision-Language Models with Physically Deployable Multimodal Semantic Lighting Attacks
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have shown remarkable performance, yet their security remains insufficiently understood. Existing adversarial studies focus almost exclusively on the digital setting, leaving physical-world threats largely unexplored. As VLMs are increasingly deployed in real environments, this gap becomes critical, since adversarial perturbations must be physically realizable. Despite this practical relevance, physical attacks against VLMs have not been systematically studied. Such attacks may induce recognition failures and further disrupt multimodal reasoning, leading to severe semantic misinterpretation in downstream tasks. Therefore, investigating physical attacks on VLMs is essential for assessing their real-world security risks. To address this gap, we propose Multimodal Semantic Lighting Attacks (MSLA), the first physically deployable adversarial attack framework against VLMs. MSLA uses controllable adversarial lighting to disrupt multimodal semantic understanding in real scenes, attacking semantic alignment rather than only task-specific outputs. Consequently, it degrades zero-shot classification performance of mainstream CLIP variants while inducing severe semantic hallucinations in advanced VLMs such as LLaVA and BLIP across image captioning and visual question answering (VQA). Extensive experiments in both digital and physical domains demonstrate that MSLA is effective, transferable, and practically realizable. Our findings provide the first evidence that VLMs are highly vulnerable to physically deployable semantic attacks, exposing a previously overlooked robustness gap and underscoring the urgent need for physical-world robustness evaluation of VLMs.

AI.tldr: 首次提出针对视觉语言模型的多模态语义光照攻击（MSLA），通过可控对抗性光照在物理世界中破坏多模态语义理解，暴露了VLMs在物理部署中的严重安全漏洞。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型（VLMs）的安全研究主要集中在数字领域，对物理世界威胁探索不足。随着VLMs在实际环境中的部署增加，物理可实现的对抗性扰动变得至关重要。现有研究缺乏对VLMs物理攻击的系统性研究，这种攻击可能导致识别失败和多模态推理中断，引发下游任务的严重语义误解。
AI.method: 提出多模态语义光照攻击（MSLA）框架，使用可控对抗性光照在真实场景中破坏多模态语义理解。该方法攻击语义对齐而非仅针对特定任务输出，通过光照扰动影响CLIP变体的零样本分类性能，并在LLaVA和BLIP等先进VLMs中引发图像描述和视觉问答任务的严重语义幻觉。
AI.result: 在数字和物理领域的广泛实验表明，MSLA攻击有效、可迁移且物理可实现。该攻击显著降低了主流CLIP变体的零样本分类性能，并在LLaVA和BLIP等VLMs中引发严重的语义幻觉。研究首次证明VLMs对物理可部署的语义攻击高度脆弱。
AI.conclusion: MSLA暴露了VLMs先前被忽视的鲁棒性差距，强调了物理世界鲁棒性评估的紧迫需求。该研究为评估VLMs在真实环境中的安全风险提供了重要依据，表明物理可实现的对抗性攻击对多模态语义理解构成严重威胁。

title: Towards Fine-grained Temporal Perception: Post-Training Large Audio-Language Models with Audio-Side Time Prompt
summary: Large Audio-Language Models (LALMs) enable general audio understanding and demonstrate remarkable performance across various audio tasks. However, these models still face challenges in temporal perception (e.g., inferring event onset and offset), leading to limited utility in fine-grained scenarios. To address this issue, we propose Audio-Side Time Prompt and leverage Reinforcement Learning (RL) to develop the TimePro-RL framework for fine-grained temporal perception. Specifically, we encode timestamps as embeddings and interleave them within the audio feature sequence as temporal coordinates to prompt the model. Furthermore, we introduce RL following Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) to directly optimize temporal alignment performance. Experiments demonstrate that TimePro-RL achieves significant performance gains across a range of audio temporal tasks, such as audio grounding, sound event detection, and dense audio captioning, validating its robust effectiveness.

AI.tldr: TimePro-RL框架通过音频侧时间提示和强化学习优化大型音频语言模型的细粒度时间感知能力
AI.motivation: 大型音频语言模型在通用音频理解方面表现出色，但在时间感知（如推断事件开始和结束时间）方面仍存在挑战，限制了其在细粒度场景中的应用
AI.method: 提出Audio-Side Time Prompt将时间戳编码为嵌入并交错插入音频特征序列作为时间坐标，然后采用监督微调后的强化学习直接优化时间对齐性能
AI.result: TimePro-RL在音频定位、声音事件检测和密集音频描述等音频时间任务上取得了显著的性能提升
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了大型音频语言模型的细粒度时间感知问题，验证了其鲁棒性和有效性

title: Simulation of Adaptive Running with Flexible Sports Prosthesis using Reinforcement Learning of Hybrid-link System
summary: This study proposes a reinforcement learning-based adaptive running motion simulation for a unilateral transtibial amputee with the flexibility of a leaf-spring-type sports prosthesis using hybrid-link system. The design and selection of sports prostheses often rely on trial and error. A comprehensive whole-body dynamics analysis that considers the interaction between human motion and prosthetic deformation could provide valuable insights for user-specific design and selection. The hybrid-link system facilitates whole-body dynamics analysis by incorporating the Piece-wise Constant Strain model to represent the flexible deformation of the prosthesis. Based on this system, the simulation methodology generates whole-body dynamic motions of a unilateral transtibial amputee through a reinforcement learning-based approach, which combines imitation learning from motion capture data with accurate prosthetic dynamics computation. We simulated running motions under different virtual prosthetic stiffness conditions and analyzed the metabolic cost of transport obtained from the simulations, suggesting that variations in stiffness influence running performance. Our findings demonstrate the potential of this approach for simulation and analysis under virtual conditions that differ from real conditions.

AI.tldr: 提出基于强化学习的单侧胫骨截肢者跑步运动仿真方法，使用混合连杆系统模拟叶片弹簧型运动假肢的柔性变形，分析不同虚拟假肢刚度对跑步性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 运动假肢的设计和选择通常依赖试错法，缺乏考虑人体运动与假肢变形相互作用的全面全身动力学分析。需要一种能够提供用户特定设计和选择见解的仿真方法。
AI.method: 采用混合连杆系统，结合分段恒定应变模型表示假肢的柔性变形。基于强化学习的方法，通过从运动捕捉数据中学习模仿并结合精确的假肢动力学计算，生成单侧胫骨截肢者的全身动态运动。
AI.result: 在不同虚拟假肢刚度条件下模拟跑步运动，分析仿真获得的代谢运输成本，发现刚度变化会影响跑步性能。验证了该方法在虚拟条件下进行仿真和分析的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够模拟和分析与实际情况不同的虚拟条件下的运动，为运动假肢的用户特定设计和选择提供了有价值的仿真工具。

title: Detecting and refurbishing ground truth errors during training of deep learning-based echocardiography segmentation models
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables, International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging 2026
summary: Deep learning-based medical image segmentation typically relies on ground truth (GT) labels obtained through manual annotation, but these can be prone to random errors or systematic biases. This study examines the robustness of deep learning models to such errors in echocardiography (echo) segmentation and evaluates a novel strategy for detecting and refurbishing erroneous labels during model training. Using the CAMUS dataset, we simulate three error types, then compare a loss-based GT label error detection method with one based on Variance of Gradients (VOG). We also propose a pseudo-labelling approach to refurbish suspected erroneous GT labels. We assess the performance of our proposed approach under varying error levels. Results show that VOG proved highly effective in flagging erroneous GT labels during training. However, a standard U-Net maintained strong performance under random label errors and moderate levels of systematic errors (up to 50%). The detection and refurbishment approach improved performance, particularly under high-error conditions.

AI.tldr: 研究评估深度学习模型对超声心动图分割中标签错误的鲁棒性，提出基于梯度方差(VOG)的错误标签检测方法及伪标签修复策略，在CAMUS数据集上验证有效性。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割通常依赖人工标注的真实标签，但这些标签可能存在随机错误或系统偏差。本研究旨在评估深度学习模型对超声心动图分割中标签错误的鲁棒性，并开发有效的错误检测与修复方法。
AI.method: 使用CAMUS数据集模拟三种错误类型；比较基于损失的错误检测方法与基于梯度方差(VOG)的方法；提出伪标签方法修复疑似错误的真实标签；在不同错误水平下评估方法性能。
AI.result: VOG方法在训练过程中能有效标记错误标签；标准U-Net对随机标签错误和中等水平系统错误(最高50%)保持良好性能；检测与修复方法显著提升性能，特别是在高错误条件下。
AI.conclusion: 基于梯度方差的错误标签检测方法在超声心动图分割中表现优异，结合伪标签修复策略可有效提升模型在标签错误条件下的鲁棒性，为医学图像分割中的标签质量控制提供实用解决方案。

title: One Interface, Many Robots: Unified Real-Time Low-Level Motion Planning for Collaborative Arms
summary: This paper proposes a common interface for real-time low-level motion planning of collaborative robotic arms, aimed at enabling broader applicability and improved portability across heterogeneous hardware platforms. In previous work, we introduced WinGs Operating Studio (WOS), a middleware solution that abstracts diverse robotic components into uniform software resources and provides a broad suite of language-agnostic APIs. This paper specifically focuses on its minimal yet flexible interface for real-time end-effector trajectory control. By employing an n-degree polynomial interpolator in conjunction with a quadratic programming solver, the proposed method generates smooth, continuously differentiable trajectories with precise position, velocity, and acceleration profiles. We validate our approach in three distinct scenarios. First, in an offline demonstration, a collaborative arm accurately draws various geometric shapes on paper. Second, in an interruptible, low-frequency re-planning setting, a robotic manipulator grasps a dynamic object placed on a moving mobile robot. Finally, we conducted a teleoperation experiment in which one robotic arm controlled another to perform a series of dexterous manipulations, confirming the proposed method's reliability, versatility, and ease of use.

AI.tldr: 提出用于协作机器人实时低级运动规划的通用接口，通过多项式插值和二次规划求解器生成平滑轨迹，在离线绘图、动态抓取和遥操作三种场景中验证
AI.motivation: 为异构硬件平台的协作机器人提供统一的实时低级运动规划接口，提高适用性和可移植性，解决现有系统硬件依赖性强、接口不统一的问题
AI.method: 基于WinGs Operating Studio中间件，提供最小化但灵活的末端执行器轨迹控制接口，采用n次多项式插值器和二次规划求解器生成位置、速度、加速度轮廓平滑且连续可微的轨迹
AI.result: 在三种场景中成功验证：1）离线演示中协作机器人准确绘制几何图形；2）可中断低频重规划场景中机器人抓取移动机器人上的动态物体；3）遥操作实验中一个机器人控制另一个完成灵巧操作
AI.conclusion: 提出的通用接口在实时低级运动规划中表现出可靠性、多功能性和易用性，为异构机器人平台提供了可移植的解决方案，支持多种应用场景

title: MIND: AI Co-Scientist for Material Research
comment: 4 pages, 3 figures. Under review for ECML PKDD 2026 Demonstration Track. Code available at https://github.com/IMMS-Ewha/MIND . Demo video available at https://youtu.be/lqiFe1OQzN4
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have enabled agentic AI systems for scientific discovery, but most approaches remain limited to textbased reasoning without automated experimental verification. We propose MIND, an LLM-driven framework for automated hypothesis validation in materials research. MIND organizes the scientific discovery process into hypothesis refinement, experimentation, and debate-based validation within a multi-agent pipeline. For experimental verification, the system integrates Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials, particularly SevenNet-Omni, enabling scalable in-silico experiments. We also provide a web-based user interface for automated hypothesis testing. The modular design allows additional experimental modules to be integrated, making the framework adaptable to broader scientific workflows. The code is available at: https://github.com/IMMS-Ewha/MIND, and a demonstration video at: https://youtu.be/lqiFe1OQzN4.

AI.tldr: MIND是一个基于大语言模型的自动化材料研究假设验证框架，通过多智能体流程实现假设精炼、实验和基于辩论的验证，集成了机器学习原子间势能进行硅基实验验证。
AI.motivation: 当前基于大语言模型的科学发现系统大多局限于文本推理，缺乏自动化实验验证能力，限制了其在材料研究等实验科学领域的实际应用。
AI.method: 采用多智能体管道将科学发现过程组织为假设精炼、实验和基于辩论的验证三个阶段；集成机器学习原子间势能（特别是SevenNet-Omni）实现可扩展的硅基实验；提供基于Web的用户界面；模块化设计允许集成更多实验模块。
AI.result: 开发了完整的MIND框架，包括代码库和演示视频，实现了自动化材料假设验证系统，能够适应更广泛的科学工作流程。
AI.conclusion: MIND框架通过结合大语言模型推理和自动化实验验证，为材料科学研究提供了有效的假设验证工具，其模块化设计使其具有扩展到其他科学领域的潜力。

title: Toward Hardware-Agnostic Quadrupedal World Models via Morphology Conditioning
summary: World models promise a paradigm shift in robotics, where an agent learns the underlying physics of its environment once to enable efficient planning and behavior learning. However, current world models are often hardware-locked specialists: a model trained on a Boston Dynamics Spot robot fails catastrophically on a Unitree Go1 due to the mismatch in kinematic and dynamic properties, as the model overfits to specific embodiment constraints rather than capturing the universal locomotion dynamics. Consequently, a slight change in actuator dynamics or limb length necessitates training a new model from scratch. In this work, we take a step towards a framework for training a generalizable Quadrupedal World Model (QWM) that disentangles environmental dynamics from robot morphology. We address the limitations of implicit system identification, where treating static physical properties (like mass or limb length) as latent variables to be inferred from motion history creates an adaptation lag that can compromise zero-shot safety and efficiency. Instead, we explicitly condition the generative dynamics on the robot's engineering specifications. By integrating a physical morphology encoder and a reward normalizer, we enable the model to serve as a neural simulator capable of generalizing across morphologies. This capability unlocks zero-shot control across a range of embodiments. We introduce, for the first time, a world model that enables zero-shot generalization to new morphologies for locomotion. While we carefully study the limitations of our method, QWM operates as a distribution-bounded interpolator within the quadrupedal morphology family rather than a universal physics engine, this work represents a significant step toward morphology-conditioned world models for legged locomotion.

AI.tldr: 提出QWM框架，通过显式编码机器人形态学参数，实现四足机器人世界模型在形态间的零样本泛化，解决现有模型硬件锁定的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前世界模型存在硬件锁定问题：针对特定机器人（如Boston Dynamics Spot）训练的模型无法泛化到其他形态（如Unitree Go1），因为模型过拟合到具体硬件约束而非学习通用运动动力学。机器人形态的微小变化（如执行器动力学或肢体长度）就需要从头训练新模型。
AI.method: 提出Quadrupedal World Model (QWM)框架：1）显式地将机器人工程规格作为生成动力学的条件输入，而非隐式地从运动历史推断静态物理属性；2）集成物理形态编码器和奖励归一化器；3）使模型能够作为神经模拟器在不同形态间泛化。
AI.result: 首次实现能够在四足机器人形态间进行零样本泛化的世界模型。模型能够作为分布有界的插值器在四足形态家族内工作，解锁跨形态的零样本控制能力。
AI.conclusion: QWM代表了向形态条件化世界模型迈出的重要一步，虽然仍限于四足形态家族而非通用物理引擎，但解决了硬件锁定问题，为腿部运动提供了可泛化的世界模型框架。

title: Monthly Diffusion v0.9: A Latent Diffusion Model for the First AI-MIP
summary: Here, we describe Monthly Diffusion at 1.5-degree grid spacing (MD-1.5 version 0.9), a climate emulator that leverages a spherical Fourier neural operator (SFNO)-inspired Conditional Variational Auto-Encoder (CVAE) architecture to model the evolution of low-frequency internal atmospheric variability using latent diffusion. MDv0.9 was designed to forward-step at monthly mean timesteps in a data-sparse regime, using modest computational requirements. This work describes the motivation behind the architecture design, the MDv0.9 training procedure, and initial results.

AI.tldr: MD-1.5 v0.9是一个基于球面傅里叶神经算子启发的条件变分自编码器架构的气候模拟器，利用潜在扩散建模低频内部大气变率的月尺度演化
AI.motivation: 开发一个在数据稀疏条件下、计算需求适中的月平均时间步长气候模拟器，用于建模低频内部大气变率的演化
AI.method: 采用球面傅里叶神经算子启发的条件变分自编码器架构，结合潜在扩散模型，在1.5度网格分辨率下进行月平均时间步长的前向模拟
AI.result: 论文描述了MDv0.9的训练过程和初步结果，表明该模型能够在数据稀疏条件下有效模拟低频大气变率的月尺度演化
AI.conclusion: MD-1.5 v0.9展示了一种新颖的气候模拟器架构，能够在计算资源有限和数据稀疏条件下有效建模大气变率的月尺度演化，为气候预测提供了新工具

title: DPC-VQA: Decoupling Quality Perception and Residual Calibration for Video Quality Assessment
summary: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown promising performance on video quality assessment (VQA) tasks. However, adapting them to new scenarios remains expensive due to large-scale retraining and costly mean opinion score (MOS) annotations. In this paper, we argue that a pretrained MLLM already provides a useful perceptual prior for VQA, and that the main challenge is to efficiently calibrate this prior to the target MOS space. Based on this insight, we propose DPC-VQA, a decoupling perception and calibration framework for video quality assessment. Specifically, DPC-VQA uses a frozen MLLM to provide a base quality estimate and perceptual prior, and employs a lightweight calibration branch to predict a residual correction for target-scenario adaptation. This design avoids costly end-to-end retraining while maintaining reliable performance with lower training and data costs. Extensive experiments on both user-generated content (UGC) and AI-generated content (AIGC) benchmarks show that DPC-VQA achieves competitive performance against representative baselines, while using less than 2% of the trainable parameters of conventional MLLM-based VQA methods and remaining effective with only 20\% of MOS labels. The code will be released upon publication.

AI.tldr: DPC-VQA提出解耦感知与校准的视频质量评估框架，利用冻结的MLLM提供基础质量估计和感知先验，通过轻量级校准分支进行目标场景适应，显著降低训练成本和数据需求。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在视频质量评估任务上表现良好，但适应新场景成本高昂，需要大规模重新训练和昂贵的平均意见分数标注。作者认为预训练的MLLM已经提供了有用的感知先验，主要挑战是如何高效地将此先验校准到目标MOS空间。
AI.method: 提出DPC-VQA框架：1) 使用冻结的MLLM提供基础质量估计和感知先验；2) 采用轻量级校准分支预测残差校正，实现目标场景适应；3) 避免昂贵的端到端重新训练，同时保持可靠性能。
AI.result: 在用户生成内容和AI生成内容基准测试中，DPC-VQA与代表性基线方法相比达到竞争性性能，同时仅使用传统MLLM-based VQA方法可训练参数的不到2%，且仅需20%的MOS标签即可保持有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦感知和校准，DPC-VQA提供了一种高效适应视频质量评估任务的方法，显著降低了训练成本和数据需求，为MLLM在VQA任务中的实际应用提供了可行方案。

title: Task-Aware Bimanual Affordance Prediction via VLM-Guided Semantic-Geometric Reasoning
summary: Bimanual manipulation requires reasoning about where to interact with an object and which arm should perform each action, a joint affordance localization and arm allocation problem that geometry-only planners cannot resolve without semantic understanding of task intent. Existing approaches either treat affordance prediction as coarse part segmentation or rely on geometric heuristics for arm assignment, failing to jointly reason about task-relevant contact regions and arm allocation. We reframe bimanual manipulation as a joint affordance localization and arm allocation problem and propose a hierarchical framework for task-aware bimanual affordance prediction that leverages a Vision-Language Model (VLM) to generalize across object categories and task descriptions without requiring category-specific training. Our approach fuses multi-view RGB-D observations into a consistent 3D scene representation and generates global 6-DoF grasp candidates, which are then spatially and semantically filtered by querying the VLM for task-relevant affordance regions on each object, as well as for arm allocation to the individual objects, thereby ensuring geometric validity while respecting task semantics. We evaluate our method on a dual-arm platform across nine real-world manipulation tasks spanning four categories: parallel manipulation, coordinated stabilization, tool use, and human handover. Our approach achieves consistently higher task success rates than geometric and semantic baselines for task-oriented grasping, demonstrating that explicit semantic reasoning over affordances and arm allocation helps enable reliable bimanual manipulation in unstructured environments.

AI.tldr: 提出分层框架，利用视觉语言模型进行任务感知的双臂操作可及性预测，解决几何规划器无法处理的语义意图问题
AI.motivation: 双臂操作需要同时考虑物体交互位置和手臂分配，几何规划器缺乏语义理解，现有方法要么将可及性预测视为粗略部分分割，要么依赖几何启发式进行手臂分配，无法联合推理任务相关接触区域和手臂分配
AI.method: 将双臂操作重构为联合可及性定位和手臂分配问题，提出分层框架：1) 融合多视角RGB-D观测到一致的3D场景表示；2) 生成全局6自由度抓取候选；3) 查询VLM进行空间和语义过滤，获取每个物体的任务相关可及性区域和手臂分配；确保几何有效性同时尊重任务语义
AI.result: 在双臂平台上评估9个真实世界操作任务，涵盖4个类别：并行操作、协调稳定、工具使用和人类交接。相比几何和语义基线，在任务导向抓取方面实现了一致更高的任务成功率
AI.conclusion: 对可及性和手臂分配的显式语义推理有助于在非结构化环境中实现可靠的双臂操作，VLM能够泛化到不同物体类别和任务描述，无需类别特定训练

title: Optimistic Policy Learning under Pessimistic Adversaries with Regret and Violation Guarantees
summary:
Real-world decision-making systems operate in environments where state transitions depend not only on the agent's actions, but also on \textbf{exogenous factors outside its control}--competing agents, environmental disturbances, or strategic adversaries--formally, $s_{h+1} = f(s_h, a_h, \bar{a}_h)+ω_h$ where $\bar{a}_h$ is the adversary/external action, $a_h$ is the agent's action, and $ω_h$ is an additive noise. Ignoring such factors can yield policies that are optimal in isolation but \textbf{fail catastrophically in deployment}, particularly when safety constraints must be satisfied.
  Standard Constrained MDP formulations assume the agent is the sole driver of state evolution, an assumption that breaks down in safety-critical settings. Existing robust RL approaches address this via distributional robustness over transition kernels, but do not explicitly model the \textbf{strategic interaction} between agent and exogenous factor, and rely on strong assumptions about divergence from a known nominal model.
  We model the exogenous factor as an \textbf{adversarial policy} $\barπ$ that co-determines state transitions, and ask how an agent can remain both optimal and safe against such an adversary. \emph{To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to study safety-constrained RL under explicit adversarial dynamics}. We propose \textbf{Robust Hallucinated Constrained Upper-Confidence RL} (\texttt{RHC-UCRL}), a model-based algorithm that maintains optimism over both agent and adversary policies, explicitly separating epistemic from aleatoric uncertainty. \texttt{RHC-UCRL} achieves sub-linear regret and constraint violation guarantees.

AI.tldr: 提出首个研究显式对抗动态下安全约束强化学习的工作，开发了RHC-UCRL算法，该算法在对抗环境中保持乐观策略，实现次线性遗憾和安全约束违反保证。
AI.motivation: 现实决策系统中状态转移不仅取决于智能体动作，还受外部因素（竞争智能体、环境干扰、战略对手）影响。忽略这些因素可能导致孤立最优但在部署中灾难性失败的政策，特别是在需要满足安全约束的场景中。现有方法要么假设智能体是状态演化的唯一驱动因素，要么通过转移核的分布鲁棒性处理，但未显式建模智能体与外部因素的战略交互。
AI.method: 将外部因素建模为对抗策略π̅，共同决定状态转移。提出Robust Hallucinated Constrained Upper-Confidence RL (RHC-UCRL)算法，这是一种基于模型的方法，同时维护对智能体和对抗策略的乐观估计，显式分离认知不确定性和偶然不确定性。
AI.result: RHC-UCRL算法实现了次线性遗憾和约束违反保证，为显式对抗动态下的安全约束强化学习提供了首个理论保证。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个研究显式对抗动态下安全约束强化学习的工作，提出的RHC-UCRL算法能够处理智能体与对抗策略的战略交互，在对抗环境中保持最优性和安全性，为安全关键应用提供了理论基础。

title: Weight Patching: Toward Source-Level Mechanistic Localization in LLMs
comment: 36 pages. Submitted to IEEE for possible publication
summary: Mechanistic interpretability seeks to localize model behavior to the internal components that causally realize it. Prior work has advanced activation-space localization and causal tracing, but modules that appear important in activation space may merely aggregate or amplify upstream signals rather than encode the target capability in their own parameters. To address this gap, we propose Weight Patching, a parameter-space intervention method for source-oriented analysis in paired same-architecture models that differ in how strongly they express a target capability under the inputs of interest. Given a base model and a behavior-specialized counterpart, Weight Patching replaces selected module weights from the specialized model into the base model under a fixed input. We instantiate the method on instruction following and introduce a framework centered on a vector-anchor behavioral interface that provides a shared internal criterion for whether a task-relevant control state has been formed or recovered in open-ended generation. Under this framework, the analysis reveals a hierarchy from shallow candidate source-side carriers to aggregation and routing modules, and further to downstream execution circuits. The recovered component scores can also guide mechanism-aware model merging, improving selective fusion across the evaluated expert combinations and providing additional external validation.

AI.tldr: 提出Weight Patching方法，通过参数空间干预分析模型能力来源，在指令跟随任务中揭示从浅层信号载体到聚合路由模块再到下游执行电路的层次结构
AI.motivation: 现有激活空间定位方法存在局限：某些模块可能只是聚合或放大上游信号，而非在自身参数中编码目标能力。需要参数空间干预方法来区分信号聚合与能力编码
AI.method: 提出Weight Patching方法：在具有相同架构但目标能力表达强度不同的配对模型间，将专门化模型的模块权重替换到基础模型中，通过向量锚行为接口提供共享内部标准来评估任务相关控制状态的形成
AI.result: 分析揭示了从浅层候选源侧载体到聚合路由模块，再到下游执行电路的层次结构。恢复的组件分数可指导机制感知的模型融合，在评估的专家组合中改善选择性融合
AI.conclusion: Weight Patching为参数空间因果分析提供了有效方法，能够区分信号聚合与能力编码，揭示模型内部能力的层次组织，并为模型融合提供机制感知指导

title: LMGenDrive: Bridging Multimodal Understanding and Generative World Modeling for End-to-End Driving
summary: Recent years have seen remarkable progress in autonomous driving, yet generalization to long-tail and open-world scenarios remains a major bottleneck for large-scale deployment. To address this challenge, some works use LLMs and VLMs for vision-language understanding and reasoning, enabling vehicles to interpret rare and safety-critical situations when generating actions. Others study generative world models to capture the spatio-temporal evolution of driving scenes, allowing agents to imagine possible futures before acting. Inspired by human intelligence, which unifies understanding and imagination, we explore a unified model for autonomous driving. We present LMGenDrive, the first framework that combines LLM-based multimodal understanding with generative world models for end-to-end closed-loop driving. Given multi-view camera inputs and natural-language instructions, LMGenDrive generates both future driving videos and control signals. This design provides complementary benefits: video prediction improves spatio-temporal scene modeling, while the LLM contributes strong semantic priors and instruction grounding from large-scale pretraining. We further propose a progressive three-stage training strategy, from vision pretraining to multi-step long-horizon driving, to improve stability and performance. LMGenDrive supports both low-latency online planning and autoregressive offline video generation. Experiments show that it significantly outperforms prior methods on challenging closed-loop benchmarks, with clear gains in instruction following, spatio-temporal understanding, and robustness to rare scenarios. These results suggest that unifying multimodal understanding and generation is a promising direction for more generalizable and robust embodied decision-making systems.

AI.tldr: LMGenDrive：首个将LLM多模态理解与生成世界模型结合的端到端闭环驾驶框架，通过生成未来驾驶视频和控制信号，在指令跟随、时空理解和罕见场景鲁棒性方面显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前自动驾驶在长尾和开放世界场景的泛化能力仍是主要瓶颈。现有方法要么使用LLM/VLM进行视觉语言理解和推理，要么研究生成世界模型捕捉驾驶场景时空演化。受人类智能统一理解和想象的启发，探索将两者结合的统一模型。
AI.method: 提出LMGenDrive框架：结合LLM多模态理解与生成世界模型，给定多视角摄像头输入和自然语言指令，同时生成未来驾驶视频和控制信号。采用渐进式三阶段训练策略：从视觉预训练到多步长时域驾驶，提高稳定性和性能。支持低延迟在线规划和自回归离线视频生成。
AI.result: 在挑战性闭环基准测试中显著优于现有方法，在指令跟随、时空理解和罕见场景鲁棒性方面有明显提升。视频预测改进了时空场景建模，LLM提供了强大的语义先验和指令基础。
AI.conclusion: 统一多模态理解和生成是构建更通用、更鲁棒的具身决策系统的有前景方向。LMGenDrive展示了将理解与想象结合在自动驾驶中的有效性。

title: Bridging MARL to SARL: An Order-Independent Multi-Agent Transformer via Latent Consensus
summary: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) is widely used to address large joint observation and action spaces by decomposing a centralized control problem into multiple interacting agents. However, such decomposition often introduces additional challenges, including non-stationarity, unstable training, weak coordination, and limited theoretical guarantees. In this paper, we propose the Consensus Multi-Agent Transformer (CMAT), a centralized framework that bridges cooperative MARL to a hierarchical single-agent reinforcement learning (SARL) formulation. CMAT treats all agents as a unified entity and employs a Transformer encoder to process the large joint observation space. To handle the extensive joint action space, we introduce a hierarchical decision-making mechanism in which a Transformer decoder autoregressively generates a high-level consensus vector, simulating the process by which agents reach agreement on their strategies in latent space. Conditioned on this consensus, all agents generate their actions simultaneously, enabling order-independent joint decision making and avoiding the sensitivity to action-generation order in conventional Multi-Agent Transformers (MAT). This factorization allows the joint policy to be optimized using single-agent PPO while preserving expressive coordination through the latent consensus. To evaluate the proposed method, we conduct experiments on benchmark tasks from StarCraft II, Multi-Agent MuJoCo, and Google Research Football. The results show that CMAT achieves superior performance over recent centralized solutions, sequential MARL methods, and conventional MARL baselines. The code for this paper is available at:https://github.com/RS2002/CMAT .

AI.tldr: CMAT提出了一种集中式多智能体Transformer框架，将合作MARL转化为分层单智能体强化学习，通过Transformer编码器处理联合观测，解码器自回归生成高层共识向量，实现顺序无关的联合决策。
AI.motivation: 传统多智能体强化学习通过分解集中控制问题引入非平稳性、训练不稳定、协调性差和理论保证有限等挑战，需要一种能处理大规模联合观测和动作空间同时保持协调性的新方法。
AI.method: 提出共识多智能体Transformer（CMAT）：1）使用Transformer编码器处理大规模联合观测空间；2）引入分层决策机制，Transformer解码器自回归生成高层共识向量；3）基于共识同时生成所有智能体动作，实现顺序无关的联合决策；4）使用单智能体PPO优化联合策略。
AI.result: 在StarCraft II、Multi-Agent MuJoCo和Google Research Football基准任务上的实验表明，CMAT优于最近的集中式解决方案、顺序MARL方法和传统MARL基线。
AI.conclusion: CMAT成功将合作MARL转化为分层SARL，通过潜在共识实现表达性协调，解决了传统多智能体Transformer对动作生成顺序敏感的问题，在多个基准任务上表现出优越性能。

title: Generative Anonymization in Event Streams
comment: Accepted to the 1st Workshop on Low-Level Vision Frontiers (LoViF) at IEEE/CVF CVPR 2026
summary: Neuromorphic vision sensors offer low latency and high dynamic range, but their deployment in public spaces raises severe data protection concerns. Recent Event-to-Video (E2V) models can reconstruct high-fidelity intensity images from sparse event streams, inadvertently exposing human identities. Current obfuscation methods, such as masking or scrambling, corrupt the spatio-temporal structure, severely degrading data utility for downstream perception tasks. In this paper, to the best of our knowledge, we present the first generative anonymization framework for event streams to resolve this utility-privacy trade-off. By bridging the modality gap between asynchronous events and standard spatial generative models, our pipeline projects events into an intermediate intensity representation, leverages pretrained models to synthesize realistic, non-existent identities, and re-encodes the features back into the neuromorphic domain. Experiments demonstrate that our method reliably prevents identity recovery from E2V reconstructions while preserving the structural data integrity required for downstream vision tasks. Finally, to facilitate rigorous evaluation, we introduce a novel, synchronized real-world event and RGB dataset captured via precise robotic trajectories, providing a robust benchmark for future research in privacy-preserving neuromorphic vision.

AI.tldr: 首个面向事件流的生成式匿名化框架，通过模态转换和预训练模型合成虚假身份，在保护隐私的同时保持数据实用性
AI.motivation: 神经形态视觉传感器具有低延迟和高动态范围优势，但在公共空间部署时存在严重的数据保护问题。现有事件到视频（E2V）模型能从稀疏事件流重建高保真强度图像，无意中暴露人类身份。当前混淆方法（如掩码或扰乱）会破坏时空结构，严重降低下游感知任务的数据效用。
AI.method: 提出首个生成式匿名化框架，通过桥接异步事件与标准空间生成模型之间的模态差距：1）将事件投影到中间强度表示；2）利用预训练模型合成真实但不存在的身份；3）将特征重新编码回神经形态域。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能可靠防止从E2V重建中恢复身份，同时保持下游视觉任务所需的结构数据完整性。此外，还引入了一个新颖的同步真实世界事件和RGB数据集，通过精确机器人轨迹捕获，为未来隐私保护神经形态视觉研究提供稳健基准。
AI.conclusion: 该研究解决了神经形态视觉中效用与隐私的权衡问题，首次实现了事件流的生成式匿名化，为隐私保护神经形态视觉系统提供了有效解决方案，并通过新数据集促进了该领域的严谨评估。

title: Generative Simulation for Policy Learning in Physical Human-Robot Interaction
summary: Developing autonomous physical human-robot interaction (pHRI) systems is limited by the scarcity of large-scale training data to learn robust robot behaviors for real-world applications. In this paper, we introduce a zero-shot "text2sim2real" generative simulation framework that automatically synthesizes diverse pHRI scenarios from high-level natural-language prompts. Leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs), our pipeline procedurally generates soft-body human models, scene layouts, and robot motion trajectories for assistive tasks. We utilize this framework to autonomously collect large-scale synthetic demonstration datasets and then train vision-based imitation learning policies operating on segmented point clouds. We evaluate our approach through a user study on two physically assistive tasks: scratching and bathing. Our learned policies successfully achieve zero-shot sim-to-real transfer, attaining success rates exceeding 80% and demonstrating resilience to unscripted human motion. Overall, we introduce the first generative simulation pipeline for pHRI applications, automating simulation environment synthesis, data collection, and policy learning. Additional information may be found on our project website: https://rchi-lab.github.io/gen_phri/

AI.tldr: 提出首个用于物理人机交互的零样本"文本到仿真到现实"生成框架，通过自然语言提示自动合成多样化的pHRI场景，实现大规模合成数据生成和零样本仿真到现实迁移
AI.motivation: 物理人机交互系统开发受限于大规模训练数据的稀缺性，难以学习适用于现实应用的鲁棒机器人行为
AI.method: 利用大语言模型和视觉语言模型构建生成式仿真管道，自动生成软体人体模型、场景布局和机器人运动轨迹，通过合成演示数据集训练基于分割点云的视觉模仿学习策略
AI.result: 在抓挠和洗澡两个辅助任务中，学习到的策略成功实现零样本仿真到现实迁移，成功率超过80%，并对非脚本化人体运动表现出鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: 提出了首个用于pHRI应用的生成式仿真管道，实现了仿真环境合成、数据收集和策略学习的自动化，为解决物理人机交互的数据稀缺问题提供了创新解决方案

title: Fragile Reconstruction: Adversarial Vulnerability of Reconstruction-Based Detectors for Diffusion-Generated Images
summary: Recently, detecting AI-generated images produced by diffusion-based models has attracted increasing attention due to their potential threat to safety. Among existing approaches, reconstruction-based methods have emerged as a prominent paradigm for this task. However, we find that such methods exhibit severe security vulnerabilities to adversarial perturbations; that is, by adding imperceptible adversarial perturbations to input images, the detection accuracy of classifiers collapses to near zero. To verify this threat, we present a systematic evaluation of the adversarial robustness of three representative detectors across four diverse generative backbone models. First, we construct adversarial attacks in white-box scenarios, which degrade the performance of all well-trained detectors. Moreover, we find that these attacks demonstrate transferability; specifically, attacks crafted against one detector can be transferred to others, indicating that adversarial attacks on detectors can also be constructed in a black-box setting. Finally, we assess common countermeasures and find that standard defense methods against adversarial attacks provide limited mitigation. We attribute these failures to the low signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) of attacked samples as perceived by the detectors. Overall, our results reveal fundamental security limitations of reconstruction-based detectors and highlight the need to rethink existing detection strategies.

AI.tldr: 该论文发现基于重建的AI生成图像检测器存在严重的安全漏洞，对抗性扰动可使其检测准确率降至接近零，且攻击具有可迁移性，现有防御方法效果有限。
AI.motivation: 随着基于扩散模型的AI生成图像日益普及，其可能带来的安全威胁引起了广泛关注。基于重建的检测方法已成为主流范式，但作者发现这类方法存在严重的安全漏洞，对抗性扰动可轻易绕过检测，这构成了实际的安全威胁。
AI.method: 1. 对三个代表性检测器和四个不同生成骨干模型进行系统性评估；2. 在白盒场景下构建对抗性攻击；3. 验证攻击的可迁移性（跨检测器转移）；4. 评估常见防御方法的有效性；5. 分析失败原因（低信噪比）。
AI.result: 1. 对抗性攻击使所有训练良好的检测器性能崩溃（准确率接近零）；2. 攻击具有可迁移性，白盒攻击可转移到其他检测器，支持黑盒攻击构建；3. 标准对抗性防御方法仅提供有限缓解；4. 失败归因于攻击样本的低信噪比。
AI.conclusion: 基于重建的检测器存在根本性安全限制，对抗性扰动可有效绕过检测且难以防御。这揭示了现有检测策略的安全漏洞，强调需要重新思考AI生成图像检测方法的设计。

title: SIM1: Physics-Aligned Simulator as Zero-Shot Data Scaler in Deformable Worlds
summary: Robotic manipulation with deformable objects represents a data-intensive regime in embodied learning, where shape, contact, and topology co-evolve in ways that far exceed the variability of rigids. Although simulation promises relief from the cost of real-world data acquisition, prevailing sim-to-real pipelines remain rooted in rigid-body abstractions, producing mismatched geometry, fragile soft dynamics, and motion primitives poorly suited for cloth interaction. We posit that simulation fails not for being synthetic, but for being ungrounded. To address this, we introduce SIM1, a physics-aligned real-to-sim-to-real data engine that grounds simulation in the physical world. Given limited demonstrations, the system digitizes scenes into metric-consistent twins, calibrates deformable dynamics through elastic modeling, and expands behaviors via diffusion-based trajectory generation with quality filtering. This pipeline transforms sparse observations into scaled synthetic supervision with near-demonstration fidelity. Experiments show that policies trained on purely synthetic data achieve parity with real-data baselines at a 1:15 equivalence ratio, while delivering 90% zero-shot success and 50% generalization gains in real-world deployment. These results validate physics-aligned simulation as scalable supervision for deformable manipulation and a practical pathway for data-efficient policy learning.

AI.tldr: SIM1：基于物理对齐的真实-仿真-真实数据引擎，通过将仿真与现实物理对齐，为可变形物体操作提供可扩展的合成监督，实现数据高效策略学习
AI.motivation: 传统基于刚体抽象的仿真到真实流水线在处理可变形物体时存在几何不匹配、软体动力学脆弱、运动基元不适配等问题，仿真失败的原因不是合成性，而是缺乏物理基础
AI.method: SIM1物理对齐真实-仿真-真实数据引擎：通过有限演示将场景数字化为度量一致的双胞胎，通过弹性建模校准可变形动力学，使用基于扩散的轨迹生成和质量过滤扩展行为，将稀疏观察转化为具有接近演示保真度的规模化合成监督
AI.result: 在纯合成数据上训练的策略达到与真实数据基线1:15的等效比，在真实世界部署中实现90%的零样本成功率和50%的泛化增益
AI.conclusion: 物理对齐仿真为可变形物体操作提供了可扩展的监督，是数据高效策略学习的实用途径，验证了将仿真与现实物理对齐的重要性

title: Efficient Adversarial Training via Criticality-Aware Fine-Tuning
summary: Vision Transformer (ViT) models have achieved remarkable performance across various vision tasks, with scalability being a key advantage when applied to large datasets. This scalability enables ViT models to exhibit strong generalization capabilities. However, as the number of parameters increases, the robustness of ViT models to adversarial examples does not scale proportionally. Adversarial training (AT), one of the most effective methods for enhancing robustness, typically requires fine-tuning the entire model, leading to prohibitively high computational costs, especially for large ViT architectures. In this paper, we aim to robustly fine-tune only a small subset of parameters to achieve robustness comparable to standard AT. To accomplish this, we introduce Criticality-Aware Adversarial Training (CAAT), a novel method that adaptively allocates resources to the most robustness-critical parameters, fine-tuning only selected modules. Specifically, CAAT efficiently identifies parameters that contribute most to adversarial robustness. It then leverages parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) to robustly adjust weight matrices where the number of critical parameters exceeds a predefined threshold. CAAT exhibits favorable generalization when scaled to larger vision transformer architectures, potentially paving the way for adversarial training at scale, e.g, compared with plain adversarial training, CAAT incurs only a 4.3% decrease in adversarial robustness while tuning approximately 6% of its parameters. Extensive experiments on three widely used adversarial learning datasets demonstrate that CAAT outperforms state-of-the-art lightweight AT methods with fewer trainable parameters.

AI.tldr: CAAT是一种针对Vision Transformer的轻量级对抗训练方法，通过识别对鲁棒性最关键参数并选择性微调，在仅调整约6%参数的情况下实现接近标准对抗训练的性能。
AI.motivation: Vision Transformer模型参数量增加时，对抗鲁棒性并未按比例提升。标准对抗训练需要微调整个模型，计算成本过高，尤其对于大型ViT架构。需要一种仅微调少量参数就能达到类似鲁棒性的高效方法。
AI.method: 提出Criticality-Aware Adversarial Training (CAAT)方法：1) 高效识别对对抗鲁棒性贡献最大的关键参数；2) 自适应地将资源分配给鲁棒性最关键的参数；3) 仅微调选定的模块；4) 当关键参数数量超过预设阈值时，利用参数高效微调技术鲁棒地调整权重矩阵。
AI.result: 在三个广泛使用的对抗学习数据集上的实验表明：CAAT在可训练参数更少的情况下优于最先进的轻量级对抗训练方法。与普通对抗训练相比，CAAT仅调整约6%的参数，对抗鲁棒性仅下降4.3%。该方法在扩展到更大的视觉Transformer架构时表现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: CAAT为大规模对抗训练提供了可行路径，通过选择性微调关键参数，在保持对抗鲁棒性的同时显著降低计算成本，特别适用于大型Vision Transformer模型。

title: Fail2Drive: Benchmarking Closed-Loop Driving Generalization
summary: Generalization under distribution shift remains a central bottleneck for closed-loop autonomous driving. Although simulators like CARLA enable safe and scalable testing, existing benchmarks rarely measure true generalization: they typically reuse training scenarios at test time. Success can therefore reflect memorization rather than robust driving behavior. We introduce Fail2Drive, the first paired-route benchmark for closed-loop generalization in CARLA, with 200 routes and 17 new scenario classes spanning appearance, layout, behavioral, and robustness shifts. Each shifted route is matched with an in-distribution counterpart, isolating the effect of the shift and turning qualitative failures into quantitative diagnostics. Evaluating multiple state-of-the-art models reveals consistent degradation, with an average success-rate drop of 22.8\%. Our analysis uncovers unexpected failure modes, such as ignoring objects clearly visible in the LiDAR and failing to learn the fundamental concepts of free and occupied space. To accelerate follow-up work, Fail2Drive includes an open-source toolbox for creating new scenarios and validating solvability via a privileged expert policy. Together, these components establish a reproducible foundation for benchmarking and improving closed-loop driving generalization. We open-source all code, data, and tools at https://github.com/autonomousvision/fail2drive .

AI.tldr: Fail2Drive是首个用于CARLA闭环自动驾驶泛化的配对路线基准测试，包含200条路线和17种新场景类别，通过匹配分布内和分布外路线来隔离分布偏移的影响，揭示现有模型平均成功率下降22.8%的泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶基准测试通常在测试时重复使用训练场景，导致成功可能反映的是记忆而非鲁棒驾驶行为，无法真正衡量分布偏移下的泛化能力。需要建立能够隔离分布偏移影响、将定性失败转化为定量诊断的基准测试。
AI.method: 提出Fail2Drive基准测试：1) 包含200条路线和17种新场景类别，涵盖外观、布局、行为和鲁棒性偏移；2) 每个偏移路线都匹配一个分布内对应路线，以隔离偏移影响；3) 提供开源工具箱用于创建新场景并通过特权专家策略验证可解性。
AI.result: 评估多个最先进模型显示一致的性能退化，平均成功率下降22.8%。分析揭示了意外的失败模式，如忽略LiDAR中清晰可见的物体，以及未能学习自由空间和占用空间的基本概念。
AI.conclusion: Fail2Drive为基准测试和改进闭环驾驶泛化能力建立了可重复的基础。通过开源代码、数据和工具，加速后续研究工作，推动自动驾驶在分布偏移下的真正泛化能力发展。

title: Learning from Change: Predictive Models for Incident Prevention in a Regulated IT Environment
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures, 2026 IEEE/ACM 48th International Conference on Software Engineering: Software Engineering in Practice (ICSE-SEIP)
summary: Effective IT change management is important for businesses that depend on software and services, particularly in highly regulated sectors such as finance, where operational reliability, auditability, and explainability are essential. A significant portion of IT incidents are caused by changes, making it important to identify high-risk changes before deployment. This study presents a predictive incident risk scoring approach at a large international bank. The approach supports engineers during the assessment and planning phases of change deployments by predicting the potential of inducing incidents. To satisfy regulatory constraints, we built the model with auditability and explainability in mind, applying SHAP values to provide feature-level insights and ensure decisions are traceable and transparent. Using a one-year real-world dataset, we compare the existing rule-based process with three machine learning models: HGBC, LightGBM, and XGBoost. LightGBM achieved the best performance, particularly when enriched with aggregated team metrics that capture organisational context. Our results show that data-driven, interpretable models can outperform rule-based approaches while meeting compliance needs, enabling proactive risk mitigation and more reliable IT operations.

AI.tldr: 基于机器学习（特别是LightGBM）的IT变更风险预测模型，在大型国际银行中超越基于规则的方法，同时满足监管可审计性和可解释性要求
AI.motivation: 在金融等高度监管行业中，IT变更常导致事故，需要事前识别高风险变更。现有基于规则的方法效果有限，需要数据驱动的预测方法，同时满足监管对可审计性和可解释性的要求
AI.method: 提出预测性事故风险评分方法，使用SHAP值确保可解释性，比较三种机器学习模型（HGBC、LightGBM、XGBoost），并引入聚合团队指标捕捉组织上下文
AI.result: LightGBM表现最佳，特别是当加入聚合团队指标后。数据驱动的可解释模型在满足合规需求的同时，超越了基于规则的方法
AI.conclusion: 可解释的机器学习模型能够有效预测IT变更风险，实现主动风险缓解和更可靠的IT运维，同时满足金融行业的监管要求

title: ActiveGlasses: Learning Manipulation with Active Vision from Ego-centric Human Demonstration
summary: Large-scale real-world robot data collection is a prerequisite for bringing robots into everyday deployment. However, existing pipelines often rely on specialized handheld devices to bridge the embodiment gap, which not only increases operator burden and limits scalability, but also makes it difficult to capture the naturally coordinated perception-manipulation behaviors of human daily interaction. This challenge calls for a more natural system that can faithfully capture human manipulation and perception behaviors while enabling zero-shot transfer to robotic platforms. We introduce ActiveGlasses, a system for learning robot manipulation from ego-centric human demonstrations with active vision. A stereo camera mounted on smart glasses serves as the sole perception device for both data collection and policy inference: the operator wears it during bare-hand demonstrations, and the same camera is mounted on a 6-DoF perception arm during deployment to reproduce human active vision. To enable zero-transfer, we extract object trajectories from demonstrations and use an object-centric point-cloud policy to jointly predict manipulation and head movement. Across several challenging tasks involving occlusion and precise interaction, ActiveGlasses achieves zero-shot transfer with active vision, consistently outperforms strong baselines under the same hardware setup, and generalizes across two robot platforms.

AI.tldr: ActiveGlasses系统通过智能眼镜上的立体相机采集人类第一人称视角演示，实现机器人操作的零样本迁移，利用主动视觉解决遮挡和精确交互问题
AI.motivation: 现有机器人数据采集方法依赖专业手持设备，增加了操作者负担且难以捕捉人类自然协调的感知-操作行为，需要更自然的系统实现零样本迁移到机器人平台
AI.method: 使用智能眼镜上的立体相机作为唯一感知设备，在演示时由操作者佩戴，部署时安装在6自由度感知臂上重现人类主动视觉；从演示中提取物体轨迹，使用以物体为中心的点云策略联合预测操作和头部运动
AI.result: 在涉及遮挡和精确交互的多个挑战性任务中，ActiveGlasses实现了带主动视觉的零样本迁移，在相同硬件设置下始终优于强基线，并在两个机器人平台上展现出泛化能力
AI.conclusion: ActiveGlasses提供了一种更自然的人类演示采集系统，通过主动视觉和物体中心策略实现了从人类到机器人的零样本迁移，为大规模机器人数据收集提供了可行方案

title: From Order to Distribution: A Spectral Characterization of Forgetting in Continual Learning
summary: A central challenge in continual learning is forgetting, the loss of performance on previously learned tasks induced by sequential adaptation to new ones. While forgetting has been extensively studied empirically, rigorous theoretical characterizations remain limited. A notable step in this direction is \citet{evron2022catastrophic}, which analyzes forgetting under random orderings of a fixed task collection in overparameterized linear regression. We shift the perspective from order to distribution. Rather than asking how a fixed task collection behaves under random orderings, we study an exact-fit linear regime in which tasks are sampled i.i.d.\ from a task distribution~$Π$, and ask how the generating distribution itself governs forgetting. In this setting, we derive an exact operator identity for the forgetting quantity, revealing a recursive spectral structure. Building on this identity, we establish an unconditional upper bound, identify the leading asymptotic term, and, in generic nondegenerate cases, characterize the convergence rate up to constants. We further relate this rate to geometric properties of the task distribution, clarifying what drives slow or fast forgetting in this model.

AI.tldr: 该论文从分布视角研究持续学习中的遗忘问题，推导出遗忘量的精确算子恒等式，建立了无条件上界，并揭示了任务分布的几何特性如何影响遗忘速率。
AI.motivation: 持续学习中的遗忘问题已有大量实证研究，但严格的理论分析仍然有限。现有研究主要关注固定任务集合在随机顺序下的行为，本文转向从分布角度研究问题，探讨任务生成分布本身如何决定遗忘现象。
AI.method: 在精确拟合的线性回归框架下，假设任务从分布Π中独立同分布采样。通过推导遗忘量的精确算子恒等式，揭示其递归谱结构。基于此恒等式建立无条件上界，识别主导渐近项，并在一般非退化情况下以常数精度表征收敛速率。
AI.result: 建立了遗忘量的无条件上界，确定了主导渐近项，在一般非退化情况下以常数精度表征了收敛速率。进一步将遗忘速率与任务分布的几何特性联系起来，阐明了导致快速或慢速遗忘的分布特征。
AI.conclusion: 从分布视角为持续学习中的遗忘问题提供了严格的理论分析框架。通过算子恒等式揭示了遗忘的递归谱结构，建立了遗忘速率与任务分布几何特性之间的明确关系，为理解遗忘机制提供了新的理论洞见。

title: Cognition-Inspired Dual-Stream Semantic Enhancement for Vision-Based Dynamic Emotion Modeling
summary: The human brain constructs emotional percepts not by processing facial expressions in isolation, but through a dynamic, hierarchical integration of sensory input with semantic and contextual knowledge. However, existing vision-based dynamic emotion modeling approaches often neglect emotion perception and cognitive theories. To bridge this gap between machine and human emotion perception, we propose cognition-inspired Dual-stream Semantic Enhancement (DuSE). Our model instantiates a dual-stream cognitive architecture. The first stream, a Hierarchical Temporal Prompt Cluster (HTPC), operationalizes the cognitive priming effect. It simulates how linguistic cues pre-sensitize neural pathways, modulating the processing of incoming visual stimuli by aligning textual semantics with fine-grained temporal features of facial dynamics. The second stream, a Latent Semantic Emotion Aggregator (LSEA), computationally models the knowledge integration process, akin to the mechanism described by the Conceptual Act Theory. It aggregates sensory inputs and synthesizes them with learned conceptual knowledge, reflecting the role of the hippocampus and default mode network in constructing a coherent emotional experience. By explicitly modeling these neuro-cognitive mechanisms, DuSE provides a more neurally plausible and robust framework for dynamic facial expression recognition (DFER). Extensive experiments on challenging in-the-wild benchmarks validate our cognition-centric approach, demonstrating that emulating the brain's strategies for emotion processing yields state-of-the-art performance and enhances model interpretability.

AI.tldr: 提出认知启发的双流语义增强模型（DuSE），通过模拟人脑情绪感知的神经认知机制，提升动态面部表情识别的性能与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉的动态情绪建模方法往往忽视情绪感知和认知理论，与人脑情绪处理机制存在差距。人脑通过动态、层次化的方式整合感官输入与语义上下文知识来构建情绪感知，而现有方法未能充分模拟这一过程。
AI.method: 提出DuSE模型，实例化双流认知架构：1）层次化时序提示簇（HTPC）模拟认知启动效应，通过文本语义与面部动态细粒度时序特征对齐来调制视觉刺激处理；2）潜在语义情绪聚合器（LSEA）计算建模知识整合过程，类似概念行为理论机制，聚合感官输入并与学习的概念知识合成。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的真实世界基准测试中进行了广泛实验，验证了认知中心方法的有效性。模拟大脑情绪处理策略实现了最先进的性能，并增强了模型的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模神经认知机制，DuSE为动态面部表情识别提供了更符合神经科学原理且鲁棒的框架。模拟大脑情绪处理策略不仅能提升性能，还能增强模型的可解释性，弥合机器与人类情绪感知之间的差距。

title: A Multi-Agent Feedback System for Detecting and Describing News Events in Satellite Imagery
summary: Changes in satellite imagery often occur over multiple time steps. Despite the emergence of bi-temporal change captioning datasets, there is a lack of multi-temporal event captioning datasets (at least two images per sequence) in remote sensing. This gap exists because (1) searching for visible events in satellite imagery and (2) labeling multi-temporal sequences require significant time and labor. To address these challenges, we present SkyScraper, an iterative multi-agent workflow that geocodes news articles and synthesizes captions for corresponding satellite image sequences. Our experiments show that SkyScraper successfully finds 5x more events than traditional geocoding methods, demonstrating that agentic feedback is an effective strategy for surfacing new multi-temporal events in satellite imagery. We apply our framework to a large database of global news articles, curating a new multi-temporal captioning dataset with 5,000 sequences. By automatically identifying imagery related to news events, our work also supports journalism and reporting efforts.

AI.tldr: SkyScraper：一种迭代多智能体工作流，通过地理编码新闻文章并合成卫星图像序列的标注，创建多时序遥感事件标注数据集
AI.motivation: 遥感领域缺乏多时序事件标注数据集（至少每序列两幅图像），因为（1）在卫星图像中搜索可见事件和（2）标注多时序序列需要大量时间和人力
AI.method: 提出SkyScraper迭代多智能体工作流，通过地理编码新闻文章并为对应卫星图像序列合成标注，利用智能体反馈作为发现新多时序事件的有效策略
AI.result: SkyScraper比传统地理编码方法多发现5倍的事件；应用该框架到全球新闻文章数据库，创建了包含5,000个序列的新多时序标注数据集
AI.conclusion: 该工作填补了遥感领域多时序事件标注数据集的空白，通过自动识别与新闻事件相关的图像，也支持新闻和报道工作

title: Syn-TurnTurk: A Synthetic Dataset for Turn-Taking Prediction in Turkish Dialogues
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE ICASI 2026
summary: Managing natural dialogue timing is a significant challenge for voice-based chatbots. Most current systems usually rely on simple silence detection, which often fails because human speech patterns involve irregular pauses. This causes bots to interrupt users, breaking the conversational flow. This problem is even more severe for languages like Turkish, which lack high-quality datasets for turn-taking prediction. This paper introduces Syn-TurnTurk, a synthetic Turkish dialogue dataset generated using various Qwen Large Language Models (LLMs) to mirror real-life verbal exchanges, including overlaps and strategic silences. We evaluated the dataset using several traditional and deep learning architectures. The results show that advanced models, particularly BI-LSTM and Ensemble (LR+RF) methods, achieve high accuracy (0.839) and AUC scores (0.910). These findings demonstrate that our synthetic dataset can have a positive affect for models understand linguistic cues, allowing for more natural human-machine interaction in Turkish.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对土耳其语对话中基于静默检测的语音机器人经常打断用户的问题，创建了Syn-TurnTurk合成对话数据集，并验证了其在转接预测任务上的有效性。
AI.motivation: 当前语音聊天机器人主要依赖简单的静默检测来管理对话时机，但这种方法经常失败，因为人类语音模式包含不规则的停顿，导致机器人打断用户，破坏对话流畅性。对于土耳其语等缺乏高质量转接预测数据集的语言，这一问题尤为严重。
AI.method: 使用多种Qwen大语言模型生成Syn-TurnTurk合成土耳其语对话数据集，模拟真实口语交流中的重叠和策略性停顿。使用多种传统和深度学习架构评估数据集性能。
AI.result: BI-LSTM和集成方法（LR+RF）在转接预测任务上取得了高准确率（0.839）和AUC分数（0.910），表明合成数据集能有效帮助模型理解语言线索。
AI.conclusion: Syn-TurnTurk合成数据集能够改善土耳其语人机交互的自然性，使模型更好地理解语言线索，实现更自然的对话时机管理。

title: 3D-VCD: Hallucination Mitigation in 3D-LLM Embodied Agents through Visual Contrastive Decoding
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, Accepted at IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026
summary: Large multimodal models are increasingly used as the reasoning core of embodied agents operating in 3D environments, yet they remain prone to hallucinations that can produce unsafe and ungrounded decisions. Existing inference-time hallucination mitigation methods largely target 2D vision-language settings and do not transfer to embodied 3D reasoning, where failures arise from object presence, spatial layout, and geometric grounding rather than pixel-level inconsistencies. We introduce 3D-VCD, the first inference-time visual contrastive decoding framework for hallucination mitigation in 3D embodied agents. 3D-VCD constructs a distorted 3D scene graph by applying semantic and geometric perturbations to object-centric representations, such as category substitutions and coordinate or extent corruption. By contrasting predictions under the original and distorted 3D contexts, our method suppresses tokens that are insensitive to grounded scene evidence and are therefore likely driven by language priors. We evaluate 3D-VCD on the 3D-POPE and HEAL benchmarks and show that it consistently improves grounded reasoning without any retraining, establishing inference-time contrastive decoding over structured 3D representations as an effective and practical route to more reliable embodied intelligence.

AI.tldr: 3D-VCD：首个用于3D具身智能体幻觉缓解的推理时视觉对比解码框架，通过对比原始与扭曲3D场景图的预测来抑制依赖语言先验而非场景证据的token
AI.motivation: 大型多模态模型作为3D环境中具身智能体的推理核心，容易产生幻觉导致不安全和非接地的决策。现有推理时幻觉缓解方法主要针对2D视觉语言设置，无法迁移到具身3D推理，因为3D环境中的失败源于物体存在、空间布局和几何接地问题而非像素级不一致
AI.method: 3D-VCD通过应用语义和几何扰动（如类别替换、坐标或范围破坏）到以物体为中心的表示，构建扭曲的3D场景图。通过对比原始和扭曲3D上下文下的预测，抑制对场景证据不敏感、可能由语言先验驱动的token
AI.result: 在3D-POPE和HEAL基准测试中，3D-VCD无需重新训练即可持续改进接地推理，确立了基于结构化3D表示的推理时对比解码作为实现更可靠具身智能的有效实用途径
AI.conclusion: 3D-VCD是首个针对3D具身智能体幻觉缓解的推理时视觉对比解码框架，通过对比解码结构化3D表示有效抑制幻觉，为更可靠的具身智能提供实用解决方案

title: CLASP: Class-Adaptive Layer Fusion and Dual-Stage Pruning for Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) suffer from substantial computational overhead due to the high redundancy in visual token sequences. Existing approaches typically address this issue using single-layer Vision Transformer (ViT) features and static pruning strategies. However, such fixed configurations are often brittle under diverse instructions. To overcome these limitations, we propose CLASP, a plug-and-play token reduction framework based on class-adaptive layer fusion and dual-stage pruning. Specifically, CLASP first constructs category-specific visual representations through multi-layer vision feature fusion. It then performs dual-stage pruning, allocating the token budget between attention-salient pivot tokens for relevance and redundancy-aware completion tokens for coverage. Through class-adaptive pruning, CLASP enables prompt-conditioned feature fusion and budget allocation, allowing aggressive yet robust visual token reduction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CLASP consistently outperforms existing methods across a wide range of benchmarks, pruning ratios, and MLLM architectures. Code will be available at https://github.com/Yunkaidang/CLASP.

AI.tldr: CLASP是一种用于多模态大语言模型的即插即用token缩减框架，通过类别自适应层融合和双阶段剪枝，显著降低视觉token序列的计算冗余。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型因视觉token序列高度冗余而产生大量计算开销。现有方法通常使用单层ViT特征和静态剪枝策略，但这些固定配置在不同指令下表现脆弱。
AI.method: 提出CLASP框架：1)通过多层视觉特征融合构建类别特定的视觉表示；2)执行双阶段剪枝，在注意力显著的关键token（用于相关性）和冗余感知的补充token（用于覆盖）之间分配token预算；3)通过类别自适应剪枝实现提示条件特征融合和预算分配。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，CLASP在广泛的基准测试、剪枝比率和MLLM架构中始终优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CLASP通过类别自适应层融合和双阶段剪枝，实现了既激进又鲁棒的视觉token缩减，显著提升了多模态大语言模型的效率。

title: Outperforming Self-Attention Mechanisms in Solar Irradiance Forecasting via Physics-Guided Neural Networks
comment: This is a second version of a previously published paper. DOI: Https://doi.org/10.36227/techrxiv.176827103.31624241/v1
summary: Accurate Global Horizontal Irradiance (GHI) forecasting is critical for grid stability, particularly in arid regions characterized by rapid aerosol fluctuations. While recent trends favor computationally expensive Transformer-based architectures, this paper challenges the prevailing "complexity-first" paradigm. We propose a lightweight, Physics-Informed Hybrid CNN-BiLSTM framework that prioritizes domain knowledge over architectural depth. The model integrates a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) for spatial feature extraction with a Bi-Directional LSTM for capturing temporal dependencies. Unlike standard data-driven approaches, our model is explicitly guided by a vector of 15 engineered features including Clear-Sky indices and Solar Zenith Angle - rather than relying solely on raw historical data. Hyperparameters are rigorously tuned using Bayesian Optimization to ensure global optimality. Experimental validation using NASA POWER data in Sudan demonstrates that our physics-guided approach achieves a Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) of 19.53 W/m^2, significantly outperforming complex attention-based baselines (RMSE 30.64 W/m^2). These results confirm a "Complexity Paradox": in high-noise meteorological tasks, explicit physical constraints offer a more efficient and accurate alternative to self-attention mechanisms. The findings advocate for a shift towards hybrid, physics-aware AI for real-time renewable energy management.

AI.tldr: 提出一种轻量级物理信息混合CNN-BiLSTM框架用于全球水平辐照度预测，在苏丹地区验证中显著优于复杂的Transformer基线，证明在气象任务中物理约束比复杂架构更有效
AI.motivation: 针对干旱地区气溶胶快速波动导致的电网稳定性问题，挑战当前"复杂度优先"的Transformer趋势，探索更高效的物理引导方法
AI.method: 提出轻量级物理信息混合CNN-BiLSTM框架：CNN提取空间特征，BiLSTM捕捉时间依赖，结合15个工程特征（晴空指数、太阳天顶角等），使用贝叶斯优化调参
AI.result: 使用NASA POWER数据在苏丹验证，RMSE为19.53 W/m²，显著优于注意力基线（30.64 W/m²），证明物理约束方法更优
AI.conclusion: 提出"复杂度悖论"：在高噪声气象任务中，显式物理约束比自注意力机制更高效准确，倡导向混合物理感知AI转变以支持实时可再生能源管理

title: Sumo: Dynamic and Generalizable Whole-Body Loco-Manipulation
summary: This paper presents a sim-to-real approach that enables legged robots to dynamically manipulate large and heavy objects with whole-body dexterity. Our key insight is that by performing test-time steering of a pre-trained whole-body control policy with a sample-based planner, we can enable these robots to solve a variety of dynamic loco-manipulation tasks. Interestingly, we find our method generalizes to a diverse set of objects and tasks with no additional tuning or training, and can be further enhanced by flexibly adjusting the cost function at test time. We demonstrate the capabilities of our approach through a variety of challenging loco-manipulation tasks on a Spot quadruped robot in the real world, including uprighting a tire heavier than the robot's nominal lifting capacity and dragging a crowd-control barrier larger and taller than the robot itself. Additionally, we show that the same approach can be generalized to humanoid loco-manipulation tasks, such as opening a door and pushing a table, in simulation. Project code and videos are available at https://sumo.rai-inst.com/.

AI.tldr: 提出一种sim-to-real方法，使足式机器人能够通过全身灵巧性动态操纵大型重物，通过测试时引导预训练全身控制策略与基于采样的规划器相结合，实现多样化的动态移动操纵任务。
AI.motivation: 解决足式机器人在现实世界中动态操纵大型、重型物体时面临的挑战，传统方法通常需要针对特定任务进行大量调整或训练，缺乏通用性和灵活性。
AI.method: 采用sim-to-real框架，结合预训练的全身控制策略和基于采样的规划器进行测试时引导，通过灵活调整成本函数增强适应性，无需额外调参或训练即可泛化到多种物体和任务。
AI.result: 在真实世界的Spot四足机器人上成功完成多项挑战性移动操纵任务，包括扶正超过机器人标称提升能力的轮胎、拖动比机器人更大更高的防暴屏障；在仿真中扩展到人形机器人开门、推桌等任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法展示了通过测试时引导预训练策略实现足式机器人通用动态移动操纵的可行性，为机器人全身灵巧操作提供了有效的sim-to-real解决方案，具有广泛的应用潜力。

title: FAST: A Synergistic Framework of Attention and State-space Models for Spatiotemporal Traffic Prediction
summary: Traffic forecasting requires modeling complex temporal dynamics and long-range spatial dependencies over large sensor networks. Existing methods typically face a trade-off between expressiveness and efficiency: Transformer-based models capture global dependencies well but suffer from quadratic complexity, while recent selective state-space models are computationally efficient yet less effective at modeling spatial interactions in graph-structured traffic data. We propose FAST, a unified framework that combines attention and state-space modeling for scalable spatiotemporal traffic forecasting. FAST adopts a Temporal-Spatial-Temporal architecture, where temporal attention modules capture both short- and long-term temporal patterns, and a Mamba-based spatial module models long-range inter-sensor dependencies with linear complexity. To better represent heterogeneous traffic contexts, FAST further introduces a learnable multi-source spatiotemporal embedding that integrates historical traffic flow, temporal context, and node-level information, together with a multi-level skip prediction mechanism for hierarchical feature fusion. Experiments on PeMS04, PeMS07, and PeMS08 show that FAST consistently outperforms strong baselines from Transformer-, GNN-, attention-, and Mamba-based families. In particular, FAST achieves the best MAE and RMSE on all three benchmarks, with up to 4.3\% lower RMSE and 2.8\% lower MAE than the strongest baseline, demonstrating a favorable balance between accuracy, scalability, and generalization.

AI.tldr: FAST是一个结合注意力机制和状态空间模型的交通预测框架，采用Temporal-Spatial-Temporal架构，通过Mamba模块实现线性复杂度的长距离空间依赖建模，在多个基准数据集上取得最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 现有交通预测方法在表达能力和效率之间存在权衡：基于Transformer的模型能很好捕捉全局依赖但具有二次复杂度，而选择性状态空间模型计算高效但在图结构交通数据中建模空间交互效果较差。
AI.method: FAST采用Temporal-Spatial-Temporal架构：时间注意力模块捕捉短期和长期时间模式，基于Mamba的空间模块以线性复杂度建模传感器间的长距离依赖。引入可学习的多源时空嵌入整合历史交通流、时间上下文和节点级信息，以及多级跳跃预测机制进行分层特征融合。
AI.result: 在PeMS04、PeMS07和PeMS08数据集上，FAST在Transformer、GNN、注意力和Mamba等基线方法中表现最佳。在所有三个基准测试中均取得最佳MAE和RMSE，相比最强基线RMSE降低达4.3%，MAE降低达2.8%。
AI.conclusion: FAST框架在准确性、可扩展性和泛化能力之间实现了有利的平衡，为大规模交通预测提供了一种高效且有效的解决方案。

title: ARGOS: Who, Where, and When in Agentic Multi-Camera Person Search
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026 Workshop on Multimodal Spatial Intelligence (MUSI)
summary: We introduce ARGOS, the first benchmark and framework that reformulates multi-camera person search as an interactive reasoning problem requiring an agent to plan, question, and eliminate candidates under information asymmetry. An ARGOS agent receives a vague witness statement and must decide what to ask, when to invoke spatial or temporal tools, and how to interpret ambiguous responses, all within a limited turn budget. Reasoning is grounded in a Spatio-Temporal Topology Graph (STTG) encoding camera connectivity and empirically validated transition times. The benchmark comprises 2,691 tasks across 14 real-world scenarios in three progressive tracks: semantic perception (Who), spatial reasoning (Where), and temporal reasoning (When). Experiments with four LLM backbones show the benchmark is far from solved (best TWS: 0.383 on Track 2, 0.590 on Track 3), and ablations confirm that removing domain-specific tools drops accuracy by up to 49.6 percentage points.

AI.tldr: ARGOS：首个将多摄像头人员搜索重构为交互式推理问题的基准框架，要求智能体在信息不对称下通过规划、提问和排除候选人来完成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有人员搜索方法通常假设完全信息，而现实场景中信息往往模糊、不完整。需要开发能够处理信息不对称、进行交互式推理的系统。
AI.method: 提出ARGOS框架，将人员搜索建模为交互式推理问题。智能体接收模糊目击陈述，在有限轮次内决定提问内容、调用时空工具并解释模糊响应。基于时空拓扑图（STTG）进行推理，该图编码摄像头连接性和经验验证的转移时间。
AI.result: 基准包含2,691个任务，覆盖14个真实场景，分为三个渐进轨道：语义感知（Who）、空间推理（Where）和时间推理（When）。实验显示基准远未解决（最佳TWS：轨道2为0.383，轨道3为0.590）。消融实验证实移除领域特定工具会使准确率下降高达49.6个百分点。
AI.conclusion: ARGOS为多摄像头人员搜索中的交互式推理设立了新基准，展示了信息不对称下智能规划、提问和工具使用的重要性。现有LLM在该任务上表现有限，强调了领域特定工具的必要性。

title: BenGER: A Collaborative Web Platform for End-to-End Benchmarking of German Legal Tasks
summary: Evaluating large language models (LLMs) for legal reasoning requires workflows that span task design, expert annotation, model execution, and metric-based evaluation. In practice, these steps are split across platforms and scripts, limiting transparency, reproducibility, and participation by non-technical legal experts. We present the BenGER (Benchmark for German Law) framework, an open-source web platform that integrates task creation, collaborative annotation, configurable LLM runs, and evaluation with lexical, semantic, factual, and judge-based metrics. BenGER supports multi-organization projects with tenant isolation and role-based access control, and can optionally provide formative, reference-grounded feedback to annotators. We will demonstrate a live deployment showing end-to-end benchmark creation and analysis.

AI.tldr: BenGER是一个开源Web平台，用于评估LLM在法律推理任务中的表现，集成了任务创建、协作标注、可配置的LLM运行和多种评估指标。
AI.motivation: 当前评估LLM法律推理能力的流程分散在不同平台和脚本中，限制了透明度、可重复性和非技术法律专家的参与，需要统一的集成解决方案。
AI.method: 开发BenGER开源Web框架，支持任务创建、协作标注、可配置LLM运行，并提供词汇、语义、事实和法官评估等多种指标，支持多组织项目管理和角色访问控制。
AI.result: 创建了集成的工作流平台，支持端到端的基准测试创建和分析，能够提供基于参考的反馈给标注者，并将在演示中展示实际部署。
AI.conclusion: BenGER框架解决了法律领域LLM评估的碎片化问题，提高了透明度、可重复性和专家参与度，为法律AI评估提供了标准化工具。

title: Density-Driven Optimal Control: Convergence Guarantees for Stochastic LTI Multi-Agent Systems
summary: This paper addresses the decentralized non-uniform area coverage problem for multi-agent systems, a critical task in missions with high spatial priority and resource constraints. While existing density-based methods often rely on computationally heavy Eulerian PDE solvers or heuristic planning, we propose Stochastic Density-Driven Optimal Control (D$^2$OC). This is a rigorous Lagrangian framework that bridges the gap between individual agent dynamics and collective distribution matching. By formulating a stochastic MPC-like problem that minimizes the Wasserstein distance as a running cost, our approach ensures that the time-averaged empirical distribution converges to a non-parametric target density under stochastic LTI dynamics. A key contribution is the formal convergence guarantee established via reachability analysis, providing a bounded tracking error even in the presence of process and measurement noise. Numerical results verify that Stochastic D$^2$OC achieves robust, decentralized coverage while outperforming previous heuristic methods in optimality and consistency.

AI.tldr: 提出随机密度驱动最优控制(D²OC)方法，解决多智能体系统的去中心化非均匀区域覆盖问题，通过最小化Wasserstein距离作为运行成本，确保时间平均经验分布收敛到非参数目标密度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于密度的方法通常依赖计算量大的欧拉PDE求解器或启发式规划，无法在具有高空间优先级和资源约束的任务中有效解决去中心化非均匀区域覆盖问题。
AI.method: 提出随机密度驱动最优控制(D²OC)，这是一个严格的拉格朗日框架，通过制定随机MPC类问题，最小化Wasserstein距离作为运行成本，将个体智能体动力学与集体分布匹配联系起来。
AI.result: 通过可达性分析建立了形式收敛保证，即使在存在过程和测量噪声的情况下也能提供有界的跟踪误差。数值结果表明，随机D²OC实现了鲁棒的去中心化覆盖，在最优性和一致性方面优于先前的启发式方法。
AI.conclusion: 随机D²OC为多智能体系统的去中心化非均匀区域覆盖提供了一种严格的理论框架，具有形式收敛保证和实际性能优势，填补了现有方法的空白。

title: Scaling In-Context Segmentation with Hierarchical Supervision
summary: In-context learning (ICL) enables medical image segmentation models to adapt to new anatomical structures from limited examples, reducing the clinical annotation burden. However, standard ICL methods typically rely on dense, global cross-attention, which scales poorly with image resolution. While recent approaches have introduced localized attention mechanisms, they often lack explicit supervision on the selection process, leading to redundant computation in non-informative regions. We propose PatchICL, a hierarchical framework that combines selective image patching with multi-level supervision. Our approach learns to actively identify and attend only to the most informative anatomical regions. Compared to UniverSeg, a strong global-attention baseline, PatchICL achieves competitive in-domain CT segmentation accuracy while reducing compute by 44\% at $512\times512$ resolution. On 35 out-of-domain datasets spanning diverse imaging modalities, PatchICL outperforms the baseline on 6 of 13 modality categories, with particular strength on modalities dominated by localized pathology such as OCT and dermoscopy. Training and evaluation code are available at https://github.com/tidiane-camaret/ic_segmentation

AI.tldr: PatchICL提出了一种用于医学图像分割的分层框架，通过选择性图像分块和多级监督，在保持分割精度的同时显著减少计算量。
AI.motivation: 现有上下文学习方法在医学图像分割中存在两个主要问题：1) 标准的全局交叉注意力机制在高分辨率图像上计算效率低下；2) 局部注意力方法缺乏对选择过程的明确监督，导致在非信息区域进行冗余计算。
AI.method: PatchICL采用分层框架，结合选择性图像分块和多级监督。该方法学习主动识别并仅关注最具信息量的解剖区域，通过多级监督优化选择过程。
AI.result: 在512×512分辨率下，PatchICL相比全局注意力基线UniverSeg，在保持竞争力的域内CT分割精度的同时，计算量减少44%。在35个跨域数据集上，PatchICL在13个模态类别中的6个上优于基线，特别是在OCT和皮肤镜检查等局部病理主导的模态上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: PatchICL通过选择性关注信息丰富的解剖区域，实现了计算效率与分割性能的有效平衡，为医学图像分割中的上下文学习提供了更高效的解决方案。

title: LEGO: Latent-space Exploration for Geometry-aware Optimization of Humanoid Kinematic Design
summary: Designing robot morphologies and kinematics has traditionally relied on human intuition, with little systematic foundation. Motion-design co-optimization offers a promising path toward automation, but two major challenges remain: (i) the vast, unstructured design space and (ii) the difficulty of constructing task-specific loss functions. We propose a new paradigm that minimizes human involvement by (i) learning the design search space from existing mechanical designs, rather than hand-crafting it, and (ii) defining the loss directly from human motion data via motion retargeting and Procrustes analysis. Using screw-theory-based joint axis representation and isometric manifold learning, we construct a compact, geometry-preserving latent space of humanoid upper body designs in which optimization is tractable. We then solve design optimization in this latent space using gradient-free optimization. Our approach establishes a principled framework for data-driven robot design and demonstrates that leveraging existing designs and human motion can effectively guide the automated discovery of novel robot design.

AI.tldr: 提出基于数据驱动的机器人设计新范式：从现有机械设计中学习设计搜索空间，通过人体运动数据定义损失函数，在紧凑的几何保持潜在空间中优化人形机器人上半身设计
AI.motivation: 传统机器人形态学和运动学设计依赖人类直觉，缺乏系统化基础。运动设计协同优化面临两大挑战：巨大的非结构化设计空间和难以构建任务特定损失函数
AI.method: 1) 从现有机械设计中学习设计搜索空间而非手工构建；2) 通过运动重定向和Procrustes分析从人体运动数据直接定义损失函数；3) 使用基于螺旋理论的关节轴表示和等距流形学习构建紧凑的几何保持潜在空间；4) 在该潜在空间中使用无梯度优化解决设计优化问题
AI.result: 建立了一个数据驱动机器人设计的原理性框架，证明利用现有设计和人体运动可以有效指导新型机器人设计的自动化发现
AI.conclusion: 提出的新范式通过最小化人类参与，利用现有设计学习搜索空间和人体运动数据定义损失，为机器人设计的自动化提供了系统化方法，展示了数据驱动设计在发现新型机器人设计方面的有效性

title: WIN-U: Woodbury-Informed Newton-Unlearning as a retain-free Machine Unlearning Framework
comment: 21 pages, 3 figures, under review at COLM2026
summary: Privacy concerns in LLMs have led to the rapidly growing need to enforce a data's "right to be forgotten". Machine unlearning addresses precisely this task, namely the removal of the influence of some specific data, i.e., the forget set, from a trained model. The gold standard for unlearning is to produce the model that would have been learned on only the rest of the training data, i.e., the retain set. Most existing unlearning methods rely on direct access to the retained data, which may not be practical due to privacy or cost constraints. We propose WIN-U, a retained-data free unlearning framework that requires only second order information for the originally trained model on the full data. The unlearning is performed using a single Newton-style step. Using the Woodbury matrix identity and a generalized Gauss-Newton approximation for the forget set curvature, the WIN-U update recovers the closed-form linear solution and serves as a local second-order approximation to the gold-standard retraining optimum.
