The mechanism is evaluated in a lifelong robotic warehouse multi-agent pickup-and-delivery scenario with kinematic orientation constraints. The results highlight that the Karma mechanism balances replanning effort across agents, reducing disparity in service times without sacrificing overall efficiency. Code: https://github.com/DerKevinRiehl/karma_dmapf

AI.tldr: 提出基于Karma机制的去中心化多智能体路径规划框架，通过不可交易的信用记录智能体历史合作行为，在双边协商中解决冲突，实现长期公平性
AI.motivation: 集中式最优求解器计算复杂度指数级增长，难以扩展到大规模系统和实时应用；现有去中心化启发式方法虽然更快，但导致次优结果和高成本差异。需要一种既能保持效率又能促进公平的去中心化协调机制
AI.method: 基于Karma机制（人工、不可交易的信用）的去中心化协调框架，将冲突解决建模为双边协商过程，智能体通过成对重规划解决冲突，同时考虑历史合作行为来调节未来冲突解决决策
AI.result: 在具有运动学方向约束的终身机器人仓库多智能体取货-送货场景中评估，Karma机制能平衡智能体间的重规划工作量，减少服务时间差异，同时不牺牲整体效率
AI.conclusion: Karma机制为多智能体路径规划提供了一种有效的去中心化协调方法，能够在有限通信和无全局优先级结构的情况下，通过记录和考虑智能体历史合作行为，实现长期公平性和效率平衡

title: WorldMAP: Bootstrapping Vision-Language Navigation Trajectory Prediction with Generative World Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) and generative world models are opening new opportunities for embodied navigation. VLMs are increasingly used as direct planners or trajectory predictors, while world models support look-ahead reasoning by imagining future views. Yet predicting a reliable trajectory from a single egocentric observation remains challenging. Current VLMs often generate unstable trajectories, and world models, though able to synthesize plausible futures, do not directly provide the grounded signals needed for navigation learning. This raises a central question: how can generated futures be turned into supervision for grounded trajectory prediction? We present WorldMAP, a teacher--student framework that converts world-model-generated futures into persistent semantic-spatial structure and planning-derived supervision. Its world-model-driven teacher builds semantic-spatial memory from generated videos, grounds task-relevant targets and obstacles, and produces trajectory pseudo-labels through explicit planning. A lightweight student with a multi-hypothesis trajectory head is then trained to predict navigation trajectories directly from vision-language inputs. On Target-Bench, WorldMAP achieves the best ADE and FDE among compared methods, reducing ADE by 18.0% and FDE by 42.1% relative to the best competing baseline, while lifting a small open-source VLM to DTW performance competitive with proprietary models. More broadly, the results suggest that, in embodied navigation, the value of world models may lie less in supplying action-ready imagined evidence than in synthesizing structured supervision for navigation learning.

AI.tldr: WorldMAP：一种将世界模型生成的未来转换为语义-空间结构和规划监督的师生框架，用于提升具身导航中的轨迹预测性能
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型（VLMs）在单视角轨迹预测中不稳定，而世界模型虽然能合成未来视图，但缺乏导航学习所需的接地信号。核心问题是如何将生成的未来转换为接地轨迹预测的监督信号。
AI.method: 提出WorldMAP师生框架：世界模型驱动的教师从生成的视频构建语义-空间记忆，接地任务相关目标和障碍，通过显式规划产生轨迹伪标签；轻量级学生配备多假设轨迹头，直接从视觉语言输入预测导航轨迹。
AI.result: 在Target-Bench上，WorldMAP在ADE和FDE指标上均优于对比方法，ADE降低18.0%，FDE降低42.1%，并将小型开源VLM的DTW性能提升到与专有模型竞争的水平。
AI.conclusion: 在具身导航中，世界模型的价值可能不在于提供可直接用于行动的想象证据，而在于为导航学习合成结构化监督信号。

title: Cross-Attentive Multiview Fusion of Vision-Language Embeddings
summary: Vision-language models have been key to the development of open-vocabulary 2D semantic segmentation. Lifting these models from 2D images to 3D scenes, however, remains a challenging problem. Existing approaches typically back-project and average 2D descriptors across views, or heuristically select a single representative one, often resulting in suboptimal 3D representations. In this work, we introduce a novel multiview transformer architecture that cross-attends across vision-language descriptors from multiple viewpoints and fuses them into a unified per-3D-instance embedding. As a second contribution, we leverage multiview consistency as a self-supervision signal for this fusion, which significantly improves performance when added to a standard supervised target-class loss. Our Cross-Attentive Multiview Fusion, which we denote with its acronym CAMFusion, not only consistently outperforms naive averaging or single-view descriptor selection, but also achieves state-of-the-art results on 3D semantic and instance classification benchmarks, including zero-shot evaluations on out-of-domain datasets.

AI.tldr: CAMFusion：一种新颖的多视角transformer架构，通过跨注意力机制融合多视角视觉-语言描述符，实现3D实例级嵌入，在3D语义和实例分类基准上达到SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常将2D描述符反向投影并平均，或启发式选择单个代表性描述符，导致3D表示次优。需要将视觉-语言模型从2D图像提升到3D场景，解决多视角融合问题
AI.method: 提出跨注意力多视角融合(CAMFusion)：1) 多视角transformer架构，跨注意力融合多视角视觉-语言描述符为统一的3D实例嵌入；2) 利用多视角一致性作为自监督信号，增强标准监督目标类别损失
AI.result: CAMFusion不仅优于朴素平均或单视角描述符选择，还在3D语义和实例分类基准上达到最先进结果，包括在域外数据集上的零样本评估
AI.conclusion: CAMFusion通过跨注意力机制有效融合多视角信息，利用多视角一致性自监督显著提升性能，为开放词汇3D语义分割提供了有效解决方案

title: Incremental Residual Reinforcement Learning Toward Real-World Learning for Social Navigation
summary: As the demand for mobile robots continues to increase, social navigation has emerged as a critical task, driving active research into deep reinforcement learning (RL) approaches. However, because pedestrian dynamics and social conventions vary widely across different regions, simulations cannot easily encompass all possible real-world scenarios. Real-world RL, in which agents learn while operating directly in physical environments, presents a promising solution to this issue. Nevertheless, this approach faces significant challenges, particularly regarding constrained computational resources on edge devices and learning efficiency. In this study, we propose incremental residual RL (IRRL). This method integrates incremental learning, which is a lightweight process that operates without a replay buffer or batch updates, with residual RL, which enhances learning efficiency by training only on the residuals relative to a base policy. Through the simulation experiments, we demonstrated that, despite lacking a replay buffer, IRRL achieved performance comparable to those of conventional replay buffer-based methods and outperformed existing incremental learning approaches. Furthermore, the real-world experiments confirmed that IRRL can enable robots to effectively adapt to previously unseen environments through the real-world learning.

AI.tldr: 提出IRRL方法，结合增量学习和残差强化学习，解决移动机器人社会导航中计算资源受限和学习效率问题
AI.motivation: 移动机器人需求增长，社会导航成为关键任务。由于不同地区行人动态和社会规范差异大，仿真难以覆盖所有真实场景。真实世界RL直接在物理环境中学习是可行方案，但面临边缘设备计算资源受限和学习效率的挑战
AI.method: 提出增量残差强化学习（IRRL），整合增量学习（轻量级、无需回放缓冲区或批量更新）和残差强化学习（仅训练相对于基础策略的残差以提高学习效率）
AI.result: 仿真实验显示，尽管没有回放缓冲区，IRRL性能与传统基于回放缓冲区的方法相当，并优于现有增量学习方法。真实世界实验证实IRRL能使机器人通过真实世界学习有效适应未见环境
AI.conclusion: IRRL方法成功解决了真实世界RL中的计算资源限制和学习效率问题，使移动机器人能够在真实环境中有效学习并适应新场景

title: Concrete Jungle: Towards Concreteness Paved Contrastive Negative Mining for Compositional Understanding
summary: Vision-Language Models demonstrate remarkable capabilities but often struggle with compositional reasoning, exhibiting vulnerabilities regarding word order and attribute binding. This limitation arises from a scarcity of informative samples needed to differentiate subtle semantic variations during contrastive pretraining. Although hard negative mining offers a promising remedy, existing methods lack explicit mechanisms to dictate which linguistic elements undergo modification. Instead of engineering generative architectures, this study establishes lexical concreteness as a fundamental determinant of negative sample efficacy. Modifying highly concrete terms generates more pronounced structural and visual discrepancies, providing a substantially stronger learning signal. Leveraging this principle, ConcretePlant is proposed to systematically isolate and manipulate perceptually grounded concepts. Analyses of the InfoNCE further reveals a severe gradient imbalance, where easily distinguishable pairs disproportionately overwhelm the optimization process and restrict the bandwidth available for nuanced learning. To resolve this degradation, the Cement loss is formulated utilizing a margin-based approach. By correlating psycholinguistic scores with sample difficulty, this objective dynamically calibrates the penalization applied to individual training pairs. Comprehensive evaluations substantiate these theoretical claims. The integrated framework, designated as Slipform, achieves state-of-the-art accuracy across diverse compositional evaluation benchmarks, general cross-modal retrieval, single and multi label linear probing.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出Slipform框架，通过基于词汇具体性的负样本生成和梯度平衡损失函数，解决视觉语言模型在组合推理中的弱点
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型在组合推理方面存在显著弱点，特别是在词序和属性绑定方面。这些限制源于对比预训练中缺乏能够区分细微语义变化的有效样本。虽然硬负样本挖掘提供了有希望的解决方案，但现有方法缺乏明确的机制来控制哪些语言元素被修改。
AI.method: 研究首先建立了词汇具体性作为负样本效力的基本决定因素。基于此提出了ConcretePlant方法，系统性地隔离和操作感知基础概念。进一步分析InfoNCE损失函数发现严重的梯度不平衡问题，为此提出了Cement损失函数，采用基于边界的方法，通过将心理语言学分数与样本难度相关联，动态校准对单个训练对的惩罚。
AI.result: 综合评估证实了理论主张。集成的Slipform框架在多样化的组合评估基准、通用跨模态检索、单标签和多标签线性探测任务中实现了最先进的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 词汇具体性是负样本效力的关键决定因素，修改高度具体的术语会产生更明显的结构和视觉差异，提供更强的学习信号。通过解决梯度不平衡问题，Slipform框架显著提升了视觉语言模型在组合推理任务上的性能。

title: MODIX: A Training-Free Multimodal Information-Driven Positional Index Scaling for Vision-Language Models
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2026 (Highlight). 10 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in multimodal understanding, yet their positional encoding mechanisms remain suboptimal. Existing approaches uniformly assign positional indices to all tokens, overlooking variations in information density within and across modalities, which leads to inefficient attention allocation where redundant visual regions dominate while informative content is underrepresented. We identify positional granularity as an implicit resource and propose MODIX (Multimodal Information-Driven Positional IndeX Scaling), a training-free framework that dynamically adapts positional strides based on modality-specific contributions. MODIX jointly models intra-modal density via covariance-based entropy and inter-modal interaction via cross-modal alignment to derive unified scores, which rescale positional indices to allocate finer granularity to informative modalities while compressing redundant ones, without requiring any modification to model parameters or architecture. Experiments across diverse architectures and benchmarks demonstrate that MODIX consistently improves multimodal reasoning and adaptively reallocates attention according to task-dependent information distributions, suggesting that positional encoding should be treated as an adaptive resource in Transformers for multimodal sequence modeling.

AI.tldr: MODIX是一种无需训练的多模态位置编码框架，通过基于信息密度的动态位置步长调整，优化视觉语言模型中的注意力分配。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型对所有token统一分配位置索引，忽略了模态内和模态间信息密度的差异，导致冗余视觉区域占据过多注意力而信息丰富内容被低估。
AI.method: 提出MODIX框架，通过协方差熵建模模态内密度，通过跨模态对齐建模模态间交互，计算统一分数来动态调整位置步长，为信息丰富的模态分配更细粒度位置索引，压缩冗余模态。
AI.result: 在多种架构和基准测试中，MODIX持续提升多模态推理能力，并能根据任务依赖的信息分布自适应重新分配注意力。
AI.conclusion: 位置编码应被视为Transformer多模态序列建模中的自适应资源，MODIX通过信息驱动的位置索引缩放实现了这一目标。

title: On-Policy Distillation of Language Models for Autonomous Vehicle Motion Planning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have recently demonstrated strong potential for autonomous vehicle motion planning by reformulating trajectory prediction as a language generation problem. However, deploying capable LLMs in resource-constrained onboard systems remains a fundamental challenge. In this paper, we study how to effectively transfer motion planning knowledge from a large teacher LLM to a smaller, more deployable student model. We build on the GPT-Driver framework, which represents driving scenes as language prompts and generates waypoint trajectories with chain-of-thought reasoning, and investigate two student training paradigms: (i) on-policy generalized knowledge distillation (GKD), which trains the student on its own self-generated outputs using dense token-level feedback from the teacher, and (ii) a dense-feedback reinforcement learning (RL) baseline that uses the teacher's log-probabilities as per-token reward signals in a policy gradient framework. Experiments on the nuScenes benchmark show that GKD substantially outperforms the RL baseline and closely approaches teacher-level performance despite a 5$\times$ reduction in model size. These results highlight the practical value of on-policy distillation as a principled and effective approach to deploying LLM-based planners in autonomous driving systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了如何将大型语言模型（LLM）的运动规划知识有效迁移到更小、更易部署的学生模型中，提出了基于GPT-Driver框架的广义知识蒸馏方法，在模型规模减小5倍的情况下仍能接近教师模型性能。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在自动驾驶运动规划中展现出潜力，但将其部署在资源受限的车载系统中存在挑战。需要研究如何将大型教师LLM的知识有效迁移到更小、更易部署的学生模型中。
AI.method: 基于GPT-Driver框架（将驾驶场景表示为语言提示，通过思维链推理生成轨迹点），研究两种学生训练范式：1）策略广义知识蒸馏（GKD），使用教师模型的密集令牌级反馈训练学生模型自身生成的输出；2）密集反馈强化学习基线，使用教师模型的log概率作为策略梯度框架中的每令牌奖励信号。
AI.result: 在nuScenes基准测试中，GKD方法显著优于强化学习基线，在模型规模减小5倍的情况下仍能接近教师模型性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 策略蒸馏作为一种原则性且有效的方法，对于在自动驾驶系统中部署基于LLM的规划器具有实际价值，能够在保持性能的同时大幅减小模型规模。

title: CoD-Lite: Real-Time Diffusion-Based Generative Image Compression
summary: Recent advanced diffusion methods typically derive strong generative priors by scaling diffusion transformers. However, scaling fails to generalize when adapted for real-time compression scenarios that demand lightweight models. In this paper, we explore the design of real-time and lightweight diffusion codecs by addressing two pivotal questions. First, does diffusion pre-training benefit lightweight diffusion codecs? Through systematic analysis, we find that generation-oriented pre-training is less effective at small model scales whereas compression-oriented pre-training yields consistently better performance. Second, are transformers essential? We find that while global attention is crucial for standard generation, lightweight convolutions suffice for compression-oriented diffusion when paired with distillation. Guided by these findings, we establish a one-step lightweight convolution diffusion codec that achieves real-time $60$~FPS encoding and $42$~FPS decoding at 1080p. Further enhanced by distillation and adversarial learning, the proposed codec reduces bitrate by 85\% at a comparable FID to MS-ILLM, bridging the gap between generative compression and practical real-time deployment. Codes are released at https://github.com/microsoft/GenCodec/tree/main/CoD_Lite

AI.tldr: 本文探索实时轻量级扩散编解码器设计，发现压缩导向预训练优于生成导向预训练，轻量卷积结合蒸馏可替代Transformer，最终实现1080p下60FPS编码和42FPS解码的实时性能。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散方法通过扩展Transformer获得强大生成先验，但在需要轻量模型的实时压缩场景中无法良好泛化。本文旨在探索实时轻量级扩散编解码器设计，解决两个关键问题：扩散预训练对轻量编解码器是否有益，以及Transformer是否必需。
AI.method: 通过系统分析发现：1) 生成导向预训练在小模型规模下效果较差，而压缩导向预训练性能更优；2) 全局注意力对标准生成至关重要，但压缩导向扩散中轻量卷积结合蒸馏即可满足需求。基于此建立一步轻量卷积扩散编解码器，并进一步通过蒸馏和对抗学习增强。
AI.result: 提出的编解码器在1080p分辨率下实现60FPS编码和42FPS解码的实时性能。通过蒸馏和对抗学习增强后，在可比FID下比特率比MS-ILLM降低85%，弥合了生成压缩与实际实时部署之间的差距。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明压缩导向预训练优于生成导向预训练，轻量卷积结合蒸馏可替代Transformer用于压缩任务，成功建立了高效实时扩散编解码器，为生成压缩的实际部署提供了可行方案。

title: RAGE-XY: RADAR-Aided Longitudinal and Lateral Forces Estimation For Autonomous Race Cars
summary: In this work, we present RAGE-XY, an extended version of RAGE, a real-time estimation framework that simultaneously infers vehicle velocity, tire slip angles, and the forces acting on the vehicle using only standard onboard sensors such as IMUs and RADARs. Compared to the original formulation, the proposed method incorporates an online RADAR calibration module, improving the accuracy of lateral velocity estimation in the presence of sensor misalignment. Furthermore, we extend the underlying vehicle model from a single-track approximation to a tricycle model, enabling the estimation of rear longitudinal tire forces in addition to lateral dynamics. We validate the proposed approach through both high-fidelity simulations and real-world experiments conducted on the EAV-24 autonomous race car, demonstrating improved accuracy and robustness in estimating both lateral and longitudinal vehicle dynamics.

AI.tldr: RAGE-XY是RAGE框架的扩展版本，通过在线雷达校准模块和三轮车模型改进车辆动力学实时估计
AI.motivation: 原始RAGE框架在传感器未对准时横向速度估计精度有限，且仅使用单轨模型无法估计后轮纵向轮胎力，需要改进以更全面准确地估计车辆动力学
AI.method: 1) 增加在线雷达校准模块以补偿传感器未对准；2) 将基础车辆模型从单轨近似扩展到三轮车模型；3) 仅使用标准车载传感器（IMU和雷达）同时估计车辆速度、轮胎侧偏角和车辆受力
AI.result: 在高保真仿真和EAV-24自动驾驶赛车真实实验中验证，在横向和纵向车辆动力学估计方面表现出改进的精度和鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: RAGE-XY通过在线雷达校准和扩展的车辆模型，显著提高了车辆动力学估计的准确性和鲁棒性，特别是在传感器未对准情况下，为自动驾驶系统提供了更可靠的实时状态估计

title: NTIRE 2026 The 3rd Restore Any Image Model (RAIM) Challenge: Professional Image Quality Assessment (Track 1)
comment: NTIRE Challenge Report. Accepted by CVPRW 2026
summary: In this paper, we present an overview of the NTIRE 2026 challenge on the 3rd Restore Any Image Model in the Wild, specifically focusing on Track 1: Professional Image Quality Assessment. Conventional Image Quality Assessment (IQA) typically relies on scalar scores. By compressing complex visual characteristics into a single number, these methods fundamentally struggle to distinguish subtle differences among uniformly high-quality images. Furthermore, they fail to articulate why one image is superior, lacking the reasoning capabilities required to provide guidance for vision tasks. To bridge this gap, recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) offer a promising paradigm. Inspired by this potential, our challenge establishes a novel benchmark exploring the ability of MLLMs to mimic human expert cognition in evaluating high-quality image pairs. Participants were tasked with overcoming critical bottlenecks in professional scenarios, centering on two primary objectives: (1) Comparative Quality Selection: reliably identifying the visually superior image within a high-quality pair; and (2) Interpretative Reasoning: generating grounded, expert-level explanations that detail the rationale behind the selection. In total, the challenge attracted nearly 200 registrations and over 2,500 submissions. The top-performing methods significantly advanced the state of the art in professional IQA. The challenge dataset is available at https://github.com/narthchin/RAIM-PIQA, and the official homepage is accessible at https://www.codabench.org/competitions/12789/.

AI.tldr: NTIRE 2026挑战赛聚焦专业图像质量评估，利用多模态大语言模型模拟人类专家认知，解决传统IQA方法在高质量图像中难以区分细微差异和缺乏解释性推理的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统图像质量评估方法依赖单一分数，无法区分高质量图像间的细微差异，也缺乏解释性推理能力，无法为视觉任务提供指导。多模态大语言模型为解决这一问题提供了新范式。
AI.method: 建立新基准测试，探索MLLMs模拟人类专家评估高质量图像对的能力。挑战包含两个主要目标：1) 比较质量选择：可靠识别高质量图像对中的视觉更优图像；2) 解释性推理：生成基于事实的专家级解释，详细说明选择理由。
AI.result: 挑战吸引了近200个注册和超过2500份提交。表现最佳的方法显著推进了专业IQA领域的技术水平。挑战数据集和官方主页已公开。
AI.conclusion: NTIRE 2026挑战赛成功建立了专业图像质量评估的新基准，展示了MLLMs在模拟人类专家认知方面的潜力，为高质量图像评估提供了更精细和可解释的解决方案。

title: The Sustainability Gap in Robotics: A Large-Scale Survey of Sustainability Awareness in 50,000 Research Articles
summary:
We present a large-scale survey of sustainability communication and motivation in robotics research. Our analysis covers nearly 50,000 open-access papers from arXiv's cs.RO category published between 2015 and early 2026. In this study, we quantify how often papers mention social, ecological, and sustainability impacts, and we analyse their alignment with the UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).
  The results reveal a persistent gap between the field's potential and its stated intent. While a large fraction of robotics papers can be mapped to SDG-relevant domains, explicit sustainability motivation remains remarkably low. Specifically, mentions of sustainability-related impacts are typically below 2%, explicit SDG references stay below 0.1%, and the proportion of sustainability-motivated papers remains below 5%. These trends suggest that while the field of robotics is advancing rapidly, sustainability is not yet a standard part of research framing.
  We conclude by proposing concrete actions for researchers, conferences, and institutions to close these awareness and motivation gaps, supporting a shift toward more intentional and responsible innovation.

AI.tldr: 对arXiv cs.RO类别近5万篇论文的大规模调查显示，机器人学研究中的可持续性沟通和动机存在显著差距：尽管许多研究可映射到联合国可持续发展目标相关领域，但明确提及可持续性影响的比例低于2%，直接引用SDG的低于0.1%，以可持续性为动机的论文不足5%
AI.motivation: 量化机器人学研究领域中可持续性沟通和动机的现状，评估该领域在应对全球可持续发展挑战方面的意识和承诺水平，揭示机器人学研究的潜在社会、生态影响与实际研究动机之间的差距
AI.method: 对arXiv cs.RO类别2015年至2026年初的近50,000篇开放获取论文进行大规模文本分析，量化论文中提及社会、生态和可持续性影响的频率，分析其与联合国可持续发展目标的对应关系
AI.result: 研究显示机器人学领域存在显著的可持续性沟通差距：可持续性相关影响提及率通常低于2%，明确SDG引用率低于0.1%，以可持续性为动机的论文比例低于5%。虽然大量机器人学论文可映射到SDG相关领域，但明确的可持续性动机仍然极低
AI.conclusion: 机器人学领域虽快速发展，但可持续性尚未成为研究框架的标准组成部分。作者建议研究人员、会议和机构采取具体行动来弥合意识和动机差距，推动向更有意识和负责任的创新转变

title: Some Theoretical Limitations of t-SNE
summary: t-SNE has gained popularity as a dimension reduction technique, especially for visualizing data. It is well-known that all dimension reduction techniques may lose important features of the data. We provide a mathematical framework for understanding this loss for t-SNE by establishing a number of results in different scenarios showing how important features of data are lost by using t-SNE.

AI.tldr: 该论文从数学角度分析t-SNE降维技术如何丢失数据的重要特征，为理解t-SNE的局限性提供理论框架
AI.motivation: t-SNE作为流行的降维可视化技术，虽然广泛应用，但所有降维方法都可能丢失数据重要特征。目前缺乏对t-SNE具体如何丢失特征的系统数学分析，需要建立理论框架来理解这一现象
AI.method: 建立数学框架，在不同场景下分析t-SNE如何丢失数据特征。通过理论推导和数学证明，展示t-SNE在降维过程中对数据重要特征的损失机制
AI.result: 证明了在不同场景下t-SNE会丢失数据的重要特征，具体展示了t-SNE降维过程中的特征损失机制，为理解t-SNE的局限性提供了数学依据
AI.conclusion: t-SNE作为降维技术确实会丢失数据的重要特征，论文建立的数学框架有助于更深入地理解t-SNE的局限性，为正确使用和解释t-SNE结果提供理论指导

title: ParkSense: Where Should a Delivery Driver Park? Leveraging Idle AV Compute and Vision-Language Models
comment: 7 pages, 3 tables. No university resources were used for this work
summary: Finding parking consumes a disproportionate share of food delivery time, yet no system addresses precise parking-spot selection relative to merchant entrances. We propose ParkSense, a framework that repurposes idle compute during low-risk AV states -- queuing at red lights, traffic congestion, parking-lot crawl -- to run a Vision-Language Model (VLM) on pre-cached satellite and street view imagery, identifying entrances and legal parking zones. We formalize the Delivery-Aware Precision Parking (DAPP) problem, show that a quantized 7B VLM completes inference in 4-8 seconds on HW4-class hardware, and estimate annual per-driver income gains of 3,000-8,000 USD in the U.S. Five open research directions are identified at this unexplored intersection of autonomous driving, computer vision, and last-mile logistics.

AI.tldr: ParkSense框架利用自动驾驶车辆空闲计算资源，通过视觉语言模型分析卫星和街景图像，为外卖配送寻找靠近商户入口的精确停车位，可显著提高配送效率和经济收益。
AI.motivation: 当前外卖配送中寻找停车位占据了不成比例的时间，但没有系统能够解决相对于商户入口的精确停车位选择问题。这影响了配送效率和司机收入。
AI.method: 提出ParkSense框架，在自动驾驶车辆低风险状态（如等红灯、交通拥堵、停车场慢行）时，利用空闲计算资源运行量化7B参数视觉语言模型，分析预缓存的卫星和街景图像，识别商户入口和合法停车区域，解决配送感知精确停车问题。
AI.result: 量化7B VLM在HW4级硬件上完成推理仅需4-8秒，估计在美国每年可为每位司机带来3,000-8,000美元的收入增长。提出了五个开放研究方向。
AI.conclusion: ParkSense展示了利用自动驾驶车辆空闲计算资源解决精确停车问题的可行性，为自动驾驶、计算机视觉和最后一公里物流的交叉领域开辟了新的研究方向，具有显著的经济效益。

title: From Attenuation to Attention: Variational Information Flow Manipulation for Fine-Grained Visual Perception
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in general visual understanding, they frequently falter in fine-grained perception tasks that require identifying tiny objects or discerning subtle visual relationships. We attribute this limitation to Visual Attenuation: a phenomenon where sparse fine-grained visual signals are prematurely suppressed or diluted by dominant textual tokens during network propagation, resulting in a "loss of focus" during the deep-level decision-making process. Existing input-centric solutions fail to fundamentally reverse this intrinsic mechanism of information loss. To address this challenge, we propose the Variational Information Flow (VIF) framework. Adopting a probabilistic perspective, VIF leverages a Conditional Variational Autoencoder (CVAE) to model the visual saliency relevant to the question-answer pair as a latent distribution. As a plug-and-play module, VIF can be integrated into existing architectures. Extensive evaluations across diverse benchmarks, covering General VQA, fine-grained perception, and visual grounding, demonstrate that VIF yields competitive improvements over previous methods, validating its effectiveness in enhancing the fine-grained perception of MLLMs.

AI.tldr: VIF框架通过变分信息流解决MLLMs在细粒度感知中的视觉衰减问题，使用CVAE建模视觉显著性分布，提升微小物体识别和细微关系辨别能力
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在通用视觉理解上表现出色，但在需要识别微小物体或辨别细微视觉关系的细粒度感知任务中表现不佳。作者将此归因于"视觉衰减"现象：稀疏的细粒度视觉信号在传播过程中被主导的文本标记过早抑制或稀释，导致深层决策过程中"注意力丢失"
AI.method: 提出变分信息流框架，采用概率视角，利用条件变分自编码器将与问答对相关的视觉显著性建模为潜在分布。作为即插即用模块，VIF可以集成到现有架构中
AI.result: 在涵盖通用VQA、细粒度感知和视觉定位的多样化基准测试中，VIF相比先前方法取得了有竞争力的改进，验证了其在增强MLLMs细粒度感知方面的有效性
AI.conclusion: VIF框架通过建模视觉显著性分布，有效解决了MLLMs中的视觉衰减问题，提升了模型在细粒度感知任务上的性能，为多模态理解提供了新的解决方案

title: Harnessing Embodied Agents: Runtime Governance for Policy-Constrained Execution
summary:
Embodied agents are evolving from passive reasoning systems into active executors that interact with tools, robots, and physical environments. Once granted execution authority, the central challenge becomes how to keep actions governable at runtime. Existing approaches embed safety and recovery logic inside the agent loop, making execution control difficult to standardize, audit, and adapt.
  This paper argues that embodied intelligence requires not only stronger agents, but stronger runtime governance. We propose a framework for policy-constrained execution that separates agent cognition from execution oversight. Governance is externalized into a dedicated runtime layer performing policy checking, capability admission, execution monitoring, rollback handling, and human override.
  We formalize the control boundary among the embodied agent, Embodied Capability Modules (ECMs), and runtime governance layer, and validate through 1000 randomized simulation trials across three governance dimensions. Results show 96.2% interception of unauthorized actions, reduction of unsafe continuation from 100% to 22.2% under runtime drift, and 91.4% recovery success with full policy compliance, substantially outperforming all baselines (p<0.001). By reframing runtime governance as a first-class systems problem, this paper positions policy-constrained execution as a key design principle for embodied agent systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于具身智能体的策略约束执行框架，将认知与执行监管分离，通过外部化运行时治理层实现动作控制、能力准入、执行监控和回滚处理。
AI.motivation: 具身智能体从被动推理系统演变为与工具、机器人和物理环境交互的主动执行器。一旦获得执行权限，核心挑战是如何在运行时保持动作的可控性。现有方法将安全性和恢复逻辑嵌入智能体循环内部，使得执行控制难以标准化、审计和适应。
AI.method: 提出策略约束执行框架，将治理外部化为专门的运行时层，执行策略检查、能力准入、执行监控、回滚处理和人工干预。形式化了具身智能体、具身能力模块（ECMs）和运行时治理层之间的控制边界。
AI.result: 通过1000次随机模拟试验验证，结果显示：96.2%的未授权动作被拦截；运行时漂移下的不安全延续从100%降至22.2%；91.4%的恢复成功率且完全符合策略要求，显著优于所有基线方法（p<0.001）。
AI.conclusion: 通过将运行时治理重构为一类系统问题，本文提出策略约束执行作为具身智能体系统的关键设计原则，强调不仅需要更强的智能体，还需要更强的运行时治理。

title: Graph-Based Fraud Detection with Dual-Path Graph Filtering
summary: Fraud detection on graph data can be viewed as a demanding task that requires distinguishing between different types of nodes. Because graph neural networks (GNNs) are naturally suited for processing information encoded in graph form through their message-passing operations, methods based on GNN models have increasingly attracted attention in the fraud detection domain. However, fraud graphs inherently exhibit relation camouflage, high heterophily, and class imbalance, causing most GNNs to underperform in fraud detection tasks. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a Graph-Based Fraud Detection Model with Dual-Path Graph Filtering (DPF-GFD). DPF-GFD first applies a beta wavelet-based operator to the original graph to capture key structural patterns. It then constructs a similarity graph from distance-based node representations and applies an improved low-pass filter. The embeddings from the original and similarity graphs are fused through supervised representation learning to obtain node features, which are finally used by an ensemble tree model to assess the fraud risk of unlabeled nodes. Unlike existing single-graph smoothing approaches, DPF-GFD introduces a frequency-complementary dual-path filtering paradigm tailored for fraud detection, explicitly decoupling structural anomaly modeling and feature similarity modeling. This design enables more discriminative and stable node representations in highly heterophilous and imbalanced fraud graphs. Comprehensive experiments on four real-world financial fraud detection datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method.

AI.tldr: 提出DPF-GFD模型，通过双路径图滤波解决欺诈检测中关系伪装、高异质性和类别不平衡问题，在四个真实金融欺诈数据集上验证有效性。
AI.motivation: 欺诈检测图数据存在关系伪装、高异质性和类别不平衡三大挑战，导致传统GNN模型表现不佳。需要专门针对欺诈检测特点设计新的图学习方法。
AI.method: 提出双路径图滤波模型DPF-GFD：1) 对原始图应用β小波算子捕获关键结构模式；2) 基于距离的节点表示构建相似图并应用改进的低通滤波器；3) 通过监督表示学习融合两个图的嵌入；4) 使用集成树模型评估未标记节点的欺诈风险。
AI.result: 在四个真实世界金融欺诈检测数据集上的综合实验表明，DPF-GFD方法相比现有单图平滑方法具有更好的性能，能够生成更具区分性和稳定的节点表示。
AI.conclusion: DPF-GFD通过频率互补的双路径滤波范式，显式解耦结构异常建模和特征相似性建模，为高异质性和不平衡的欺诈图提供了有效的解决方案。

title: SEATrack: Simple, Efficient, and Adaptive Multimodal Tracker
summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) in multimodal tracking reveals a concerning trend where recent performance gains are often achieved at the cost of inflated parameter budgets, which fundamentally erodes PEFT's efficiency promise. In this work, we introduce SEATrack, a Simple, Efficient, and Adaptive two-stream multimodal tracker that tackles this performance-efficiency dilemma from two complementary perspectives. We first prioritize cross-modal alignment of matching responses, an underexplored yet pivotal factor that we argue is essential for breaking the trade-off. Specifically, we observe that modality-specific biases in existing two-stream methods generate conflicting matching attention maps, thereby hindering effective joint representation learning. To mitigate this, we propose AMG-LoRA, which seamlessly integrates Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) for domain adaptation with Adaptive Mutual Guidance (AMG) to dynamically refine and align attention maps across modalities. We then depart from conventional local fusion approaches by introducing a Hierarchical Mixture of Experts (HMoE) that enables efficient global relation modeling, effectively balancing expressiveness and computational efficiency in cross-modal fusion. Equipped with these innovations, SEATrack advances notable progress over state-of-the-art methods in balancing performance with efficiency across RGB-T, RGB-D, and RGB-E tracking tasks. \href{https://github.com/AutoLab-SAI-SJTU/SEATrack}{\textcolor{cyan}{Code is available}}.

AI.tldr: SEATrack是一个简单、高效、自适应的双流多模态跟踪器，通过跨模态对齐匹配响应和分层专家混合机制，在保持参数效率的同时提升跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态跟踪中的参数高效微调存在参数膨胀问题，损害了PEFT的效率承诺。现有双流方法存在模态特定偏差，导致冲突的匹配注意力图，阻碍有效的联合表示学习。
AI.method: 提出SEATrack框架：1) AMG-LoRA结合低秩适应和自适应互引导，动态细化和对齐跨模态注意力图；2) 分层专家混合机制替代传统局部融合，实现高效的全局关系建模。
AI.result: 在RGB-T、RGB-D和RGB-E跟踪任务中，SEATrack在性能与效率平衡方面显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过跨模态对齐和全局关系建模，SEATrack成功解决了多模态跟踪中性能与效率的权衡问题，为参数高效微调提供了新方向。

title: Learning Without Losing Identity: Capability Evolution for Embodied Agents
summary: Embodied agents are expected to operate persistently in dynamic physical environments, continuously acquiring new capabilities over time. Existing approaches to improving agent performance often rely on modifying the agent itself -- through prompt engineering, policy updates, or structural redesign -- leading to instability and loss of identity in long-lived systems. In this work, we propose a capability-centric evolution paradigm for embodied agents. We argue that a robot should maintain a persistent agent as its cognitive identity, while enabling continuous improvement through the evolution of its capabilities. Specifically, we introduce the concept of Embodied Capability Modules (ECMs), which represent modular, versioned units of embodied functionality that can be learned, refined, and composed over time. We present a unified framework in which capability evolution is decoupled from agent identity. Capabilities evolve through a closed-loop process involving task execution, experience collection, model refinement, and module updating, while all executions are governed by a runtime layer that enforces safety and policy constraints. We demonstrate through simulated embodied tasks that capability evolution improves task success rates from 32.4% to 91.3% over 20 iterations, outperforming both agent-modification baselines and established skill-learning methods (SPiRL, SkiMo), while preserving zero policy drift and zero safety violations. Our results suggest that separating agent identity from capability evolution provides a scalable and safe foundation for long-term embodied intelligence.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种能力中心化的具身智能体进化范式，通过将能力模块化并与智能体身份解耦，实现持续改进而不损失稳定性
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过修改智能体本身（提示工程、策略更新或结构重设计）来提高性能，导致长期系统中不稳定和身份丢失。需要一种既能持续改进又能保持智能体认知身份的方法。
AI.method: 引入具身能力模块（ECMs）概念，将能力表示为模块化、版本化的功能单元。提出统一框架，将能力进化与智能体身份解耦，通过任务执行、经验收集、模型精炼和模块更新的闭环过程实现能力进化，运行时层强制执行安全和策略约束。
AI.result: 在模拟具身任务中，能力进化在20次迭代中将任务成功率从32.4%提升至91.3%，优于智能体修改基线（SPiRL、SkiMo等技能学习方法），同时保持零策略漂移和零安全违规。
AI.conclusion: 将智能体身份与能力进化分离为长期具身智能提供了可扩展且安全的基础，使机器人能够保持持久认知身份的同时通过能力模块的进化实现持续改进。

title: MOONSHOT : A Framework for Multi-Objective Pruning of Vision and Large Language Models
summary: Weight pruning is a common technique for compressing large neural networks. We focus on the challenging post-training one-shot setting, where a pre-trained model is compressed without any retraining. Existing one-shot pruning methods typically optimize a single objective, such as a layer-wise reconstruction loss or a second-order Taylor approximation of the training loss. We highlight that neither objective alone is consistently the most effective across architectures and sparsity levels. Motivated by this insight, we propose MOONSHOT, a general and flexible framework that extends any single-objective pruning method into a multi-objective formulation by jointly optimizing both the layer-wise reconstruction error and second-order Taylor approximation of the training loss. MOONSHOT acts as a wrapper around existing pruning algorithms. To enable this integration while maintaining scalability to billion-parameter models, we propose modeling decisions and introduce an efficient procedure for computing the inverse Hessian, preserving the efficiency of state-of-the-art one-shot pruners. When combined with state-of-the-art pruning methods on Llama-3.2 and Llama-2 models, MOONSHOT reduces C4 perplexity by up to 32.6% at 2:4 sparsity and improves zero-shot mean accuracy across seven classification benchmarks by up to 4.9 points. On Vision Transformers, it improves accuracy on ImageNet-1k by over 5 points at 70% sparsity, and on ResNet-50, it yields a 4-point gain at 90% sparsity.

AI.tldr: MOONSHOT是一个通用的后训练单次剪枝框架，通过联合优化层间重构误差和训练损失的二阶泰勒近似，将单目标剪枝方法扩展为多目标优化，显著提升了各种架构在不同稀疏度下的剪枝效果。
AI.motivation: 现有单次剪枝方法通常只优化单一目标（如层间重构损失或训练损失的二阶泰勒近似），但在不同架构和稀疏度下，没有单一目标始终最有效。需要一种更灵活的多目标优化框架来提升剪枝效果的一致性。
AI.method: MOONSHOT作为现有剪枝算法的包装器，将单目标剪枝方法扩展为多目标优化，联合优化层间重构误差和训练损失的二阶泰勒近似。通过设计建模决策和高效计算逆Hessian矩阵的流程，保持了扩展到十亿参数模型的效率。
AI.result: 在Llama-3.2和Llama-2模型上，MOONSHOT在2:4稀疏度下将C4困惑度降低达32.6%，在七个分类基准测试中零样本平均准确率提升达4.9个百分点。在Vision Transformers上，70%稀疏度下ImageNet-1k准确率提升超过5个百分点；在ResNet-50上，90%稀疏度下准确率提升4个百分点。
AI.conclusion: MOONSHOT通过多目标优化框架显著提升了后训练单次剪枝的效果，在各种架构和稀疏度下都表现出优越性能，同时保持了计算效率，能够扩展到大型模型。

title: RoboAgent: Chaining Basic Capabilities for Embodied Task Planning
summary: This paper focuses on embodied task planning, where an agent acquires visual observations from the environment and executes atomic actions to accomplish a given task. Although recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved impressive results in multimodal understanding and reasoning, their performance remains limited when applied to embodied planning that involves multi-turn interaction, long-horizon reasoning, and extended context analysis. To bridge this gap, we propose RoboAgent, a capability-driven planning pipeline in which the model actively invokes different sub-capabilities. Each capability maintains its own context, and produces intermediate reasoning results or interacts with the environment according to the query given by a scheduler. This framework decomposes complex planning into a sequence of basic vision-language problems that VLMs can better address, enabling a more transparent and controllable reasoning process. The scheduler and all capabilities are implemented with a single VLM, without relying on external tools. To train this VLM, we adopt a multi-stage paradigm that consists of: (1) behavior cloning with expert plans, (2) DAgger training using trajectories collected by the model, and (3) reinforcement learning guided by an expert policy. Across these stages, we exploit the internal information of the environment simulator to construct high-quality supervision for each capability, and we further introduce augmented and synthetic data to enhance the model's performance in more diverse scenarios. Extensive experiments on widely used embodied task planning benchmarks validate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. Our codes will be available at https://github.com/woyut/RoboAgent_CVPR26.

AI.tldr: RoboAgent：一种基于能力驱动的具身任务规划框架，通过调度器调用不同子能力模块，将复杂规划分解为VLM能更好处理的基本视觉语言问题，实现更透明可控的推理过程。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型在多模态理解和推理方面取得了显著进展，但在涉及多轮交互、长时程推理和扩展上下文分析的具身任务规划中性能仍然有限。需要一种方法将复杂规划分解为VLM能更好处理的基本问题。
AI.method: 提出RoboAgent能力驱动规划流水线：模型主动调用不同子能力，每个能力维护自身上下文，根据调度器查询产生中间推理结果或与环境交互。调度器和所有能力均由单一VLM实现，无需外部工具。采用三阶段训练范式：1）专家计划的行为克隆；2）使用模型收集轨迹的DAgger训练；3）专家策略指导的强化学习。利用环境模拟器内部信息构建高质量监督，并引入增强和合成数据提升多样性场景性能。
AI.result: 在广泛使用的具身任务规划基准测试中进行了大量实验，验证了所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: RoboAgent框架通过能力驱动的规划方法，将复杂具身任务分解为VLM能更好处理的基本视觉语言问题，实现了更透明可控的推理过程，在具身任务规划基准上表现出色。

title: The Cognitive Circuit Breaker: A Systems Engineering Framework for Intrinsic AI Reliability
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in mission-critical software systems, detecting hallucinations and ``faked truthfulness'' has become a paramount engineering challenge. Current reliability architectures rely heavily on post-generation, black-box mechanisms, such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) cross-checking or LLM-as-a-judge evaluators. These extrinsic methods introduce unacceptable latency, high computational overhead, and reliance on secondary external API calls, frequently violating standard software engineering Service Level Agreements (SLAs). In this paper, we propose the Cognitive Circuit Breaker, a novel systems engineering framework that provides intrinsic reliability monitoring with minimal latency overhead. By extracting hidden states during a model's forward pass, we calculate the ``Cognitive Dissonance Delta'' -- the mathematical gap between an LLM's outward semantic confidence (softmax probabilities) and its internal latent certainty (derived via linear probes). We demonstrate statistically significant detection of cognitive dissonance, highlight architecture-dependent Out-of-Distribution (OOD) generalization, and show that this framework adds negligible computational overhead to the active inference pipeline.

AI.tldr: 提出Cognitive Circuit Breaker框架，通过提取LLM前向传播中的隐藏状态，计算"认知失调差值"来检测幻觉和虚假真实性，实现低延迟的内在可靠性监控。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM在关键任务系统中的部署增加，检测幻觉和"虚假真实性"成为重要工程挑战。现有方法依赖后生成的黑盒机制（如RAG交叉检查或LLM-as-a-judge评估器），这些外在方法引入不可接受的延迟、高计算开销和对外部API的依赖，经常违反软件工程SLA。
AI.method: 提出Cognitive Circuit Breaker系统工程框架，通过提取模型前向传播中的隐藏状态，计算"认知失调差值"——LLM外部语义置信度（softmax概率）与内部潜在确定性（通过线性探针推导）之间的数学差距，实现内在可靠性监控。
AI.result: 展示了认知失调的统计显著检测，突出了架构相关的分布外泛化能力，并证明该框架对活跃推理流程增加了可忽略的计算开销。
AI.conclusion: Cognitive Circuit Breaker框架提供了一种低延迟、内在的可靠性监控方法，解决了现有外在方法的高延迟、高计算开销和外部依赖问题，适用于需要满足SLA的关键任务系统。

title: GEAR: GEometry-motion Alternating Refinement for Articulated Object Modeling with Gaussian Splatting
summary: High-fidelity interactive digital assets are essential for embodied intelligence and robotic interaction, yet articulated objects remain challenging to reconstruct due to their complex structures and coupled geometry-motion relationships. Existing methods suffer from instability in geometry-motion joint optimization, while their generalization remains limited on complex multi-joint or out-of-distribution objects. To address these challenges, we propose GEAR, an EM-style alternating optimization framework that jointly models geometry and motion as interdependent components within a Gaussian Splatting representation. GEAR treats part segmentation as a latent variable and joint motion parameters as explicit variables, alternately refining them for improved convergence and geometric-motion consistency. To enhance part segmentation quality without sacrificing generalization, we leverage a vanilla 2D segmentation model to provide multi-view part priors, and employ a weakly supervised constraint to regularize the latent variable. Experiments on multiple benchmarks and our newly constructed dataset GEAR-Multi demonstrate that GEAR achieves state-of-the-art results in geometric reconstruction and motion parameters estimation, particularly on complex articulated objects with multiple movable parts.

AI.tldr: GEAR：基于高斯泼溅的EM交替优化框架，用于联合重建关节物体的几何与运动，通过潜在变量分割和显式运动参数交替优化，结合多视图分割先验，在复杂多关节物体上实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 高保真交互数字资产对具身智能和机器人交互至关重要，但关节物体因其复杂结构和耦合的几何-运动关系而难以重建。现有方法在几何-运动联合优化中存在不稳定性，且在复杂多关节或分布外物体上泛化能力有限。
AI.method: 提出GEAR框架：1）将几何和运动作为高斯泼溅表示中的相互依赖组件进行联合建模；2）将部件分割视为潜在变量，关节运动参数作为显式变量；3）采用EM风格的交替优化策略，交替细化分割和运动参数以改善收敛性和几何-运动一致性；4）利用普通2D分割模型提供多视图部件先验，并采用弱监督约束正则化潜在变量。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试和新构建的GEAR-Multi数据集上的实验表明，GEAR在几何重建和运动参数估计方面达到最先进水平，特别是在具有多个可动部件的复杂关节物体上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: GEAR通过将部件分割作为潜在变量、运动参数作为显式变量的交替优化框架，有效解决了关节物体重建中几何与运动的联合优化问题，结合多视图分割先验和弱监督约束，在复杂多关节物体上实现了稳定且高质量的几何-运动重建。

title: Vision-Language Navigation for Aerial Robots: Towards the Era of Large Language Models
summary: Aerial vision-and-language navigation (Aerial VLN) aims to enable unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) to interpret natural language instructions and autonomously navigate complex three-dimensional environments by grounding language in visual perception. This survey provides a critical and analytical review of the Aerial VLN field, with particular attention to the recent integration of large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs). We first formally introduce the Aerial VLN problem and define two interaction paradigms: single-instruction and dialog-based, as foundational axes. We then organize the body of Aerial VLN methods into a taxonomy of five architectural categories: sequence-to-sequence and attention-based methods, end-to-end LLM/VLM methods, hierarchical methods, multi-agent methods, and dialog-based navigation methods. For each category, we systematically analyze design rationales, technical trade-offs, and reported performance. We critically assess the evaluation infrastructure for Aerial VLN, including datasets, simulation platforms, and metrics, and identify their gaps in scale, environmental diversity, real-world grounding, and metric coverage. We consolidate cross-method comparisons on shared benchmarks and analyze key architectural trade-offs, including discrete versus continuous actions, end-to-end versus hierarchical designs, and the simulation-to-reality gap. Finally, we synthesize seven concrete open problems: long-horizon instruction grounding, viewpoint robustness, scalable spatial representation, continuous 6-DoF action execution, onboard deployment, benchmark standardization, and multi-UAV swarm navigation, with specific research directions grounded in the evidence presented throughout the survey.

AI.tldr: 本文对空中视觉语言导航领域进行了系统性综述，重点关注大语言模型和视觉语言模型的整合，提出了分类框架并分析了关键挑战。
AI.motivation: 空中视觉语言导航旨在让无人机能够理解自然语言指令并在复杂三维环境中自主导航。随着大语言模型和视觉语言模型的发展，该领域面临新的机遇和挑战，需要系统性梳理现有方法、评估基础设施和未来研究方向。
AI.method: 采用批判性分析方法，首先形式化定义Aerial VLN问题，提出单指令和对话式两种交互范式。然后将现有方法组织为五个架构类别：序列到序列与基于注意力的方法、端到端LLM/VLM方法、分层方法、多智能体方法和对话式导航方法。对每个类别分析设计原理、技术权衡和性能表现。
AI.result: 系统分析了Aerial VLN的评估基础设施（数据集、仿真平台、指标）的局限性，包括规模不足、环境多样性有限、真实世界接地性差和指标覆盖不全。通过跨方法比较揭示了关键架构权衡：离散vs连续动作、端到端vs分层设计、仿真到现实的差距。
AI.conclusion: 提出了七个具体开放问题：长时域指令接地、视点鲁棒性、可扩展空间表示、连续6自由度动作执行、机载部署、基准标准化和多无人机集群导航，为未来研究提供了明确方向。

title: Anomaly Detection in IEC-61850 GOOSE Networks: Evaluating Unsupervised and Temporal Learning for Real-Time Intrusion Detection
summary: The IEC-61850 GOOSE protocol underpins time-critical communication in modern digital substations but lacks native security mechanisms, leaving it vulnerable to replay, masquerade, and data injection attacks. Intrusion detection in this setting is challenging due to strict latency constraints (sub-4ms) and limited availability of labeled attack data. This paper evaluates whether unsupervised temporal modeling can provide effective and deployable anomaly detection for GOOSE networks. Five models are compared on the ERENO IEC-61850 dataset: a supervised Random Forest baseline, a feedforward Autoencoder, and three recurrent sequence autoencoders (RNN, LSTM, and GRU). The supervised Random Forest achieves the highest detection performance (F1=0.9516) but fails to meet real-time constraints at 21.8ms per prediction. All four unsupervised models satisfy the 4ms requirement, with the GRU achieving the best accuracy to latency tradeoff among them (F1=0.8737 at 1.118ms). A cross-environment evaluation on an independent dataset shows that all models degrade under distribution shift. However, recurrent models retain substantially higher relative performance than the supervised baseline, suggesting that temporal sequence modeling generalizes better than fitting labeled attack distributions. Anomaly thresholds for the unsupervised models are selected on a held out validation partition to avoid test set leakage. These results support unsupervised temporal models as a practical choice for real-time GOOSE intrusion detection, particularly in environments where labeled training data may be unavailable or where large-scale deployment across diverse substations is required.

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了无监督时序模型在IEC-61850 GOOSE协议入侵检测中的应用，比较了五种模型，发现GRU模型在满足4ms实时约束的同时实现了最佳精度-延迟权衡。
AI.motivation: IEC-61850 GOOSE协议是现代数字化变电站中时间关键通信的基础，但缺乏原生安全机制，容易受到重放、伪装和数据注入攻击。由于严格的延迟约束（亚4ms）和标记攻击数据的有限可用性，在这种环境下的入侵检测具有挑战性。
AI.method: 在ERENO IEC-61850数据集上比较了五种模型：监督式随机森林基线、前馈自编码器以及三种循环序列自编码器（RNN、LSTM和GRU）。使用无监督时序建模方法，通过在保留验证分区上选择异常阈值来避免测试集泄漏。
AI.result: 监督式随机森林达到最高检测性能（F1=0.9516）但无法满足实时约束（21.8ms/预测）。所有四种无监督模型都满足4ms要求，其中GRU在无监督模型中实现了最佳精度-延迟权衡（F1=0.8737，1.118ms）。跨环境评估显示所有模型在分布偏移下性能下降，但循环模型比监督基线保持了显著更高的相对性能。
AI.conclusion: 无监督时序模型是实时GOOSE入侵检测的实用选择，特别是在标记训练数据可能不可用或需要跨多样化变电站大规模部署的环境中。时序序列建模比拟合标记攻击分布具有更好的泛化能力。

title: Bird-Inspired Spatial Flapping Wing Mechanism via Coupled Linkages with Single Actuator
summary: Spatial single-loop mechanisms such as Bennett linkages offer a unique combination of one-degree-of-freedom actuation and nontrivial spatial trajectories, making them attractive for lightweight bio-inspired robotic design. However, although they appear simple and elegant, the geometric task-based synthesis is rather complicated and often avoided in engineering tasks due to the mathematical complexity involved. This paper presents a bird-inspired flapping-wing mechanism built from two coupled spatial four-bars, driven by a single motor. One linkage is actuated to generate the desired spatial sweeping stroke, while the serially coupled linkage remains unactuated and passively switches between extended and folded wing configurations over the stroke cycle. We introduce a simplified kinematic methodology for constructing Bennett linkages from quadrilaterals that contain a desired surface area and further leverage mechanically induced passive state switching. This architecture realizes a coordinated sweep-and-fold wing motion with a single actuation input, reducing weight and control complexity. A 3D-printed prototype is assembled and tested, demonstrating the intended spatial stroke and passive folding behavior.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于Bennett连杆的鸟翼仿生扑翼机构，通过单电机驱动两个耦合的空间四杆机构，实现空间扫掠和被动折叠的协调运动。
AI.motivation: 空间单环机构（如Bennett连杆）具有单自由度驱动和非平凡空间轨迹的特点，适合轻量化仿生机器人设计，但其几何任务综合因数学复杂性而难以应用。
AI.method: 提出简化运动学方法，从包含所需表面积的四边形构建Bennett连杆；采用两个耦合的空间四杆机构，一个主动驱动产生空间扫掠，另一个被动切换翼型状态；利用机械诱导的被动状态切换实现协调运动。
AI.result: 3D打印原型机成功组装测试，展示了预期的空间扑翼轨迹和被动折叠行为，实现了单驱动输入下的扫掠-折叠协调运动。
AI.conclusion: 该架构通过简化Bennett连杆综合方法，结合被动状态切换机制，实现了单驱动下的协调扑翼运动，降低了重量和控制复杂度，为轻量化仿生机器人设计提供了新思路。

title: Better and Worse with Scale: How Contextual Entrainment Diverges with Model Size
comment: 16 pages, 11 figures, 6 tables. Accepted to Findings of ACL 2026
summary: Larger language models become simultaneously better and worse at handling contextual information -- better at ignoring false claims, worse at ignoring irrelevant tokens. We formalize this apparent paradox through the first scaling laws for contextual entrainment, the tendency of models to favor tokens that appeared in context regardless of relevance. Analyzing the Cerebras-GPT (111M-13B) and Pythia (410M-12B) model families, we find entrainment follows predictable power-law scaling, but with opposite trends depending on context type: semantic contexts show decreasing entrainment with scale, while non-semantic contexts show increasing entrainment. Concretely, the largest models are four times more resistant to counterfactual misinformation than the smallest, yet simultaneously twice as prone to copying arbitrary tokens. These diverging trends, which replicate across model families, suggest that semantic filtering and mechanical copying are functionally distinct behaviors that scale in opposition -- scaling alone does not resolve context sensitivity, it reshapes it.

AI.tldr: 语言模型规模增大时，在上下文处理上呈现矛盾趋势：更擅长忽略虚假信息，但更易复制无关标记。研究发现上下文牵引现象遵循幂律缩放规律，但语义和非语义上下文呈现相反趋势。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是解释语言模型规模扩大时出现的矛盾现象：模型在处理上下文信息时，一方面变得更擅长忽略虚假声明（语义过滤能力增强），另一方面却变得更易复制无关标记（机械复制倾向增加）。这种看似矛盾的现象需要系统性的理论解释和量化分析。
AI.method: 研究方法包括：1）形式化定义"上下文牵引"概念，即模型倾向于偏爱出现在上下文中的标记而忽略其相关性；2）建立上下文牵引的首个缩放定律；3）分析Cerebras-GPT（111M-13B）和Pythia（410M-12B）两个模型家族；4）区分语义上下文（如反事实错误信息）和非语义上下文（如任意标记）；5）通过可预测的幂律缩放分析趋势。
AI.result: 研究发现：1）上下文牵引遵循可预测的幂律缩放规律；2）语义上下文（如虚假信息）的牵引随模型规模增大而减小——最大模型对反事实错误信息的抵抗力是最小模型的4倍；3）非语义上下文（如任意标记）的牵引随模型规模增大而增加——最大模型复制任意标记的倾向是最小模型的2倍；4）这些相反趋势在多个模型家族中重复出现。
AI.conclusion: 结论表明：语义过滤和机械复制是功能上不同的行为，它们在缩放过程中呈现相反趋势。单纯的模型缩放并不能解决上下文敏感性问题，而是重塑了这种敏感性。这意味着模型规模扩大时，其上下文处理能力会发生结构性变化，而非简单的线性改进。

title: From Prediction to Justification: Aligning Sentiment Reasoning with Human Rationale via Reinforcement Learning
summary: While Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA) systems have achieved high accuracy in identifying sentiment polarities, they often operate as "black boxes," lacking the explicit reasoning capabilities characteristic of human affective cognition. Humans do not merely categorize sentiment; they construct causal explanations for their judgments. To bridge this gap, we propose ABSA-R1, a large language model framework designed to mimic this ``reason-before-predict" cognitive process. By leveraging reinforcement learning (RL), ABSA-R1 learns to articulate the why behind the what, generating natural language justifications that ground its sentiment predictions. We introduce a Cognition-Aligned Reward Model (formerly sentiment-aware reward model) that enforces consistency between the generated reasoning path and the final emotional label. Furthermore, inspired by metacognitive monitoring, we implement a performance-driven rejection sampling strategy that selectively targets hard cases where the model's internal reasoning is uncertain or inconsistent. Experimental results on four benchmarks demonstrate that equipping models with this explicit reasoning capability not only enhances interpretability but also yields superior performance in sentiment classification and triplet extraction compared to non-reasoning baselines.

AI.tldr: ABSA-R1是一个基于大语言模型的框架，通过强化学习让模型在预测情感前先生成自然语言推理，模仿人类"先推理后预测"的认知过程，提高可解释性和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有ABSA系统虽然准确率高，但缺乏人类情感认知中的显式推理能力，无法提供因果解释。人类不仅分类情感，还会构建判断的因果解释。
AI.method: 提出ABSA-R1框架：1) 使用强化学习让模型生成自然语言推理来支撑情感预测；2) 引入认知对齐奖励模型确保推理路径与情感标签的一致性；3) 受元认知监控启发，实施性能驱动的拒绝采样策略，针对模型内部推理不确定或不一致的情况。
AI.result: 在四个基准测试上的实验结果表明，赋予模型这种显式推理能力不仅增强了可解释性，而且在情感分类和三元组提取方面相比非推理基线取得了更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: ABSA-R1通过模仿人类"先推理后预测"的认知过程，成功地将显式推理能力融入ABSA系统，既提高了可解释性又提升了性能，为解决ABSA系统的"黑盒"问题提供了有效方案。

title: Reset-Free Reinforcement Learning for Real-World Agile Driving: An Empirical Study
summary: This paper presents an empirical study of reset-free reinforcement learning (RL) for real-world agile driving, in which a physical 1/10-scale vehicle learns continuously on a slippery indoor track without manual resets. High-speed driving near the limits of tire friction is particularly challenging for learning-based methods because complex vehicle dynamics, actuation delays, and other unmodeled effects hinder both accurate simulation and direct sim-to-real transfer of learned policies. To enable autonomous training on a physical platform, we employ Model Predictive Path Integral control (MPPI) as both the reset policy and the base policy for residual learning, and systematically compare three representative RL algorithms, i.e., PPO, SAC, and TD-MPC2, with and without residual learning in simulation and real-world experiments. Our results reveal a clear gap between simulation and real-world: SAC with residual learning achieves the highest returns in simulation, yet only TD-MPC2 consistently outperforms the MPPI baseline on the physical platform. Moreover, residual learning, while clearly beneficial in simulation, fails to transfer its advantage to the real world and can even degrade performance. These findings reveal that reset-free RL in the real world poses unique challenges absent from simulation, calling for further algorithmic development tailored to training in the wild.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证研究探索了无重置强化学习在真实世界敏捷驾驶中的应用，发现仿真与真实环境存在显著性能差距，TD-MPC2在物理平台上表现最佳，而残差学习在真实环境中未能发挥优势。
AI.motivation: 研究无重置强化学习在真实世界高速驾驶中的应用，解决复杂车辆动力学、执行延迟和未建模效应等挑战，这些因素阻碍了精确仿真和从仿真到真实环境的策略直接迁移。
AI.method: 使用模型预测路径积分控制作为重置策略和残差学习的基础策略，系统比较PPO、SAC和TD-MPC2三种代表性RL算法在仿真和真实实验中的表现，包括是否使用残差学习的情况。
AI.result: 仿真与真实环境存在明显差距：SAC+残差学习在仿真中表现最佳，但只有TD-MPC2在物理平台上始终优于MPPI基线；残差学习在仿真中明显有益，但在真实环境中未能转移其优势，甚至可能降低性能。
AI.conclusion: 真实世界的无重置强化学习面临仿真中不存在的独特挑战，需要针对野外训练环境开发专门的算法，当前TD-MPC2在物理平台上表现最为可靠。

title: Enhancing Confidence Estimation in Telco LLMs via Twin-Pass CoT-Ensembling
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to complex telecommunications tasks, including 3GPP specification analysis and O-RAN network troubleshooting. However, a critical limitation remains: LLM-generated confidence scores are often biased and unreliable, frequently exhibiting systematic overconfidence. This lack of trustworthy self-assessment makes it difficult to verify model outputs and safely rely on them in practice. In this paper, we study confidence calibration in telecom-domain LLMs using the representative Gemma-3 model family (4B, 12B, and 27B parameters), evaluated on TeleQnA, ORANBench, and srsRANBench. We show that standard single-pass, verbalized confidence estimates fail to reflect true correctness, often assigning high confidence to incorrect predictions. To address this, we propose a novel Twin-Pass Chain of Thought (CoT)-Ensembling methodology for improving confidence estimation by leveraging multiple independent reasoning evaluations and aggregating their assessments into a calibrated confidence score. Our approach reduces Expected Calibration Error (ECE) by up to 88% across benchmarks, significantly improving the reliability of model self-assessment. These results highlight the limitations of current confidence estimation practices and demonstrate a practical path toward more trustworthy evaluation of LLM outputs in telecommunications.

AI.tldr: 本文针对电信领域大语言模型置信度校准问题，提出双通道思维链集成方法，显著降低预期校准误差，提升模型自评估可靠性。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在电信领域应用日益广泛，但生成的置信度分数存在系统性偏差和不可靠性，经常表现出过度自信。这种缺乏可信自评估的问题使得难以验证模型输出并在实践中安全依赖它们。
AI.method: 提出新颖的双通道思维链集成方法，通过利用多个独立推理评估并将其评估聚合为校准后的置信度分数来改进置信度估计。使用Gemma-3模型家族（4B、12B和27B参数）在TeleQnA、ORANBench和srsRANBench基准上进行评估。
AI.result: 标准单通道、语言化置信度估计无法反映真实正确性，经常为错误预测分配高置信度。提出的方法将预期校准误差降低高达88%，显著提高了模型自评估的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了当前置信度估计实践的局限性，并展示了在电信领域实现更可信赖的大语言模型输出评估的实用路径。双通道思维链集成方法为解决模型过度自信问题提供了有效解决方案。

title: Safe Large-Scale Robust Nonlinear MPC in Milliseconds via Reachability-Constrained System Level Synthesis on the GPU
summary: We present GPU-SLS, a GPU-parallelized framework for safe, robust nonlinear model predictive control (MPC) that scales to high-dimensional uncertain robotic systems and long planning horizons. Our method jointly optimizes an inequality-constrained, dynamically-feasible nominal trajectory, a tracking controller, and a closed-loop reachable set under disturbance, all in real-time. To efficiently compute nominal trajectories, we develop a sequential quadratic programming procedure with a novel GPU-accelerated quadratic program (QP) solver that uses parallel associative scans and adaptive caching within an alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) framework. The same GPU QP backend is used to optimize robust tracking controllers and closed-loop reachable sets via system level synthesis (SLS), enabling reachability-constrained control in both fixed- and receding-horizon settings. We achieve substantial performance gains, reducing nominal trajectory solve times by 97.7% relative to state-of-the-art CPU solvers and 71.8% compared to GPU solvers, while accelerating SLS-based control and reachability by 237x. Despite large problem scales, our method achieves 100% empirical safety, unlike high-dimensional learning-based reachability baselines. We validate our approach on complex nonlinear systems, including whole-body quadrupeds (61D) and humanoids (75D), synthesizing robust control policies online on the GPU in 20 milliseconds on average and scaling to problems with 2 x 10^5 decision variables and 8 x 10^4 constraints. The implementation of our method is available at https://github.com/Jeff300fang/gpu_sls.

AI.tldr: GPU-SLS：一个GPU并行化的安全鲁棒非线性模型预测控制框架，针对高维不确定机器人系统和长规划时域，实现实时联合优化名义轨迹、跟踪控制器和闭环可达集。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在高维不确定机器人系统和长规划时域下实现实时、安全的非线性模型预测控制。CPU求解器计算速度慢，GPU求解器效率仍有提升空间，且学习型可达性方法在高维情况下无法保证100%安全性。
AI.method: 开发GPU并行化的顺序二次规划程序，采用新颖的GPU加速二次规划求解器，利用并行关联扫描和自适应缓存在ADMM框架内求解。使用相同的GPU QP后端通过系统级合成优化鲁棒跟踪控制器和闭环可达集，支持固定和滚动时域下的可达性约束控制。
AI.result: 性能显著提升：名义轨迹求解时间比最先进CPU求解器减少97.7%，比GPU求解器减少71.8%；SLS控制和可达性计算加速237倍。在复杂非线性系统（61D四足机器人、75D人形机器人）上验证，平均在线合成鲁棒控制策略仅需20毫秒，可扩展到2×10^5决策变量和8×10^4约束的问题，实现100%经验安全性。
AI.conclusion: GPU-SLS框架成功实现了高维不确定机器人系统的实时安全鲁棒控制，通过GPU并行化显著提升计算效率，同时保证100%安全性，为复杂机器人系统的在线控制提供了有效解决方案。

title: Binomial Gradient-Based Meta-Learning for Enhanced Meta-Gradient Estimation
comment: Accepted as poster at ICLR 2026. Code available at https://github.com/AbrahamJJM/binomgbml
summary: Meta-learning offers a principled framework leveraging \emph{task-invariant} priors from related tasks, with which \emph{task-specific} models can be fine-tuned on downstream tasks, even with limited data records. Gradient-based meta-learning (GBML) relies on gradient descent (GD) to adapt the prior to a new task. Albeit effective, these methods incur high computational overhead that scales linearly with the number of GD steps. To enhance efficiency and scalability, existing methods approximate the gradient of prior parameters (meta-gradient) via truncated backpropagation, yet suffer large approximation errors. Targeting accurate approximation, this work puts forth binomial GBML (BinomGBML), which relies on a truncated binomial expansion for meta-gradient estimation. This novel expansion endows more information in the meta-gradient estimation via efficient parallel computation. As a running paradigm applied to model-agnostic meta-learning (MAML), the resultant BinomMAML provably enjoys error bounds that not only improve upon existing approaches, but also decay super-exponentially under mild conditions. Numerical tests corroborate the theoretical analysis and showcase boosted performance with slightly increased computational overhead.

AI.tldr: 提出基于二项式展开的梯度元学习方法BinomGBML，通过并行计算高效估计元梯度，在MAML框架中实现超指数误差衰减
AI.motivation: 传统梯度元学习方法计算开销大，现有近似方法误差较大，需要更准确高效的元梯度估计方法
AI.method: 提出BinomGBML方法，利用截断二项式展开进行元梯度估计，通过并行计算高效获取更多信息
AI.result: 理论证明BinomMAML误差界优于现有方法，在温和条件下可超指数衰减；数值实验验证理论分析并展示性能提升
AI.conclusion: BinomGBML通过二项式展开提供准确高效的元梯度估计，显著提升元学习性能，计算开销略有增加但可控

title: ReSS: Learning Reasoning Models for Tabular Data Prediction via Symbolic Scaffold
summary: Tabular data remains prevalent in high-stakes domains such as healthcare and finance, where predictive models are expected to provide both high accuracy and faithful, human-understandable reasoning. While symbolic models offer verifiable logic, they lack semantic expressiveness. Meanwhile, general-purpose LLMs often require specialized fine-tuning to master domain-specific tabular reasoning. To address the dual challenges of scalable data curation and reasoning consistency, we propose ReSS, a systematic framework that bridges symbolic and neural reasoning models. ReSS leverages a decision-tree model to extract instance-level decision paths as symbolic scaffolds. These scaffolds, alongside input features and labels, guide an LLM to generate grounded natural-language reasoning that strictly adheres to the underlying decision logic. The resulting high-quality dataset is used to fine-tune a pretrained LLM into a specialized tabular reasoning model, further enhanced by a scaffold-invariant data augmentation strategy to improve generalization and explainability. To rigorously assess faithfulness, we introduce quantitative metrics including hallucination rate, explanation necessity, and explanation sufficiency. Experimental results on medical and financial benchmarks demonstrate that ReSS-trained models improve traditional decision trees and standard fine-tuning approaches up to $10\%$ while producing faithful and consistent reasoning

AI.tldr: ReSS框架通过决策树提取符号支架，引导LLM生成忠实于决策逻辑的自然语言推理，用于微调专门的表格推理模型，在医疗和金融基准上提升性能达10%
AI.motivation: 解决表格数据预测模型在高风险领域（如医疗和金融）中需要同时提供高准确性和可解释推理的挑战。符号模型缺乏语义表达能力，而通用LLM需要专门微调才能掌握领域特定的表格推理
AI.method: 提出ReSS框架：1) 使用决策树模型提取实例级决策路径作为符号支架；2) 用这些支架、输入特征和标签引导LLM生成严格遵循底层决策逻辑的自然语言推理；3) 用生成的高质量数据集微调预训练LLM为专门的表格推理模型；4) 采用支架不变的数据增强策略提升泛化能力和可解释性
AI.result: 在医疗和金融基准测试中，ReSS训练的模型相比传统决策树和标准微调方法提升达10%，同时产生忠实且一致的推理。引入了幻觉率、解释必要性和解释充分性等定量指标来严格评估忠实性
AI.conclusion: ReSS框架成功桥接了符号和神经推理模型，通过系统化的数据生成和微调方法，实现了在表格数据上既保持高准确性又提供忠实可解释推理的目标，为高风险领域的AI应用提供了有效解决方案

title: EgoVerse: An Egocentric Human Dataset for Robot Learning from Around the World
summary: Robot learning increasingly depends on large and diverse data, yet robot data collection remains expensive and difficult to scale. Egocentric human data offer a promising alternative by capturing rich manipulation behavior across everyday environments. However, existing human datasets are often limited in scope, difficult to extend, and fragmented across institutions. We introduce EgoVerse, a collaborative platform for human data-driven robot learning that unifies data collection, processing, and access under a shared framework, enabling contributions from individual researchers, academic labs, and industry partners. The current release includes 1,362 hours (80k episodes) of human demonstrations spanning 1,965 tasks, 240 scenes, and 2,087 unique demonstrators, with standardized formats, manipulation-relevant annotations, and tooling for downstream learning. Beyond the dataset, we conduct a large-scale study of human-to-robot transfer with experiments replicated across multiple labs, tasks, and robot embodiments under shared protocols. We find that policy performance generally improves with increased human data, but that effective scaling depends on alignment between human data and robot learning objectives. Together, the dataset, platform, and study establish a foundation for reproducible progress in human data-driven robot learning. Videos and additional information can be found at https://egoverse.ai/

AI.tldr: EgoVerse是一个用于机器人学习的协作平台，统一了人类数据收集、处理和访问，包含1,362小时人类演示数据，并通过多实验室研究验证了人类数据对机器人策略性能的积极影响。
AI.motivation: 机器人学习需要大量多样化数据，但机器人数据收集成本高且难以扩展。人类自我中心数据提供了丰富的日常操作行为，但现有数据集范围有限、难以扩展且分散在不同机构。
AI.method: 开发EgoVerse协作平台，统一数据收集、处理和访问框架；收集1,362小时人类演示数据（80k片段），涵盖1,965个任务、240个场景、2,087个演示者；进行大规模人类到机器人转移研究，在多个实验室、任务和机器人形态下使用共享协议进行实验。
AI.result: 当前发布包含标准化格式、操作相关标注和下游学习工具；研究发现策略性能通常随人类数据增加而提升，但有效扩展取决于人类数据与机器人学习目标的对齐程度。
AI.conclusion: EgoVerse的数据集、平台和研究为人类数据驱动的机器人学习建立了可重复进展的基础，表明协作框架和标准化协议对推动该领域发展至关重要。

title: On the Use of Evolutionary Optimization for the Dynamic Chance Constrained Open-Pit Mine Scheduling Problem
comment: Accepted to publish in 2026 IEEE World Congress on Computational Intelligence (WCCI)
summary: Open-pit mine scheduling is a complex real world optimization problem that involves uncertain economic values and dynamically changing resource capacities. Evolutionary algorithms are particularly effective in these scenarios, as they can easily adapt to uncertain and changing environments. However, uncertainty and dynamic changes are often studied in isolation in real-world problems. In this paper, we study a dynamic chance-constrained open-pit mine scheduling problem in which block economic values are stochastic and mining and processing capacities vary over time. We adopt a bi-objective evolutionary formulation that simultaneously maximizes expected discounted profit and minimizes its standard deviation. To address dynamic changes, we propose a diversity-based change response mechanism that repairs a subset of infeasible solutions and introduces additional feasible solutions whenever a change is detected. We evaluate the effectiveness of this mechanism across four multi-objective evolutionary algorithms and compare it with a baseline re-evaluation-based change-response strategy. Experimental results on six mining instances demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently outperforms the baseline methods across different uncertainty levels and change frequencies.

AI.tldr: 本文研究动态机会约束露天矿调度问题，提出基于多样性的变化响应机制，在四种多目标进化算法中验证其有效性
AI.motivation: 露天矿调度是一个复杂的现实世界优化问题，涉及不确定的经济价值和动态变化的资源容量。进化算法在这些场景中特别有效，因为它们能轻松适应不确定和变化的环境。然而，在现实问题中，不确定性和动态变化通常被孤立研究。本文研究一个动态机会约束露天矿调度问题，其中区块经济价值是随机的，采矿和处理容量随时间变化。
AI.method: 采用双目标进化公式，同时最大化预期贴现利润并最小化其标准差。为应对动态变化，提出基于多样性的变化响应机制，在检测到变化时修复不可行解的子集并引入额外的可行解。在四种多目标进化算法中评估该机制，并与基于重新评估的基线变化响应策略进行比较。
AI.result: 在六个采矿实例上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在不同不确定性水平和变化频率下始终优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于多样性的变化响应机制能有效处理动态机会约束露天矿调度问题中的不确定性和动态变化，在多目标进化算法框架下表现出优越性能。

title: SANDO: Safe Autonomous Trajectory Planning for Dynamic Unknown Environments
summary: SANDO is a safe trajectory planner for 3D dynamic unknown environments, where obstacle locations and motions are unknown a priori and a collision-free plan can become unsafe at any moment, requiring fast replanning. Existing soft-constraint planners are fast but cannot guarantee collision-free paths, while hard-constraint methods ensure safety at the cost of longer computation. SANDO addresses this trade-off through three contributions. First, a heat map-based A* global planner steers paths away from high-risk regions using soft costs, and a spatiotemporal safe flight corridor (STSFC) generator produces time-layered polytopes that inflate obstacles only by their worst-case reachable set at each time layer, rather than by the worst case over the entire horizon. Second, trajectory optimization is formulated as a Mixed-Integer Quadratic Program (MIQP) with hard collision-avoidance constraints, and a variable elimination technique reduces the number of decision variables, enabling fast computation. Third, a formal safety analysis establishes collision-free guarantees under explicit velocity-bound and estimation-error assumptions. Ablation studies show that variable elimination yields up to 7.4x speedup in optimization time, and that STSFCs are critical for feasibility in dense dynamic environments. Benchmark simulations against state-of-the-art methods across standardized static benchmarks, obstacle-rich static forests, and dynamic environments show that SANDO consistently achieves the highest success rate with no constraint violations across all difficulty levels; perception-only experiments without ground truth obstacle information confirm robust performance under realistic sensing. Hardware experiments on a UAV with fully onboard planning, perception, and localization demonstrate six safe flights in static environments and ten safe flights among dynamic obstacles.

AI.tldr: SANDO是一种用于3D动态未知环境的安全轨迹规划器，通过热图A*全局规划、时空安全飞行走廊和MIQP优化，在保证安全性的同时实现快速重规划。
AI.motivation: 现有软约束规划器速度快但无法保证无碰撞路径，硬约束方法确保安全但计算时间长。SANDO旨在解决这一权衡问题，在动态未知环境中实现既快速又安全的轨迹规划。
AI.method: 1) 热图A*全局规划器使用软成本引导路径远离高风险区域，时空安全飞行走廊生成器按时间层膨胀障碍物可达集；2) 将轨迹优化建模为混合整数二次规划，采用变量消除技术减少决策变量；3) 在明确速度边界和估计误差假设下进行形式化安全分析。
AI.result: 变量消除使优化时间加速达7.4倍，时空安全飞行走廊在密集动态环境中对可行性至关重要。在标准化静态基准、障碍物丰富的静态森林和动态环境中的基准测试显示，SANDO在所有难度级别上均实现最高成功率且无约束违反。硬件实验验证了在静态环境中的6次安全飞行和动态障碍物中的10次安全飞行。
AI.conclusion: SANDO在3D动态未知环境中实现了安全与计算效率的平衡，通过创新的规划框架在保证形式化安全性的同时提供快速重规划能力，适用于无人机等自主系统的实时导航。

title: Young people's perceptions and recommendations for conversational generative artificial intelligence in youth mental health
summary: Conversational generative artificial intelligence agents (or genAI chatbots) could benefit youth mental health, yet young people's perspectives remain underexplored. We examined the Mental health Intelligence Agent (Mia), a genAI chatbot originally designed for professionals in Australian youth services. Following co-design, 32 young people participated in online workshops exploring their perceptions of genAI chatbots in youth mental health and to develop recommendations for reconceptualising Mia for consumers and integrating it into services. Four themes were developed: (1) Humanising AI without dehumanising care, (2) I need to know what's under the hood, (3) Right tool, right place, right time?, and (4) Making it mine on safe ground. This study offers insights into young people's attitudes, needs, and requirements regarding genAI chatbots in youth mental health, with key implications for service integration. Additionally, by co-designing system requirements, this work informs the ethics, design, development, implementation, and governance of genAI chatbots in youth mental health contexts.

AI.tldr: 研究通过共同设计方法，探索年轻人对心理健康AI聊天机器人Mia的看法，并开发了四个主题来指导AI聊天机器人在青年心理健康服务中的整合与应用。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI聊天机器人可能有益于青年心理健康，但年轻人的观点尚未得到充分探索。研究旨在了解年轻人对心理健康AI聊天机器人的态度、需求和期望，以指导Mia聊天机器人的重新概念化及服务整合。
AI.method: 采用共同设计方法，32名年轻人参与在线研讨会，探讨他们对心理健康AI聊天机器人的看法，并开发关于将Mia重新设计为消费者工具及整合到服务中的建议。
AI.result: 研究得出四个主题：1) 人性化AI而不去人性化关怀；2) 需要了解AI的工作原理；3) 合适的工具、地点和时间；4) 在安全环境中实现个性化定制。这些主题揭示了年轻人对AI聊天机器人的态度、需求和具体要求。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为青年心理健康服务中AI聊天机器人的伦理、设计、开发、实施和治理提供了重要见解，通过共同设计的系统要求，指导AI聊天机器人在青年心理健康环境中的有效整合与应用。

title: Bias-Corrected Adaptive Conformal Inference for Multi-Horizon Time Series Forecasting
summary: Adaptive Conformal Inference (ACI) provides distribution-free prediction intervals with asymptotic coverage guarantees for time series under distribution shift. However, ACI only adapts the quantile threshold -- it cannot shift the interval center. When a base forecaster develops persistent bias after a regime change, ACI compensates by widening intervals symmetrically, producing unnecessarily conservative bands. We propose Bias-Corrected ACI (BC-ACI), which augments standard ACI with an online exponentially weighted moving average (EWM) estimate of forecast bias. BC-ACI corrects nonconformity scores before quantile computation and re-centers prediction intervals, addressing the root cause of miscalibration rather than its symptom. An adaptive dead-zone threshold suppresses corrections when estimated bias is indistinguishable from noise, ensuring no degradation on well-calibrated data. In controlled experiments across 688 runs spanning two base models, four synthetic regimes, and three real datasets, BC-ACI reduces Winkler interval scores by 13--17% under mean and compound distribution shifts (Wilcoxon p < 0.001) while maintaining equivalent performance on stationary data (ratio 1.002x). We provide finite-sample analysis showing that coverage guarantees degrade gracefully with bias estimation error.

AI.tldr: BC-ACI通过在线偏差估计和校正，改进标准ACI在分布漂移下的预测区间，减少不必要的保守性，同时保持覆盖保证。
AI.motivation: 标准自适应共形推断(ACI)只能调整分位数阈值，无法移动区间中心。当基础预测器在机制变化后出现持续偏差时，ACI通过对称地加宽区间来补偿，产生不必要的保守区间。需要一种能校正偏差而非仅处理症状的方法。
AI.method: 提出偏差校正ACI(BC-ACI)，在标准ACI基础上增加在线指数加权移动平均(EWMA)偏差估计。校正非共形分数后再计算分位数，重新中心化预测区间。自适应死区阈值在估计偏差与噪声无法区分时抑制校正，确保在校准良好的数据上不退化。
AI.result: 在688次实验运行中，涵盖两个基础模型、四种合成机制和三个真实数据集，BC-ACI在均值和复合分布漂移下将Winkler区间分数降低13-17%(Wilcoxon p<0.001)，在平稳数据上保持等效性能(比率1.002x)。有限样本分析显示覆盖保证随偏差估计误差优雅退化。
AI.conclusion: BC-ACI通过在线偏差估计和校正，有效解决了ACI在分布漂移下的局限性，减少了不必要的保守性，同时保持了覆盖保证，为时间序列预测提供了更精确的分布自由预测区间。

title: Out of Context: Reliability in Multimodal Anomaly Detection Requires Contextual Inference
summary: Anomaly detection aims to identify observations that deviate from expected behavior. Because anomalous events are inherently sparse, most frameworks are trained exclusively on normal data to learn a single reference model of normality. This implicitly assumes that normal behavior can be captured by a single, unconditional reference distribution. In practice, however, anomalies are often context-dependent: A specific observation may be normal under one operating condition, yet anomalous under another. As machine learning systems are deployed in dynamic and heterogeneous environments, these fixed-context assumptions introduce structural ambiguity, i.e., the inability to distinguish contextual variation from genuine abnormality under marginal modeling, leading to unstable performance and unreliable anomaly assessments. While modern sensing systems frequently collect multimodal data capturing complementary aspects of both system behavior and operating conditions, existing methods treat all data streams equally, without distinguishing contextual information from anomaly-relevant signals. As a result, abnormality is often evaluated without explicitly conditioning on operating conditions. We argue that multimodal anomaly detection should be reframed as a cross-modal contextual inference problem, in which modalities play asymmetric roles, separating context from observation, to define abnormality conditionally rather than relative to a single global reference. This perspective has implications for model design, evaluation protocols, and benchmark construction, and outline open research challenges toward robust, context-aware multimodal anomaly detection.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出将多模态异常检测重构为跨模态上下文推理问题，强调区分上下文信息与异常相关信号，以条件方式定义异常而非依赖单一全局参考分布。
AI.motivation: 传统异常检测方法假设正常行为可由单一无条件参考分布捕获，但在动态异构环境中，异常具有上下文依赖性。现有多模态方法平等对待所有数据流，未能区分上下文信息与异常相关信号，导致结构模糊性和不可靠的异常评估。
AI.method: 提出将多模态异常检测重构为跨模态上下文推理问题，其中模态扮演不对称角色：分离上下文与观测，以条件方式而非相对于单一全局参考来定义异常。这需要对模型设计、评估协议和基准构建进行相应调整。
AI.result: 论文提出了概念框架而非具体实验结果，但论证了当前方法的局限性：在动态环境中，固定上下文假设导致结构模糊性，无法区分上下文变化与真实异常，造成性能不稳定和不可靠的异常评估。
AI.conclusion: 多模态异常检测应作为跨模态上下文推理问题重新构建，模态需区分上下文与观测角色，实现条件异常定义。这一视角对模型设计、评估协议和基准构建具有重要影响，并指出了实现鲁棒、上下文感知的多模态异常检测的开放研究挑战。

title: Peer-Predictive Self-Training for Language Model Reasoning
summary: Mechanisms for continued self-improvement of language models without external supervision remain an open challenge. We propose Peer-Predictive Self-Training (PST), a label-free fine-tuning framework in which multiple language models improve collaboratively by leveraging a cross-model aggregated response as an internal training signal. Given a prompt question, the models generate responses sequentially; the final aggregated answer, often more reliable than individual responses in practice, serves as an internal target for learning. We measure how informative each intermediate response is about the aggregate using pointwise mutual information (PMI), and use this signal to scale self-training updates. Responses already aligned with the aggregate are updated less, while less informative or misaligned responses are updated more. On mathematical reasoning benchmarks (SimulEq, Math500, and MultiArith), PST improves exact-match accuracy by 2.2 to 4.3 percentage points across Gemma-2-2B, LLaMA-3.2-1B, and Qwen-2.5-1.5B, and reduces the average generator-verifier gap (GV-Gap) by 26 to 40 percent, while requiring no external supervision or teacher-student hierarchy and relying solely on cross-model interactions. These results suggest that cross-model generations and peer-predictive feedback can serve as an effective approach for self-supervised training.

AI.tldr: PST是一种无需外部监督的语言模型自我改进框架，通过多个模型协作生成响应，利用聚合答案作为内部训练信号，使用PMI衡量中间响应的信息量来缩放自训练更新。
AI.motivation: 语言模型在没有外部监督的情况下持续自我改进的机制仍然是一个开放挑战。需要开发一种无需外部标签或教师-学生层次结构的自我训练方法。
AI.method: 提出Peer-Predictive Self-Training (PST)框架：多个语言模型顺序生成对提示问题的响应；最终聚合答案作为内部训练目标；使用点互信息(PMI)衡量每个中间响应关于聚合答案的信息量，以此信号缩放自训练更新（与聚合对齐的响应更新较少，信息量不足或不对齐的响应更新更多）。
AI.result: 在数学推理基准测试(SimulEq、Math500、MultiArith)上，PST将Gemma-2-2B、LLaMA-3.2-1B和Qwen-2.5-1.5B的精确匹配准确率提高了2.2到4.3个百分点，并将平均生成器-验证器差距(GV-Gap)降低了26%到40%。
AI.conclusion: 跨模型生成和同伴预测反馈可以作为有效的自监督训练方法，无需外部监督或教师-学生层次结构，仅依赖跨模型交互即可实现语言模型的自我改进。

title: Grasp as You Dream: Imitating Functional Grasping from Generated Human Demonstrations
summary: Building generalist robots capable of performing functional grasping in everyday, open-world environments remains a significant challenge due to the vast diversity of objects and tasks. Existing methods are either constrained to narrow object/task sets or rely on prohibitively large-scale data collection to capture real-world variability. In this work, we present an alternative approach, GraspDreamer, a method that leverages human demonstrations synthesized by visual generative models (VGMs) (e.g., video generation models) to enable zero-shot functional grasping without labor-intensive data collection. The key idea is that VGMs pre-trained on internet-scale human data implicitly encode generalized priors about how humans interact with the physical world, which can be combined with embodiment-specific action optimization to enable functional grasping with minimal effort. Extensive experiments on the public benchmarks with different robot hands demonstrate the superior data efficiency and generalization performance of GraspDreamer compared to previous methods. Real-world evaluations further validate the effectiveness on real robots. Additionally, we showcase that GraspDreamer can (1) be naturally extended to downstream manipulation tasks, and (2) can generate data to support visuomotor policy learning.

AI.tldr: GraspDreamer：利用视觉生成模型合成人类演示，实现零样本功能抓取，无需大规模数据收集
AI.motivation: 构建能在开放世界环境中执行功能抓取的通用机器人面临巨大挑战，现有方法要么局限于狭窄的对象/任务集，要么依赖大规模数据收集来捕捉现实世界的多样性。
AI.method: 利用在互联网规模人类数据上预训练的视觉生成模型（如视频生成模型）合成人类演示，这些模型隐式编码了人类与物理世界交互的广义先验，再结合特定具身动作优化来实现功能抓取。
AI.result: 在不同机器人手上的公共基准测试中，GraspDreamer相比先前方法展现出卓越的数据效率和泛化性能。真实世界评估进一步验证了其在真实机器人上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: GraspDreamer提供了一种无需劳动密集型数据收集的零样本功能抓取方法，可自然扩展到下游操作任务，并能生成数据支持视觉运动策略学习。

title: Analog Optical Inference on Million-Record Mortgage Data
summary: Analog optical computers promise large efficiency gains for machine learning inference, yet no demonstration has moved beyond small-scale image benchmarks. We benchmark the analog optical computer (AOC) digital twin on mortgage approval classification from 5.84 million U.S. HMDA records and separate three sources of accuracy loss. On the original 19 features, the AOC reaches 94.6% balanced accuracy with 5,126 parameters (1,024 optical), compared with 97.9% for XGBoost; the 3.3 percentage-point gap narrows by only 0.5pp when the optical core is widened from 16 to 48 channels, suggesting an architectural rather than hardware limitation. Restricting all models to a shared 127-bit binary encoding drops every model to 89.4--89.6%, with an encoding cost of 8pp for digital models and 5pp for the AOC. Seven calibrated hardware non-idealities impose no measurable penalty. The three resulting layers of limitation (encoding, architecture, hardware fidelity) locate where accuracy is lost and what to improve next.

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了模拟光学计算机在抵押贷款审批分类任务上的性能，识别了三种准确性损失来源：编码限制、架构限制和硬件保真度限制。
AI.motivation: 模拟光学计算机在机器学习推理方面具有巨大的效率优势，但现有研究仅限于小规模图像基准测试。需要在实际大规模金融数据集上评估其性能，并系统分析准确性损失的来源。
AI.method: 使用美国HMDA的584万条抵押贷款记录进行抵押贷款审批分类任务。通过数字孪生模型评估模拟光学计算机性能，分析三种准确性损失来源：1）编码限制（127位二进制编码）；2）架构限制（光学核心从16通道扩展到48通道）；3）硬件保真度（7种校准的硬件非理想性）。
AI.result: 在原始19个特征上，AOC达到94.6%的平衡准确率（5,126个参数，其中1,024个光学参数），XGBoost为97.9%。将光学核心从16通道扩展到48通道仅缩小0.5pp差距，表明存在架构限制而非硬件限制。使用127位二进制编码后，所有模型准确率降至89.4-89.6%，编码成本对数字模型为8pp，对AOC为5pp。硬件非理想性未造成可测量的性能损失。
AI.conclusion: 研究识别了模拟光学计算机准确性的三层限制：编码限制、架构限制和硬件保真度限制。硬件非理想性不是主要瓶颈，未来改进应聚焦于编码方案和架构设计，而非单纯增加硬件规模。
