title: Active Reward Machine Inference From Raw State Trajectories
summary: Reward machines are automaton-like structures that capture the memory required to accomplish a multi-stage task. When combined with reinforcement learning or optimal control methods, they can be used to synthesize robot policies to achieve such tasks. However, specifying a reward machine by hand, including a labeling function capturing high-level features that the decisions are based on, can be a daunting task. This paper deals with the problem of learning reward machines directly from raw state and policy information. As opposed to existing works, we assume no access to observations of rewards, labels, or machine nodes, and show what trajectory data is sufficient for learning the reward machine in this information-scarce regime. We then extend the result to an active learning setting where we incrementally query trajectory extensions to improve data (and indirectly computational) efficiency. Results are demonstrated with several grid world examples.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在缺乏奖励、标签和状态节点观测的情况下，直接从原始状态和策略信息中学习奖励机器，并扩展到主动学习以提高数据效率。
AI.motivation: 手动指定奖励机器（包括捕捉决策基础的高层特征的标记函数）是一项艰巨任务，现有方法需要访问奖励、标签或机器节点观测，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 提出在信息稀缺情况下直接从原始状态和策略信息学习奖励机器的方法，确定足够学习奖励机器的轨迹数据类型，并扩展到主动学习设置，通过增量查询轨迹扩展来提高数据效率。
AI.result: 在多个网格世界示例中验证了方法的有效性，展示了在缺乏奖励、标签和状态节点观测的情况下仍能学习奖励机器，主动学习进一步提高了数据效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够在信息稀缺情况下学习奖励机器，为机器人策略合成提供了更实用的解决方案，主动学习扩展进一步提高了方法的效率和实用性。

title: CMP: Robust Whole-Body Tracking for Loco-Manipulation via Competence Manifold Projection
comment: 14 pages, 8 figures. Under review. Project page and videos: https://shepherd1226.github.io/CMP
summary: While decoupled control schemes for legged mobile manipulators have shown robustness, learning holistic whole-body control policies for tracking global end-effector poses remains fragile against Out-of-Distribution (OOD) inputs induced by sensor noise or infeasible user commands. To improve robustness against these perturbations without sacrificing task performance and continuity, we propose Competence Manifold Projection (CMP). Specifically, we utilize a Frame-Wise Safety Scheme that transforms the infinite-horizon safety constraint into a computationally efficient single-step manifold inclusion. To instantiate this competence manifold, we employ a Lower-Bounded Safety Estimator that distinguishes unmastered intentions from the training distribution. We then introduce an Isomorphic Latent Space (ILS) that aligns manifold geometry with safety probability, enabling efficient O(1) seamless defense against arbitrary OOD intents. Experiments demonstrate that CMP achieves up to a 10-fold survival rate improvement in typical OOD scenarios where baselines suffer catastrophic failure, incurring under 10% tracking degradation. Notably, the system exhibits emergent ``best-effort'' generalization behaviors to progressively accomplish OOD goals by adhering to the competence boundaries. Result videos are available at: https://shepherd1226.github.io/CMP.

AI.tldr: 提出Competence Manifold Projection (CMP)方法，通过能力流形投影提升腿式移动机械臂全身控制策略对分布外输入的鲁棒性，同时保持任务性能连续性。
AI.motivation: 现有解耦控制方案对腿式移动机械臂已显示鲁棒性，但学习型全身控制策略在跟踪全局末端执行器位姿时，对传感器噪声或不可行用户命令引起的分布外输入仍显脆弱。
AI.method: 提出能力流形投影(CMP)：1) 采用帧级安全方案将无限时域安全约束转化为计算高效的单步流形包含问题；2) 使用下界安全估计器区分训练分布外的未掌握意图；3) 引入同构潜在空间对齐流形几何与安全概率，实现O(1)复杂度对任意分布外意图的无缝防御。
AI.result: 实验显示CMP在典型分布外场景中实现高达10倍的生存率提升（基线方法出现灾难性失败），同时跟踪性能下降低于10%。系统展现出"尽力而为"的泛化行为，通过遵循能力边界逐步完成分布外目标。
AI.conclusion: CMP方法有效提升了学习型全身控制策略对分布外输入的鲁棒性，在保持任务性能的同时实现了对不可行命令的安全处理，展现了向分布外目标渐进完成的能力。

title: MoRight: Motion Control Done Right
summary: Generating motion-controlled videos--where user-specified actions drive physically plausible scene dynamics under freely chosen viewpoints--demands two capabilities: (1) disentangled motion control, allowing users to separately control the object motion and adjust camera viewpoint; and (2) motion causality, ensuring that user-driven actions trigger coherent reactions from other objects rather than merely displacing pixels. Existing methods fall short on both fronts: they entangle camera and object motion into a single tracking signal and treat motion as kinematic displacement without modeling causal relationships between object motion. We introduce MoRight, a unified framework that addresses both limitations through disentangled motion modeling. Object motion is specified in a canonical static-view and transferred to an arbitrary target camera viewpoint via temporal cross-view attention, enabling disentangled camera and object control. We further decompose motion into active (user-driven) and passive (consequence) components, training the model to learn motion causality from data. At inference, users can either supply active motion and MoRight predicts consequences (forward reasoning), or specify desired passive outcomes and MoRight recovers plausible driving actions (inverse reasoning), all while freely adjusting the camera viewpoint. Experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance in generation quality, motion controllability, and interaction awareness.

AI.tldr: MoRight：一个解耦运动控制的视频生成框架，支持分离控制物体运动和相机视角，并建模主动运动与被动反应的因果关系
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在两个主要问题：1) 将相机运动和物体运动耦合在单一跟踪信号中，无法独立控制；2) 将运动视为简单的运动学位移，未建模物体间的因果关系。需要同时实现解耦运动控制和运动因果性建模
AI.method: 提出MoRight统一框架：1) 在静态视角规范空间中指定物体运动，通过时序跨视角注意力转移到任意目标相机视角，实现相机与物体运动的解耦控制；2) 将运动分解为主动（用户驱动）和被动（后果）分量，从数据中学习运动因果关系；3) 支持前向推理（给定主动运动预测后果）和逆向推理（指定被动结果恢复驱动动作）
AI.result: 在三个基准测试中展示了最先进的性能，在生成质量、运动可控性和交互感知方面表现优异
AI.conclusion: MoRight通过解耦运动建模解决了现有方法的局限性，实现了分离的相机和物体控制，并建模了运动因果关系，为运动控制视频生成提供了灵活的前向和逆向推理能力

title: Shapley Value-Guided Adaptive Ensemble Learning for Explainable Financial Fraud Detection with U.S. Regulatory Compliance Validation
comment: 28 pages. Submitted to Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence (Elsevier). IEEE-CIS dataset (590,540 transactions). Includes SGAE algorithm, SHAP stability evaluation, and OCC/SR 11-7 regulatory compliance mapping
summary: Financial crime costs U.S. institutions over $32 billion each year. Although AI tools for fraud detection have become more advanced, their use in real-world systems still faces a major obstacle: many of these models operate as black boxes that cannot provide the transparent, auditable explanations required by regulations such as OCC Bulletin 2011-12 and Federal Reserve SR 11-7. This study makes three main contributions. First, it offers a thorough evaluation of explanation quality across faithfulness (sufficiency and comprehensiveness at k=5, 10, and 15) and stability (Kendall's W across 30 bootstrap samples). XGBoost paired with TreeExplainer achieves near-perfect stability (W=0.9912), while LSTM with DeepExplainer shows weak results (W=0.4962). Second, the paper introduces the SHAP-Guided Adaptive Ensemble (SGAE), which dynamically adjusts per-transaction ensemble weights based on SHAP attribution agreement, achieving the highest AUC-ROC among all tested models (0.8837 held-out; 0.9245 cross-validation). Third, a complete three-architecture evaluation of LSTM, Transformer, and GNN-GraphSAGE on the full 590,540-transaction IEEE-CIS dataset is provided, with GNN-GraphSAGE achieving AUC-ROC 0.9248 and F1=0.6013. All results are mapped directly to OCC, SR 11-7, and BSA-AML regulatory compliance requirements.

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了金融犯罪检测AI模型的可解释性质量，提出了基于SHAP的自适应集成方法SGAE，并在完整数据集上评估了三种架构，将结果映射到监管合规要求。
AI.motivation: 金融犯罪每年给美国机构造成超过320亿美元损失。虽然AI欺诈检测工具日益先进，但在实际系统中应用仍面临主要障碍：许多模型是黑箱，无法提供监管要求（如OCC Bulletin 2011-12和Federal Reserve SR 11-7）所需的透明、可审计的解释。
AI.method: 1) 全面评估解释质量，包括忠实性（充分性和全面性，k=5,10,15）和稳定性（30个bootstrap样本的Kendall's W）；2) 提出SHAP引导自适应集成(SGAE)，基于SHAP归因一致性动态调整每笔交易的集成权重；3) 在完整590,540笔交易的IEEE-CIS数据集上评估LSTM、Transformer和GNN-GraphSAGE三种架构。
AI.result: XGBoost+TreeExplainer达到近乎完美的稳定性(W=0.9912)，LSTM+DeepExplainer表现较弱(W=0.4962)。SGAE在所有测试模型中达到最高AUC-ROC（保留集0.8837；交叉验证0.9245）。GNN-GraphSAGE在完整数据集上表现最佳（AUC-ROC 0.9248，F1=0.6013）。所有结果直接映射到OCC、SR 11-7和BSA-AML监管合规要求。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过系统评估可解释性质量、提出自适应集成方法SGAE以及全面评估三种架构，为金融犯罪检测AI模型提供了满足监管合规要求的解决方案，解决了黑箱模型在实际应用中的障碍。

title: TAMEn: Tactile-Aware Manipulation Engine for Closed-Loop Data Collection in Contact-Rich Tasks
summary: Handheld paradigms offer an efficient and intuitive way for collecting large-scale demonstration of robot manipulation. However, achieving contact-rich bimanual manipulation through these methods remains a pivotal challenge, which is substantially hindered by hardware adaptability and data efficacy. Prior hardware designs remain gripper-specific and often face a trade-off between tracking precision and portability. Furthermore, the lack of online feasibility checking during demonstration leads to poor replayability. More importantly, existing handheld setups struggle to collect interactive recovery data during robot execution, lacking the authentic tactile information necessary for robust policy refinement. To bridge these gaps, we present TAMEn, a tactile-aware manipulation engine for closed-loop data collection in contact-rich tasks. Our system features a cross-morphology wearable interface that enables rapid adaptation across heterogeneous grippers. To balance data quality and environmental diversity, we implement a dual-modal acquisition pipeline: a precision mode leveraging motion capture for high-fidelity demonstrations, and a portable mode utilizing VR-based tracking for in-the-wild acquisition and tactile-visualized recovery teleoperation. Building on this hardware, we unify large-scale tactile pretraining, task-specific bimanual demonstrations, and human-in-the-loop recovery data into a pyramid-structured data regime, enabling closed-loop policy refinement. Experiments show that our feasibility-aware pipeline significantly improves demonstration replayability, and that the proposed visuo-tactile learning framework increases task success rates from 34% to 75% across diverse bimanual manipulation tasks. We further open-source the hardware and dataset to facilitate reproducibility and support research in visuo-tactile manipulation.

AI.tldr: TAMEn是一个触觉感知的闭环数据收集系统，用于接触丰富的双手操作任务，通过跨形态可穿戴接口、双模态采集管道和金字塔结构数据体系，显著提升演示可重放性和任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 手持式演示方法虽然高效直观，但在实现接触丰富的双手操作方面面临关键挑战：硬件适应性差、数据效率低、缺乏在线可行性检查导致可重放性差，以及无法收集机器人执行期间的交互恢复数据。
AI.method: 1) 跨形态可穿戴接口，快速适应异构夹爪；2) 双模态采集管道：精度模式（运动捕捉）用于高保真演示，便携模式（VR跟踪）用于野外采集和触觉可视化恢复遥操作；3) 金字塔结构数据体系，统一大规模触觉预训练、任务特定双手演示和人在环恢复数据。
AI.result: 可行性感知管道显著提升演示可重放性；提出的视觉-触觉学习框架将任务成功率从34%提高到75%；硬件和数据集已开源以促进可重复性研究。
AI.conclusion: TAMEn系统通过硬件适应性、数据收集效率和闭环策略精炼的创新设计，成功解决了接触丰富双手操作中的数据收集挑战，为视觉-触觉操作研究提供了有效工具。

title: Does Dimensionality Reduction via Random Projections Preserve Landscape Features?
comment: 9 Pages, 5 figures, Submitted and accepted to Proceedings of The Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference 2026,
summary:
Exploratory Landscape Analysis (ELA) provides numerical features for characterizing black-box optimization problems. In high-dimensional settings, however, ELA suffers from sparsity effects, high estimator variance, and the prohibitive cost of computing several feature classes. Dimensionality reduction has therefore been proposed as a way to make ELA applicable in such settings, but it remains unclear whether features computed in reduced spaces still reflect intrinsic properties of the original landscape.
  In this work, we investigate the robustness of ELA features under dimensionality reduction via Random Gaussian Embeddings (RGEs). Starting from the same sampled points and objective values, we compute ELA features in projected spaces and compare them to those obtained in the original search space across multiple sample budgets and embedding dimensions.
  Our results show that linear random projections often alter the geometric and topological structure relevant to ELA, yielding feature values that are no longer representative of the original problem. While a small subset of features remains comparatively stable, most are highly sensitive to the embedding. Moreover, robustness under projection does not necessarily imply informativeness, as apparently robust features may still reflect projection-induced artifacts rather than intrinsic landscape characteristics.

AI.tldr: 研究探索性景观分析(ELA)特征在随机高斯嵌入降维下的鲁棒性，发现大多数特征对投影高度敏感，降维后特征值不再代表原始问题特性。
AI.motivation: 探索性景观分析在高维设置中存在稀疏效应、高估计方差和计算成本问题，降维虽被提出作为解决方案，但尚不清楚降维空间中的特征是否仍能反映原始景观的内在特性。
AI.method: 通过随机高斯嵌入(RGEs)进行降维，从相同的采样点和目标值出发，在投影空间中计算ELA特征，并与原始搜索空间中的特征进行比较，考察多个样本预算和嵌入维度。
AI.result: 线性随机投影通常会改变与ELA相关的几何和拓扑结构，导致特征值不再代表原始问题；只有一小部分特征相对稳定，大多数特征对嵌入高度敏感；鲁棒性并不一定意味着信息性，看似鲁棒的特征可能仍反映投影引入的伪影而非内在景观特性。
AI.conclusion: 在高维优化问题中应用探索性景观分析时需谨慎使用降维技术，因为大多数ELA特征在随机投影下不鲁棒，降维可能扭曲景观特性，导致特征分析结果不可靠。

title: RoSHI: A Versatile Robot-oriented Suit for Human Data In-the-Wild
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures. *Equal contribution by first three authors. Project webpage: https://roshi-mocap.github.io/
summary: Scaling up robot learning will likely require human data containing rich and long-horizon interactions in the wild. Existing approaches for collecting such data trade off portability, robustness to occlusion, and global consistency. We introduce RoSHI, a hybrid wearable that fuses low-cost sparse IMUs with the Project Aria glasses to estimate the full 3D pose and body shape of the wearer in a metric global coordinate frame from egocentric perception. This system is motivated by the complementarity of the two sensors: IMUs provide robustness to occlusions and high-speed motions, while egocentric SLAM anchors long-horizon motion and stabilizes upper body pose. We collect a dataset of agile activities to evaluate RoSHI. On this dataset, we generally outperform other egocentric baselines and perform comparably to a state-of-the-art exocentric baseline (SAM3D). Finally, we demonstrate that the motion data recorded from our system are suitable for real-world humanoid policy learning. For videos, data and more, visit the project webpage: https://roshi-mocap.github.io/

AI.tldr: RoSHI：一种融合低成本稀疏IMU与Project Aria眼镜的混合可穿戴系统，用于从第一人称视角估计穿戴者的完整3D姿态和身体形状，在度量全局坐标系中实现。
AI.motivation: 扩展机器人学习需要包含丰富、长时程交互的人类数据。现有数据收集方法在便携性、遮挡鲁棒性和全局一致性之间存在权衡。RoSHI通过融合两种传感器的互补优势来解决这一问题：IMU提供遮挡鲁棒性和高速运动捕捉，而第一人称SLAM锚定长时程运动并稳定上身姿态。
AI.method: 开发了RoSHI混合可穿戴系统，融合低成本稀疏IMU（惯性测量单元）与Project Aria眼镜。IMU提供运动捕捉的鲁棒性，特别是对遮挡和高速运动；第一人称SLAM（同步定位与建图）提供全局坐标系锚定和长时程运动稳定性。系统在度量全局坐标系中估计完整的3D姿态和身体形状。
AI.result: 在敏捷活动数据集上评估RoSHI，通常优于其他第一人称基线方法，性能与最先进的外部视角基线（SAM3D）相当。同时证明系统记录的运动数据适用于现实世界人形机器人策略学习。
AI.conclusion: RoSHI系统通过融合IMU和第一人称SLAM的互补优势，实现了便携、遮挡鲁棒且全局一致的人类运动捕捉，为机器人学习提供了高质量的人类交互数据收集解决方案。

title: KV Packet: Recomputation-Free Context-Independent KV Caching for LLMs
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) rely heavily on Key-Value (KV) caching to minimize inference latency. However, standard KV caches are context-dependent: reusing a cached document in a new context requires recomputing KV states to account for shifts in attention distribution. Existing solutions such as CacheBlend, EPIC, and SAM-KV mitigate this issue by selectively recomputing a subset of tokens; however, they still incur non-negligible computational overhead (FLOPs) and increased Time-to-First-Token (TTFT) latency. In this paper, we propose KV Packet, a recomputation-free cache reuse framework that treats cached documents as immutable ``packets'' wrapped in light-weight trainable soft-token adapters, which are trained via self-supervised distillation to bridge context discontinuities. Experiments on Llama-3.1 and Qwen2.5 demonstrate that the proposed KV Packet method achieves near-zero FLOPs and lower TTFT than recomputation-based baselines, while retaining F1 scores comparable to those of the full recomputation baseline.

AI.tldr: KV Packet：一种免重计算的KV缓存复用框架，通过可训练的软标记适配器实现跨上下文缓存重用，显著降低计算开销和首词延迟
AI.motivation: 现有KV缓存复用方法（如CacheBlend、EPIC、SAM-KV）虽然通过选择性重计算部分标记来缓解上下文依赖问题，但仍产生不可忽略的计算开销（FLOPs）和增加的首词延迟（TTFT）。需要一种更高效的缓存复用方案。
AI.method: 提出KV Packet框架，将缓存文档视为不可变的"数据包"，并包装轻量级可训练的软标记适配器。通过自监督蒸馏训练适配器来弥合上下文不连续性，实现免重计算的缓存复用。
AI.result: 在Llama-3.1和Qwen2.5上的实验表明，KV Packet方法实现了接近零的FLOPs，比基于重计算的基线方法具有更低的首词延迟（TTFT），同时保持了与完全重计算基线相当的F1分数。
AI.conclusion: KV Packet通过软标记适配器有效解决了KV缓存的上下文依赖问题，在保持模型性能的同时显著降低了计算开销和推理延迟，为LLM推理优化提供了高效解决方案。

title: Identifiability of Potentially Degenerate Gaussian Mixture Models With Piecewise Affine Mixing
summary: Causal representation learning (CRL) aims to identify the underlying latent variables from high-dimensional observations, even when variables are dependent with each other. We study this problem for latent variables that follow a potentially degenerate Gaussian mixture distribution and that are only observed through the transformation via a piecewise affine mixing function. We provide a series of progressively stronger identifiability results for this challenging setting in which the probability density functions are ill-defined because of the potential degeneracy. For identifiability up to permutation and scaling, we leverage a sparsity regularization on the learned representation. Based on our theoretical results, we propose a two-stage method to estimate the latent variables by enforcing sparsity and Gaussianity in the learned representations. Experiments on synthetic and image data highlight our method's effectiveness in recovering the ground-truth latent variables.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究因果表示学习问题，针对潜在变量服从可能退化的高斯混合分布且通过分段仿射混合函数观测的情况，提出了一系列逐步增强的可识别性结果，并基于稀疏性正则化设计了两阶段估计方法。
AI.motivation: 因果表示学习旨在从高维观测中识别潜在变量，但当变量相互依赖且观测函数复杂时面临挑战。特别是当潜在变量服从可能退化的高斯混合分布，且通过分段仿射混合函数观测时，概率密度函数可能未定义，这使得传统方法难以应用。
AI.method: 提出基于稀疏性正则化的可识别性理论框架，利用潜在表示的稀疏性实现置换和缩放级别的可识别性。基于理论结果设计了两阶段估计方法：第一阶段通过稀疏性约束学习表示，第二阶段通过高斯性约束进一步优化。
AI.result: 在合成数据和图像数据上的实验表明，该方法能有效恢复真实潜在变量。理论分析提供了一系列逐步增强的可识别性结果，包括在概率密度函数未定义的退化情况下的可识别性保证。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为具有退化高斯混合分布潜在变量和分段仿射混合函数的因果表示学习提供了理论框架和实用方法，通过稀疏性正则化解决了传统方法难以处理的退化情况，扩展了因果表示学习的适用范围。

title: Giving Voice to the Constitution: Low-Resource Text-to-Speech for Quechua and Spanish Using a Bilingual Legal Corpus
summary: We present a unified pipeline for synthesizing high-quality Quechua and Spanish speech for the Peruvian Constitution using three state-of-the-art text-to-speech (TTS) architectures: XTTS v2, F5-TTS, and DiFlow-TTS. Our models are trained on independent Spanish and Quechua speech datasets with heterogeneous sizes and recording conditions, and leverage bilingual and multilingual TTS capabilities to improve synthesis quality in both languages. By exploiting cross-lingual transfer, our framework mitigates data scarcity in Quechua while preserving naturalness in Spanish. We release trained checkpoints, inference code, and synthesized audio for each constitutional article, providing a reusable resource for speech technologies in indigenous and multilingual contexts. This work contributes to the development of inclusive TTS systems for political and legal content in low-resource settings.

AI.tldr: 提出一个统一管道，使用XTTS v2、F5-TTS和DiFlow-TTS三种最先进的TTS架构，为秘鲁宪法合成高质量的克丘亚语和西班牙语语音。
AI.motivation: 解决低资源环境下土著语言（克丘亚语）语音合成的数据稀缺问题，同时为政治和法律内容开发包容性的多语言TTS系统。
AI.method: 使用三种先进TTS架构（XTTS v2、F5-TTS、DiFlow-TTS），在独立西班牙语和克丘亚语语音数据集上训练，利用双语和多语言TTS能力，通过跨语言迁移缓解克丘亚语数据稀缺。
AI.result: 训练了检查点、发布了推理代码，并为每个宪法条款合成了音频，创建了可重用的语音技术资源，在保持西班牙语自然度的同时提高了克丘亚语合成质量。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为低资源环境下的土著和多语言语境开发了包容性TTS系统，为政治和法律内容的语音合成提供了实用资源。

title: Rare Event Analysis via Stochastic Optimal Control
summary: Rare events such as conformational changes in biomolecules, phase transitions, and chemical reactions are central to the behavior of many physical systems, yet they are extremely difficult to study computationally because unbiased simulations seldom produce them. Transition Path Theory (TPT) provides a rigorous statistical framework for analyzing such events: it characterizes the ensemble of reactive trajectories between two designated metastable states (reactant and product), and its central object--the committor function, which gives the probability that the system will next reach the product rather than the reactant--encodes all essential kinetic and thermodynamic information. We introduce a framework that casts committor estimation as a stochastic optimal control (SOC) problem. In this formulation the committor defines a feedback control--proportional to the gradient of its logarithm--that actively steers trajectories toward the reactive region, thereby enabling efficient sampling of reactive paths. To solve the resulting hitting-time control problem we develop two complementary objectives: a direct backpropagation loss and a principled off-policy Value Matching loss, for which we establish first-order optimality guarantees. We further address metastability, which can trap controlled trajectories in intermediate basins, by introducing an alternative sampling process that preserves the reactive current while lowering effective energy barriers. On benchmark systems, the framework yields markedly more accurate committor estimates, reaction rates, and equilibrium constants than existing methods.

AI.tldr: 将过渡路径理论中的承诺函数估计转化为随机最优控制问题，通过反馈控制引导轨迹采样反应路径，提出两种优化目标并解决亚稳态问题
AI.motivation: 生物分子构象变化、相变和化学反应等罕见事件在计算上难以研究，因为无偏模拟很少产生这些事件。过渡路径理论提供了分析此类事件的严格统计框架，但其核心承诺函数的准确估计具有挑战性。
AI.method: 将承诺函数估计转化为随机最优控制问题，承诺函数定义了一个反馈控制（与其对数梯度成正比），主动引导轨迹进入反应区域。开发了两种互补的优化目标：直接反向传播损失和原则性的离策略值匹配损失，并建立了最优性保证。针对亚稳态问题，引入替代采样过程，在保持反应流的同时降低有效能垒。
AI.result: 在基准系统上，该框架产生的承诺函数估计、反应速率和平衡常数比现有方法显著更准确。
AI.conclusion: 将过渡路径理论与随机最优控制相结合，为罕见事件采样和分析提供了强大的新框架，能够更准确地估计反应动力学和热力学性质。

title: English is Not All You Need: Systematically Exploring the Role of Multilinguality in LLM Post-Training
summary: Despite the widespread multilingual deployment of large language models, post-training pipelines remain predominantly English-centric, contributing to performance disparities across languages. We present a systematic, controlled study of the interplay between training language coverage, model scale, and task domain, based on 220 supervised fine-tuning runs on parallel translated multilingual data mixtures spanning mathematical reasoning and API calling tasks, with models up to 8B parameters. We find that increasing language coverage during post-training is largely beneficial across tasks and model scales, with low-resource languages benefiting the most and high-resource languages plateauing rather than degrading. Even minimal multilinguality helps: incorporating a single non-English language improves both English performance and cross-lingual generalization, making English-only post-training largely suboptimal. Moreover, at sufficient language diversity, zero-shot cross-lingual transfer can match or exceed the effects of direct language inclusion in a low-diversity setting, although gains remain limited for typologically distant, low-resource languages.

AI.tldr: 该研究系统分析了多语言后训练中语言覆盖度、模型规模和任务领域的相互作用，发现增加语言覆盖度普遍有益，低资源语言受益最大，高资源语言趋于饱和而非下降。即使最小程度的多语言化也能提升英语性能和跨语言泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型的后训练流程主要围绕英语设计，导致不同语言间的性能差异。研究旨在系统探索训练语言覆盖度、模型规模和任务领域之间的相互作用，以优化多语言后训练策略。
AI.method: 基于220个监督微调实验，使用并行翻译的多语言数据混合，涵盖数学推理和API调用任务，模型参数规模达80亿。通过控制实验研究语言覆盖度、模型规模和任务领域的影响。
AI.result: 增加后训练语言覆盖度对各类任务和模型规模都有益，低资源语言受益最大，高资源语言性能趋于饱和而非下降。即使只加入一种非英语语言也能提升英语性能和跨语言泛化。在足够语言多样性下，零样本跨语言迁移可达到或超过低多样性设置中直接包含语言的效果，但对类型学上遥远、低资源语言的提升有限。
AI.conclusion: 纯英语后训练策略是次优的，多语言后训练能显著提升模型性能，特别是对低资源语言。语言多样性是实现有效跨语言迁移的关键因素，但需要针对特定语言特性进行优化。

title: OpenPRC: A Unified Open-Source Framework for Physics-to-Task Evaluation in Physical Reservoir Computing
summary: Physical Reservoir Computing (PRC) leverages the intrinsic nonlinear dynamics of physical substrates, mechanical, optical, spintronic, and beyond, as fixed computational reservoirs, offering a compelling paradigm for energy-efficient and embodied machine learning. However, the practical workflow for developing and evaluating PRC systems remains fragmented: existing tools typically address only isolated parts of the pipeline, such as substrate-specific simulation, digital reservoir benchmarking, or readout training. What is missing is a unified framework that can represent both high-fidelity simulated trajectories and real experimental measurements through the same data interface, enabling reproducible evaluation, analysis, and physics-aware optimization across substrates and data sources. We present OpenPRC, an open-source Python framework that fills this gap through a schema-driven physics-to-task pipeline built around five modules: a GPU-accelerated hybrid RK4-PBD physics engine (demlat), a video-based experimental ingestion layer (openprc.vision), a modular learning layer (reservoir), information-theoretic analysis and benchmarking tools (analysis), and physics-aware optimization (optimize). A universal HDF5 schema enforces reproducibility and interoperability, allowing GPU-simulated and experimentally acquired trajectories to enter the same downstream workflow without modification. Demonstrated capabilities include simulations of Origami tessellations, video-based trajectory extraction from a physical reservoir, and a common interface for standardized PRC benchmarking, correlation diagnostics, and capacity analysis. The longer-term vision is to serve as a standardizing layer for the PRC community, compatible with external physics engines including PyBullet, PyElastica, and MERLIN.

AI.tldr: OpenPRC是一个开源Python框架，为物理储层计算提供统一的物理到任务流程，包含GPU加速物理引擎、实验数据摄取、模块化学习层、分析工具和物理感知优化，通过通用HDF5模式确保可重复性和互操作性。
AI.motivation: 当前物理储层计算（PRC）的开发与评估工作流程碎片化，缺乏能够统一处理高保真模拟轨迹和真实实验测量的框架，无法实现跨基底和数据源的可重复评估、分析和物理感知优化。
AI.method: 开发OpenPRC开源框架，采用模式驱动的物理到任务流程，包含五个核心模块：GPU加速的混合RK4-PBD物理引擎（demlat）、基于视频的实验数据摄取层（openprc.vision）、模块化学习层（reservoir）、信息论分析与基准测试工具（analysis）以及物理感知优化模块（optimize）。通过通用HDF5模式确保可重复性和互操作性。
AI.result: 展示了框架的多项能力：折纸镶嵌模拟、基于视频的物理储层轨迹提取、标准化PRC基准测试、相关性诊断和容量分析的通用接口。实现了GPU模拟和实验获取轨迹的无缝集成。
AI.conclusion: OpenPRC填补了PRC领域统一框架的空白，旨在成为PRC社区的标准化层，兼容外部物理引擎如PyBullet、PyElastica和MERLIN，促进可重复评估、分析和优化。

title: L2D-Clinical: Learning to Defer for Adaptive Model Selection in Clinical Text Classification
summary: Clinical text classification requires choosing between specialized fine-tuned models (BERT variants) and general-purpose large language models (LLMs), yet neither dominates across all instances. We introduce Learning to Defer for clinical text (L2D-Clinical), a framework that learns when a BERT classifier should defer to an LLM based on uncertainty signals and text characteristics. Unlike prior L2D work that defers to human experts assumed universally superior, our approach enables adaptive deferral-improving accuracy when the LLM complements BERT. We evaluate on two English clinical tasks: (1) ADE detection (ADE Corpus V2), where BioBERT (F1=0.911) outperforms the LLM (F1=0.765), and (2) treatment outcome classification (MIMIC-IV with multi-LLM consensus ground truth), where GPT-5-nano (F1=0.967) outperforms ClinicalBERT (F1=0.887). On ADE, L2D-Clinical achieves F1=0.928 (+1.7 points over BERT) by selectively deferring 7% of instances where the LLM's high recall compensates for BERT's misses. On MIMIC, L2D-Clinical achieves F1=0.980 (+9.3 points over BERT) by deferring only 16.8\% of cases to the LLM. The key insight is that L2D-Clinical learns to selectively leverage LLM strengths while minimizing API costs.

AI.tldr: 提出了L2D-Clinical框架，通过学习BERT分类器何时应该基于不确定性信号和文本特征将决策推迟给LLM，在临床文本分类任务中实现自适应推迟，提升准确率同时控制API成本。
AI.motivation: 临床文本分类需要在专门的微调模型（BERT变体）和通用大语言模型（LLM）之间选择，但两者在不同实例中各有优势。现有学习推迟（L2D）方法假设人类专家总是更优，但LLM并非在所有情况下都优于BERT。需要一种能自适应决定何时使用BERT、何时使用LLM的框架。
AI.method: 提出L2D-Clinical框架，通过学习BERT分类器何时应该基于不确定性信号和文本特征将决策推迟给LLM。框架使用不确定性度量和文本特征来预测何时LLM能补充BERT的不足，实现自适应推迟决策。
AI.result: 在两个英文临床任务上评估：1）ADE检测（ADE Corpus V2）：BioBERT（F1=0.911）优于LLM（F1=0.765），L2D-Clinical达到F1=0.928（比BERT提升1.7分），仅推迟7%实例；2）治疗结果分类（MIMIC-IV）：GPT-5-nano（F1=0.967）优于ClinicalBERT（F1=0.887），L2D-Clinical达到F1=0.980（比BERT提升9.3分），仅推迟16.8%实例。
AI.conclusion: L2D-Clinical框架能有效学习选择性利用LLM优势，在BERT和LLM各有优势的临床文本分类任务中实现性能提升，同时通过控制推迟比例最小化API成本。关键洞察是自适应推迟机制能根据具体任务需求优化模型组合。

title: Robust Quadruped Locomotion via Evolutionary Reinforcement Learning
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures. Accepted to the 11th International Conference on Control and Robotics Engineering (ICCRE 2026), Kyoto, Japan, May, 2026, www.iccre.org
summary: Deep reinforcement learning has recently achieved strong results in quadrupedal locomotion, yet policies trained in simulation often fail to transfer when the environment changes. Evolutionary reinforcement learning aims to address this limitation by combining gradient-based policy optimisation with population-driven exploration. This work evaluates four methods on a simulated walking task: DDPG, TD3, and two Cross-Entropy-based variants CEM-DDPG and CEM-TD3. All agents are trained on flat terrain and later tested both on this domain and on a rough terrain not encountered during training. TD3 performs best among the standard deep RL baselines on flat ground with a mean reward of 5927.26, while CEM-TD3 achieves the highest rewards overall during training and evaluation 17611.41. Under the rough-terrain transfer test, performance of the deep RL methods drops sharply. DDPG achieves -1016.32 and TD3 achieves -99.73, whereas the evolutionary variants retain much of their capability. CEM-TD3 records the strongest transfer performance with a mean reward of 19574.33. These findings suggest that incorporating evolutionary search can reduce overfitting and improve policy robustness in locomotion tasks, particularly when deployment conditions differ from those seen during training.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了深度强化学习与进化强化学习方法在四足机器人行走任务中的表现，发现结合进化搜索的CEM-TD3方法在训练和迁移到未见过地形时表现最优，显著提高了策略的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在四足机器人运动控制中取得了进展，但在仿真中训练的策略往往难以迁移到环境变化的情况。本研究旨在通过结合梯度策略优化和种群驱动探索的进化强化学习来解决这一局限性，提高策略的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.method: 研究评估了四种方法在仿真行走任务中的表现：标准深度强化学习方法DDPG和TD3，以及两种基于交叉熵的进化强化学习变体CEM-DDPG和CEM-TD3。所有智能体在平坦地形上训练，然后在平坦地形和未在训练中见过的崎岖地形上进行测试。
AI.result: 在平坦地形上，TD3在标准深度RL基线中表现最佳（平均奖励5927.26），而CEM-TD3在训练和评估中总体表现最优（17611.41）。在崎岖地形迁移测试中，深度RL方法性能急剧下降（DDPG：-1016.32，TD3：-99.73），而进化变体保留了大部分能力，CEM-TD3迁移性能最强（平均奖励19574.33）。
AI.conclusion: 结合进化搜索可以减少过拟合并提高运动任务中策略的鲁棒性，特别是在部署条件与训练条件不同的情况下。进化强化学习方法在未见过地形上表现出更好的迁移能力，为解决仿真到现实的差距问题提供了有前景的方向。

title: Fast Voxelization and Level of Detail for Microgeometry Rendering
comment: Accepted for publication in The Visual Computer. 16 pages, 7 figures, 3 tables. Supplementary material: https://javierfabre.com/projects/voxel-lod/supp.pdf
summary: Many materials show anisotropic light scattering patterns due to the shape and local alignment of their underlying micro structures: surfaces with small elements such as fibers, or the ridges of a brushed metal, are very sparse and require a high spatial resolution to be properly represented as a volume. The acquisition of voxel data from such objects is a time and memory-intensive task, and most rendering approaches require an additional Level-of-Detail (LoD) data structure to aggregate the visual appearance, as observed from multiple distances, in order to reduce the number of samples computed per pixel (E.g.: MIP mapping). In this work we introduce first, an efficient parallel voxelization method designed to facilitate fast data aggregation at multiple resolution levels, and second, a novel representation based on hierarchical SGGX clustering that provides better accuracy than baseline methods. We validate our approach with a CUDA-based implementation of the voxelizer, tested both on triangle meshes and volumetric fabrics modeled with explicit fibers. Finally, we show the results generated with a path tracer based on the proposed LoD rendering model.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种高效的并行体素化方法和基于分层SGGX聚类的表示方法，用于处理具有各向异性散射特性的稀疏微结构材料的渲染问题。
AI.motivation: 许多材料由于微观结构的形状和局部排列而表现出各向异性的光散射模式，如纤维表面或拉丝金属的脊线。这些稀疏结构需要高空间分辨率才能准确表示为体积数据，但体素数据的获取是时间和内存密集型的，且大多数渲染方法需要额外的LOD数据结构来聚合从不同距离观察到的视觉外观。
AI.method: 1. 设计了一种高效的并行体素化方法，支持多分辨率级别的快速数据聚合；2. 提出了一种基于分层SGGX聚类的新表示方法，比基线方法提供更好的精度；3. 使用基于CUDA的体素化器实现，在三角形网格和显式纤维建模的体素织物上进行测试；4. 基于提出的LOD渲染模型开发了路径追踪器。
AI.result: 验证了CUDA实现的体素化器在三角形网格和体素织物上的有效性，展示了基于提出的LOD渲染模型的路径追踪器生成的结果，表明新方法比基线方法具有更好的精度。
AI.conclusion: 提出的并行体素化方法和分层SGGX聚类表示能够有效处理稀疏微结构材料的渲染问题，在保持精度的同时提高了计算效率，为各向异性散射材料的实时渲染提供了可行方案。

title: An RTK-SLAM Dataset for Absolute Accuracy Evaluation in GNSS-Degraded Environments
summary: RTK-SLAM systems integrate simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) with real-time kinematic (RTK) GNSS positioning, promising both relative consistency and globally referenced coordinates for efficient georeferenced surveying. A critical and underappreciated issue is that the standard evaluation metric, Absolute Trajectory Error (ATE), first fits an optimal rigid-body transformation between the estimated trajectory and reference before computing errors. This so-called SE(3) alignment absorbs global drift and systematic errors, making trajectories appear more accurate than they are in practice, and is unsuitable for evaluating the global accuracy of RTK-SLAM. We present a geodetically referenced dataset and evaluation methodology that expose this gap. A key design principle is that the RTK receiver is used solely as a system input, while ground truth is established independently via a geodetic total station. This separation is absent from all existing datasets, where GNSS typically serves as (part of) the ground truth. The dataset is collected with a handheld RTK-SLAM device, comprising two scenes. We evaluate LiDAR-inertial, visual-inertial, and LiDAR-visual-inertial RTK-SLAM systems alongside standalone RTK, reporting direct global accuracy and SE(3)-aligned relative accuracy to make the gap explicit. Results show that SE(3) alignment can underestimate absolute positioning error by up to 76\%. RTK-SLAM achieves centimeter-level absolute accuracy in open-sky conditions and maintains decimeter-level global accuracy indoors, where standalone RTK degrades to tens of meters. The dataset, calibration files, and evaluation scripts are publicly available at https://rtk-slam-dataset.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 论文指出RTK-SLAM系统评估中标准ATE指标存在缺陷，提出新的数据集和评估方法，揭示SE(3)对齐会低估绝对定位误差达76%
AI.motivation: RTK-SLAM系统结合了SLAM的局部一致性和RTK GNSS的全局参考坐标，但现有评估方法存在严重问题。标准ATE指标通过SE(3)对齐吸收全局漂移和系统误差，使轨迹看起来比实际更准确，无法评估RTK-SLAM的全局精度。现有数据集通常将GNSS作为地面真值的一部分，缺乏独立的地面真值验证。
AI.method: 提出地理参考数据集和评估方法：1）RTK接收器仅作为系统输入，地面真值通过大地测量全站仪独立建立；2）使用手持RTK-SLAM设备采集两个场景数据；3）评估LiDAR-惯性、视觉-惯性和LiDAR-视觉-惯性RTK-SLAM系统以及独立RTK；4）同时报告直接全局精度和SE(3)对齐的相对精度以明确差距。
AI.result: SE(3)对齐可能低估绝对定位误差达76%。RTK-SLAM在开阔天空条件下达到厘米级绝对精度，在室内保持分米级全局精度，而独立RTK在室内退化到数十米级误差。数据集、校准文件和评估脚本已公开。
AI.conclusion: 标准ATE评估方法不适合RTK-SLAM的全局精度评估，提出的新数据集和方法能更准确地评估系统性能。RTK-SLAM在室内外都能提供良好的全局精度，特别是在GNSS信号受限环境中优于独立RTK。需要新的评估标准来准确反映RTK-SLAM的实际性能。

title: Magnitude Is All You Need? Rethinking Phase in Quantum Encoding of Complex SAR Data
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures. Under review for IEEE QCE 2026
summary:
Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) data is inherently complex-valued, while quantum machine learning (QML) models naturally operate in complex Hilbert spaces. This apparent alignment suggests that incorporating both magnitude and phase information into quantum encoding should improve performance in SAR Automatic Target Recognition (ATR). In this work, we systematically evaluate this assumption by comparing five quantum encoding strategies: magnitude-only, joint complex, I/Q-based, preprocessed phase, and pure quantum, under a unified experimental framework on the MSTAR benchmark dataset.
  Contrary to expectation, we observe a consistent pattern: in hybrid quantum-classical architectures, magnitude-only encoding outperforms all complex-valued strategies, achieving 99.57% accuracy on a 3-class task and 71.19% on an 8-class task, while phase-aware methods provide negligible (~0%) or negative improvements. In contrast, in purely quantum architectures with only 184-224 trainable parameters and no classical components, phase information becomes essential, contributing up to 21.65% improvement in accuracy.
  These results reveal that the utility of phase information is not inherent to the data, but depends critically on the model architecture. Hybrid models rely on classical components that compensate for missing phase information, whereas purely quantum models require phase to construct discriminative representations. Our findings provide practical design guidelines for encoding complex-valued data in QML and highlight the importance of encoding-architecture co-design in the NISQ era.

AI.tldr: 量子机器学习中SAR数据编码策略的系统评估：幅度编码在混合架构中表现最佳，相位信息仅在纯量子架构中提供显著改进
AI.motivation: SAR数据本质上是复数值的，而量子机器学习模型自然在复希尔伯特空间中运行，这种表面上的对齐表明将幅度和相位信息纳入量子编码应该能提高SAR自动目标识别的性能
AI.method: 在MSTAR基准数据集上，通过统一实验框架比较五种量子编码策略：仅幅度编码、联合复数编码、I/Q基编码、预处理相位编码和纯量子编码，评估混合量子-经典架构和纯量子架构
AI.result: 出乎意料的是，在混合量子-经典架构中，仅幅度编码优于所有复数值策略，在3类任务上达到99.57%准确率，在8类任务上达到71.19%，而相位感知方法提供可忽略(~0%)或负面的改进。相反，在仅有184-224个可训练参数且无经典组件的纯量子架构中，相位信息变得至关重要，贡献高达21.65%的准确率提升
AI.conclusion: 相位信息的效用并非数据固有的，而是关键取决于模型架构。混合模型依赖经典组件补偿缺失的相位信息，而纯量子模型需要相位来构建判别性表示。这些发现为QML中复数值数据的编码提供了实用设计指南，并强调了NISQ时代编码-架构协同设计的重要性

title: Pareto-Optimal Offline Reinforcement Learning via Smooth Tchebysheff Scalarization
summary: Large language models can be aligned with human preferences through offline reinforcement learning (RL) on small labeled datasets. While single-objective alignment is well-studied, many real-world applications demand the simultaneous optimization of multiple conflicting rewards, e.g. optimizing both catalytic activity and specificity in protein engineering, or helpfulness and harmlessness for chatbots. Prior work has largely relied on linear reward scalarization, but this approach provably fails to recover non-convex regions of the Pareto front. In this paper, instead of scalarizing the rewards directly, we frame multi-objective RL itself as an optimization problem to be scalarized via smooth Tchebysheff scalarization, a recent technique that overcomes the shortcomings of linear scalarization. We use this formulation to derive Smooth Tchebysheff Optimization of Multi-Objective Preferences (STOMP), a novel offline RL algorithm that extends direct preference optimization to the multi-objective setting in a principled way by standardizing the individual rewards based on their observed distributions. We empirically validate STOMP on a range of protein engineering tasks by aligning three autoregressive protein language models on three laboratory datasets of protein fitness. Compared to state-of-the-art baselines, STOMP achieves the highest hypervolumes in eight of nine settings according to both offline off-policy and generative evaluations. We thus demonstrate that STOMP is a powerful, robust multi-objective alignment algorithm that can meaningfully improve post-trained models for multi-attribute protein optimization and beyond.

AI.tldr: STOMP是一种新颖的离线强化学习算法，通过平滑Tchebysheff标量化将多目标偏好优化扩展到多目标设置，在蛋白质工程任务中优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现实世界应用通常需要同时优化多个相互冲突的目标（如蛋白质工程中的催化活性和特异性，或聊天机器人中的帮助性和无害性）。传统的线性奖励标量化方法无法恢复帕累托前沿的非凸区域，因此需要更有效的多目标对齐算法。
AI.method: 将多目标强化学习本身构建为优化问题，通过平滑Tchebysheff标量化来解决线性标量化的局限性。提出STOMP算法，通过基于观察分布标准化个体奖励，将直接偏好优化扩展到多目标设置。
AI.result: 在三个蛋白质语言模型和三个实验室蛋白质适应度数据集上的实验表明，STOMP在九个设置中的八个实现了最高的超体积，在离线离策略和生成评估中均优于最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: STOMP是一种强大、稳健的多目标对齐算法，能够有意义地改进后训练模型，适用于多属性蛋白质优化及其他领域。

title: Flow Motion Policy: Manipulator Motion Planning with Flow Matching Models
summary: Open-loop end-to-end neural motion planners have recently been proposed to improve motion planning for robotic manipulators. These methods enable planning directly from sensor observations without relying on a privileged collision checker during planning. However, many existing methods generate only a single path for a given workspace across different runs, and do not leverage their open-loop structure for inference-time optimization. To address this limitation, we introduce Flow Motion Policy, an open-loop, end-to-end neural motion planner for robotic manipulators that leverages the stochastic generative formulation of flow matching methods to capture the inherent multi-modality of planning datasets. By modeling a distribution over feasible paths, Flow Motion Policy enables efficient inference-time best-of-$N$ sampling. The method generates multiple end-to-end candidate paths, evaluates their collision status after planning, and executes the first collision-free solution. We benchmark the Flow Motion Policy against representative sampling-based and neural motion planning methods. Evaluation results demonstrate that Flow Motion Policy improves planning success and efficiency, highlighting the effectiveness of stochastic generative policies for end-to-end motion planning and inference-time optimization. Experimental evaluation videos are available via this \href{https://zh.engr.tamu.edu/wp-content/uploads/sites/310/2026/03/FMP-Website.mp4}{link}.

AI.tldr: Flow Motion Policy是一种用于机器人操作臂的端到端神经运动规划器，利用流匹配的随机生成公式捕捉规划数据集的固有多模态特性，通过推理时最佳N采样提高规划成功率
AI.motivation: 现有开环端到端神经运动规划器通常为给定工作空间生成单一路径，无法利用其开环结构进行推理时优化，且未充分考虑规划数据集的多模态特性
AI.method: 基于流匹配方法的随机生成公式，建模可行路径的分布，实现推理时最佳N采样：生成多个端到端候选路径，规划后评估碰撞状态，执行第一个无碰撞解
AI.result: 与代表性采样基和神经运动规划方法相比，Flow Motion Policy提高了规划成功率和效率，证明了随机生成策略在端到端运动规划和推理时优化中的有效性
AI.conclusion: 流匹配的随机生成公式能有效捕捉规划数据集的多模态特性，通过推理时最佳N采样显著提升开环端到端神经运动规划器的性能

title: AEROS: A Single-Agent Operating Architecture with Embodied Capability Modules
comment: Submitted to Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence (EAAI). 48 pages, 5 figures, 9 tables
summary: Robotic systems lack a principled abstraction for organizing intelligence, capabilities, and execution in a unified manner. Existing approaches either couple skills within monolithic architectures or decompose functionality into loosely coordinated modules or multiple agents, often without a coherent model of identity and control authority. We argue that a robot should be modeled as a single persistent intelligent subject whose capabilities are extended through installable packages. We formalize this view as AEROS (Agent Execution Runtime Operating System), in which each robot corresponds to one persistent agent and capabilities are provided through Embodied Capability Modules (ECMs). Each ECM encapsulates executable skills, models, and tools, while execution constraints and safety guarantees are enforced by a policy-separated runtime. This separation enables modular extensibility, composable capability execution, and consistent system-level safety. We evaluate a reference implementation in PyBullet simulation with a Franka Panda 7-DOF manipulator across eight experiments covering re-planning, failure recovery, policy enforcement, baseline comparison, cross-task generality, ECM hot-swapping, ablation, and failure boundary analysis. Over 100 randomized trials per condition, AEROS achieves 100% task success across three tasks versus baselines (BehaviorTree.CPP-style and ProgPrompt-style at 92--93%, flat pipeline at 67--73%), the policy layer blocks all invalid actions with zero false acceptances, runtime benefits generalize across tasks without task-specific tuning, and ECMs load at runtime with 100% post-swap success.

AI.tldr: AEROS框架将机器人建模为单一持久智能主体，通过可安装的具身能力模块扩展能力，实现模块化扩展、可组合执行和系统级安全保证。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人系统缺乏统一的智能组织抽象，要么采用单体架构耦合技能，要么分解为松散协调的模块或多智能体，缺乏一致的身份和控制权限模型。需要一种将机器人视为单一持久智能主体的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出AEROS（Agent Execution Runtime Operating System）框架，每个机器人对应一个持久智能体，能力通过具身能力模块（ECMs）提供。ECMs封装可执行技能、模型和工具，执行约束和安全保证由策略分离的运行时强制执行。
AI.result: 在PyBullet仿真中，使用Franka Panda 7自由度机械臂进行8个实验评估：AEROS在三个任务中达到100%成功率（基线为67-93%）；策略层阻止所有无效动作（零误接受）；运行时优势跨任务泛化；ECMs运行时加载后100%成功。
AI.conclusion: AEROS提供了一种将机器人建模为单一持久智能主体的统一框架，通过ECMs实现模块化扩展和可组合执行，同时通过策略分离的运行时确保系统级安全，为机器人系统提供了新的抽象和组织原则。

title: CLAD: Efficient Log Anomaly Detection Directly on Compressed Representations
summary: The explosive growth of system logs makes streaming compression essential, yet existing log anomaly detection (LAD) methods incur severe pre-processing overhead by requiring full decompression and parsing. We introduce CLAD, the first deep learning framework to perform LAD directly on compressed byte streams. CLAD bypasses these bottlenecks by exploiting a key insight: normal logs compress into regular byte patterns, while anomalies systematically disrupt them. To extract these multi-scale deviations from opaque bytes, we propose a purpose-built architecture integrating a dilated convolutional byte encoder, a hybrid Transformer--mLSTM, and four-way aggregation pooling. This is coupled with a two-stage training strategy of masked pre-training and focal-contrastive fine-tuning to effectively handle severe class imbalance. Evaluated across five datasets, CLAD achieves a state-of-the-art average F1-score of 0.9909 and outperforms the best baseline by 2.72 percentage points. It delivers superior accuracy while completely eliminating decompression and parsing overheads, offering a robust solution that generalizes to structured streaming compressors.

AI.tldr: CLAD是首个直接在压缩字节流上进行日志异常检测的深度学习框架，无需解压和解析，利用正常日志压缩后字节模式的规律性来检测异常，在五个数据集上达到平均F1分数0.9909的SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 系统日志爆炸式增长使得流式压缩变得必要，但现有日志异常检测方法需要完全解压和解析，产生严重的预处理开销。需要一种能够直接在压缩数据上操作的方法来消除这些瓶颈。
AI.method: CLAD框架基于关键洞察：正常日志压缩成规则的字节模式，而异常会系统性地破坏这些模式。采用专门构建的架构，包括扩张卷积字节编码器、混合Transformer-mLSTM和四路聚合池化。使用两阶段训练策略：掩码预训练和焦点对比微调，以有效处理严重的类别不平衡。
AI.result: 在五个数据集上评估，CLAD实现了平均F1分数0.9909的SOTA性能，比最佳基线高出2.72个百分点。在完全消除解压和解析开销的同时提供卓越的准确性，并能泛化到结构化流式压缩器。
AI.conclusion: CLAD是首个直接在压缩字节流上进行日志异常检测的深度学习框架，通过利用压缩字节模式的规律性来检测异常，在保持高准确性的同时完全消除了预处理开销，为日志异常检测提供了鲁棒且高效的解决方案。

title: KITE: Keyframe-Indexed Tokenized Evidence for VLM-Based Robot Failure Analysis
summary: We present KITE, a training-free, keyframe-anchored, layout-grounded front-end that converts long robot-execution videos into compact, interpretable tokenized evidence for vision-language models (VLMs). KITE distills each trajectory into a small set of motion-salient keyframes with open-vocabulary detections and pairs each keyframe with a schematic bird's-eye-view (BEV) representation that encodes relative object layout, axes, timestamps, and detection confidence. These visual cues are serialized with robot-profile and scene-context tokens into a unified prompt, allowing the same front-end to support failure detection, identification, localization, explanation, and correction with an off-the-shelf VLM. On the RoboFAC benchmark, KITE with Qwen2.5-VL substantially improves over vanilla Qwen2.5-VL in the training-free setting, with especially large gains on simulation failure detection, identification, and localization, while remaining competitive with a RoboFAC-tuned baseline. A small QLoRA fine-tune further improves explanation and correction quality. We also report qualitative results on real dual-arm robots, demonstrating the practical applicability of KITE as a structured and interpretable front-end for robot failure analysis. Code and models are released on our project page: https://m80hz.github.io/kite/

AI.tldr: KITE是一个无需训练、基于关键帧锚定、布局接地的前端系统，将长机器人执行视频转换为紧凑、可解释的标记化证据，供视觉语言模型使用，支持机器人故障检测、识别、定位、解释和纠正。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理长机器人执行视频时面临效率低、可解释性差的问题，需要一种能够将复杂视频信息压缩为结构化表示的方法，以支持全面的机器人故障分析。
AI.method: KITE通过提取运动显著的关键帧，结合开放词汇检测，为每个关键帧生成包含相对物体布局、轴、时间戳和检测置信度的鸟瞰图表示，将这些视觉线索与机器人配置和场景上下文标记序列化为统一提示。
AI.result: 在RoboFAC基准测试中，KITE与Qwen2.5-VL结合在无需训练设置下显著优于原始Qwen2.5-VL，在模拟故障检测、识别和定位方面提升尤其明显，同时与RoboFAC调优基线保持竞争力。QLoRA微调进一步提升了解释和纠正质量。
AI.conclusion: KITE作为一种结构化、可解释的前端系统，能够有效支持机器人故障分析，在模拟和真实双手机器人场景中均表现出实用性和有效性。

title: Classical and Quantum Speedups for Non-Convex Optimization via Energy Conserving Descent
summary:
The Energy Conserving Descent (ECD) algorithm was recently proposed (De Luca & Silverstein, 2022) as a global non-convex optimization method. Unlike gradient descent, appropriately configured ECD dynamics escape strict local minima and converge to a global minimum, making it appealing for machine learning optimization.
  We present the first analytical study of ECD, focusing on the one-dimensional setting for this first installment. We formalize a stochastic ECD dynamics (sECD) with energy-preserving noise, as well as a quantum analog of the ECD Hamiltonian (qECD), providing the foundation for a quantum algorithm through Hamiltonian simulation.
  For positive double-well objectives, we compute the expected hitting time from a local to the global minimum. We prove that both sECD and qECD yield exponential speedup over respective gradient descent baselines--stochastic gradient descent and its quantization. For objectives with tall barriers, qECD achieves a further speedup over sECD.

AI.tldr: 本文首次对能量守恒下降（ECD）算法进行理论分析，在一维设置下研究其随机版本（sECD）和量子模拟版本（qECD），证明两者在双井势能函数上都能实现相对于梯度下降基线的指数级加速。
AI.motivation: ECD算法作为全局非凸优化方法，能够逃离严格局部极小值并收敛到全局最小值，这使其在机器学习优化中具有吸引力。然而，ECD缺乏理论分析，本文旨在填补这一空白，为量子算法提供理论基础。
AI.method: 在一维设置下形式化随机ECD动力学（sECD）和量子ECD哈密顿量（qECD）。对于正双井目标函数，计算从局部最小值到全局最小值的预期命中时间。通过哈密顿模拟为量子算法奠定基础。
AI.result: 证明sECD和qECD相对于各自的梯度下降基线（随机梯度下降及其量子化）都能实现指数级加速。对于具有高势垒的目标函数，qECD相比sECD能获得进一步的加速。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次为ECD算法提供了严格的理论分析，证明其在一维非凸优化中的优越性能，并为量子优化算法的发展奠定了基础。qECD在特定条件下能提供比经典sECD更快的收敛速度。

title: Formally Guaranteed Control Adaptation for ODD-Resilient Autonomous Systems
summary: Ensuring reliable performance in situations outside the Operational Design Domain (ODD) remains a primary challenge in devising resilient autonomous systems. We explore this challenge by introducing an approach for adapting probabilistic system models to handle out-of-ODD scenarios while, in parallel, providing quantitative guarantees. Our approach dynamically extends the coverage of existing system situation capabilities, supporting the verification and adaptation of the system's behaviour under unanticipated situations. Preliminary results demonstrate that our approach effectively increases system reliability by adapting its behaviour and providing formal guarantees even under unforeseen out-of-ODD situations.

AI.tldr: 提出一种自适应概率系统模型方法，用于处理超出设计域(ODD)的场景，同时提供定量保证，增强自主系统在意外情况下的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 确保自主系统在超出操作设计域(ODD)情况下的可靠性能是构建弹性自主系统的主要挑战，需要能够处理意外场景并提供定量保证的方法。
AI.method: 引入自适应概率系统模型方法，动态扩展现有系统态势能力覆盖范围，支持在未预期情况下对系统行为进行验证和适应。
AI.result: 初步结果表明，该方法通过自适应行为调整和提供形式化保证，有效提高了系统在不可预见的ODD外情况下的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法能够增强自主系统在意外情况下的弹性，通过动态扩展系统能力覆盖范围并提供定量保证，为解决ODD外场景的可靠性挑战提供了有效途径。

title: Rethinking On-Policy Distillation of Large Language Models: Phenomenology, Mechanism, and Recipe
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) has become a core technique in the post-training of large language models, yet its training dynamics remain poorly understood. This paper provides a systematic investigation of OPD dynamics and mechanisms. We first identify that two conditions govern whether OPD succeeds or fails: (i) the student and teacher should share compatible thinking patterns; and (ii) even with consistent thinking patterns and higher scores, the teacher must offer genuinely new capabilities beyond what the student has seen during training. We validate these findings through weak-to-strong reverse distillation, showing that same-family 1.5B and 7B teachers are distributionally indistinguishable from the student's perspective. Probing into the token-level mechanism, we show that successful OPD is characterized by progressive alignment on high-probability tokens at student-visited states, a small shared token set that concentrates most of the probability mass (97%-99%). We further propose two practical strategies to recover failing OPD: off-policy cold start and teacher-aligned prompt selection. Finally, we show that OPD's apparent free lunch of dense token-level reward comes at a cost, raising the question of whether OPD can scale to long-horizon distillation.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了在线策略蒸馏（OPD）的训练动态和机制，揭示了OPD成功或失败的两个关键条件，并提出了恢复失败OPD的实用策略。
AI.motivation: 尽管在线策略蒸馏已成为大语言模型后训练的核心技术，但其训练动态机制仍缺乏深入理解。本文旨在系统研究OPD的动态过程和内在机制，为实际应用提供理论指导。
AI.method: 通过弱到强反向蒸馏实验验证条件假设；分析token级机制，识别高概率token的渐进对齐特征；提出两种恢复失败OPPD的策略：离策略冷启动和教师对齐提示选择。
AI.result: 发现OPD成功的两个关键条件：师生需共享兼容的思维模式；教师需提供学生训练中未见的新能力。成功OPD表现为在师生访问状态下高概率token的渐进对齐，这些token仅占很小比例（97%-99%概率质量）。提出的恢复策略能有效改善失败OPD。
AI.conclusion: OPD的成功依赖于师生思维模式的兼容性和教师提供的新能力，其密集token级奖励的"免费午餐"存在代价，引发了对OPD能否扩展到长视野蒸馏的疑问。

title: Lightning OPD: Efficient Post-Training for Large Reasoning Models with Offline On-Policy Distillation
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) has emerged as an efficient post-training paradigm for large language models. However, standard OPD requires a live teacher inference server throughout training, resulting in substantial infrastructure overhead. In this work, we investigate whether on-policy distillation can be performed offline. A natural approach is to precompute teacher log-probabilities once over SFT rollouts and reuse them during training. In practice, however, this offline variant fails to reliably match the performance of standard OPD. To understand this discrepancy, we identify a previously overlooked condition that is critical for any OPD pipeline, which we term teacher consistency. This condition requires that the same teacher model be used for both supervised fine-tuning and OPD. We show that violating teacher consistency introduces an irreducible gradient bias, causing both offline and online OPD to converge to a suboptimal fixed point regardless of training duration. Building on this insight, we propose Lightning OPD, an offline on-policy distillation framework that enforces teacher consistency by precomputing teacher log-probabilities over SFT rollouts. This design eliminates the need for a live teacher server entirely. We further show that, under teacher consistency, Lightning OPD shares the same optimum as standard OPD, with bounded gradient discrepancy and an implicit regularization effect that helps prevent policy drift. Extensive experiments on mathematical reasoning and code generation demonstrate that Lightning OPD achieves state-of-the-art performance with significantly improved efficiency. Starting from an SFT-initialized Qwen3-8B-Base model, Lightning OPD reaches 69.9% on AIME 2024 in just 30 GPU hours, achieving a 4.0x speedup over standard OPD and substantially lowering the barrier to entry for academic research on LLM post-training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Lightning OPD，一种离线策略蒸馏框架，通过预计算教师模型在SFT轨迹上的对数概率来确保教师一致性，从而消除实时教师服务器的需求，在保持标准OPD性能的同时大幅提升训练效率。
AI.motivation: 标准在线策略蒸馏需要实时教师推理服务器，导致巨大的基础设施开销。离线OPD的简单实现（预计算教师对数概率）在实践中无法可靠匹配标准OPD的性能，需要深入理解这种差异的根本原因。
AI.method: 首先识别了教师一致性这一关键条件：要求监督微调和OPD使用相同的教师模型。提出Lightning OPD框架，通过预计算教师模型在SFT轨迹上的对数概率来确保教师一致性，完全消除实时教师服务器的需求。理论分析表明，在教师一致性条件下，Lightning OPD与标准OPD共享相同的最优点，具有有界的梯度差异和防止策略漂移的隐式正则化效果。
AI.result: 在数学推理和代码生成任务上的广泛实验表明，Lightning OPD实现了最先进的性能并显著提升效率。从SFT初始化的Qwen3-8B-Base模型开始，仅用30GPU小时就在AIME 2024上达到69.9%，相比标准OPD实现4.0倍加速，大幅降低了LLM后训练的学术研究门槛。
AI.conclusion: 教师一致性是OPD成功的关键条件，违反该条件会导致不可约的梯度偏差和次优固定点。Lightning OPD通过离线方式确保教师一致性，在保持性能的同时大幅提升效率，为LLM后训练研究提供了更易访问的解决方案。

title: Causal Diffusion Models for Counterfactual Outcome Distributions in Longitudinal Data
summary: Predicting counterfactual outcomes in longitudinal data, where sequential treatment decisions heavily depend on evolving patient states, is critical yet notoriously challenging due to complex time-dependent confounding and inadequate uncertainty quantification in existing methods. We introduce the Causal Diffusion Model (CDM), the first denoising diffusion probabilistic approach explicitly designed to generate full probabilistic distributions of counterfactual outcomes under sequential interventions. CDM employs a novel residual denoising architecture with relational self-attention, capturing intricate temporal dependencies and multimodal outcome trajectories without requiring explicit adjustments (e.g., inverse-probability weighting or adversarial balancing) for confounding. In rigorous evaluation on a pharmacokinetic-pharmacodynamic tumor-growth simulator widely adopted in prior work, CDM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art longitudinal causal inference methods, achieving a 15-30% relative improvement in distributional accuracy (1-Wasserstein distance) while maintaining competitive or superior point-estimate accuracy (RMSE) under high-confounding regimes. By unifying uncertainty quantification and robust counterfactual prediction in complex, sequentially confounded settings, without tailored deconfounding, CDM offers a flexible, high-impact tool for decision support in medicine, policy evaluation, and other longitudinal domains.

AI.tldr: CDM是首个基于去噪扩散概率模型的方法，用于生成序列干预下的反事实结果完整概率分布，无需显式去混杂调整，在复杂时间依赖混杂场景中显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 纵向数据中反事实结果预测面临两大挑战：1）序列治疗决策高度依赖患者状态的动态演变，存在复杂的时间依赖混杂；2）现有方法在不确定性量化方面不足。需要一种能生成完整概率分布、无需显式去混杂调整的稳健方法。
AI.method: 提出因果扩散模型（CDM），采用创新的残差去噪架构和关系自注意力机制，捕捉复杂的时间依赖性和多模态结果轨迹。该方法无需逆概率加权或对抗平衡等显式去混杂调整，直接通过扩散模型学习反事实结果分布。
AI.result: 在药代动力学-药效学肿瘤生长模拟器上评估，CDM在分布准确性（1-Wasserstein距离）上相对提升15-30%，在高混杂场景下保持竞争性或更优的点估计准确性（RMSE），显著优于现有纵向因果推断方法。
AI.conclusion: CDM首次将不确定性量化和稳健反事实预测统一于复杂序列混杂场景，无需定制化去混杂，为医学决策支持、政策评估等纵向领域提供了灵活高效的工具。
